Genesis1:1 O KĨAMBĨRĨRIA-RĨ
Genesis1:2 Nayo thĩ ndĩarĩ ũrĩa yatariĩ; yarĩ o ũguo ũtheri; o nakuo kũu guothe kũriku gũtarĩ gĩturi kwahumbĩtwo no nduma. Na roho wa Ngai aatũire acuhĩrĩire kũu maĩ maarĩ.
Genesis1:3 Nake Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis1:4 Naguo ũtheri ũcio Ngai akĩwona atĩ nĩ mwega; ningĩ Ngai akĩamũrania ũtheri na nduma.
Genesis1:5 Naguo ũtheri ũcio Ngai akĩũtua Mũthenya
Genesis1:6 Ningĩ Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis1:7 Nake Ngai agĩĩkĩra mũtambũrũko ũcio
Genesis1:8 Ngai agĩgĩtua mũtambũrũko ũcio wa matu-mairũ Igũrũ. Nakuo gũkĩgĩa hwaĩ-inĩ
Genesis1:9 Ningĩ Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis1:10 Ngai agĩgĩtua kũndũ kũu kũniaru Thĩ
Genesis1:11 Ningĩ Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis1:12 Nayo thĩ ĩkĩmera nyeki
Genesis1:13 Nakuo gũkĩgĩa hwaĩ-inĩ
Genesis1:14 Ningĩ Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis1:15 ningĩ ituĩke imũrĩ mũtambũrũko-inĩ ũcio wa matu-mairũ ma igũrũ cia gũtũmaga thĩ ĩgĩe na ũtheri; gũgĩtuĩka o ũguo.
Genesis1:16 Ngai agĩkĩũmba imũrĩ iria igĩrĩ nene
Genesis1:17 We Ngai agĩkĩiga imũrĩ icio mũtambũrũko inĩ ũcio wa matu-mairũ ma igũrũ itũmage thĩ ĩgĩe ũtheri
Genesis1:18 na ciathage mũthenya na ũtukũ
Genesis1:19 Nakuo gũkĩgĩa hwaĩ-inĩ
Genesis1:20 Ningĩ Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis1:21 Ningĩ Ngai agĩtũma kũgĩe nyamũ iria nene mũno cia iria rĩrĩa inene
Genesis1:22 We Ngai agĩgĩcirathima
Genesis1:23 Nakuo gũkĩgĩa hwaĩ-inĩ
Genesis1:24 Ningĩ Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis1:25 We Ngai agĩkĩũmba nyamũ cia werũ
Genesis1:26 Ningĩ Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis1:27 We Ngai agĩgĩtũma kũgĩe andũ
Genesis1:28 Nake Ngai agĩkĩmarathima
Genesis1:29 Ningĩ Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis1:30 nayo nyamũ o yothe ya werũ
Genesis1:31 Ngai agĩkĩona atĩ kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩrĩa ombĩte nĩ kĩega mũno. Nakuo gũkĩgĩa hwaĩ-inĩ
Genesis2:1 Igũrũ na thĩ gũgĩkĩrĩka o kũrĩka
Genesis2:2 naguo mũthenya wa mũgwanja Ngai agĩkorũo arĩkĩtie wĩra ũcio wake aarutaga wa ũũmbi; ningĩ mũthenya o ũcio wa mũgwanja akĩhurũka atiganĩte na wĩra wake wothe ũcio aarutĩte wa ũũmbi.
Genesis2:3 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis2:4 Kĩu nĩkĩo kĩhumo kĩa igũrũ na gĩa thĩ
Genesis2:5 Na hĩndĩ ĩo thĩ ndĩakoretwo ĩgĩĩte kamũtĩ o na kamwe ga gĩthaka
Genesis2:6 no rĩrĩ
Genesis2:7 Nake Jehova Ngai akĩũmba mũndũ na rũkũngũ rũa thĩ
Genesis2:8 Naguo mwena ũrĩa riũa rĩrathagĩra
Genesis2:9 Naguo tĩri Jehova Ngai agĩtũma ũmere mũtĩ o wothe wa kwendeka ũkĩonwo
Genesis2:10 Na kwarĩ rũũĩ rũoimĩte kũu Edeni rũa kuunithagĩria mũgũnda ũcio maĩ; naruo rũoima hau
Genesis2:11 Rĩĩtwa rĩa ũrĩa wa mbere nĩ Pishoni
Genesis2:12 nayo thahabu ya bũrũri ũcio nĩ njega
Genesis2:13 Na rĩĩtwa rĩa rũũĩ rũa kerĩ nĩ Gihoni
Genesis2:14 Na rĩĩtwa rĩa rũũĩ rũa gatatũ nĩ Hidekeli
Genesis2:15 Nake Jehova Ngai agĩtwara mũndũ ũcio ombĩte akĩmũiga mũgũnda ũcio warĩ kũu Edeni
Genesis2:16 Nake Jehova Ngai agĩatha mũndũ ũcio
Genesis2:17 no rĩrĩ
Genesis2:18 Ningĩ Jehova Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis2:19 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis2:20 Nake mũndũ ũcio agĩtua mahiũ mothe marĩĩtwa
Genesis2:21 Nake Jehova Ngai agĩtũma mũndũ ũcio agwatwo nĩ toro mũnene mũno
Genesis2:22 naruo rũbaru rũu Jehova Ngai aarutire mũndũ ũcio
Genesis2:23 Nake mũndũ ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis2:24 Tondũ wa ũguo-rĩ
Genesis2:25 Nao acio erĩ
Genesis3:1 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis3:2 Nake mũndũ mũka agĩcokeria nyamũ-ya-thĩ
Genesis3:3 no rĩrĩ
Genesis3:4 Nayo nyamũ-ya-thĩ ĩkĩĩra mũndũ mũka atĩrĩ
Genesis3:5 nĩ gũkorũo Ngai nĩoĩ atĩ mũthenya ũrĩa mũkamarĩa
Genesis3:6 Nake mũndũ mũka ũcio rĩrĩa onire atĩ mũtĩ ũcio nĩ mwega wa kuuma irio
Genesis3:7 Namo maitho mao o erĩ makĩhingũka
Genesis3:8 Nao makĩigua mũgambo wa Jehova Ngai agĩceeranga kũu mũgũnda riũa rĩarura
Genesis3:9 Nake Jehova Ngai agĩĩta mũndũ ũcio
Genesis3:10 Nake akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis3:11 Nake akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Genesis3:12 Nake mũndũ ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis3:13 Nake Jehova Ngai agĩcoka akĩũria mũndũ mũka ũcio atĩrĩ
Genesis3:14 Nake Jehova Ngai akĩĩra nyamũ-ya-thĩ atĩrĩ
Genesis3:15 na ningĩ nĩngũtũma inyuĩ na mũndũ mũka ũyũ mũgĩe ũthũ
Genesis3:16 Ningĩ agĩcoka akĩĩra mũndũ mũka atĩrĩ
Genesis3:17 Ningĩ akĩĩra Adamu o nake atĩrĩ
Genesis3:18 naguo nĩũgũkũmerera mĩigua
Genesis3:19 irio ciaku-rĩ
Genesis3:20 Nake mũndũ ũcio aatuire mũka Hawa
Genesis3:21 Ningĩ Jehova Ngai agĩthondekera Adamu o na mũka nguo cia njũa
Genesis3:22 Nake Jehova Ngai akiuga ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Genesis3:23 tondũ ũcio-rĩ
Genesis3:24 Agĩkĩrutũrũra mũndũ ũcio
Genesis4:1 Nake mũndũ ũcio akĩonana na mũka ũcio wake Hawa
Genesis4:2 Na ningĩ agĩciara Habili
Genesis4:3 Namo matukũ maathiathia
Genesis4:4 O nake Habili agĩtwara mbũri imwe ciake iria ciarigithathĩtwo nĩ mbũri cia rũru rũake
Genesis4:5 no rĩrĩ
Genesis4:6 Nake Jehova akĩũria Kaini atĩrĩ
Genesis4:7 Githĩ ũngĩĩka wega
Genesis4:8 Nake Kaini akĩĩra Habili mũrũ wa nyina ũhoro ũcio. Na rĩrĩ
Genesis4:9 Nake Jehova akĩũria Kaini atĩrĩ. Mũrũ wa nyũkwa Habili-rĩ
Genesis4:10 Nake akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Genesis4:11 Na rĩu
Genesis4:12 warĩma mũgũnda
Genesis4:13 Nake Kaini akĩĩra Jehova atĩrĩ
Genesis4:14 Atĩrĩ
Genesis4:15 Nake Jehova akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis4:16 Nake Kaini akiuma harĩ Jehova
Genesis4:17 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis4:18 Nake Enoku agĩciara Iradu
Genesis4:19 Nake Lameku ũcio akĩhikia aka erĩ; ũmwe wao etagwo Ada
Genesis4:20 Nake Ada agĩciara Jabali; ũcio nĩwe ithe wa andũ arĩa matũũraga hema-inĩ na makagĩa na indo cia thakame.
Genesis4:21 Nake mũrũ wa nyina etagwo Jubali
Genesis4:22 Nake ũcio wetagwo Zila agĩciara Tubali-Kaini
Genesis4:23 Nake Lameku akĩĩra aka acio ake ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Genesis4:24 Kũngĩkorũo Kaini akarĩhĩrio maita mũgwanja-rĩ
Genesis4:25 Ningĩ Adamu agĩcoka akĩonana na mũka rĩngĩ; nake agĩciara kahĩĩ
Genesis4:26 O nake Sethu agĩciarĩrũo kahĩĩ
Genesis5:1 Rĩrĩ nĩrĩo ibuku rĩa njiaro cia Adamu. Mũthenya ũrĩa Ngai aatũmire andũ magĩe-rĩ
Genesis5:2 agĩgĩtũma magĩe kuo marĩ mũndũ mũrũme na mũndũ mũka; na mũthenya ũcio aatũmire magĩe kuo-rĩ
Genesis5:3 Nake Adamu aatũũra mĩaka igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩtatũ
Genesis5:4 ningĩ matukũ marĩa Adamu aacokire gũtũũra muoyo aarĩkia gũciara Sethu
Genesis5:5 Namo matukũ mothe marĩa Adamu aatũũrire muoyo nĩ mĩaka magana kenda ma mĩrongo ĩtatũ
Genesis5:6 Nake Sethu aakinyia mĩaka igana na ĩtano
Genesis5:7 na aarĩkia gũciara Enoshu
Genesis5:8 Namo matukũ mothe ma Sethu maarĩ mĩaka magana kenda ma ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ
Genesis5:9 Nake Enoshu aakinyia mĩaka mĩrongo kenda
Genesis5:10 na aarĩkia gũciara Kenani
Genesis5:11 Namo matukũ mothe ma Enoshu maarĩ mĩaka magana kenda na ĩtano
Genesis5:12 Nake Kenani aakinyia mĩaka mĩrongo mũgwanja
Genesis5:13 na aarĩkia gũciara Mahalaleli
Genesis5:14 Namo matukũ mothe ma Kenani maarĩ mĩaka magana kenda na ikũmi
Genesis5:15 Nake Mahalaleli aakinyia mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na ĩtano
Genesis5:16 na aarĩkia gũciara Jaredu
Genesis5:17 Namo matukũ mothe ma Mahalaleli maarĩ mĩaka magana manana ma mĩrongo kenda na ĩtano
Genesis5:18 Nake Jaredu aakinyia mĩaka igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na ĩĩrĩ
Genesis5:19 na aarĩkia gũciara Enoku
Genesis5:20 Namo matukũ mothe ma Jaredu maarĩ mĩaka magana kenda ma mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na ĩĩrĩ
Genesis5:21 Nake Enoku aakinyia mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na ĩtano
Genesis5:22 na aarĩkia gũciara Methusela
Genesis5:23 Namo matukũ mothe ma Enoku maarĩ mĩaka magana matatũ ma mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na ĩtano
Genesis5:24 nake Enoku ũcio nĩaatũũrire e mũthiritũ wa Ngai
Genesis5:25 Nake Methusela aakinyia mĩaka igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩnana na mũgwanja
Genesis5:26 na aarĩkia gũciara Lameku
Genesis5:27 Namo matukũ mothe ma Methusela maarĩ mĩaka magana kenda ma mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na kenda
Genesis5:28 Nake Lameku aakinyia mĩaka igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩnana na ĩĩrĩ
Genesis5:29 agĩgatua Nuhu
Genesis5:30 Nake Lameku aarĩkia gũciara Nuhu
Genesis5:31 Namo matukũ mothe ma Lameku maarĩ mĩaka magana mũgwanja ma mĩrongo mũgwanja na mũgwanja
Genesis5:32 Nake Nuhu aakinyia mĩaka magana matano
Genesis6:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Genesis6:2 ariũ a Ngai makĩona atĩ airĩtu a andũ nĩ athaka; magĩkĩhikia o arĩa methurĩire magatuĩke aka ao.
Genesis6:3 Nake Jehova akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis6:4 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis6:5 Nake Jehova akĩona atĩ ũũru wa andũ warĩ mũingĩ mũno gũkũ thĩ
Genesis6:6 Nake Jehova agĩkĩĩrira nĩ ũndũ wa kũũmba mũndũ atũũre gũkũ thĩ; ũndũ ũcio ũkĩmũiguithia ũũru ngoro.
Genesis6:7 Nake Jehova akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis6:8 No rĩrĩ
Genesis6:9 ICI NĨCIO njiaro cia Nuhu. Nuhu aarĩ mũndũ mũthingu
Genesis6:10 Nake Nuhu agĩciara ihĩĩ ithatũ
Genesis6:11 Nakuo gũkũ thĩ gwakorirũo gwĩ kũũru gũkĩonwo nĩ Ngai
Genesis6:12 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis6:13 Nake Ngai akĩĩra Nuhu atĩrĩ Ũrĩa nguona-rĩ
Genesis6:14 Wĩakĩre thabina na mĩtĩ ya thithinda
Genesis6:15 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis6:16 Na ningĩ ũthondeke mwanya wa kũrehe ũtheri thabina-inĩ ĩo
Genesis6:17 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis6:18 No rĩrĩ
Genesis6:19 Nakĩo kĩrĩa gĩothe kĩĩ na muoyo kĩa mwĩrĩ o na ũrĩkũ wa nyama-rĩ
Genesis6:20 Nyamũ iria ii njoya o kĩruka gĩacio
Genesis6:21 Na ningĩ ũmathe mĩthemba yothe ya irio iria irĩagwo
Genesis6:22 Ũguo noguo Nuhu ekire; maũndũ marĩa mothe aathirũo nĩ Ngai eke
Genesis7:1 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Nuhu atĩrĩ
Genesis7:2 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis7:3 naho ha ũhoro wa mĩthemba ya nyamũ iria ii njoya cia rĩera inĩ wĩoere mũgwanja mũgwanja
Genesis7:4 Nĩ gũkorũo rĩu nĩhatigaire matukũ mũgwanja
Genesis7:5 Namo maũndũ marĩa mothe Nuhu aathirũo nĩ Jehova eke
Genesis7:6 Na Nuhu aarĩ wa mĩaka magana matandatũ rĩrĩa mũiyũro ũcio wa maĩ wokire thĩ.
Genesis7:7 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis7:8 Nacio nyamũ cia magũrũ mana cia mĩthemba ĩrĩa ĩtarĩ mũgiro
Genesis7:9 igĩgĩtonya thabina thĩinĩ kwĩ Nuhu
Genesis7:10 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Genesis7:11 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis7:12 Nayo mbura ĩgĩkiura thĩ matukũ mĩrongo ĩna
Genesis7:13 Mũthenya o ro ũcio noguo Nuhu aatonyire thabina thĩinĩ
Genesis7:14 andũ acio magĩgĩtonya me hamwe na ndaara-gĩthaka
Genesis7:15 Icio ciothe igĩtonya thabina thĩinĩ kwĩ Nuhu
Genesis7:16 Nacio iria ciatonyire thabina
Genesis7:17 Naguo mũiyũro ũcio mũnene wa maĩ ũgĩikara ũhumbĩte thĩ matukũ mĩrongo ĩna
Genesis7:18 Maĩ magĩkĩhũhita
Genesis7:19 Maĩ macio magĩgĩkĩrĩrĩria kũhũhita gũkũ thĩ
Genesis7:20 Maĩ macio magĩkĩhũhita
Genesis7:21 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis7:22 gũgĩgĩkua kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩrĩa gĩakoretwo gũkũ thĩ kũrĩa kũniaru
Genesis7:23 Kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩarĩ na muoyo kĩrĩa kĩarĩ gũkũ thĩ gĩkĩninwo
Genesis7:24 Namo maĩ macio magĩikara mahũhitĩte gũkũ thĩ ihinda rĩa matukũ igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩtano.
Genesis8:1 Nake Ngai no aaririkaine Nuhu
Genesis8:2 namo matherũkĩro ma maĩ ma kũrĩa kũriku mũno makĩhingwo
Genesis8:3 namo maĩ makĩrũmanĩria gũcokacoka na thutha o makĩeheraga thĩ; na rĩrĩ
Genesis8:4 Naguo mũthenya wa ikũmi na mũgwanja wa mweri wa mũgwanja thabina ĩo ĩgĩikarĩra irĩma iria ciĩtagwo Ararati.
Genesis8:5 Namo maĩ macio makĩrũmanĩria kũnyihanyiha o nginya mweri wa ikũmi; na rĩrĩ
Genesis8:6 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Genesis8:7 agĩcoka akiumia ihuru na nja
Genesis8:8 Agĩcoka akiumia ndutura na nja
Genesis8:9 no rĩrĩ
Genesis8:10 Ningĩ agĩikara mĩthenya ĩngĩ mũgwanja
Genesis8:11 nayo ndutura ĩo ĩkĩya kũmũcokerera o hwaĩ-inĩ; na rĩ’
Genesis8:12 Agĩikara mĩthenya ĩngĩ mũgwanja
Genesis8:13 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Genesis8:14 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis8:15 Nake Ngai akĩarĩria Nuhu
Genesis8:16 Uma thabina wee mwene mũrĩ hamwe na mũkaguo
Genesis8:17 Hingũrĩra nyamũ o yothe
Genesis8:18 Nake Nuhu makiuma na ariũ ake
Genesis8:19 ningĩ nyamũ o yothe ya magũrũ mana
Genesis8:20 Nake Nuhu agĩakĩra Jehova kĩgongona; agĩtwara nyamũ imwe cia mũthemba o wothe ũrĩa ũtarĩ mũgiro
Genesis8:21 Nake Jehova akĩigua atĩ mũcingũ wa nyama icio nĩ mwega; ningĩ Jehova akĩĩĩra na ngoro atĩrĩ
Genesis8:22 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yothe thĩ ĩgũtũũra-rĩ
Genesis9:1 Ngai agĩkĩrathima Nuhu na ariũ ake; akĩmera atĩrĩ
Genesis9:2 Nayo nyamũ o yothe ya werũ
Genesis9:3 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis9:4 No rĩrĩ
Genesis9:5 Naguo ũhoro ũyũ nĩ wa ma atĩ thakame yanyu
Genesis9:6 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũgaita thakame ya mũndũ-rĩ
Genesis9:7 Na inyuĩ ciarai mũno
Genesis9:8 Ningĩ Ngai akĩarĩria Nuhu me na ariũ ake
Genesis9:9 Atĩrĩrĩ
Genesis9:10 ndarĩkanĩra na kĩũmbe o gĩothe kĩrĩa kĩĩ muoyo
Genesis9:11 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis9:12 Ningĩ Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis9:13 nĩ gĩkĩ
Genesis9:14 Na gũgatuĩka atĩrĩ
Genesis9:15 na niĩ ngaririkana kĩrĩkanĩro gĩakwa na inyuĩ o na kĩũmbe o gĩothe kĩrĩa kĩĩ muoyo kĩa mwĩrĩ o na ũrĩkũ wa nyama; namo maĩ matigacoka gũtuĩka mũiyũro mũnene wa kũnina indo ciothe cia mwĩrĩ wa nyama.
Genesis9:16 Naguo mũkũnga-mbura ũcio ũrĩgĩaga itu-inĩ; na niĩ-rĩ
Genesis9:17 Nake Ngai akĩĩra Nuhu atĩrĩ
Genesis9:18 Nao ariũ a Nuhu
Genesis9:19 Acio atatũ nĩo ariũ a Nuhu
Genesis9:20 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis9:21 ningĩ agĩcoka akĩnyua ndibei yayo
Genesis9:22 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis9:23 Nao Shemu na Jafethu makĩoya nguo
Genesis9:24 Nake Nuhu akĩrĩũkwo nĩ ndibei
Genesis9:25 agĩkiuga atĩrĩ: Kanaani arotũũra na ndirũ
Genesis9:26 Ningĩ agĩcoka akiuga atĩrĩ: Jehova arogathwo
Genesis9:27 Ngai aroaramia Jafethu
Genesis9:28 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis9:29 Namo matukũ mothe ma Nuhu maarĩ mĩaka magana kenda ma mĩrongo ĩtano
Genesis10:1 NA RĨRĨ
Genesis10:2 Ariũ a Jafethu nĩ aya: Gomeri
Genesis10:3 Nao ariũ a Gomeri nĩ aya: Ashikenazu
Genesis10:4 Nao ariũ a Javani nĩ aya: Elishahu
Genesis10:5 Andũ arĩa moimire thĩinĩ wa acio nĩo maagayũkanĩire thĩ cia ndũrĩrĩ iria ii hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia iria rĩrĩa inene
Genesis10:6 Nao ariũ a Hamu nĩ aya: Kushi
Genesis10:7 Nao ariũ a Kushi nĩ aya: Seba
Genesis10:8 Nake Kushi agĩciara Nimirodi ũrĩa waambire gũtuĩka hoti ya gwathana gũkũ thĩ.
Genesis10:9 Ũcio nĩonagwo nĩ Jehova arĩ hoti ya ũguĩmi; nĩkĩo kwĩragwo atĩrĩ
Genesis10:10 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis10:11 Na kuuma o bũrũri ũcio
Genesis10:12 na Reseni o kũu gatagatĩ ka Nineve na Kala (kũu nĩkuo itũũra rĩrĩa inene).
Genesis10:13 Nake Misiri agĩtuĩka kĩhumo kĩa Aludi
Genesis10:14 na Apathirusi
Genesis10:15 Nake Kanaani agĩciara Zidoni mũrũwe wa irigithathi
Genesis10:16 ningĩ nĩwe kĩhumo ha mĩhĩrĩga ya Jebusi
Genesis10:17 na Hivi
Genesis10:18 na Arivadi
Genesis10:19 Naguo mũhaka wa rũrĩrĩ rũu rũa Kanaani woimĩte Zidoni
Genesis10:20 Icio nĩcio ciana cia Hamu
Genesis10:21 Nake Shemu ũrĩa warĩ kĩhumo gĩa kĩruka gĩothe kĩa Eberi
Genesis10:22 Nao ariũ a Shemu nĩ aya: Elamu
Genesis10:23 Nao ariũ a Aramu nĩ aya: Uzu
Genesis10:24 Nake Aripakishadi agĩciara Shela
Genesis10:25 Nake Eberi ũcio agĩciarĩrũo ihĩĩ igĩrĩ

Genesis10:28 na Obali

Genesis20:4 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis20:5 Githĩ mũndũ ũcio we mwene ndaranjĩrire ũũ: Ũyũ nĩ mwarĩ witũ? O nake mũka ũcio we mwene aroiga ũũ: Ũyũ nĩ mũndũ witũ? Ũndũ ũcio kaĩ ndĩwĩkĩte o na ũthungĩru wa ngoro-ĩ

Genesis20:17 Nake Iburahimu agĩkĩhoya Ngai
Genesis20:18 amu Jehova nĩaatũmĩte andũ-a-nja othe a nyũmba ya Abimeleku marũgamĩre o kũrũgamĩra
Genesis21:1 Nake Jehova akĩng’ethera Sara o ta ũrĩa oigĩte
Genesis21:2 Nake Sara akĩgĩa ihu
Genesis21:3 Nako kahĩĩ kau aaciarĩirũo
Genesis21:4 Nake Iburahimu akĩruithia kahĩĩ kau gake getagwo Isaaka kaanina mĩthenya ĩnana
Genesis21:5 Na hĩndĩ ĩo aaciarĩirũo kahĩĩ kau gake Isaaka
Genesis21:6 Nake Sara akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis21:7 Na ningĩ akĩũria atĩrĩ
Genesis21:8 Nako kaana kau gagĩkũra gagĩtua iria
Genesis21:9 Nake Sara akĩona mũrũ wa Hagari ũrĩa Mũmisiri atĩ e na kĩnyugo
Genesis21:10 Tondũ wa ũguo akĩĩra Iburahimu atĩrĩ
Genesis21:11 Naguo ũndũ ũcio Iburahimu akĩona ta ũkũmũiguithia ũũru mũno nĩ ũndũ wa mũriũ.
Genesis21:12 Nake Ngai akĩĩra Iburahimu atĩrĩ
Genesis21:13 O na ningĩ atĩrĩ
Genesis21:14 Nake Iburahimu akĩroka gũũkĩra rũcinĩ tene
Genesis21:15 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis21:16 Nake agĩthiĩ agĩikara thĩ amwerekeire
Genesis21:17 Nake Ngai agĩkorũo aiguĩte mũkayo wa kĩhĩĩ kĩu; nake mũraika wa Ngai agĩĩtana arĩ o igũrũ
Genesis21:18 Ũkĩra ũtiire kĩhĩĩ kĩu na igũrũ
Genesis21:19 Nake Ngai akĩmũhingũra maitho
Genesis21:20 Nake Ngai aakoragwo e hamwe na kĩhĩĩ kĩu
Genesis21:21 Agĩgĩĩtũũria werũ wa Parani
Genesis21:22 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Genesis21:23 rĩu-rĩ
Genesis21:24 Nake Iburahimu akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis21:25 Nake Iburahimu akĩrũithia Abimeleku nĩ ũndũ wa gĩthima kĩa maĩ kĩrĩa gĩatunyanĩtwo nĩ ndungata cia Abimeleku na kĩĩ-hinya.
Genesis21:26 Nake Abimeleku akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis21:27 Nake Iburahimu akĩoya gĩkundi kĩa ng’ondu na ndegwa akĩhe Abimeleku; nao erĩ makĩrĩkanĩrĩria kĩrĩko.
Genesis21:28 Nake Iburahimu akĩamũra tũmĩatĩ mũgwanja twa rũũru.
Genesis21:29 Nake Abimeleku akĩũria Iburahimu atĩrĩ
Genesis21:30 Nake akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis21:31 Tondũ wa ũguo agĩtua handũ hau Biri-shiba
Genesis21:32 Magĩkĩrĩkanĩrĩria kĩrĩko o hau Biri-shiba
Genesis21:33 Ningĩ hau Birishiba Iburahimu akĩhanda mũkarakaba
Genesis21:34 Nake Iburahimu nĩaaikarire e mũgeni bũrũri wa Afilisiti matukũ maingĩ.

Genesis22:4 Na mũthenya wa gatatũ we Iburahimu agĩgĩtiira maitho

Genesis29:6 Ningĩ akĩmoria atĩrĩ
Genesis29:7 Agĩcoka akĩmera ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Genesis29:8 Makĩmũcokeria atĩrĩ
Genesis29:9 Na ihinda o ro rĩu aaragia nao
Genesis29:10 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Genesis29:11 Jakubu agĩkĩmumunya Rakeli
Genesis29:12 Ningĩ Jakubu akĩĩra Rakeli atĩ nĩ mũihawe wa ithe
Genesis29:13 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Genesis29:14 Labani agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis29:15 Nake Labani akĩũria Jakubu atĩrĩ
Genesis29:16 Nake Labani aakĩrĩ na airĩtu erĩ; na ũrĩa mũkũrũ etagwo Lea
Genesis29:17 Nake Lea aakĩrĩ na maitho macici
Genesis29:18 Nake Jakubu endete Rakeli; agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis29:19 Labani agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis29:20 Jakubu agĩkĩmũtungatĩra mĩaka mũgwanja nĩ ũndũ wa Rakeli; nake akĩona mĩaka ĩo o ta ĩrĩ matukũ manyinyi
Genesis29:21 Nake Jakubu akĩĩra Labani atĩrĩ
Genesis29:22 Nake Labani agĩkĩũngania andũ othe a handũ hau
Genesis29:23 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Genesis29:24 Ningĩ Labani akĩoya ndungata ĩmwe yake ya mũirĩtu
Genesis29:25 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Genesis29:26 Nake Labani akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis29:27 Hingia kiumia gĩa ũcio
Genesis29:28 Jakubu agĩgĩĩka o ro ũguo
Genesis29:29 Ningĩ Labani akĩoya ndungata ĩmwe yake ya mũirĩtu
Genesis29:30 Jakubu agĩkĩonana na Rakeli o nake
Genesis29:31 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis29:32 Lea agĩkĩgĩa ihu
Genesis29:33 Nake agĩkĩgĩa ihu rĩngĩ
Genesis29:34 Ningĩ akĩgĩa ihu rĩngĩ
Genesis29:35 Ningĩ agĩkĩgĩa ihu rĩngĩ
Genesis30:1 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis30:2 Nake Jakubu agĩgĩcinwo nĩ marakara mũno nĩ ũndũ wa Rakeli
Genesis30:3 Rakeli agĩkiuga ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Genesis30:4 Agĩkĩmũhe Biliha
Genesis30:5 Biliha agĩkĩgĩa ihu
Genesis30:6 Rakeli agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis30:7 Ningĩ Biliha
Genesis30:8 Rakeli agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis30:9 Nake Lea ona atĩ ekũrũgamĩra
Genesis30:10 Nake Zilipa
Genesis30:11 Lea agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis30:12 Ningĩ Zilipa
Genesis30:13 Lea agĩgĩcoka akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis30:14 Na hĩndĩ ya magetha ma ngano Reubeni agĩthiĩ akĩona tũtunda tũtariĩ ta ndongu gĩthaka-inĩ
Genesis30:15 Lea agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Genesis30:16 Nake Jakubu oka hwaĩ-inĩ oimĩte mũgũnda
Genesis30:17 Nake Ngai akĩigua mahoya ma Lea
Genesis30:18 Hĩndĩ ĩo Lea agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis30:19 Ningĩ Lea akĩgĩa ihu rĩngĩ
Genesis30:20 Nake Lea agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis30:21 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis30:22 Ningĩ Ngai akĩririkana Rakeli
Genesis30:23 agĩkĩgĩa ihu
Genesis30:24 agĩgĩgeta Jusufu
Genesis30:25 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Genesis30:26 O nao atumia akwa aya maatũũmire ndũũre ngũtungatagĩra
Genesis30:27 Labani agĩkĩmũcokeria atĩrĩ
Genesis30:28 Agĩcoka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis30:29 Nake Jakubu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis30:30 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Genesis30:31 Nake Labani akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Genesis30:32 Naguo ũndũ ũcio nĩ ũyũ: Atĩrĩ
Genesis30:33 Naguo ũndũ ũyũ nĩguo ũkanjarĩrĩria ũhoro-inĩ wa ũthingu wakwa thutha-inĩ rĩrĩa ũgoka kũrora mũcara wakwa ũrĩa ũkonagwo o mbere yaku nĩwe; thĩinĩ wa mbũri-rĩ
Genesis30:34 Nake Labani akiuga ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Genesis30:35 Mũthenya ũcio Labani agĩkĩamũra thenge ciothe iria ciarĩ manyaga
Genesis30:36 agĩciehereria Jakubu handũ ha rũgendo rũa matukũ matatũ; Jakubu agĩgĩtuĩka mũrĩithi wa ndũru cia mbũri cia Labani iria ciatigarire.
Genesis30:37 Nake Jakubu akĩĩyoera thanju njigũ cia mũlibina
Genesis30:38 Nacio thanju icio onũraga agaciiga mĩtaro-inĩ ya handũ harĩa haathondeketwo ha kũnyuithĩria mbũri maĩ
Genesis30:39 Na rĩrĩ

Genesis30:41 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Genesis30:42 no rĩrĩ
Genesis30:43 Indo cia mũndũ ũcio
Genesis31:1 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis31:2 Ningĩ Jakubu aarora gĩthiithi kĩa Labani
Genesis31:3 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Jakubu atĩrĩ
Genesis31:4 Jakubu agĩkĩrekania
Genesis31:5 Agĩkĩmera atĩrĩ
Genesis31:6 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis31:7 Nake ithe wanyu aana’henia kaingĩ
Genesis31:8 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis31:9 Ũguo nĩguo Ngai aakĩrutire mahiũ mothe gwĩ ithe wanyu
Genesis31:10 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Genesis31:11 Nake mũraika wa Ngai akĩnjĩta ngĩrota
Genesis31:12 Agĩkĩnjĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis31:13 Nĩ niĩ Ngai wa Beth-eli
Genesis31:14 Nao Rakeli na Lea magĩcokia makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Genesis31:15 Githĩ ndatũtuaga o ta tũrĩ ageni? Nĩ ũndũ nĩaatwendirie
Genesis31:16 Tondũ atĩrĩ
Genesis31:17 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jakubu agĩũkĩra
Genesis31:18 nake agĩthiĩ na mahiũ make mothe
Genesis31:19 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis31:20 Nake Jakubu akiuma kũu na hitho
Genesis31:21 Ũguo nĩguo orĩre na indo ciothe iria aarĩ nacio; agĩgĩũkĩra aguthiĩra
Genesis31:22 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis31:23 Agĩ-kĩoya ariũ a ithe
Genesis31:24 Nake Ngai akiumĩrĩra Labani Mũsuriata
Genesis31:25 Labani agĩgĩkinya he Jakubu. Na rĩrĩ
Genesis31:26 Labani agĩkĩũria Jakubu atĩrĩ
Genesis31:27 Wakĩũra na hitho nĩ ũndũ kĩ
Genesis31:28 Ningĩ warega kũ’he ihinda rĩa kũmumunya ariũ akwa na airĩtu akwa nĩkĩ? Atĩrĩrĩ
Genesis31:29 Kũhota ndahota gũkũgera ngero; no rĩrĩ
Genesis31:30 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis31:31 Jakubu agĩgĩcokia akĩĩra Labani atĩrĩ
Genesis31:32 No rĩrĩ
Genesis31:33 Labani agĩgĩtonya hema ya Jakubu
Genesis31:34 Nake Rakeli agĩkorũo nĩwe woete mĩhianano ĩo
Genesis31:35 Nake Rakeli akĩĩra ithe atĩrĩ
Genesis31:36 Jakubu agĩkĩrakara
Genesis31:37 Ningĩ tondũ nĩuururĩtie indo-inĩ ciakwa ciothe-rĩ
Genesis31:38 Rĩu-rĩ
Genesis31:39 Ningĩ mbũri ĩrĩa yakoragwo ĩrĩĩkĩte
Genesis31:40 Nayo mĩtũũrĩre-inĩ yakwa-rĩ
Genesis31:41 Ningĩ-rĩ
Genesis31:42 Tiga Ngai wa baba aarĩ hamwe na niĩ
Genesis31:43 Labani agĩgĩcokia akĩĩra Jakubu atĩrĩ
Genesis31:44 Rĩu ta kĩreke tũrĩkanĩre nawe; nakĩo kĩrĩkanĩro kĩu gĩtuĩke ũira harĩ niĩ nawe.
Genesis31:45 Jakubu agĩkĩoya ihiga
Genesis31:46 Ningĩ Jakubu akĩĩra ariũ a ithe atĩrĩ

Genesis31:48 Ningĩ Labani akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis31:49 ningĩ rĩgĩĩtwo Mizipa
Genesis31:50 Atĩrĩrĩ
Genesis31:51 Ningĩ Labani akĩĩra Jakubu ũũ: Ta rora wone nũndo ĩno o na gĩtugĩ gĩkĩ
Genesis31:52 Nũndo ĩno-rĩ
Genesis31:53 Ngai wa Iburahimu
Genesis31:54 Jakubu agĩkĩrutĩra igongona kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩu
Genesis31:55 Naguo mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ Labani akĩroka gũũkĩra rũcinĩ tene
Genesis32:1 Nake Jakubu aagwata rũgendo
Genesis32:2 Nake Jakubu aamona akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis32:3 NINGĨ Jakubu akĩrekia andũ mathiage mbere yake kwĩ Esau
Genesis32:4 Agĩkĩmaatha akĩmera ũũ: Thiĩi mũkere mwathi wakwa Esau atĩrĩ
Genesis32:5 na rĩrĩ
Genesis32:6 Nao arekio acio magĩcoka kwĩ Jakubu
Genesis32:7 Jakubu agĩgĩĩtigĩra
Genesis32:8 agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis32:9 Ningĩ Jakubu akĩhoya akiuga ũũ: Wee Ngai wa baba Iburahimu
Genesis32:10 ũhoro ũcio wa tha ciaku ciothe iria ũnjiguagĩra-rĩ
Genesis32:11 Ndagũthaitha ’honokia he mũrũ wa maitũ
Genesis32:12 Tondũ wanjĩrire ũũ: Ti-itherũ nĩngagwĩka wega
Genesis32:13 Agĩkĩraarĩrĩra hau ũtukũ ũcio; agĩcoka agĩthurĩra Esau mũrũ wa nyina indo imwe thĩinĩ wa iria aarĩ nacio ituĩke kĩheo gĩake;
Genesis32:14 nacio nĩ mbũri magana merĩ cia mĩgoma
Genesis32:15 o na ngamĩra mĩrongo ĩtatũ cia mĩgoma igũkamwo
Genesis32:16 Agĩkĩnengera ndungata ciake indo icio
Genesis32:17 Nake Jakubu agĩgĩtaara mũndũ ũrĩa warĩ mbere ya arĩa angĩ
Genesis32:18 Hĩndĩ ĩo nĩũkamũcokeria
Genesis32:19 Ningĩ agĩtaara ndungata ya kerĩ
Genesis32:20 o na mũmwĩre atĩrĩ
Genesis32:21 Tondũ ũcio indo icio cia kũheanwo ikĩamba kũringa mbere yake; nake Jakubu we mwene ũtukũ ũcio akĩraara o hau maarĩ na andũ ake.
Genesis32:22 Naguo ũtukũ o ro ũcio Jakubu agĩũkĩra
Genesis32:23 Agĩgĩthiĩ nao
Genesis32:24 Nake Jakubu agĩgĩtigwo wiki; naho hau hagĩgĩkorũo he mũndũ
Genesis32:25 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis32:26 Mũndũ ũcio agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis32:27 Mũndũ ũcio agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Genesis32:28 Ningĩ mũndũ ũcio agĩcoka akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis32:29 Jakubu agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis32:30 Jakubu agĩgĩtua handũ hau Penieli; nĩ ũndũ oigire atĩrĩ
Genesis32:31 Narĩo riũa rĩkĩmũrathĩra agĩkĩra hau Penueli; na kũgũrũ gwake nĩkwamũthuithagia.
Genesis32:32 Na tondũ ũcio ciana cia Isiraeli itingĩrũma mũkiha ũrĩa ũrĩ rũhonge-inĩ rũa gĩtina gĩa kũgũrũ o na ũmũthĩ
Genesis33:1 Na rĩrĩ

Genesis33:4 Esau agĩgĩteng’era akamũtũnge
Genesis33:5 Nake Esau agĩtiira maitho
Genesis33:6 Hĩndĩ ĩo ndungata icio cia andũ-a-nja ikĩmũkuhĩhĩria

Genesis33:19 Nakĩo gĩcigo gĩa gĩthaka
Genesis33:20 Agĩgĩaka kĩgongona handũ hau
Genesis34:1 Hĩndĩ ĩo Dina
Genesis34:2 Nake Shekemu

Genesis34:11 Nake Shekemu we mwene akĩĩra ithe wa Dina
Genesis34:12 Njĩtiai rũracio rũingĩ

Genesis34:14 magĩkĩaria makĩmera ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ

Genesis34:16 hĩndĩ ĩo twakĩhota kũmũhikithanagia na airĩtu aitũ
Genesis34:17 No rĩrĩ
Genesis34:18 Naguo ũhoro ũcio maamwĩrire ũgĩkenia Hamoru
Genesis34:19 Nake mwanake ũcio ndaigana kũgondereria ũndũ ũcio
Genesis34:20 Nao Hamoru na Shekemu
Genesis34:21 Andũ acio nĩmaarĩte ũhoro na ithuĩ; na tondũ ũcio rekei matũũre bũrũri ũyũ
Genesis34:22 No rĩrĩ
Genesis34:23 Githĩ ng’ombe ciao
Genesis34:24 Nacio ciugo icio cioigirũo nĩ Hamoru
Genesis34:25 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Genesis34:26 Magĩkĩũraga Hamoru
Genesis34:27 Nao ariũ a Jakubu magĩkinya harĩ andũ acio moragĩtwo na ihenya magĩtaha indo itũũra-inĩ rĩu rĩao
Genesis34:28 Magĩgĩthiĩ na mahiũ mao ma mbũri na ng’ombe
Genesis34:29 magĩgĩthiĩ na ũtonga wao wothe
Genesis34:30 Jakubu agĩkĩĩra Simeoni na Lawii atĩrĩ
Genesis34:31 Nao magĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis35:1 Nake Ngai akĩĩra Jakubu atĩrĩ
Genesis35:2 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jakubu akĩĩra andũ a nyũmba yake
Genesis35:3 mũũkĩre twambate tũthiĩ Beth-eli ngaakĩre Ngai kĩgongona kuo
Genesis35:4 Andũ acio magĩkĩnengera Jakubu ngai cia kũngĩ iria ciothe maarĩ nacio
Genesis35:5 Thutha wa ũguo makĩgwata rũgendo; na andũ arĩa maatũire matũũra marĩa maamarigicĩirie mĩena yothe makĩgwatwo nĩ guoya mũnene
Genesis35:6 Jakubu agĩgĩthiĩ agĩkinya Luzu
Genesis35:7 Agĩgĩakĩra kĩgongona hau
Genesis35:8 Nake Debora mũreri wa Rebeka agĩkua
Genesis35:9 NINGĨ Ngai akiumĩrĩra Jakubu o rĩngĩ
Genesis35:10 Ngai agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis35:11 Ningĩ Ngai akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis35:12 o naguo bũrũri ũrĩa ndaheire Iburahimu na Isaaka
Genesis35:13 Nake Ngai agĩkĩambata igũrũ
Genesis35:14 Nake Jakubu akĩhanda gĩtugĩ handũ hau Jehova aaragĩria nake
Genesis35:15 Naho handũ hau Ngai aaragĩria nake
Genesis35:16 Nao makĩgwata rũgendo moimĩte Beth-eli; na rĩrĩ
Genesis35:17 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Genesis35:18 Ningĩ gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Genesis35:19 Rakeli agĩgĩkua
Genesis35:20 Nake Jakubu akĩhanda gĩtugĩ kĩrũngiĩ mbĩrĩra-inĩ yake; nakĩo gĩtugĩ kĩu gĩtũire gĩĩtagwo Gĩtugĩ kĩa mbĩrĩra ya Rakeli
Genesis35:21 Isiraeli agĩkĩgwata rũgendo
Genesis35:22 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Genesis35:23 ariũ a Lea nĩ aya: nĩ Reubeni
Genesis35:24 nao ariũ a Rakeli
Genesis35:25 nao ariũ a Biliha
Genesis35:26 nao ariũ a Zilipa
Genesis35:27 Jakubu agĩgĩthiĩ agĩkinya Mamure kũrĩ ithe Isaaka
Genesis35:28 Nayo mĩaka ĩrĩa Isaaka aatũũrire muoyo yarĩ igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩnana.
Genesis35:29 Nake Isaaka agĩtuĩkana
Genesis36:1 Na rĩrĩ
Genesis36:2 Esau egũrĩire aka thĩinĩ wa airĩtu a Kanaani; nao ũmwe nĩ Ada mwarĩ wa Eloni
Genesis36:3 O na Basemathu
Genesis36:4 Ada agĩgĩciarĩra Esau Elifazu; nake Basemathu akĩmũciarĩra Reueli
Genesis36:5 nake Oholibama agĩciara Jeushu na Jalamu
Genesis36:6 Nake Esau akĩoya atumia ake
Genesis36:7 nĩ gũkorũo indo ciao ciarĩ nyingĩ mũno itangĩreka matũũranie; na makĩaga kũiganĩra bũrũri ũcio maatũire marĩ ageni
Genesis36:8 Esau agĩgĩtũũra kĩrĩma gĩa Seiru; nake Esau ũcio
Genesis36:9 Nacio ici nĩcio njiaro cia Esau
Genesis36:10 marĩĩtwa ma ariũ a Esau nĩ maya
Genesis36:11 Nao ariũ a Elifazu nĩ Temani
Genesis36:12 Nake Timina aarĩ thuriya ya Elifazu
Genesis36:13 Nao aya nĩo ariũ a Reueli; nĩ Nahathu
Genesis36:14 Nao aya nĩo maarĩ ariũ a mũka ũcio wa Esau wetagwo Oholibama
Genesis36:15 Nao aya nĩo anene a ita thĩinĩ wa ariũ a Elifazu
Genesis36:16 na mũnene Kora
Genesis36:17 Nao aya nĩo ariũ a Reueli wa Esau; nĩ mũnene Nahathu
Genesis36:18 Nao ariũ a Oholibama
Genesis36:19 Acio othe nĩ ariũ a Esau
Genesis36:20 Nao aya nĩo ariũ a Seiru
Genesis36:21 na Dishoni
Genesis36:22 Nacio ciana cia Lotani nĩ Hori
Genesis36:23 Nacio ici nĩcio ciana cia Shobali: nĩ Alivani
Genesis36:24 Nacio ici nĩcio ciana cia Zibeoni: nĩ Aia
Genesis36:25 Nacio ici nĩcio ciana cia Ana: nĩ Dishoni
Genesis36:26 Nacio ici nĩcio ciana cia Dishoni: nĩ Hemudani
Genesis36:27 Nacio ici nĩcio ciana cia Ezeri: nĩ Bilihani
Genesis36:28 Nacio ciana cia Dishani nĩ ici: nĩ Uzu
Genesis36:29 Nao aya nĩo anene a ita arĩa maaciarirũo nĩ Ahori: nĩ mũnene Lotani
Genesis36:30 na mũnene Dishoni
Genesis36:31 Nao aya nĩo athamaki arĩa maathamakaga bũrũri wa Edomu

Genesis45:1 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jusufu agĩkĩremwo nĩ gũcoka kwĩyũmĩrĩria andũ arĩa othe maarũgamĩte harĩ we me ho
Genesis45:2 Agĩkĩanĩrĩra akĩrĩra

Genesis45:4 Ningĩ Jusufu agĩkĩĩra ariũ a ithe atĩrĩ
Genesis45:5 Na rĩu menyai mũigue ũũru
Genesis45:6 Nĩ ũndũ rĩu nĩ mĩaka ĩĩrĩ mĩthiru gwata ng’aragu yagĩa bũrũri ũyũ; na ningĩ nĩ hatigaru mĩaka ĩngĩ ĩtano hatekũgĩa icimba kana magetha.
Genesis45:7 Ngai nĩwe wakĩndekirie njũke gũkũ mbere yanyu nĩ getha ndũme matigari manyu matũũre gũkũ thĩ

Exodus4:7 Nake agĩcoka akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus4:8 Na nĩgũgatuĩka atĩrĩ
Exodus4:9 Na nĩgũgakinya atĩrĩ
Exodus4:10 Nake Musa akĩĩra Jehova ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Exodus4:11 Nake Jehova akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Exodus4:12 Tondũ wa ũguo ũkĩra ũthiĩ o rĩu
Exodus4:13 Nake akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus4:14 Nake Jehova agĩcinwo nĩ marakara mũno nĩ ũndũ wa Musa
Exodus4:15 Nawe nĩwe ũrĩmwaragĩria
Exodus4:16 Nake nĩwe ũgatuĩka mũndũ waku wa kwaragĩria andũ; na nĩgũgakinya atĩrĩ
Exodus4:17 Naruo rũthanju rũu
Exodus4:18 Nake Musa agĩcokerera Jethero mũthoniwe
Exodus4:19 Nake Jehova akĩarĩria Musa e kũu bũrũri wa Midiani
Exodus4:20 Nake Musa akĩoya mũka
Exodus4:21 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus4:22 Nawe nĩũkera Firauni atĩrĩ
Exodus4:23 na nĩngwĩrĩte atĩrĩ
Exodus4:24 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Exodus4:25 Nake Zipora akĩoya kahiga ka mũthemba wa rũenji-rũa-ngoma
Exodus4:26 Na tondũ wa ũguo
Exodus4:27 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Haruni atĩrĩ
Exodus4:28 Nake Musa akĩhe Haruni ũhoro wothe ũrĩa watũmĩte Jehova amũrekie
Exodus4:29 Nao Musa na Haruni magĩthiĩ makĩũngania athuri othe a ciana cia Isiraeli;
Exodus4:30 nake Haruni akĩheana ũhoro wothe ũrĩa Jehova aaheete Musa
Exodus4:31 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ gĩgĩĩtĩkia
Exodus5:1 Thutha ũcio
Exodus5:2 Nake Firauni akĩũria atĩrĩ
Exodus5:3 Nao makiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus5:4 Nake mũthamaki ũcio wa Misiri akĩmera atĩrĩ
Exodus5:5 Nake Firauni akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus5:6 Naguo mũthenya o ro ũcio Firauni agĩatha akaburũ arĩa maaroraga andũ
Exodus5:7 Mũtigũcoka kũhe andũ rũũa rũa ngano rũa gũthondeka matubarĩ naruo
Exodus5:8 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus5:9 Nĩ wega maheo wĩra wa hinya gũkĩra mbere marutage
Exodus5:10 Nao akaburũ acio maaroraga andũ makiumagara
Exodus5:11 Thiagai mũgecarĩria rũũa o kũrĩa mũrĩruonera; na rĩrĩ
Exodus5:12 Tondũ wa ũguo andũ makĩharaganĩria kũndũ guothe bũrũri-inĩ ũcio wa Misiri
Exodus5:13 Nao akaburũ makamahĩkagĩrĩria mũno
Exodus5:14 Nao anyabara a ciana cia Isiraeli arĩa maaigĩtwo nĩ akaburũ a Firauni a gũciroraga makĩhũrũo
Exodus5:15 Hĩndĩ ĩo anyabara acio a ciana cia Isiraeli magĩthiĩ gũkaĩra Firauni
Exodus5:16 Rĩu ithuĩ ndungata ciaku tũtiheagwo rũũa
Exodus5:17 Nowe akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus5:18 Gĩũkĩrei

Exodus6:1 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus6:2 Nake Ngai akĩarĩria Musa
Exodus6:3 na nĩ niĩ ndoimĩrĩire Iburahimu
Exodus6:4 O na ningĩ nĩ’handĩte kĩrĩkanĩro gĩakwa nao gĩa atĩ nĩngamahe bũrũri wa Kanaani
Exodus6:5 O na ningĩ atĩrĩ
Exodus6:6 Tondũ ũcio
Exodus6:7 njoke ndĩmuoe mũtuĩke andũ akwa
Exodus6:8 Na nĩngũmũtwara mũkinye bũrũri ũrĩa ndehĩtire nĩ ũndũ waguo njoete guoko na igũrũ
Exodus6:9 Nake Musa akĩhe ciana cia Isiraeli ũhoro ũcio
Exodus6:10 Nake Jehova akĩarĩria Musa
Exodus6:11 Thiĩ ũtonye kwa Firauni
Exodus6:12 Nake Musa akĩarĩria Jehova akĩũria atĩrĩ
Exodus6:13 Noguo Jehova aarĩirie Musa na Haruni
Exodus6:14 Nao andũ aya nĩo ciongo cia nyũmba cia maithe mao. Ariũ a Reubeni
Exodus6:15 Nao ariũ a Simeoni nĩ Jemueli
Exodus6:16 Namo marĩĩtwa ma ariũ a Lawii nĩmo maya
Exodus6:17 Nao ariũ a Gerishoni nĩ aya: nĩ Libini na Shimei
Exodus6:18 Nao ariũ a Kohathu nĩ aya: nĩ Amuramu na Iziharu
Exodus6:19 Nao ariũ a Merari nĩ aya: nĩ Mahali na Mishi. Acio nĩo mbarĩ cia Alawii
Exodus6:20 Nake Amuramu akĩhikia Jokebedi
Exodus6:21 Nao ariũ a Iziharu nĩ aya: nĩ Kora
Exodus6:22 Nao ariũ a Uzieli nĩ aya: nĩ Mishaeli
Exodus6:23 Nake Haruni akĩhikia Elisheba mwarĩ wa Aminadabu
Exodus6:24 Nao ariũ a Kora nĩ aya: nĩ Asiru
Exodus6:25 Nake Eleazaru
Exodus6:26 Haruni ũcio na Musa nĩo arĩa Jehova aarĩirie

Exodus7:1 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ

Exodus7:3 Na nĩngũũmia Firauni ngoro
Exodus7:4 No rĩrĩ
Exodus7:5 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus7:6 Nao Musa na Haruni magĩgĩĩka ũguo; o ta ũguo Jehova aamaathĩte meke
Exodus7:7 Na hĩndĩ ĩo maarĩirie Firauni
Exodus7:8 NAKE Jehova akĩarĩria Musa na Haruni
Exodus7:9 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Firauni arĩmwarĩria
Exodus7:10 Nao Musa na Haruni magĩgĩtonya kwa Firauni

Exodus7:12 Nĩ ũndũ andũ acio othe

Exodus7:16 Nawe ũcoke ũmwĩre atĩrĩ

Exodus7:20 Nao Musa na Haruni magĩgĩĩka ũguo
Exodus7:21 Nacio ciũngũyũ iria ciarĩ rũũĩ igĩkua
Exodus7:22 Nao ago a Misiri magĩĩka o ta ũguo na ũgo wao
Exodus7:23 Nake Firauni akĩhũndũka akĩinũka gwake mũciĩ

Exodus8:19 Hĩndĩ ĩo ago acio makĩĩra Firauni atĩrĩ
Exodus8:20 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ

Exodus9:1 THUTHA wa ũguo Jehova agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus9:2 Tondũ wamagiria mathiĩ
Exodus9:3 Jehova nĩegũũkĩrĩra ũhiũ waku ũrĩa ũrĩ rũũru
Exodus9:4 Nake Ngai nĩekwamũrania ũhiũ wa Isiraeli
Exodus9:5 Ngai agĩgĩtua mũthenya ũrĩa guo
Exodus9:6 Nake Jehova agĩkĩroka gwĩka ũndũ ũcio
Exodus9:7 Nake Firauni akĩrekania
Exodus9:8 Ningĩ Jehova akĩarĩria Musa na Haruni
Exodus9:9 Naguo mũhu ũcio nĩũgũtuĩka rũkũngũ rũceke rũiyũre bũrũri wothe wa Misiri
Exodus9:10 Nao magĩkĩhakũra mũhu wa icua
Exodus9:11 Nao ago makĩremwo nĩ kũrũgama mbere ya Musa nĩ ũndũ wa mahũha
Exodus9:12 Nake Jehova akĩũmia ngoro ya Firauni
Exodus9:13 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus9:14 Nĩ gũkorũo ihinda rĩrĩ
Exodus9:15 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Exodus9:16 No rĩrĩ
Exodus9:17 Githĩ o na rĩu nĩ kwĩnenehia ũkwĩneneheria andũ akwa ũkarega kũreka mathiĩ?
Exodus9:18 Atĩrĩrĩ
Exodus9:19 Tondũ wa ũguo
Exodus9:20 Tondũ ũcio thĩinĩ wa ndungata cia Firauni
Exodus9:21 nake ũrĩa ũtaarũmbũirie ũhoro wa Jehova akĩrekereria ndungata ciake
Exodus9:22 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus9:23 Nake Musa agĩtambũrũkia guoko anyitĩte rũthanju rũake
Exodus9:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio gũkĩgĩa mbura ya mbembe
Exodus9:25 Nayo mbura ĩo ya mbembe ĩkĩhũra indo ciothe cia bũrũri wothe wa Misiri iria ciarĩ mĩgũnda
Exodus9:26 No rĩrĩ
Exodus9:27 Nake Firauni akĩrekania
Exodus9:28 Hoyai Jehova
Exodus9:29 Nake Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus9:30 No rĩrĩ
Exodus9:31 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus9:32 No rĩrĩ

Exodus9:34 Ningĩ Firauni ona atĩ mbura ya mbembe o na marurumĩ igũthira
Exodus9:35 Ngoro ya Firauni ĩgĩkĩũma
Exodus10:1 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ

Exodus10:3 Nao Musa na Haruni magĩthiĩ

Exodus10:5 nacio nĩikaiyũra thĩ imĩhumbe
Exodus10:6 nacio nyũmba ciaku nĩikaiyũrũo nĩcio

Exodus10:9 Musa agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus10:10 Nake akĩmera atĩrĩ
Exodus10:11 Hau ndingĩĩtĩkĩra o na hanini; no rĩrĩ
Exodus10:12 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ

Exodus10:14 Nacio ngigĩ icio igĩthiĩ ikĩiyũra bũrũri wothe wa Misiri
Exodus10:15 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Exodus10:16 Hĩndĩ ĩo Firauni agĩĩta Musa na Haruni na ihenya akĩmera atĩrĩ
Exodus10:17 Tondũ ũcio ndamũthaitha mũnjohere wĩhia ũcio wakwa ihinda o rĩrĩ rĩmwe riiki
Exodus10:18 Agĩkiuma he Firauni akĩhoya Jehova.

Exodus11:1 NAKE Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus11:2 Tondũ ũcio nĩ wega ũgataare andũ
Exodus11:3 Nake Jehova agĩtũma andũ acio metĩkĩrĩke nĩ Amisiri. Ningĩ makĩria mũndũ ũcio ti Musa nĩonagwo arĩ mũnene mũno kũu bũrũri wa Misiri nĩ ndungata cia Firauni
Exodus11:4 Nake Musa akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus11:5 namo marigithathi mothe ma bũrũri wa Misiri nĩmagakua
Exodus11:6 Na nĩgũkagĩa kĩrĩro kĩnene mũno kũndũ guothe bũrũri wa Misiri; na gũtirĩ kwagĩa kĩngĩ takĩo
Exodus11:7 No rĩrĩ
Exodus11:8 Nacio ndungata ici ciaku ciothe nĩigaikũrũka ciũke kũrĩ niĩ
Exodus11:9 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus11:10 Nao Musa na Haruni meka maũndũ macio mothe ma kũgegania marĩ mbere ya Firauni-rĩ
Exodus12:1 Nake Jehova akĩarĩria Musa na Haruni kũu bũrũri wa Misiri
Exodus12:2 Mweri ũyũ nĩguo ũgatuĩka mweri wa mbere ya mĩeri ĩrĩa ĩngĩ harĩ inyuĩ
Exodus12:3 Arĩria kĩrĩndĩ gĩothe gĩa Isiraeli
Exodus12:4 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus12:5 Nako gatũrũme kau no mũhaka gagakorũo gatarĩ na kaũũgũ
Exodus12:6 Nĩmũgakaiga gaikare o nginya rĩrĩa mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri o ro ũcio ũgakinya; na mũthenya ũcio-rĩ
Exodus12:7 Na nyũmba ĩrĩa yothe gatũrũme kau gakarĩĩrũo nĩ andũ-rĩ
Exodus12:8 Nao makarĩa nyama ciako ũtukũ o ro ũcio
Exodus12:9 Mũtikarĩe gatũrũme kau ge gethĩ
Exodus12:10 Na mũtikanatigarie gacunjĩ o na kamwe karaare gakinyie rũcinĩ; no rĩrĩ
Exodus12:11 Naguo ũrĩa mũgakorũo mũikarĩte mũkĩrĩa gatũrũme kau-rĩ
Exodus12:12 Nĩ gũkorũo ũtukũ ũcio nĩngagera bũrũri wa Misiri njũrage marigithathi mothe bũrũri ũcio wa Misiri
Exodus12:13 Nayo thakame ĩo nĩyo ĩgatuĩka kĩmenyithia kĩa nyũmba iria mũikarĩte; na rĩrĩ
Exodus12:14 Na mũthenya ũcio ũgatuĩka wa kũmũririkanagia maũndũ
Exodus12:15 Mĩthenya mũgwanja noyo mũrĩrĩaga mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩimbie
Exodus12:16 Naguo mũthenya wa mbere wayo nĩmũrĩgĩaga na ũũngano mwamũre ũkoniĩ andũ othe
Exodus12:17 Nĩ wega mũmenyagĩrĩre gĩathĩ kĩu kĩa mĩgate itarĩ mĩimbie; nĩ gũkorũo mũthenya ũcio nĩguo wakwa wa kũruta mbũtũ cianyu ciothe bũrũri wa Misiri; tondũ ũcio mũrĩmenyagĩrĩra mũthenya ũcio njiaro-inĩ cianyu ciothe; naguo ũndũ ũcio ũtuĩke mũtugo ũrĩa ndĩmũtuĩrĩire wa tene na tene.
Exodus12:18 Mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri ũcio wa mbere
Exodus12:19 Mĩthenya ĩo mũgwanja-rĩ
Exodus12:20 Mũtikanarĩe kĩndũ o na kĩ gĩĩkĩrĩtwo ndawa ya kũimbia mũgate; ciikaro-inĩ cianyu ciothe-rĩ
Exodus12:21 Hĩndĩ ĩo Musa agĩgĩĩtithia athuri othe a Isiraeli
Exodus12:22 Na mũcoke muoe kĩohe kĩmwe kĩa mathangũ ma mũthobi
Exodus12:23 Tondũ Jehova ekũgera bũrũri wothe wa andũ a Misiri
Exodus12:24 Naguo ũndũ ũcio nĩmũkaũmenyagĩrĩra ũtuĩke mũtugo ũrĩa ndĩmũtuĩrĩire
Exodus12:25 Na nĩgũgakinya atĩrĩ
Exodus12:26 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus12:27 nĩmũgakĩmacokeria mũmere atĩrĩ
Exodus12:28 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli igĩthiĩ
Exodus12:29 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Exodus12:30 Firauni agĩgĩũkĩra ũtukũ
Exodus12:31 Nake agĩĩta Musa na Haruni o hĩndĩ ĩo ya ũtukũ
Exodus12:32 Oyai mbũri cianyu
Exodus12:33 Nao andũ a Misiri makĩhĩkĩrĩria andũ a Isiraeli mũno
Exodus12:34 Nao andũ acio a Isiraeli magĩthiĩ na kĩmere kĩao kĩa mũtu wa ngano gĩtarĩ kĩimbie
Exodus12:35 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli igĩĩka o ta ũrĩa Musa aaciĩrire
Exodus12:36 nake Jehova agĩtũma andũ acio metĩkĩrĩke nĩ andũ a Misiri; tondũ ũcio magĩgĩĩtĩkĩra kũmahe indo o ta iria metagia. Magĩgĩtaha andũ a Misiri indo ciao.
Exodus12:37 NACIO ciana cia Isiraeli ikĩgwata rũgendo ciumĩte Ramesese
Exodus12:38 Na magĩthiĩ na kĩrĩndĩ kĩa andũ a mĩthemba mĩingĩ mathombocanĩte
Exodus12:39 Nao makĩruga mĩgate ĩtaimbĩtio ya kĩmere kĩa mũtu kĩu maarutĩte Misiri
Exodus12:40 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus12:41 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Exodus12:42 Ũtukũ ũcio nĩguo wagĩrĩire kũmenyererũo wamũrĩrũo Jehova
Exodus12:43 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Musa na Haruni ũũ: Mũtugo ũrĩa ndĩmũtuĩrĩire ũkoniĩ Bathaka nĩ ũyũ
Exodus12:44 no rĩrĩ
Exodus12:45 No mũũki arĩ mũrũrĩrĩ
Exodus12:46 Nĩĩrĩagĩrũo o nyũmba o nyũmba ĩmwe thĩinĩ; mũtikanoimie kanyama o na kanini kayo nja karutwo nyũmba
Exodus12:47 Na no mũhaka kĩrĩndĩ gĩothe gĩa ciana cia Isiraeli kĩririkanage ũhoro ũcio
Exodus12:48 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus12:49 Watho ũrĩgĩtuĩkaga o ũmwe wa gwatha mũndũ ũrĩa ũciarĩirũo bũrũri wanyu
Exodus12:50 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli ciothe igĩgĩĩka; o ta ũguo o ta ũrĩa Jehova aathire Musa na Haruni meke-rĩ
Exodus12:51 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ

Exodus13:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũmũthĩ nĩguo mwoimagara mũthiĩ
Exodus13:5 Na nĩgũgakinya atĩrĩ

Exodus13:9 Naguo nĩguo ũgũtuĩka rũũri rũĩkĩrĩtwo guoko gwaku
Exodus13:10 Tondũ ũcio tũũra ũririkanaga mũtugo ũyũ ngũtuĩrĩire o ihinda rĩaguo rĩakinya mwaka o mwaka.

Exodus21:22 Ningĩ arũme mangĩtetania
Exodus21:23 No rĩrĩ
Exodus21:24 na riitho riumage riitho
Exodus21:25 ningĩ-rĩ
Exodus21:26 Ningĩ mũndũ angĩgũtha ngombo yake ya mũndũ mũrũme kana ya mũirĩtu riitho rĩtũrĩke
Exodus21:27 Ningĩ angĩgũtha ngombo yake ya mũndũ mũrũme kana ya mũirĩtu igego
Exodus21:28 Ningĩ ndegwa ĩngĩtheca mũndũ mũrũme kana mũndũ-wa-nja na rũhĩa
Exodus21:29 No ndegwa ĩo ĩngĩkorũo nĩĩtũire ithecanaga kuuma o tene
Exodus21:30 No angĩĩtio mbia cia ũkũũri-rĩ
Exodus21:31 Ningĩ ĩngĩkorũo nĩ mũrũ wa mũndũ ĩthecete
Exodus21:32 No rĩrĩ
Exodus21:33 Ningĩ mũndũ angĩkunũra irima rĩake rĩa maĩ na ndarĩkunĩke
Exodus21:34 mwene irima rĩu nĩ kũrĩha akarĩha
Exodus21:35 Ningĩ ndegwa ya mũndũ ĩngĩgera ya ũrĩa ũngĩ ngero o nginya ĩkue-rĩ

Exodus22:1 Mũndũ angĩiya ng’ombe kana mbũri amĩthĩnje kana amĩendie
Exodus22:2 Na mũici ũcio angĩnyitwo akĩenja nyũmba
Exodus22:3 No rĩrĩ
Exodus22:4 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus22:5 Mũndũ angĩrĩithia mũgũnda wene
Exodus22:6 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus22:7 Mũndũ angĩnengera ũrĩa ũngĩ mbia ciake kana indo ingĩ ciake amũigĩre
Exodus22:8 No rĩrĩ
Exodus22:9 Nĩ gũkorũo ha ũhoro wothe wa kwagarara watho
Exodus22:10 Mũndũ angĩhithia ũrĩa ũngĩ ndigiri
Exodus22:11 nĩgũkagĩa mwĩhĩtwa mbere ya Jehova
Exodus22:12 No rĩrĩ
Exodus22:13 Ningĩ ĩngĩrĩĩka-rĩ
Exodus22:14 Na rĩrĩ

Exodus22:17 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus22:18 Ndũkanareke mũndũ-wa-nja mũrogi atũũre muoyo.
Exodus22:19 Mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ angĩgwata nyamũ ndarĩ hingo atakoragwo.
Exodus22:20 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũkarutĩra ngai ingĩ igongona
Exodus22:21 Ndũkaneke mũndũ wa kũngĩ ũũru
Exodus22:22 Ndũkananyarire mũka wa ndigwa o na ũrĩkũ
Exodus22:23 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus22:24 njinwo nĩ marakara
Exodus22:25 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus22:26 Ũngĩthiĩ na nguo ya mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ
Exodus22:27 nĩ gũkorũo nguo ĩo iiki noyo arĩ nayo ya kwĩhumba
Exodus22:28 Ndũkanarume Ngai

Exodus22:30 Na ũguo noguo ũgeka ũhoro-inĩ wa ng’ombe ciaku
Exodus22:31 Na inyuĩ nĩmũgatuĩka atheru
Exodus23:1 Ndũkanamemerekie ndeto cia maheni; ningĩ ndũkaneĩkĩre he mũndũ mwaganu ũhoro-inĩ wa kũiganĩrĩra kĩgenyo.
Exodus23:2 Ndũkanarũmanĩrĩre na mũingĩ ũgeke ũũru hamwe naguo
Exodus23:3 ningĩ ndũkanenderere mũndũ mũkĩa cira-inĩ wake.
Exodus23:4 Ũngĩtũnga ndegwa ya mũndũ ũrĩa mũrĩ ũthũ nake yũrĩte
Exodus23:5 Ningĩ ũngĩona ndigiri ya mũndũ ũrĩa ũgũthũũrĩte ĩgũĩte ĩkaremererũo nĩ mũrigo wayo
Exodus23:6 Ndũkanathũkĩrie mũthĩni wanyu cira wake ũrĩa e naguo.
Exodus23:7 Themaga ũhoro o wothe wa maheni; ningĩ ndũkanoragithie mũndũ ũtarĩ ũũru ekĩte
Exodus23:8 Ndũkanaamũkĩre ihaki o na atĩa
Exodus23:9 Na ndũkanahinyĩrĩrie mũndũ wa kũngĩ
Exodus23:10 Handaga irio mĩgũnda ya bũrũri waku mĩaka ĩtandatũ
Exodus23:11 no mwaka wa mũgwanja nĩũkareka ĩhurũke ĩruĩre
Exodus23:12 Ningĩ nĩ mĩthenya ĩtandatũ ũkarutaga wĩra waku
Exodus23:13 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus23:14 Atĩrĩrĩ
Exodus23:15 Gĩathĩ kĩa mbere-rĩ
Exodus23:16 Gĩathĩ kĩrĩa kĩngĩ nĩ imatha rĩa irio cia mũro wa mbere
Exodus23:17 Nĩ mahinda matatũ o mwaka arũme othe thĩinĩ wanyu marĩthiaga kwĩonania mbere ya Mwathani Jehova.
Exodus23:18 Ndũkanathenganĩrĩrie mũgate mũimbie na thakame ya igongona rĩakwa
Exodus23:19 Maciaro ma mbere ma irio cia mũro wa mbere cia mĩgũnda yaku
Exodus23:20 Atĩrĩrĩ
Exodus23:21 Menyagĩrĩrai mũno ũhoro wake
Exodus23:22 No rĩrĩ
Exodus23:23 Nĩ gũkorũo mũraika wakwa nĩegũkũgĩa mbere
Exodus23:24 Ndũkanainamĩrĩre ngai ciao ũcihoe
Exodus23:25 Jehova Ngai wanyu nowe inyuĩ mũgatungatĩra
Exodus23:26 Bũrũri waku-rĩ

Exodus23:28 Ningĩ nĩngarekia magi me mbora
Exodus23:29 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus23:30 No rĩrĩ
Exodus23:31 Naguo mũhaka wa bũrũri waku

Exodus23:33 Andũ acio matikanatũũre bũrũri waku
Exodus24:1 Ningĩ akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus24:2 na Musa wiki nowe ũgũũka gũkuhĩhĩria Jehova; acio angĩ-rĩ
Exodus24:3 Nake Musa agĩthiĩ akĩhe andũ mohoro macio mothe aaheetwo nĩ Jehova
Exodus24:4 Nake Musa akĩandĩka mohoro macio mothe ma Jehova
Exodus24:5 Ningĩ akĩrekia aanake amwe a ciana cia Isiraeli
Exodus24:6 Nake Musa akĩgayania thakame yacio kerĩ; ĩmwe akĩmĩĩkĩra mbakũri-inĩ
Exodus24:7 Agĩcoka akĩoya ibuku rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro
Exodus24:8 Ningĩ Musa akĩoya thakame
Exodus24:9 Thutha wa ũguo Musa akĩambata marĩ na Haruni
Exodus24:10 nao makĩĩonera Ngai wa Isiraeli; naho harĩa aakinyĩte na magũrũ make
Exodus24:11 Nao anene acio a ciana cia Isiraeli ndaigana kũmeka ũũru; tondũ nĩmonire Ngai
Exodus24:12 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus24:13 Nake Musa agĩũkĩra
Exodus24:14 agĩtiga era athuri atĩrĩ
Exodus24:15 Musa agĩgĩcoka akĩambata kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩu
Exodus24:16 Naguo riri wa Jehova ũkĩiyũra kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩu gĩa Sinai igũrũ
Exodus24:17 Naguo riri wa Jehova ũrĩ o igũrũ gacũmbĩrĩ ga kĩrĩma kĩu ũkĩonwo nĩ ciana cia Isiraeli-rĩ
Exodus24:18 Nake Musa agĩtonya gatagatĩ-inĩ ga itu rĩu thĩinĩ
Exodus25:1 Jehova agĩkĩaria na Musa
Exodus25:2 Arĩria ciana cia Isiraeli
Exodus25:3 Nacio indo iria ũrĩhothithagia kũrĩ cio cia kũndutĩra nĩ ici
Exodus25:4 na ndigi cia rangi wa bururu
Exodus25:5 na njũa cia ndũrũme itoboketio rangi-inĩ igatunĩha
Exodus25:6 na maguta ma gwakio
Exodus25:7 na tũhiga tũrĩa twĩtagwo onigithi
Exodus25:8 ma’thondekere handũ haamũre ha gũikara nĩ getha njikarage thĩinĩ wao.
Exodus25:9 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus25:10 Nĩmagathondeka ithandũkũ rĩa mbaũ cia mũtĩ ta mũgaa; na kũraiha kwarĩo gũtuĩke mĩkono ĩĩrĩ na nuthu
Exodus25:11 Nawe nĩũkarĩĩkĩra thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno mbarĩ ciothe
Exodus25:12 Ũcoke ũthondeke icũhĩ inya cia thahabu
Exodus25:13 Ningĩ wacũhie mĩtĩ mĩraya ya mũthemba ta mũgaa
Exodus25:14 na mĩtĩ ĩo mĩraya ũmĩtonyie icũhĩ-inĩ icio irĩ mĩena-inĩ ya ithandũkũ rĩu
Exodus25:15 Mĩtĩ ĩo mĩraya-rĩ
Exodus25:16 Naguo ũira ũrĩa ngakũhe ũwĩkĩre ithandũkũ-inĩ rĩu thĩinĩ.
Exodus25:17 Ningĩ ũthondeke gĩikaro-gĩa-tha na thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno; kũraiha gwakĩo gũtuĩke mĩkono ĩĩrĩ na nuthu
Exodus25:18 ũcoke ũthondeke makerubi merĩ ma thahabu
Exodus25:19 ũthondeke kerubi ĩmwe ĩikare mũthia ũmwe
Exodus25:20 Namo makerubi macio matambũrũkie mathagu mamo na igũrũ
Exodus25:21 Nakĩo gĩikaro-kĩu-gĩa-tha ũkĩigĩrĩre igũrũ rĩa ithandũkũ rĩu
Exodus25:22 Hau nĩho ngacemanagia nawe
Exodus25:23 Ningĩ nĩũgathondeka metha ya mbaũ cia mũtĩ ta mũgaa
Exodus25:24 Ũcoke ũmĩĩkĩre thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno igũrũ rĩayo guothe
Exodus25:25 O na ningĩ ũmĩĩkĩre kabaũ gaceke mĩena yothe kamĩrigicĩrie; nako kaarame o ta ũrĩa rũhĩ rũaramĩte
Exodus25:26 Ũcoke ũmithondekere icũhĩ inya cia thahabu
Exodus25:27 Nacio icũhĩ icio ikuhanĩrĩrie na kabaũ kau gaceke karigicĩirie metha
Exodus25:28 Nayo mĩtĩ ĩo mĩraya ũmĩacũhie ya mũthemba ta mũgaa
Exodus25:29 Ningĩ ũcoke ũthondeke thani ciayo
Exodus25:30 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus25:31 Ningĩ ũcoke ũthondeke mũtĩ wa kũigĩrĩrũo matawa na thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno; naguo mũtĩ ũcio ũtuĩke wa gũturũo
Exodus25:32 Nĩ wega hagĩe honge ithathatũ ciumĩte mĩena-inĩ yaguo; honge ithatũ cia mũtĩ wa kũigĩrĩrũo matawa ciume mwena ũmwe
Exodus25:33 ningĩ rũhonge-inĩ rũmwe hagĩe ikombe ithatũ itariĩ ta mahũa ma mũrothi
Exodus25:34 O naguo mũtĩ-inĩ ũcio wa kũigĩrĩrũo matawa guo wene hagĩe ikombe inya itariĩ ta mahũa ma mũrothi
Exodus25:35 ningĩ hagĩe gĩkonyo kĩmwe kĩgwatanĩtie honge igĩrĩ; nakĩo gĩtuĩke o ro kĩmwe na mũtĩ ũcio; o ũguo taguo hagĩe gĩkonyo o kĩmwe kĩngĩ kĩgwatanĩtie honge ingĩ igĩrĩ
Exodus25:36 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus25:37 Ningĩ ũthondeke matawa maguo
Exodus25:38 Naguo mwĩhato waguo
Exodus25:39 Ningĩ mũtĩ ũcio na indo ciothe ciaguo
Exodus25:40 Na ũmenyerere ũcithondeke o ta ũrĩa mũhianĩre wacio ũtariĩ
Exodus26:1 O na ningĩ nĩũgathondeka gĩikaro kĩgĩe na matama ikũmi macunjurĩtio
Exodus26:2 Naguo ũraihu wa tama o tama ũtuĩke mĩkono mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩnana
Exodus26:3 Matama matano-rĩ
Exodus26:4 Ningĩ ũgakundĩkĩrĩra ciana cia ndigi cia rangi wa bururu
Exodus26:5 Ũgakundĩka ciana mĩrongo ĩtano cia ndigi ũciĩkĩre tama-inĩ ũmwe; o na ũkundĩke ciana ingĩ mĩrongo ĩtano cia ndigi
Exodus26:6 Ningĩ ũcoke ũthondeke ngathĩka mĩrongo ĩtano cia thahabu ũnyitithanie matama macio
Exodus26:7 Ningĩ ũgathondeka matama ma gũcunjurio ma ngore cia mbũri matuĩke hema ya kũhumba gĩikaro kĩu; ũmathondeke ikũmi na ũmwe.
Exodus26:8 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus26:9 Matama matano-rĩ
Exodus26:10 Ningĩ ũgakundĩkĩrĩra ciana mĩrongo ĩtano cia ndigi
Exodus26:11 Ũcoke ũthondeke ngathĩka mĩrongo ĩtano cia gĩcango ũcitonyie ndigi-inĩ cia ciana icio ngundĩke ũnyitithanie matama macio
Exodus26:12 Nakĩo gĩcunjĩ kĩa matama macio ma hema ĩo kĩrĩa kĩraiharaihu gũkĩra harĩa gĩikaro kĩu gĩakinya
Exodus26:13 Naguo mũkono ũmwe wa matama ma mwena ũmwe
Exodus26:14 Ningĩ ũcoke ũthondekere hema ĩo kĩandarũa kĩa njũa cia ndũrũme
Exodus26:15 Ningĩ ũgaatũra mbaũ cia gwaka gĩikaro kĩu cia mũtĩ ta mũgaa
Exodus26:16 Na kũraiha kwa rũbaũ
Exodus26:17 Ningĩ o rũbaũ rũgĩe na tũng’ote twĩrĩ twa kũnyitithania mbaũ icio; ũguo nĩguo ũgathondeka mbaũ ciothe cia gĩikaro kĩu.
Exodus26:18 Nacio mbaũ cia mwena wa gũthini wa gĩikaro kĩu
Exodus26:19 Ningĩ ũcoke ũthondeke makinya ma betha mĩrongo ĩna
Exodus26:20 Ningĩ mwena ũrĩa ũngĩ wa gĩikaro kĩu
Exodus26:21 hamwe na makinya ma cio mĩrongo ĩna ma betha; o makinya merĩ ma kũigĩrĩrũo rũbaũ rũmwe
Exodus26:22 Ningĩ mwena wa na thutha wa gĩikaro kĩu
Exodus26:23 Ningĩ ũgathondeka mbaũ igĩrĩ cia gwĩkĩrũo tuune-inĩ twerĩ twa na kũu thutha wa gĩikaro kĩu
Exodus26:24 irutio o mũhuro irĩ o igĩrĩ igĩrĩ
Exodus26:25 handũ hau hagĩe mbaũ inyanya na makinya ma cio ma betha ikũmi na matandatũ
Exodus26:26 Ningĩ ũcoke ũthondeke mĩgamba ya mĩtĩ ta mũgaa; ĩtano yayo ĩtuĩke ya kũnyita mbaũ cia mwena ũmwe wa gĩikaro kĩu
Exodus26:27 o na ĩngĩ ĩtano ya kũnyita mbaũ cia mwena ũrĩa ũngĩ wakĩo; na hacoke hagĩe mĩgamba ĩngĩ ĩtano ya kũnyita mwena wa na thutha wa gĩikaro kĩu
Exodus26:28 Naguo mũgamba wa gatagatĩ
Exodus26:29 Nacio mbaũ icio irũngiĩ ciothe ũgacihumba igũrũ guothe na thahabu
Exodus26:30 Nakĩo gĩikaro kĩu ũgagĩaka o ta ũrĩa mũthondekere wakĩo ũrĩa wonetio kĩrĩma-inĩ watariĩ.
Exodus26:31 Ningĩ ũgatuma gĩtama gĩa kũhakania na ndigi cia rangi wa bururu
Exodus26:32 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus26:33 Nakĩo gĩtama kĩu gĩa kũhakania ũgagĩcuuria mũhuro wa mũhari ũrĩa ũrĩ ngathĩka
Exodus26:34 Ningĩ gĩikaro-gĩa-tha ũgakĩigĩrĩra igũrũ rĩa ithandũkũ rĩa ũira
Exodus26:35 Nayo metha ũmĩige mwena wa na nja wa gĩtama kĩu gĩa kũhakania
Exodus26:36 Naguo mũromo-inĩ wa Hema-rĩ
Exodus26:37 Ningĩ tama ũcio wa kweheheragio ũũthondekere itugĩ ithano harĩa ũrĩhocagio
Exodus27:1 Nakĩo kĩgongona-rĩ
Exodus27:2 Ningĩ hĩa ciakĩo ũcithondeke igũrũ tuune-inĩ tuothe tũna twakĩo
Exodus27:3 Ningĩ ũgĩthondekere nyũngũ cia kũrutaga mũhu wakĩo
Exodus27:4 Ningĩ ũgĩthondekere kĩrũgara gĩa gĩcango
Exodus27:5 Ũcoke wĩkĩre kĩrũgara kĩu mũhurahuro wa mũnyamũ ũrĩa ũrigicũkĩte kĩgongona na kũu thĩ
Exodus27:6 Ningĩ wacũhĩrie kĩgongona kĩu mĩtĩ mĩraya ya mũthemba ta mũgaa
Exodus27:7 Nayo mĩtĩ ĩo mĩraya ĩtonyio icũhĩ-inĩ
Exodus27:8 Ningĩ ũgathondeka kĩgongona kĩu na mbaũ mĩena yothe
Exodus27:9 Ningĩ ũgathondeka handũ hatuĩke nja ya gĩikaro kĩu
Exodus27:10 ningĩ mwena ũcio ũgĩe itugĩ mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ
Exodus27:11 O ũguo taguo mwena wa gathigathini ũwĩkĩre ciandarũa igetetwo; nakuo kwarama gwacio kwa mũkĩgiĩ gũtuĩke mĩkono igana nacio itugĩ cia mwena ũcio ituĩke mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ
Exodus27:12 Ningĩ hagĩe ciandarũa ingĩ igetetwo mwena wa ithũĩro
Exodus27:13 Nakuo kwarama kwa nja ĩo mwena wa irathĩro
Exodus27:14 Nakuo kwarama kwa mũkĩgiĩ gwa ciandarũa cia mwena ũmwe wa mũromo wa nja ĩo gũtuĩke mĩkono ikũmi na ĩtano
Exodus27:15 O naguo mwena ũrĩa ũngĩ hagĩe ciandarũa ingĩ
Exodus27:16 Ningĩ mũromo-inĩ wa nja ĩo hagĩe tama wa kweheheragio
Exodus27:17 Ningĩ itugĩ ciothe iria ikũrigicĩria nja ĩo inyitithanio na tũthanju twa betha
Exodus27:18 Na ũraihu wa nja ĩo ũtuĩke mĩkono igana
Exodus27:19 Nacio indo ciothe iria irutagwo wĩra nacio rĩakĩro-inĩ rĩa hema ĩo
Exodus27:20 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus27:21 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus28:1 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus28:2 Ningĩ ũtumithĩrie Haruni mũrũ wa nyũkwa nguo nyamũre cia kũmũnenehagia
Exodus28:3 Aria na andũ othe arĩa me na ũũgĩ ngoro
Exodus28:4 Nacio nguo iria andũ acio magatuma nĩ ici: nĩ gakuo ga gĩthũri
Exodus28:5 Nao makaruta wĩra ũcio na thahabu
Exodus28:6 Nayo ebodi makamĩtuma na ndigi cia thahabu
Exodus28:7 Nĩ wega ebodi ĩo ĩkagĩa na ngwa igĩrĩ cia kũmĩnyitithanĩria ciande-inĩ
Exodus28:8 Naguo mwĩhotoro wayo ũrĩa ũgemetio wega wa kũmĩnyitia wa igũrũ rĩayo
Exodus28:9 Ningĩ woe tũhiga twĩrĩ twa onigithi
Exodus28:10 marĩĩtwa matandatũ ma cio makururũo kahiga-inĩ kamwe
Exodus28:11 Tũhiga tũu twerĩ nĩũgatũkururithia marĩĩtwa ma ciana cia Isiraeli o ta ũrĩa matariĩ
Exodus28:12 Natuo tũhiga tũu twerĩ ũtwĩkĩre ngwa-inĩ icio igĩrĩ cia kũnyitithanĩria ebodi ĩo ciande-inĩ
Exodus28:13 Ningĩ ũgathondeka tũkonyo tũgemie twa thahabu
Exodus28:14 na irengeri igĩrĩ cia thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno
Exodus28:15 Ningĩ ũgathondeka gakuo ga ituĩro rĩa cira ga gĩthũri; nako gathondekwo nĩ mũtumi mũũhĩgĩrĩru wĩra ũcio
Exodus28:16 Nako gathunanĩrũo kerĩ
Exodus28:17 Na ũgagathecerera tũhiga twa goro tũkonyo-inĩ twatuo ũtũnyitithanie nako
Exodus28:18 o naguo mũhari wa kerĩ wĩkĩrũo kahiga ga thumarati
Exodus28:19 o naguo mũhari wa gatatũ
Exodus28:20 o naguo mũhari wa kana wĩkĩrũo kahiga ga thumarati ĩrĩa theru
Exodus28:21 O natuo tũhiga tũu tũiganane na marĩĩtwa ma ciana cia Isiraeli tũtuĩke ikũmi na twĩrĩ
Exodus28:22 Nako gakuo kau ga gĩthũri
Exodus28:23 Ningĩ ũgekĩra gakuo-inĩ kau icũhĩ igĩrĩ cia thahabu
Exodus28:24 Nacio irengeri icio cierĩ njogothe cia thahabu
Exodus28:25 O nayo mĩthia ĩrĩa ingĩ yerĩ ya irengeri icio njogothe
Exodus28:26 O na ningĩ ũgathondeka icũhĩ ingĩ igĩrĩ cia thahabu
Exodus28:27 O na ningĩ ũgathondeka icũhĩ o ingĩ igĩrĩ cia thahabu
Exodus28:28 Nako gakuo kau ga gĩthũri kanyitithanio na ebodi
Exodus28:29 Nake Haruni agĩthiĩ gũtonya handũ harĩa hatheru mũno
Exodus28:30 Ningĩ ũgekĩra Urimu na Thumimu gakuo-inĩ kau ga gũtuaga cira
Exodus28:31 Nayo nguo ĩo ndaya ya kwĩhumbanĩrio na ebodi ũkamĩtũma ya rangi wa bururu yothe.
Exodus28:32 Na igĩe irima gatagatĩ kayo rĩa gũtonyagĩria mũtwe
Exodus28:33 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus28:34 ũthiĩ ũkĩhakanagia o njingiri ĩmwe ya thahabu na ikomamanga rĩmwe
Exodus28:35 Nayo nguo ĩo ĩkehumbagwo nĩ Haruni akĩruta wĩra wake wa gũtungatĩra Jehova; nacio njingiri icio ciiguagwo ikĩgamba agĩtonya handũ harĩa hatheru mũno mbere ya Jehova
Exodus28:36 Ningĩ ũgathondeka gathuma ga thahabu therie mũno
Exodus28:37 ũgatumĩrĩre rũkwa-inĩ rũa rangi wa bururu
Exodus28:38 Nako gathuma kau gaikarage thiithi wake
Exodus28:39 Ningĩ kanjũ wa Haruni ũkaũtuma wĩ marooro wa gatani ĩrĩa njega; na ũmũthondekere kĩremba gĩa gatani ĩrĩa njega mũno; o na ũmũthondekĩthĩrie mwĩhotoro
Exodus28:40 O nao ariũ a Haruni ũkamathondekĩthĩria makanjũ
Exodus28:41 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus28:42 Ningĩ ũmatumithĩrie thuruarĩ cia gatani cia kũhumbĩra njaga ya mĩĩrĩ yao; nacio thuruarĩ icio ciĩhumbagwo kuuma njohero-inĩ nginya ciero-inĩ;
Exodus28:43 na ciĩhumbagwo nĩ Haruni na ariũ ake o magĩtonya hema-inĩ-ya-gũtũnganwo
Exodus29:1 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus29:2 na woe mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩimbie
Exodus29:3 Ũcoke wĩkĩre mĩgate ĩo gĩkabu-inĩ kĩmwe
Exodus29:4 Ningĩ Haruni na ariũ ake
Exodus29:5 Ũcoke woe nguo icio ũhumbe Haruni kanjũ ũcio
Exodus29:6 na ũmwĩkĩre kĩremba mũtwe; nako gatanji karĩa kaamũre ũgekĩre kĩremba-inĩ igũrũ.
Exodus29:7 Hĩndĩ ĩo ũcoke woe maguta ma gũitanĩrĩrio
Exodus29:8 O nao ariũ ake ũmarehe
Exodus29:9 Ningĩ ũkamahotora mĩĩhotoro
Exodus29:10 Nayo ndegwa ĩo ũkamĩtwara na hau kabere ka mũromo wa hema-ya-gũtũnganwo
Exodus29:11 ũcoke ũthĩnjĩre ndegwa ĩo mũromo-inĩ wa hema-ya-gũtũnganwo mbere ya Jehova.
Exodus29:12 Ningĩ woe thakame ĩmwe ya ndegwa ĩo ũmĩĩkĩre hĩa-inĩ cia kĩgongona na kĩara gĩaku; nayo thakame ĩo ĩngĩ yothe ũmĩite hau thĩ kĩgongona-inĩ;
Exodus29:13 na woe rũambũ ruothe
Exodus29:14 No rĩrĩ
Exodus29:15 Ningĩ ũcoke woe ndũrũme ĩmwe
Exodus29:16 Nayo ndũrũme ĩo
Exodus29:17 Ningĩ ũtinangie ndũrũme ĩo icunjĩ
Exodus29:18 Nayo ndũrũme ĩo yothe ũmĩcinĩre igũrũ rĩa kĩgongona; ndũrũme ĩo nĩyo ĩrutĩirũo Jehova ya ihaki rĩa njino
Exodus29:19 Nayo ndũrũme ĩrĩa ĩngĩ ũcoke ũmĩoe
Exodus29:20 Nawe ũcoke ũthĩnje ndũrũme ĩo
Exodus29:21 Ningĩ woe thakame ĩmwe thĩinĩ wa ĩrĩa ĩrĩ igũrũ rĩa kĩgongona
Exodus29:22 Ningĩ woe maguta ma ndũrũme ĩo
Exodus29:23 ningĩ woe mũgate ũmwe
Exodus29:24 nacio indo icio ciothe ũgaciigĩrĩra hĩ-inĩ cia Haruni
Exodus29:25 Ningĩ ũcoke ũcioe
Exodus29:26 O na ningĩ woe gĩthũri kĩa ndũrũme ĩo ya gũtua Haruni atĩ nĩ mwamũrĩre wĩra ũcio wake mũtheru
Exodus29:27 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus29:28 nacio icunjĩ icio irĩtuĩkaga cia Haruni
Exodus29:29 Nacio nguo icio nyamũre cia Haruni igatuĩka cia ariũ ake arĩa magacoka ithenya rĩake
Exodus29:30 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus29:31 Ningĩ woe ndũrũme ĩo ya kũmwamũra atuwo mũtheru ũrugĩre nyama ciayo handũ hatheru.
Exodus29:32 Na nĩ wega Haruni na ariũ ake marĩĩre nyama cia ndũrũme ĩo
Exodus29:33 Acio nĩo makarĩa indo icio cia horohio o icio maamũrĩtwo magatherio nacio; no itikanarĩo nĩ mũndũ ũngĩ nĩ ũndũ nĩ nyamũre.
Exodus29:34 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus29:35 Maũndũ macio nĩmo ũgekaga Haruni
Exodus29:36 Na mũthenya o mũthenya
Exodus29:37 Ũkanina matukũ mũgwanja o ũkĩruta horohio icio cia kĩgongona kĩu
Exodus29:38 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus29:39 Gatũrũme kamwe gatuo ũgakarutaga rũcinĩ
Exodus29:40 na rĩrĩa ũkũruta gatũrũme kau kamwe ũgakarutanagĩria na mũtu ũrĩa mwega mũhinyu mũno ibaba ithatũ
Exodus29:41 Nako gatũrũme karĩa kangĩ ũgakaruta igongona hwaĩ-inĩ
Exodus29:42 Na atĩrĩrĩ igongona rĩu nĩrĩo rĩgatuĩka ihaki rĩa njino rĩa gũtũũra rĩrutagĩrũo mbere ya Jehova hĩndĩ ciothe njiaro-inĩ cianyu ciothe o kũu mũromo-inĩ wa hema-ya-gũtũnganwo. Hau nĩho ngatũnganaga na inyuĩ nĩguo ngwaragĩrie ndĩ ho.
Exodus29:43 Ningĩ hau nĩho ngatũnganaga na ciana cia Isiraeli
Exodus29:44 Ningĩ hema-ya-gũtũnganwo o na kĩgongona kĩu nĩngaciamũra ndĩcitherie; nake Haruni na ariũ ake ndĩmaamũre ndĩmatherie
Exodus29:45 Na niĩ nĩngatũũrania na ciana cia Isiraeli njikare hamwe nacio
Exodus29:46 Nacio nĩikamenya atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova Ngai wacio ũrĩa wacirutire bũrũri wa Misiri
Exodus30:1 Ningĩ nĩũgathondeka kĩgongona gĩa gũcinagĩrũo ũbumba igũrũ rĩakĩo

Exodus30:3 Na ũgakĩhumba guothe na thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno

Exodus30:5 Ningĩ ũgathondeka mĩtĩ ĩo ĩĩrĩ na mũtĩ wa mũthemba ta mũgaa
Exodus30:6 Na ũcoke ũige kĩgongona kĩu mwena wa na nja wa gĩtama kĩrĩa gĩa kũhakania
Exodus30:7 Nake Haruni agacinagĩra ũbumba igũrũ rĩakĩo

Exodus30:9 Mũtikanacinĩre ũbumba wa mũthemba ũngĩ igũrũ rĩakĩo

Exodus30:11 Nake Jehova akĩarĩria Musa
Exodus30:12 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũgũtara ciana cia Isiraeli nĩ ũndũ wa kũmenya ũrĩa ciigana-rĩ
Exodus30:13 Kĩndũ kĩrĩa marĩrutaga nĩ rĩrĩ
Exodus30:14 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũkinyĩtie mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ
Exodus30:15 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus30:16 Nacio cekeri icio cia horohio ũciĩtie ciana cia Isiraeli ũcitue cia wĩra wa hema-ya-gũtũnganwo
Exodus30:17 Ningĩ Jehova akĩarĩria Musa
Exodus30:18 Nĩũgathondeka kĩnyũngũ gĩa gwĩthambĩrũo gĩa gĩcango
Exodus30:19 nao Haruni na ariũ ake methambagĩre moko mao o na magũrũ mao ho.
Exodus30:20 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa megũtonya hema-ya-gũtũnganwo-rĩ
Exodus30:21 Ũguo nĩguo marĩĩthambaga moko mao o na magũrũ
Exodus30:22 O na ningĩ Jehova akĩarĩria Musa
Exodus30:23 Oya mahuti marĩa manungaga wega mĩthemba ĩrĩa mĩega makĩria
Exodus30:24 O namo mahuti ma mũtĩ ũrĩa ũngĩ ũnungaga wega wa mũthemba ta ndarathini
Exodus30:25 na rĩrĩ
Exodus30:26 Nayo hema-ya-gũtũnganwo ũmĩitĩrĩrie maguta macio
Exodus30:27 na metha
Exodus30:28 na kĩgongona kĩrĩa gĩcinagĩrũo indo iria irutĩtwo cia mahaki ma njino
Exodus30:29 Nacio indo icio ciothe ũgaciamũra ũcitherie
Exodus30:30 Nake Haruni na ariũ ake ũkamaitĩrĩria maguta
Exodus30:31 Nawe ũkaaria na ciana cia Isiraeli ũciĩre atĩrĩ
Exodus30:32 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus30:33 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũrĩthondekaga mangĩ mathombocanĩtio tamo

Exodus30:35 Ũcoke ũthondeke mahuti macio matuĩke ũbumba wĩ na mũtararĩko ta wa mahuti mathondeke nĩ mũndũ mũũhĩgĩrĩru ũthondeki wamo
Exodus30:36 Ningĩ ũmwe waguo ũũthĩe ũhinye mũno

Exodus34:1 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus34:2 Nawe ũroke gũkorũo wĩthagathagĩte rũciũ rũcinĩ
Exodus34:3 Na hatikagĩe mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ũkwambatania nawe
Exodus34:4 Musa agĩkĩĩicũhĩria ihengere igĩrĩ cia mahiga itariĩ o ta iria cia mbere; agĩkĩroka gũũkĩra rũcinĩ tene
Exodus34:5 Nake Jehova agĩgĩikũrũka
Exodus34:6 Nake Jehova akĩhĩtũkĩra mbere yake akĩanagĩrĩra akiugaga atĩrĩ
Exodus34:7 na aiguagĩra andũ ngiri na ngiri tha; na nĩwe Ngai ũrĩa muohanĩri waganu
Exodus34:8 Nake Musa akĩhiũha kũinamia ũthiũ na thĩ
Exodus34:9 agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus34:10 Nake Jehova akiuga ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Exodus34:11 Maũndũ marĩa mothe ngũgwatha ũmũthĩ-rĩ
Exodus34:12 Wĩmenyagĩrĩre ndũkanagĩe karĩĩko o na kanini na andũ arĩa matũũraga bũrũri ũcio ũgũthiĩ
Exodus34:13 no rĩrĩ
Exodus34:14 Nĩ gũkorũo ndũrĩ hingo ũkainamĩrĩra ũhoe ngai ingĩ
Exodus34:15 nĩ getha ndũkanarĩkanĩre na andũ arĩa matũũraga bũrũri ũcio
Exodus34:16 na hihi ũcoke ũgũrĩre ariũ aku airĩtu ao
Exodus34:17 Ndũkanetwekerie indo ũcitue ngai cia kũhoyũo.
Exodus34:18 Tũũra ũmenyereire gĩathĩ kĩa mĩgate ĩrĩa itarĩ mĩimbie. Mĩgate ĩo ĩtarĩ mĩimbie ũkamĩrĩaga mĩthenya mũgwanja
Exodus34:19 Kĩrĩa gĩothe kĩrĩrigithathagwo nĩ gĩakwa
Exodus34:20 Narĩo irigithathi o rĩothe rĩa ndigiri
Exodus34:21 Nĩũkarutaga wĩra mĩthenya ĩtandatũ
Exodus34:22 Na ũmenyagĩrĩre gĩathĩ kĩrĩa gĩĩtagwo ’gĩathĩ gĩa Ciumia’
Exodus34:23 Nĩ mahinda matatũ
Exodus34:24 Nĩ ũndũ nĩ kũingata ngaingata andũ a ndũrĩrĩ iria ingĩ makweherere
Exodus34:25 Ndũkanathenganĩrĩrie thakame ya igongona rĩakwa na mĩgate mĩimbie; o nacio indo iria irutagwo cia igongona rĩa Bathaka ndũkanareke itigario iraare nginya rũcinĩ.
Exodus34:26 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus34:27 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus34:28 Nake agĩikara hau marĩ na Jehova mĩthenya mĩrongo ĩna
Exodus34:29 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Exodus34:30 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus34:31 Musa agĩkĩmeta
Exodus34:32 Thutha wa ũguo
Exodus34:33 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus34:34 No rĩrĩ
Exodus34:35 nacio ciana cia Isiraeli ikĩona ũthiũ wa Musa-rĩ
Exodus35:1 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus35:2 Wĩra ũrĩrutagwo mĩthenya ĩtandatũ; no rĩrĩ
Exodus35:3 Mũtigaakie mwaki o na atĩa mũthenya ũcio wa thabatũ kũndũ kũrĩa guothe mũtũũrĩte.
Exodus35:4 Nake Musa akĩaria na kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩothe gĩa ciana cia Isiraeli
Exodus35:5 Hothithaniai thĩinĩ wanyu indo cia kũrutĩrũo Jehova; mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũkũigua ngoro yake ĩkĩenda-rĩ
Exodus35:6 na ndigi cia rangi wa bururu
Exodus35:7 na njũa cia ndũrũme itoboketio rangi-inĩ igatunĩha
Exodus35:8 na maguta ma gwakio
Exodus35:9 na tũhiga tũrĩa twĩtagwo onigithi
Exodus35:10 Na nĩ wega andũ othe arĩa marĩ na ngoro ya ũũgĩ thĩinĩ wanyu moke
Exodus35:11 nacio nĩcio gĩikaro kĩu
Exodus35:12 ningĩ mathondeke ithandũkũ rĩa ũira
Exodus35:13 na metha
Exodus35:14 na mũtĩ wa kũigĩrĩrũo matawa ma kũmũrĩka na indo ciaguo
Exodus35:15 na kĩgongona gĩa gũcinĩrũo ũbumba
Exodus35:16 na kĩgongona kĩa mahaki ma njino
Exodus35:17 na ciandarũa iria icunjuragio mĩena-inĩ hau nja ya gĩikaro
Exodus35:18 na higĩ cia gĩikaro
Exodus35:19 na nguo irĩ riri ndume wega cia kũrutaga wĩra nacio handũ hau hatheru
Exodus35:20 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ gĩothe gĩa ciana cia Isiraeli gĩkiuma harĩ Musa gĩkĩharagania.
Exodus35:21 Nao andũ othe arĩa maarĩ na ngoro ciahĩahĩaga nĩ kwenda gwĩka wega
Exodus35:22 Nao magĩthiĩ ho othe
Exodus35:23 Ningĩ andũ othe
Exodus35:24 Nao andũ othe
Exodus35:25 Nao andũ-a-nja othe arĩa maarĩ na ngoro irĩ na ũũgĩ makĩogotha ndigi na moko mao
Exodus35:26 O nao andũ-a-nja othe arĩa maarĩ na ngoro ciahĩahĩaga nĩ kũgĩa na ũũgĩ
Exodus35:27 Nao aathani magĩtwara onigithi
Exodus35:28 na mahuti marĩa manungaga wega
Exodus35:29 Ũguo noguo ciana cia Isiraeli ciatwarire na kwĩendera indo cia kũrutĩrũo Jehova; andũ othe
Exodus35:30 Nake Musa akĩĩra ciana cia Isiraeli ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Exodus35:31 na akamũiyũria roho wa Ngai
Exodus35:32 ningĩ ahotage gũthugunda mĩrutĩre ya mawĩra ma ũũgĩ marĩa makoniĩ thahabu
Exodus35:33 o na makoniĩ wacũhia wa tũhiga twa gũthecererũo indo-inĩ
Exodus35:34 Ningĩ nĩamwĩkĩrĩte ngoro-inĩ yake ũhoti wa kũrutana
Exodus35:35 Acio nĩo aiyũrĩtie ũũgĩ ngoro-inĩ ciao
Exodus36:1 Nao Beza-leli na Oholiabu nĩo mekũruta mawĩra macio
Exodus36:2 Nake Musa agĩgĩĩta Bezaleli na Oholiabu
Exodus36:3 nao makĩnengerũo nĩ Musa indo ciothe iria ciarutĩtwo
Exodus36:4 Nao andũ arĩa othe maarĩ na ũũgĩ
Exodus36:5 magĩkĩarĩria Musa
Exodus36:6 Nake Musa agĩkĩheana ũhoro agĩathana
Exodus36:7 nĩ ũndũ iria maarutĩte nĩciaiganĩte cia kũruta wĩra waho nacio
Exodus36:8 Na mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa warĩ na ngoro ya ũũgĩ thĩinĩ wa arĩa maarutaga wĩra ũcio
Exodus36:9 Ũraihu wa tama o tama ũgĩkorũo wĩ wa mĩkono mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩnana
Exodus36:10 Nao makĩnyitithania matama matano hamwe makĩmaturumithania o namo matama macio mangĩ matano makĩmanyitithania hamwe makĩmaturumithania o ro ũguo.
Exodus36:11 Ningĩ magĩkundĩkĩrĩra ciana cia ndigi cia rangi wa bururu
Exodus36:12 Magĩgĩkundĩka ciana mĩrongo ĩtano cia ndigi
Exodus36:13 Na ningĩ magĩthondeka ngathĩka mĩrongo ĩtano cia thahabu
Exodus36:14 Ningĩ magĩthondeka matama ma gũcunjurio ma ngore cia mbũri
Exodus36:15 Naguo ũraihu wa tama o tama ũgĩtuĩka mĩkono mĩrongo ĩtatũ
Exodus36:16 Matama matano-rĩ
Exodus36:17 Ningĩ magĩkundĩkĩrĩra ciana mĩrongo ĩtano cia ndigi
Exodus36:18 Ningĩ magĩthondeka ngathĩka mĩrongo ĩtano cia gĩcango
Exodus36:19 Ningĩ magĩthondekera hema ĩo kĩandarũa kĩa njũa cia ndũrũme itoboketio rangi-inĩ igatunĩha
Exodus36:20 Nacio mbaũ cia gwaka gĩikaro kĩu magĩciatũra cia mũtĩ ta mũgaa
Exodus36:21 Naguo ũraihu wa rũbaũ o rũbaũ ũgĩtuĩka mĩkono ikũmi
Exodus36:22 Naruo rũbaũ o rũbaũ
Exodus36:23 Magĩgĩthondeka mbaũ cia gĩikaro kĩu; magĩthondeka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ cia gwĩkĩrũo mwena wa gũthini
Exodus36:24 magĩcoka magĩthondeka makinya mĩrongo ĩna ma betha ma kũgĩa na thĩ ya mbaũ icio mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ
Exodus36:25 O naguo mwena ũrĩa ũngĩ wa kerĩ wa gĩikaro kĩu
Exodus36:26 hamwe na makinya ma cio mĩrongo ĩna ma betha; o makinya merĩ makaigĩrĩrũo rũbaũ rũmwe
Exodus36:27 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus36:28 Ningĩ magĩthondeka mbaũ igĩrĩ cia gwĩkĩrũo tuune-inĩ twerĩ twa mwena ũcio wa na thutha wa gĩikaro kĩu.
Exodus36:29 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus36:30 Naho handũ hau hagĩkĩgĩa mbaũ inyanya
Exodus36:31 Ningĩ magĩthondeka mĩgamba ya mũtĩ ta mũgaa
Exodus36:32 nayo mĩgamba ĩngĩ ĩtano ĩgĩtuĩka ya kũnyitithania mbaũ cia mwena ũrĩa ũngĩ wakĩo
Exodus36:33 Nao magĩthondeka mũgamba wa gatagatĩ ka mbaũ iria irũngiĩ ũkinye mũthia ũyũ na mũthia ũrĩa ũngĩ.
Exodus36:34 Nacio mbaũ icio irũngiĩ ciothe magĩcihumba igũrũ guothe na thahabu; na icũhĩ ciacio cia gũtonyio mĩgamba magĩcithondeka cia thahabu; na ningĩ mĩgamba o nayo makĩmĩhumba igũrũ guothe na thahabu.
Exodus36:35 O na ningĩ magĩtuma gĩtama kĩrĩa gĩa kũhakania na ndigi cia rangi wa bururu
Exodus36:36 Magĩcoka magĩgĩthondekera itugĩ inya cia mũtĩ ta mũgaa
Exodus36:37 Naguo mũromo wa Hema-rĩ
Exodus36:38 Na magĩthondeka itugĩ ithano nĩ ũndũ wa tama ũcio hamwe na tũhocio twacio; nakuo igũrũ mĩthia-inĩ ya itugĩ icio
Exodus37:1 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus37:2 agĩkĩrĩĩkĩra thahabu therie mũno mbarĩ ciothe ciarĩo
Exodus37:3 Ningĩ akĩrĩthondekera icũhĩ inya cia thahabu
Exodus37:4 Ningĩ agĩacũhia mĩtĩ mĩraya ya mũthemba ta mũgaa
Exodus37:5 Nayo mĩtĩ ĩo mĩraya akĩmĩtonyia icũhĩ-inĩ cia mĩena-inĩ ya ithandũkũ rĩu
Exodus37:6 Ningĩ agĩthondeka gĩikaro-gĩa-tha na thahabu therie mũno; nakuo kũraiha gwakĩo gũgĩtuĩka mĩkono ĩĩrĩ na nuthu
Exodus37:7 Agĩcoka agĩthondeka makerubi merĩ ma thahabu; akĩmathondeka ma gũturũo
Exodus37:8 kerubi ĩmwe akĩmĩĩkĩra mũthia ũmwe
Exodus37:9 Namo makerubi macio magatambũrũkia mathagu mamo na igũrũ
Exodus37:10 Ningĩ agĩthondeka metha ya mbaũ cia mũtĩ ta mũgaa
Exodus37:11 agĩcoka akĩmĩĩkĩra thahabu therie mũno igũrũ rĩayo guothe
Exodus37:12 O na ningĩ akĩmĩĩkĩra kabaũ gaceke mĩena yothe
Exodus37:13 Ningĩ agĩgĩthondekera metha ĩo icũhĩ inya cia thahabu
Exodus37:14 Nacio icũhĩ icio igĩkuhanĩrĩria na kabaũ kau gaceke karigicĩirie metha ĩo
Exodus37:15 nayo mĩtĩ ĩo mĩraya akĩmĩthondeka na mĩtĩ ta mũgaa
Exodus37:16 Agĩcoka agĩthondeka indo cia kũigagĩrĩrũo metha; nacio nĩ thani nene ciayo
Exodus37:17 Ningĩ agĩthondeka mũtĩ wa kũigĩrĩrũo matawa na thahabu therie mũno
Exodus37:18 na hagĩkĩgĩa honge ithathatũ ciumĩte mĩena-inĩ yaguo; honge ithatũ ciaguo ikiuma mwena ũmwe waguo
Exodus37:19 rũhonge-inĩ rũmwe hakĩgĩa ikombe ithatũ ithondeketwo ta kĩro kĩa mũrothi hamwe na gĩkonyo kĩmwe kĩa ihũa
Exodus37:20 Ningĩ mũtĩ-inĩ ũcio wa kũigĩrĩrũo matawa guo mwene ũkĩgĩa ikombe inya ithondeketwo ta kĩro kĩa mũrothi
Exodus37:21 hagĩkĩgĩa gĩkonyo kĩmwe kĩgwatanĩtie honge igĩrĩ
Exodus37:22 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus37:23 Nake agĩthondeka matawa maguo mũgwanja o na mwĩhato waguo
Exodus37:24 Agĩgĩthondeka mũtĩ ũcio wa kũigĩrĩrũo matawa wothe
Exodus37:25 Ningĩ agĩthondeka kĩgongona gĩa gũcinagĩrũo ũbumba igũrũ rĩakĩo
Exodus37:26 Nake agĩkĩhumba gĩothe na thahabu therie mũno
Exodus37:27 Ningĩ agĩgĩthondekera icũhĩ igĩrĩ cia thahabu
Exodus37:28 Nake agĩthondeka mĩtĩ ĩo na mũtĩ ta mũgaa
Exodus37:29 Agĩcoka agĩthondeka maguta marĩa maamũre ma gũitanĩrĩrio
Exodus38:1 Nĩngĩ agĩthondeka kĩgongona kĩa mahaki ma njino na mũtĩ ta mũgaa; kũraiha gwakĩo gũgĩtuĩka mĩkono ĩtano
Exodus38:2 Ningĩ agĩthondeka hĩa igũrũ tuune-inĩ twakĩo tũna; nacio hĩa icio igĩtuĩka kĩndũ o ro kĩmwe nakĩo; nake agĩkĩhumba igũrũ guothe na gĩcango.
Exodus38:3 Agĩcoka agĩthondeka indo ciothe cia kĩgongona kĩu
Exodus38:4 Ningĩ agĩgĩthondekera kĩrũgara gĩa gĩcango
Exodus38:5 Agĩcoka agĩthondeka icũhĩ inya cia gwĩkĩrũo mĩthia-inĩ ĩrĩa ĩna ya kĩrũgara kĩu gĩa gĩcango
Exodus38:6 Ningĩ agĩthondeka mĩtĩ ĩo mĩraya na mũtĩ ta mũgaa
Exodus38:7 Nayo mĩtĩ ĩo mĩraya agĩcoka akĩmĩtonyia icũhĩ-inĩ icio ciarĩ mĩena-inĩ ya kĩgongona kĩu
Exodus38:8 Nakĩo kĩnyũngũ gĩa gwĩthambĩrũo agĩgĩthondeka na gĩcango
Exodus38:9 Ningĩ agĩthondeka rũirigo rũa nja ya gĩikaro kĩu; nacio ciandarũa cia nja ĩo cia mwena wa gũthini
Exodus38:10 na itugĩ ciacio ciarĩ mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ
Exodus38:11 Ningĩ mwena wa gathigathini hakĩgĩa ciandarũa cia mĩkono igana
Exodus38:12 Ningĩ mwena wa ithũĩro hakĩgĩa ciandarũa cia mĩkono ĩtano
Exodus38:13 Nakuo kwarama kwa mũkĩgiĩ gwa ciandarũa cia mwena wa irathĩro
Exodus38:14 Nakuo kwarama kwa mũkĩgiĩ gwa ciandarũa cia mwena ũmwe wa mũromo wa nja ĩo gũgĩtuĩka mĩkono ikũmi na ĩtano; nacio itugĩ ciacio igĩtuĩka ithatũ
Exodus38:15 o naguo mwena ũrĩa ũngĩ wa mũromo ũcio hagĩtuĩka o ta ũguo; hagĩkĩgĩa ciandarũa cia mĩkono ikũmi na ĩtano mũromo-inĩ guoko gũkũ o na guoko kũrĩa kũngĩ
Exodus38:16 Ciandarũa icio ciothe ciairigĩte mĩena yothe ya nja ĩo irigicĩirie igĩtuĩka cia gatani ya ndigi njeke ciogothetwo.
Exodus38:17 Namo makinya ma itugĩ icio maarĩ ma gĩcango; na tũhocio twa itugĩ icio
Exodus38:18 O naguo tama wa kweheheragio wa mũromo-inĩ wa nja ĩo ya hema watumĩtwo na ndigi cia rangi wa bururu
Exodus38:19 Na itugĩ ciaguo cia kũũcuuria cia gĩcango ciarĩ inya
Exodus38:20 Nacio higĩ ciothe cia gĩikaro kĩu
Exodus38:21 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus38:22 Nake Bezaleli wa Uri mũrũ wa Huri
Exodus38:23 Nake aakoragwo me na Oholiabu mũrũ wa Ahisamaku
Exodus38:24 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus38:25 Ningĩ betha ĩrĩa yarutirũo nĩ andũ a kĩrĩndĩ kĩu magĩtarũo yarĩ taranda igana rĩmwe
Exodus38:26 o mũndũ aarutire beka ĩmwe
Exodus38:27 Nacio taranda icio igana cia betha igĩtuĩka cia gũthondeka makinya ma handũ hau haamũre
Exodus38:28 Ningĩ cekeri icio cia betha ngiri ĩmwe ya magana mũgwanja ma mĩrongo mũgwanja na ithano
Exodus38:29 Nakĩo gĩcango kĩrĩa kĩahothirũo kĩarĩ gĩa taranda mĩrongo mũgwanja na cekeri ngiri igĩrĩ cia magana mana gĩgĩtarũo.
Exodus38:30 Agĩgĩthondeka nakĩo makinya ma mũromo wa hema-ya-gũtũnganwo
Exodus38:31 hamwe na makinya mothe ma itugĩ cia kũrigicĩria nja ya gĩikaro kĩu
Exodus39:1 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus39:2 Ningĩ agĩtuma ebodi na ndigi cia thahabu
Exodus39:3 Magĩkĩhũrahũra thahabu
Exodus39:4 Nao magĩthondekera ebodi ĩo ngwa igĩrĩ igĩtumanio nayo
Exodus39:5 O naguo mwĩhotoro ũrĩa ũgemetio wega wa kũmĩnyitia wa igũrũ rĩayo
Exodus39:6 Ningĩ magĩthondeka tũhiga tũrĩa twa onigithi
Exodus39:7 Agĩgĩĩkĩra tũhiga tũu ngwa-inĩ cia manyitithanĩrio ma ebodi ciande-inĩ
Exodus39:8 Ningĩ agĩtuma gakuo ga gĩthũri; gagĩtumwo nĩ mũtumi mũũhĩgĩrĩru ũtumi ũcio o ta ũrĩa ebodi yatumĩtwo; agĩgĩgatuma na ndigi cia thahabu
Exodus39:9 Nao magĩgatuma ge thikwea koinanĩirũo
Exodus39:10 Magĩgĩgathecerera tũhiga twa goro mĩhari ĩna; mũhari wa mbere ũkĩgĩa kahiga ka wakiki ũrĩa mũtune
Exodus39:11 Naguo mũhari wa kerĩ
Exodus39:12 naguo mũhari wa gatatũ
Exodus39:13 O naguo mũhari wa kana
Exodus39:14 Tũhiga tũu tũgĩgĩtuĩka ikũmi na twĩrĩ o ta marĩĩtwa ma ciana cia Isiraeli
Exodus39:15 Ningĩ gakuo kau ga gĩthũri magĩgatumĩrĩra irengeri cia thahabu therie mũno itariĩ ta mĩhĩndo mĩceke ya kuogothwo.
Exodus39:16 Magĩcoka magĩthondeka tũkonyo twĩrĩ tũgemie twa thahabu
Exodus39:17 Nacio irengeri icio cierĩ cia kuogothwo cia thahabu magĩciĩkĩra icũhĩ-inĩ icio cierĩ mĩthia-inĩ ya gakuo kau.
Exodus39:18 O nayo mĩthia ĩrĩa ĩngĩ yerĩ ya irengeri icio cia kuogothwo
Exodus39:19 O na ningĩ magĩthondeka icũhĩ ingĩ igĩrĩ cia thahabu
Exodus39:20 Na ningĩ magĩcoka magĩthondeka icũhĩ ingĩ igĩrĩ cia thahabu
Exodus39:21 Nako gakuo kau ga gĩthũri
Exodus39:22 Nayo nguo ĩo ndaya ya kwĩhumbanĩrio na ebodi akĩmĩtuma ĩrĩ o ĩmwe yothe
Exodus39:23 na akĩmĩĩkĩra irima gatagatĩ kayo rĩa gũtonyagĩria mũtwe rĩrigicĩirio gatamĩ ga kũrũmia mbarĩ ciothe ciarĩo
Exodus39:24 Nao makĩgemia mwena wa mũhuro wa nguo ĩo ndaya na tũcunjura tũtariĩ ta matunda ma makomamanga twa ndigi cia rangi wa bururu
Exodus39:25 Ningĩ magĩthondeka njingiri cia thahabu therie
Exodus39:26 o njingiri ĩmwe
Exodus39:27 Ningĩ magĩtumĩra Haruni na ariũ ake makanjũ na gatani ya ndigi njeke ciogothetwo
Exodus39:28 na magĩtuma kĩremba gĩa gatani njega mũno
Exodus39:29 na magĩtuma mĩĩhotoro na gatani ya ndigi njeke ciogothetwo
Exodus39:30 Magĩcoka magĩthondeka gathuma ga gatanji karĩa kaamũre na thahabu therie mũno
Exodus39:31 Magĩgĩkoherera karũkwa ka rangi wa bururu
Exodus39:32 Ũguo nĩguo wĩra ũcio wothe wa gũthondeka gĩikaro kĩa hema-ya gũtũnganwo warĩkirio; ciana icio cia Isiraeli igĩgĩĩka maũndũ mothe o ta ũrĩa Jehova aathire Musa gwĩkwo; ũguo noguo ciekire.
Exodus39:33 Nao andũ magĩtwarĩra Musa gĩikaro kĩu
Exodus39:34 na kĩandarũa kĩa njũa cia ndũrũme itoboketio rangi-inĩ igatunĩha
Exodus39:35 na ithandũkũ rĩa ũira
Exodus39:36 na metha
Exodus39:37 na mũtĩ ũrĩa mũtheru wa kũigĩrĩrũo matawa
Exodus39:38 na kĩgongona gĩa thahabu
Exodus39:39 na kĩgongona kĩrĩa gĩa gĩcango
Exodus39:40 na matama ma kũiriga nja ya gĩikaro
Exodus39:41 na nguo iria itumĩtwo wega irĩ riri
Exodus39:42 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus39:43 Nake Musa akĩona wĩra ũcio wothe; na atĩrĩrĩ
Exodus40:1 Nake Jehova akĩarĩria Musa
Exodus40:2 O mũthenya wa mbere wa mweri wa mbere
Exodus40:3 Narĩo ithandũkũ rĩa ũira
Exodus40:4 Ningĩ ũgatonyia metha thĩinĩ
Exodus40:5 Nakĩo kĩgongona kĩrĩa gĩa thahabu gĩa gũcinĩrũo ũbumba ũrĩa ũnungaga wega ũgakĩrũgamia nyumĩrĩra ya ithandũkũ rĩa ũira
Exodus40:6 o nakĩo kĩgongona kĩa mahaki ma njino ũgakĩiga na hau kabere ka mũromo wa gĩikaro kĩa hema-ya-gũtũnganwo
Exodus40:7 Nakĩo kĩnyũngũ gĩa gwĩthambĩrũo ũkĩige gatagatĩ-inĩ ka hema-ya-gũtũnganwo na kĩgongona kĩu
Exodus40:8 Ningĩ ũkarũgamia itugĩ cia nja ũmĩirige mĩena yothe
Exodus40:9 Thutha wa ũguo
Exodus40:10 O nakĩo kĩgongona kĩa mahaki ma njino ũgagĩitĩrĩria maguta hamwe na indo ciakĩo ciothe
Exodus40:11 Nakĩo kĩnyũngũ gĩa gwĩthambĩrũo hamwe na kũgũrũ gwakĩo ũgaciitĩrĩria maguta
Exodus40:12 Nake Haruni me na ariũ ake
Exodus40:13 Ũcoke ũhumbe Haruni nguo icio nyamũre
Exodus40:14 O nao ariũ ake ũmatware ũmahumbe makanjũ
Exodus40:15 ũmaitĩrĩrie maguta
Exodus40:16 Nake Musa agĩgĩĩka o ta ũguo; o ta ũrĩa Jehova aamwathire eke-rĩ
Exodus40:17 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Exodus40:18 Musa agĩgĩaka gĩikaro kĩu; makinya makĩo akĩmaiga thĩ akĩmaara wega
Exodus40:19 Agĩcoka agĩtambũrũkia hema
Exodus40:20 Thutha wa ũguo akĩoya ihengere icio cia ũira
Exodus40:21 agĩcoka agĩtwara ithandũkũ rĩu
Exodus40:22 Nayo metha
Exodus40:23 Nayo mĩgate akĩmĩiga wega mbere ya Jehova igũrũ rĩayo
Exodus40:24 O naguo mũtĩ wa kũigĩrĩrũo matawa akĩũtonyia hema-inĩ-ya-gũtũnganwo
Exodus40:25 O namo matawa akĩmaakia mbere ya Jehova
Exodus40:26 Nakĩo kĩgongona kĩrĩa gĩa thahabu agĩgĩtonyia hema-inĩ-ya-gũtũnganwo
Exodus40:27 agĩcoka agĩcinĩra igũrũ rĩakĩo ũbumba wa mahuti marĩa manungaga wega
Exodus40:28 Ningĩ agĩcuuria gĩtama gĩa kweheheragio mũromo-inĩ wa gĩikaro.
Exodus40:29 O nakĩo kĩgongona kĩa mahaki ma njino
Exodus40:30 Nakĩo kĩnyũngũ gĩa gwĩthambĩrũo
Exodus40:31 Nake Musa
Exodus40:32 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa megũtonya hema-inĩ-ya-gũtũnganwo
Exodus40:33 Ningĩ akĩrũgamia itugĩ cia nja akĩirigĩra gĩikaro o na kĩgongona
Exodus40:34 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus40:35 Nake Musa ndaigana kũhota gũtonya hema-inĩ-ya-gũtũnganwo
Exodus40:36 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus40:37 no itu rĩu rĩaaga kuoyũo na igũrũ-rĩ
Exodus40:38 Nĩ gũkorũo itu rĩu rĩa Jehova rĩaikaraga igũrũ rĩa gĩikaro kĩu mũthenya
Leviticus1:1 NAKE Jehova agĩĩta Musa
Leviticus1:2 Arĩria ciana cia Isiraeli
Leviticus1:3 Na rĩrĩ
Leviticus1:4 Nake aambe aigĩrĩre guoko gwake mũtwe wa nyamũ ĩo ĩkũrutwo ihaki rĩa njino
Leviticus1:5 Nake agathĩnjĩra ndegwa ĩo mbere ya Jehova
Leviticus1:6 Ningĩ nyamũ ĩo ya ihaki rĩa njino
Leviticus1:7 Nao ariũ a Haruni
Leviticus1:8 nao ariũ a Haruni
Leviticus1:9 no rĩrĩ
Leviticus1:10 Ningĩ kũngĩkorũo kĩndũ kĩrĩa mũndũ ekũruta kĩa ihaki rĩa njino gĩkuuma rũũru-inĩ rũa ng’ondu
Leviticus1:11 nake amĩthĩnjĩre mbere ya Jehova o hau mwena-inĩ wa kĩgongona ũrĩa ũrorete gathigathini; nao ariũ a Haruni
Leviticus1:12 Acoke amĩtinangie icunjĩ
Leviticus1:13 no rĩrĩ
Leviticus1:14 Nĩngĩ kĩndũ gĩake gĩa kũrutĩra Jehova kĩngĩtuĩka nĩ ihaki rĩa njino rĩa mũthemba wa nyamũ iria ciũmbũkaga-rĩ
Leviticus1:15 Nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai amĩtware kĩgongona-inĩ
Leviticus1:16 ningĩ arute kabutu kayo hamwe na tatha wako
Leviticus1:17 na amĩtarũre mathagu mayo
Leviticus2:1 Na rĩrĩ
Leviticus2:2 acoke aũtwarĩre ariũ a Haruni acio athĩnjĩri-Ngai; naguo mũtu ũcio mũhinyu mũno mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai awĩrũmĩre rũhĩ rũgima hamwe na maguta maguo
Leviticus2:3 nakĩo kĩrĩa gĩgũtigara kĩa ihaki rĩu rĩa mũtu gĩtuĩke kĩa Haruni na ariũ ake; kĩu nĩ gĩtheru mũno kuona atĩ kiumĩte mahaki-inĩ marĩa macinĩirũo Jehova na mwaki.
Leviticus2:4 Na rĩrĩ
Leviticus2:5 Na rĩrĩ
Leviticus2:6 Ũgakĩwenyũranga cienyũ
Leviticus2:7 Na rĩrĩ
Leviticus2:8 Narĩo ihaki rĩu rĩa mũtu rĩthondeketwo mĩthemba ĩo rĩtwarĩrũo Jehova; nakĩo kĩndũ kĩu gĩtwarũo kĩigwo harĩ mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai
Leviticus2:9 Nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai acoke oe mĩgate ĩmwe ya ihaki rĩu rĩa mũtu ya gũtũma andũ maririkanwo nĩ Jehova
Leviticus2:10 Nakĩo kĩrĩa kĩrĩtigara kĩa ihaki rĩu rĩa mũtu gĩtuĩke kĩa Haruni na ariũ ake; kĩu nĩ gĩtheru mũno kuona atĩ kiumĩte mahaki-inĩ marĩa macinĩirũo Jehova na mwaki.
Leviticus2:11 Gũtirĩ ihaki rĩa mũtu wa mũthemba o na ũrĩkũ mũkarutĩra Jehova wĩ mwĩkĩre ndawa ya kũimbia; nĩ gũkorũo mũtigacina ndawa ya kũimbia mĩgate o na atĩa
Leviticus2:12 Indo icio mũgacirutĩra Jehova mũkĩruta maciaro ma mbere; no rĩrĩ
Leviticus2:13 Ningĩ kĩndũ kĩrĩa gĩothe ũkũruta kĩa ihaki rĩa mũtu ũgĩĩkagĩre cumbĩ; o na ndũkanareke cumbĩ wa kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Ngai waku wage ihaki-inĩ rĩaku rĩa mũtu; ningĩ indo ciaku ciothe iria ũkũruta
Leviticus2:14 Na rĩrĩ
Leviticus2:15 Na ũgekĩra maguta igũrũ rĩayo; ũcoke ũmĩigĩrĩre ubani igũrũ rĩayo; rĩu nĩrĩo ihaki rĩa mũtu.
Leviticus2:16 Nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai agacina ngano ĩmwe ĩtumbũrĩtwo
Leviticus3:1 Na rĩrĩ
Leviticus3:2 Nayo nyamũ ĩo yake ya kũrutwo aambe amĩigĩrĩre guoko mũtwe
Leviticus3:3 Na rĩrĩ
Leviticus3:4 na higo cierĩ hamwe na maguta marĩa magwataine nacio honge-inĩ
Leviticus3:5 Nao ariũ a Haruni macinĩre nyama icio kĩgongona-inĩ igũrũ
Leviticus3:6 Na rĩrĩ kĩndũ gĩake gĩa kũrutĩra Jehova kĩa igongona rĩa ũiguano
Leviticus3:7 Na kĩngĩkorũo nĩ gatũrũme kana kamwatĩ
Leviticus3:8 na aambe aigĩrĩre guoko gwake mũtwe wa kau ekũruta
Leviticus3:9 Na rĩrĩ
Leviticus3:10 o na higo cierĩ hamwe na maguta marĩa magwataine nacio honge-inĩ
Leviticus3:11 Nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai acinĩre nyama icio kĩgongona-inĩ kĩu igũrũ; ĩo nĩyo ndĩa ĩrĩa ĩrutĩirũo Jehova ya ihaki rĩa gũcinwo na mwaki.
Leviticus3:12 Ningĩ kĩndũ gĩake gĩa kũruta kĩngĩtuĩka nĩ mbũri-rĩ
Leviticus3:13 na aambe aigĩrĩre guoko gwake mũtwe wa nyamũ ĩo ekũruta
Leviticus3:14 Na nĩakaruta nyama imwe ciayo ituĩke kĩndũ kĩrĩa arutĩire Jehova kĩa ihaki rĩa gũcinwo na mwaki; nacio nĩ rũambũ rũrĩa rũhumbagĩra nyama cia nda
Leviticus3:15 na higo cierĩ hamwe na maguta marĩa magwataine nacio honge-inĩ
Leviticus3:16 Nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai acinĩre nyama icio kĩgongona-inĩ kĩu igũrũ; ĩo nĩyo ndĩa ĩrĩa ĩrutĩirũo Jehova ya ihaki rĩa gũcinwo na mwaki ya gũtũma mũtararĩko ũrĩa ũnungaga wega ũiguwo; maguta mothe nĩ ma Jehova.
Leviticus3:17 Ũndũ ũyũ ũgũtuĩka watho wa gũtũũra ũrũmagĩrĩrũo hingo ciothe njiaro-inĩ cianyu ciothe
Leviticus4:1 NINGĨ Jehova akĩarĩria Musa
Leviticus4:2 Aria na ciana cia Isiraeli
Leviticus4:3 kũngĩkorũo nĩ mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa ũitĩrĩirio maguta ũkehia
Leviticus4:4 Nake agatwara ndegwa o mũromo-inĩ wa hema-ya-gũtũnganwo mbere ya Jehova
Leviticus4:5 Nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũcio ũitĩrĩirio maguta oe thakame ya ndegwa ĩo
Leviticus4:6 nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũcio atobokie kĩara gĩake thakame-inĩ
Leviticus4:7 Ningĩ mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ekĩre thakame ĩo ĩmwe hĩa-inĩ cia kĩgongona kĩa mahuti marĩa manungaga wega
Leviticus4:8 Nayo ndegwa ĩo ya igongona rĩa mehia amĩrute maguta mayo mothe; namo nĩ rũambũ rũrĩa rũhumbagĩra nyama cia nda
Leviticus4:9 o na higo cierĩ hamwe na maguta marĩa magwataine nacio honge-inĩ
