Numbers14:44 No-o magĩtua mĩkwa
Numbers14:45 Hĩndĩ ĩo Aamaleki na Akanaani arĩa maatũũraga kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩu magĩikũrũka makĩmahũra
Numbers15:1 NINGI Jehova akĩarĩria Musa
Numbers15:2 Aria na ciana cia Isiraeli ũciĩre ũũ: Mwakinya bũrũri ũrĩa mũgatũũra
Numbers15:3 na mũkorũo nĩmũkwenda kũrutĩra Jehova ihaki rĩa gũcinwo na mwaki
Numbers15:4 mũndũ ũcio ũkũruta kĩndũ gĩake gĩa kũrutĩrũo Jehova nĩakirutanagĩrie na ihaki rĩa mũtu
Numbers15:5 ningĩ ũthondekage ndibei ĩtuĩke kĩndũ kĩrĩa kĩrutagwo gĩa kũnyuwo nĩ ũndũ wa gatũrũme o gatũrũme
Numbers15:6 Kana hihi kũngĩkorũo nĩ ndũrũme ĩkũrutwo-rĩ
Numbers15:7 ningĩ kĩrĩa ũkaruta nĩ ũndũ wa igongona rĩa indo cia kũnyuwo
Numbers15:8 Ningĩ ũkĩruta ndegwa ĩtuĩke ya ihaki rĩa njino
Numbers15:9 mũndũ ũrĩa ũkũruta magongona macio nĩarutanagĩrie na ndegwa ĩo icunjĩ ithatũ cia ikũmi cia eba ng’ima ya mũtu ũrĩa mũhinyu mũno
Numbers15:10 Ningĩ kĩrĩa ũkũruta kĩa igongona rĩa indo cia kũnyuwo-rĩ
Numbers15:11 Ũguo nĩguo gũgekwo nĩ ũndũ wa ndegwa o ndegwa
Numbers15:12 O ta ũguo nyamũ iria mũkũruta ciigana-rĩ
Numbers15:13 Nao andũ othe arĩa maaciarĩirũo kwanyu nĩmekage maũndũ macio
Numbers15:14 Ningĩ kũngĩkorũo kwĩ mũgeni ũtũũranĩtie na inyuĩ
Numbers15:15 Kĩrĩra kĩa watho wa kũrũmĩrĩrũo kĩrĩtuĩkaga o ro kĩmwe gĩkoniĩ ũũngano wanyu wothe
Numbers15:16 Watho ũrĩtuĩkaga o ro ũmwe
Numbers15:17 Nake Jehova akĩarĩria Musa
Numbers15:18 Aria na ciana cia Isiraeli
Numbers15:19 nĩgũgatuĩka atĩrĩ
Numbers15:20 Thĩinĩ wa kĩmere kĩanyu kĩa mbere-rĩ
Numbers15:21 Kĩmere kĩanyu kĩa mbere mũgakĩheaga Jehova
Numbers15:22 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers15:23 namo nĩ maũndũ mothe marĩa Jehova aamwathire akĩĩra Musa mũmekage
Numbers15:24 nĩgũgakinya atĩrĩ
Numbers15:25 Nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ahoroherie kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩothe gĩa ciana cia Isiraeli
Numbers15:26 nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ gĩothe gĩa ciana cia Isiraeli nĩgĩkoherũo
Numbers15:27 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers15:28 Nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai akĩhoroherie mũndũ ũcio ũhĩtĩtie mbere ya Jehova angĩkorũo ehirie atekũmenya nĩ ũũru; akĩmũhoroherie
Numbers15:29 Mũrĩgĩaga na watho o ro ũmwe ũkoniĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩhĩtia atekũmenya atĩ ũrĩa egwĩka nĩ ũũru
Numbers15:30 No rĩrĩ
Numbers15:31 Tondũ nĩamenete uuge wa Jehova
Numbers15:32 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers15:33 Nao acio maamũkorire akĩũngania tũkũ
Numbers15:34 Nao makĩmũrangithĩria
Numbers15:35 Jehova agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers15:36 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩothe gĩkĩmũtwara na kũu gĩthaka-inĩ mbarĩ ĩrĩa ĩngĩ ya kĩraaro gĩkĩmũhũra na mahiga nyuguto
Numbers15:37 Ningĩ Jehova akĩarĩria Musa
Numbers15:38 Aria na ciana cia Isiraeli ũciĩre itũũre ciĩkagĩra ciohe cia ndigi mĩthia-inĩ ya nguo ciacio njiaro-inĩ ciacio ciothe
Numbers15:39 Naho ha ũhoro wa ndigi icio-rĩ
Numbers15:40 nĩ getha mũririkanage
Numbers15:41 Niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova Ngai wanyu
Numbers16:1 NA RIRI
Numbers16:2 magĩgĩũkĩra magĩthiĩ harĩ Musa
Numbers16:3 magĩĩcokanĩrĩria hamwe mokĩrĩre Musa na Haruni
Numbers16:4 Nake Musa
Numbers16:5 agĩkĩarĩria Kora
Numbers16:6 Atĩrĩrĩ
Numbers16:7 mũciĩkĩre mwaki
Numbers16:8 Ningĩ Musa akĩĩra Kora atĩrĩ
Numbers16:9 anga muonete ta arĩ ũndũ mũnyinyi mũno
Numbers16:10 na atĩ nĩamũreharehete harĩ we
Numbers16:11 Tondũ ũcio wee mwene
Numbers16:12 Nake Musa agĩkĩrekania atĩ Dathani na Abiramu
Numbers16:13 anga ũkuona ta arĩ ũndũ mũnyinyi mũno wekire ũgĩtũruta bũrũri warĩ bũthi wa iria na ũũkĩ
Numbers16:14 Ningĩ-rĩ
Numbers16:15 Musa agĩgĩtũkũyana mũno
Numbers16:16 Musa agĩkĩĩra Kora atĩrĩ
Numbers16:17 na rĩrĩ
Numbers16:18 Nao mũndũ o mũndũ agĩkĩoya rũgĩo rũake
Numbers16:19 Ningĩ Kora agĩgĩcokanĩrĩria kĩrĩndĩ gĩothe o hau mũromo-inĩ wa hema-ya-gũtũnganwo nĩguo kĩmokĩrĩre; naguo riri wa Jehova ũkiumĩrĩra kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩothe.
Numbers16:20 Nake Jehova agĩkĩarĩria Musa na Haruni
Numbers16:21 Eherai kĩrĩndĩ-inĩ gĩkĩ nĩ getha ndĩkĩnine o kahinda kanini.
Numbers16:22 Nao makĩĩgũithia magĩturumithia mothiũ mao thĩ
Numbers16:23 Jehova agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers16:24 Aria na kĩrĩndĩ gĩkĩ gĩothe ũkĩĩre ũũ: Ũkĩrai mwehere hau gĩikaro-inĩ gĩa Kora
Numbers16:25 Nake Musa agĩũkĩra agĩthiĩ he Dathani na Abiramu nao athuri a Isiraeli makĩmũrũmĩrĩra.
Numbers16:26 Agĩkĩaria na kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩothe
Numbers16:27 Tondũ ũcio magĩkĩehera makiuma mĩena-inĩ yothe ya gĩikaro kĩu gĩa Kora
Numbers16:28 Nake Musa akiuga atĩrĩ
Numbers16:29 Andũ aya mangĩkorũo megũkua gĩkuũ o ta kĩrĩa kĩa ndũire gĩkoniĩ andũ othe
Numbers16:30 No rĩrĩ
Numbers16:31 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Numbers16:32 nayo thĩ kahinda o kau ĩgĩgĩathamia kanua kayo
Numbers16:33 Andũ acio me na arĩa angĩ othe a nyũmba ciao
Numbers16:34 Nao Aisiraeli othe arĩa maamarigicĩirie na mĩena yothe
Numbers16:35 Naguo mwaki ũgĩkiuma he Jehova
Numbers16:36 Ningĩ Jehova agĩkĩarĩria Musa
Numbers16:37 Aria na Eleazaru wa Haruni
Numbers16:38 o ngĩo icio cia ehia acio monũhĩte mĩoyo yao o ene; nacio iturũo ithondekwo ithuma cia kũhumbaga kĩgongona; nĩ ũndũ nĩmaacitwarĩte mbere ya Jehova
Numbers16:39 Nake Eleazaru ũcio mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai agĩkĩoya ngĩo icio cia gĩcango
Numbers16:40 nĩ getha iririkanagie ciana cia Isiraeli atĩ mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ wa nyũmba ĩngĩ
Numbers16:41 No rĩrĩ
Numbers16:42 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Numbers16:43 Nao Musa na Haruni magĩgĩthiĩ magĩkinya o hau mbere ya hema-ya-gũtũnganwo.
Numbers16:44 Nake Jehova agĩkĩarĩria Musa
Numbers16:45 Ũkĩrai mwehere kĩrĩndĩ-inĩ gĩkĩ nĩ getha ndĩkĩnine o kahinda kanini. Magĩkĩĩgũithia
Numbers16:46 Nake Musa agĩkĩĩra Haruni atĩrĩ
Numbers16:47 Nake Haruni akĩoya rũgĩo rũu rũake o ta ũguo Musa oigĩte
Numbers16:48 Nake agĩkĩrũgama gatagatĩ-inĩ ka andũ arĩa makuĩte na arĩa me muoyo; naguo mũthiro ũcio ũkĩninwo.
Numbers16:49 Nao andũ arĩa maakuire nĩ ũndũ wa mũthiro ũcio maarĩ ngiri ikũmi na inya
Numbers16:50 Nake Haruni agĩgĩcoka he Musa mũromo-inĩ wa hema-ĩo-ya-gũtũnganwo; naguo mũthiro ũcio ũgĩkĩninwo.
Numbers17:1 NINGĨ Jehova akĩarĩria Musa
Numbers17:2 Aria na ciana cia Isiraeli
Numbers17:3 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers17:4 Nacio thanju icio ũciige hema-inĩ-ya-gũtũnganwo mbere ya ithandũkũ rĩa ũira
Numbers17:5 Na nĩgũgakinya atĩrĩ
Numbers17:6 Musa agĩkĩarĩria ciana cia Isiraeli
Numbers17:7 Nake Musa agĩkĩiga thanju icio mbere ya Jehova kũu hema-inĩ-ya-ũira thĩinĩ.
Numbers17:8 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Numbers17:9 Nake Musa akiumia thanju icio ciothe nja
Numbers17:10 Nake Jehova agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers17:11 Ũguo nĩguo Musa ekire; o ta ũrĩa Jehova aamwĩrire eke
Numbers17:12 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli ikĩarĩria Musa
Numbers17:13 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũkuhagĩrĩria gĩikaro kĩu kĩa Jehova nĩ gũkua akuaga! Anga nĩtũgũgĩthira ithuothe?
Numbers18:1 Nake Jehova agĩkĩĩra Haruni atĩrĩ
Numbers18:2 O nao ariũ a ithe wanyu
Numbers18:3 Nao magũtungatagĩre wee mwene
Numbers18:4 Nao megũturanĩrũo nawe
Numbers18:5 Naguo wĩra wanyu ũtuĩke wa kũmenyagĩrĩra maũndũ mothe ma handũ hau haamũre
Numbers18:6 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Numbers18:7 Ningĩ wee nawe
Numbers18:8 NINGI Jehova akĩarĩria Haruni
Numbers18:9 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers18:10 Indo icio nĩũgacirĩaga ũcituĩte indo nyamũre mũno; na rĩrĩ
Numbers18:11 Ningĩ indo iria ciana cia Isiraeli ikarutaga cia magongona ma kũiyũkio na igũrũ
Numbers18:12 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers18:13 Maciaro mothe ma mbere marĩa makaamba kwĩrua thĩinĩ wa bũrũri wacio
Numbers18:14 Kĩndũ kĩrĩa gĩothe nyamũriirũo nĩ ciana cia Isiraeli gĩgatuĩka gĩaku.
Numbers18:15 Marigithathi mothe thĩinĩ wa andũ othe
Numbers18:16 Naguo ũkũũri wa marigithathi ma andũ-rĩ
Numbers18:17 No rĩrĩ
Numbers18:18 Nacio nyama ciatuo igatuĩka ciaku
Numbers18:19 Indo ciothe iria nyamũre cia magongona ma kũiyũkio na igũrũ iria ciana cia Isiraeli irĩrutagĩra Jehova
Numbers18:20 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Haruni atĩrĩ
Numbers18:21 O naho ha ũhoro wa ciana cia Lawii-rĩ
Numbers18:22 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers18:23 No rĩrĩ
Numbers18:24 Nĩ gũkorũo gĩcunjĩ kĩu gĩa ikũmi ciana cia Isiraeli irutagĩra Jehova gĩtuĩke indo ciacio iria imũrutagĩra cia igongona rĩa kũiyũkio na igũrũ
Numbers18:25 Ningĩ Jehova akĩarĩria Musa
Numbers18:26 O na ningĩ arĩria Alawii
Numbers18:27 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers18:28 Ũguo noguo na inyuĩ mũkarutagĩra Jehova igongona rĩa kũiyũkio na igũrũ riumĩte gĩcunjĩ-inĩ kĩu gĩa ĩkũmi kĩa indo iria mũkaiyũkagia harĩ ciana cia Isiraeli; na gĩcunjĩ kĩu gĩacio mũrutagĩra Jehova gĩa kũiyũkio na igũrũ kĩheo Haruni
Numbers18:29 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers18:30 Tondũ ũcio nĩũkera ciana cia Lawii ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Numbers18:31 Na nĩmũkarĩagĩra indo icio o kũndũ guothe kũrĩa mũgakoragwo mũrĩ
Numbers18:32 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers19:1 NINGĨ Jehova akĩarĩria Musa na Haruni
Numbers19:2 Gĩkĩ nĩ kĩrĩra kĩa watho wa kũrũmĩrĩrũo gĩathanĩtwo nĩ Jehova
Numbers19:3 mũmĩnengere Eleazaru
Numbers19:4 nake Eleazaru
Numbers19:5 nayo mori ĩo ĩcinwo nĩ mũndũ Eleazaru akĩĩonagĩra
Numbers19:6 Nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai acoke oe kamũtĩ ka mũtarakwa
Numbers19:7 Thutha wa ũguo mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai athambie nguo ciake
Numbers19:8 O nake mũndũ ũcio ũcinĩte mori ĩo athambie nguo ciake na maĩ
Numbers19:9 Na mũndũ ũngĩ ũtarĩ na thahu ahakũre mũhu wa mori ĩo
Numbers19:10 Nake mũndũ ũrĩa ũkũhakũra mũhu ũcio wa mori ĩo athambie nguo ciake
Numbers19:11 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers19:12 mũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Numbers19:13 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũkahutia kĩimba kĩa mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ
Numbers19:14 Atĩrĩrĩ
Numbers19:15 Nakĩo kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩgakoragwo gĩkunũrĩtwo
Numbers19:16 Ningĩ mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũkahutia kĩimba kĩa mũndũ ũũragĩirũo na rũhiũ rũa njora na kũu gĩthaka-inĩ
Numbers19:17 Naho ha ũhoro wa mũndũ ũcio ũgwatĩtwo nĩ thahu
Numbers19:18 na mũndũ ũmwe ũtarĩ na thahu oe mũthobi
Numbers19:19 na rĩrĩ
Numbers19:20 No rĩrĩ
Numbers19:21 Naguo ũndũ ũyũ ũtuĩke kĩrĩra kĩa watho wa gũtũũra ũrũmagĩrĩrũo nĩo
Numbers19:22 Ningĩ kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩkahutio nĩ mũndũ ũcio wĩ na thahu nĩgĩkagwatwo nĩ thahu; o nake mũndũ ũrĩa ũkahutia kĩndũ kĩu nĩakagwatwo nĩ thahu ũcio
Numbers20:1 NA RĨRĨ
Numbers20:2 Naho handũ hau hakĩagwo maĩ nĩ ũndũ wa kĩrĩndĩ kĩu; nakĩo gĩkĩrũrũngana
Numbers20:3 Nao andũ acio magĩtetia Musa
Numbers20:4 Rĩu-rĩ
Numbers20:5 Ningĩ-rĩ
Numbers20:6 Nao Musa na Haruni magĩthiĩ
Numbers20:7 Nake Jehova akĩarĩria Musa
Numbers20:8 Oya rũthanju rũaku
Numbers20:9 Musa agĩkĩoya rũthanju rũu
Numbers20:10 Musa na Haruni magĩgĩcokanĩrĩria kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩothe hamwe mbere ya ihiga rĩu
Numbers20:11 Musa agĩkĩoya guoko gwake na igũrũ
Numbers20:12 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Musa na Haruni atĩrĩ
Numbers20:13 Namo maĩ macio magĩtuwo Meriba; nĩ gũkorũo ciana cia Isiraeli nĩciatetanirie na Jehova
Numbers20:14 Ningĩ Musa akĩrekia andũ moimĩte hau Kadeshi makinye kwĩ mũthamaki wa Edomu
Numbers20:15 ũrĩa maithe maitũ maaikũrũkire magĩthiĩ Misiri
Numbers20:16 na rĩrĩa twakaĩire Jehova
Numbers20:17 Ndagũthaitha ũtwĩtĩkĩrie tũtuĩkanĩrie bũrũri waku; na tũtigera mĩgũnda-inĩ ya irio
Numbers20:18 Nake mũthamaki ũcio wa Edomu akĩmũcokeria atĩrĩ
Numbers20:19 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli ikĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Numbers20:20 Nowe akiuga atĩrĩ
Numbers20:21 Ũguo nĩguo Aedomu maaregire gwĩtĩkĩria Aisiraeli matuĩkanĩrie bũrũri wao; tondũ ũcio Aisiraeli makĩgarũrũka
Numbers20:22 Nao magĩkĩgwata rũgendo moimĩte hau Kadeshi; nacio ciana cia Isiraeli
Numbers20:23 Nake Jehova akĩarĩria Musa na Haruni kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩu kĩa Horu
Numbers20:24 Rĩu nĩ hĩndĩ Haruni egũturanĩrũo na andũ ao arĩa maanakua; nĩ ũndũ ndagatonya bũrũri ũcio ’heete ciana cia Isiraeli
Numbers20:25 Ta kĩoe Haruni na Eleazaru mũrũwe
Numbers20:26 ũcoke ũcume Haruni nguo ciake
Numbers20:27 Nake Musa agĩĩka o ta ũrĩa Jehova aamwathire
Numbers20:28 Musa agĩgĩcuma Haruni nguo ciake
Numbers20:29 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers21:1 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers21:2 Nao Aisiraeli makĩĩra Jehova na mwĩhĩtwa atĩrĩ
Numbers21:3 Nake Jehova agĩkĩigua mũgambo wa andũ a Isiraeli
Numbers21:4 Nao makĩgwata rũgendo
Numbers21:5 Nao magĩkĩaria maũndũ ma gũcambia Ngai
Numbers21:6 Nake Jehova akĩrehithĩrie andũ acio nyamũ-cia-thĩ ikũhenia o ta mwaki
Numbers21:7 Andũ acio magĩgĩthiĩ kwĩ Musa
Numbers21:8 Nake Jehova agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers21:9 Musa agĩgĩthondeka nyamũ-ya-thĩ ya gĩcango
Numbers21:10 Ningĩ ciana cia Isiraeli ikĩgwata rũgendo
Numbers21:11 Ningĩ igĩthiĩ ciumĩte Obothu
Numbers21:12 Ningĩ cioima hau igĩthiĩ rũgendo
Numbers21:13 Ningĩ cioima hau igĩthiĩ rũgendo
Numbers21:14 Tondũ ũcio kwĩragwo ibuku-inĩ rĩa ita cia Jehova atĩrĩ
Numbers21:15 O na kĩgaragaro-inĩ gĩa cianda
Numbers21:16 Ningĩ cioima hau
Numbers21:17 Hĩndĩ ĩo Aisiraeli magĩkĩina rũĩmbo rũrũ: Therũka maĩ
Numbers21:18 O gĩthima kĩrĩa anene menjete
Numbers21:19 ningĩ cioima Matana
Numbers21:20 ningĩ cioima Bamothu
Numbers21:21 Nao Aisiraeli makĩrekia andũ gwĩ Sihoni
Numbers21:22 Reka nduĩkanĩrie bũrũri waku; na tũtikerũra mĩgũnda-inĩ ya irio
Numbers21:23 No Sihoni ndaigana gwĩtĩkĩria Aisiraeli mahĩtũkĩre mũhaka-inĩ wa bũrũri wake; no rĩrĩ
Numbers21:24 Nao Aisiraeli makĩmũhũra na hiũ cia njora makĩmũnina
Numbers21:25 Nao Aisiraeli magĩtunyana matũũra mothe marĩa maarĩ kuo
Numbers21:26 Tondũ Heshiboni nĩrĩo itũũra rĩa Sihoni ũcio mũthamaki wa Aamori
Numbers21:27 Tondũ ũcio arĩa maaragia ũhoro na thimo makĩrũhia moigaga atĩrĩ
Numbers21:28 Nĩ gũkorũo mwaki nĩuumĩte Heshiboni
Numbers21:29 Hĩ! Kaĩ ũrĩ na haaro
Numbers21:30 Nĩtũmarathĩte; Heshiboni nĩrĩninĩtwo biũ
Numbers21:31 Ũguo nĩguo Aisiraeli maatũũrire bũrũri wa Aamori.
Numbers21:32 Nake Musa akĩrekia andũ magathigane Jazeri
Numbers21:33 Ningĩ magĩkĩgarũrũka makĩambata na njĩra ĩrĩa ĩrorete Bashani; nake Ogu
Numbers21:34 Nake Jehova agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers21:35 Tondũ ũcio makĩmũhũra we mwene o na ariũ ake
Numbers22:1 Ningĩ ciana cia Isiraeli ikĩgwata rũgendo ikĩamba hema ciacio werũ wa Moabi
Numbers22:2 Nake Balaki wa Ziporu
Numbers22:3 Nao Amoabi magĩĩtigĩra andũ acio mũno
Numbers22:4 Amoabi acio magĩkĩĩra athuri a Midiani atĩrĩ
Numbers22:5 Agĩkĩrekereria Balaamu wa Beori andũ makinye Pethori
Numbers22:6 tondũ ũcio ndagũthaitha ũũke ũ’numĩre andũ aya magwatwo nĩ kĩrumi
Numbers22:7 Athuri acio a Amoabi
Numbers22:8 Nake agĩkĩmera atĩrĩ
Numbers22:9 Nake Ngai agĩkora Balaamu
Numbers22:10 Nake Balaamu agĩcokeria Ngai atĩrĩ
Numbers22:11 Atĩrĩrĩ
Numbers22:12 Ngai agĩkĩĩra Balaamu atĩrĩ
Numbers22:13 Nake Balaamu akĩroka gũũkĩra rũcinĩ tene
Numbers22:14 Nao anene acio a Amoabi magĩgĩũkĩra
Numbers22:15 Ningĩ Balaki akĩrekia anene angĩ
Numbers22:16 Nao magĩgĩkinya kwĩ Balaamu
Numbers22:17 nĩ ũndũ nĩngũgũtũũgĩria ũtĩĩke mũno
Numbers22:18 Nake Balaamu agĩcokia
Numbers22:19 Tondũ ũcio ndamũthaitha mũraare gũkũ ũtukũ ũyũ o na inyuĩ
Numbers22:20 Nake Ngai agĩgĩkora Balaamu ũtukũ
Numbers22:21 Balaamu agĩkĩroka gũũkĩra rũcinĩ
Numbers22:22 Nake Ngai agĩcinwo nĩ marakara mũno nĩ ũndũ wa Balaamu gũthiĩ nao
Numbers22:23 Nayo ndigiri ĩgĩkĩona mũraika wa Jehova arũgamĩte njĩra-inĩ
Numbers22:24 Ningĩ mũraika wa Jehova akĩrũgama handũ mũriko-inĩ gatagatĩ ka mĩgũnda ĩĩrĩ ya mĩthabibu handũ hairige mwena ũyũ o na mwena ũrĩa ũngĩ.
Numbers22:25 Nayo ndigiri ĩo ĩkĩona mũraika wa Jehova
Numbers22:26 Ningĩ mũraika wa Jehova agĩthiathia kabere
Numbers22:27 Nayo ndigiri ĩo ĩkĩona mũraika wa Jehova
Numbers22:28 Nake Jehova agĩtumũra ndigiri ĩo kanua
Numbers22:29 Nake Balaamu akĩĩra ndigiri ĩo atĩrĩ
Numbers22:30 Ningĩ ndigiri ĩo ĩkĩĩra Balaamu atĩrĩ
Numbers22:31 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jehova agĩkĩhingũra Balaamu maitho
Numbers22:32 Nake mũraika ũcio wa Jehova akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Numbers22:33 nayo ndigiri ĩno nĩ kuona ĩnyonire
Numbers22:34 Balaamu agĩkĩĩra mũraika ũcio wa Jehova atĩrĩ
Numbers22:35 Mũraika wa Jehova agĩkĩĩra Balaamu atĩrĩ
Numbers22:36 Nake Balaki aaigua atĩ Balaamu nĩokĩte
Numbers22:37 Nake Balaki agĩkĩũria Balaamu atĩrĩ
Numbers22:38 Nake Balaamu akĩĩra Balaki atĩrĩ
Numbers22:39 Nake Balaamu magĩgĩtwarana na Balaki
Numbers22:40 Nake Balaki agĩthĩnjithia ndegwa o na mbũri cia igongona
Numbers22:41 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Numbers23:1 Nake Balaamu agĩkĩĩra Balaki atĩrĩ
Numbers23:2 Nake Balaki agĩĩka o ta ũrĩa Balaamu oigĩte gwĩkwo; nao Balaki na Balaamu makĩrutĩra igongona-inĩ icio ciothe
Numbers23:3 Balaamu agĩkĩĩra Balaki atĩrĩ
Numbers23:4 Nake Ngai agĩgĩcemania na Balaamu ho
Numbers23:5 Jehova agĩgĩtaara Balaamu
Numbers23:6 Agĩgĩcoka harĩ we
Numbers23:7 Agĩgĩitĩka kwaria na thimo
Numbers23:8 Hĩ! Ũrĩa ũtarumĩtwo nĩ Ngai-rĩ
Numbers23:9 Nĩ gũkorũo ngũmona ndĩ o haha gacũmbĩrĩ-inĩ ka ndwaro ici cia mahiga; Ndĩ o gũkũ irĩma igũrũ-rĩ
Numbers23:10 Nũ ũngĩkĩhota gũtara rũkũngũ rũa Jakubu? Kana ahote gũtara gĩcunjĩ gĩa kana kĩa andũ a Isiraeli? Hĩ! ndĩrorekwo ngue gĩkuũ ta kĩa andũ aya athingu
Numbers23:11 Balaki agĩkĩĩra Balaamu atĩrĩ
Numbers23:12 Nake agĩgĩcokia akiuga atĩrĩ
Numbers23:13 Nake Balaki akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Numbers23:14 Agĩkĩmuoya magĩthiĩ nake kawerũ-inĩ ga Zofimu

Numbers23:22 Ngai nĩwe ũmarehage amarutĩte Misiri; Hinya wake ũrĩa arĩ naguo ũtariĩ o ta wa mbogo.

Numbers24:5 Kaĩ hema ciaku
Numbers24:6 Tondũ igucũkĩte o ta cianda
Numbers24:7 Ndoo ciake ĩkaiyũra maĩ o nginya maitĩke
Numbers24:8 Ngai aramũrehe amũrutĩte Misiri; Hinya ũrĩa arĩ naguo ũtariĩ o ta wa mbogo: Nacio ndũrĩrĩ iria irĩ ũthũ nake nĩ kũrĩa agacirĩa
Numbers24:9 Nĩ gwĩthuna ethunire
Numbers24:10 Balaki agĩgĩcinwo nĩ marakara mũno nĩ ũndũ wa Balaamu

Numbers24:12 Nake Balaamu akĩĩra Balaki atĩrĩ

Numbers24:18 O nakuo Edomu nĩgũkegwatĩrũo gũtuĩke gwake

Numbers24:25 Nake Baalamu agĩũkĩra
Numbers25:1 NA RĨRĨ
Numbers25:2 nao magagĩĩtaga Aisiraeli mathiĩ igongona-inĩ cia ngai ciao; na Aisiraeli magĩkĩrĩanĩra nao
Numbers25:3 Aisiraeli magĩkĩĩgwatania na Baali-peori; nake Jehova agĩcinwo nĩ marakara nĩ ũndũ wa Aisiraeli.
Numbers25:4 Jehova agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers25:5 Nake Musa agĩkĩĩra aciri a Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Numbers25:6 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Numbers25:7 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers25:8 akĩrũmĩrĩra mũndũ ũcio wa Isiraeli
Numbers25:9 Nao arĩa moragirũo nĩ mũthiro ũcio maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na inya.
Numbers25:10 Ningĩ Jehova akĩarĩria Musa
Numbers25:11 Finehasi wa Eleazaru wa Haruni
Numbers25:12 Tondũ ũcio uga ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Numbers25:13 nakĩo kĩrĩkanĩro kĩu gĩgatuĩka gĩa kuonania atĩ we mwene
Numbers25:14 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers25:15 O nake mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio Mũmidiani woragirũo etagwo Kozibi
Numbers25:16 Ningĩ Jehova akĩarĩria Musa
Numbers25:17 Arahũkĩra Amidiani
Numbers25:18 nĩ ũndũ nĩmamũnyariraga na maũndũ marĩa mekaga ma kũmũhenereria o marĩa maatũmire mũhenio
Numbers26:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Numbers26:2 Ta tarai kĩrĩndĩ gĩothe gĩa ciana cia Isiraeli
Numbers26:3 Nake Musa na Eleazaru
Numbers26:4 Tarai andũ arĩa makinyĩtie mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na magakĩria hau; o ta ũrĩa Jehova aathĩte Musa na ciana cia Isiraeli iria cioimire bũrũri wa Misiri.
Numbers26:5 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers26:6 na mbarĩ ya Ahezironi
Numbers26:7 Icio nĩcio mbarĩ cia Areubeni
Numbers26:8 Nake mũrũ wa Palu
Numbers26:9 Nao ariũ a Eliabu nĩ Nemueli
Numbers26:10 nayo thĩ ĩgĩathamia kanua kayo
Numbers26:11 No rĩrĩ
Numbers26:12 Nao ariũ a Simeoni

Numbers26:28 Nao ariũ a Jusufu
Numbers26:29 Amanase-rĩ
Numbers26:30 Nao ariũ a Gileadi nĩo aya: nĩ mbarĩ ya Aiezeri
Numbers26:31 na mbarĩ ya Aasirieli
Numbers26:32 na mbarĩ ya Ashemida
Numbers26:33 Nake Zelofehadi
Numbers26:34 Acio nĩo andũ a mbarĩ cia Manase; nao arĩa maatarirũo thĩinĩ wao maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩtano na igĩrĩ
Numbers26:35 Nao ariũ a Efiraimu
Numbers26:36 Nao ariũ a Shutela nĩ aya: nĩ mbarĩ ya Aerani
Numbers26:37 Icio nĩcio mbarĩ cia ariũ a Efiramu
Numbers26:38 O nao ariũ a Benjamini
Numbers26:39 na mbarĩ ya Ashefufamu
Numbers26:40 Nao ariũ a Bela nĩ Aridi
Numbers26:41 Acio nĩo ariũ a Benjamini
Numbers26:42 Nao aya nĩo ariũ a Dani
Numbers26:43 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers26:44 O nao ariũ a Asheri
Numbers26:45 Nao ariũ a Beria nĩo aya: nĩ mbarĩ ya Aheberi
Numbers26:46 Nake mwarĩ wa Asheri etagwo Sera.
Numbers26:47 Icio nĩcio mbarĩ cia ariũ a Asheri
Numbers26:48 Nao ariũ a Nafitali
Numbers26:49 na mbarĩ ya Ajezeri
Numbers26:50 Acio nĩo a mbarĩ cia Nafitali
Numbers26:51 Acio othe nĩo maatarirũo thĩinĩ wa ciana cia Isiraeli
Numbers26:52 Nake Jehova akĩarĩria Musa
Numbers26:53 Acio nĩo makagayanio bũrũri ũrĩa megũthiĩ
Numbers26:54 Andũ arĩa maaingĩha-rĩ
Numbers26:55 No rĩrĩ
Numbers26:56 O ta ũrĩa ũhoro wa gũcuka mĩtĩ ũtariĩ-rĩ
Numbers26:57 Nao aya nĩo arĩa maatarirũo a mbarĩ cia Alawii
Numbers26:58 Ningĩ aya nĩo andũ a mbarĩ cia Lawii: nĩ mbarĩ ya Alibini
Numbers26:59 Nake mũka wa Amuramu etagwo Jokebedi
Numbers26:60 Nake Haruni agĩciara Nadabu
Numbers26:61 Nao Nadabu na Abihu magĩgĩkua hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maatwarire mwaki wa handũ hangĩ mbere ya Jehova.
Numbers26:62 Nao arĩa maatarirũo thĩinĩ wao nĩ arũme othe arĩa maakinyĩtie mweri ũmwe na magakĩria hau
Numbers26:63 Acio nĩo maatarirũo nĩ Musa na Eleazaru
Numbers26:64 No rĩrĩ
Numbers26:65 Nĩ gũkorũo Jehova ha ũhoro wao nĩoigĩte atĩrĩ
Numbers27:1 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers27:2 Magĩgĩthiĩ makĩrũgama mbere ya Musa
Numbers27:3 Ithe witũ nĩaakuĩrĩire werũ-inĩ
Numbers27:4 Rĩu-rĩ
Numbers27:5 Musa agĩgĩtwarĩra Jehova ũhoro ũcio wao.
Numbers27:6 Nake Jehova agĩkĩarĩria Musa
Numbers27:7 Airĩtu acio a Zelofehadi mekwaria kĩhooto; ti-itherũ nĩ wega ũmaheanĩrie igai rĩao hamwe na agendi a ithe wao
Numbers27:8 Ningĩ warie na ciana cia Isiraeli
Numbers27:9 Na angĩkorũo atarĩ na mũirĩtu

Numbers27:18 Nake Jehova agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers27:19 ũmũige mbere ya Eleazaru

Numbers27:21 Nake arũgamage mbere ya Eleazaru
Numbers27:22 Nake Musa agĩĩka o ta ũguo Jehova aamwathire eke; agĩkĩoya Joshua
Numbers27:23 agĩkĩmũigĩrĩra moko mũtwe
Numbers28:1 NAKE Jehova akĩarĩria Musa
Numbers28:2 Athana wĩre ciana cia Isiraeli imenyagĩrĩre ũhoro wothe wa kũndutĩra indo iria ndutagĩrũo ihinda rĩrĩa rĩagĩrĩire rĩakinya
Numbers28:3 ũkĩmere atĩrĩ
Numbers28:4 Gatũrũme kamwe nĩkarutagwo rũcinĩ
Numbers28:5 tũrutanagĩrio hamwe na gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi kĩa eba ng’ima ya mũtu mwega mũhinyu mũno
Numbers28:6 Rĩu nĩrĩo ihaki rĩa njino rĩa gũtũũra rĩrutagwo hingo ciothe; naguo ũhoro ũcio nĩguo waathanĩirũo o kũu kĩrĩma-inĩ gĩa Sinai
Numbers28:7 O nacio indo iria irutagwo cia kũnyuwo cia igongona ciarĩo ituĩke gĩcunjĩ gĩa kana kĩa hini ĩmwe nĩ ũndũ wa gatũrũme kau kamwe ga tũu twerĩ; naho handũ harĩa hatheru nĩho ũgaitanga ndibei ĩo ndũrũ
Numbers28:8 O nako gatũrũme kau kangĩ ũkarutage hwaĩ-inĩ gũtanatuka; na karutanagĩrio na ihaki rĩa mũtu
Numbers28:9 O naguo mũthenya wa thabatũ nĩũkarutaga tũtũrũme twĩrĩ twa mwaka ũmwe
Numbers28:10 Rĩu nĩrĩo ihaki rĩa njino rĩa kũrutagwo mĩthenya yothe ya thabatũ
Numbers28:11 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers28:12 na harutanĩrio na ndegwa o ndegwa icunjĩ ithatũ cia ĩkũmi cia eba ng’ima ya mũtu ũrĩa mwega mũhinyu mũno wa gũtuĩka ihaki rĩa mũtu
Numbers28:13 o nakĩo gĩcunjĩ kĩmwe gĩa ikũmi kĩa mũtu ũrĩa mwega mũhinyu mũno
Numbers28:14 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers28:15 Ningĩ Jehova arutĩrũo thenge ĩmwe ĩtuĩke igongona rĩa mehia; na ĩrutanĩrio na ihaki rĩa njino rĩu rĩa gũtũũra rĩrutagwo hingo ciothe
Numbers28:16 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers28:17 O naguo mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩtano wa mweri ũcio nĩguo ũgatuĩka wa gĩathĩ kĩu; nayo mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩimbie ĩkarĩo mĩthenya mũgwanja.
Numbers28:18 Naguo mũthenya wa mbere nĩmũkagĩaga na ũũngano mwamũre ũkoniĩ andũ othe
Numbers28:19 no rĩrĩ
Numbers28:20 na mũcirutanĩrie na ihaki rĩacio rĩa mũtu
Numbers28:21 nakĩo gĩcunjĩ kĩmwe kĩmwe gĩa ikũmi kĩrutwo nĩ ũndũ wa gatũrũme o gatũrũme ga tũu mũgwanja;
Numbers28:22 o na ningĩ thenge ĩmwe ĩrutwo ĩtuĩke igongona rĩa mehia
Numbers28:23 Indo icio mũgacirutanagĩria hamwe na igongona rĩrĩa rĩcinagwo rũcinĩ
Numbers28:24 Na rĩrĩ
Numbers28:25 Ningĩ mũthenya wa mũgwanja mũgĩe na ũũngano ũngĩ mwamũre ũkoniĩ andũ othe
Numbers28:26 O na ningĩ-rĩ
Numbers28:27 No rĩrĩ
Numbers28:28 na irutanĩrio na ihaki rĩacio rĩa mũtu
Numbers28:29 o na gĩcunjĩ kĩmwe gĩa ikũmi kĩrutwo nĩ ũndũ wa gatũrũme o gatũrũme ga tũu mũgwanja;
Numbers28:30 na harutwo thenge ĩmwe nĩguo mũhoroherio nayo.
Numbers28:31 Nacio indo icio mũcirutanagĩrie hamwe na ihaki rĩa njino rĩa gũtũũra rĩrutagwo hingo ciothe
Numbers29:1 Ningĩ mweri wa mũgwanja
Numbers29:2 Nĩmũkaruta ihaki rĩa njino rĩa gũtũma mũtararĩko ũrĩa ũnungaga wega ũiguwo nĩ Jehova; narĩo nĩ ndegwa ĩmwe ĩtarĩ ngũrũ
Numbers29:3 na mũcirutanagĩrie na ihaki rĩacio rĩa mũtu
Numbers29:4 o nakĩo gĩcunjĩ kĩmwe gĩa ikũmi kĩrutagwo nĩ ũndũ wa gatũrũme o gatũrũme ga tũu mũgwanja;
Numbers29:5 o na mũrute thenge ĩmwe ya gũtuĩka igongona rĩa mehia
Numbers29:6 nacio icio ciothe irutanagĩrio hamwe na ihaki rĩa njino rĩa karũgamo ka mweri
Numbers29:7 Ningĩ mũthenya wa ikũmi wa mweri ũcio wa mũgwanja
Numbers29:8 no rĩrĩ
Numbers29:9 na mũrute ihaki rĩacio rĩa mũtu
Numbers29:10 o nakĩo gĩcunjĩ kĩmwe gĩa ĩkũmi kĩrutwo nĩ ũndũ wa gatũrũme o gatũrũme ga tũu mũgwanja;
Numbers29:11 na thenge ĩmwe ĩrutwo ĩtuĩke ya igongona rĩa mehia; nacio icio ciothe irutanĩrio hamwe na igongona rĩa mehia rĩa horohio
Numbers29:12 Ningĩ mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩtano wa mweri wa mũgwanja nĩmũkagĩa na ũũngano mwamũre ũkoniĩ andũ othe
Numbers29:13 na mũrute ihaki rĩa njino rĩa indo iria irutagwo cia gũcinwo na mwaki
Numbers29:14 na mũrute ihaki rĩacio rĩa mũtu
Numbers29:15 nakĩo gĩcunjĩ kĩmwe gĩa ikũmi kĩrutwo nĩ ũndũ wa gatũrũme o gatũrũme ga tũu ikũmi na tũna;
Numbers29:16 o na thenge ĩmwe ĩtuĩke igongona rĩa mehia; nacio icio ciothe irutanĩrio hamwe na ihaki rĩa njino rĩu rĩa gũtũũra rĩrutagwo hingo ciothe
Numbers29:17 O naguo mũthenya wa kerĩ wa gĩathĩ kĩu mũrute ndegwa ĩkũmi na igĩrĩ itarĩ ngũrũ
Numbers29:18 hamwe na ihaki rĩacio rĩa mũtu
Numbers29:19 ningĩ mũrute thenge ĩmwe ĩtuĩke ya igongona rĩa mehia; nacio icio ciothe irutanĩrio hamwe na igongona rĩu rĩa gũtũũra rĩrutagwo hingo ciothe
Numbers29:20 Naguo mũthenya wa ĩtatũ kũrutwo ndegwa ikũmi na ĩmwe
Numbers29:21 hamwe na ihaki rĩacio rĩa mũtu
Numbers29:22 na mũrute thenge ĩmwe ĩtuĩke ya igongona rĩa mehia; nacio icio ciothe irutanĩrio hamwe na ihaki rĩa njino rĩu rĩa gũtũũra rĩrutagwo hingo ciothe
Numbers29:23 Naguo mũthenya wa ĩna kũrutwo ndegwa ikũmi

Numbers35:10 Aria na ciana cia Isiraeli ũciĩre ũũ: Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũkaringa Jorodani mũkinye bũrũri wa Kanaani
Numbers35:11 nĩmũgethurĩra matũũra mamwe matuĩke matũũra ma kũũrĩrũo; nĩ getha mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũũragĩte mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ
Numbers35:12 Namo matũũra macio matuĩke ũũrĩro wanyu gũkĩũrĩrũo mwĩrĩhĩria
Numbers35:13 Namo matũũra manyu marĩa mũkaruta ma kũũrĩrũo magatuĩka matandatũ.

Numbers35:18 Kana hihi angĩoya mũtĩ wa mbaara
Numbers35:19 Mwĩrĩhĩria wa thakame ĩo ĩitĩtwo

Numbers35:21 kana ningĩ me na muku angĩmũgũtha na guoko nake akue
Numbers35:22 No rĩrĩ
Numbers35:23 kana amũikie ihiga o na rĩrĩkũ rĩrĩa rĩngĩhota kũũraga mũndũ atekũmuona
Numbers35:24 hĩndĩ ĩo andũ monganĩte magĩtue cira ũkoniĩ mũgũthani ũcio na mwĩrĩhĩria thakame ĩo ĩitĩtwo
Numbers35:25 nao andũ acio monganĩte mahonokie mũndũ ũcio ũũragĩte mũndũ
Numbers35:26 No rĩrĩ
Numbers35:27 nake mũndũ ũcio mwĩrĩhĩria thakame ĩo ĩitĩtwo amũkore arĩ na kũu mbarĩ ĩo ĩngĩ ya mũhaka wa itũũra rĩu rĩa kũũrĩrũo
Numbers35:28 nĩ gũkorũo mũndũ ũcio nĩaagĩrĩirũo nĩ gũikara o itũũra-inĩ rĩu rĩa kũũrĩrũo o nginya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene agakua; na rĩrĩ
Numbers35:29 Namo maũndũ maya nĩmo magatuĩka kĩrĩra kĩa watho wa kũrũmĩrĩrũo nĩ inyuĩ cira-inĩ njiaro-inĩ cianyu ciothe
Numbers35:30 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũkoraga mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ angiumbũrũo nĩ aira-rĩ
Numbers35:31 O na ningĩ atĩrĩ
Numbers35:32 Ningĩ mũtikanaamũkĩre indo cia gũkũũra mũndũ orĩire itũũra rĩa kũũrĩrũo rĩu orĩire akehithe kuo
Numbers35:33 Ũguo nĩguo mũkagiria bũrũri ũrĩa mũikarĩte ũthahe; nĩ ũndũ thakame nĩyo ĩtũmaga bũrũri ũthahe; na gũtirĩ horohio ĩngĩhota kũhoroheria bũrũri nĩ ũndũ wa thakame ĩrĩa ĩitĩtwo kuo
Numbers35:34 Na rĩrĩ

Deuteronomy22:1 Ũngĩkona ndegwa ya mũrũ wa ithe wanyu yũrĩte
Deuteronomy22:2 Nake mũriũ ũcio wa ithe wanyu hihi angĩkorũo ndarĩ hakuhĩ nawe
Deuteronomy22:3 Na ningĩ ũguo noguo ũgeka ndigiri yake; o na wĩke nguo yake; ningĩ ũguo noguo ũgeka kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩa mũrũ wa ithe wanyu kĩrĩa kĩũrĩte
Deuteronomy22:4 Ũngĩona ndigiri ya mũrũ wa ithe wanyu ĩgũĩte thĩ ĩgĩthiĩ na njĩra
Deuteronomy22:5 Mũndũ-wa-nja ndakanehumbe nguo iria ĩkoniĩ mũndũ mũrũme; kana mũndũ mũrũme ehumbe nguo iria ikoniĩ mũndũ-wa-nja
Deuteronomy22:6 Ũngĩkorerera nyamũ ĩrĩa yũmbũkaga na mathagu
Deuteronomy22:7 no mũhaka ũkareka nyina ĩĩthiĩre; no rĩrĩ
Deuteronomy22:8 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũngĩaka nyũmba njerũ
Deuteronomy22:9 Mũgũnda waku wa mĩthabibu ndũkanaũhande mbeũ cia mĩthemba ĩĩrĩ; nĩ getha uumithio wothe wa maciaro maguo
Deuteronomy22:10 Ndũkanarĩme wohanĩtie ndegwa na ndigiri igucanĩrie mũraũ.
Deuteronomy22:11 Ndũkanehumbe nguo yogothithanĩtio na ndigi cia mĩthemba ĩĩrĩ ĩtukanĩte
Deuteronomy22:12 Nguo yaku ya kwĩhumba nĩũkamĩĩkagĩra ciohe cia ndigi mĩthia-inĩ yayo yothe.
Deuteronomy22:13 Mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ angĩhikia mũka
Deuteronomy22:14 nake amũthitake atĩ nĩekĩte maũndũ ma gũconorithia andũ
Deuteronomy22:15 hĩndĩ ĩo ithe wa mũirĩtu ũcio
Deuteronomy22:16 nake ithe wa mũirĩtu ũcio ere athuri acio atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy22:17 na akamũthitaka atĩ nĩekĩte maũndũ ma gũconorithia andũ
Deuteronomy22:18 Nao athuri acio a itũũra rĩu makĩnyite mũndũ ũcio mamũhũre
Deuteronomy22:19 na mamwĩtie thĩnjo ya cekeri igana rĩmwe cia betha
Deuteronomy22:20 No rĩrĩ

Joshua4:13 igĩkĩringa mũrĩmo ikĩonagwo nĩ Jehova ciĩthagathagĩte
Joshua4:14 Naguo mũthenya o ro ũcio
Joshua4:15 Nake Jehova akĩarĩria Joshua
Joshua4:16 Athana wĩre athĩnjĩri-Ngai
Joshua4:17 Tondũ ũcio Joshua agĩgĩatha athĩnjĩri-Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Joshua4:18 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Joshua4:19 Nao andũ acio maambatire makiuma hau Jorodani mũthenya wa ikũmi wa mweri wa mbere; magĩkĩamba hema ciao mwena wa irathĩro wa Jeriko
Joshua4:20 Namo mahiga ikũmi na merĩ macio maarutire Jorodani
Joshua4:21 Nake akĩarĩria ciana cia Isiraeli
Joshua4:22 hĩndĩ ĩo nĩmũkamenyithia ciana cianyu ũhoro ũyũ
Joshua4:23 Nĩ ũndũ Jehova Ngai wanyu nĩaahũithirie maĩ ma Jorodani makĩmweherera
Joshua4:24 nĩ getha ndũrĩrĩ ciothe cia thĩ imenye atĩ guoko kwa Jehova kwĩ hinya mũno; nĩguo itũũre ciĩtigĩrĩte Jehova Ngai wanyu tene na tene.
Joshua5:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Joshua5:2 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jehova agĩkĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua5:3 Joshua agĩgĩĩthondekithĩria hiũ cia mahiga ma nyaigĩ
Joshua5:4 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua5:5 nao othe maarĩ aruu; no rĩrĩ
Joshua5:6 Nĩ ũndũ ciana cia Isiraeli ciacangire werũ-inĩ mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna
Joshua5:7 Nacio ciana ciao

Joshua5:11 Naguo mũthenya o ro ũcio wa kerĩ thutha wa Bathaka ikĩrĩa irio iria ciarĩ o kũu mĩgũnda-inĩ ya bũrũri ũcio

Joshua11:4 Nao magĩkiumagara
Joshua11:5 Nao athamaki acio othe magĩcemania o handũ hamwe; magĩthiĩ makĩamba hema ciao o handũ hamwe hakuhĩ na maĩ ma Meromu

Joshua11:17 kuuma kĩrĩma kĩa Halaku
Joshua11:18 Nake Joshua akĩhũrana mbaara na athamaki acio othe ihinda iraya.

Joshua13:27 o na Bethi-haramu
Joshua13:28 Ũcio nĩguo bũrũri ũrĩa ciana cia Gadi ciegwatĩire ũtuĩke wacio hamwe na matũũra maguo
Joshua13:29 Ningi Musa akĩhe nuthu ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase igai rĩayo
Joshua13:30 Naguo mũhaka wacio warutĩtio o kũu Mahanaimu; naguo bũrũri wacio ũgĩgĩtuĩka nĩ kũu Bashani guothe
Joshua13:31 na rĩrĩ
Joshua13:32 Macio nĩmo mabũrũri marĩa Musa aagayanirie kũu werũ-inĩ wa Moabi
Joshua13:33 No mũhĩrĩga wa Lawii-rĩ
Joshua14:1 Namo maya nĩmo mabũrũri marĩa ciana cia Isiraeli ciagwatire matuĩke igai rĩacio bũrũri wa Kanaani
Joshua14:2 o ta ũrĩa Jehova aathĩte Musa gwĩkwo nĩ ũndũ wa mĩhĩrĩga ĩo kenda
Joshua14:3 Nĩ gũkorũo Musa nĩaarĩkĩtie kũheana mabũrũri ma mĩhĩrĩga ĩĩrĩ
Joshua14:4 Nĩ gũkorũo ciana cia Jusufu ciarĩ mĩhĩrĩga ĩĩrĩ
Joshua14:5 O ta ũrĩa Jehova aathire Musa gwĩkwo-rĩ
Joshua14:6 Hĩndĩ ĩo ciana cia Juda igĩgĩkuhĩhĩria Joshua o kũu Giligali; nake Kalebu wa Jefune
Joshua14:7 Niĩ ndarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna hĩndĩ ĩo Musa
Joshua14:8 No rĩrĩ
Joshua14:9 Nake Musa akĩĩhĩta mũthenya o ro ũcio
Joshua14:10 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Joshua14:11 Na rĩu ningĩ
Joshua14:12 Tondũ ũcio rĩu kĩ’he kĩrĩma gĩkĩ Jehova aaririe ũhoro wakĩo mũthenya ũcio; nĩ ũndũ wee mwene mũthenya ũcio nĩweiguĩrĩire ũrĩa Aanakimu maarĩ kũu
Joshua14:13 Nake Joshua agĩkĩrathima Kalebu wa Jefune
Joshua14:14 Tondũ ũcio Hebironi gũgĩtuĩka igai rĩa Kalebu wa Jefune
Joshua14:15 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua15:1 Naguo bũrũri ũrĩa wagũĩrĩire mũhĩrĩga wa ciana cia Juda wacukĩrũo mĩtĩ
Joshua15:2 O naguo mũhaka wao wa mwena wa gũthini warutĩtio o mũthia-inĩ wa Iria rĩa Cumbĩ
Joshua15:3 mũhaka ũcio ũgathiĩ ũkahĩtũkĩra o mwena-inĩ wa gũthini wa rĩambatĩrĩro-inĩ rĩa Akirabimu
Joshua15:4 ũgagĩcoka ũgathiĩ o ro ũguo
Joshua15:5 Naguo mũhaka wa mwena wa irathĩro warĩ Iria rĩa Cumbĩ
Joshua15:6 naguo mũhaka ũcio ũkĩambata
Joshua15:7 ningĩ mũhaka ũcio ũkĩambata ũgĩkinya Debiri uumĩte gĩtuamba gĩa Akori
Joshua15:8 ningĩ mũhaka ũcio ũkĩambata ũkĩgera mũkuru-inĩ wa mũrũ wa Hinomu
Joshua15:9 naguo mũhari wa mũhaka ũcio ũgĩkururũo ũrutĩtio kĩrĩma-inĩ igũrũ
Joshua15:10 ningĩ mũhaka ũcio ũkĩrigicũka na mwena wa ithũĩro uumĩte Baala ũgĩkinya kĩrĩma gĩa Seiru
Joshua15:11 ningĩ mũhaka ũcio ũkiuma hau
Joshua15:12 Naguo mũhaka wa mwena wa ithũĩro ũgĩthiĩ ũrorete iria-inĩ rĩrĩa inene
Joshua15:13 Nake Kalebu wa Jefune agĩkĩheo igai rĩa gĩthaka thĩinĩ wa ciana cia Juda
Joshua15:14 Nake Kalebu akĩingata ariũ arĩa atatũ a Anaku moime kũu
Joshua15:15 Ningĩ agĩkiuma kũu
Joshua15:16 Nake Kalebu agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Joshua15:17 Nake Othinieli
Joshua15:18 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Joshua15:19 Agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Joshua15:20 Rĩrĩ nĩrĩo igai rĩrĩa mũhĩrĩga wa ciana cia Juda wagwatire rĩtuĩke rĩaguo o ta ũrĩa mbarĩ ciaguo ciatariĩ.

Joshua16:1 Naguo bũrũri ũrĩa wagũĩrĩire ciana cia Jusufu wacukĩrũo mĩtĩ-rĩ
Joshua16:2 ningĩ woima Beth-eli ũgĩkinya Luzu
Joshua16:3 ningĩ ũgĩikũrũka na mwena wa irathĩro
Joshua16:4 Ciana icio cia Jusufu
Joshua16:5 Naguo mũhaka wa ciana cia Efiraimu
Joshua16:6 ningĩ mwena wa ithũĩro
Joshua16:7 ũgĩcoka ũgĩikũrũka uumĩte Janoa ũgĩkinya Atarothu
Joshua16:8 Ningĩ woima Tapua
Joshua16:9 hamwe na matũũra marĩa maamũrĩtwo nĩ ũndũ wa ciana icio cia Efiraimu bũrũri wa ciana cia Manase
Joshua16:10 Nacio ciana cia Efiraimu itiigana kũingata Akanaani arĩa maatũire Gezeri; no Akanaani acio maatũũrire thĩinĩ wa Efiraimu
Joshua17:1 Naguo mũhĩrĩga wa Manase
Joshua17:2 Nacio ciana iria ingĩ cia Manase igĩcukĩrũo mĩtĩ o ta ũrĩa mbarĩ ciacio ciatariĩ; ĩgĩgĩcukwo nĩ ũndũ wa ciana cia Abiezeri
Joshua17:3 No rĩrĩ
Joshua17:4 Nao magĩthengerera Eleazaru
Joshua17:5 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua17:6 nĩ ũndũ airĩtu a Manase nĩmaagwatire igai thĩinĩ wa ariũ ake; naguo bũrũri wa Gileadi ũgĩtuĩka wa ihĩĩ iria ingĩ cia Manase.
Joshua17:7 Naguo mũhaka wa Manase ũkĩrutio o kũu Asheri
Joshua17:8 Naguo bũrũri ũcio wa Tapua warĩ wa Manase; no rĩrĩ
Joshua17:9 Naguo mũhaka ũcio ũgĩikũrũka ũgĩthiĩ gũtheca karũũĩ ga Kana mwena wa gũthini wa karũũĩ kau. Namo matũũra marĩa me kũu nĩ ma Efiraimu no me thĩinĩ wa matũũra ma Manase; naguo mũhaka wa Manase warĩ mwena wa gathigathini wa karũũĩ kau
Joshua17:10 mwena wa gũthini-rĩ
Joshua17:11 Naguo mũhĩrĩga wa Manase ũgĩkorũo warĩ na matũũra mamwe thĩinĩ wa Isakaru
Joshua17:12 No rĩrĩ
Joshua17:13 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Joshua17:14 Nacio ciana cia Jusufu ikĩarĩria Joshua
Joshua17:15 Nake Joshua agĩciĩra atĩrĩ
Joshua17:16 Nacio ciana icio cia Jusufu igĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Joshua17:17 Joshua agĩkĩaria na andũ acio a nyũmba ya Jusufu
Joshua17:18 no rĩrĩ
Joshua18:1 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ gĩothe gĩa ciana cia Isiraeli gĩkĩũngana Shilo
Joshua18:2 No nĩgwatigarĩte mĩhĩrĩga mũgwanja thĩinĩ wa ciana cia Isiraeli ĩtagaĩirũo igai rĩayo.
Joshua18:3 Nake Joshua agĩkĩĩra ciana cia Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Joshua18:4 Wĩthurĩrei andũ atatũ thĩinĩ wa mũhĩrĩga o mũhĩrĩga; na niĩ ndĩmarekie mokĩre mathiĩ bũrũri wothe
Joshua18:5 Nao maũgayanie icunjĩ mũgwanja
Joshua18:6 Na mwarĩkia gũtuĩria ũhoro wa bũrũri ũcio mwandĩke ũrĩa ũngĩgayũo icunjĩ mũgwanja-rĩ
Joshua18:7 Tondũ Alawii matirĩ na gĩcunjĩ kĩao thĩinĩ wanyu
Joshua18:8 Nao andũ acio magĩgĩũkĩra magĩthiĩ; nake Joshua agĩkorũo aathĩte andũ acio maathiaga akamera maandĩke ũhoro wa ũrĩa thĩ ĩo ĩtariĩ
Joshua18:9 Nao andũ acio magĩgĩthiĩ makĩgera thĩ ĩo yothe
Joshua18:10 Nake Joshua agĩkĩmacukĩra mĩtĩ o kũu Shilo
Joshua18:11 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua18:12 Naguo mũhaka wacio wa mwena wa gathigathini warutĩtio Jorodani; ningĩ mũhaka ũcio ũkĩambatĩra mwena wa gathigathini wa Jeriko ũgĩtuĩkanĩria bũrũri ũrĩa wĩ irĩma nyingĩ mwena wa ithũĩro; nayo nyumĩrĩra yaguo yarĩ werũ-inĩ wa Bethi-aveni.
Joshua18:13 Ningĩ mũhaka ũcio woima hau ũkĩhungura ũgĩkinya Luzu
Joshua18:14 Naguo mwena wa ithũĩro mũhaka ũcio ũgĩkururũo
Joshua18:15 Naguo mwena wa gũthini warutĩtio o gĩturi-inĩ gĩa Kiriathu-jearimu
Joshua18:16 ningĩ mũhaka ũcio ũgĩikũrũka ũgĩkinya o mũthia-inĩ wa kĩrĩma kĩrĩa kĩng’etheire mũkuru wa mũrũ wa Hinomu
Joshua18:17 ningĩ mwena wa gathigathini
Joshua18:18 ũgĩgĩtuĩkanĩria rũgongo rũrĩa rũng’etheire Araba
Joshua18:19 ningĩ mũhaka ũcio ũkĩhungurĩra mwena-inĩ wa gathigathini wa Bethi-hogila; nayo nyumĩrĩra ya mũhaka ũcio ĩkĩgĩa gĩcongoco-inĩ kĩa mwena wa gathigathini wa Iria rĩa Cumbĩ
Joshua18:20 Naruo rũũĩ rũa Jorodani nĩruo mũhaka waguo wa mwena wa irathĩro. Bũrũri ũcio nĩguo wagairũo nĩ ciana cia Benjamini o ta ũrĩa mĩhaka yaguo ĩũrigicĩirie mĩena yothe
Joshua18:21 Na rĩrĩ

Joshua20:1 Ningĩ Jehova akĩarĩria Joshua

Joshua20:3 nĩ getha mũũragani ũrĩa ũũragĩte mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ na ũndũ wa kũhĩtia
Joshua20:4 Nake mũũragani ũcio orĩre itũũra rĩmwe rĩa matũũra macio
Joshua20:5 Nake mwĩrĩhĩria ũcio wa thakame ĩrĩa ĩitĩtwo angĩkorũo nĩamũteng’eretie
Joshua20:6 Nake mũndũ ũcio atũũre itũũra rĩu o nginya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa akarũgama mbere ya andũ monganĩte atuĩrũo cira
Joshua20:7 Nao magĩkĩamũra Kedeshi
Joshua20:8 Naguo mũrĩmo ũcio ũngĩ wa Jorodani
Joshua20:9 Macio nĩmo matũũra marĩa maamũrirũo nĩ ũndũ wa ciana ciothe cia Isiraeli

Joshua21:6 Nacio ciana cia Gerishoni ikĩgũĩrũo nĩ matũũra ikũmi na matatũ bũrũri wa mbarĩ cia mũhĩrĩga wa Isakaru
Joshua21:7 O nacio ciana cia Merari ikĩgũĩrũo nĩ matũũra ikũmi na merĩ
Joshua21:8 Ciana cia Isiraeli igĩkĩhe Alawii matũũra macio
Joshua21:9 Nacio igĩcihe o kũu bũrũri wa mũhĩrĩga wa ciana cia Juda

Joshua21:20 Nacio mbarĩ cia ciana cia Kohathu
Joshua21:21 Ciana cia Isiraeli igĩgĩcihe Shekemu
Joshua21:22 na Kibizaimu

Joshua21:24 na Aijaloni

Joshua21:29 na Jaramuthu

Joshua21:33 Matũũra macio mothe ma Agerishoni
Joshua21:34 Nacio mbarĩ cia ciana cia Merari
Joshua21:35 na Dimuna
Joshua21:36 O na ningĩ mũhĩrĩga-inĩ wa Reubeni igĩcihe Bezeri
Joshua21:37 na Kedemothu
Joshua21:38 Ningĩ mũhĩrĩga-inĩ wa Gadi igĩcihe Ramothu
Joshua21:39 na Heshiboni
Joshua21:40 Matũũra macio mothe nĩmo ciana cia Merari
Joshua21:41 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua21:42 Matũũra macio-rĩ
Joshua21:43 Ũguo nĩguo Jehova aakĩheire Aisiraeli bũrũri ũcio wothe ehĩtire akĩĩra maithe mao atĩ nĩakamahe; nao magĩkĩwĩgwatĩra ũgĩtuĩka wao
Joshua21:44 Nake Jehova agĩgĩtũma maikare mahoreire na ndwere ciothe
Joshua21:45 Gũtirĩ ũndũ o na ũmwe wa maũndũ mega marĩa Jehova oigĩte atĩ nĩageka nyũmba ya Isiraeli ũtaigana kuoneka; maũndũ macio mothe nĩmaahingirio biũ.
Joshua22:1 Hĩndĩ ĩo Joshua agĩgĩĩta Areubeni
Joshua22:2 agĩkĩmera atĩrĩ
Joshua22:3 matukũ macio mothe mathirĩte o nginya ũmũthĩ-rĩ
Joshua22:4 Na rĩu
Joshua22:5 No rĩrĩ
Joshua22:6 Joshua agĩkĩmarathima
Joshua22:7 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua22:8 na akĩmaarĩria
Joshua22:9 Nacio ciana icio cia Reubeni
Joshua22:10 Nacio rĩrĩa ciakinyire rũgongo rũrĩa rũĩ gũkuhĩ na Jorodani
Joshua22:11 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli ikĩigua gũkiugwo ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩi
Joshua22:12 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua22:13 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli igĩkĩrekia Finehasi wa Eleazaru
Joshua22:14 e hamwe na atongoria ikũmi
Joshua22:15 Nao magĩgĩkinya harĩ ciana cia Reubeni
Joshua22:16 Kĩrĩndĩ gĩothe kĩa Jehova gĩkũũria ũũ: Nĩ kĩ gĩtũmĩte mwĩhie Ngai wa Isiraeli mũkaagarara watho wake
Joshua22:17 Anga tũtiaiganirũo nĩ ũũru ũrĩa wekirũo nĩ ũndũ wa Peori
Joshua22:18 atĩ nĩkĩo mũgarũrũkĩte ũmũthĩ mũgatiga kũrũmĩrĩra Jehova? Nĩgũgũgĩtuĩka atĩrĩ
Joshua22:19 No rĩrĩ
Joshua22:20 Githĩ Akani mũrũ wa Zera ndaakĩĩhirie ũhoro-inĩ wa indo iria ciaamũrĩtwo cia kũninwo
Joshua22:21 Hĩndĩ ĩo ciana cia Reubeni
Joshua22:22 Jehova
Joshua22:23 ningĩ kũngĩkorũo hihi twĩakĩire kĩgongona gĩkĩ nĩguo tũgarũrũke tũtige kũmũrũmĩrĩra
Joshua22:24 No rĩrĩ
Joshua22:25 Nĩ gũkorũo Jehova nĩatuĩte atĩ Jorodani rũtuĩke mũhaka witũ na inyuĩ ciana cia Reubeni na cia Gadi; tondũ ũcio mũtirĩ ho o na hanini ũhoro-inĩ wa Jehova; na ciana cianyu nĩigatũma ciana ciitũ itige gwĩtigĩra Jehova.
Joshua22:26 Tondũ ũcio tũgĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Joshua22:27 no nĩ getha gĩtuĩke kĩririkania kĩa ũhoro witũ na inyuĩ
Joshua22:28 Ũndũ ũcio nĩguo watũmire tuuge ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Joshua22:29 Kũroaga gũtuĩka ũguo atĩ tũreme Jehova
Joshua22:30 Na rĩrĩ
Joshua22:31 Nake Finehasi wa Eleazaru
Joshua22:32 Nake Finehasi wa Eleazaru
Joshua22:33 Naguo ũndũ ũcio ũgĩkenia ciana icio cia Isiraeli; igĩkĩgatha Ngai
Joshua22:34 Nacio ciana cia Reubeni na cia Gadi igĩgĩĩta kĩgongona kĩu Edi
Joshua23:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Joshua23:2 agĩgĩĩta Aisiraeli othe
Joshua23:3 na inyuĩ nĩmuonete maũndũ mothe marĩa Jehova Ngai wanyu ekĩte ndũrĩrĩ ici ciothe nĩ ũndũ wanyu; nĩ gũkorũo Jehova Ngai wanyu nĩwe wamũhũranĩire.
Joshua23:4 Atĩrĩrĩ
Joshua23:5 Nake Jehova Ngai wanyu nĩwe ũgacithinĩkania imweherere
Joshua23:6 Tondũ ũcio ũmĩrĩriai mũno
Joshua23:7 mũtikanatonyane na ndũrĩrĩ ici
Joshua23:8 no rĩrĩ
Joshua23:9 Nĩ gũkorũo Jehova nĩamũingatĩire ndũrĩrĩ nene
Joshua23:10 Mũndũ ũmwe thĩinĩ wanyu akaingataga andũ ngiri; nĩ ũndũ Jehova Ngai wanyu nĩwe ũkũmũhũranĩra
Joshua23:11 Tondũ ũcio wĩmenyererei mũno mwendage Jehova Ngai wanyu.
Joshua23:12 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Joshua23:13 menyai o mũno mũno atĩ Jehova Ngai wanyu ndagagĩcoka kũingata ndũrĩrĩ ici mũtikanacoke gũciona; no rĩrĩ
Joshua23:14 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Joshua23:15 Na nĩgũgakinya atĩrĩ
Joshua23:16 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũkaagarara kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Jehova Ngai wanyu
Joshua24:1 Nake Joshua agĩcokanĩrĩria mĩhĩrĩga yothe ya Isiraeli o kũu Shekemu
Joshua24:2 Nake Joshua agĩkĩĩra andũ acio othe atĩrĩ
Joshua24:3 Niĩ na niĩ ngĩruta ithe wanyu Iburahimu mũrĩmo ũcio wa rũũĩ rũu rũa Farati
Joshua24:4 Nake Isaaka ngĩkĩmũhe Jakubu
Joshua24:5 Ngĩcoka ngĩrekia Musa na Haruni
Joshua24:6 Ngikĩruta maithe manyu kũu Misiri
Joshua24:7 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maakaĩire Jehova
Joshua24:8 Ngĩkĩmũtwara
Joshua24:9 Ningĩ hĩndĩ o ĩo Balaki
Joshua24:10 no rĩrĩ ndiigana kũigua Balaamu; na tondũ ũcio agĩkĩrĩrĩria kũmũrathima. Ũguo nĩguo ndakĩmũhonokirie ngĩmũruta moko-inĩ make.
Joshua24:11 Na inyuĩ mũgĩkĩringa Jorodani
Joshua24:12 Ngĩkĩrekia magi me mbora mbere yanyu
Joshua24:13 Ngĩkĩmũhe bũrũri mũtanogeire mũkĩũrutĩra wĩra
Joshua24:14 Tondũ ũcio rĩu wĩtigĩrei Jehova
Joshua24:15 Na rĩu mũngĩkorũo nĩmũkuona arĩ ũũru gũtungatĩra Jehova
Joshua24:16 Nao andũ acio magĩcokia makiuga atĩrĩ
Joshua24:17 nĩ gũkorũo Jehova Ngai witũ nĩwe watũrutire bũrũri wa Misiri ithuene
Joshua24:18 na ningĩ Jehova akĩingata andũ acio othe mehere mbere iitũ
Joshua24:19 Nake Joshua agĩkĩĩra andũ acio atĩrĩ
Joshua24:20 Mũngĩgĩtigana na Jehova
Joshua24:21 Nao andũ acio magĩkĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua24:22 Ningĩ Joshua agĩkĩĩra andũ acio atĩrĩ
Joshua24:23 Nake agĩkĩmera atĩrĩ
Joshua24:24 Nao andũ acio magĩkĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua24:25 Joshua agĩkĩrĩkanĩra na andũ acio mũthenya o ro ũcio
Joshua24:26 Nake Joshua akĩandĩka ciugo icio ibuku-inĩ rĩa watho wa Ngai; agĩcoka akĩoya ihiga inene
Joshua24:27 Nake Joshua akĩĩra andũ acio othe ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Joshua24:28 Nake Joshua agĩkĩĩra andũ methiĩre
Joshua24:29 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Joshua24:30 Nao makĩmũthika gĩthaka-inĩ gĩake o kũu Timinathu-sera
Joshua24:31 Nao Aisiraeli magĩtungatĩra Jehova matukũ mothe marĩa Joshua aarĩ muoyo
Joshua24:32 Na rĩri
Joshua24:33 O nake Eleazaru wa Haruni agĩkua
Judges1:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges1:2 Nake Jehova agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Judges1:3 Nao andũ a Juda magĩkĩĩra andũ a Simeoni mũrũ wa nyina wao atĩrĩ
Judges1:4 Ajuda magĩkĩambata; nake Jehova akĩrekereria Akanaani
Judges1:5 Nao magĩkĩonera Adoni-bezeki o kũu Bezeki; magĩkĩhũrana mbaara nake
Judges1:6 No Adoni-bezeki akĩũra
Judges1:7 Nake Adoni-bezeki akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges1:8 Nacio ciana cia Juda ikĩhũrana mbaara na Jerusalemu
Judges1:9 Ningi thutha wa ũguo ciana cia Juda igiikũrũka ikahũrane mbaara na Akanaani arĩa maatũũraga bũrũri ũrĩa wĩ irĩma nyingĩ
Judges1:10 Ningĩ ciana icio cia Juda igĩgĩthiĩ kũhũrana mbaara na Akanaani arĩa maatũũraga Hebironi
Judges1:11 Ningĩ moima kũu
Judges1:12 Nake Kalebu agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Judges1:13 Nake Othinieli
Judges1:14 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges1:15 Agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges1:16 Nacio ciana cia Mũkeni
Judges1:17 Nacio ciana cia Juda igĩgĩthiĩ na ciana cia Simeoni
Judges1:18 Ningĩ ciana cia Juda igĩtunyana Gaza
Judges1:19 Nake Jehova aakĩrĩ hamwe na ciana icio cia Juda; nake agĩkĩingata andũ arĩa maatũũraga bũrũri ũrĩa wĩ irĩma nyingĩ; no rĩrĩ
Judges1:20 Nacio igĩkĩhe Kalebu Hebironi
Judges1:21 Nacio ciana cia Benjamini itiigana kũingata Ajebusi arĩa maatũũrĩte Jerusalemu; no rĩri
Judges1:22 O nao andũ a nyũmba ya Jusufu makĩambata makahũrane na Beth-eli; nake Jehova aarĩ hamwe nao.
Judges1:23 Nao andũ a nyũmba ĩo ya Jusufu magĩkĩrekia andũ magathigane Beth-eli. (Narĩo itũũra rĩu tene rĩetagwo Luzu.)
Judges1:24 Nao athigani acio magĩkĩona mũndũ akiuma kũu itũũra-inĩ rĩu
Judges1:25 Nake agĩkĩmonia harĩa itũũra rĩu rĩatonyagĩrũo
Judges1:26 Nake mũndũ ũcio agĩthiĩ bũrũri wa Ahiti
Judges1:27 Nao andũ a Manase matiaingatire andũ arĩa maatũũraga Bethi-sheani hamwe na mĩciĩ yarĩo
Judges1:28 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges1:29 Nao andũ a Efiraimu matiigana kũingata Akanaani arĩa maatũire Gezeri; no rĩrĩ
Judges1:30 Nao andũ a Zebuluni matiigana kũingata andũ arĩa maatũũraga Kitironi
Judges1:31 Nao andũ a Asheri matiaingatire andũ arĩa maatũũraga Ako
Judges1:32 no andũ acio a Asheri maatũũrire o kũu thĩinĩ wa Akanaani
Judges1:33 Nao andũ a Nafitali matiaingatire andũ arĩa maatũũraga Bethi-shemeshi
Judges1:34 Nao Aamori makĩhatĩrĩria ciana cia Dani igĩtũũrio o kũu bũrũri ũrĩa wĩ irĩma nyingĩ na hinya; nĩ gũkorũo nĩmaacigiririe ciikũrũke ituamba-inĩ.
Judges1:35 Ningĩ Aamori acio magĩtũũra kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa Herezu
Judges1:36 Naguo mũhaka wa Aamori warutĩtio o rĩambatĩrĩro-inĩ rĩa Akirabimu
Judges2:1 Na rĩrĩ
Judges2:2 na atĩ mũtikanarĩkanĩre na andũ aya matũũraga bũrũri ũyũ o na atĩa
Judges2:3 Tondũ ũcio niĩ o na niĩ ngĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Judges2:4 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges2:5 narĩo rĩĩtwa rĩa handũ hau makĩrĩĩta Bokimu; nao magĩkĩrutĩra Jehova igongona o ro hau.
Judges2:6 Na rĩrĩ
Judges2:7 Nao andũ acio magĩtungatĩra Jehova matukũ mothe marĩa Joshua aarĩ muoyo
Judges2:8 Nake Joshua wa Nuni
Judges2:9 Nao makĩmũthika gĩthaka-inĩ gĩake o kũu Timinathu-heresi bũrũri ũrĩa wĩ irĩma nyingĩ wa Efiraimu
Judges2:10 Thutha wa ũguo andũ othe a rũciaro rũu o nao magĩturanĩrũo na andũ ao arĩa maanakua; gũgĩgĩcoka gũkĩgĩa rũciaro rũngĩ thutha wao
Judges2:11 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli igĩgĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ moru nĩ Jehova
Judges2:12 nacio igĩgĩtigana na Jehova
Judges2:13 Igĩgĩtigana na Jehova
Judges2:14 Nake Jehova agĩcinwo nĩ marakara nĩ ũndũ wa Aisiraeli
Judges2:15 Na rĩrĩ
Judges2:16 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jehova agĩkĩmaarahũrĩra atiirĩrĩri-bũrũri a kũmahonokia
Judges2:17 No rĩrĩ
Judges2:18 Na rĩrĩ
Judges2:19 No nĩgwakinyaga atĩrĩ
Judges2:20 Nake Jehova agĩgĩcinwo nĩ marakara nĩ ũndũ wa Isiraeli
Judges2:21 niĩ o na niĩ gwata rĩu ndicoka kũingata rũrĩrĩ o na rũmwe rũa ndũrĩrĩ iria Joshua aatigire kuo hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aakuire rũrũeherere;
Judges2:22 nĩ getha ’hote kũgeria Aisiraeli na ũndũ wacio ’menye kana nĩmarĩikaraga njĩra-inĩ ya Jehova
Judges2:23 Tondũ ũcio Jehova agĩgĩtiga ndũrĩrĩ icio na ndaciingate na ihenya; o na ndaigana gũcirekereria acineane moko-inĩ ma Joshua.
Judges3:1 Na rĩrĩ
Judges3:2 naguo ũndũ ũcio wekirũo ũguo
Judges3:3 nacio ndũrĩrĩ icio nĩcio ici
Judges3:4 Nao acio maatigĩtwo nĩ ũndũ wa kũgeria Isiraeli
Judges3:5 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli igĩgĩtũũrania na Akanaani
Judges3:6 nacio igĩgĩtwara airĩtu ao
Judges3:7 Ciana cia Isiraeli igĩgĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo me moru nĩ Jehova
Judges3:8 Na tondũ ũcio Jehova agĩgĩcinwo nĩ marakara nĩ ũndũ wa Aisiraeli
Judges3:9 Na rĩrĩ
Judges3:10 Naguo roho wa Jehova ũgĩkĩmũkora ũkĩgĩa nake
Judges3:11 Naguo bũrũri ũcio ũgĩkĩhorera ihinda rĩa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna. Nake Othinieli
Judges3:12 Ningĩ ciana cia Isiraeli igĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ moru nĩ Jehova; nake Jehova agĩĩkĩra Egiloni mũthamaki wa Moabi hinya
Judges3:13 Nake agĩkĩũnganithia ciana cia Amoni na cia Aanaleki ithiĩ harĩ we
Judges3:14 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli igĩgĩtungatĩra Egiloni
Judges3:15 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ciana cia Isiraeli ciakaĩire Jehova
Judges3:16 Ningĩ Ehudu ũcio agĩkorũo nĩeturithĩirie rũhiũ rũa njora rũũgĩ mbarĩ cierĩ
Judges3:17 Nake agĩgĩtwarĩra Egiloni mũthamaki ũcio wa Moabi igoti rĩu; nake Egiloni ũcio aarĩ mũndũ mũnoru mũno.
Judges3:18 Na rĩrĩ
Judges3:19 No rĩrĩ
Judges3:20 Nake Ehudu agĩthiĩ harĩ we; nake agĩkorũo aikarĩte thĩ arĩ o wiki nyũmba ya igũrũ ĩrĩa aaikaraga hĩndĩ ya riũa. Nake Ehudu akiuga ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Judges3:21 Hĩndĩ ĩo Ehudu agĩgĩtambũrũkia guoko kwa ũmotho
Judges3:22 naruo rũhiũ rũu ruothe rũkĩmũtonya nda
Judges3:23 Nake Ehudu agĩkiuma agĩkinya gĩthaku-inĩ
Judges3:24 Na rĩrĩ
Judges3:25 Nacio igĩgĩikara cietereire o nginya ĩkĩya kũmaka; nake agĩkĩaga kũhingũra mĩrango ya nyũmba ĩo; tondũ ũcio igĩkĩoya kĩhingũri ikĩmĩhingũra; na atĩrĩrĩ
Judges3:26 Nake Ehudu agĩkorũo eyũrĩire hĩndĩ ĩo ciaikarĩte cietereire
Judges3:27 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges3:28 Nake agĩciĩra atĩrĩ
Judges3:29 Hĩndĩ ĩo igĩkĩũraga arũme ta ngiri ikũmi a Amoabi
Judges3:30 Ũguo nĩguo Amoabi maakĩhootirũo nĩ Aisiraeli mũthenya ũcio. Naguo bũrũri ũkĩgĩa thayũ ũkĩhorera ihinda rĩa mĩaka mĩrongo inana.
Judges3:31 Ningĩ thutha wake hakĩgĩa mũndũ ũngĩ wetagwo Shamigari wa Anathu
Judges4:1 Ningĩ ciana cia Isiraeli igĩcoka gwĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ moru nĩ Jehova
Judges4:2 Nake Jehova agĩciendia harĩ Jabini
Judges4:3 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli igĩkaĩra Jehova; nĩ ũndũ Jabini aarĩ na ngari cia ita cia igera magana kenda; nake nĩaahinyĩrĩirie ciana cia Isiraeli mũno mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ.
Judges4:4 Na rĩrĩ
Judges4:5 Nake aaikaraga gĩtina-inĩ kĩa mũkĩndũ wa Debora ũrĩa warĩ gatagatĩ ka Rama na Beth-eli
Judges4:6 Nake agĩkĩrekania agĩĩta Baraka wa Abinoamu
Judges4:7 Niĩ na niĩ nĩngũgucĩrĩria Sisera
Judges4:8 Nake Baraka agĩkĩĩra Debora atĩrĩ
Judges4:9 Nake agĩgĩcokia atĩrĩ
Judges4:10 Baraka agĩgĩĩta andũ a Zebuluni na a Nafitali mongane o kũu Kedeshi; na rĩrĩ
Judges4:11 Na rĩrĩ
Judges4:12 Nao andũ makĩhe Sisera ũhoro makĩmwĩra atĩ Baraka wa Abinoamu nĩ mwambatu agakinya kĩrĩma-inĩ gĩa Taboru.
Judges4:13 Nake Sisera agĩkĩũnganithia ngari ciake ciothe cia ita
Judges4:14 Nake Debora agĩkĩĩra Baraka atĩrĩ
Judges4:15 Nake Jehova akĩnyaririthia Sisera na ngari ciake ciothe cia ita
Judges4:16 No rĩrĩ
Judges4:17 No rĩrĩ
Judges4:18 Nake Jaeli akiumagara agatũnge Sisera
Judges4:19 Ningĩ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges4:20 Ningĩ Sisera agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges4:21 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jaeli
Judges4:22 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Judges4:23 Ũguo nĩguo Ngai aakĩhootithirie Jabini
Judges4:24 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli igĩkĩrĩrĩria gũtoria Jabini
Judges5:1 Na rĩrĩ
Judges5:2 Atĩrĩrĩ
Judges5:3 Atĩrĩrĩ
Judges5:4 Wee Jehova
Judges5:5 Irĩma nacio ikĩinaina nĩ kuona Jehova; Ti-itherũ
Judges5:6 Atĩrĩrĩ
Judges5:7 Tũtũũra tũkĩaga andũ o kũu Isiraeli
Judges5:8 Andũ nĩ gũthura methurĩire ngai cia mũũkano
Judges5:9 Niĩ njikaraga ndĩĩte aathani a Isiraeli
Judges5:10 Atĩrĩrĩ
Judges5:11 Na rĩrĩ
Judges5:12 Atĩrĩrĩ
Judges5:13 Gũgĩgĩikũrũka matigari ma anene
Judges5:14 Na rĩrĩ
Judges5:15 O nao anene a Isakaru magĩkorũo me hamwe na Debora
Judges5:16 Wee-rĩ
Judges5:17 Gileadi aikarire o ro kũu mũrĩmo ũcio ũngĩ wa Jorodani; O nake Dani-rĩ
Judges5:18 Azebuluni nĩo andũ arĩa metwarĩrĩire ũgwati-inĩ wa gĩkuũ
Judges5:19 Nao athamaki magĩgĩũka kũhũrana
Judges5:20 O kũu igũrũ-rĩ
Judges5:21 Naruo rũũĩ rũa Kishoni rũkĩmatwara na kĩguũ
Judges5:22 Hĩndĩ ĩo mahũngũ ma mbarathi makĩrumĩa thĩ Nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa kwarũgarũgirũo o kũrũgarũgwo nĩ mbarathi ciao irĩ hinya.
Judges5:23 Atĩrĩrĩ
Judges5:24 Gũkena-rĩ
Judges5:25 Sisera nĩ maĩ aamũhoire
Judges5:26 Agĩcoka agĩtambũrũkia guoko
Judges5:27 Nake agĩkĩinamĩrĩra o hau magũrũ-inĩ make
Judges5:28 Nyina wa Sisera agĩgĩcũthĩrĩria na ndirica
Judges5:29 Nao atumia ogĩ arĩa maarĩ hamwe nake makĩmũcokeria atĩrĩ
Judges5:30 Anga ti kuona monete indo cia gũtahwo
Judges5:31 Thũ ciaku ciothe irokua o ta ũguo
Judges6:1 Ningĩ ciana cia Isiraeli igĩgĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo me moru nĩ Jehova
Judges6:2 Nao Amidiani makĩhoota Aisiraeli o kũmahoota
Judges6:3 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges6:4 nao magĩkĩamba hema ciao mamang’etheire
Judges6:5 Nĩ gũkorũo maambatire kuo na ũhiũ wao
Judges6:6 Aisiraeli magĩkĩhinyario mũno nĩ Amidiani acio
Judges6:7 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges6:8 Jehova agĩkĩrekia mũnabii harĩ ciana icio cia Isiraeli
Judges6:9 na ngĩmũhonokia moko-inĩ ma Amisiri
Judges6:10 ningĩ ngĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges6:11 Nake mũraika wa Jehova agĩgĩthiĩ agĩikara thĩ gĩtina-inĩ kĩa mũgandi o kũu Ofira
Judges6:12 Nake mũraika ũcio wa Jehova akĩmuumĩrĩra
Judges6:13 Nake Gideoni akĩmwĩra ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Judges6:14 Nake Jehova akĩmũrora
Judges6:15 Nake agĩkĩmũcokeria atĩrĩ
Judges6:16 Nake Jehova agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges6:17 Nake Gideoni akĩmwĩra ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Judges6:18 Ndagũthaitha ndũkae kuuma haha mũira wa njoke haha harĩ wee
Judges6:19 Gideoni agĩgĩtonya nyũmba agĩthĩnja kori agĩgathondeka
Judges6:20 Nake mũraika wa Ngai akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges6:21 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũraika wa Jehova agĩtwaratwara rũthanju rũrĩa aarĩ naruo guoko
Judges6:22 Nake Gideoni agĩkĩona atĩ nĩ mũraika wa Jehova
Judges6:23 Nake Jehova agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges6:24 Hĩndĩ ĩo Gideoni agĩgĩakĩra Jehova kĩgongona hau
Judges6:25 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges6:26 ũcoke wakĩre Jehova Ngai waku kĩgongona gũkũ mũciĩ ũyũ
Judges6:27 Nake Gideoni agĩkĩoya andũ ikũmi thĩinĩ wa ndungata ciake agĩgĩĩka o ta ũrĩa Jehova aamwĩrire eke; na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges6:28 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges6:29 Nao magĩkĩũrania o mũndũ na mũndũ atĩrĩ
Judges6:30 Hĩndĩ ĩo andũ acio a itũũra rĩu magĩkĩĩra Joashu atĩrĩ
Judges6:31 Nake Joashu agĩkĩĩra andũ acio othe maarũgamĩte harĩ we ũũ: Anga nĩmũgũkĩrũĩrĩra Baali? Kana nĩmũgũkĩmũhonokia? Mũndũ ũrĩa ũkũmũrũĩrĩra-rĩ
Judges6:32 Tondũ ũcio agĩgĩtua Gideoni Jerub-baali mũthenya o ro ũcio
Judges6:33 Hĩndĩ ĩo Amidiani
Judges6:34 No rĩrĩ
Judges6:35 Agĩgĩcoka akĩrekia andũ magacange bũrũri wothe wa Amanase; nao othe makĩũngana harĩ we
Judges6:36 Nake Gideoni agĩkĩĩra Ngai atĩrĩ
Judges6:37 atĩrĩrĩ
Judges6:38 Gũgĩgĩtuĩka o ro ũguo; nĩ ũndũ rĩrĩa aarokire gũũkĩra rũcinĩ tene
Judges6:39 Ningĩ Gideoni akĩĩra Ngai atĩrĩ
Judges6:40 Nake Ngai agĩgĩĩka o ro ũguo ũtukũ ũcio; nĩ gũkorũo no rũũa rũu ruiki rũakorirũo rũĩ rũũmũ
Judges7:1 Thutha wa ũguo Jerub-baali
Judges7:2 Nake Jehova agĩkĩĩra Gideoni atĩrĩ
Judges7:3 Tondũ ũcio thiĩ ũheane ũhoro ũiguwo nĩ andũ othe
Judges7:4 Ningĩ Jehova agĩkĩĩra Gideoni atĩrĩ
Judges7:5 Agĩgĩikũrũkia andũ acio maĩ-inĩ; nake Jehova agĩkĩĩra Gideoni atĩrĩ
Judges7:6 Nao andũ arĩa maanyuire maĩ na rũrĩmĩ mamatwarĩte kanua na hĩ
Judges7:7 Jehova agĩkĩĩra Gideoni atĩrĩ
Judges7:8 Andũ acio magĩkĩoya irio cia rĩĩgu na moko mao
Judges7:9 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges7:10 No rĩrĩ
Judges7:11 na nĩũkũigua ũrĩa andũ arĩa me kuo mekuuga; na thutha wa ũguo nĩũkũũmĩrĩrio ũgĩe na hinya wa gũikũrũka ũgatharĩke kĩraaro kĩu. Agĩgĩikũrũka marĩ na Pura
Judges7:12 Nao Amidiani
Judges7:13 Na rĩrĩ
Judges7:14 Nake mũndũ ũcio ũngĩ akĩmũcokeria
Judges7:15 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges7:16 Nao andũ acio magana matatũ akĩmagayũkania ikundi ithatũ
Judges7:17 Agĩkĩmera atĩrĩ
Judges7:18 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndĩrĩhuha coro wakwa niĩ mwene o hamwe na arĩa othe twĩ nao
Judges7:19 Tondũ ũcio Gideoni
Judges7:20 Andũ a ikundi icio ithatũ magĩkĩhuha macoro
Judges7:21 Nao magĩkĩrũgama o mũndũ handũ hake mathiũrũrũkĩirie kĩraaro kĩu na ndwere ciothe
Judges7:22 Macoro macio magana matatũ maahuhwo-rĩ
Judges7:23 Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩkĩũngana moimĩte Nafitali
Judges7:24 Nake Gideoni akĩrekania bũrũri wothe ũrĩa wĩ irĩma nyingĩ wa Efiraimu
Judges7:25 Nao magĩkĩnyita anene erĩ a Midiani
Judges8:1 Nao andũ a Efiraimu makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges8:2 Nowe akĩmera atĩrĩ
Judges8:3 Ngai nĩarekereirie anene a Midiani
Judges8:4 Nake Gideoni agĩkinya Jorodani
Judges8:5 Nake agĩkĩĩra andũ a Sukothu atĩrĩ
Judges8:6 Nao anene acio a Sukothu makiuga atĩrĩ
Judges8:7 Nake Gideoni agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Judges8:8 Agĩkĩambata akiuma kũu
Judges8:9 Agĩkĩarĩria andũ acio a kũu Penueli
Judges8:10 Na rĩrĩ
Judges8:11 Nake Gideoni akĩambata na njĩra ya arĩa maatũũraga hema-inĩ arorete na mwena wa irathĩro wa Noba na Jogibeha
Judges8:12 Nao Zeba na Zalimuna magĩkĩũra; nake akĩmarũmĩrĩra na ihenya
Judges8:13 Nake Gideoni ũcio wa Joashu agĩkĩhũndũka oimĩte rĩambatĩro-inĩ rĩa Heresi
Judges8:14 Nake agĩkĩnyita mwanake wa andũ a Sukothu
Judges8:15 Agĩgĩkinya harĩ andũ a Sukothu
Judges8:16 Nake agĩkĩnyita athuri a itũũra rĩu
Judges8:17 Naguo mũthiringo wa nyũmba ĩo ndaya na igũrũ wa Penueli-rĩ
Judges8:18 Hĩndĩ ĩo akĩũria Zeba na Zalimuna atĩrĩ
Judges8:19 Nake agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Judges8:20 Agĩgĩcoka akĩĩra Jetheri
Judges8:21 Hĩndĩ ĩo Zeba na Zalimuna makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges8:22 Hĩndĩ ĩo andũ a Isiraeli magĩkĩĩra Gideoni
Judges8:23 Nake Gideoni agĩkĩmera atĩrĩ
Judges8:24 Nake Gideoni agĩcoka akĩmera atĩrĩ
Judges8:25 Nao magĩcokia atĩrĩ
Judges8:26 Nacio icũhĩ icio cia matũ cia thahabu iria etirie ciarĩ cia cekeri ngiri ĩmwe na magana mũgwanja cia thahabu igĩthimwo
Judges8:27 Nake Gideoni agĩthondeka ebodi
Judges8:28 Ũguo nĩguo Amidiani maahootirũo nĩ ciana cia Isiraeli
Judges8:29 Nake Jerub-baali wa Joashu agĩgĩthiĩ agĩtũũra gwake mũciĩ.
Judges8:30 Nake Gideoni agĩkorũo arĩ na ariũ ake andũ mĩrongo mũgwanja arĩa moimĩte mũthimo wake we mwene; nĩ ũndũ aarĩ na aka aingĩ.
Judges8:31 O nayo thuriya ĩrĩa aaigĩte Shekemu nĩyamũciarĩire kĩhĩĩ
Judges8:32 Gideoni ũcio wa Joashu agĩgĩkua e mũkũrũ mũno
Judges8:33 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges8:34 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli ikĩaga kũririkana Jehova Ngai wacio
Judges8:35 o na itiekire nyũmba ya Jerub-baali
Judges9:1 Nake Abimeleku
Judges9:2 Ndamũthaitha mwarie mũkĩiguagwo nĩ andũ othe a Shekemu
Judges9:3 Nao aa mamawe makĩmwarĩrĩria harĩ andũ othe a Shekemu na ciugo icio ciothe
Judges9:4 Nao magĩkĩmũhe mbia mĩrongo mũgwanja irutĩtwo nyũmba ya Baali-berithu
Judges9:5 Nake agĩgĩthiĩ gwa ithe mũciĩ o kũu Ofira
Judges9:6 Nao andũ othe a Shekemu magĩkĩũngana
Judges9:7 Na rĩrĩa andũ maaheire Jothamu ũhoro ũcio
Judges9:8 Kwĩ hĩndĩ mĩtĩ yoimagarire ĩgaitĩrĩrie ũmwe wayo maguta ũtuĩke mũthamaki wayo; nayo ĩgĩkĩĩra mũtamaiyũ atĩrĩ
Judges9:9 No mũtamaiyũ ũkĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ
Judges9:10 Ningĩ mĩtĩ ĩgĩkĩĩra mũkũyũ atĩrĩ
Judges9:11 No mũkũyũ ũkĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ
Judges9:12 Ningĩ mĩtĩ ĩgĩkĩĩra mũthabibu atĩrĩ
Judges9:13 Naguo mũthabibu ũkĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ
Judges9:14 Hĩndĩ ĩo mĩtĩ yothe ĩgĩkĩĩra mũtare wa gĩthaka-inĩ atĩrĩ
Judges9:15 Naguo mũtare ũcio wa gĩthaka-inĩ ũgĩkĩĩra ĩo ĩngĩ atĩrĩ
Judges9:16 Jothamu agĩcoka akĩmera atĩrĩ
Judges9:17 (amu-rĩ
Judges9:18 na rĩu ũmũthĩ mũkĩarahũkĩte mũũkĩrĩre nyũmba ya baba
Judges9:19 ngũkiuga atĩrĩ
Judges9:20 no kũngĩkorũo ti ũguo
Judges9:21 Nake Jothamu akĩĩyũrĩra ateng’erete
Judges9:22 Na rĩrĩ
Judges9:23 Nake Ngai agĩkĩrekia roho mũũru ũthũkie ngoro ya Abimeleku
Judges9:24 nĩ getha ũũru ũrĩa wekirũo ariũ a Jerub-baali mĩrongo mũgwanja ũcokanĩrĩre; na nĩ getha thakame yao ĩcokerere Abimeleku
Judges9:25 Andũ acio a Shekemu magĩkĩiga andũ o igũrũ tũcũmbĩrĩ-inĩ twa irĩma mamuoherie kuo
Judges9:26 Nake Gaali wa Ebedi
Judges9:27 Nao magĩkiumagara magĩkinya mĩgũnda yao ya mĩthabibu
Judges9:28 Nake Gaali wa Ebedi agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Judges9:29 Na arĩ korũo andũ aya maagĩa moko-inĩ makwa! Tondũ kũngĩtuĩka ũguo
Judges9:30 Nake Zebuli
Judges9:31 Agĩkĩrekeria Abimeleku andũ na wara
Judges9:32 Tondũ ũcio wee mwene na andũ arĩa mwĩ nao nĩmũgokĩra ũtukũ gũtanakĩa
Judges9:33 na gũgĩkinye atĩrĩ
Judges9:34 Nake Abimeleku agĩgĩũkĩra
Judges9:35 Nake Gaali wa Ebedi akiumagara
Judges9:36 Nake Gaali rĩrĩa onire andũ acio
Judges9:37 Ningĩ Gaali akĩaria o rĩngĩ
Judges9:38 Hĩndĩ ĩo Zebuli agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges9:39 Nake Gaali agĩkiumagara atongoretie andũ a Shekemu
Judges9:40 Nake Abimeleku agĩkĩmũteng’eria
Judges9:41 Abimeleku agĩgĩtũũra Aruma; nake Zebuli akĩingata Gaali na ariũ a ithe matigatũũre Shekemu.
Judges9:42 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges9:43 Nake agĩkĩoya andũ
Judges9:44 Abimeleku
Judges9:45 Nake Abimeleku agĩkĩhũrana na itũũra rĩu mũthenya ũcio wothe; akĩrĩtunyana
Judges9:46 Na rĩrĩ
Judges9:47 Nake Abimeleku akĩĩrũo atĩ andũ a mũthiringo ũcio wa kũu Shekemu nĩmacokanĩrĩire othe hamwe.
Judges9:48 Abimeleku agĩkĩambata
Judges9:49 O nao andũ acio othe magĩgĩĩka o ta ũguo
Judges9:50 Ningĩ Abimeleku agĩthiĩ Thebezu
Judges9:51 No rĩrĩ
Judges9:52 Nake Abimeleku agĩthiĩ agĩkinya kĩmũthiringo-inĩ kĩu
Judges9:53 Na rĩrĩ
Judges9:54 Nake agĩgĩĩta mwanake ũrĩa wamũkuuagĩra indo ciake cia ita na ihenya
Judges9:55 Na rĩrĩ
Judges9:56 Ũguo nĩguo Ngai aacokereirie Abimeleku waganu ũrĩa ekĩte ithe
Judges9:57 o naguo waganu wothe wa andũ a Shekemu Ngai akĩmacokereria o ene; magĩgĩcokererũo nĩ kĩrumi kĩrĩa kĩarumanirũo nĩ Jothamu wa Jerub-baali.
Judges10:1 Na rĩrĩ
Judges10:2 Nake agĩgĩtiirĩrĩra Isiraeli mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtatũ
Judges10:3 Ningĩ thutha wake hakĩarahũka Jairu
Judges10:4 Nake aarĩ na ariũ ake mĩrongo ĩtatũ
Judges10:5 Nake Jairu agĩgĩkua
Judges10:6 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli igĩgĩcoka igĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ moru nĩ Jehova
Judges10:7 Nake Jehova agĩgĩcinwo nĩ marakara nĩ ũndũ wa andũ a Isiraeli
Judges10:8 Nao andũ acio magĩkĩnyarira ciana cia Isiraeli
Judges10:9 O na ningĩ ciana icio cia Amoni ikĩringa mũrĩmo ũyũ wa Jorodani ciũke ihũrane na Juda
Judges10:10 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli igĩkaĩra Jehova
Judges10:11 Nake Jehova agĩkĩĩra ciana cia Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Judges10:12 O na ningĩ no mwahinyĩrĩirio nĩ Azidoni
Judges10:13 No rĩrĩ
Judges10:14 Gĩthiĩi mũgakaĩre ngai icio mwethurĩire
Judges10:15 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli ikĩĩra Jehova atĩrĩ
Judges10:16 Nacio igĩkĩeheria ngai icio cia kũngĩ iria ciarĩ thĩinĩ wacio
Judges10:17 Hĩndĩ ĩo ciana cia Amoni igĩkĩũngana ikĩamba hema ciacio o kũu Gileadi
Judges10:18 Nao andũ a Gileadi
Judges11:1 Na rĩrĩ
Judges11:2 Ningĩ mũtumia wa Gileadi nĩaamũciarĩire ihĩĩ; na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ihĩĩ icio cia mũtumia wake ciakũrire
Judges11:3 Nake Jefitha agĩkĩũrĩra ariũ a ithe
Judges11:4 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges11:5 Na gũgĩtuĩka atĩrĩ
Judges11:6 nao magĩkĩĩra Jefitha atĩrĩ
Judges11:7 Nake Jefitha agĩkĩĩra athuri acio a Gileadi atĩrĩ
Judges11:8 Nao athuri acio a Gileadi magĩkĩĩra Jefitha atĩrĩ
Judges11:9 Nake Jefitha agĩkĩũria athuri acio a Gileadi atĩrĩ
Judges11:10 Nao athuri acio a Gileadi magĩkĩĩra Jefitha atĩrĩ
Judges11:11 Jefitha agĩgĩthiĩ na athuri acio a Gileadi
Judges11:12 Nake Jefitha agĩkĩrekia andũ harĩ mũthamaki wa ciana cia Amoni
Judges11:13 Nake mũthamaki wa ciana cia Amoni agĩgĩcokeria arekio acio a Jefitha atĩrĩ
Judges11:14 Nake Jefitha agĩkĩrekeria mũthamaki wa ciana cia Amoni andũ rĩngĩ
Judges11:15 akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges11:16 No rĩrĩ
Judges11:17 Na hĩndĩ ĩo Isiraeli agĩkĩrekeria mũthamaki wa Edomu andũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges11:18 Thutha wa ũguo magĩgĩtuĩkanĩria werũ-inĩ magĩthiũrũrũka bũrũri wa Edomu
Judges11:19 Ningĩ Aisiraeli makĩrekia andũ gwĩ Sihoni
Judges11:20 No rĩrĩ
Judges11:21 Nake Jehova Ngai wa Isiraeli akĩrekereria Sihoni o na andũ ake othe
Judges11:22 O na makĩĩgwatĩra bũrũri wothe wa Aamori
Judges11:23 Na rĩrĩ
Judges11:24 Githĩ wee ndũrĩkĩĩgwatĩra kũndũ gwa gũtũũra kũrĩa ngai yaku Kemoshu ĩkũheete? Tondũ ũcio andũ arĩa othe Jehova Ngai witũ aatunyire kũndũ kwao kũrĩa maatũũraga akĩmeheria mbere iitũ-rĩ
Judges11:25 Na rĩrĩ
Judges11:26 Githĩ Aisiraeli matigĩtũũrĩte o kũu itũũra rĩa Heshiboni o na mĩciĩ yarĩo
Judges11:27 Tondũ ũcio niĩ ndirĩ kwĩhia ngwĩhĩtie
Judges11:28 No rĩrĩ
Judges11:29 Hĩndĩ ĩo roho wa Jehova ũgĩkora Jefitha ũkĩgĩa nake
Judges11:30 Nake Jefitha akĩhe Jehova ũhoro na mwĩhĩtwa
Judges11:31 nĩgũgatuĩka atĩrĩ
Judges11:32 Jefitha agĩgĩthiĩ harĩ ciana cia Amoni akahũrane mbaara nacio; nake Jehova agĩcirekereria agĩcineana moko-inĩ make.
Judges11:33 Nake agĩkĩhũra andũ a matũũra mao mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ amarutĩtie Aroeri o nginya Minithu
Judges11:34 Nake Jefitha agĩgĩthiĩ agĩkinya Mizipa gwake mũciĩ; na atĩrĩrĩ
Judges11:35 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges11:36 Nake mwarĩ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges11:37 Agĩkĩĩra ithe atĩrĩ
Judges11:38 Hĩndĩ ĩo ithe agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges11:39 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges11:40 atĩ airĩtu Aisiraeli mathiage mwaka o mwaka kũririkana mwarĩ wa Jefitha
Judges12:1 Nao andũ a Efiraimu makĩũngana makĩringa marorete gathigathini; magĩkĩĩra Jefitha atĩrĩ
Judges12:2 Nake Jefitha agĩkĩmera atĩrĩ
Judges12:3 Rĩrĩa ndakĩonire atĩ mũti’honokia-rĩ
Judges12:4 Jefitha agĩkĩũngania andũ othe a Gileadi
Judges12:5 Nao Agileadi makĩnyita mariũko ma Jorodani marĩa maaringĩrĩire kwa Aefiraimu; na gũgĩtuĩka atĩrĩ
Judges12:6 magakĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges12:7 Jefitha agĩgĩtiirĩrĩra Isiraeli mĩaka ĩtandatũ
Judges12:8 Na thutha wake nĩ Ibizani
Judges12:9 Nake aarĩ na ariũ ake mĩrongo ĩtatũ; nao airĩtu ake mĩrongo ĩtatũ makĩhika matũũra mangĩ
Judges12:10 Nake Ibizani ũcio agĩgĩkua agĩthikwo Bethi-lehemu.
Judges12:11 Na thutha wake nĩ Eloni
Judges12:12 Nake Eloni ũcio Mũzebuluni agĩgĩkua
Judges12:13 Na thutha wake nĩ Abidoni wa Hileli
Judges12:14 Nake aarĩ na ariũ ake mĩrongo ĩna
Judges12:15 Nake Abidoni ũcio wa Hileli
Judges13:1 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli igĩcoka gwĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ moru nĩ Jehova; nake Jehova agĩcirekereria agĩcineana moko-inĩ ma Afilisiti mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna.
Judges13:2 Na rĩrĩ
Judges13:3 Nake mũraika wa Jehova akiumĩrĩra mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio
Judges13:4 Na tondũ ũcio ndagũthaitha wĩmenyerere ndũgacoke kũnyua ndibei
Judges13:5 nĩ ũndũ nĩũkũgĩa ihu
Judges13:6 Nake mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio agĩgĩthiĩ akĩhe mũthuriwe ũhoro ũcio
Judges13:7 no anjĩrire ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Judges13:8 Hĩndĩ ĩo Manoa agĩthaitha Jehova
Judges13:9 Nake Ngai agĩgĩĩtĩkĩra kũigua ihoya rĩu rĩa Manoa
Judges13:10 Nake mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio agĩteng’era ahiũhĩte
Judges13:11 Nake Manoa agĩgĩũkĩra
Judges13:12 Manoa agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges13:13 Nake mũraika wa Jehova agĩkĩĩra Manoa atĩrĩ
Judges13:14 Ndagacoke kũrĩa kĩndũ o na kĩ kĩrĩa kiumaga mũthabibu-inĩ
Judges13:15 Nake Manoa akĩĩra mũraika ũcio wa Jehova atĩrĩ
Judges13:16 Nake mũraika wa Jehova akĩĩra Manoa atĩrĩ
Judges13:17 Ningĩ Manoa agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Judges13:18 Nake mũraika ũcio wa Jehova akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Judges13:19 Tondũ ũcio Manoa agĩkĩnyita kori o na akĩoya mũtu wa ihaki
Judges13:20 Nĩ ũndũ nĩgwakinyire atĩrĩ
Judges13:21 No rĩrĩ
Judges13:22 Nake Manoa agĩkĩĩra mũka atĩrĩ
Judges13:23 No mũka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges13:24 Nake mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio agĩciara kahĩĩ
Judges13:25 Ningĩ roho wa Jehova ũgĩgĩitĩka kũmũhĩka arĩ o kũu Mahane-dani
Judges14:1 Na rĩrĩ
Judges14:2 Agĩgĩcoka akĩambata akĩhe ithe na nyina ũhoro ũcio
Judges14:3 Nao ithe na nyina makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Judges14:4 No rĩrĩ
Judges14:5 Samusoni agĩgĩikũrũka Timina me na ithe na nyina
Judges14:6 Naguo roho wa Jehova ũgĩkĩmũkora na hinya mũnene mũno
Judges14:7 Samusoni agĩgĩikũrũka
Judges14:8 Nake aaikaranga agĩcoka gũthiĩ kũmũgĩra
Judges14:9 Nake akĩũnyita na moko
Judges14:10 Nake ithe agĩikũrũka agĩthiĩ kwĩ mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio; nake Samusoni akĩrugithia gĩathĩ kũu; nĩ gũkorũo ũguo nĩguo aanake maamenyerete gwĩka.
Judges14:11 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges14:12 Nake Samusoni agĩkĩmera atĩrĩ
Judges14:13 no rĩrĩ
Judges14:14 Nake agĩkiuga ũũ: Nyamũ ndĩani thĩinĩ
Judges14:15 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges14:16 Nake mũka wa Samusoni akĩmũrĩrĩra
Judges14:17 Nake akĩmũrĩrĩra matukũ macio mũgwanja ma gĩathĩ kĩu; na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges14:18 Na rĩrĩ
Judges14:19 Naguo roho wa Jehova ũkĩmũkora na hinya mũno
Judges14:20 No rĩrĩ
Judges15:1 No gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges15:2 Ithe wa mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges15:3 Nake Samusoni agĩkĩmera atĩrĩ
Judges15:4 Nake Samusoni agĩgĩthiĩ agĩtega mbwe magana matatũ
Judges15:5 Nake aagwatia icinga icio mwaki
Judges15:6 Hĩndĩ ĩo Afilisiti magĩkĩũria atĩrĩ
Judges15:7 Nake Samusoni agĩkĩmera atĩrĩ
Judges15:8 Samusoni agĩkĩmahũra ihũra inene
Judges15:9 Hĩndĩ ĩo Afilisiti magĩkĩambata
Judges15:10 Nao andũ a Juda magĩkĩmoria atĩrĩ
Judges15:11 Hĩndĩ ĩo andũ ngiri ithatũ a Juda magĩgĩikũrũka magĩkinya mwanya-inĩ ũcio wa rũaro rũu rũa ihiga o kũu Etamu
Judges15:12 Magĩkĩmwĩra ũũ: Tũikũrũkĩte nĩguo tũũke tũkuohe
Judges15:13 Nao magĩkĩmwarĩria
Judges15:14 Na rĩrĩ
Judges15:15 Nake agĩkĩona rũkambucu rũa ndigiri rũtarĩ rũkũrũ
Judges15:16 Nake Samusoni agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Judges15:17 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges15:18 Nake agĩkĩigua anyotete mũno
Judges15:19 No rĩrĩ
Judges15:20 Nake Samusoni agĩtiirĩrĩra Isiraeli mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ matukũ macio ma Afilisiti.
Judges16:1 Ningĩ Samusoni agĩgĩthiĩ Gaza
Judges16:2 Naguo ũndũ ũcio ũkĩĩrũo Agaza
Judges16:3 Nake Samusoni agĩgĩkoma nginya o ũtukũ gatagatĩ
Judges16:4 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges16:5 Nao anene a Afilisiti magĩũkĩra magĩthiĩ harĩ we
Judges16:6 Nake Delila agĩkĩĩra Samusoni atĩrĩ
Judges16:7 Nake Samusoni agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges16:8 Anene a Afilisiti magĩgĩtwarĩra Delila nga mũgwanja cia muogothano itarĩ ciomithio
Judges16:9 Nake mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio agĩgĩkorũo aigĩte andũ kanyũmba kaarĩ thĩinĩ wa iria ingĩ mamuohie. Nake agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges16:10 Ningĩ Delila akĩĩra Samusoni ũũ: Atĩrĩ
Judges16:11 Nake agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges16:12 Delila agĩkĩoya mĩhĩndo mĩtungu ya muogothano
Judges16:13 Ningĩ Delila agĩkĩĩra Samusoni atĩrĩ
Judges16:14 Nake Delila agĩciohania na mũnyamũ wa mũtambo
Judges16:15 Ningĩ Delila akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges16:16 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges16:17 Na tondũ ũcio agĩkĩmwĩra maũndũ mothe marĩa maarĩ ngoro-inĩ yake
Judges16:18 Na rĩrĩ

Judges16:20 Agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ

Judges16:22 No rĩrĩ

Judges16:24 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ maamuonire
Judges16:25 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges16:26 Nake Samusoni agĩkĩĩra kamwanake karĩa kaamũnyitaga atĩrĩ
Judges16:27 Na rĩrĩ
Judges16:28 Nake Samusoni agĩgĩkaĩra Jehova
Judges16:29 Nake Samusoni agĩkĩnyita itugĩ icio cierĩ cia gatagatĩ
Judges16:30 Nake Samusoni agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Judges16:31 Hĩndĩ ĩo ariũ a ithe

Judges17:6 Na matukũ macio

Judges17:10 Mika agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ

Judges17:12 Nake Mika agĩkĩamũra Mũlawii ũcio
Judges17:13 Hĩndĩ ĩo Mika akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges18:1 Na rĩrĩ
Judges18:2 Nacio ciana cia Dani igĩkĩrekia andũ atano a nyũmba yacio
Judges18:3 Na rĩrĩ
Judges18:4 Nake agĩkĩmera atĩrĩ
Judges18:5 Nao magĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges18:6 Nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũcio agĩkĩmera atĩrĩ
Judges18:7 Hĩndĩ ĩo andũ acio atano magĩkiuma hau
Judges18:8 Nao athigani acio magĩkĩhũndũka magĩcoka kũrĩ ariũ a ithe wao o kũu Zora na Eshitaoli; nao ariũ acio a ithe magĩkĩmoria atĩrĩ
Judges18:9 Nao makiuga atĩrĩ
Judges18:10 Na rĩrĩ
Judges18:11 Naho hagĩkiumagara andũ magana matandatũ a nyũmba ya Dani meohete indo ciao cia mbaara moimĩte Zora na Eshitaoli.
Judges18:12 Nao magĩkĩambata
Judges18:13 Nao moima kũu magĩkĩgera bũrũri ũcio wĩ irĩma nyingĩ wa Efiraimu
Judges18:14 Nao andũ acio atano maathiĩte gũthigana bũrũri ũcio wa Laishi magĩkĩũria ariũ a ithe wao atĩrĩ
Judges18:15 Nao magĩgĩkerũra kũu
Judges18:16 Nao andũ acio magana matandatũ a ciana cia Dani meohete indo ciao cia ita makĩrũgama itonyero-inĩ rĩa kĩhingo.
Judges18:17 Nao andũ acio atano maathiĩte gũthigana bũrũri ũcio magĩgĩtonya kuo
Judges18:18 Na maatonya mũciĩ wa Mika
Judges18:19 Nao magĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges18:20 Nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũcio agĩkena na ngoro
Judges18:21 Magĩkĩgarũrũka magĩĩthiĩra
Judges18:22 Na rĩrĩ
Judges18:23 Magĩkĩanĩrĩra ciana icio cia Dani
Judges18:24 Nake agĩkĩmera atĩrĩ
Judges18:25 Nacio ciana icio cia Dani ikĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges18:26 Nacio ciana icio cia Dani igĩgĩĩthiĩra; nake Mika ona atĩ andũ acio me na hinya kũmũkĩra-rĩ
Judges18:27 Nao magĩgĩthiĩ na indo icio Mika aathondekete
Judges18:28 Na gũtionekire wa kũmahonokia
Judges18:29 Narĩo rĩĩtwa rĩa itũũra rĩu ikĩrĩtua Dani
Judges18:30 Nacio ciana icio cia Dani ikĩĩhandĩra mũhianano ũcio wa gwacũhio; nake Jonathani wa Gerishoni mũrũ wa Musa
Judges18:31 Tondũ ũcio igĩkĩĩhandĩra mũhianano wa gwacũhio

Judges19:3 Nake mũthuri wayo agĩũkĩra akĩmĩrũmĩrĩra
Judges19:4 Nake mũthoniwe

Judges19:9 Na rĩrĩ

Judges19:15 Nao magĩgĩkerũra nĩguo makaraarĩrĩre kũu Gibea; nake agĩgĩtonya itũũra rĩu
Judges19:16 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Judges19:17 Nake mũthuri ũcio agĩgĩtiira maitho akĩona mũgendi njĩra-inĩ ya itũũra; agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Judges19:18 Nake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges19:19 No rĩrĩ

Judges19:21 Tondũ ũcio agĩkĩmũtwara gwake mũciĩ
Judges19:22 Na rĩrĩ
Judges19:23 Nake mũthuri ũcio mũnene wa nyũmba ĩo akiuma
