Judges20:1 Hĩndĩ ĩo ciana cia Isiraeli ciothe igĩkiumagara
Judges20:2 Nao anene a andũ acio othe
Judges20:3 (Na rĩrĩ
Judges20:4 Nake Mũlawii ũcio mũrũme wa mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio woragirũo
Judges20:5 Nao andũ a Gibea magĩũka ũtukũ kũnjũkĩrĩra
Judges20:6 Tondũ ũcio niĩ na niĩ ngĩnyita thuriya ĩo yakwa
Judges20:7 Atĩrĩrĩ
Judges20:8 Nao andũ acio othe magĩũkanĩrĩra o ta marĩ mũndũ ũmwe
Judges20:9 No rĩrĩ
Judges20:10 na rĩrĩ
Judges20:11 Tondũ ũcio andũ othe a Isiraeli magĩkĩũngana makahũre itũũra rĩu
Judges20:12 Nayo mĩhĩrĩga ya Isiraeli ĩgĩkĩrekia andũ mathiĩ kũndũ guothe mũhĩrĩga-inĩ wa Benjamini makaũũrie atĩrĩ
Judges20:13 Tondũ ũcio gĩtũnengerei andũ acio aaganu mũno marĩ Gibea
Judges20:14 Nacio ciana cia Benjamini igĩkĩũngana hamwe ciumĩte matũũra-inĩ ma cio
Judges20:15 Nacio ciana cia Benjamini iria cioimĩte matũũra-inĩ macio igĩtarũo mũthenya ũcio; igĩkorũo irĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ithathatũ thengia andũ arĩa maatũũraga Gibea
Judges20:16 Na rĩrĩ
Judges20:17 Nao andũ a Isiraeli a ita arĩa maamenyete kũrũa na hiũ cia njora
Judges20:18 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli igĩũkĩra
Judges20:19 Ciana icio cia Isiraeli igĩkĩroka gũũkĩra rũcinĩ tene
Judges20:20 Nao arũme acio a Isiraeli makiumagara mathiĩ ita makahũrane na andũ a Benjamini; Aisiraeli magĩkĩarania ita yao mahũranĩre nao o kũu Gibea.
Judges20:21 Nacio ciana cia Benjamini ikiumagara ciumĩte Gibea
Judges20:22 Nao andũ o acio a Isiraeli magĩkĩũmĩrĩria
Judges20:23 (Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli igĩkĩambata igĩkaĩra Jehova ikĩmũrĩrĩra nginya o hwaĩ-inĩ; igĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Judges20:24 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli igĩkuhĩhĩria ciana cia Benjamini ikahũrane nacio mũthenya ũcio wa ĩĩrĩ.
Judges20:25 O nao Abenjamini makiumagara moimĩte Gibea mũthenya o ro ũcio wa ĩĩrĩ makahũrane nacio
Judges20:26 Hĩndĩ ĩo ciana ciothe cia Isiraeli
Judges20:27 Nacio ciana icio cia Isiraeli ikĩhoera Jehova ũhoro kũu
Judges20:28 nake Finehasi wa Eleazaru mũrũ wa Haruni
Judges20:29 Nao Aisiraeli magĩkĩiga andũ a kuohia Gibea
Judges20:30 Ningĩ mũthenya wa ĩtatũ ciana cia Isiraeli ikĩambata ikahũrane na ciana cia Benjamini
Judges20:31 Nacio ciana cia Benjamini ikiumagara nĩguo ikahũrane na andũ acio
Judges20:32 Nacio ciana icio cia Benjamini igĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Judges20:33 Nao andũ othe a Isiraeli magĩũkĩra makiuma handũ harĩa maaikarĩte
Judges20:34 Na hĩndĩ ĩo hagĩgĩthiĩ andũ ngiri ikũmi Aisiraeli marorete Gibea
Judges20:35 Nake Jehova agĩcihũrĩra mbere ya Isiraeli; naguo mũthenya ũcio ciana cia Isiraeli ikĩũraga andũ a Benjamini ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ithano
Judges20:36 Tondũ ũcio ciana cia Benjamini ikĩona atĩ ii gũtorio; nĩ ũndũ andũ acio a Isiraeli nĩmorĩire andũ acio a Benjamini nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa mehokete andũ arĩa maaigĩte a kuohia andũ nĩguo mahũre Gibea.
Judges20:37 Nao andũ acio mohetie andũ magĩkĩguthũka magĩtharĩka Gibea; nao magĩthiathia na mbere
Judges20:38 Na rĩrĩ
Judges20:39 Nao andũ a Isiraeli
Judges20:40 No rĩrĩ
Judges20:41 Andũ a Isiraeli magĩkĩgarũrũka
Judges20:42 Tondũ ũcio magĩkĩhutatĩra andũ a Isiraeli makĩmorĩra magerete njĩra ya werũ-inĩ; no rĩrĩ
Judges20:43 Nao Aisiraeli magĩkĩhĩta Abenjamini mamarigicĩirie na mbarĩ ciothe
Judges20:44 Nakuo kũu gũgĩkĩgũa andũ ngiri ikũmi na inyanya a Benjamini; nao othe maarĩ njamba theri cia ita.
Judges20:45 Nao magĩgĩcoka makĩgarũrũka
Judges20:46 Tondũ ũcio andũ a Benjamini arĩa maakuire mũthenya ũcio maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ithano a ita; nao othe maarĩ njamba theri cia ita.
Judges20:47 No rĩrĩ
Judges20:48 Ningĩ andũ a Isiraeli makĩgarũrũkĩra ciana cia Benjamini rĩngĩ
Judges21:1 Na rĩrĩ
Judges21:2 Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩthiĩ magĩkinya Beth-eli magĩikara kuo mbere ya Ngai nginya o hwaĩ-inĩ
Judges21:3 Magĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Judges21:4 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Judges21:5 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli ikĩũria atĩrĩ
Judges21:6 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli igĩkĩĩrira nĩ ũndũ wa mũrũ wa ithe wacio Benjamini
Judges21:7 Rĩu-rĩ
Judges21:8 Nao magĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Judges21:9 Nĩ gũkorũo hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ maataragwo
Judges21:10 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩkĩrekia andũ njamba mũno ngiri ikũmi na igĩrĩ kuo; gĩkĩmaatha atĩrĩ
Judges21:11 Naguo ũndũ ũrĩa mũgwĩka nĩ ũyũ
Judges21:12 Na rĩrĩ
Judges21:13 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩothe gĩkĩrekia andũ makaarie na ciana cia Benjamini icio ciarĩ rũaro-inĩ rũa ihiga rũa Rimoni
Judges21:14 Hĩndĩ ĩo Abenjamini magĩkĩhũndũka magĩcoka kwao; nao Aisiraeli magĩkĩmahe airĩtu acio maahonoketie makamatiga muoyo thĩinĩ wa andũ-a-nja a Jabeshi-gileadi; no rĩrĩ
Judges21:15 Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩgĩcakaĩra Abenjamini nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa Jehova aatũmire hagĩe mwamũ thĩinĩ wa mĩhĩrĩga ya Isiraeli.
Judges21:16 Hĩndĩ ĩo athuri a kĩrĩndĩ gĩa Isiraeli magĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Judges21:17 Magĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Judges21:18 No rĩrĩ
Judges21:19 Ningĩ magĩcoka makiuga ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Judges21:20 Magĩgĩatha ciana cia Benjamini
Judges21:21 mũcũthĩrĩrie muone kana hihi airĩtu a Shilo nĩmariumagara magĩũka kũina nyĩmbo iria irĩinwo kuo; na hĩndĩ ĩo mũgakiuma mĩgũnda-inĩ ya mĩthabibu
Judges21:22 Na nĩgũgatuĩka atĩrĩ
Judges21:23 Nacio ciana cia Benjamini igĩgĩĩka o ro ũguo
Judges21:24 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli igĩkiuma kũu
Judges21:25 Namo matukũ macio
Ruth1:1 NA GŨGĨKINYA atĩrĩ
Ruth1:2 Nake mũndũ ũcio etagwo Elimeleku
Ruth1:3 Nake Elimeleku
Ruth1:4 Nao makĩĩgũrĩra aka thĩinĩ wa airĩtu a Moabi; nao ũmwe etagwo Oripa
Ruth1:5 Nao Mahaloni na Kilioni magĩkua erĩ; mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio agĩgĩkuĩrũo nĩ ciana icio ciake cierĩ
Ruth1:6 Nake agĩgĩũkĩra
Ruth1:7 Nake agĩkiumagara
Ruth1:8 Nake Naomi agĩkĩĩra aka acio erĩ a ariũ ake atĩrĩ
Ruth1:9 Jehova aroetĩkĩra muone handũ ha gũikara mũhoreire
Ruth1:10 Magĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Ruth1:11 Ningĩ Naomi akĩmera atĩrĩ
Ruth1:12 Wĩhũndũkĩrei
Ruth1:13 kaĩ mũngĩgĩcieterera o nginya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa igakũra? Githĩ mwakĩhota kwĩhinga arũme nĩ ũndũ wacio? Kũroaga gũtuĩka ũguo
Ruth1:14 Nao magĩkĩanĩrĩra makĩrĩra rĩngĩ; nake Oripa akĩmumunya nyaciarawe; no Ruthu akĩrũmanĩrĩra nake.
Ruth1:15 Nake agĩkĩmwĩra ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Ruth1:16 Nake Ruthu agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Ruth1:17 na kũrĩa ũgakuĩra nokuo niĩ na niĩ ngakuĩra
Ruth1:18 Na rĩrĩ
Ruth1:19 Tondũ ũcio magĩgĩthiĩ o erĩ
Ruth1:20 Nake akĩmera atĩrĩ
Ruth1:21 Tondũ-rĩ
Ruth1:22 Ũguo nĩguo Naomi aahũndũkire kwao; nake Ruthu
Ruth2:1 Na rĩrĩ
Ruth2:2 Nake Ruthu ũcio Mũmoabi agĩkĩĩra Naomi atĩrĩ
Ruth2:3 Nake agĩgĩthiĩ akĩhaara cairi kũu mĩgũnda arĩ thutha wa agethi; na rĩrĩ
Ruth2:4 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Ruth2:5 Hĩndĩ ĩo Boazu agĩkĩũria ndungata yake ĩrĩa yaroraga agethi atĩrĩ
Ruth2:6 Nayo ndungata ĩo yaroraga agethi ĩkĩmũcokeria ĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Ruth2:7 nake anjĩrire ũũ: Ndagũthaitha
Ruth2:8 Hĩndĩ ĩo Boazu agĩkĩĩra Ruthu atĩrĩ
Ruth2:9 Ikara ũroretie maitho maku o mũgũnda ũrĩa mekũgetha
Ruth2:10 Nake agĩkĩĩgũithia agĩturumithia ũthiũ thĩ
Ruth2:11 Nake Boazu akĩmũcokeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Ruth2:12 Jehova arokũhe kĩrĩa wagĩrĩirũo nĩ kũheo nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ macio waneka! Ningĩ Jehova
Ruth2:13 Hĩndĩ ĩo agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Ruth2:14 Na ihinda rĩa kũrĩa irio rĩakinya Boazu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Ruth2:15 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aarahũkire acoke mũgũnda akahaare cairi ĩngĩ-rĩ
Ruth2:16 O na ningĩ rutagai cairi ĩmwe ĩrĩa ĩrĩ itĩa-inĩ
Ruth2:17 Tondũ ũcio agĩkĩhaara cairi mũgũnda ũcio nginya o hwaĩ-inĩ; agĩcoka akĩhũra cairi ĩo aahaarĩte
Ruth2:18 Nake akĩmĩoya
Ruth2:19 Nake nyaciarawe agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Ruth2:20 Nake Naomi akĩarĩria mũka wa mũriũ akiuga atĩrĩ
Ruth2:21 Nake Ruthu ũcio Mũmoabi agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Ruth2:22 Nake Naomi agĩkĩĩra Ruthu
Ruth2:23 Tondũ ũcio agĩkĩrũmanĩrĩra mũno na airĩtu a Boazu
Ruth3:1 Nake Naomi
Ruth3:2 Na rĩrĩ
Ruth3:3 Tondũ ũcio wĩthambe
Ruth3:4 Na gũgatuĩka atĩrĩ
Ruth3:5 Nake Ruthu agĩkĩĩra nyaciarawe atĩrĩ
Ruth3:6 Nake agĩgĩikũrũka agĩkinya kĩhuhĩro-inĩ kĩu
Ruth3:7 Nake Boazu aarĩkia kũrĩa na kũnyua
Ruth3:8 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Ruth3:9 Nake agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Ruth3:10 Nake agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Ruth3:11 Na rĩrĩ
Ruth3:12 Na rĩrĩ
Ruth3:13 Tondũ ũcio kĩraare ũtukũ ũyũ
Ruth3:14 Nake Ruthu agĩkoma hau magũrũ-inĩ make nginya o rũcinĩ; akĩroka gũũkĩra rũcinĩ tene kwĩ mairia. Nĩ ũndũ Boazu oigire atĩrĩ
Ruth3:15 Nake agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Ruth3:16 Na rĩrĩa Ruthu aakinyire kwĩ nyaciarawe
Ruth3:17 Nake Ruthu agĩgĩcoka akiuga atĩrĩ
Ruth3:18 Hĩndĩ ĩo nyaciarawe agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Ruth4:1 Nake Boazu akĩambata agĩkinya kĩhingo-inĩ gĩa itũũra agĩikara thĩ ho; na atĩrĩrĩ
Ruth4:2 Nake agĩkĩnyita andũ ikũmi thĩinĩ wa athuri a itũũra
Ruth4:3 Agĩkĩĩra mũndũ ũcio wa arĩa mangĩmathambia atĩrĩ
Ruth4:4 na niĩ ndagĩĩciria nguumbũrĩre ũhoro ũcio
Ruth4:5 Nake Boazu agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Ruth4:6 Nake mũndũ ũcio wa arĩa mangĩmathambia agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Ruth4:7 Na rĩrĩ
Ruth4:8 Naguo ũguo noguo gwagĩkinyire
Ruth4:9 Nake Boazu agĩkĩĩra athuri acio
Ruth4:10 O na ningĩ-rĩ
Ruth4:11 Nao andũ acio othe maarĩ kĩhingo-inĩ
Ruth4:12 o nayo nyũmba yaku ĩrogatuĩka ta nyũmba ya Perezu
Ruth4:13 Tondũ wa maũndũ macio
Ruth4:14 Nao andũ-a-nja arĩa angĩ a itũũra rĩu makĩaria na Naomi
Ruth4:15 Kau nĩko gagatũma ũcoke kwĩigua
Ruth4:16 Nake Naomi agĩkĩoya kaana kau
Ruth4:17 Nao andũ-a-nja arĩa angĩ a itũũra rĩao magĩgatua rĩĩtwa
Ruth4:18 Na rĩrĩ
Ruth4:19 Perezu aaciarire Hezironi
Ruth4:20 nake Aminadabu agĩciara Nahashoni
Ruth4:21 nake Salimoni agĩciara Boazu
Ruth4:22 nake Obedi agĩciara Jesii
1Samuel1:1 NA RĨRĨ
1Samuel1:2 nake aarĩ na atumia erĩ; nao ũmwe etagwo Hana
1Samuel1:3 Nake mũthuri ũcio nĩaambataga oimĩte itũũra rĩao mwaka o mwaka
1Samuel1:4 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel1:5 no rĩrĩ
1Samuel1:6 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel1:7 Na rĩrĩa mũthuriwe ekaga ũguo mwaka o mwaka
1Samuel1:8 Nake Elikana
1Samuel1:9 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel1:10 Nake Hana nĩaaiguĩte ũũru mũno na ngoro
1Samuel1:11 Agĩkĩĩhĩta mwĩhĩtwa
1Samuel1:12 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:13 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel1:14 Eli agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:15 Nake Hana agĩcokia akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:16 Tiga kũnyona
1Samuel1:17 Eli agĩgĩcokia atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:18 Nake mũtumia ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:19 Nao magĩkĩroka gũũkĩra rũcinĩ tene
1Samuel1:20 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:21 Nake mũndũ ũcio
1Samuel1:22 No rĩrĩ
1Samuel1:23 Nake Elikana
1Samuel1:24 Na rĩrĩ

1Samuel1:28 tondũ ũcio
1Samuel2:1 Hana agĩkĩhoya
1Samuel2:2 Gũtirĩ ũngĩ mũtheru ta Jehova
1Samuel2:3 Mũtikanacoke kwaria na mwĩĩkĩrĩro mũnene ũguo
1Samuel2:4 Mota ma andũ arĩa marĩ hinya-rĩ
1Samuel2:5 Arĩa maarĩ ahũnu-rĩ
1Samuel2:6 Jehova nĩwe ũũraganaga
1Samuel2:7 Jehova nĩwe ũkĩaranagia
1Samuel2:8 Oyaga mũthĩni na igũrũ
1Samuel2:9 Magũrũ ma andũ ake arĩa atheru-rĩ
1Samuel2:10 Arĩa matetanagia na Jehova nĩ gũthuthwo magathuthangwo; Akamarurumĩria marurumĩ arĩ o igũrũ amokĩrĩre. Jehova nĩwe ũgacirithia ituri cia thĩ; Na mũndũ wake ũrĩa atuĩte mũthamaki amũhe hinya
1Samuel2:11 Nake Elikana agĩgĩcoka Rama akĩinũka gwake mũciĩ. Nako kaana kau gagĩtungatĩra Jehova
1Samuel2:12 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel2:13 Tondũ-rĩ
1Samuel2:14 ĩgakĩmĩtobokia nyũngũ-inĩ ya kĩgera
1Samuel2:15 Ningĩ-rĩ
1Samuel2:16 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel2:17 Naguo wĩhia wa aanake acio wakĩrĩ mũnene mũno mbere ya Jehova; nĩ gũkorũo andũ nĩmaanyararaga ũhoro ũcio wa kũrutĩra Jehova igongona.
1Samuel2:18 No rĩrĩ
1Samuel2:19 O na ningĩ nyina nĩaamũtumagĩra gakanjũ
1Samuel2:20 Nake Eli agĩkĩrathima Elikana
1Samuel2:21 Nake Jehova agĩkĩng’ethera Hana
1Samuel2:22 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel2:23 Nake akĩmoria atĩrĩ
1Samuel2:24 Aca

1Samuel2:31 Atĩrĩrĩ

1Samuel2:33 O nake mũndũ waku ũrĩa itakeheria biũ kĩgongona-inĩ gĩakwa-rĩ
1Samuel2:34 Naguo ũndũ ũrĩa ũgakora ariũ aku erĩ
1Samuel2:35 Na niĩ nĩngearahũrĩra mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai mwĩhokeku

1Samuel4:7 Afilisiti magĩgĩĩtigĩra
1Samuel4:8 Wũi-ĩiya-witũ-ĩ! Nũ ũgũtũhonokia atũrute moko-inĩ ma ngai ici irĩ hinya ũũ? Ici nĩcio ngai iria ciahũrĩire Amisiri na mĩrimũ ya mĩthemba yothe werũ-inĩ.

1Samuel4:10 Afilisiti magĩkĩhũrana nao

1Samuel6:1 Narĩo ithandũkũ rĩa Jehova rĩgĩikara bũrũri ũcio wa Afilisiti mĩeri mũgwanja.
1Samuel6:2 Afilisiti magĩgĩĩta athĩnjĩri-ngai ciao
1Samuel6:3 Nao magĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel6:4 Nao makĩũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel6:5 Tondũ wa ũguo
1Samuel6:6 Rĩu-rĩ
1Samuel6:7 Tondũ ũcio itĩkanai na wĩra mwĩthondekere ngari njerũ
1Samuel6:8 mũcoke muoe ithandũkũ rĩa Jehova
1Samuel6:9 Na mũbare na kũrĩa rĩgũthiĩ; rĩngĩkĩambata rĩrorete mũhaka-inĩ wa bũrũri warĩo
1Samuel6:10 Nao andũ acio magĩgĩĩka o ta ũguo; makĩnyita ng’ombe igĩrĩ igũkamwo
1Samuel6:11 magĩgĩĩkĩra ithandũkũ rĩa Jehova ngari-inĩ ĩo igũrũ
1Samuel6:12 Nacio ng’ombe icio ikĩgwata njĩra ĩrĩa yathiaga yarũngĩrĩirie ĩrorete Bethi-shemeshu; igĩgĩthiĩ o na njĩra ya gĩtwari ikĩanagia
1Samuel6:13 Nao andũ a Bethi-shemeshu nĩ kũgetha maagethaga ngano yao kĩanda-inĩ; magĩtiira maitho
1Samuel6:14 Nayo ngari ĩo ĩgĩgĩkinya mũgũnda wa Joshua
1Samuel6:15 Nao Alawii makĩruta ithandũkũ rĩa Jehova ngari igũrũ
1Samuel6:16 Nao anene acio atano a Afilisiti mona ũguo
1Samuel6:17 Naguo ũhoro wa mĩhianano ya ngaĩ icio ĩthondeketwo na thahabu
1Samuel6:18 o na tũbĩa twa thahabu tũu twatwarirũo twaiganaga o ta ũrĩa matũũra ma Afilisiti maigana ma anene acio atano
1Samuel6:19 Nake Jehova akĩũraga andũ a kũu Bethi-shemeshu ngiri mĩrongo ĩtano na mĩrongo mũgwanja
1Samuel6:20 Nao andũ a Bethi-shemeshu makiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel6:21 Nao magĩkĩrekeria andũ arĩa maatũũraga Kiriathu-jearimu andũ
1Samuel7:1 Nao andũ a Kiriathu-jearimu magĩthiĩ makĩgĩra ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa Jehova
1Samuel7:2 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel7:3 Nake Samueli akĩaria na andũ acio othe a nyũmba ya Isiraeli
1Samuel7:4 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli igĩkĩeheria Mabaali na Maashitarothu
1Samuel7:5 Ningĩ Samueli agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel7:6 Nao makĩũngana kũu Mizipa
1Samuel7:7 Nao Afilisiti maaigua atĩ ciana cia Isiraeli nĩciũnganĩte kũu Mizipa
1Samuel7:8 Ciana icio cia Isiraeli igĩkĩĩra Samueli atĩrĩ
1Samuel7:9 Nake Samueli agĩkĩnyita kagondu ka nyondo-inĩ agĩkaruta gatuĩke ihaki rĩa gũcinĩrũo Jehova karĩ kagima o ro ũguo; ningĩ Samueli agĩkaĩra Jehova nĩ ũndũ wa Isiraeli
1Samuel7:10 Na rĩrĩa Samueli aarutaga ihaki rĩu rĩa njino-rĩ
1Samuel7:11 Nao andũ a Isiraeli makiuma Mizipa
1Samuel7:12 Hĩndĩ ĩo Samueli agĩkĩoya ihiga
1Samuel7:13 Afilisiti magĩgĩtorio o gũtorio biũ
1Samuel7:14 Namo matũũra ma Isiraeli marĩa maatunyanĩtwo nĩ Afilisiti magĩcokithio harĩ Isiraeli
1Samuel7:15 Nake Samueli agĩtiirĩrĩra Isiraeli matukũ mothe ma muoyo wake.
1Samuel7:16 Na agathiaga Beth-eli
1Samuel7:17 Nakuo kũndũ gwake kũrĩa aacokaga kũinũka nĩ Rama
1Samuel8:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel8:2 Mũrũwe wa irigithathi etagwo Joeli
1Samuel8:3 No rĩrĩ
1Samuel8:4 Hĩndĩ ĩo athuri othe a Isiraeli magĩkĩũngana
1Samuel8:5 nao makĩmwĩra ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
1Samuel8:6 No rĩrĩ
1Samuel8:7 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Samueli atĩrĩ
1Samuel8:8 O ta ũrĩa maũndũ mothe marĩa matũire mekaga gwata mũthenya ũrĩa ndamaambatirie ngĩmaruta Misiri
1Samuel8:9 Tondũ ũcio
1Samuel8:10 Samueli agĩkĩhe andũ acio metĩtie mũthamaki mohoro macio mothe ma Jehova.
1Samuel8:11 Agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel8:12 na amatue anene a athigari ngiri
1Samuel8:13 Nao airĩtu anyu athiage nao a kũmũthondekera irio irĩ mũrĩo
1Samuel8:14 Ningĩ nĩagathiaga na mĩgũnda yanyu
1Samuel8:15 Ningĩ nĩagathiaga na gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi kĩa mbeũ cianyu
1Samuel8:16 Na athiage na ndungata cianyu cia arũme
1Samuel8:17 Ningĩ nĩagathiaga na gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi kĩa ndũru cianyu
1Samuel8:18 Na hĩndĩ ĩo nĩmũgakaya nĩ mũthamaki wanyu ũcio mũgakorũo mwĩthurĩire
1Samuel8:19 No rĩrĩ
1Samuel8:20 nĩguo o na ithuĩ tũtuĩke ta ndũrĩrĩ iria ingĩ ciothe
1Samuel8:21 Nake Samueli agĩgĩthikĩrĩria ciugo ciothe iria cioigirũo nĩ andũ acio
1Samuel8:22 Nake Jehova akĩĩra Samueli atĩrĩ
1Samuel9:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel9:2 Nake aarĩ na mũriũ wetagwo Saulu
1Samuel9:3 Nacio ndigiri cia Kishu
1Samuel9:4 Nake agĩkĩgera bũrũri wothe ũrĩa wĩ irĩma nyingĩ wa Efiraimu
1Samuel9:5 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel9:6 Nake agĩcokia ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
1Samuel9:7 Ningĩ Saulu akĩĩra ndungata yake atĩrĩ
1Samuel9:8 Ndungata ĩo ĩgĩgĩcokeria Saulu rĩngĩ ĩkiuga ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
1Samuel9:9 (Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel9:10 Saulu agĩkĩĩra ndungata ĩo yake atĩrĩ
1Samuel9:11 Na rĩrĩa maambataga ihaicĩro-inĩ makinye itũũra rĩu
1Samuel9:12 Nao magĩkĩmacokeria makiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel9:13 Na mwatonya itũũra
1Samuel9:14 Magĩkĩambata
1Samuel9:15 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel9:16 Rũciũ
1Samuel9:17 Na rĩrĩa Samueli onire Saulu-rĩ
1Samuel9:18 Hĩndĩ ĩo Saulu agĩgĩkuhĩhĩria Samueli kĩhingo-inĩ gĩa ĩtũũra
1Samuel9:19 Nake Samueli agĩcokeria Saulu
1Samuel9:20 Naho ha ũhoro wa ndigiri ciaku iria ciorire mĩthenya ĩtatũ ĩthirĩte-rĩ
1Samuel9:21 Nake Saulu agĩcokia
1Samuel9:22 Nake Samueli agĩkĩoya Saulu
1Samuel9:23 Samueli agĩkĩĩra mũrugi wa irio atĩrĩ
1Samuel9:24 Mũrugi ũcio agĩkĩoya kĩande hamwe na nyama ĩrĩa yarĩ igũrũ rĩakĩo agĩkĩiga harĩ Saulu. Nake Samueli akiuga ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
1Samuel9:25 Na rĩrĩa maakorirũo maikũrũkĩte moimĩte itĩri-inĩ magatonya itũũra-rĩ
1Samuel9:26 Nao magĩkĩroka gũũkĩra rũcinĩ tene; na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel9:27 Nao rĩrĩa maaikũrũkaga makinye mũthia-inĩ wa itũũra rĩu
1Samuel10:1 Samueli agĩkĩoya kanandũ ka maguta
1Samuel10:2 Ũmũthĩ twatigana-rĩ
1Samuel10:3 Ningĩ wathiathia na mbere woima kũu
1Samuel10:4 nao makũgeithie
1Samuel10:5 Thutha wa ũguo ningĩ wakinya kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa Ngai
1Samuel10:6 na roho wa Jehova nĩũgũgũkora na hinya mũnene
1Samuel10:7 Na nĩgũgũkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel10:8 Ũgĩcoke ũikũrũke Giligali ũkinye kuo mbere yakwa; na atĩrĩrĩ
1Samuel10:9 Na gũgĩkinya o ro ũguo
1Samuel10:10 Na maakinya kĩrĩma-inĩ-rĩ
1Samuel10:11 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel10:12 Na mũndũ ũmwe wa handũ o ro hau agĩcokia akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel10:13 Na aarĩkia kũratha mohoro
1Samuel10:14 Nake ithe mũnyinyi wa Saulu akĩũria Saulu o na ndungata yake atĩrĩ
1Samuel10:15 Ningĩ ithe mũnyinyi wa Saulu akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel10:16 Nake Saulu agĩkĩĩra ithe mũnyinyi atĩrĩ
1Samuel10:17 Nake Samueli agĩgĩĩta andũ mongane harĩ Jehova kũu Mizipa
1Samuel10:18 agĩkĩĩra ciana cia Isiraeli atĩrĩ
1Samuel10:19 no rĩrĩ
1Samuel10:20 Tondũ ũcio Samueli agĩkĩreharehithie mĩhĩrĩga yothe ya Isiraeli ĩmũthengerere; naguo mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini ũkĩoyũo.
1Samuel10:21 Ningĩ akĩreharehithie mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini o ta ũrĩa mbarĩ ciaguo ciatariĩ
1Samuel10:22 Tondũ ũcio magĩgĩtuĩria ũhoro kwĩ Jehova
1Samuel10:23 Magĩgĩteng’era
1Samuel10:24 Nake Samueli agĩkĩĩra andũ acio othe atĩrĩ
1Samuel10:25 Hĩndĩ ĩo Samueli akĩhe andũ acio kĩrĩra gĩkoniĩ ũthamaki ũcio
1Samuel10:26 O nake Saulu akĩinũka gwake mũciĩ Gibea
1Samuel10:27 No andũ amwe aaganu mũno makiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel11:2 Nake Nahashu
1Samuel11:3 Nao athuri acio a Jabeshi magĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:4 Nao andũ acio maareketio magĩgĩthiĩ magĩkinya Gibea
1Samuel11:5 Na atĩrĩrĩ
1Samuel11:6 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel11:7 Agĩkĩnyita ndegwa cia icoki rĩmwe agĩcitinangia icunjĩ
1Samuel11:8 Nake Saulu akĩmatarĩra Bezeki; nacio ciana cia Isiraeli ikĩonwo irĩ ngiri magana matatũ; na andũ a Juda ngiri mĩrongo ĩtatũ.
1Samuel11:9 Nao magĩkĩĩra andũ acio maareketio kũrĩ o atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:10 Tondũ ũcio andũ acio a Jabeshi magĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:11 Na gũgĩtuĩka atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:12 Nao andũ magĩkĩĩra Samueli atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:13 Nowe Saulu akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:14 Hĩndĩ ĩo Samueli agĩkĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:15 Nao andũ othe magĩgĩthiĩ Giligali
1Samuel12:1 Nake Samueli agĩkĩĩra Aisiraeli othe ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
1Samuel12:2 Na rĩu ta onei
1Samuel12:3 Niĩ ũyũ haha; ta umbũrĩrai o gũkũ tũrĩ
1Samuel12:4 Nao magĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel12:5 Ningĩ akĩmera atĩrĩ
1Samuel12:6 Ningĩ Samueli agĩkĩĩra andũ acio atĩrĩ
1Samuel12:7 Na tondũ ũcio ta rũgamai o ro ũguo rĩu nĩ getha tũcire
1Samuel12:8 Atĩrĩrĩ
1Samuel12:9 No nĩmaariganĩirũo nĩ Jehova Ngai wao
1Samuel12:10 Ningĩ magĩkaĩra Jehova
1Samuel12:11 Nake Jehova agĩkĩrekia Jerub-baali
1Samuel12:12 Na rĩrĩa mwonire atĩ Nahashu
1Samuel12:13 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel12:14 Mũngĩkorũo nĩmũrĩĩtigagĩra Jehova
1Samuel12:15 no rĩrĩ
1Samuel12:16 Tondũ ũcio
1Samuel12:17 Githĩ rĩu ti ihinda rĩa magetha ma ngano? Nĩngũkaĩra Jehova arehithie marurumĩ na mbura; na nĩmũkũmenya
1Samuel12:18 Nake Samueli agĩgĩkaĩra Jehova
1Samuel12:19 Nao andũ acio othe makĩĩra Samueli atĩrĩ
1Samuel12:20 Nake Samueli akĩĩra andũ acio atĩrĩ
1Samuel12:21 na mũtikagarũrũke na mwena ũngĩ
1Samuel12:22 Nĩ gũkorũo Jehova ndangĩtiga andũ ake
1Samuel12:23 O na ningĩ atĩrĩ
1Samuel12:24 Gĩtai o gwĩtigĩra Jehova
1Samuel12:25 No rĩrĩ
1Samuel13:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel13:2 Nake Saulu agĩĩthurĩra andũ a Isiraeli ngiri ithatũ; nao andũ ngiri igĩrĩ thĩinĩ wa acio magĩikara na Saulu Mikimashi
1Samuel13:3 Nake Jonathani akĩhũra kĩhingo kĩa Afilisiti kĩrĩa kĩarĩ Geba; nao Afilisiti makĩigua ũhoro ũcio. Nake Saulu akĩhuhithia coro bũrũri ũcio wothe akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel13:4 Nao Aisiraeli othe magĩkĩigua gũkĩĩranwo atĩ Saulu nĩaahũrĩte kĩhingo kĩa Afilisiti
1Samuel13:5 Nao Afilisiti magĩkĩũngana nĩguo mahũrane na Isiraeli
1Samuel13:6 Na rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli meonire atĩ me hairũ
1Samuel13:7 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel13:8 Nake agĩgĩikara kuo mĩthenya mũgwanja
1Samuel13:9 Nake Saulu agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel13:10 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel13:11 Nake Samueli akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel13:12 tondũ ũcio ndoiga atĩrĩ
1Samuel13:13 Nake Samueli agĩkĩĩra Saulu atĩrĩ
1Samuel13:14 No rĩrĩ
1Samuel13:15 Nake Samueli agĩgĩũkĩra
1Samuel13:16 Nake Saulu
1Samuel13:17 Ningĩ hagĩkiuma aninani kĩraaro-inĩ kĩa Afilisiti marĩ ikundi ithatũ; gĩkundi kĩmwe gĩkĩgwata njĩra ĩrĩa ĩthiaga Ofara
1Samuel13:18 kĩrĩa kĩngĩ gĩkĩgwata njĩra ya Bethi-horoni
1Samuel13:19 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel13:20 no rĩrĩ
1Samuel13:21 o hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yothe macembe mao
1Samuel13:22 Na tondũ ũcio gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel13:23 Nakĩo gĩtungati kĩa Afilisiti gĩkiumagara
1Samuel14:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel14:2 Nake Saulu aaikarĩte mwena wa mũthia mũno wa Gibea
1Samuel14:3 ningĩ Ahija
1Samuel14:4 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel14:5 Ningĩ ndwaro icio cierĩ
1Samuel14:6 Jonathani agĩkĩĩra mwanake ũcio wamũkuuagĩra indo ciake cia mbaara atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:7 Nake mũndũ ũcio wamũkuuagĩra indo cia mbaara akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ; Ĩka maũndũ mothe marĩa marĩ ngoro-inĩ yaku
1Samuel14:8 Nake Jonathani agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:9 Nao mangĩgĩtwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:10 No mangĩtwĩra ũũ: Ambatai gũkũ tũrĩ; tũkiambate
1Samuel14:11 Nao erĩ makĩĩonithia gĩtungati gĩa athigari kĩa Afilisiti; nao Afilisiti makiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:12 Nao andũ a gĩtungati kĩu makĩgwata kwaria na Jonathani na mũndũ ũcio wamũkuuagĩra indo cia mbaara
1Samuel14:13 Nake Jonathani akĩhaica atambĩte na moko na magũrũ
1Samuel14:14 Narĩo rĩũragana rĩu rĩa mbere rĩa Jonathani na mũndũ ũcio wamũkuuagĩra indo cia mbaara
1Samuel14:15 Gũgĩkĩgĩa kĩmako kĩnene kũu kĩraaro-inĩ
1Samuel14:16 Nao arangĩri a Saulu me kũu Gibea ya Benjamini magĩcũthĩrĩria
1Samuel14:17 Hĩndĩ ĩo Saulu agĩkĩĩra andũ arĩa maarĩ hamwe nake atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:18 Nake Saulu akĩĩra Ahija atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:19 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:20 Nake Saulu na andũ othe arĩa maarĩ hamwe nake magĩkĩũngana
1Samuel14:21 Nao Ahibirania arĩa maarĩ na Afilisiti mbere ĩo
1Samuel14:22 O nao andũ othe a Isiraeli arĩa mehithĩte bũrũri ũrĩa wĩ irĩma nyingĩ wa Efiraimu
1Samuel14:23 Ũguo nĩguo Jehova aahonokirie Isiraeli mũthenya ũcio; nayo mbaara ĩo ĩgĩthiĩ ĩgĩkinya gũkuhĩ na Bethi-aveni.
1Samuel14:24 Nao andũ a Isiraeli makĩnoga mũno mũthenya ũcio; no Saulu nĩehĩtithirie andũ akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:25 Nao andũ acio othe magĩgĩtonya mũtitũ-inĩ
1Samuel14:26 Na rĩrĩa andũ maagĩtonyire mũtitũ-inĩ ũcio
1Samuel14:27 No rĩrĩ
1Samuel14:28 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũndũ ũmwe wa acio maarĩ ho agĩcokia
1Samuel14:29 Jonathani agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:30 Githĩ gũtingĩkĩagĩrĩte makĩria korũo andũ aya nĩ kũrĩa mekũrĩa ũmũthĩ matekũhatwo indo imwe thĩinĩ wa iria matahĩte cia thũ ciao
1Samuel14:31 Magĩkĩhũra Afilisiti mũthenya ũcio mamarutĩtie Mikimashi
1Samuel14:32 Nao andũ makĩrũũgĩrĩra indo iria maatahĩte
1Samuel14:33 Nake Saulu akĩheo ũhoro
1Samuel14:34 Ningĩ Saulu akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:35 Nake Saulu agĩgĩakĩra Jehova kĩgongona; nakĩo kĩgongona kĩu nĩkĩo kĩa mbere kĩrĩa aakĩire Jehova.
1Samuel14:36 Nake Saulu akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:37 Saulu agĩkĩhoya kĩrĩra harĩ Ngai atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:38 Hĩndĩ ĩo Saulu agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:39 Nĩ gũkorũo o ta ũrĩa Jehova ũrĩa ũhonokagia Isiraeli atũũraga muoyo-rĩ
1Samuel14:40 Agĩkĩĩra Aisiraeli othe atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:41 Tondũ ũcio Saulu agĩkĩĩra Jehova Ngai wa Isiraeli atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:42 Ningĩ Saulu akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:43 Saulu agĩkĩĩra Jonathani atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:44 Ningĩ Saulu akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:45 Nao andũ magĩkĩĩra Saulu atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:46 Thutha ũcio Saulu agĩkĩambata agĩtiga kũrũmĩrĩra Afilisiti; nao Afilisiti magĩĩthiĩra kwao.
1Samuel14:47 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel14:48 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ ma ũcamba
1Samuel14:49 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel14:50 Nake mũtumia wa Saulu etagwo Ahinoamu
1Samuel14:51 Ningĩ Kishu nĩwe warĩ ithe wa Saulu; o nake Neri
1Samuel14:52 Na rĩrĩ

1Samuel15:3 Rĩu gĩthiĩ ũkahũre Aamaleki
1Samuel15:4 Hĩndĩ ĩo Saulu agĩgĩĩta andũ ake

1Samuel15:8 Agĩkĩnyita Agagi
1Samuel15:9 No rĩrĩ
1Samuel15:10 Hĩndĩ ĩo ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova ĩgĩgĩkinyĩrĩra Samueli
1Samuel15:11 Nĩngwĩrira nĩ kwarahũra Saulu atuĩke mũthamaki; nĩ ũndũ nĩacokete na thutha
1Samuel15:12 Ningĩ Samueli agĩkĩroka gũũkĩra tene agatũnge Saulu kũrĩ o rũcinĩ; nake Samueli akĩheo ũhoro
1Samuel15:13 Samueli agĩgĩkinya he Saulu

1Samuel15:35 Nake Samueli ndakĩigana gũcoka gũthiĩ kuonana na Saulu
1Samuel16:1 Ningĩ Jehova akĩĩra Samueli atĩrĩ
1Samuel16:2 Samueli agĩgĩcokia atĩrĩ
1Samuel16:3 Na wĩte Jesii igongona-inĩ rĩu
1Samuel16:4 Nake Samueli agĩgĩĩka ũndũ ũcio Jehova oigĩte
1Samuel16:5 Nake akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel16:6 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel16:7 No Jehova akĩĩra Samueli atĩrĩ
1Samuel16:8 Ningĩ Jesii agĩĩta Abinadabu
1Samuel16:9 Thutha wa ũguo Jesii akĩhĩtũkithia Shama. Nake akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel16:10 Jesii agĩkĩhĩtũkithĩria ariũ ake mũgwanja harĩ Samueli. Nake Samueli akĩĩra Jesii atĩrĩ
1Samuel16:11 Hĩndĩ ĩo Samueli agĩkĩũria Jesii atĩrĩ
1Samuel16:12 Agĩkĩrekania
1Samuel16:13 Samueli agĩkĩoya rũhĩa rũa maguta
1Samuel16:14 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel16:15 Nacio ndungata cia Saulu igĩkĩmwĩra ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
1Samuel16:16 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel16:17 Saulu agĩkĩĩra ndungata ciake atĩrĩ
1Samuel16:18 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũndũ ũmwe wa aanake acio agĩcokia
1Samuel16:19 Tondũ ũcio Saulu agĩkĩrekeria Jesii andũ
1Samuel16:20 Nake Jesii agĩkĩnyita ndigiri
1Samuel16:21 Daudi agĩgĩthiĩ he Saulu
1Samuel16:22 Ningĩ Saulu akĩrekeria Jesii mũndũ
1Samuel16:23 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel17:2 Nake Saulu na andũ a Isiraeli magĩkorũo nĩmonganĩte makaamba hema ciao gĩtuamba kĩa Ela
1Samuel17:3 Nao Afilisiti makĩrũgama kĩrĩma-inĩ mwena ũmwe
1Samuel17:4 Naho hau kĩraaro-inĩ kĩa Afilisiti hagĩkiumĩra njamba ĩmwe yetagwo Goliathu
1Samuel17:5 Ningĩ yarĩ na ngũbia ya ita ya gĩcango mũtwe
1Samuel17:6 Namo magũrũ mayo magekĩrũo mĩnyamũ ya mbaara ya gĩcango; na yarĩ na itimũ rĩa kĩberethi rĩa gĩcango rĩahocetio gatagatĩ-inĩ ga ciande ciayo.
1Samuel17:7 Naguo mũtĩ wa itimũ rĩayo rĩa mwenjerere watariĩ o ta mũtĩ wa mũtambo ũrĩa ũtumaga tama; narĩo ithũmbĩ rĩa itimũ rĩayo rĩgĩthimwo-rĩ
1Samuel17:8 Nayo ĩgĩkĩrũgama
1Samuel17:9 Nake aahota kũhũrana na niĩ
1Samuel17:10 Mũfilisiti ũcio agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:11 Nake Saulu na Isiraeli othe maaigua ciugo cia Mũfilisiti ũcio makĩmaka
1Samuel17:12 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel17:13 Nao ariũ atatũ a Jesii arĩa akũrũ nĩmaathiĩte na Saulu kũu ita-inĩ; namo marĩĩtwa ma ariũ acio ake atatũ maathiĩte ita-inĩ nĩ Eliabu
1Samuel17:14 Nake Daudi nĩwe warĩ wa kĩhinganda; nao acio atatũ akũrũ nĩmaathiĩte na Saulu.
1Samuel17:15 Nake Daudi agathiaga agĩcokaga oimĩte he Saulu nĩguo akarĩithie mbũri cia ithe kũu Bethi-lehemu.
1Samuel17:16 Nake Mũfilisiti ũcio akĩnina matukũ mĩrongo ĩna
1Samuel17:17 Nake Jesii agĩkĩĩra mũriũ Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:18 Nacio cienyũ ici ikũmi cia ngorono ũcitwarĩre mũnene wa gĩtungati kĩao gĩa athigari ngiri; ũkĩrore ũrĩa ariũ a nyũkwa matariĩ
1Samuel17:19 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel17:20 Daudi agĩkĩroka gũũkĩra rũcinĩ tene
1Samuel17:21 Nao Aisiraeli na Afilisiti magĩthabania ita
1Samuel17:22 Nake Daudi agĩgĩtiga kĩrĩa aakuuĩte na mũndũ ũrĩa waikaragia indo
1Samuel17:23 Na rĩrĩa aaragia nao-rĩ
1Samuel17:24 Nao andũ othe a Isiraeli mona mũndũ ũcio
1Samuel17:25 Andũ acio a Isiraeli magĩkĩũrania atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:26 Nake Daudi agĩkĩaria na andũ arĩa maarũngiĩ hakuhĩ nake
1Samuel17:27 Nao andũ acio makĩmũcokeria ũhoro o ta ũcio
1Samuel17:28 Nake Eliabu
1Samuel17:29 Nake Daudi agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:30 Agĩkĩhũgũka akĩmũtiga
1Samuel17:31 Na rĩrĩa ũhoro ũcio Daudi aaragia waiguirũo-rĩ
1Samuel17:32 Daudi agĩkĩĩra Saulu atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:33 Nake Saulu agĩkĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:34 Daudi agĩkĩĩra Saulu atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:35 ngamĩrũmĩrĩra ngamĩgũtha
1Samuel17:36 Niĩ ndungata yaku
1Samuel17:37 Ningĩ Daudi agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:38 Nake Saulu agĩkĩhumba Daudi nguo ciake
1Samuel17:39 Nake Daudi akĩĩoha rũhiũ rũa njora igũrũ rĩa nguo icio
1Samuel17:40 Agĩkĩnyita rũthanju rũake na guoko
1Samuel17:41 Nake Mũfilisiti ũcio agĩthiathia agĩkuhĩhĩria Daudi; nake mũndũ ũrĩa wamũkuuagĩra ngo agĩthiĩ mbere yake.
1Samuel17:42 Na rĩrĩa Mũfilisiti ũcio aabarangire akĩona Daudi-rĩ
1Samuel17:43 Mũfilisiti ũcio agĩkĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:44 Ningĩ Mũfilisiti ũcio akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:45 Daudi agĩkĩĩra Mũfilisiti ũcio atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:46 Mũthenya ũyũ wa ũmũthĩ nĩguo Jehova egũkũneana moko-inĩ makwa; na nĩngũkũgũtha
1Samuel17:47 ningĩ nĩ getha ũũngano ũyũ wothe ũmenye atĩ Jehova ndahonokanagia na rũhiũ rũa njora
1Samuel17:48 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:49 Daudi agĩgĩikia guoko kondo-inĩ gake akĩruta kahiga
1Samuel17:50 Ũguo nĩguo Daudi aakĩhootire Mũfilisiti ũcio na kĩgũtha na kahiga
1Samuel17:51 Daudi agĩgĩteng’era
1Samuel17:52 Nao andũ a Isiraeli na Juda magĩũkĩra
1Samuel17:53 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli ikĩhũndũka ciumĩte gũteng’eria Afilisiti
1Samuel17:54 Nake Daudi akĩoya mũtwe wa Mũfilisiti ũcio
1Samuel17:55 Na rĩrĩa Saulu onire Daudi akiumagara akahũrane na Mũfilisiti ũcio
1Samuel17:56 Ningĩ mũthamaki akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:57 Tondũ ũcio rĩrĩa Daudi aacokire oimĩte kũũraga Mũfilisiti ũcio
1Samuel17:58 Nake Saulu agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:2 Nake Saulu agĩkĩmuoya mũthenya o ro ũcio
1Samuel18:3 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jonathani na Daudi makĩgĩa na kĩrĩkanĩro
1Samuel18:4 Jonathani agĩgĩĩcuma nguo yake ĩrĩa ndaya ya igũrũ
1Samuel18:5 Nake Daudi agathiaga kũndũ guothe kũrĩa Saulu aamũrekagia
1Samuel18:6 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:7 Nao andũ-a-nja acio magĩkĩinanĩra o mũndũ-wa-nja na ũrĩa ũngĩ magĩthaka
1Samuel18:8 Saulu agĩkĩrakara mũno
1Samuel18:9 Nake Saulu agĩgĩitĩka kũrora Daudi manyiira kuuma mũthenya ũcio
1Samuel18:10 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:11 Saulu agĩgĩikia itimũ rĩu
1Samuel18:12 Nake Saulu agĩgĩĩtigĩra Daudi
1Samuel18:13 Tondũ ũcio Saulu agĩkĩmũthengia oime harĩ we
1Samuel18:14 Nake Daudi agekaga na ũũgĩ maũndũ marĩa mamũkoniĩ mĩthiĩre-inĩ yake yothe; na Jehova aarĩ hamwe nake.
1Samuel18:15 No rĩrĩa Saulu onire atĩ nĩegwĩka maũndũ make na ũũgĩ mũno-rĩ
1Samuel18:16 No Isiraeli othe
1Samuel18:17 Nake Saulu agĩkĩĩra Daudi ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
1Samuel18:18 Daudi agĩkĩĩra Saulu atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:19 No rĩrĩ
1Samuel18:20 No rĩrĩ
1Samuel18:21 Saulu agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:22 Nake Saulu agĩatha ndungata ciake
1Samuel18:23 Ndungata cia Saulu igĩkĩhe Daudi ũhoro ũcio me ndundu. Nake Daudi akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:24 Ningĩ ndungata icio cia Saulu ikĩmũhe ũhoro ũcio
1Samuel18:25 Saulu agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:26 Na rĩrĩa ndungata ciake ciaheire Daudi ndeto icio
1Samuel18:27 Daudi agĩũkĩra agĩthiĩ
1Samuel18:28 Nake Saulu akĩona
1Samuel18:29 Saulu agĩgĩkĩrĩrĩria gwĩtigĩra Daudi; ningĩ Saulu agĩtũũra arĩ o thũ ya Daudi.
1Samuel18:30 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel19:1 Rĩrĩ rĩngĩ Saulu agĩkĩaria na Jonathani
1Samuel19:2 No rĩrĩ
1Samuel19:3 na niĩ nĩngoimagara
1Samuel19:4 Nake Jonathani akĩgathĩrĩria Daudi he ithe
1Samuel19:5 nĩ ũndũ ndaaregire gwĩtwarĩrĩra ũgwati-inĩ wa gĩkuũ
1Samuel19:6 Saulu agĩkĩigua uuge wa Jonathani
1Samuel19:7 Nake Jonathani agĩgĩĩta Daudi
1Samuel19:8 Ningĩ gũgĩkĩgĩa mbaara rĩngĩ; nake Daudi agĩthiĩ akĩhũrana na Afilisiti
1Samuel19:9 Ningĩ roho mũũru uumĩte he Jehova ũkĩgwata Saulu aikarĩte gwake mũciĩ
1Samuel19:10 Nake Saulu agĩcaria gũtheca Daudi akamũthecithanie na rũthingo na itimũ rĩu; no rĩrĩ
1Samuel19:11 Ningĩ Saulu akĩrekia andũ kwa Daudi mũciĩ
1Samuel19:12 Mikali agĩgĩikũrũkĩria Daudi ndirica-inĩ
1Samuel19:13 Nake Mikali akĩoya mũhianano wa kũhoya ngai naguo
1Samuel19:14 Nake Saulu aarekia andũ makanyite Daudi-rĩ
1Samuel19:15 Ningĩ Saulu agĩkĩrekia andũ makarore Daudi
1Samuel19:16 Nao arekio acio maatonya nyũmba-rĩ
1Samuel19:17 Saulu agĩkĩũria Mikali atĩrĩ
1Samuel19:18 Nake Daudi agĩkĩĩũrĩra
1Samuel19:19 Ningĩ Saulu akĩheo ũhoro ũcio
1Samuel19:20 Saulu agĩkĩrekia andũ makanyite Daudi; no rĩrĩa monire gĩkundi kĩa anabii makĩratha mohoro
1Samuel19:21 Na rĩrĩa Saulu aaheirũo ũhoro ũcio
1Samuel19:22 Thutha wa ũguo o nake we mwene agĩthiĩ Rama
1Samuel19:23 Agĩgĩthiĩ Naiothu
1Samuel19:24 Ningĩ agĩgĩĩcuma nguo ciake cia igũrũ
1Samuel20:1 Ningĩ Daudi agĩkĩũra akiuma Naiothu
1Samuel20:2 Nake akĩmũcokeria atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:3 Daudi agĩgĩcoka akĩĩhĩta akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:4 Ningĩ Jonathani akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:5 Daudi agĩkĩĩra Jonathani ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
1Samuel20:6 Na thoguo angĩnjũria-rĩ
1Samuel20:7 Nake angĩgĩcokia oige
1Samuel20:8 Tondũ ũcio njiguĩra tha ũnjĩke ũndũ ũcio
1Samuel20:9 Jonathani agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:10 Daudi agĩkĩĩra Jonathani atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:11 Nake Jonathani agĩkĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:12 Jonathani agĩkĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:13 Jehova aro’thũũra niĩ
1Samuel20:14 Ndagũthaitha ũnjiguagĩre tha ta cia Jehova; na ti o hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndĩ muoyo iiki
1Samuel20:15 no rĩrĩ
1Samuel20:16 Tondũ ũcio Jonathani agĩkĩgĩa kĩrĩkanĩro na nyũmba ya Daudi
1Samuel20:17 Ningĩ Jonathani agĩtũma Daudi ehĩte rĩngĩ
1Samuel20:18 Nake Jonathani agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:19 Na wanina mĩthenya ĩtatũ
1Samuel20:20 Na niĩ nĩngaikia mĩguĩ ĩtatũ na mwena-inĩ warĩo ta arĩ wathi ngwĩgera.
1Samuel20:21 Na atĩrĩrĩ
1Samuel20:22 No rĩrĩ
1Samuel20:23 Naho ha ũhoro ũrĩa twaranĩirie nawe-rĩ
1Samuel20:24 Nake Daudi agĩkĩĩhitha gĩthaka-inĩ
1Samuel20:25 Agĩikarĩra gĩtĩ gĩake o ta mahinda marĩa mangĩ
1Samuel20:26 No rĩrĩ
1Samuel20:27 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:28 Jonathani agĩgĩcokeria Saulu atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:29 akĩnjĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:30 Saulu agĩgĩcinwo nĩ marakara mũno nĩ ũndũ wa Jonathani
1Samuel20:31 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
1Samuel20:32 Jonathani agĩgĩcokeria Saulu
1Samuel20:33 Nake Saulu akĩmũikĩria itimũ rĩake
1Samuel20:34 Jonathani agĩgĩũkĩra akiuma hau metha-inĩ
1Samuel20:35 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:36 Agĩkĩĩra kahĩĩ kau gake atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:37 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel20:38 Ningĩ Jonathani akĩanĩrĩra akĩĩra kahĩĩ kau atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:39 No rĩrĩ
1Samuel20:40 Jonathani agĩkĩnengera kahĩĩ kau indo ciake cia mbaara
1Samuel20:41 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel20:42 Jonathani agĩkĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel21:1 Nake Daudi agĩgĩthiĩ Nobu kwĩ Ahimeleku
1Samuel21:2 Nake Daudi agĩkĩĩra Ahimeleku
1Samuel21:3 Rĩu-rĩ
1Samuel21:4 Nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũcio agĩcokeria Daudi
1Samuel21:5 Daudi agĩgĩcokeria mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũcio
1Samuel21:6 Mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai agĩkĩmũhe mĩgate ĩo mĩamũre; nĩ ũndũ gũtiarĩ mĩgate ĩngĩ tiga o ĩrĩa yaigagwo mbere ya Jehova
1Samuel21:7 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel21:8 Nake Daudi agĩkĩũria Ahimeleku atĩrĩ
1Samuel21:9 Mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel21:10 Daudi agĩgĩũkĩra
1Samuel21:11 Nake Akishi akĩĩrũo nĩ ndungata ciake atĩrĩ
1Samuel21:12 Nake Daudi agĩkĩiga ũhoro ũcio ngoro-inĩ yake
1Samuel21:13 Agĩkĩĩgarũra mũthiĩre wake arĩ o harĩ andũ acio
1Samuel21:14 Akishi agĩkĩĩra ndungata ciake atĩrĩ
1Samuel21:15 Anga nĩ kwaga njagĩte agũrũki
1Samuel22:1 Tondũ ũcio Daudi agĩkiuma kũu
1Samuel22:2 Na mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa warĩ na mĩnyamaro
1Samuel22:3 Ningĩ Daudi agĩkiumagara agĩthiĩ Mizipa ya Moabi
1Samuel22:4 Agĩkĩmatwara harĩ mũthamaki wa Moabi; magĩikarania nake ihinda rĩrĩa rĩothe Daudi aarĩ kĩhingo-inĩ kĩu.
1Samuel22:5 Nake mũnabii
1Samuel22:6 Nake Saulu akĩigua atĩ Daudi na andũ arĩa maarĩ nake nĩmonetwo. Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel22:7 Nake Saulu agĩkĩĩra ndungata ciake icio ciamũrũgamĩte na ndwere ciothe atĩrĩ
1Samuel22:8 atĩ nĩkĩo inyuothe mũgĩĩte ndundu ya kũnjũkĩrĩra
1Samuel22:9 Hĩndĩ ĩo Doegu
1Samuel22:10 nake akĩmũtuĩrĩria ũhoro he Jehova
1Samuel22:11 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩrekania Ahimeleku
1Samuel22:12 Saulu agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel22:13 Saulu agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel22:14 Nake Ahimeleku agĩcokeria mũthamaki
1Samuel22:15 Kaĩ ũmũthĩ arĩ guo ndakĩambĩrĩria kũmũtuĩrĩria ũhoro he Ngai? Kũroaga gũtuĩka ũguo! Mũthamaki witũ
1Samuel22:16 Mũthamaki agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel22:17 Ningĩ mũthamaki akĩĩra amũrangĩri acio maamũrũgamĩte na ndwere ciothe atĩrĩ
1Samuel22:18 Mũthamaki agĩkĩĩra Doegu atĩrĩ
1Samuel22:19 Narĩo Nobu
1Samuel22:20 Na mũndũ ũmwe wa ariũ a Ahimeleku
1Samuel22:21 Nake Abiatharu ũcio agĩkĩĩra Daudi atĩ Saulu nĩoragĩte athĩnjĩri-Ngai a Jehova.
1Samuel22:22 Daudi agĩkĩĩra Abiatharu atĩrĩ
1Samuel22:23 Wee gĩikare hamwe na niĩ
1Samuel23:1 Hĩndĩ ĩo andũ magĩkĩhe Daudi ũhoro
1Samuel23:2 Tondũ ũcio Daudi agĩgĩtuĩria ũhoro he Jehova
1Samuel23:3 Nao andũ a Daudi makĩmwĩra ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
1Samuel23:4 Daudi agĩgĩtuĩria ũhoro he Jehova ihinda rĩa kerĩ. Nake Jehova akĩmũcokeria
1Samuel23:5 Nake Daudi na andũ ake magĩgĩthiĩ Keila
1Samuel23:6 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel23:7 Ningĩ Saulu agĩkĩheo ũhoro
1Samuel23:8 Nake Saulu agĩgĩĩta andũ othe mathiĩ ita
1Samuel23:9 Nake Daudi akĩmenya atĩ Saulu nĩaacirĩire kũmwĩka ũũru; agĩkĩĩra Abiatharu ũcio mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai atĩrĩ
1Samuel23:10 Hĩndĩ ĩo Daudi agĩkĩhoya
1Samuel23:11 Rĩu-rĩ
1Samuel23:12 Ningĩ Daudi agĩkĩũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel23:13 Hĩndĩ ĩo Daudi na andũ acio ake magana matandatũ magĩgĩũkĩra makĩehera kũu Keila
1Samuel23:14 Nake Daudi agĩgĩtũũra werũ wa Zifu
1Samuel23:15 Daudi agĩkĩona atĩ Saulu oimagarĩte agacarie kũmũruta muoyo. Nake Daudi agĩkorũo arĩ o kũu mũtitũ-inĩ wa werũ wa Zifu.
1Samuel23:16 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel23:17 Agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel23:18 Nao magĩkĩrĩkanĩra kĩrĩkanĩro mbere ya Jehova; nake Daudi agĩtũũra o kũu mũtitũ-inĩ
1Samuel23:19 Hĩndĩ ĩo Azifu makĩambata Gibea gwĩ Saulu
1Samuel23:20 Tondũ ũcio
1Samuel23:21 Saulu agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel23:22 Ta gĩthiĩi mũtĩtĩrithie ũhoro ũcio wega
1Samuel23:23 Tondũ ũcio
1Samuel23:24 Nao magĩgĩũkĩra magĩthiĩ
1Samuel23:25 Nake Saulu na andũ ake magĩthiĩ kũmũcaria. Nao andũ makĩhe Daudi ũhoro ũcio
1Samuel23:26 Saulu akĩgera mwena ũyũ wa kĩrĩma
1Samuel23:27 No hagĩgĩũka mũndũ wareketio gwĩ Saulu amwĩre atĩrĩ
1Samuel23:28 Saulu agĩkĩhũndũka
1Samuel23:29 Nake Daudi agĩkĩambata akiuma kũu
1Samuel24:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel24:2 Nake agĩkĩoya andũ ngiri ithatũ mathurĩtwo thĩinĩ wa andũ othe a Isiraeli
1Samuel24:3 Agĩgĩkinya handũ haarĩ ciugũ cia mbũri njĩra-inĩ
1Samuel24:4 Andũ a Daudi magĩkĩmwĩra ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
1Samuel24:5 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel24:6 Agĩkĩĩra andũ ake atĩrĩ
1Samuel24:7 Tondũ ũcio Daudi agĩgĩkaania andũ ake na kũmera ciugo icio
1Samuel24:8 Thutha ũcio Daudi o nake agĩũkĩra akiuma ngurunga-inĩ ĩo
1Samuel24:9 Daudi agĩkĩĩra Saulu atĩrĩ
1Samuel24:10 Atĩrĩrĩ
1Samuel24:11 Ningĩ-rĩ
1Samuel24:12 Jehova arotũtuithania cira niĩ nawe! Ningĩ Jehova arondĩhĩria harĩ wee; no rĩrĩ
1Samuel24:13 O ta ũrĩa thimo ya andũ a tene yugaga atĩrĩ
1Samuel24:14 Rĩu-rĩ
1Samuel24:15 Tondũ ũcio Jehova nĩatuĩke mũciri atũtuithanie niĩ nawe
1Samuel24:16 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel24:17 Agĩkĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel24:18 Ningĩ ũmũthĩ nĩwonanĩtie ũrĩa wananjĩka maũndũ mega; nĩ gũkorũo rĩrĩa Jehova andekereirie aa’neana moko-inĩ maku
1Samuel24:19 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
1Samuel24:20 Atĩrĩrĩ
1Samuel24:21 Tondũ ũcio wĩhĩte rĩu
1Samuel24:22 Nake Daudi agĩkĩĩra Saulu o ro ũguo na mwĩhĩtwa. Nake Saulu agĩkĩĩinũkĩra; no rĩrĩ
1Samuel25:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel25:2 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel25:3 Nake mũndũ ũcio aagĩĩtagwo Nabali
1Samuel25:4 Nake Daudi akĩiguĩra o kũu werũ-inĩ atĩ Nabali nĩaramura ng’ondu ciake guoya.
1Samuel25:5 Daudi agĩkĩrekia aanake ikũmi akĩmera atĩrĩ
1Samuel25:6 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel25:7 Nĩ rĩrĩ
1Samuel25:8 Ta ũria aanake aku
1Samuel25:9 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel25:10 Nabali agĩgĩcokeria ndungata icio cia Daudi
1Samuel25:11 Hĩ! Nĩ ndĩkĩoe irio ciakwa
1Samuel25:12 Tondũ ũcio aanake acio a Daudi magĩkĩgarũrũka
1Samuel25:13 Nake Daudi agĩkĩĩra andũ acio ake atĩrĩ
1Samuel25:14 No rĩrĩ
1Samuel25:15 No rĩrĩ
1Samuel25:16 acio nĩo maatuĩkĩte ta rũgiri harĩ ithuĩ ũtukũ na mũthenya
1Samuel25:17 Rĩu-rĩ
1Samuel25:18 Abigaili agĩkĩhĩkĩrĩria ũhoro ũcio
1Samuel25:19 Agĩkĩĩra aanake ake atĩrĩ
1Samuel25:20 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel25:21 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel25:22 Ngai arothũũra thũ cia Daudi
1Samuel25:23 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel25:24 Agĩkĩĩgũithia magũrũ-inĩ make akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel25:25 Mwathi wakwa
1Samuel25:26 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel25:27 Na rĩu mwathi wakwa
1Samuel25:28 Ta njohera ihĩtia rĩakwa
1Samuel25:29 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel25:30 Na nĩgũgakinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel25:31 ũndũ ũyũ wa ũrĩa ũtaaitire thakame hatarĩ gĩtũmi
1Samuel25:32 Nake Daudi agĩkĩĩra Abigaili atĩrĩ
1Samuel25:33 o naguo ũũgĩ waku ũrorathimwo
1Samuel25:34 Nĩ ũndũ ti-itherũ
1Samuel25:35 Tondũ ũcio Daudi agĩĩkĩoya kĩheo kĩrĩa aamũtwarithĩirie
1Samuel25:36 Abigaili agĩgĩkinya kwĩ Nabali
1Samuel25:37 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel25:38 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel25:39 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel25:40 Na rĩrĩa ndungata cia Daudi ciakinyire kwĩ Abigaili o kũu Karimeli
1Samuel25:41 Nake agĩgĩũkĩra
1Samuel25:42 Abigaili agĩgĩũkĩra narua
1Samuel25:43 Ningĩ Daudi akĩhikia Ahinoamu wa Jezireeli; nao erĩ magĩtuĩka aka ake.
1Samuel25:44 Nake Saulu agĩgĩkorũo aheanĩte mwarĩ
1Samuel26:1 Ningĩ Azifu magĩthiĩ gwĩ Saulu o kũu Gibea
1Samuel26:2 Saulu agĩgĩũkĩra
1Samuel26:3 Saulu akĩamba hema ciake kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa Hakila kĩrĩa kĩng’etheire werũ
1Samuel26:4 Tondũ ũcio Daudi akĩrekia athigani
1Samuel26:5 Daudi agĩgĩũkĩra
1Samuel26:6 Daudi agĩgĩcokia akĩũria Ahimeleku ũrĩa Mũhiti
1Samuel26:7 Tondũ ũcio Daudi na Abishai magĩgĩkinya harĩ andũ a Saulu ũtukũ; na atĩrĩrĩ
1Samuel26:8 Hĩndĩ ĩo Abishai agĩkĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:9 Nake Daudi agĩkĩĩra Abishai atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:10 Ningĩ Daudi akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:11 Jehova arongiria ndigatambũrũkie guoko gwakwa njũkĩrĩre mũtĩrĩrio maguta wa Jehova! No wee oya itimũ rĩrĩ rĩĩ mũtwe-inĩ wake
1Samuel26:12 Daudi agĩkĩoya itimũ mũtwe-inĩ wa Saulu
1Samuel26:13 Hĩndĩ ĩo Daudi agĩkĩringa mũrĩmo
1Samuel26:14 Daudi agĩkĩanĩrĩra agĩĩta andũ a Saulu
1Samuel26:15 Daudi agĩkĩĩra Abineri atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:16 Ũndũ ũcio wĩkĩte ti mwega. O ta ũrĩa Jehova atũũraga muoyo-rĩ
1Samuel26:17 Nake Saulu agĩkĩmenya mũgambo wa Daudi
1Samuel26:18 Agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:19 Tondũ ũcio
1Samuel26:20 Tondũ ũcio thakame yakwa ĩroaga gũkanaitwo thĩ haraya na harĩa Jehova arĩ; nĩ ũndũ mũthamaki wa Isiraeli oimagarĩte agacarie thuya
1Samuel26:21 Saulu agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:22 Daudi agĩgĩcokia akiuga ũũ: Itimũ nĩwa rĩrĩ
1Samuel26:23 Jehova nĩwe ũrĩĩkaga mũndũ o mũndũ maũndũ o ta ũrĩa ũthingu wake
1Samuel26:24 Atĩrĩrĩ
1Samuel26:25 Saulu agĩkĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel27:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel27:2 Daudi agĩgĩũkĩra
1Samuel27:3 Nake Daudi agĩtũũrania na Akishi
1Samuel27:4 Nake Saulu akĩĩrũo atĩ Daudi nĩorĩire Gathu
1Samuel27:5 Ningĩ Daudi agĩkĩĩra Akishi atĩrĩ
1Samuel27:6 Akishi agĩkĩmũhe Zikilagi mũthenya o ro ũcio; tondũ ũcio
1Samuel27:7 Namo matukũ marĩa Daudi aatũũrire bũrũri wa Afilisiti maarĩ mwaka mũgima na mĩeri ĩna magĩtarũo.
1Samuel27:8 Nake Daudi na andũ ake magĩkĩambata
1Samuel27:9 Daudi agĩkĩhũra bũrũri ũcio mũno
1Samuel27:10 Nake Akishi akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel27:11 Nake Daudi ndakĩigana gũtigia mũndũ mũrũme
1Samuel27:12 Nake Akishi agĩgĩĩtĩkia Daudi
1Samuel28:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ matukũ macio
1Samuel28:2 Daudi agĩkĩĩra Akishi atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:3 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel28:4 Nao Afilisiti magĩkĩũngana makĩamba hema ciao Shunemu; nake Saulu akĩũngania Isiraeli othe
1Samuel28:5 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel28:6 Na rĩrĩa Saulu aatuĩririe ũhoro he Jehova
1Samuel28:7 Saulu agĩkĩĩra ndungata ciake atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:8 Saulu agĩkĩĩgarũra ndakamenyeke
1Samuel28:9 Nake mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio agĩkĩmwĩra ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
1Samuel28:10 Nake Saulu agĩkĩĩhĩtĩra harĩ we akĩgwetaga rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova
1Samuel28:11 Mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:12 Na rĩrĩa mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio onire Samueli
1Samuel28:13 Mũthamaki ũcio agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:14 Agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:15 Samueli agĩkĩĩra Saulu atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:16 Samueli agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:17 Jehova nĩ gwĩka ekĩte o ta ũrĩa oigire na kanua gakwa; ningĩ Jehova nĩagũtunyĩte ũthamaki uume moko-inĩ maku
1Samuel28:18 nĩ ũndũ wee ndwaiguire uuge wa Jehova
1Samuel28:19 O na ningĩ-rĩ
1Samuel28:20 Hĩndĩ ĩo Saulu agĩgĩtungumana akĩaragana thĩ
1Samuel28:21 Nake mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio agĩthengerera Saulu
1Samuel28:22 Na tondũ ũcio
1Samuel28:23 No we akĩrega
1Samuel28:24 Nake mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio agĩkorũo aarĩ na njaũ noru ya gĩcegũ nyũmba thĩinĩ; nake akĩhĩkĩrĩria akĩmĩthĩnjithia
1Samuel28:25 akĩmĩtwarĩra Saulu na ndungata ciake
1Samuel29:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel29:2 Nao anene a Afilisiti makĩhĩtũka na makĩaranio marĩ mathimbũtũ maingĩ ma andũ igana igana
1Samuel29:3 Hĩndĩ ĩo atongoria a Afilisiti magĩkĩũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel29:4 No atongoria acio a Afilisiti makĩrakario nĩwe
1Samuel29:5 Githĩ ũyũ tiwe Daudi
1Samuel29:6 Akishi agĩgĩĩta Daudi
1Samuel29:7 Tondũ ũcio ũkĩra ũhũndũke wĩthiĩre na ũhoreri
1Samuel29:8 Daudi agĩkĩĩra Akishi atĩrĩ
1Samuel29:9 Akishi agĩgĩcokia akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel29:10 Tondũ ũcio
1Samuel29:11 Daudi agĩkĩroka gũũkĩra rũcinĩ tene
1Samuel30:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel30:2 na magataha atumia
1Samuel30:3 Na rĩrĩa Daudi na andũ ake maagĩkinyire itũũra rĩu rĩao-rĩ
1Samuel30:4 Hĩndĩ ĩo Daudi
1Samuel30:5 Nao atumia a Daudi erĩ
1Samuel30:6 Daudi agĩkĩnyarirĩka mũno
1Samuel30:7 Daudi agĩkĩĩra Abiatharu
1Samuel30:8 Nake Daudi agĩgĩtuĩria ũhoro he Jehova
1Samuel30:9 Tondũ ũcio Daudi agĩgĩthiĩ
1Samuel30:10 No Daudi agĩteng’era na ihenya
1Samuel30:11 Nao magĩgĩkora Mũmisiri kũu gĩthaka-inĩ
1Samuel30:12 magĩcoka makĩmũhe kĩenyũ kĩa ngũmba ya ngũyũ na imanjika igĩrĩ cia thabibu nyũmũ; na aarĩkia gũcirĩa-rĩ
1Samuel30:13 Nake Daudi agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel30:14 Nĩ gũtharĩka twatharĩkĩte mwena wa Gũthini wa Akerethi
1Samuel30:15 Nake Daudi akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel30:16 Nake aamũikũrũkia-rĩ
1Samuel30:17 Nake Daudi agĩkĩmahũra amaambĩrĩirie kĩhwaĩ-inĩ kwĩ mairia
1Samuel30:18 Daudi agĩgĩcokithia kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩatahĩtwo nĩ Aamaleki
1Samuel30:19 Na gũtirĩ kĩndũ o na kĩmwe maagire
1Samuel30:20 Ningĩ Daudi agĩtaha ndũru ciao ciothe cia mbũri na ng’ombe; igĩgĩtwarũo o mbere ya ũhiũ ũcio ũngĩ nĩ andũ ake
1Samuel30:21 Nake Daudi agĩkinya harĩa andũ acio magana merĩ morĩtwo nĩ hinya makaremwo nĩ kũrũmĩrĩra Daudi maarĩ
1Samuel30:22 Nao andũ othe arĩa imaramari na arĩa aaganu mũno thĩinĩ wa arĩa maathiĩte na Daudi
1Samuel30:23 Hĩndĩ ĩo Daudi agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel30:24 Ningĩ-rĩ
1Samuel30:25 Naguo ũndũ ũcio akĩũtua kĩrĩra kĩa watho wa kũrũmĩrĩrũo
1Samuel30:26 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel30:27 Agĩgĩtwarithĩria athuri a Beth-eli
1Samuel30:28 na a Aroeru
1Samuel30:29 na a Rakali
1Samuel30:30 na a Horima
1Samuel30:31 na a Hebironi
1Samuel31:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel31:2 Ningĩ Afilisiti makĩrũmĩrĩra Saulu
1Samuel31:3 Nayo mbaara ĩo ĩgĩkĩrũrĩra Saulu mũno mũno
1Samuel31:4 Hĩndĩ ĩo Saulu agĩkĩĩra mũmũkuuĩri indo ciake cia mbaara atĩrĩ
1Samuel31:5 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel31:6 Tondũ ũcio Saulu
1Samuel31:7 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel31:8 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Samuel31:9 Makĩmũtinia mũtwe
1Samuel31:10 Nacio nguo ciake cia kĩgera cia mbaara magĩciiga nyũmba ya Ashitarothu; nakĩo kĩimba gĩake magĩkĩoherera rũthingo-inĩ rũa Bethi-shani.
1Samuel31:11 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel31:12 andũ othe arĩa maarĩ njamba magĩũkĩra
1Samuel31:13 Namo mahĩndĩ mao makĩmoya
2Samuel1:1 NA GŨGĨKINYA atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:2 mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ wa ĩtatũ hagĩũka mũndũ oimĩte kĩraaro-inĩ gĩa Saulu
2Samuel1:3 Nake Daudi agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:4 Nake Daudi agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:5 Daudi agĩkĩũria mwanake ũcio wamũheaga ũhoro ũcio atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:6 Ningĩ mwanake ũcio wamũheaga ũhoro akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:7 Na rĩrĩa aracũthĩrĩirie na thutha wake-rĩ
2Samuel1:8 Nake arakĩnjũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:9 Arakĩnjĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:10 Tondũ ũcio ndĩrakĩrũgama mwena-inĩ wake
2Samuel1:11 Daudi agĩkĩnyita nguo ciake
2Samuel1:12 nao magĩkĩĩhũra ithũri nĩ kĩeha
2Samuel1:13 Nake Daudi agĩkĩũria mwanake ũcio wamũheire ũhoro ũcio atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:14 Daudi agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:15 Daudi agĩgĩĩta mwanake ũmwe wa arĩa maarĩ hau
2Samuel1:16 Daudi agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:17 Nake Daudi akĩrĩrĩra Saulu
2Samuel1:18 nake agĩathana atĩ ciana cia Juda ikarutwo rũĩmbo rũrũ
2Samuel1:19 Atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel1:20 Menyai mũheane ũhoro ũcio kũu Gathu
2Samuel1:21 Atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel1:22 Ũta wa Jonathani ndwahũndũkaga ũtarĩ thakame ya arĩa moragĩtwo
2Samuel1:23 Saulu na Jonathani marĩ muoyo maarĩ a kwendeka
2Samuel1:24 Atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel1:25 Hĩ! Kaĩ andũ arĩa marĩ hinya nĩmagũĩte ita-inĩ thĩinĩ-ĩ! Jonathani nĩ mũũrage
2Samuel1:26 Ndĩ na kĩeha kĩnene mũno nĩ ũndũ waku
2Samuel1:27 Hĩ! Kaĩ andũ arĩa marĩ hinya nĩmagũĩte-ĩ! O nacio indo cia ita-rĩ
2Samuel2:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Samuel2:2 Daudi agĩkĩambata agĩkinya kuo; o nao aka ake erĩ
2Samuel2:3 Ningĩ Daudi akĩambatia andũ arĩa maamũrũmĩrĩire
2Samuel2:4 Nao andũ a Juda magĩthiĩ kuo
2Samuel2:5 Nake Daudi agĩkĩrekeria andũ acio a Jabeshi-gileadi andũ
2Samuel2:6 Nake Jehova rĩu aromwĩka maũndũ mega ma tha
2Samuel2:7 Na tondũ ũcio rĩu wĩũmĩrĩriei mwĩtue njamba ki; nĩ gũkorũo Saulu mwathi wanyu nĩakuĩte
2Samuel2:8 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel2:9 nake agĩkĩmũtua mũthamaki wa Gileadi
2Samuel2:10 (Nake Ishi-boshethu ũcio wa Saulu aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aambĩrĩirie gũthamakĩra Isiraeli; agĩgĩthamaka mĩaka ĩĩrĩ.) No rĩrĩ
2Samuel2:11 Narĩo ihinda rĩrĩa Daudi aaikarire kũu Hebironi e mũthamaki wa nyũmba ya Juda
2Samuel2:12 Nake Abineri wa Neri
2Samuel2:13 Nake Joabu wa Zeruia o na ndungata cia Daudi makiumagara
2Samuel2:14 Nake Abineri agĩkĩĩra Joabu atĩrĩ
2Samuel2:15 Magĩgĩũkĩra
2Samuel2:16 Nao othe
2Samuel2:17 Nayo mbaara ĩgĩkĩĩha mũno mũthenya ũcio; nake Abineri o na andũ a Isiraeli magĩtorio nĩ ndungata cia Daudi.
2Samuel2:18 Nao ariũ arĩa atatũ a Zeruia maarĩ ho
2Samuel2:19 Nake Asaheli ũcio agĩgĩteng’eria Abineri
2Samuel2:20 Hĩndĩ ĩo Abineri agĩkĩrora na thutha wake
2Samuel2:21 Ningĩ Abineri akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel2:22 Ningĩ Abineri agĩkĩĩra Asaheli atĩrĩ
2Samuel2:23 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel2:24 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel2:25 Nacio ciana cia Benjamini igĩĩcokanĩrĩria hamwe
2Samuel2:26 Hĩndĩ ĩo Abineri agĩkĩanĩrĩra akĩĩra Joabu atĩrĩ
2Samuel2:27 Nake Joabu akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel2:28 Joabu agĩkihuha coro
2Samuel2:29 Nake Abineri na andũ ake makĩraara magĩthiĩ makĩgera Araba; magĩkĩringa Jorodani
2Samuel2:30 Nake Joabu agĩtiga gũteng’eria Abineri
2Samuel2:31 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel2:32 Nao magĩkĩoya kĩimba gĩa Asaheli magĩgĩthika mbĩrĩra ya ithe
2Samuel3:1 Na atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel3:2 Nake Daudi agĩciarĩra ihĩĩ kũu Hebironi; nake mũrũwe wa irigithathi nĩ Amunoni
2Samuel3:3 na wa kerĩ nĩ Kileabu
2Samuel3:4 na wa kana nĩ Adonija
2Samuel3:5 na wa gatandatũ
2Samuel3:6 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Samuel3:7 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel3:8 Abineri agĩkĩrakara mũno mũno nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoro ũcio wa Ishi-boshethu
2Samuel3:9 Ngai aro’thũũra niĩ
2Samuel3:10 naguo nĩ atĩ ndute ũthamaki ũyũ uume thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ya Saulu
2Samuel3:11 Nake Ishi-boshethu ndaigana kũhota gũcokeria Abineri kiugo kĩngĩ
2Samuel3:12 Nake Abineri agĩkĩrekia andũ mathiĩ kwĩ Daudi makamũhe ũhoro ũrĩa aarĩ naguo
2Samuel3:13 Nake Daudi akĩmũcokeria atĩrĩ
2Samuel3:14 Nake Daudi agĩkĩrekeria Ishi-hoshethu wa Saulu andũ
2Samuel3:15 Nake Ishi-boshethu agĩkĩrekania
2Samuel3:16 Nake mũthuriwe agĩgĩtwarana nake
2Samuel3:17 Nake Abineri agĩkĩaria na athuri a Isiraeli
2Samuel3:18 ta ĩkai ũndũ ũcio rĩu; nĩ ũndũ Jehova nĩaarĩtie ũhoro wa Daudi
2Samuel3:19 Ningĩ Abineri agĩkĩaria na andũ a Benjamini
2Samuel3:20 Nake Abineri agĩgĩthiĩ agĩkinya he Daudi o kũu Hebironi
2Samuel3:21 Nake Abineri akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
2Samuel3:22 Na atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel3:23 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel3:24 Hĩndĩ ĩo Joabu agĩgĩthiĩ agĩkinya he mũthamaki
2Samuel3:25 Githĩ ndũũĩ atĩ Abineri wa Neri okĩte gũkũhenia nĩguo atuĩrie maũndũ mothe ma ũrĩa wĩkaga ũkiuma itũũra-inĩ rĩaku
2Samuel3:26 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel3:27 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel3:28 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel3:29 ũndũ ũcio ũrocokerera Joabu na nyũmba ya ithe yothe; ningĩ thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ya Joabu gũtikanaage mũndũ ũkuura mwĩrĩ wake nĩ ũndũ wa mũthiori
2Samuel3:30 Ũguo nĩguo Joabu na Abishai
2Samuel3:31 Nake Daudi agĩkĩĩra Joabu
2Samuel3:32 Abineri agĩgĩthikwo kũu Hebironi
2Samuel3:33 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩrĩrĩra Abineri na ciugo ici: Hĩ
2Samuel3:34 Moko maku ti kuohwo maarĩ mohe
2Samuel3:35 Ningĩ andũ acio othe magĩthengerera harĩ Daudi mamũringĩrĩrie arĩe irio gũtanatuka; no rĩrĩ
2Samuel3:36 Nao andũ othe makĩona ũrĩa ũndũ ũcio wathiĩ
2Samuel3:37 Tondũ ũcio
2Samuel3:38 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩĩra ndungata ciake atĩrĩ
2Samuel3:39 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel4:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel4:2 Nake Ishi-boshethu ũcio
2Samuel4:3 nao Abeerothi magĩgĩkorũo morĩire Gitaimu
2Samuel4:4 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel4:5 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel4:6 Nao maathiire magĩtonya o kũu nyũmba thĩinĩ
2Samuel4:7 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel4:8 Naguo mũtwe ũcio wa Ishi-boshethu makĩũtwarĩra Daudi o kũu Hebironi
2Samuel4:9 Nake Daudi agĩcokeria Rekabu
2Samuel4:10 hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ aanjarĩirie akĩnjĩra ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel4:11 Kũngĩkorũo nĩ ũguo-rĩ
2Samuel4:12 Nake Daudi agĩgĩatha aanake ake
2Samuel5:1 Hĩndĩ ĩo mĩhĩrĩga yothe ya Isiraeli ĩgĩgĩthiĩ he Daudi o kũu Hebironi
2Samuel5:2 Tene hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Saulu aarĩ mũthamaki wa gũtũthamakĩra-rĩ
2Samuel5:3 Tondũ ũcio athuri othe a Isiraeli magĩthiĩ magĩkinya he mũthamaki o kũu Hebironi; nake Daudi ũcio mũthamaki akĩrĩkanĩrĩra nao kũu Hebironi mbere ya Jehova; nao magĩgĩitĩrĩria Daudi maguta atuĩke mũthamaki wa gũthamakĩra Isiraeli.
2Samuel5:4 Nake Daudi aakorirũo aninĩte mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka; agĩgĩthamaka mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna.
2Samuel5:5 Mĩaka mũgwanja na mĩeri ĩtandatũ agĩgĩthamakĩra Juda kũu Hebironi
2Samuel5:6 Nake mũthamaki na andũ ake a ita
2Samuel5:7 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel5:8 Naguo mũthenya ũcio Daudi akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel5:9 Nake Daudi agĩgĩtũũra kĩhingo-inĩ kĩu kĩa hinya
2Samuel5:10 Daudi agĩgĩkĩrĩrĩria kũgĩa na ũnene
2Samuel5:11 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel5:12 Nake Daudi agĩkĩona atĩ Jehova nĩamũhandĩte atũũre e mũthamaki wa gũthamakĩra Isiraeli
2Samuel5:13 Nake Daudi akĩĩhikĩria thuriya ingĩ
2Samuel5:14 Namo maya nĩmo marĩĩtwa ma ihĩĩ ciake iria aaciarĩire kũu Jerusalemu; nĩ Shamua
2Samuel5:15 na Ibiharu
2Samuel5:16 na Elishama
2Samuel5:17 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel5:18 Nao Afilisiti magĩgĩkorũo maambatĩte makaarania ita ciao gĩtuamba kĩa Refaimu
2Samuel5:19 nake Daudi agĩgĩtuĩria ũhoro he Jehova
2Samuel5:20 Nake Daudi agĩgĩthiĩ agĩkinya Baali-perazimu
2Samuel5:21 Nao Afilisiti magĩgĩtiga mĩhianano ya ngai ciao hau
2Samuel5:22 Ningĩ Afilisiti magĩgĩcoka makĩambata o rĩngĩ
2Samuel5:23 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel5:24 Na gũgatuĩka atĩrĩ
2Samuel5:25 Nake Daudi agĩgĩĩka ũguo
2Samuel6:1 Ningĩ Daudi agĩgĩcokereria njamba ciothe iria thure cia Isiraeli hamwe; nacio ciarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩtatũ.
2Samuel6:2 Agĩgĩũkĩra
2Samuel6:3 Narĩo ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa Ngai makĩrĩigĩrĩra igũrũ rĩa ngari njerũ
2Samuel6:4 Magĩkĩmĩruta kũu mũciĩ wa Abinadabu kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩu
2Samuel6:5 Nake Daudi
2Samuel6:6 Nao maakinya kĩhuhĩro-inĩ kĩa ngano kĩa Nakoni-rĩ
2Samuel6:7 Nake Jehova agĩgĩcinwo nĩ marakara nĩ ũndũ wa Uza; Ngai akĩmũhũrĩra o ro hau nĩ ũndũ wa ihĩtia rĩu rĩake
2Samuel6:8 Nake Daudi agĩkĩigua ũũru nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo Jehova aaguthũkĩire Uza
2Samuel6:9 Nake Daudi agĩgĩĩtigĩra Jehova mũthenya ũcio
2Samuel6:10 Na tondũ ũcio Daudi ndetĩkĩrire gũthamĩria ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa Jehova kũu aatũire
2Samuel6:11 Narĩo ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa Jehova rĩgĩikara kũu mũciĩ wa Obedi-edomu
2Samuel6:12 Naguo ũhoro ũcio ũgĩkĩheo mũthamaki Daudi
2Samuel6:13 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Samuel6:14 Ningĩ Daudi akĩinĩra mbere ya Jehova na hinya wake wothe
2Samuel6:15 Ũguo nĩguo Daudi
2Samuel6:16 Na gũgĩtuĩka atĩrĩ
2Samuel6:17 Narĩo ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa Jehova rĩgĩgĩtonyio handũ harĩo
2Samuel6:18 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel6:19 Ningĩ akĩgayanĩria andũ othe
2Samuel6:20 Nake Daudi agĩkĩhũndũka akĩinũka nĩguo akarathime andũ othe a nyũmba yake. Nake Mikali
2Samuel6:21 Nake Daudi agĩgĩcokeria Mikali atĩrĩ
2Samuel6:22 Na nĩngwĩtua ta njagĩte gĩtĩo makĩria kũrĩ ũguo ndariĩ rĩu
2Samuel6:23 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel7:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Samuel7:2 agĩkĩĩra Nathani
2Samuel7:3 Nake Nathani agĩkĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Samuel7:4 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Samuel7:5 Thiĩ ũkere ndungata yakwa Daudi atĩrĩ
2Samuel7:6 kuona atĩ ndirĩ ndaikara nyũmba kuuma mũthenya ũrĩa ndaambatirie ciana cia Isiraeli
2Samuel7:7 Atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel7:8 Na rĩu tondũ ũcio nĩ wega ũkere Daudi ndungata yakwa atĩrĩ
2Samuel7:9 na nĩnjikarĩte hamwe nawe kũndũ kũrĩa guothe wanathiĩ
2Samuel7:10 Nao andũ akwa Isiraeli nĩngũmathurĩra handũ ndĩmahande ho
2Samuel7:11 o na ta ũrĩa gwatariĩ kuuma mũthenya ũrĩa ndaathanire ngiuga atĩ atiirĩrĩri-bũrũri matuĩke a gũtiirĩrĩra andũ akwa Isiraeli. Na nĩngũkũhurũkia
2Samuel7:12 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel7:13 Mũndũ ũcio nĩwe ũgaakĩra rĩĩtwa rĩakwa nyũmba
2Samuel7:14 Na nĩ niĩ ngatuĩka ithe
2Samuel7:15 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel7:16 Naruo rũciaro rũaku
2Samuel7:17 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel7:18 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũthamaki Daudi agĩtonya nyũmba thĩinĩ
2Samuel7:19 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel7:20 Niĩ na niĩ Daudi-rĩ
2Samuel7:21 Tondũ wa ũhoro ũcio warĩtie
2Samuel7:22 Tondũ ũcio
2Samuel7:23 Ningĩ-rĩ
2Samuel7:24 Na ningĩ nĩwatũmire andũ aku
2Samuel7:25 Na rĩu Jehova Ngai
2Samuel7:26 Narĩo rĩĩtwa rĩaku tũma rĩtũũre rĩnenehagio tene na tene
2Samuel7:27 Nĩ gũkorũo wee Jehova
2Samuel7:28 Na rĩu wee Mwathani Ngai
2Samuel7:29 Na tondũ ũcio
2Samuel8:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Samuel8:2 Ningĩ akĩhũra Amoabi
2Samuel8:3 Ningĩ Daudi akĩhũra Hadadezeri
2Samuel8:4 Nake Daudi agĩkĩmũtunya andũ ngiri ĩmwe na magana mũgwanja arĩa mathiaga mahaicĩte mbarathi
2Samuel8:5 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel8:6 Thutha wa ũguo Daudi agĩkĩiga athigari a kũrangĩra kũndũ o kũndũ kũu Suriata ya Dameski; nao Asuriata magĩgĩtuĩka ndungata cia Daudi
2Samuel8:7 Nake Daudi akĩoya ngo cia thahabu iria ndungata cia Hadadezeri ciarĩ nacio
2Samuel8:8 Ningĩ mũthamaki
2Samuel8:9 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Toi
2Samuel8:10 agĩkĩrekia Joramu
2Samuel8:11 O nacio indo icio
2Samuel8:12 nacio indo icio cioimĩte Suriata
2Samuel8:13 Nake Daudi agĩkĩgĩa igweta mũno hĩndĩ ĩrĩa oimire kũhũra Asuriata andũ ngiri ikũmi na inyanya o kũu Gĩtuamba gĩa Cumbĩ.
2Samuel8:14 Ningĩ agĩkĩiga athigari a kũrangĩra kũu Edomu; nakuo kũu Edomu akĩiga athigari acio kũndũ guothe
2Samuel8:15 Daudi agĩgĩthamaka bũrũri wothe wa Isiraeli
2Samuel8:16 Nake Joabu wa Zeruia nĩwe warĩ mũnene wa mbũtũ cia ita; nake Jehoshafatu wa Ahiludu nĩwe warĩ mwandĩki maũndũ ma ihinda rĩu;
2Samuel8:17 nake Zadoku wa Ahitubu
2Samuel8:18 nake Benaia wa Jehoiada nĩwe warĩ mũrori wa Akerethi na Apelethi; nao ariũ a Daudi maarĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai.
2Samuel9:1 Nake Daudi agĩkĩũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel9:2 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel9:3 Nake mũthamaki akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel9:4 Mũthamaki agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel9:5 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũthamaki
2Samuel9:6 Nake Mefiboshethu ũcio wa Jonathani wa Saulu agĩthiĩ agĩkinya he Daudi
2Samuel9:7 Nake Daudi akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel9:8 Nake Mefiboshethu akĩĩinamia akĩmwĩnyihĩria
2Samuel9:9 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũthamaki agĩgĩĩta Ziba
2Samuel9:10 Nawe nĩwe ũrĩmũrĩmagĩra mĩgũnda
2Samuel9:11 Hĩndĩ ĩo Ziba akĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Samuel9:12 Nake Mefiboshethu aarĩ na kamwana kanini getagwo Mika. Nao andũ othe arĩa maatũũrĩte mũciĩ wa Ziba magĩgĩtuĩka ndungata cia Mefiboshethu.
2Samuel9:13 Nake Mefiboshethu agĩgĩtũũra Jerusalemu; nĩ ũndũ aarĩagĩra irio metha-inĩ ya mũthamaki hĩndĩ ciothe; nake nĩaathuaga magũrũ merĩ.

2Samuel10:3 No rĩrĩ

2Samuel11:14 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ

2Samuel11:19 nake agĩgĩatha mũndũ ũcio aareketie
2Samuel11:20 nĩgũgakinya atĩrĩ
