2Samuel11:24 Nao andũ arĩa maarathanaga na mĩguĩ me rũthingo-inĩ igũrũ magĩikia ndungata ciaku mĩguĩ; nacio ndungata imwe ciaku
2Samuel11:25 Hĩndĩ ĩo Daudi agĩkĩĩra mũndũ ũcio wareketio atĩrĩ
2Samuel11:26 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel11:27 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel12:1 Nake Jehova agĩkĩrekia Nathani he Daudi. Nake agĩgĩthiĩ agĩkinya harĩ we akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel12:2 Mũndũ ũcio wakĩrĩ gĩtonga-rĩ
2Samuel12:3 no mũndũ ũcio mũkĩa ndaarĩ na kĩndũ o na kĩ
2Samuel12:4 Nakĩo gĩtonga kĩu gĩgĩkorũo nĩ mũndũ wathiaga ũgeni
2Samuel12:5 Nake Daudi agĩgĩcinwo nĩ marakara manene nĩ ũndũ wa mũndũ ũcio
2Samuel12:6 nĩakarĩha kamwatĩ kau maita mana nĩ ũndũ wa ũndũ ũcio ekĩte
2Samuel12:7 Nake Nathani agĩkĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
2Samuel12:8 na ngĩkũhe nyũmba ya mwathi waku
2Samuel12:9 Rĩu-rĩ
2Samuel12:10 Rĩu-rĩ
2Samuel12:11 Ningĩ Jehova oiga ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel12:12 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
2Samuel12:13 Nake Daudi agĩkĩĩra Nathani atĩrĩ
2Samuel12:14 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel12:15 Nake Nathani agĩcoka agĩĩthiĩra
2Samuel12:16 Na tondũ ũcio Daudi agĩgĩthaitha Ngai mũno nĩ ũndũ wa kaana kau; agĩkĩĩhinga kũrĩa irio
2Samuel12:17 Nao athuri a gwake mũciĩ magĩũkĩra
2Samuel12:18 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Samuel12:19 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel12:20 Hĩndĩ ĩo Daudi agĩgĩũkĩra
2Samuel12:21 Hĩndĩ ĩo ndungata ciake igĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel12:22 Nake akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel12:23 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel12:24 Nake Daudi akĩhoreria mũka
2Samuel12:25 agĩgĩtwarithia ũhoro wako na Nathani ũrĩa mũnabii; nake Nathani agĩgatua Jedidia
2Samuel12:26 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel12:27 Nake Joabu agĩkĩrekeria Daudi andũ akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel12:28 Na tondũ ũcio rĩu cokanĩrĩria andũ arĩa angĩ mũkaambe hema cianyu mũhũrane na itũũra rĩrĩ
2Samuel12:29 Daudi agĩgĩcokanĩrĩria andũ othe hamwe
2Samuel12:30 O na ningĩ mũthamaki wao akĩmũruta tanji mũtwe; naguo ũritũ wayo warĩ wa taranda ĩmwe ya thahabu ĩgĩthimwo; na nĩyathecereirũo tũhiga twa goro; nayo ĩgĩgĩĩkĩrũo Daudi mũtwe. Nacio indo cia itũũra rĩu iria ciatahĩtwo agĩciumagaria; na ciarĩ nyingĩ mũno igakĩrĩrĩria.
2Samuel12:31 O nao andũ arĩa maarĩ kuo thĩinĩ akĩmoimagaria
2Samuel13:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:2 Amunoni ũcio agĩgĩtangĩka mũno o nginya akĩrũara nĩ ũndũ wa Tamaru
2Samuel13:3 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel13:4 Nake akĩũria Amunoni atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:5 Nake Jonadabu agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:6 Tondũ ũcio Amunoni agĩĩkomia
2Samuel13:7 Hĩndĩ ĩo Daudi agĩkĩrekania mũciĩ Tamaru agetwo
2Samuel13:8 Tondũ ũcio Tamaru agĩgĩthiĩ nyũmba ya mũrũ wa ithe
2Samuel13:9 Agĩcoka akĩoya rũgĩo
2Samuel13:10 Nake Amunoni akĩĩra Tamaru atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:11 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel13:12 Nake akĩmũcokeria atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:13 Niĩ na niĩ-rĩ
2Samuel13:14 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel13:15 Thutha wa ũguo Amunoni agĩcoka akĩmũthũũra gĩthũũro kĩnene mũno; nakuo gũthũũra kũu aamũthũũrire gũkĩneneha mũno gũkĩra kwenda kũrĩa aamwendete. Nake Amunoni agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:16 Nake Tamaru akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:17 Nake agĩgĩĩta ndungata yake ĩrĩa yamũtungatagĩra
2Samuel13:18 Nake mũirĩtu ũcio ehumbĩte nguo ya rangi wa mĩthemba mĩingĩ
2Samuel13:19 Nake Tamaru agĩkĩĩitĩrĩria mũhu mũtwe
2Samuel13:20 Nake Abisalomu
2Samuel13:21 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel13:22 Nake Abisalomu ndaigana gũcoka kwaria na Amunoni ũndũ o na ũrĩkũ mwega kana mũũru; nĩ gũkorũo Abisalomu nĩaathũũrire Amunoni o kũmũthũũra biũ nĩ ũndũ wa kũgwata mwarĩ wa nyina
2Samuel13:23 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:24 Abisalomu agĩgĩthiĩ he mũthamaki
2Samuel13:25 Nake mũthamaki akĩĩra Abisalomu atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:26 Hĩndĩ ĩo Abisalomu agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:27 No Abisalomu akĩmũhatĩrĩria mũno o nginya akĩreka Amunoni
2Samuel13:28 Nake Abisalomu agĩatha ndungata ciake
2Samuel13:29 Nacio ndungata cia Abisalomu igĩgĩĩka Amunoni o ta ũguo Abisalomu aaciathĩte. Hĩndĩ ĩo ariũ a mũthamaki othe makĩarahũka
2Samuel13:30 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:31 Nake mũthamaki agĩgĩũkĩra
2Samuel13:32 Nake Jonadabu
2Samuel13:33 Na tondũ ũcio mũthamaki ũyũ
2Samuel13:34 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel13:35 Nake Jonadabu agĩkĩĩra mũthamaki ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel13:36 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:37 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel13:38 Abisalomu agĩkĩũra
2Samuel13:39 Nayo ngoro ya mũthamaki Daudi ĩkeriragĩria gũthiĩ kwĩ Abisalomu; nĩ gũkorũo ha ũhoro wa Amunoni
2Samuel14:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel14:2 Nake Joabu akĩrekania itũũra rĩa Tekoa
2Samuel14:3 ũcoke ũtonye he mũthamaki
2Samuel14:4 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel14:5 Nake mũthamaki akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:6 Na niĩ ndungata yaku ya mũndũ-wa-nja ndĩrarĩ na ariũ erĩ
2Samuel14:7 Na atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel14:8 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩĩra mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:9 Nake mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio wa Tekoa agĩcoka akĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:10 Nake mũthamaki akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:11 Mũtumia ũcio agĩcokia atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:12 Nake mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:13 Mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:14 Nĩ ũndũ ithuĩ no mũhaka tũkuage
2Samuel14:15 Na rĩu
2Samuel14:16 Nĩ ũndũ mũthamaki nĩekũnjigua
2Samuel14:17 Tondũ ũcio niĩ
2Samuel14:18 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũthamaki agĩgĩcokia akĩĩra mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:19 Mũthamaki agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:20 Nake Joabu
2Samuel14:21 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩĩra Joabu ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel14:22 Nake Joabu agĩkĩĩgũithia agĩturumithia ũthiũ thĩ
2Samuel14:23 Tondũ ũcio Joabu agĩkĩarahũka agĩthiĩ Geshuru
2Samuel14:24 Nake mũthamaki agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:25 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel14:26 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel14:27 Nake Abisalomu agĩciarĩrũo ihĩĩ ithatũ
2Samuel14:28 Nake Abisalomu agĩgĩikara kũu Jerusalemu mĩaka ĩĩrĩ mĩgima atekuona ũthiũ wa mũthamaki.
2Samuel14:29 Thutha ũcio Abisalomu agĩkĩrekania Joabu agetwo
2Samuel14:30 Na tondũ ũcio agĩkĩĩra ndungata ciake atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:31 Hĩndĩ ĩo Joabu agĩgĩũkĩra
2Samuel14:32 Nake Abisalomu agĩcokeria Joabu
2Samuel14:33 Tondũ ũcio Joabu agĩgĩthiĩ he mũthamaki
2Samuel15:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:2 Nake Abisalomu akarokaga gũũkĩra rũcinĩ tene
2Samuel15:3 Nake Abisalomu agakĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:4 O na ningĩ Abisalomu akoigaga ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel15:5 Na gũgĩtuĩka atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:6 Ũguo nĩguo Abisalomu aagĩĩkaga andũ othe a Isiraeli arĩa maathiaga harĩ mũthamaki gũtuithanio macira mao; na tondũ ũcio akĩgucĩrĩria ngoro cia andũ a Isiraeli irore harĩ we.
2Samuel15:7 Na gũgĩgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:8 Nĩ gũkorũo niĩ ndungata yaku nĩndehĩtire mwĩhĩtwa hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndatũire Geshuru
2Samuel15:9 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:10 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel15:11 Nake Abisalomu agĩgĩthiĩ na andũ magana merĩ arĩa etire
2Samuel15:12 Nake Abisalomu
2Samuel15:13 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel15:14 Nake Daudi agĩkĩĩra ndungata ciake ciothe iria aarĩ nacio kũu Jerusalemu atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:15 Nacio ndungata cia mũthamaki igĩkĩmwĩra ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel15:16 Mũthamaki agĩkiumagara
2Samuel15:17 Mũthamaki agĩkiumagara
2Samuel15:18 Nacio ndungata ciake ciothe igĩkĩmũhĩtũka ikĩmũthiĩ mbere
2Samuel15:19 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũthamaki agĩkĩĩra Itai
2Samuel15:20 Kuona atĩ kũhaana ta arĩ o ira ũragĩũkire-rĩ
2Samuel15:21 Nake Itai agĩcokeria mũthamaki akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:22 Nake Daudi agĩkĩĩra Itai atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:23 Nao andũ othe a bũrũri ũcio makĩringa mũrĩmo makĩrĩraga na mũgambo mũnene; o nake mũthamaki we mwene akĩringa mũrĩmo ũrĩa wa karũũĩ ga Kidironi
2Samuel15:24 Na atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel15:25 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩĩra Zadoku atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:26 no rĩrĩ
2Samuel15:27 O na ningĩ mũthamaki agĩkĩũria Zadoku mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:28 Atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel15:29 Tondũ ũcio Zadoku na Abiatharu magĩkĩoya ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa Ngai
2Samuel15:30 Nake Daudi agĩkĩgera rĩambatĩro-inĩ rĩa kĩrĩma kĩa Mĩtamaiyũ
2Samuel15:31 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel15:32 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:33 Nake Daudi agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:34 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel15:35 Ningĩ-rĩ
2Samuel15:36 Na atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel15:37 Tondũ ũcio Hushai
2Samuel16:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel16:2 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩũria Ziba atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:3 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:4 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩĩra Ziba ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel16:5 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel16:6 Nake agĩgĩikĩria Daudi
2Samuel16:7 Nake Shimei rĩrĩa aarumanaga
2Samuel16:8 Jehova nĩwe ũtũmĩte ũcokererũo nĩ thakame yothe ya nyũmba ya Saulu
2Samuel16:9 Hĩndĩ ĩo Abishai wa Zeruia akĩũria mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:10 Nake mũthamaki agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:11 Nake Daudi agĩkĩĩra Abishai
2Samuel16:12 Hihi no gũkorũo Jehova nĩekũrora amenye ũũru ũcio njĩkĩtwo
2Samuel16:13 Tondũ ũcio Daudi na andũ ake magĩgĩĩthiĩra o ro ũguo na njĩra me rũgongo rũmwe
2Samuel16:14 Nake mũthamaki o na andũ othe arĩa maarĩ hamwe nake
2Samuel16:15 Nake Abisalomu
2Samuel16:16 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:17 Nake Abisalomu agĩkĩũria Hushai atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:18 Nake Hushai akĩĩra Abisalomu atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:19 O na ningĩ-rĩ
2Samuel16:20 Thutha wa ũguo Abisalomu agĩkĩĩra Ahithofeli atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:21 Nake Ahithofeli agĩkĩĩra Abisalomu atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:22 Tondũ ũcio magĩtambũrũkiria Abisalomu hema nyũmba-inĩ ĩo igũrũ; nake Abisalomu agĩkĩonana na thuriya cia ithe
2Samuel16:23 Nakĩo kĩrĩra kĩa Ahithofeli
2Samuel17:1 Ningĩ Ahithofeli agĩkĩĩra Abisalomu atĩrĩ
2Samuel17:2 ’thiĩ ngamũhobanĩrie rĩrĩa anogete
2Samuel17:3 ndĩgĩkũhũndũrĩre andũ othe arĩa me hamwe nake; nĩ ũndũ mũndũ ũrĩa ũgũcaria angĩũragwo
2Samuel17:4 Naguo uuge ũcio ũgĩkenia Abisalomu mũno
2Samuel17:5 Ningĩ Abisalomu agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel17:6 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel17:7 Nake Hushai agĩkĩĩra Abisalomu atĩrĩ
2Samuel17:8 Nake Hushai agĩkĩrĩrĩria kuuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel17:9 Na atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel17:10 o nake mũndũ ũrĩa njamba mũno
2Samuel17:11 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel17:12 Hĩndĩ ĩo hihi nĩtũkamũkora kũndũ kũmwe o kũrĩa angĩonekera
2Samuel17:13 O na ningĩ atĩrĩ
2Samuel17:14 Nake Abisalomu o na andũ othe a Isiraeli makiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel17:15 Hĩndĩ ĩo Hushai akĩĩra Zadoku o na Abiatharu
2Samuel17:16 Na tondũ ũcio rekania narua
2Samuel17:17 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel17:18 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel17:19 Nake mũtumia wa mũndũ ũcio akĩoya tama wa kũmathiĩkĩrĩria
2Samuel17:20 Nacio ndungata cia Abisalomu igĩthiĩ
2Samuel17:21 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Samuel17:22 Hĩndĩ ĩo Daudi akĩarahũka
2Samuel17:23 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel17:24 Hĩndĩ ĩo Daudi agĩthiĩ agĩkinya Mahanaimu. Nake Abisalomu akĩringa mũrĩmo ũrĩa ũngĩ wa Jorodani
2Samuel17:25 Nake Abisalomu agĩtua Amasa mũnene wa gwatha mbũtũ cia ita ithenya rĩa Joabu. Nake Amasa ũcio aarĩ mũrũ wa mũndũ wetagwo Ithira
2Samuel17:26 Nao Isiraeli me na Abisalomu makĩamba hema ciao bũrũri wa Gileadi.
2Samuel17:27 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Samuel17:28 magĩtwara itanda
2Samuel17:29 na ũũkĩ
2Samuel18:1 Nake Daudi agĩgĩtara andũ arĩa maarĩ hamwe nake
2Samuel18:2 Ningĩ Daudi akĩgayania andũ ikundi ithatũ
2Samuel18:3 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel18:4 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩmera atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:5 Ningĩ mũthamaki agĩgĩatha Joabu
2Samuel18:6 Andũ magĩkiumagara magĩthiĩ werũ-inĩ
2Samuel18:7 Nao andũ acio a Isiraeli makĩhũrĩrũo mũno kũu nĩ ndungata cia Daudi
2Samuel18:8 Nĩ gũkorũo ita rĩu rĩaharaganĩirie bũrũri ũcio wothe
2Samuel18:9 Nake Abisalomu agĩgĩturanĩrĩria na ndungata cia Daudi. Nake Abisalomu nĩ kũhaica aahaicĩte nyũmbũ yake
2Samuel18:10 Nake mũndũ ũmwe agĩkĩona ũndũ ũcio
2Samuel18:11 Nake Joabu agĩkĩũria mũndũ ũcio wamũheaga ũhoro ũcio atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:12 Nake mũndũ ũcio agĩkĩĩra Joabu atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:13 Na korũo ndiĩkire o ta ũguo njĩkire
2Samuel18:14 Joabu agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:15 Nao aanake ikũmi arĩa maakuuĩire Joabu indo ciake cia mbaara makĩrigicĩria mũtĩ ũcio na mbarĩ ciothe
2Samuel18:16 Nake Joabu agĩkĩhuhithia coro
2Samuel18:17 Nao magĩkĩnyita Abisalomu
2Samuel18:18 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel18:19 Hĩndĩ ĩo Ahimaazu wa Zadoku akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:20 Nake Joabu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:21 Hĩndĩ o ĩo Joabu agĩgĩcoka akĩĩra Mũkushi atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:22 Nake Ahimaazu wa Zadoku agĩkĩĩra Joabu rĩa kerĩ atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:23 No we akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:24 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel18:25 Nake mũrangĩri ũcio agĩkĩanĩrĩra akĩĩra mũthamaki ũrĩa onete. Nake mũthamaki akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:26 Thutha wa ũguo mũrangĩri ũcio akĩona mũndũ ũngĩ ateng’erete; agĩgĩĩta mũhingũri-kĩhingo
2Samuel18:27 Ningĩ mũrangĩri ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:28 Nake Ahimaazu agĩkĩanĩrĩra akĩĩra mũthamaki ũũ: Ũhoro nĩ mwega. Agĩkĩinamĩrĩra o hau mbere ya mũthamaki aturumithĩtie ũthiũ thĩ
2Samuel18:29 Nake mũthamaki akĩũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:30 Nake mũthamaki agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:31 Na atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel18:32 Mũthamaki agĩkĩũria Mũkushi ũcio atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:33 Nake mũthamaki agĩgĩtuĩka nda mũno
2Samuel19:1 Nake Joabu agĩkĩheo ũhoro akĩĩrũo ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel19:2 Nakuo kũhootana kũrĩa kwahootanĩtwo mũthenya ũcio
2Samuel19:3 Nao andũ magĩgĩtonya itũũra-inĩ mũthenya ũcio na hitho
2Samuel19:4 Nake mũthamaki akĩĩhumba ũthiũ
2Samuel19:5 Nake Joabu agĩgĩthiĩ nyũmba kwĩ mũthamaki
2Samuel19:6 kuona atĩ wee wendaga arĩa magũthũũrĩte
2Samuel19:7 Tondũ ũcio gĩũkĩre uumagare
2Samuel19:8 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũthamaki agĩkĩarahũka
2Samuel19:9 Nao andũ othe thĩinĩ wa mĩhĩrĩga yothe ya Isiraeli maakorirũo magĩteta makiugaga atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:10 Nake Abisalomu
2Samuel19:11 Nake mũthamaki Daudi agĩkĩrekania gwĩ Zadoku na Abiatharu
2Samuel19:12 Inyuĩ nĩ inyuĩ ariũ a baba
2Samuel19:13 Ningĩ ĩrai Amasa atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:14 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩgucĩrĩria ngoro cia andũ othe a Juda irore harĩ we
2Samuel19:15 Tondũ ũcio mũthamaki agĩgĩcoka
2Samuel19:16 Nake Shimei
2Samuel19:17 Nakuo gũgĩkorũo kwarĩ andũ ngiri ĩmwe a Benjamini maarĩ hamwe nake
2Samuel19:18 Naho hagĩkĩrehwo gĩtarũ kĩringie andũ a nyũmba ya mũthamaki
2Samuel19:19 Nake agĩkĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:20 Nĩ gũkorũo niĩ
2Samuel19:21 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel19:22 Nake Daudi agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:23 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩĩra Shimei atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:24 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel19:25 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:26 Nake agĩcokia akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:27 Nayo ndungata ĩo yakwa ĩkĩnjukanĩrĩra harĩ wee
2Samuel19:28 Tondũ-rĩ
2Samuel19:29 Nake mũthamaki akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:30 Nake Mefiboshethu akĩĩra mũthamaki ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel19:31 Ningĩ Barizilai
2Samuel19:32 Nake Barizilai aakĩrĩ mũthuri mũkũrũ mũno
2Samuel19:33 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩĩra Barizilai atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:34 Nake Barizilai akĩũria mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:35 Hau ndĩ ũmũthĩ-rĩ
2Samuel19:36 Aca
2Samuel19:37 Reka niĩ
2Samuel19:38 Nake mũthamaki agĩgĩcokia atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:39 Nao andũ acio othe magĩkĩringa Jorodani
2Samuel19:40 Mũthamaki agĩkĩringa agĩthiĩ Giligali
2Samuel19:41 Na atĩrĩrĩ
2Samuel19:42 Nao andũ acio othe a Juda magĩgĩcokeria Aisiraeli acio atĩrĩ
2Samuel19:43 Nao Aisiraeli acio magĩcokeria andũ acio a Juda
2Samuel20:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel20:2 Tondũ ũcio Aisiraeli othe magĩgĩtiga kũrũmĩrĩra Daudi
2Samuel20:3 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel20:4 Ningĩ mũthamaki agĩkĩĩra Amasa atĩrĩ
2Samuel20:5 Tondũ ũcio Amasa agĩgĩthiĩ gwĩta andũ a Juda macokanĩrĩre hamwe; no rĩrĩ
2Samuel20:6 Nake Daudi agĩkĩĩra Abishai atĩrĩ
2Samuel20:7 Naho hagĩkiumagara andũ arĩa maarĩ a Joabu
2Samuel20:8 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel20:9 Nake Joabu agĩkĩũria Amasa atĩrĩ
2Samuel20:10 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel20:11 Naho hau hagĩgĩtigwo mũndũ ũmwe wa aanake a Joabu arũgamĩte ho
2Samuel20:12 Nake Amasa aakorirũo akomete egaragarĩtie thakame-inĩ yake o njĩra-inĩ ya gĩtwari gatagatĩ. Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel20:13 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel20:14 Nake Sheba agĩgĩthiĩ akĩgera mabũrũri mothe ma mĩhĩrĩga ya Isiraeli
2Samuel20:15 Nao aa Joabu magĩgĩthiĩ makĩmũthiũrũrũkĩria o kũu Abeli
2Samuel20:16 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũndũ-wa-nja ũmwe mũũgĩ wa itũũra rĩu akĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel20:17 Nake agĩthiathia hakuhĩ nake; nake mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel20:18 Nake agĩkĩmwarĩria
2Samuel20:19 Niĩ-rĩ
2Samuel20:20 Nake Joabu agĩcokia akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel20:21 Ũhoro ndũtariĩ ũguo; no nĩ mũndũ ũmwe wa bũrũri ũrĩa wĩ irĩma nyingĩ wa Efiraimu
2Samuel20:22 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio agĩgĩthiĩ harĩ andũ akĩaria nao na ũũgĩ. Nao magĩtinia Sheba ũcio wa Bikiri mũtwe
2Samuel20:23 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel20:24 nake Adoramu nĩwe warĩ mũnene wa kũrutithia igoti
2Samuel20:25 nake Sheva nĩwe warĩ mwandĩki-marũa
2Samuel20:26 o nake Ira
2Samuel21:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel21:2 Nake mũthamaki agĩgĩĩta Agibeoni
2Samuel21:3 Daudi agĩkĩũria Agibeoni acio atĩrĩ
2Samuel21:4 Nao Agibeoni acio makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel21:5 Nao magĩkĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Samuel21:6 nĩtũrutĩrũo andũ mũgwanja thĩinĩ wa ariũ ake
2Samuel21:7 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel21:8 No mũthamaki nĩaanyitire ariũ a Rizipa
2Samuel21:9 nake akĩmaneana harĩ Agibeoni
2Samuel21:10 Nake Rizipa
2Samuel21:11 Nake Daudi agĩkĩheo ũhoro wa ũrĩa Rizipa
2Samuel21:12 Nake Daudi agĩgĩthiĩ akĩoithia mahĩndĩ ma Saulu
2Samuel21:13 agĩkĩambatia mahĩndĩ macio ma Saulu
2Samuel21:14 Nao andũ magĩgĩthika mahĩndĩ ma Saulu na Jonathani mũrũwe
2Samuel21:15 Nao Afilisiti magĩgĩcoka kũgĩa na mbaara rĩngĩ na Isiraeli; nake Daudi agĩikũrũka e hamwe na ndungata ciake
2Samuel21:16 Hĩndĩ ĩo Ishibi-benobu
2Samuel21:17 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel21:18 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Samuel21:19 Ningĩ gũkĩgĩa mbaara o hĩndĩ ĩngĩ kũu Gobu ya kũhũranwo na Afilisiti; nake Elihanani
2Samuel21:20 O na ningĩ gũgĩcoka gũkĩgĩa mbaara o hĩndĩ ĩngĩ kũu Gathu
2Samuel21:21 Na rĩrĩa ogitire Isiraeli
2Samuel21:22 Andũ acio ana-rĩ
2Samuel22:1 Nake Daudi agĩkĩarĩria Jehova na ciugo cia rũĩmbo rũrũ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jehova aamũhonokirie akĩmũruta moko-inĩ ma thũ ciake ciothe
2Samuel22:2 agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel22:3 Nĩwe Mũrungu
2Samuel22:4 Ngayagĩra Jehova
2Samuel22:5 Ndihũ cia gĩkuũ nĩciahĩtĩrĩirie
2Samuel22:6 Mĩgeto ya Kwa-ngoma nĩyo yeĩ’thiorereirie
2Samuel22:7 Ndĩ na mĩnyamaro ĩo
2Samuel22:8 Hĩndĩ ĩo thĩ ĩgĩkĩrika kwerera o ĩgĩtetemaga
2Samuel22:9 Hagĩkĩambata ndogo yumĩte maniũrũ-inĩ make
2Samuel22:10 Agĩcuhĩrĩria matu
2Samuel22:11 Nake agĩgĩthiĩ akuuĩtwo nĩ kerubi
2Samuel22:12 Nayo nduma aamĩtuire ta hema ĩmũthiũrũrũkĩirie na mĩena yothe
2Samuel22:13 Tondũ wa ũkengi ũrĩa warĩ harĩ we
2Samuel22:14 We Jehova agĩkĩrurumia marurumĩ e kũu matu-inĩ
2Samuel22:15 Aaikanirie mĩguĩ
2Samuel22:16 Hĩndĩ ĩo ndĩra cia iria ĩkĩonekana
2Samuel22:17 Aatambũrũkirie guoko arĩ o igũrũ
2Samuel22:18 Nĩaa’honokirie akĩndeithũra harĩ thũ yakwa ĩrĩa yarĩ na hinya
2Samuel22:19 Maa’harũkĩire mũthenya ũrĩa ndarĩ na mũtino
2Samuel22:20 Aanyumirie na nja
2Samuel22:21 Jehova aa’thukĩire maũndũ maringaine na ũthingu wakwa; O ta ũguo moko makwa matherete-rĩ
2Samuel22:22 Nĩ ũndũ ndũire nũmĩrĩire njĩra cia Jehova
2Samuel22:23 Nĩ gũkorũo matuĩro make mothe maaikaraga o mbere yakwa
2Samuel22:24 O na ningĩ ngĩonwo nĩwe-rĩ
2Samuel22:25 Tondũ ũcio Jehova nĩa’thukĩire ithuka rĩringaine na ũthingu wakwa
2Samuel22:26 Wee-rĩ
2Samuel22:27 Harĩ ũrĩa mwĩtheria ũrĩĩonanagia wĩ mũtheru
2Samuel22:28 Nao arĩa athĩnie-rĩ
2Samuel22:29 Nĩ ũndũ atĩrĩ
2Samuel22:30 Amu tondũ waku ndahota gũtharĩkĩra mbũtũ ng’ima
2Samuel22:31 Mũrungu-rĩ
2Samuel22:32 Amu-rĩ
2Samuel22:33 Mũrungu nĩwe kĩhingo gĩakwa kĩrĩa kĩrũmu mũno
2Samuel22:34 Atũmaga magũrũ makwa magĩe ihenya ta ma thwariga ya mũgoma
2Samuel22:35 Wee nĩwe ũmenyithagia moko makwa mũrũĩre wa mbaara
2Samuel22:36 O na ningĩ-rĩ
2Samuel22:37 Wee nĩwe ũnjaramĩirie ũthiĩro wa makinya makwa
2Samuel22:38 Thũ ciakwa ndĩciteng’eretie ngacinina biũ
2Samuel22:39 Nĩ kũnina ndĩcininĩte biũ
2Samuel22:40 Nĩ ũndũ wee ũ’hotorete ũhoti wa kũrũa mbaara
2Samuel22:41 O na ũgĩtũma thũ ciakwa inyonie ciande
2Samuel22:42 Nĩmaacũthangĩrĩirie
2Samuel22:43 Hĩndĩ ĩo ngĩkĩmamemenda magĩtuĩka o ta rũkũngũ rũa thĩ
2Samuel22:44 Ningĩ nĩwe ũ’honoketie
2Samuel22:45 Andũ a kũngĩ-rĩ
2Samuel22:46 Andũ acio a kũngĩ-rĩ
2Samuel22:47 Jehova atũũraga muoyo; o we rũaro rũakwa rũa ihiga arogathwo; We Ngai ũrĩa rũaro rũa ihiga rũa ũhonokio wakwa arotũũra atũũgĩrĩte;
2Samuel22:48 Nowe Mũrungu ũrĩa ũndĩhagĩria
2Samuel22:49 Nĩwe ũnyumagaragia akanduta harĩ thũ ciakwa; Ĩĩ-ni
2Samuel22:50 Tondũ ũcio no ngũcokagĩrie ngatho
2Samuel22:51 Mũthamaki wake-rĩ
2Samuel23:1 NA RĨRĨ
2Samuel23:2 Roho wa Jehova nĩ kwaria aaririe na kanua gakwa
2Samuel23:3 Ngai wa Isiraeli oigire atĩrĩ
2Samuel23:4 Agatuĩka o ta ũtheri ũrĩa ũtheraga rũcinĩ riũa rĩaratha
2Samuel23:5 Githĩ ũguo tiguo nyũmba yakwa ĩtariĩ ĩkĩonwo nĩ Mũrungu? Nĩ ũndũ nĩaarĩkanĩire na niĩ kĩrĩkanĩro gĩa gũtũũra tene na tene
2Samuel23:6 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel23:7 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel23:8 Maya nĩmo marĩĩtwa ma andũ arĩa maarĩ njamba arĩa Daudi aarĩ nao; wa mbere-rĩ
2Samuel23:9 Nake ũrĩa wamũrũmĩrĩire nĩ Eleazaru
2Samuel23:10 mũndũ ũcio agĩgĩũkĩra akĩhũra Afilisiti o nginya rĩrĩa aanogire guoko
2Samuel23:11 Na thutha wake kwarĩ Shama
2Samuel23:12 Shama aarũgamire mũgũnda-inĩ ũcio gatagatĩ akĩgiria Afilisiti maũkinye
2Samuel23:13 Ningĩ thĩinĩ wa arĩa mĩrongo ĩtatũ anene
2Samuel23:14 Nake Daudi hĩndĩ ĩo agĩkorũo arĩ kĩhingo-inĩ gĩakĩtwo na hinya
2Samuel23:15 Nake Daudi aaigua abataire mũno
2Samuel23:16 Nao andũ acio atatũ njamba irĩ hinya
2Samuel23:17 Nake agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel23:18 Nake Abishai
2Samuel23:19 Githĩ tiwe wagĩtĩĩkire mũno thĩinĩ wa acio atatũ
2Samuel23:20 Nake Benaia wa Jehoiada
2Samuel23:21 na ningĩ akĩũraga Mũmisiri warĩ karau akĩonwo; nake Mũmisiri ũcio aarĩ na itimũ guoko; no rĩrĩ
2Samuel23:22 Maũndũ macio nĩmo mekirũo nĩ Benaia
2Samuel23:23 Mũndũ ũcio agĩgĩtĩĩka mũno gũkĩra acio angĩ mĩrongo ĩtatũ; no rĩrĩ
2Samuel23:24 Nake Asaheli
2Samuel23:25 na Shama
2Samuel23:26 na Helezu
2Samuel23:27 na Abiezeri
2Samuel23:28 na Zalimoni
2Samuel23:29 na Helebu
2Samuel23:30 na Benaia
2Samuel23:31 na Abi-aliboni
2Samuel23:32 na Eliaba
2Samuel23:33 na Shama
2Samuel23:34 na Elifeleti
2Samuel23:35 na Herezo
2Samuel23:36 na Igali
2Samuel23:37 na Zeleku
2Samuel23:38 na Ira
2Samuel23:39 na Uria
2Samuel24:1 Ningĩ Jehova agĩcinwo nĩ marakara nĩ ũndũ wa Isiraeli
2Samuel24:2 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩĩra Joabu
2Samuel24:3 Nake Joabu agĩkĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Samuel24:4 No rĩrĩ
2Samuel24:5 Nao makĩringa Jorodani
2Samuel24:6 Na thutha wa ũguo magĩkinya Gileadi
2Samuel24:7 magĩcoka magĩkinya kĩhingo-inĩ kĩrĩa kĩrũmu gĩa Turo
2Samuel24:8 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel24:9 Nake Joabu agĩkĩhe mũthamaki ũhoro wa ũrĩa andũ acio maaiganaga maatarũo; na rĩrĩ
2Samuel24:10 Nayo ngoro ya Daudi ĩkĩmũtheca mũno
2Samuel24:11 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel24:12 Thiĩ warie na Daudi
2Samuel24:13 Tondũ ũcio Gadi agĩgĩthiĩ agĩkinya he Daudi
2Samuel24:14 Nake Daudi agĩkĩĩra Gadi atĩrĩ
2Samuel24:15 Tondũ ũcio Jehova agĩgĩtwarithĩria Isiraeli mũrimũ mũũru kuuma o rũcinĩ rũu o nginya ihinda rĩrĩa rĩatuĩtwo; nakuo kũu bũrũri ũcio kuuma Dani o nginya Biri-shiba gũgĩkua andũ ngiri mĩrongo mũgwanja.
2Samuel24:16 Na rĩrĩ
2Samuel24:17 Nake Daudi agĩkĩaria na Jehova ona mũraika ũcio waninaga andũ
2Samuel24:18 Nake Gadi agĩkinya he Daudi mũthenya o ro ũcio
2Samuel24:19 Nake Daudi agĩkĩambata o ta ũguo Gadi oigĩte
2Samuel24:20 Nake Arauna agĩgĩcũthĩrĩria
2Samuel24:21 Arauna agĩkĩũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel24:22 Nake Arauna akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
2Samuel24:23 indo icio ciothe
2Samuel24:24 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩĩra Arauna atĩrĩ
2Samuel24:25 Nake Daudi agĩgĩakĩra Jehova kĩgongona hau
1Kings1:1 NA RĨRĨ
1Kings1:2 Tondũ ũcio ndungata ciake igĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings1:3 Magĩkĩmatha mũirĩtu mũthaka kũndũ guothe bũrũri wa Isiraeli
1Kings1:4 Mũirĩtu ũcio aakĩrĩ mũthaka mũno; nake agĩtuĩka mũmenyereri mũthamaki
1Kings1:5 Hĩndĩ ĩo Adonija
1Kings1:6 Nake ithe o na mbere ya hĩndĩ ĩo ndarĩ aamũrakaria na ũndũ wa kũmũũria
1Kings1:7 Nake agĩgĩciranĩra na Joabu wa Zeruia na Abiatharu mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai
1Kings1:8 No rĩrĩ
1Kings1:9 Nake Adonija agĩthĩnjĩra ndũrũme na ndegwa o na nyamũ noru ihiga-inĩ rĩa Zohelethu
1Kings1:10 no rĩrĩ
1Kings1:11 Hĩndĩ ĩo Nathani agĩkĩaria na Bathi-sheba
1Kings1:12 Tondũ ũcio ndagũthaitha ũũke
1Kings1:13 Ũkĩra ũthiĩ ũtonye he mũthamaki Daudi
1Kings1:14 Na atĩrĩrĩ
1Kings1:15 Bathi-sheba agĩgĩtonya he mũthamaki kanyũmba thĩinĩ; nake mũthamaki aarĩ mũkũrũ mũno
1Kings1:16 Nake Bathi-sheba agĩkĩinamĩrĩra mũthamaki amwĩnyihĩrie. Mũthamaki agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Kings1:17 Nake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings1:18 Na atĩrĩrĩ
1Kings1:19 na rĩu nĩathĩnjithĩtie ndegwa
1Kings1:20 Nawe rĩu
1Kings1:21 Ũngĩaga gwĩka ũguo-rĩ
1Kings1:22 Na atĩrĩrĩ
1Kings1:23 Nao andũ magĩkĩhe mũthamaki ũhoro makiuga ũũ: Nathani mũnabii ũyũ. Nake aatonya harĩ mũthamaki
1Kings1:24 Nake Nathani agĩkĩũria ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
1Kings1:25 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
1Kings1:26 No rĩrĩ
1Kings1:27 Kaĩ ũndũ ũcio ũgĩĩkĩtwo nĩwe
1Kings1:28 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũthamaki Daudi agĩgĩcokia akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings1:29 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩĩhĩta
1Kings1:30 ti-itherũ o ta ũrĩa ndehĩtire hĩndĩ ĩo ngĩkwĩra na mwĩhĩtwa ũkoniĩ Jehova Ngai wa Isiraeli
1Kings1:31 Hĩndĩ ĩo Bathi-sheba akĩinamĩrĩra
1Kings1:32 Mũthamaki Daudi agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings1:33 Mũthamaki agĩkĩmera ũũ: Oyai ndungata ciakwa
1Kings1:34 Na mwĩ kũu
1Kings1:35 Mũgĩcoke mwambate mũmuumĩte thutha
1Kings1:36 Nake Benaia wa Jehoiada agĩcokeria mũthamaki
1Kings1:37 O ta ũrĩa Jehova aikarĩte hamwe nawe
1Kings1:38 Tondũ ũcio Zadoku mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai
1Kings1:39 Nake Zadoku mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai akĩoya rũhĩa rũa gũitanĩrĩria maguta arũrutĩte Hema-inĩ ya Ngai
1Kings1:40 Nao andũ othe magĩkĩambata mamuumĩte thutha
1Kings1:41 Nake Adonija o na ageni othe arĩa maarĩ hamwe nake makĩigua kayũ kau o hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maakorirũo maanina kũrĩa. Na rĩrĩ
1Kings1:42 Na ihinda o rĩu aaragia
1Kings1:43 Nake Jonathani agĩcokia akĩĩra Adonija atĩrĩ
1Kings1:44 nake nĩareketie Zadoku mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai
1Kings1:45 ningĩ Zadoku mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai
1Kings1:46 O na ningĩ rĩu Suleimani nĩaikarĩire gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene gĩa ũthamaki.
1Kings1:47 Makĩria ningĩ ndungata cia mũthamaki nĩithiire kũrathimithia mũthamaki Daudi
1Kings1:48 O na ningĩ mũthamaki oiga ũũ: Jehova Ngai wa Isiraeli arogathwo
1Kings1:49 Nao ageni othe a Adonija magĩkĩgwatwo nĩ guoya
1Kings1:50 Nake Adonija agĩgĩĩtigĩra nĩ ũndũ wa Suleimani; agĩgĩũkĩra
1Kings1:51 Naguo ũhoro ũcio ũkĩheo Suleimani
1Kings1:52 Nake Suleimani agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings1:53 Tondũ ũcio mũthamaki Suleimani agĩkĩrekania
1Kings2:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings2:2 Nĩngwĩthiĩra na njĩra ĩrĩa ĩgeragwo nĩ andũ othe a gũkũ thĩ; tondũ ũcio gĩa na hinya
1Kings2:3 na ũikarage ũmenyereire maũndũ marĩa Jehova Ngai waku aathanĩte
1Kings2:4 nĩ getha Jehova atũũre arũmĩtie ũhoro ũrĩa aaririe ũngoniĩ
1Kings2:5 O na ningĩ atĩrĩ
1Kings2:6 Tondũ ũcio mũtware o ta ũrĩa ũũgĩ waku ũtariĩ
1Kings2:7 No rĩrĩ
1Kings2:8 Na atĩrĩrĩ
1Kings2:9 No rĩrĩ
1Kings2:10 Thutha ũcio Daudi agĩgĩkoma hamwe na maithe
1Kings2:11 Nayo mĩthenya ĩrĩa Daudi aathamakĩire Isiraeli
1Kings2:12 Nake Suleimani agĩgĩikarĩra gĩtĩ gĩa ũthamaki gĩa ithe Daudi; naguo ũthamaki wake ũkĩhandwo ũgĩtũũra ũrũmĩte mũno.
1Kings2:13 Hĩndĩ ĩo Adonija
1Kings2:14 Ningĩ agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings2:15 Agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings2:16 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings2:17 Nake akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings2:18 Nake Bathi-sheba agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings2:19 Tondũ ũcio Bathi-sheba agĩthiĩ he mũthamaki Suleimani
1Kings2:20 Nake agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings2:21 Nake akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings2:22 Nake mũthamaki Suleimani agĩcokeria nyina akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Kings2:23 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũthamaki Suleimani agĩkĩĩhĩta mwĩhĩtwa ũkoniĩ Jehova
1Kings2:24 Na tondũ wa ũhoro ũcio
1Kings2:25 Mũthamaki Suleimani agĩkĩrekia Benaia wa Jehoiada
1Kings2:26 Naho ha ũhoro wa Abiatharu mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai
1Kings2:27 Ũguo nĩguo Suleimani aakĩingatire Abiatharu
1Kings2:28 Naguo ũhoro ũcio ũgĩkinyĩra Joabu
1Kings2:29 Naguo ũhoro ũcio ũkĩheo mũthamaki Suleimani
1Kings2:30 Nake Benaia agĩthiĩ
1Kings2:31 Nake mũthamaki akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings2:32 Nake Jehova nĩegũtũma thakame yake ĩmũcokerere we mwene
1Kings2:33 Ũguo noguo thakame yao ĩgacokerera Joabu o na rũciaro rũake tene na tene; no rĩrĩ
1Kings2:34 Hĩndĩ ĩo Benaia wa Jehoiada agĩkĩambata
1Kings2:35 Nake mũthamaki agĩtua Benaia wa Jehoiada mũnene wa mbũtũ cia ita ithenya rĩake; nake Zadoku mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai-rĩ
1Kings2:36 Nake mũthamaki akĩrekania Shimei agĩĩtwo
1Kings2:37 Nĩ gũkorũo mũthenya ũrĩa ũkoima kuo
1Kings2:38 Nake Shimei agĩcokeria mũthamaki atĩrĩ
1Kings2:39 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings2:40 Nake Shimei agĩkĩarahũka
1Kings2:41 Naguo ũhoro ũcio ũkĩheo Suleimani
1Kings2:42 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩrekania Shimei agĩĩtwo
1Kings2:43 Rĩu-rĩ
1Kings2:44 Ningĩ mũthamaki akĩĩra Shimei atĩrĩ
1Kings2:45 No rĩrĩ
1Kings2:46 Tondũ ũcio mũthamaki agĩgĩatha Benaia wa Jehoiada; nake akiumagara
1Kings3:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings3:2 No rĩrĩ
1Kings3:3 Nake Suleimani agĩtũũra endete Jehova
1Kings3:4 Nake mũthamaki agĩgĩthiĩ Gibeoni akarutĩre igongona kuo; nĩ ũndũ kũu nĩkuo kwarĩ itĩri rĩrĩa rĩekĩrĩirũo mũno; Suleimani agĩkĩrutĩra nyamũ ngiri ĩmwe cia mahaki ma njino kĩgongona-inĩ kĩu.
1Kings3:5 Nakuo kũu Gibeoni Jehova akiumĩrĩra Suleimani na njĩra ya kĩroto ũtukũ; nake Ngai akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings3:6 Nake Suleimani akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings3:7 Na rĩu wee
1Kings3:8 Ningĩ niĩ
1Kings3:9 Tondũ ũcio
1Kings3:10 Naguo uuge ũcio ũgĩgĩkenia Jehova
1Kings3:11 Nake Ngai agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings3:12 tondũ ũcio-rĩ
1Kings3:13 O na ningĩ indo iria ũtahoete o nacio nĩndakũhe
1Kings3:14 O na ningĩ ũngĩĩtĩkĩra gũthiaga na mĩthiĩre ya kũnũmĩrĩra
1Kings3:15 Nake Suleimani agĩgĩũkĩra toro
1Kings3:16 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings3:17 Nake mũndũ-wa-nja ũmwe akiuga ũũ: Hĩ! Atĩrĩrĩ
1Kings3:18 Na kũrakinya atĩrĩ
1Kings3:19 Nako kaana ka mũndũ-wa-nja ũyũ karakua ũtukũ
1Kings3:20 Nake arokĩra ũtukũ gatagatĩ
1Kings3:21 No rĩrĩ
1Kings3:22 Nake mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio ũngĩ akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings3:23 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũthamaki agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings3:24 Nake mũthamaki agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings3:25 Nake mũthamaki agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings3:26 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũndũ-wa-nja ũrĩa warĩ mwene kama kau kaarĩ muoyo akĩarĩria mũthamaki nĩ gũikio nĩ ngoro nĩ ũndũ wa kaana kau gake
1Kings3:27 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũthamaki agĩgĩcokia ũhoro akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings3:28 Nao Isiraeli othe makĩigua ituĩro rĩa cira ũcio rĩrĩa rĩatuĩtwo nĩ mũthamaki; nao magĩgĩĩtigĩra mũthamaki ũcio; nĩ gũkorũo nĩmonire atĩ ũũgĩ wa Ngai warĩ thĩinĩ wake atuage cira na kĩhooto.
1Kings4:1 Nake Suleimani ũcio mũthamaki agĩgĩthamakĩra Aisiraeli othe.
1Kings4:2 Nao anene arĩa aarĩ nao nĩ aya: nĩ Azaria wa Zadoku
1Kings4:3 na Elihorefu na Ahija
1Kings4:4 nake Benaia wa Jehoiada nĩwe warĩ mũnene wa mbũtũ cia ita; nao Zadoku na Abiatharu nĩo maarĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai;
1Kings4:5 nake Azaria wa Nathani aarĩ mwathi wa anyabara arĩa angĩ; nake Zabudu wa Nathani aarĩ mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai
1Kings4:6 nake Ahisharu aarĩ mwathi wa andũ othe arĩa maatũire nyũmba ya mũthamaki; o nake Adoniramu wa Abida nĩwe waathaga andũ a kĩaro.
1Kings4:7 Ningĩ Suleimani aarĩ na anyabara ikũmi na erĩ arĩa maatuĩtwo arori a Aisiraeli othe; nao nĩo maamathagĩra mũthamaki
1Kings4:8 Namo marĩĩtwa mao nĩ maya: Beni-huri
1Kings4:9 o nake Beni-dekeri
1Kings4:10 o nake Beni-hesedi kũu Arubothu
1Kings4:11 o nake Beni-abinadabu kũu bũrũri ũrĩa mũtũũgĩru wa Dori; nake nĩwe wahikĩtie Tafathu
1Kings4:12 o nake Baana wa Akiludu kũu Taanaka
1Kings4:13 o nake Beni-geberi
1Kings4:14 o nake Ahinadabu wa Ido kũu Mahanaimu;
1Kings4:15 o nake Ahimaazu kũu Nafitali; nake nĩwe wahikirie Basemathu
1Kings4:16 o nake Baana wa Hushai kũu Asheri na Bealothu;
1Kings4:17 o nake Jehoshafatu wa Parua
1Kings4:18 O nake Shimei wa Ela kũu Benjamini;
1Kings4:19 o nake Geberi wa Uri kũu bũrũri wa Gileadi
1Kings4:20 Nao andũ a Juda o na a Isiraeli maarĩ aingĩ mũno makaigana o ta mũthanga ũrĩa ũrĩ hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia iria nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa maaingĩhĩte
1Kings4:21 Nake Suleimani agĩgĩtũũra aathaga mothamaki mothe kuuma Rũũĩ rũa Farati o nginya bũrũri wa Afilisiti
1Kings4:22 Nacio irio iria ciatwaragwo gwa Suleimani mũthenya ũmwe ciarĩ kori mĩrongo ĩtatũ cia mũtu mũhinyu mũno
1Kings4:23 na ndegwa ikũmi noru
1Kings4:24 Nĩ ũndũ nĩwe waathaga bũrũri wothe wa mũrĩmo ũyũ wa Rũũĩ rũa Farati
1Kings4:25 Nao Juda na Isiraeli magĩgĩtũũra matarĩ na ũgwati
1Kings4:26 Nake Suleimani aakĩrĩ na tũnyũmba ngiri mĩrongo ĩna twa mbarathi ciake cia ngari cia ita
1Kings4:27 Nao anyabara acio
1Kings4:28 O nayo cairi na rũũa rũa ngano cia kũrĩo nĩ mbarathi na nyamũ iria ingĩ cia ihenya
1Kings4:29 Nake Ngai agĩkĩhe Suleimani ũũgĩ
1Kings4:30 Naguo ũũgĩ ũcio wa Suleimani ũgĩkĩra mũno ũũgĩ wa ciana ciothe cia mwena wa irathĩro
1Kings4:31 Nĩ gũkorũo aarĩ mũũgĩ gũkĩra andũ arĩa angĩ othe; o na gũkĩra Ethani
1Kings4:32 Nake nĩaathugundire thimo ngiri ithatũ
1Kings4:33 Na ningĩ akĩaria ũhoro wa mĩtĩ
1Kings4:34 Nao andũ a ndũrĩrĩ ciothe moimĩte harĩ athamaki othe a thĩ
1Kings5:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings5:2 Nake Suleimani agĩkĩrekania harĩ Hiramu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings5:3 Wee nĩũũĩ ũrĩa baba
1Kings5:4 No rĩrĩ
1Kings5:5 Na atĩrĩrĩ
1Kings5:6 Na tondũ ũcio athana rĩu atĩ andũ mandemere mĩtarakwa kũu Lebanoni; nacio ndungata ciakwa ciĩturanĩre na ndungata ciaku
1Kings5:7 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings5:8 Nake Hiramu agĩkĩrekania he Suleimani
1Kings5:9 Ndungata ciakwa nĩikamĩikũrũkia
1Kings5:10 Hiramu agĩkĩhe Suleimani mĩgogo ya mĩtarakwa
1Kings5:11 Nake Suleimani agĩkĩhe Hiramu kori ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ cia ngano
1Kings5:12 Nake Jehova akĩhe Suleimani ũũgĩ
1Kings5:13 Ningĩ Suleimani akĩnyitithia a kĩaro thĩinĩ wa andũ othe a Isiraeli gĩa kũruta wĩra
1Kings5:14 Nake agĩkĩmatwarithia Lebanoni
1Kings5:15 Ningĩ Suleimani aarĩ na andũ ngiri mĩrongo mũgwanja arĩa maakuuaga mĩrigo
1Kings5:16 hamwe na anyabara ake arĩa anene ngiri ithatũ na magana matatũ a gwatha aruti wĩra.
1Kings5:17 Nake mũthamaki agĩatha andũ
1Kings5:18 Nao aaki a Suleimani
1Kings6:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings6:2 Nayo nyũmba ĩrĩa Suleimani ũcio mũthamaki aakĩire Jehova yarĩ ya mĩkono mĩrongo ĩtandatũ kũraiha
1Kings6:3 Nakĩo gĩthaku kĩrĩa kĩarĩ mbere ya handũ harĩa hatheru ha nyũmba ĩo nene
1Kings6:4 Nayo nyũmba ĩo akĩmĩthondekithĩria ndirica cia mĩtĩ ĩhĩtũkanganĩtio.
1Kings6:5 Nakuo kũu mwena wa na nja wa rũthingo rũa nyũmba ĩo nene agĩgwakithia nyũmba ingĩ irigicĩirie igwataine na rũthingo rũu
1Kings6:6 Naho ha ũhoro wa nyũmba iria ciarigĩtie thĩ o thĩ
1Kings6:7 Nayo nyũmba ĩo ĩgĩakwo-rĩ
1Kings6:8 Naguo mũromo wa gũtonya tũnyũmba tũu twa mĩena-inĩ twa thĩ o thĩ
1Kings6:9 Agĩgĩaka nyũmba ĩo
1Kings6:10 Natuo tũnyũmba tũu twarĩ mĩena-inĩ yothe ya nyũmba ĩo nene
1Kings6:11 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings6:12 Ha ũhoro wa nyũmba ĩno ũgwaka-rĩ
1Kings6:13 Na nĩngatũũra thĩinĩ wa ciana cia Isiraeli
1Kings6:14 Suleimani agĩgĩaka nyũmba ĩo
1Kings6:15 Nacio thingo cia nyũmba ĩo mĩena ya na thĩinĩ agĩcihumbithia na mbaũ cia mũtarakwa; agĩcihumbithia mĩena ya na thĩinĩ
1Kings6:16 Ningĩ mwena wa na thutha wa nyũmba ĩo nene
1Kings6:17 Nayo nyũmba ĩo ĩngĩ nene
1Kings6:18 Nakuo na thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ĩo nene kwahumbĩtwo na mbaũ cia mĩtarakwa ciacũhĩtio mĩhianano ya maage
1Kings6:19 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings6:20 Nakuo kũu thĩinĩ wa handũ hau hatheru mũno
1Kings6:21 Ũguo nĩguo Suleimani aahumbithirie nyũmba ĩo nene na thĩinĩ na thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno; agĩcoka agĩĩkĩrithia irengeri cia thahabu na kũu mbere ya handũ hau hatheru mũno ta irĩ cia kũhahakania na hau hangĩ; naho handũ hau hatheru hothe akĩhahumbithia na thahabu.
1Kings6:22 Nyũmba ĩo yothe thĩinĩ agĩkĩmĩhumbithia na thahabu
1Kings6:23 Naho handũ hau hatheru mũno thĩinĩ akĩhathondekithĩria makerubi merĩ na mbaũ cia mĩtamaiyũ
1Kings6:24 Narĩo ithagu rĩmwe rĩa ikerubi rĩmwe rĩarĩ rĩa mĩkono ĩtano
1Kings6:25 O narĩo ikerubi rĩu rĩngĩ rĩarĩ rĩa mĩkono ikũmi o ro ũguo; namo makerubi macio merĩ maarĩ o ũndũ ũmwe magĩthimwo
1Kings6:26 Nakuo kũraiha kwa na igũrũ gwa ikerubi rĩmwe kwarĩ mĩkono ikũmi; naguo ũguo noguo ikerubi rĩrĩa rĩngĩ rĩatariĩ.
1Kings6:27 Namo makerubi macio akĩmekĩrithia kanyũmba karĩa kaarĩ thĩinĩ mũno; namo mathagu ma makerubi macio maacũhĩtio matambũrũkĩte
1Kings6:28 Ningĩ makerubi macio akĩmahumbithia igũrũ guothe na thahabu.
1Kings6:29 Nakuo kũu thingo-inĩ ciothe cia nyũmba ĩo nene
1Kings6:30 Nakuo mbaũ-inĩ cia thĩ cia nyũmba ĩo
1Kings6:31 Narĩo itonyero-inĩ rĩa gũthiĩ handũ hau hatheru mũno akĩrĩthondekithĩria mĩrango ya mĩtamaiyũ; nayo mĩrango ĩo hamwe na hingĩro ĩrĩa ĩkĩgamagio igũrũ rĩa mũromo
1Kings6:32 Agĩgĩthondekithia mĩrango ĩĩrĩ na mĩtamaiyũ; nayo mĩrango ĩo akĩmĩacũhithĩria mĩhianano ya makerubi
1Kings6:33 O na ningĩ ũguo noguo aathondekithirie hingĩro cia mĩtamaiyũ cia mũromo-inĩ wa gũtonya hau haatuĩtwo hekarũ
1Kings6:34 Nayo mĩrango yarĩ ya mbaũ cia mĩthengera; nacio mbaũ cierĩ cia mũrango ũmwe ciarĩ cia gũthunanĩrũo; o nacio mbaũ iria ingĩ cierĩ cia mũrango ũcio ũngĩ ciarĩ cia gũthunanĩrũo o ro ũguo.
1Kings6:35 Nacio mbaũ icio agĩciacũhithĩria mĩhianano ya makerubi
1Kings6:36 Nayo nja ĩrĩa ya thĩinĩ wa ĩrĩa ĩngĩ
1Kings6:37 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings6:38 Naguo mwaka wa ikũmi na ũmwe
1Kings7:1 Ningĩ Suleimani aaninire mĩaka ikũmi na ĩtatũ agĩaka nyũmba yake we mwene
1Kings7:2 O na ningĩ agĩaka nyũmba ĩĩtagwo nyũmba ya kĩrĩti kĩa Lebanoni; nakuo kũraiha kwayo ĩkĩgiĩ kwarĩ mĩkono igana rĩmwe
1Kings7:3 Nayo nyũmba ĩo ĩkahumbwo igũrũ na mbaũ cia mĩtarakwa
1Kings7:4 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings7:5 Nayo mĩrango yothe o na hingĩro ciayo ciathondeketwo irĩ thikwea; nacio ndirica icio cia gũtonyeria ũtheri igĩkorũo iringanĩte ithatũ ithatũ.
1Kings7:6 Ningĩ agĩthondekithia gĩthaku kĩayo na itugĩ; nakuo kũraiha gwakĩo gĩkĩgiĩ kwarĩ mĩkono mĩrongo ĩtano
1Kings7:7 Ningĩ agĩthondekithia gĩthaku gĩa kũigagwo gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene kĩrĩa angĩgaikarĩra agĩcira
1Kings7:8 Nayo nyũmba yake ĩrĩa angĩgatũũra akĩmĩaka mwena wa na thĩinĩ wa nja ĩo ĩngĩ yarĩ gĩthaku
1Kings7:9 Nyũmba icio ciothe ciaakĩtwo na mahiga me goro kuuma o gĩtina-inĩ nginya mahiga-inĩ ma igũrũ; naguo ũguo nĩ ta kuuga mahiga maicũhie o ta ũrĩa mũthimĩre wamo watariĩ
1Kings7:10 Nacio itina cia nyũmba icio ciothe ciarĩ cia mahiga me goro mũno
1Kings7:11 Ningĩ igũrũ rĩa itina cia nyũmba icio gwakĩtwo na mahiga me goro mũno
1Kings7:12 Nayo nja ĩo nene kũrigicĩria mĩena yothe
1Kings7:13 Ningĩ Suleimani mũthamaki akĩrekania kwĩ Hiramu
1Kings7:14 Nake aakĩrĩ mũrũ wa mũtumia wa ndigwa wa mũhĩrĩga wa Nafitali
1Kings7:15 Nĩ ũndũ nĩaathondekire itugĩ iria igĩrĩ cia icango
1Kings7:16 Agĩthondeka ciongo igĩrĩ irĩ mũnduru cia gĩcango gĩtweketio
1Kings7:17 Ningĩ hakĩgĩa inyamũ itumanĩtio ta rũgara
1Kings7:18 Ũguo nĩguo aathondekire itugĩ icio; ningĩ hakĩgĩa mĩhari ĩĩrĩ ya makomamanga ĩrigicĩirie mũnyamũ ũmwe wa ĩo ĩtumanĩtio ta rũgara
1Kings7:19 Nacio ciongo icio ciarĩ igũrũ rĩa itugĩ icio cia gĩthaku-inĩ-rĩ
1Kings7:20 O na ningĩ itugĩ-inĩ icio cierĩ igũrũ
1Kings7:21 Agĩkĩhanda itugĩ icio gĩthaku-inĩ kĩa hekarũ; nakĩo gĩtugĩ kĩa mwena wa ũrĩo aakĩhanda
1Kings7:22 Nakuo itugĩ-inĩ icio igũrũ kwarĩ mũhianĩre wa mahũa matariĩ ta itoka ũguo nĩguo wĩra wa gũthondeka itugĩ icio warĩkirio.
1Kings7:23 Ningĩ agĩthondeka itangi rĩrĩa rĩĩtagwo karia ga gĩcango gĩtweketio
1Kings7:24 Na mũhurahuro wa mũthia-inĩ warĩo hanini kũrigicĩria
1Kings7:25 Nako karia kau kaaigĩrĩirũo igũrũ rĩa mĩhianano ya ndegwa ikũmi na igĩrĩ
1Kings7:26 Naguo ũtungu wa gĩcango gĩako waiganaine na rũhĩ kwarama; nayo mĩthia-inĩ yako yathondeketwo o ta mĩthia ya gĩkombe
1Kings7:27 Ningĩ agĩthondeka inyamũ ikũmi cia gĩcango itariĩ ta ngari
1Kings7:28 Nakuo gũthondekwo kwa inyamũ icio gwatariĩ ũũ: nĩ gwĩkĩrũo ciekĩrĩtwo ithuma; o na ningĩ kwarĩ thanju njeke ciekĩrĩtwo gatagatĩ-inĩ ga ithuma icio;
1Kings7:29 ningĩ kwarĩ mĩhianano ya mĩrũthi
1Kings7:30 Nakĩo kĩnyamũ kĩmwe gĩa icio ciahaanaga ta ngari kĩarĩ na magũrũ mana ma gĩcango ta ma ngari
1Kings7:31 Nakuo kwarama na igũrũ gwa kanua ga kĩnyũngũ kĩu gũgĩthimwo gatagatĩ ga gĩthiũrũrĩ kĩu gĩa gĩcango kĩmĩrigicĩirie-rĩ
1Kings7:32 Namo magũrũ macio mana ta ma ngari maarĩ mũhuro wa ithuma icio cia mĩena-inĩ; o nayo mĩtĩ ya kũnyitithania magũrũ macio yarĩ gĩtina-inĩ; nakuo kũraiha na igũrũ gwa kũgũrũ kũmwe kũmwe gũgĩthimwo kwarĩ mũkono ũmwe na nuthu.
1Kings7:33 Nakuo gũthondekwo kwa magũrũ macio gwatariĩ o ta ũrĩa kũgũrũ kwa ngari ya ita gũthondekagwo; nayo mĩtĩ yamo ya kũmanyitithania
1Kings7:34 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings7:35 Narĩo igũrũ rĩa ngari o ngari haarĩ handũ hathondeketwo gĩthiũrũrĩ
1Kings7:36 Nayo mĩena-inĩ ya nyitĩro icio ciayo
1Kings7:37 O ũguo noguo aathondekire ngari icio ikũmi; nacio ciothe ciatwekirio o ũndũ ũmwe
1Kings7:38 Agĩcoka agĩthondeka inyũngũ ikũmi cia gĩcango nakĩo kĩnyũngũ o kĩmwe kĩmwe kĩaiyũragia mbathi mĩrongo ĩna; nacio inyũngũ icio o kĩmwe kĩmwe kĩarĩ kĩa mĩkono ĩna gĩgĩthimwo; nakĩo kĩnyũngũ kĩmwe kĩmwe gĩkĩigĩrĩrũo ngari-inĩ ĩmwe ya icio ikũmi ciathondeketwo.
1Kings7:39 Nacio ngari icio agĩciiga ũũ: ithano akĩiga mwena wa ũrĩo wa nyũmba
1Kings7:40 Ningĩ Hiramu agĩthondeka nyũngũ
1Kings7:41 nacio indo icio nĩ itugĩ cierĩ
1Kings7:42 o na makomamanga macio magana mana marĩa maarĩ mĩnyamũ-inĩ ĩĩrĩ ĩo yatumanĩtio ta rũgara; gũgĩkĩgĩa mĩhari ĩĩrĩ ya makomamanga yekĩrĩtwo kĩnyamũ-inĩ kĩmwe gĩa icio ciatumanĩtio ta rũgara
1Kings7:43 o na ngari icio ikũmi
1Kings7:44 o na karia kau kamwe
1Kings7:45 o na nyũngũ
1Kings7:46 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings7:47 Nake Suleimani ndathimithirie indo icio ciothe
1Kings7:48 Nacio indo iria ingĩ ciothe cia kũigwo nyũmba ya Jehova
1Kings7:49 nayo mĩtĩ ya kũigĩrĩrũo matawa
1Kings7:50 nacio ikombe na tũmĩĩhato tũnini twa mũrarĩ wa ndambĩ
1Kings7:51 Ũguo nĩguo wĩra warĩkire
1Kings8:1 Hĩndĩ ĩo Suleimani akĩũnganithia athuri a Isiraeli mathiĩ harĩ we
1Kings8:2 Nao andũ othe a Isiraeli magĩgĩtũngana he mũthamaki Suleimani gĩathĩ-inĩ
1Kings8:3 Nao athuri othe a Isiraeli magĩthiĩ kuo
1Kings8:4 Nao makĩambatia ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa Jehova
1Kings8:5 Nake mũthamaki Suleimani
1Kings8:6 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai magĩgĩtonyia ithandũkũ rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Jehova makĩrĩiga o handũ harĩo mũhuro wa mathagu ma makerubi
1Kings8:7 Nĩ ũndũ makerubi maatambũrũkĩtie mathagu mamo igũrũ rĩa handũ hau ha kũigwo ithandũkũ rĩu
1Kings8:8 Nayo mĩtĩ ĩo mĩraya nĩyaraihĩte mũno o nginya mĩthia yayo ĩkoneka nĩ mũndũ e nyũmba ĩrĩa theru ĩrĩa ĩrĩ mbere ya kanyũmba kau kangĩ gatheru mũno
1Kings8:9 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings8:10 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings8:11 o nginya athĩnjĩri-Ngai makĩremwo nĩ kũrũgama kuo marute wĩra nĩ ũndũ wa itu rĩu; nĩ gũkorũo riri wa Jehova nĩwaiyũrĩte nyũmba ĩo ya Jehova.
1Kings8:12 Hĩndĩ ĩo Suleimani agĩkĩaria
1Kings8:13 Tondũ ũcio wee
1Kings8:14 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩhũgũra ũthiũ
1Kings8:15 Agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings8:16 Gwata mũthenya ũrĩa ndoimagaririe andũ akwa Isiraeli ngĩmaruta bũrũri wa Misiri-rĩ
1Kings8:17 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings8:18 No rĩri
1Kings8:19 no rĩrĩ
1Kings8:20 Naguo ũhoro ũcio Jehova aaririe nĩatũire aũrũmĩtie; nĩ gũkorũo nĩ niĩ njarahũrĩtwo njoke ithenya rĩa awa Daudi
1Kings8:21 Nakuo kũu nĩkuo ’thondekete handũ ha kũiga ithandũkũ rĩrĩa
1Kings8:22 Nake Suleimani agĩkĩrũgama hau mbere ya kĩgongona kĩa Jehova
1Kings8:23 agĩkiuga atĩrĩrĩ: Wee
1Kings8:24 wee ũtũũraga ũrũmĩtie kĩĩranĩro kĩrĩa werĩire awa
1Kings8:25 Tondũ ũcio wee
1Kings8:26 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings8:27 No rĩrĩ
1Kings8:28 No rĩrĩ
1Kings8:29 nĩ getha maitho maku maikarage maracũrĩirio nyũmba ĩno ũtukũ na mũthenya
1Kings8:30 Na ũthikagĩrĩrie gũthaithana gwakwa
1Kings8:31 Mũndũ angĩkehia mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ
1Kings8:32 ndagũthaitha ũkaigua ũhoro ũcio ũrĩ o kũu igũrũ
1Kings8:33 Ningĩ-rĩ
1Kings8:34 ndagũthaitha ũkamaigua
1Kings8:35 Ningĩ-rĩ
1Kings8:36 ndagũthaitha ũkamaigua ũrĩ o kũu igũrũ
1Kings8:37 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings8:38 ihoya rĩrĩa rĩkahoyũo hĩndĩ ĩo
1Kings8:39 ndagũthaitha ũkamaigua ũrĩ o kũu igũrũ handũ haku harĩa ũtũũraga
1Kings8:40 nĩ getha igwĩtigagĩre matukũ mothe marĩa igũtũũra bũrũri ũyũ waheire maithe maitũ.
1Kings8:41 O na ningĩ atĩrĩ
1Kings8:42 (tondũ andũ nĩmakaigua ngumo ya rĩĩtwa rĩu rĩaku inene
1Kings8:43 ndagũthaitha ũkamũigua ũrĩ o kũu igũrũ handũ haku harĩa ũtũũraga
1Kings8:44 Ningĩ andũ aku mangĩkoimagara mathiĩ ita-inĩ makahũrane na thũ ciao-rĩ
1Kings8:45 ndagũthaitha ũkaigua ihoya rĩao
1Kings8:46 Na mangĩgakwĩhia
1Kings8:47 mangĩgakorũo megwĩciria ũrĩa ũhoro wao ũtariĩ
1Kings8:48 nao magũcokerere na ngoro ciao ciothe
1Kings8:49 hĩndĩ ĩo ndagũthaitha ũkaigua ihoya rĩao
1Kings8:50 o na wohere andũ aku
1Kings8:51 nĩ gũkorũo andũ acio nĩ aku
1Kings8:52 Na arĩ korũo waracũria maitho maku manyone niĩ
1Kings8:53 Nĩ ũndũ wee
1Kings8:54 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings8:55 Agĩkĩĩhanda arũngiĩ
1Kings8:56 Jehova arogoocwo
1Kings8:57 Jehova Ngai witũ aroikara hamwe na ithuĩ
1Kings8:58 nĩ getha endithie ngoro ciitũ harĩ we
1Kings8:59 Na rĩu ngũhoya atĩ ciugo ici ciakwa iria ’thaithĩte Jehova nacio
1Kings8:60 nĩ getha andũ othe a gũkũ thĩ mamenye atĩ Jehova nĩwe Ngai; na gũtirĩ ũngĩ o na ũrĩkũ.
1Kings8:61 Na tondũ ũcio wĩmenyererei atĩ mũtũũre mũrũmĩrĩire Jehova Ngai witũ na ngoro cianyu ciothe
1Kings8:62 Nake mũthamaki
1Kings8:63 Nake Suleimani aarutĩire Jehova indo cia magongona ma ũiguano ndegwa ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na igĩrĩ
1Kings8:64 Naguo mũthenya o ro ũcio
1Kings8:65 Ũguo nĩguo Suleimani aathondekire gĩathĩ kĩu mbere ya Jehova
1Kings8:66 Naguo mũthenya wa ĩnana agĩkĩĩra andũ mainũke
1Kings9:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings9:2 Jehova agĩkiumĩrĩra Suleimani ihinda rĩa kerĩ
1Kings9:3 Nake Jehova akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings9:4 Naho ha ũhoro waku-rĩ
1Kings9:5 nĩngũtũma ũhoro waku wa gũikarĩra gĩtĩ gĩaku kĩa ũnene
1Kings9:6 No rĩrĩ

1Kings9:9 Nao macokerio atĩrĩ
1Kings9:10 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings9:11 (na rĩrĩ
1Kings9:12 Nake Hiramu agĩkiuma Turo akarore matũũra macio Suleimani aamũheete; namo matiigana kũmũkenia.
1Kings9:13 Nake agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings9:14 Nake Hiramu nĩaatwarithĩirie mũthamaki ũcio taranda cia thahabu igana na mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ.
1Kings9:15 Naho ha ũhoro wa kĩaro kĩrĩa Suleimani aanyitithirie-rĩ
1Kings9:16 Nĩ ũndũ atĩrĩ
1Kings9:17 Nake Suleimani agĩgĩaka Gezeru
1Kings9:18 na Baalathu
1Kings9:19 O na matũũra mothe marĩa Suleimani aarĩ namo ma kũigwo indo ciake
1Kings9:20 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings9:21 ciana ciao iria ciatigarĩte bũrũri ũcio
1Kings9:22 No rĩrĩ
1Kings9:23 Na nĩkwarĩ andũ magana matano ma mĩrongo ĩtano
1Kings9:24 Nake mwarĩ wa Firauni akiuma itũũra rĩa Daudi
1Kings9:25 Nake Suleimani aarutagĩra mahaki ma njino

1Kings10:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings10:2 Nake aakinyire Jerusalemu e na mũrũmanĩrĩro wa andũ aingĩ mũno marĩ na ngamĩra ciakuuĩte mahuti marĩa manungaga wega
1Kings10:3 Nake Suleimani agĩkĩmũtaũrĩra maũndũ mothe marĩa aamũũririe; na gũtirĩ ũndũ o na ũmwe wahithĩkire mũthamaki akĩremwo nĩ kũmwĩra.
1Kings10:4 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings10:5 o na irio cia metha-inĩ yake
1Kings10:6 Nake agĩkĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
1Kings10:7 No rĩrĩ
1Kings10:8 Gũkena-rĩ
1Kings10:9 Jehova Ngai waku arogoocwo
1Kings10:10 Nake agĩkĩhe mũthamaki ũcio taranda igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ cia thahabu
1Kings10:11 O na ningĩ gĩkundi kĩa marikabu cia Hiramu
1Kings10:12 Nake mũthamaki agĩacũhia mĩthandari ĩo akĩmĩtua itugĩ cia nyũmba ya Jehova
1Kings10:13 Nake mũthamaki Suleimani akĩhe mũthamaki ũcio mũndũ-wa-nja wa Sheba indo ciothe iria eriragĩria
1Kings10:14 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings10:15 thengia ĩrĩa yatwaragwo kuo nĩ athũgũri indo
1Kings10:16 Nake Suleimani
1Kings10:17 Ningĩ agĩthondeka ngo cia mũthemba mũnyinyi magana matatũ cia thahabu ĩturĩtwo; o ĩmwe yacio ĩgĩthirĩra ratiri ithatũ cia thababu; nake mũthamaki agĩciiga nyũmba ĩrĩa yetagwo nyũmba ya kĩrĩti kĩa Lebanoni thĩinĩ.
1Kings10:18 O na ningĩ mũthamaki ũcio agĩthondeka gĩtĩ-gĩa-ũthamaki kĩnene mũno kĩa mĩguongo
1Kings10:19 Nakĩo gĩtĩ kĩu kĩarĩ na ngathĩ ya makinya matandatũ ya gũkĩhaica; nakuo kũu igũrũ na thutha wa gĩtĩ kĩu kwarĩ gĩthiũrũrĩ; na kĩarĩ na moko mekĩrĩtwo mwena ũyũ
1Kings10:20 nayo mĩhianano ĩngĩ ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ ya mĩrũthi ĩkarũgamio mwena ũyũ
1Kings10:21 Nacio indo ciothe iria mũthamaki aanyuagĩra ciarĩ cia thahabu
1Kings10:22 Nĩ gũkorũo mũthamaki ũcio aarĩ na marikabu cia Tarishishi
1Kings10:23 Tondũ ũcio mũthamaki Suleimani agĩgĩkĩra athamaki arĩa angĩ othe a thĩ na ũtonga
1Kings10:24 Nao andũ a mabũrũri mothe magacaragia ũrĩa mangĩona Suleimani ũthiũ
1Kings10:25 Nao othe
1Kings10:26 Nake Suleimani akĩĩyũnganithĩria ngari cia ita
1Kings10:27 Nake mũthamaki ũcio agĩkĩingĩhia betha o nginya ĩkonagwo ĩhaana o ta ĩrĩ mahiga kũu Jerusalemu
1Kings10:28 Nacio mbarathi iria Suleimani aarĩ nacio ciarutĩtwo Misiri; nao andũ arĩa maarutagĩra mũthamaki wĩra wa wonjoria nĩo maacithogoraga irĩ ndũru nene
1Kings10:29 Nacio cekeri magana matandatũ cia betha nĩcio ciarutagwo ngari ĩmwe ya ita ĩkĩambatio ĩrutĩtwo Misiri
1Kings11:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings11:2 o a ndũrĩrĩ iria Jehova aarĩtie ũhoro wacio

1Kings11:4 Nĩ ũndũ nĩgwakinyire atĩrĩ

1Kings11:17 gũgĩgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings11:18 Nao magĩũkĩra makiuma Midiani
1Kings11:19 Nake Hadadi akĩendeka mũno nĩ Firauni

1Kings11:24 nake nĩeyũnganĩirie andũ agĩtuĩka mũnene wa mbũtũ ya ita
1Kings11:25 Nake agĩgĩtuĩka thũ ya Isiraeli matukũ mothe ma Suleimani

1Kings11:29 Na matukũ macio gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings11:30 Nake Ahija akĩnyita nguo ĩo ya mũtumano ehumbĩte

1Kings11:40 Na tondũ wa ũhoro ũcio Suleimani agĩgĩcaria njĩra ya kũũraga Jeroboamu. No rĩrĩ

1Kings11:42 Narĩo ihinda rĩrĩa Suleimani aathamakĩire Aisiraeli othe kũu Jerusalemu rĩarĩ mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna.

1Kings12:3 nao andũ makĩrekania agetwo;) Jeroboamu na kĩrĩndĩ gĩothe gĩa Isiraeli magĩgĩthiĩ makĩarĩria Rehoboamu makĩmwĩra ũũ:
1Kings12:4 Atĩrĩrĩ

1Kings12:27 Andũ aya mangĩkorũo nĩmarĩambataga magathiĩ nyũmba ya Jehova o kũu Jerusalemu kũrutĩra magongona kuo-rĩ

1Kings12:31 Ningĩ agĩaka nyũmba cia kũhoerũo matĩri-inĩ ma kũndũ gũtũũgĩru

1Kings13:9 nĩ gũkorũo ũguo nĩguo ndaathirũo na uuge wa Jehova

1Kings13:15 Agĩgĩcoka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings13:16 Nake akiuga atĩrĩ

1Kings13:18 Nake agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ

1Kings13:22 no nĩũhũndũkire
1Kings13:23 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings13:24 Na aarĩkia kũgwata njĩra ainũke-rĩ
1Kings13:25 Naho hau hakĩhĩtũkĩra andũ
1Kings13:26 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũnabii ũrĩa wamũhũndũrire e njĩra-inĩ aaiguire ũhoro ũcio
1Kings13:27 Nake agĩgĩatha ariũ ake
1Kings13:28 Nake agĩthiĩ akĩona kĩimba kĩu kĩgũĩte njĩra-inĩ
1Kings13:29 Nake mũnabii ũcio agĩkĩoya kĩimba kĩa mũndũ ũcio wa Ngai
1Kings13:30 Nake agĩkĩiga kĩimba kĩu mbĩrĩra-inĩ yake we mwene; nao makĩmũrĩrĩra
1Kings13:31 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings13:32 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
1Kings13:33 Na rĩrĩ

1Kings14:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings14:2 Nake Jeroboamu akĩĩra mũka atĩrĩ
1Kings14:3 Na ũthiĩ ũkuuĩte mĩgate ikũmi
1Kings14:4 Nake mũka wa Jeroboamu agĩgĩĩka o ta ũguo
1Kings14:5 Nake Jehova agĩkĩĩra Ahija ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
1Kings14:6 Na gũgĩtuĩka o ro ũguo
1Kings14:7 Thiĩ
1Kings14:8 o na ngĩtunya mbarĩ ya Daudi ũthamaki ngĩkũhe wee-rĩ
1Kings14:9 no rĩrĩ
1Kings14:10 tondũ ũcio ti-itherũ nĩngũrehithĩrie mbarĩ ya Jeroboamu ũũru
1Kings14:11 Mũndũ wa Jeroboamu ũrĩa ũgakuĩra itũũra-inĩ-rĩ
1Kings14:12 Tondũ ũcio arahũka ũinũke gwaku mũciĩ; na rĩrĩ
1Kings14:13 Nao Aisiraeli othe nĩmegũkarĩrĩra na magathike
1Kings14:14 O na ningĩ-rĩ
1Kings14:15 Nĩ gũkorũo Jehova nĩakahũra Aisiraeli matuĩke o ta kamũrangi karainaina ke maĩ-inĩ; na nĩakamarindũra biũ amarute bũrũri ũyũ mwega
1Kings14:16 Nake nĩakarekereria Isiraeli o ro ũguo amatige
1Kings14:17 Nake mũka wa Jeroboamu agĩkĩarahũka
1Kings14:18 Nao Aisiraeli othe magĩgathika
1Kings14:19 Na atĩrĩrĩ
1Kings14:20 Narĩo ihinda rĩrĩa Jeroboamu aathamakire rĩarĩ mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩĩrĩ; nake agĩgĩkoma hamwe na maithe
1Kings14:21 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings14:22 Nao andũ a Juda magĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ moru nĩ Jehova
1Kings14:23 Nĩ gũkorũo o nao nĩmethondekeire matĩri ma kũndũ gũtũũgĩru
1Kings14:24 O na ningĩ bũrũri ũcio gũkĩgĩa ũmaraya wa arũme; na arũme nao magekaga maũndũ mothe marĩa me thahu ma ndũrĩrĩ iria Jehova aaingatire ciehere mbere ya ciana cia Isiraeli.
1Kings14:25 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings14:26 nake agĩgĩtunyana mũthithũ wa indo cia bata iria ciaigĩtwo nyũmba ya Jehova
1Kings14:27 Nake mũthamaki
1Kings14:28 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings14:29 Nacio ciĩko iria ingĩ cia Rehoboamu

1Kings16:25 Nake Omuri agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ moru nĩ Jehova

1Kings18:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings18:2 Elija agĩgĩthiĩ kwĩonania he Ahabu; nayo ng’aragu ĩgĩkorũo ĩĩhĩte mũno kũu Samaria hĩndĩ ĩo.
1Kings18:3 Nake Ahabu agĩgĩĩta Obadia
1Kings18:4 nĩ ũndũ nĩgwakinyĩte atĩrĩ
1Kings18:5 Nake Ahabu agĩkĩĩra Obadia atĩrĩ
1Kings18:6 Tondũ ũcio magĩkĩgayana bũrũri ũcio o erĩ
1Kings18:7 Na rĩrĩa Obadia aarĩ njĩra agĩthiĩ
1Kings18:8 Nake akĩmũcokeria athĩrĩ
1Kings18:9 Nake agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings18:10 O ta ũrĩa Jehova Ngai waku atũũraga muoyo-rĩ
1Kings18:11 Na rĩu wee nawe ũkuuga atĩrĩ
1Kings18:12 Na nĩgũgakinya atĩrĩ
1Kings18:13 Kaĩ wee
1Kings18:14 Na rĩu wee nawe ũkũnjĩra ũũ: Thiĩ ũkere mwathi waku atĩrĩ
1Kings18:15 Nake Elija agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings18:16 Tondũ ũcio Obadia agĩgĩthiĩ gũtũnga Ahabu
1Kings18:17 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings18:18 Nake agĩcokia atĩrĩ
1Kings18:19 Na rĩu rekania ũnyũnganithĩrie Aisiraeli othe
1Kings18:20 Tondũ ũcio Ahabu akĩrekania he ciana ciothe cia Isiraeli
1Kings18:21 Nake Elija agĩgĩthengerera harĩ andũ acio othe
1Kings18:22 Elija agĩkĩĩra andũ acio atĩrĩ
1Kings18:23 Tondũ ũcio nĩtũheo ndegwa igĩrĩ; nao marekwo methurĩre ndegwa ĩmwe
1Kings18:24 Thutha wa ũguo inyuĩ mũkaĩre rĩĩtwa rĩa ngai yanyu
1Kings18:25 Elija agĩkĩĩra anabii acio a Baali atĩrĩ
1Kings18:26 Nao magĩkĩnyita ndegwa ĩrĩa maaheetwo
1Kings18:27 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings18:28 Magĩkĩanĩrĩra na mĩgambo mĩnene mũno
1Kings18:29 Na gũgĩtuĩka atĩrĩ
1Kings18:30 Hĩndĩ ĩo Elija agĩkĩĩra andũ othe arĩa maarĩ ho atĩrĩ
1Kings18:31 Nake Elija akĩoya mahiga ikũmi na merĩ
1Kings18:32 Nake Elija agĩgĩaka kĩgongona gĩa kũgoocithia rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova na mahiga macio
1Kings18:33 Agĩkĩara ngũ wega
1Kings18:34 Ningĩ akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings18:35 Namo maĩ macio magĩthiĩ kĩgongona-inĩ kĩu mbarĩ ciothe; o naguo mũtaro ũcio akĩũiyũria maĩ.
1Kings18:36 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings18:37 Njigua
1Kings18:38 Hĩndĩ ĩo mwaki wa Jehova ũgĩkĩgũa
1Kings18:39 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings18:40 Nake Elija akĩmera
1Kings18:41 Thutha wa ũguo Elija agĩkĩĩra Ahabu atĩrĩ
1Kings18:42 Tondũ ũcio Ahabu agĩkĩambata akarĩe o na anyue. Nake Elija agĩkĩambata o igũrũ gacũmbĩrĩ ga kĩrĩma kĩu gĩa Karimeli

1Kings20:16 Nao magĩkiumagara mĩaraho. No rĩrĩ

1Kings20:18 Nake agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings20:19 Nao andũ acio magĩkiumagara moimĩte itũũra-inĩ
1Kings20:20 Nao o mũndũ agĩkĩũraga mũndũ wake; nao Asuriata magĩkĩũra
1Kings20:21 Nake mũthamaki wa Isiraeli akiumagara
1Kings20:22 Nake mũnabii ũcio agĩcoka agĩthengerera mũthamaki wa Isiraeli
1Kings20:23 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings20:24 Na wĩke atĩrĩ
1Kings20:25 ũcoke wĩtarĩre athigari a ita maigana o ta arĩa aku moragirũo
1Kings20:26 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings20:27 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli igĩcokanĩrĩrio
1Kings20:28 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings20:29 Nao magĩgĩikara hema-inĩ ciao matukũ mũgwanja mang’ethanĩire. Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings20:30 No arĩa angĩ makĩũra magĩkinya Afeki
1Kings20:31 Nacio ndungata ciake ikĩmwĩra ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
1Kings20:32 Tondũ ũcio magĩkĩĩoha nguo cia makũnia njohero
1Kings20:33 Nao andũ acio makĩbarĩrĩra ũhoro ũcio na kĩyo
1Kings20:34 Nake Beni-hadadi akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings20:35 Na rĩrĩ

1Kings20:37 Ningĩ akĩona mũndũ ũngĩ
1Kings20:38 Thutha wa ũguo mũnabii ũcio agĩgĩĩthiĩra
1Kings20:39 Na rĩrĩa mũthamaki aahĩtũkaga
1Kings20:40 Na tondũ niĩ ndungata yaku ndarĩ na mĩhang’o ya ũũ na ũũ-rĩ
1Kings20:41 Nake akĩhiũha kũruta tama ũcio wa mũtwe maitho
1Kings20:42 Nake mũndũ ũcio agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings20:43 Nake mũthamaki wa Isiraeli agĩkĩinũka gwake mũciĩ e na kĩeha mũno

1Kings21:4 Nake Ahabu agĩkĩinũka gwake mũciĩ e na kĩeha mũno

1Kings21:6 Nake akĩmũcokeria atĩrĩ
1Kings21:7 Nake Jezebeli
1Kings21:8 Tondũ ũcio Jezebeli akĩandĩka marũa
1Kings21:9 Namo marũa-inĩ macio akĩandĩka atĩrĩ
1Kings21:10 mũcoke mũige andũ erĩ
1Kings21:11 Nao andũ a itũũra rĩao
1Kings21:12 Magĩkĩhunjanĩria ũhoro atĩ andũ mehinge kũrĩa irio
1Kings21:13 Ningĩ andũ acio maathurĩtwo aaganu mũno magĩgĩtonya ho

1Kings21:19 Nawe ũkĩarie nake
1Kings21:20 Nake Ahabu agĩkĩũria Elija atĩrĩ
1Kings21:21 Atĩrĩrĩ
1Kings21:22 nayo nyũmba yaku ndĩmĩtue o ta nyũmba ya Jeroboamu wa Nebati
1Kings21:23 O naho ha ũhoro wa Jezebeli-rĩ
1Kings21:24 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings21:25 (No ti-itherũ gũtiarĩ mũndũ ũngĩ o na ũmwe wetwarĩrĩire wĩki-inĩ wa maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ moru nĩ Jehova ta Ahabu
1Kings21:26 Tondũ nĩekaga maũndũ me thahu mũno
1Kings21:27 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings21:28 Nakĩo kiugo kĩa Jehova gĩgĩkinyĩrĩra Elija
1Kings21:29 Nĩũkuona ũrĩa Ahabu enyihĩtie mbere yakwa? Tondũ wa ũguo enyihĩtie mbere yakwa-rĩ
1Kings22:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings22:2 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings22:3 Nake mũthamaki wa Isiraeli akĩĩra ndungata ciake atĩrĩ
1Kings22:4 Nake agĩkĩũria Jehoshafatu atĩrĩ
1Kings22:5 Ningĩ Jehoshafatu akĩĩra mũthamaki wa Isiraeli atĩrĩ
1Kings22:6 Nake mũthamaki wa Isiraeli agĩkĩũnganithia anabii
1Kings22:7 No rĩrĩ
1Kings22:8 Nake mũthamaki wa Isiraeli akĩĩra Jehoshafatu atĩrĩ
1Kings22:9 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũthamaki wa Isiraeli agĩgĩĩta mũndũ ũmwe wa arĩa mehokeirũo wĩra wa mũciĩ wake
1Kings22:10 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings22:11 Nake Zedekia wa Kenaana nĩethondekeire hĩa cia igera
1Kings22:12 Nao anabii othe magĩkĩratha mohoro o ta macio
1Kings22:13 Nake mũrekio ũrĩa wathiĩte gwĩta Mikaya akĩaria nake
1Kings22:14 Nake Mikaya akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings22:15 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings22:16 Nake mũthamaki akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings22:17 Nake agĩgĩcokia atĩrĩ
1Kings22:18 Nake mũthamaki wa Isiraeli agĩkĩĩra Jehoshafatu atĩrĩ
1Kings22:19 Nake Mikaya agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings22:20 Nake Jehova aakiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings22:21 Naho haakiumĩra roho ũmwe
1Kings22:22 Nake Jehova aakĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Kings22:23 Tondũ ũcio ũhoro ũtariĩ ũũ
1Kings22:24 Hĩndĩ ĩo Zedekia wa Kenaana agĩthengerera Mikaya

1Kings22:26 Nake mũthamaki wa Isiraeli agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings22:27 mũmere atĩrĩ

1Kings22:33 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Kings22:34 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings22:35 Nayo mbaara ĩo ĩgĩkĩneneha mũno mũthenya ũcio
1Kings22:36 Gũgĩkĩanĩrĩrũo na mũgambo mũnene kũu mbũtũ-inĩ ya ita
1Kings22:37 Ũguo nĩguo mũthamaki ũcio aagĩkuire
1Kings22:38 Nayo ngari ĩo ya ita makĩmĩthambĩria karia-inĩ ga kũu Samaria
1Kings22:39 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings22:40 Ahabu agĩgĩkoma hamwe na maithe; nake Ahazia
1Kings22:41 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings22:42 Nake Jehoshafatu aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ĩtano hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka; agĩthamaka mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtano arĩ Jerusalemu. Nake nyina etagwo Azuba
1Kings22:43 Nake agĩkĩrũmĩrĩra mĩthiĩre ĩrĩa yothe ithe
1Kings22:44 Nake Jehoshafatu akĩara ũhoro na mũthamaki wa Isiraeli wa atĩ magĩe na thayũ.
1Kings22:45 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings22:46 Namo matigari ma andũ arĩa maarũmagĩrĩra ũmaraya wa arũme na arũme arĩa angĩ
1Kings22:47 Na rĩrĩ
1Kings22:48 Nake Jehoshafatu nĩaathondekithirie marikabu cia Tarishishi cia gũthiĩ Ofiru igĩre thahabu; no itiathiire

1Kings22:50 Nake Jehoshafatu agĩgĩkoma hamwe na maithe

1Kings22:53 Nake agĩtungatĩra Baali
2Kings1:1 NA RĨRĨ
2Kings1:2 Nake Ahazia akĩgũa thĩ oimĩte ndirica-inĩ ya kanyũmba gake ka igũrũ o kũu Samaria
2Kings1:3 No mũraika wa Jehova agĩkĩĩra Elija
2Kings1:4 Tondũ ũcio rĩu Jehova oiga ũũ: Ndũngiuma ũrĩrĩ ũcio ũhaicĩte; no ti-itherũ nĩũgũkua. Nake Elija agĩĩthiĩra.
2Kings1:5 Nao arekio acio magĩgĩcoka he mũthamaki; nake akĩmoria atĩrĩ
2Kings1:6 Magĩkĩmwĩra ũũ: Nĩ mũndũ ũũkire aacemania na ithuĩ
2Kings1:7 Nake agĩkĩmoria atĩrĩ
2Kings1:8 Makĩmũcokeria atĩrĩ
2Kings1:9 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũthamaki agĩkĩmũrekeria mũnene wa athigari mĩrongo ĩtano
2Kings1:10 Nake Elija agĩcokia akĩĩra mũnene ũcio wa athigari mĩrongo ĩtano atĩrĩ
2Kings1:11 Ningĩ mũthamaki akĩmũrekeria mũnene ũngĩ wa athigari mĩrongo ĩtano na mĩrongo yake ĩtano. Nake mũnene ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings1:12 Nake Elija akĩmũcokeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings1:13 Ningĩ akĩrekia mũnene ũngĩ wa gatatũ wa athigari mĩrongo ĩtano
2Kings1:14 Nĩnjũĩ atĩ nĩharokĩte mwaki uumĩte igũrũ
2Kings1:15 Nake mũraika wa Jehova agĩkĩĩra Elija atĩrĩ
2Kings1:16 Nake Elija akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings1:17 Nake agĩgĩkua o ta ũrĩa uuge wa Jehova watariĩ ũcio warĩtio nĩ Elija. Nake Jehoramu
2Kings1:18 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings2:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings2:2 Nake Elija akĩĩra Elisha atĩrĩ
2Kings2:3 Nao andũ a thiritũ ya ariũ a anabii arĩa maarĩ kũu Beth-eli makiumagara
2Kings2:4 Ningĩ Elija akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ

2Kings2:10 Nake akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings2:11 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings2:12 Nake Elisha agĩkĩona ngari ĩo
2Kings2:13 Ningĩ akĩoya nguo ya igũrũ ya Elija
2Kings2:14 Agĩkĩoya nguo ĩo ya igũrũ ya Elija ĩrĩa yagũĩte thĩ yumĩte harĩ we
2Kings2:15 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings2:16 makĩmwĩra ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
2Kings2:17 Nao rĩrĩa maamũringĩrĩirie o nginya agĩconoka-rĩ
2Kings2:18 Magĩkĩmũcokerera
2Kings2:19 Nao andũ a itũũra rĩu magĩkĩĩra Elisha ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
2Kings2:20 Nake agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings2:21 Nake agĩkiumagara agĩthiĩ itherũkĩro-inĩ rĩa maĩ macio
2Kings2:22 Tondũ ũcio maĩ macio makĩninwo ũũru wamo
2Kings2:23 Nake akĩambata akiuma kũu athiĩ Beth-eli; na rĩrĩ
2Kings2:24 Nake akĩroraga na thutha wake
2Kings2:25 Nake agĩkiuma kũu

2Kings4:39 Mũndũ ũmwe wao agĩkiuma agĩthiĩ ngamba-inĩ gũtua nyeni

2Kings6:1 Nao andũ a thiritũ ya ariũ a anabii makĩĩra Elisha ũũ: Handũ haha tũikarĩte mbere yaku nĩhatũnyihĩire mũno.
2Kings6:2 Twagũthaitha ũreke tũthiĩ Jorodani tũgatue o mũndũ mũtĩ kuo
2Kings6:3 Nake mũndũ ũmwe agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings6:4 Tondũ ũcio agĩgĩthiĩ nao. Nao maakinya Jorodani
2Kings6:5 No rĩrĩa mũndũ ũmwe aatemaga mũtĩ
2Kings6:6 Nake mũndũ ũcio wa Ngai agĩkĩũria atĩrĩ
2Kings6:7 agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings6:8 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings6:9 mũndũ ũcio wa Ngai akarekeria mũthamaki wa Isiraeli mũndũ
2Kings6:10 Nake mũthamaki wa Isiraeli akarekia andũ mathiĩ handũ hau mũndũ ũcio wa Ngai aamwĩrĩte emenyerere ũhoro waho
2Kings6:11 Nayo ngoro ya mũthamaki ũcio wa Suriata ĩkĩnyarirĩka mũno nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoro ũcio; nake agĩgĩĩta ndungata ciake
2Kings6:12 Nake mũndũ ũmwe wa ndungata ciake akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings6:13 Nake agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings6:14 Tondũ ũcio agĩgĩtwarithia mbarathi kuo
2Kings6:15 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings6:16 Nake agĩcokia atĩrĩ
2Kings6:17 Nake Elisha akĩhoya Ngai
2Kings6:18 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings6:19 Nake Elisha akĩmera atĩrĩ
2Kings6:20 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings6:21 Nake mũthamaki wa Isiraeli aamona
2Kings6:22 Nake agĩcokia atĩrĩ
2Kings6:23 Nake mũthamaki ũcio agĩkĩmathondekithiria irio nyingĩ; nao maarĩkia kũrĩa na kũnyua
2Kings6:24 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings6:25 Nakuo gũkĩgĩa ng’aragu nene mũno kũu Samaria; na atĩrĩrĩ
2Kings6:26 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings6:27 Nake akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings6:28 Ningĩ mũthamaki akĩmũũria atĩrĩ

2Kings6:32 No rĩrĩ
2Kings6:33 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings7:1 Nake Elisha agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings7:2 Nake mũnene ũrĩa mũthamaki etiiranagia na guoko gwake agĩcokeria mũndũ ũcio wa Ngai
2Kings7:3 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings7:4 Tũngiuga uũ: Nĩtũgũtonya itũũra
2Kings7:5 Magĩkĩroka gũũkĩra na maairia nĩguo mathiĩ kĩraaro-inĩ gĩa Asuriata. Nao maakinya o nyumĩrĩra-inĩ ya kĩraaro kĩu gĩa Asuriata-rĩ
2Kings7:6 Nĩ ũndũ Jehova nĩaatũmĩte mbũtũ cia ita cia Asuriara ciigue mũruruno ta wa ngari cia ita
2Kings7:7 Na tondũ ũcio makĩroka gũũkĩra na mairia makĩũra
2Kings7:8 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings7:9 Magĩgĩcoka makĩĩrana o mũndũ na mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ atĩrĩ
2Kings7:10 Tondũ ũcio magĩgĩthiĩ magĩĩta aikaria kĩhingo gĩa itũũra makĩmahe ũhoro
2Kings7:11 Nao aikaria acio a kĩhingo magĩkĩanĩrĩra makĩheana ũhoro ũcio kũu nyũmba ya mũthamaki.
2Kings7:12 Nake mũthamaki akĩarahũka o ũtukũ
2Kings7:13 Mũndũ ũmwe wa ndungata ciake agĩgĩcokia
2Kings7:14 Tondũ ũcio magĩkĩoya ngari igĩrĩ cia ita hamwe na mbarathi
2Kings7:15 Nao magĩkĩmarũmĩrĩra o nginya magĩkinya Jorodani; na atĩrĩrĩ
2Kings7:16 Nao andũ makiumagara
2Kings7:17 Nake mũthamaki agĩgĩtua atĩ mũnene ũcio etiiranagia na guoko gwake aikarie kĩhingo gĩa itũũra; nao andũ makĩmũrangĩrĩria o hau kĩhingo-inĩ kĩu
2Kings7:18 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings7:19 na hĩndĩ ĩo mũnene ũcio wa athigari agĩcokeria mũndũ ũcio wa Ngai akiuga ũũ: Hĩ! O na Jehova angĩtua ndirica igũrũ-rĩ
2Kings7:20 naguo ũguo noguo gwakinyire ũhoro-inĩ wake; nĩ gũkorũo nĩmaamũrangĩrĩirie o hau kĩhingo-inĩ
2Kings8:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings8:2 Nake mũtumia ũcio agĩũkĩra
2Kings8:3 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings8:4 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings8:5 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings8:6 Nake mũthamaki aahoya mũtumia ũhoro ũcio
2Kings8:7 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings8:8 Nake mũthamaki akĩĩra Hazaeli atĩrĩ
2Kings8:9 Tondũ ũcio Hazaeli agĩgĩthiĩ gũtũngana nake akuuĩte kĩheo kĩa indo iria ciothe njega cia Dameski
2Kings8:10 Nake Elisha agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings8:11 Nake Elisha agĩgĩikara amũcũthĩrĩirie amũroretie ũthiũ amũkũũrĩire maitho
2Kings8:12 Nake Hazaeli agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Kings8:13 Nake Hazaeli akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings8:14 Hĩndĩ ĩo agĩgĩthiĩ akiuma harĩ Elisha
2Kings8:15 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings8:16 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings8:17 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings8:18 Nake akĩrũmĩrĩra mĩthiĩre ya athamaki a Isiraeli
2Kings8:19 No rĩrĩ
2Kings8:20 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings8:21 Hĩndĩ ĩo Joramu akĩringa agĩthiĩ Zairu
2Kings8:22 Ũguo nĩguo Aedomu mokĩrĩire athamaki a Juda makĩmarema
2Kings8:23 Nacio ciĩko iria ingĩ cia Joramu
2Kings8:24 Nake Joramu agĩgĩkoma hamwe na maithe
2Kings8:25 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings8:26 Nake Ahazia aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩĩrĩ rĩrĩa aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka; nake agĩthamaka mwaka ũmwe kũu Jerusalemu. Nake nyina etagwo Athalia
2Kings8:27 Nake agĩkĩrũmĩrĩra mĩthiĩre ĩrĩa nyũmba ya Ahabu yathiaga nayo
2Kings8:28 Nao magĩthiĩ na Joramu wa Ahabu
2Kings8:29 Nake mũthamaki
2Kings9:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings9:2 Na wakinya kuo ũcarie Jehu
2Kings9:3 Ũcoke woe kĩnandũ kĩu kĩa maguta
2Kings9:4 Tondũ ũcio mwanake ũcio
2Kings9:5 Na rĩrĩa aakinyire kuo
2Kings9:6 Nake agĩgĩũkĩra agĩtonya nyũmba; nake mũndũ ũcio akĩmũitĩrĩria maguta mũtwe
2Kings9:7 Nawe-rĩ
2Kings9:8 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
2Kings9:9 Nayo nyũmba ya Ahabu ndĩmĩtue o ta nyũmba ya Jeroboamu wa Nebati
2Kings9:10 Nacio ngui ĩkarĩĩra Jezebeli o kũu gĩcigo-inĩ gĩa gĩthaka kĩa Jezireeli
2Kings9:11 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jehu agĩkiuma
2Kings9:12 Nao makiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings9:13 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũndũ o mũndũ wao akĩhiũha kuoya nguo yake ya igũrũ
2Kings9:14 Ũguo nĩguo Jehu
2Kings9:15 no rĩrĩ
2Kings9:16 Nake Jehu agĩkĩhaica ngari agĩthiĩ Jezireeli
2Kings9:17 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings9:18 Tondũ ũcio hagĩgĩthiĩ mũndũ ũmwe ahaicĩte mbarathi agacemanie nake
2Kings9:19 Hĩndĩ ĩo agĩcoka akĩrekia mũndũ ũngĩ wa kerĩ ahaicĩte mbarathi
2Kings9:20 Ningĩ mũrangĩri ũcio akĩheana ũhoro
2Kings9:21 Nake Joramu akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings9:22 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings9:23 Nake Joramu akĩgarũrithia ngari yake
2Kings9:24 Nake Jehu akĩgeta ũta wake na hinya wake wothe akĩratha Joramu gatagatĩ ga ciande
2Kings9:25 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jehu akĩĩra Bidikari
2Kings9:26 Jehova oiga ũũ: Ti-itherũ ira nĩ kuona ndĩronire thakame ya Nabothu
2Kings9:27 No rĩrĩ
2Kings9:28 Nacio ndungata ciake ikĩmũkuua na ngari ikĩmũkinyia Jerusalemu
2Kings9:29 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings9:30 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings9:31 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings9:32 Nake agĩgĩtiira ũthiũ agĩcũthĩrĩria ndirica-inĩ hau aarĩ
2Kings9:33 Nake agĩkĩmera atĩrĩ
2Kings9:34 Nake aarĩkia gũtonya nyũmba thĩinĩ
2Kings9:35 Nao andũ ake magĩgĩthiĩ kũmũthika; no matiakorire kĩĩga o na kĩmwe kĩa mwĩrĩ wake tiga o kĩongo giiki
2Kings9:36 Tondũ ũcio magĩgĩcoka harĩ we
2Kings9:37 o nakĩo kĩimba kĩa Jezebeli gĩgatuĩka o ta rũrua rũaraganĩte kũu mũgũnda ũcio wa Jezireeli; nĩguo andũ matikanoige atĩrĩ
2Kings10:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings10:2 Atĩrĩrĩ
2Kings10:3 cariai thĩinĩ wa ariũ a mwathi wanyu mũndũ ũrĩa mwega na mwagĩrĩru mũno
2Kings10:4 No andũ acio magĩĩtigĩra o mũno mũno ma
2Kings10:5 Nake mũndũ ũrĩa warĩ mũrori wa maũndũ mothe ma nyũmba ya mũthamaki
2Kings10:6 Hĩndĩ ĩo agĩcoka akĩmaandĩkĩra marũa o hĩndĩ ya kerĩ
2Kings10:7 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings10:8 Naho hagĩgĩthiĩ mũndũ wareketio akĩmũhe ũhoro
2Kings10:9 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings10:10 Menyai rĩu atĩ hatirĩ kiugo o na kĩmwe kĩa Jehova kĩa ũhoro ũrĩa aaririe ũkoniĩ nyũmba ya Ahabu kĩngĩaga kũhingio; nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
2Kings10:11 Tondũ ũcio Jehu agĩkĩũraga arĩa othe maatigarĩte kũu Jezireeli a nyũmba ya Ahabu
2Kings10:12 Nake Jehu agĩũkĩra akĩĩeherera kũu
2Kings10:13 agĩcemania na ariũ a ithe na Ahazia
2Kings10:14 Nake agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings10:15 Nake oima hau
2Kings10:16 Nake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings10:17 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings10:18 Ningĩ Jehu agĩkĩũnganithia andũ othe
2Kings10:19 Tondũ ũcio njĩtĩrai anabii othe a Baali
2Kings10:20 Nake Jehu akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings10:21 Nake Jehu akĩrekania Isiraeli guothe; nao andũ othe arĩa maahoyaga Baali magĩgĩthiĩ kuo
2Kings10:22 Nake agĩkĩĩra mũrori wa harĩa nguo cia nyũmba ĩo ciaigagwo ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
2Kings10:23 Nake Jehu
2Kings10:24 Nao magĩgĩtonya nyũmba thĩinĩ nĩguo makarute magongona
2Kings10:25 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings10:26 Nacio itugĩ iria ciahandĩtwo cia kũhoerũo Baali
2Kings10:27 O nakĩo gĩtugĩ kĩa ihoero rĩa Baali magĩkiunanga magĩkĩgũithia thĩ
2Kings10:28 Ũguo nĩguo Jehu aaninire ũhoro wothe wa kũhoya Baali kũu Isiraeli.
2Kings10:29 No rĩrĩ
2Kings10:30 Nake Jehova agĩkĩĩra Jehu atĩrĩ
2Kings10:31 No Jehu ndaigana kwĩmenyerera nĩguo athiage arũmĩrĩire watho wa Jehova
2Kings10:32 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings10:33 akĩmatunya bũrũri wothe wa Gileadi
2Kings10:34 Nacio ciĩko iria ingĩ cia Jehu
2Kings10:35 Nake Jehu agĩgĩkoma hamwe na maithe; nao andũ makĩmũthika Samaria. Nake Jehoahazu
2Kings10:36 Narĩo ihinda rĩrĩa Jehu aathamakĩire Isiraeli
2Kings11:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings11:2 No rĩrĩ
2Kings11:3 Nake agĩtũũra ahithĩtwo nĩwe nyũmba ya Jehova mĩaka ĩtandatũ; narĩo ihinda rĩu Athalia nĩwe wathamakaga bũrũri ũcio.
2Kings11:4 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings11:5 Nake Jehoiada akĩmaatha
2Kings11:6 o nao andũ arĩa angĩ gĩcunjĩ gĩa gatatũ maikare kĩhingo-inĩ kĩrĩa gĩĩtagwo Suri; o nao andũ arĩa angĩ gĩcunjĩ gĩa gatatũ maikare kĩhingo-inĩ kĩrĩa kĩĩ na thutha wa arangĩri acio; ũguo nĩguo mũkarangĩra nyũmba ĩo mũriĩre andũ.
2Kings11:7 Nacio mbũtũ iria igĩrĩ cianyu
2Kings11:8 Nĩ gũthiũrũrũkĩria mũgathiũrũrũkĩria mũthamaki ũyũ witũ na mĩena yothe
2Kings11:9 Nao anene acio maathaga athigari igana magĩĩka o ta ũrĩa maũndũ mothe maatariĩ marĩa Jehoiada mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai aamaathire nao mũndũ o mũndũ akĩoya andũ ake
2Kings11:10 Nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai akĩrutĩra anene arĩa maathaga athigari igana matimũ na ngo iria ciarĩ cia mũthamaki Daudi
2Kings11:11 Nao arangĩri acio makĩrũgama
2Kings11:12 Hĩndĩ ĩo agĩkĩruta mũrũ wa mũthamaki
2Kings11:13 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings11:14 agĩgĩcũthĩrĩria
2Kings11:15 Nake Jehoiada mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai agĩatha anene a athigari igana igana arĩa maaigĩtwo marorage mbũtũ cia ita
2Kings11:16 Tondũ ũcio magĩkĩmweherera; nake akĩgera njĩra ĩrĩa yageragwo nĩ mbarathi igĩthiĩ nyũmba ya mũthamaki; nakuo kũu nĩkuo oragĩirũo.
2Kings11:17 Nake Jehoiada agĩgĩtũma harĩkanĩrũo kĩrĩkanĩro gĩkoniĩ Jehova
2Kings11:18 Nao andũ othe a bũrũri ũcio magĩgĩthiĩ nyũmba ya Baali
2Kings11:19 Nake akĩoya andũ arĩa maathaga athigari igana igana
2Kings11:20 Na tondũ ũcio andũ othe a bũrũri ũcio magĩkena
2Kings11:21 Nake Jehoashu aarĩ wa mĩaka mũgwanja hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka.
2Kings12:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings12:2 Nake Jehoashu agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ mega nĩ Jehova ihinda rĩrĩa rĩothe Jehoiada
2Kings12:3 No rĩrĩ
2Kings12:4 Nake Jehoashu agĩkĩĩra athĩnjĩri-Ngai atĩrĩ

2Kings12:6 No rĩrĩ

2Kings12:12 o na aaki na mahiga

2Kings13:12 Na rĩrĩ

2Kings14:20 Thutha wa ũguo magĩkĩmũcokia aigĩrĩirũo mbarathi igũrũ; agĩthikwo o kũu Jerusalemu itũũra rĩa Daudi hamwe na maithe.
2Kings14:21 Nao andũ othe a Juda makĩoya Azaria

2Kings14:23 Na rĩrĩ

2Kings14:25 Nake agĩcokithia mũhaka wa bũrũri wa Isiraeli
2Kings14:26 Nĩ gũkorũo Jehova nĩonire atĩ gũthĩnio kũrĩa Aisiraeli maathĩnagio kwarĩ kũnene mũno; nĩ ũndũ gũtiatigarĩte andũ marĩ ũkombo-inĩ
2Kings14:27 Nake Jehova ndaigana kuuga atĩ nĩekũhuura rĩĩtwa rĩa Isiraeli rĩthenge gũkũ thĩ guothe; no nĩ kũhonokia aamahonokirie na ũndũ wa Jeroboamu
2Kings14:28 Na rĩrĩ

2Kings15:3 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ mega nĩ Jehova

2Kings15:7 Nake Azaria agĩgĩkoma hamwe na maithe; nao makĩmũthika hamwe na maithe itũũra rĩa Daudi; nake Jothamu

2Kings15:13 Na rĩrĩ

2Kings15:19 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings15:20 Nake Menahemu agĩĩtia ciringi icio kũrĩ Aisiraeli
2Kings15:21 Na rĩrĩ
