2Kings15:38 Nake Jothamu agĩkoma hamwe na maithe
2Kings16:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings16:2 Nake Ahazu aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka; agĩthamaka mĩaka ikũmi na ĩtandatũ kũu Jerusalemu; na ndaigana gwĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ mega nĩ Jehova Ngai wake
2Kings16:3 No rĩrĩ
2Kings16:4 Nake nĩaarutagĩra magongona matĩri-inĩ ma kũndũ gũtũũgĩru o na irĩma-inĩ
2Kings16:5 Hĩndĩ ĩo Rezini mũthamaki wa Suriata
2Kings16:6 Ningĩ matukũ-inĩ macio Rezini
2Kings16:7 Tondũ ũcio Ahazu agĩkĩrekia andũ mathiĩ gwĩ Tigilathu-pileseru
2Kings16:8 Nake Ahazu agĩkĩoya betha o na thahabu ciothe iria cionekire nyũmba ya Jehova thĩinĩ
2Kings16:9 Nake mũthamaki ũcio wa Ashuri agĩkĩmũigua
2Kings16:10 Nake Ahazu
2Kings16:11 Nake Urija
2Kings16:12 Nake mũthamaki oima Dameski
2Kings16:13 Agĩcinĩra mahaki ma njino igũrũ rĩa kĩgongona kĩu
2Kings16:14 Nakĩo kĩgongona gĩa gĩcango kĩrĩa kĩarĩ mbere ya Jehova
2Kings16:15 Nake Ahazu
2Kings16:16 Ũguo nĩguo Urija
2Kings16:17 Nake Ahazu mũthamaki akĩrenga ithuma cia inyamũ iria ciahaanaga ta ngari
2Kings16:18 Nako gathaku karĩa gaathondeketwo nyũmba-inĩ ĩo gakoniĩ mũthenya wa thabatũ
2Kings16:19 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings16:20 Nake Ahazu agĩkoma hamwe na maithe
2Kings17:1 Na rĩri
2Kings17:2 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ moru nĩ Jehova; no ti ta athamaki a Isiraeli arĩa maarĩ mbere yake.
2Kings17:3 Nake Shalimaneseru
2Kings17:4 Thutha ũcio mũthamiki wa Ashuri akĩona atĩ Hoshea nĩagĩĩte ndundu ya kũmũũkĩrĩra
2Kings17:5 Agĩgĩcoka akĩambata
2Kings17:6 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings17:7 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings17:8 o na ikarũmĩrĩra irĩra cia watho wa kũrũmĩrĩrũo cia ndũrĩrĩ iria Jehova aaingatire ciehere mbere ya ciana cia Isiraeli
2Kings17:9 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli igĩĩka Jehova Ngai wacio maũndũ materekereire na hitho; nacio igĩkĩĩyakĩra matĩri ma kũndũ gũtũũgĩru matũũra-inĩ ma cio mothe kũndũ guothe
2Kings17:10 Ningĩ ikĩĩhandĩra itugĩ cia kũhoyũo
2Kings17:11 Nakuo kũu igĩgĩcinĩra ũbumba matĩri-inĩ mothe ma kũndũ gũtũũgĩru
2Kings17:12 nacio igĩtungatĩra mĩhianano ya kũhoyũo o ĩrĩa Jehova aaciheete ũhoro wayo agaciĩra ũũ: Mũtikaneke ũndũ ũcio.
2Kings17:13 No rĩrĩ
2Kings17:14 No rĩrĩ
2Kings17:15 Ningĩ makĩrega kũrũmĩrĩra irĩra cia watho wake wa kũrũmĩrĩrũo
2Kings17:16 Nao magĩtigana na maathani mothe ma Jehova Ngai wao
2Kings17:17 Ningĩ makĩhĩtũkithĩria ariũ ao o na airĩtu ao mwaki-inĩ
2Kings17:18 Tondũ ũcio Jehova agĩkĩrakario mũno mũno nĩ Isiraeli
2Kings17:19 Ningĩ o nao andũ a Juda matiigana kũmenyerera maathani ma Jehova Ngai wao
2Kings17:20 Nake Jehova akĩrega mbeũ yothe ya Isiraeli
2Kings17:21 Nĩ ũndũ nĩaamũranirie Isiraeli na nyũmba ya Daudi
2Kings17:22 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli ikĩrũmĩrĩra mehia mothe ma Jeroboamu marĩa ehirie
2Kings17:23 o nginya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jehova eheririe Isiraeli ũthiũ-inĩ wake
2Kings17:24 Nake mũthamaki wa Ashuri agĩtwarithia andũ amarutĩte Babuloni na Kutha
2Kings17:25 Na gũgĩtuĩka atĩrĩ
2Kings17:26 Tondũ ũcio andũ magĩkĩaria na mũthamaki wa Ashuri
2Kings17:27 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũthamaki wa Ashuri agĩgĩathana
2Kings17:28 Tondũ ũcio ũmwe wa athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa maatahĩte
2Kings17:29 No rĩrĩ
2Kings17:30 Nao andũ a Babuloni magĩthondeka mũhianano wĩtagwo Sukothu-benothu; nao andũ a Kuthi magĩthondeka Nerigali; o nao andũ a Hamathu magĩthondeka Ashima;
2Kings17:31 nao Aavi magĩthondeka Nibihazu na Tarataka; nao Asefarivi magĩcinĩra Adarameleku na Anameleku
2Kings17:32 Ũguo nĩguo gwatuĩkire atĩ magĩĩtigĩra Jehova
2Kings17:33 Magĩgĩikara metigĩrĩte Jehova
2Kings17:34 Nao andũ acio
2Kings17:35 Nao andũ acio nĩo Jehova aarĩkanĩire kĩrĩkanĩro nao; akĩmataara
2Kings17:36 no rĩrĩ
2Kings17:37 nacio irĩra iria atuĩte cia watho wa kũrũmĩrĩrũo
2Kings17:38 o nakĩo kĩrĩkanĩro kĩrĩa ndĩkanĩire na inyuĩ mũtikanariganĩrũo nĩkĩo; o na kana mwĩtigĩre ngai ingĩ.
2Kings17:39 No rĩrĩ
2Kings17:40 No rĩrĩ
2Kings17:41 Ũguo noguo gwatuĩkire atĩ ndũrĩrĩ icio igĩikara ciĩtigĩrĩte Jehova
2Kings18:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings18:2 Nake aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtano hĩndĩ ĩo aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka; agĩgĩthamaka mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na kenda Jerusalemu; nake nyina etagwo Abi
2Kings18:3 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ mega nĩ Jehova
2Kings18:4 Agĩkĩeheria matĩri ma kũndũ gũtũũgĩru
2Kings18:5 Nake agĩgĩtũũra ehokete Jehova
2Kings18:6 Nĩ ũndũ nĩaatũũrire egwatanĩtie na Jehova mũno
2Kings18:7 Nake Jehova agĩgĩikara hamwe nake; nakuo kũndũ kũrĩa guothe erekagĩra
2Kings18:8 Nake akĩhũra Afilisiti o nginya Gaza
2Kings18:9 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings18:10 Na mĩaka ĩtatũ yathira makĩrĩtunyana; naguo nĩguo mwaka wa ĩtandatũ ĩrĩa Hezekia aakorirũo athamakĩte
2Kings18:11 Nake mũthamaki wa Ashuri agĩgĩtaha andũ a Isiraeli
2Kings18:12 ũguo nĩguo gwakinyire nĩ ũndũ nĩmaaregire gwathĩkĩra uuge wa Jehova Ngai wao
2Kings18:13 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings18:14 Nake Hezekia
2Kings18:15 Nake Hezekia agĩkĩmũhe betha yothe ĩrĩa yonekire thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ya Jehova
2Kings18:16 Ningĩ hĩndĩ ĩo Hezekia mũthamaki wa Juda
2Kings18:17 Ningĩ mũthamaki wa Ashuri akĩrekia Taritani
2Kings18:18 Nao meta mũthamaki-rĩ
2Kings18:19 Nake Rabishake akĩmera atĩrĩ
2Kings18:20 Wee uugaga ũũ: Ũtaarani wĩ ho
2Kings18:21 Atĩrĩrĩ
2Kings18:22 No mũngĩnjĩra ũũ: Ithuĩ twĩhokete Jehova Ngai witũ-rĩ
2Kings18:23 Na tondũ ũcio ta kĩgĩe na karĩko na mwathi wakwa
2Kings18:24 Rĩu-rĩ
2Kings18:25 Kaĩ mũgwĩciria atĩ nyambatĩte ’hũrane na kũndũ gũkũ ndĩkũnine Jehova atarĩ ũhoro-inĩ ũcio? Jehova nĩwe wanjĩrire atĩrĩ
2Kings18:26 Hĩndĩ ĩo Eliakimu wa Hilikia
2Kings18:27 No Rabishake agĩcokia atĩrĩ
2Kings18:28 Hĩndĩ ĩo Rabishake akĩrũgama
2Kings18:29 Mũthamaki ũcio oigĩte ũũ: Menyai mũreke Hezekia amũhenie
2Kings18:30 o na ningĩ menyai mũreke Hezekia atũme mwĩhoke Jehova akiuga atĩ
2Kings18:31 Tigai kũigua ũhoro ũrĩa mũkũheo nĩ Hezekia; nĩ gũkorũo mũthamaki wa Ashuri oigĩte atĩrĩ
2Kings18:32 o nginya rĩrĩa ngoka kũmũiyĩra ndĩmũtware bũrũri ũtariĩ o ta bũrũri ũyũ wanyu
2Kings18:33 Rĩu-rĩ
2Kings18:34 Hĩ! ngai cia Hamathu-rĩ
2Kings18:35 Nĩ ngai irĩkũ thĩinĩ wa ngai ciothe cia mabũrũri mothe irĩ ciahonokia bũrũri wacio
2Kings18:36 No rĩrĩ
2Kings18:37 Hĩndĩ ĩo Eliakimu wa Hilikia
2Kings19:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings19:2 Ningĩ akĩrekia Eliakimu
2Kings19:3 Magĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings19:4 No gũkorũo Jehova Ngai waku nĩaiguĩte ũhoro wothe ũrĩa warĩtio nĩ Rabishake
2Kings19:5 Ndungata icio cia Hezekia
2Kings19:6 Nake Isaia agĩciĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings19:7 Atĩrĩrĩ
2Kings19:8 Nake Rabishake agĩkĩhũndũka
2Kings19:9 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings19:10 Thiĩi mwarie na Hezekia
2Kings19:11 Atĩrĩrĩ
2Kings19:12 Kũrĩ kwoneka hihi atĩ ngai cia andũ a ndũrĩrĩ iria aa baba maaninire o kũnina biũ nĩimahonoketie
2Kings19:13 Rĩu-rĩ
2Kings19:14 Nake Hezekia akĩiyũkia marũa macio moko-inĩ ma andũ acio maareketio
2Kings19:15 Nake Hezekia akĩhoera Jehova o hau mbere yake
2Kings19:16 Tega gũtũ
2Kings19:17 Ti-itherũ
2Kings19:18 o na magĩikia ngai ciacio mwaki-inĩ; nĩ ũndũ itikoragwo irĩ ngai cia ma
2Kings19:19 Tondũ ũcio
2Kings19:20 Hĩndĩ ĩo Isaia
2Kings19:21 Naguo ũhoro ũrĩa Jehova aarĩtie ũmũkoniĩ nĩguo ũyũ: Mũirĩtu gathirange mwarĩ wa Zayuni nĩ kũmena akũmenete
2Kings19:22 Rĩu-rĩ
2Kings19:23 Wee-rĩ
2Kings19:24 Nĩndĩĩyenjeire maĩ ma kũndũ kũngĩ
2Kings19:25 Jehova arakĩũria ũũ: Kaĩ ũtarĩ waigua atĩ nĩ niĩ ndekire maũndũ maya o tene
2Kings19:26 Tondũ ũcio andũ arĩa maamatũũraga-rĩ
2Kings19:27 No rĩrĩ
2Kings19:28 Tondũ wa marakara macio ũndakarĩire
2Kings19:29 Wee nawe Hezekia-rĩ
2Kings19:30 Namo matigari marĩa mahonokete ma nyũmba ya Juda nĩmagacoka gũikũrũkia mĩri na thĩ; nakuo na igũrũ maciare maciare.
2Kings19:31 Nĩ gũkorũo Jerusalemu nĩgũkoima matigari ma andũ
2Kings19:32 Tondũ ũcio
2Kings19:33 Njĩra ĩrĩa okĩire-rĩ
2Kings19:34 Nĩ gũkorũo nĩngagitĩra itũũra rĩrĩ ndĩrĩhonokie nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoro wakwa niĩ mwene
2Kings19:35 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings19:36 Tondũ ũcio Senakeribu
2Kings19:37 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings20:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings20:2 Nake agĩkĩhũgũra ũthiũ akĩũroria rũthingo-inĩ
2Kings20:3 Wee
2Kings20:4 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings20:5 Garũrũka ũcoke wĩre Hezekia
2Kings20:6 Namo matukũ maku nĩngũmongerera mĩaka ikũmi na ĩtano; nawe wee mwene hamwe na itũũra rĩrĩ nĩngũmũhonokia mũtikegwatĩrũo nĩ mũthamaki wa Ashuri narĩo itũũra rĩrĩ
2Kings20:7 Nake Isaia akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings20:8 Nake Hezekia akĩũria Isaia atĩrĩ
2Kings20:9 Nake Isaia akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings20:10 Nake Hezekia agĩcokia atĩrĩ
2Kings20:11 Nake Isaia mũnabii agĩkaĩra Jehova; nake Jehova agĩcokia kĩĩruru na thutha matĩĩna ikũmi
2Kings20:12 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings20:13 Nake Hezekia agĩĩtĩkĩra ũhoro wa andũ acio
2Kings20:14 Hĩndĩ ĩo Isaia
2Kings20:15 Agĩkĩũria atĩrĩ
2Kings20:16 Nake Isaia akĩĩra Hezekia atĩrĩ
2Kings20:17 Atĩrĩrĩ
2Kings20:18 Nacio ihĩĩ ciaku iria ũgaciara ciume mũthimo waku nĩmagataha imwe ciacio igatũũre nyũmba ya mũthamaki wa Babuloni irĩ cia thiritũ ya andũ arĩa mehokeirũo wĩra wa nyũmba yake.
2Kings20:19 Hĩndĩ ĩo Hezekia agĩkĩĩra Isaia atĩrĩ
2Kings20:20 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings20:21 Nake Hezekia agĩkoma hamwe na maithe; nake Manase
2Kings21:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings21:2 Nake agĩgĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ moru nĩ Jehova
2Kings21:3 Nĩ ũndũ nĩaacokire gwaka matĩri ma kũndũ gũtũũgĩru marĩa ithe
2Kings21:4 Ningĩ agĩakithia igongona kũu nyũmba ya Jehova thĩinĩ
2Kings21:5 Agĩgĩakithĩria mbũtũ yothe ya igũrũ igongona o kũu nja cierĩ cia nyũmba ya Jehova.
2Kings21:6 Ningĩ akĩhĩtũkithĩria mũrũwe mwaki-inĩ
2Kings21:7 Nayo Ashera ĩrĩa aathondekete
2Kings21:8 na ndikareka magũrũ ma Isiraeli macoke kũũrũra o na hanini moimĩte bũrũri ũrĩa ndaheire maithe mao
2Kings21:9 No rĩrĩ
2Kings21:10 Nake Jehova agĩkĩaria na kanua ka ndungata ciake cia anabii
2Kings21:11 Tondũ Manase
2Kings21:12 tondũ ũcio Jehova
2Kings21:13 Narĩo Jerusalemu nĩngarĩtambũrũkĩria rũkwaro rũa gũthima rũrĩa ndathimire Samaria naruo
2Kings21:14 O namo matigari ma andũ arĩa maarĩ akwa ndĩmate biũ
2Kings21:15 nĩ ũndũ nĩmekĩte maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ moru nĩ niĩ
2Kings21:16 Ningĩ Manase nĩaakĩrĩrĩirie mũno gũita thakame ĩrĩa ĩtarĩ na ũũru o nginya akĩmĩiyũria Jerusalemu
2Kings21:17 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings21:18 Nake Manase agĩkoma hamwe na maithe
2Kings21:19 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings21:20 Nake agĩgĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ moru nĩ Jehova
2Kings21:21 Agĩthiĩ na mĩthiĩre ĩrĩa yothe ithe aathiaga nayo
2Kings21:22 agĩgĩtigana na Jehova
2Kings21:23 Nacio ndungata cia Amoni ikĩmũgĩĩra ndundu imũũkĩrĩre
2Kings21:24 No andũ a bũrũri ũcio magĩkĩũraga andũ othe arĩa maagĩĩrĩire mũthamaki ũcio
2Kings21:25 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings21:26 Nake agĩthikwo mbĩrĩra-inĩ yake
2Kings22:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings22:2 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ mega nĩ Jehova
2Kings22:3 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings22:4 Ambata ũkinye he Hilikia
2Kings22:5 nao macineane harĩ anyabara arĩa marutithagia wĩra wa nyũmba ya Jehova; nao acio macihe aruti wĩra arĩa marĩ nyũmba ya Jehova
2Kings22:6 macihe atharamara
2Kings22:7 No rĩrĩ
2Kings22:8 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings22:9 Nake Shafani
2Kings22:10 Ningĩ Shafani
2Kings22:11 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings22:12 Nake mũthamaki agĩgĩatha Hilikia mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai
2Kings22:13 Thiĩi mũgatuĩrie ũhoro he Jehova nĩ ũndũ wakwa o na ũndũ wa andũ a bũrũri wakwa
2Kings22:14 Tondũ ũcio Hilikia
2Kings22:15 Nake akĩmera ũũ: Jehova
2Kings22:16 Jehova oigĩte atĩrĩ
2Kings22:17 tondũ nĩmaatiganire na niĩ
2Kings22:18 No rĩrĩ
2Kings22:19 tondũ ngoro yaku nĩyororoire
2Kings22:20 Na atĩrĩrĩ
2Kings23:1 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩrekania
2Kings23:2 Nake mũthamaki akĩambata
2Kings23:3 Nake mũthamaki akĩrũgama gĩtugĩ-inĩ
2Kings23:4 Nake mũthamaki agĩatha Hilikia
2Kings23:5 Ningĩ athĩnjĩri-ngai cia mĩhianano arĩa maatuĩtwo nĩ athamaki a Juda a gũcinagĩra ũbumba matĩri-inĩ ma kũndũ gũtũũgĩru
2Kings23:6 Nayo Ashera ĩrĩa yarĩ kũu nyũmba ya Jehova thĩinĩ
2Kings23:7 O nacio nyũmba cia ũmaraya wa arũme na arũme agĩcitharia
2Kings23:8 Nake agĩkĩruta athĩnjĩri-ngai othe matũũra-inĩ ma Juda; o namo matĩri ma kũndũ gũtũũgĩru marĩa athĩnjĩri-ngai maacinagĩra ũbumba akĩmathũkia
2Kings23:9 No rĩrĩ
2Kings23:10 Ningĩ agĩthũkia Tofeti
2Kings23:11 O na ningĩ akĩeheria mbarathi iria ciaamũrĩirũo riũa nĩ athamaki a Juda
2Kings23:12 Nacio igongona iria ciaakĩtwo igũrũ rĩa kanyũmba ka Ahazu
2Kings23:13 Namo matĩri ma kũndũ gũtũũgĩru marĩa maarĩ o hau mbere ya Jerusalemu
2Kings23:14 O nacio itugĩ cia kũhoyũo agĩciunanga tũcunjĩ
2Kings23:15 O na ningĩ kĩgongona kĩrĩa kĩarĩ Beth-eli
2Kings23:16 Nake Josia rĩrĩa ehũgũraga
2Kings23:17 Agĩgĩcoka akĩũria atĩrĩ
2Kings23:18 Nake akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings23:19 Nacio nyũmba ciothe cia matĩri-inĩ marĩa maarĩ matũũra-inĩ ma Samaria
2Kings23:20 Nao athĩnjĩri-ngai othe a matĩri-inĩ macio makuo
2Kings23:21 Nake mũthamaki agĩatha andũ othe akĩmera atĩrĩ
2Kings23:22 Na ti-itherũ gũtirĩ kwarĩo Bathaka ĩngĩ ta ĩo
2Kings23:23 naguo mwaka wa ikũmi na ĩnana ĩrĩa Josia ũcio mũthamaki aakorirũo athamakĩte
2Kings23:24 Ningĩ-rĩ
2Kings23:25 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings23:26 No ningĩ-rĩ
2Kings23:27 Ningĩ Jehova akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings23:28 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings23:29 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings23:30 Nacio ndungata ciake ikĩmũkuua na ngari arĩ mũkuũ
2Kings23:31 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings23:32 Nake agĩgĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ moru nĩ Jehova
2Kings23:33 Nake Firauni-neko akĩmuohera na mĩnyororo o kũu Ribila
2Kings23:34 Nake Firauni-neko agĩtua Eliakimu

2Kings24:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings24:2 Nake Jehova akĩmũrekeria mbũtũ cia gũtahana cia Akalidei
2Kings24:3 Ti-itherũ maũndũ macio maakorire andũ acio a Juda nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa gwathanĩtwo nĩ Jehova
2Kings24:4 o na ningĩ nĩ ũndũ wa thakame ĩrĩa aaitithirie ĩtarĩ na ũũru; nĩ gũkorũo nĩaaiyũririe Jerusalemu thakame ĩrĩa ĩtaarĩ na ũũru; nake Jehova ndaigana kuohanĩra ũndũ ũcio.
2Kings24:5 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings24:6 Jehoiakimu agĩgĩkoma hamwe na maithe; nake mũrũwe
2Kings24:7 Nake mũthamaki wa Misiri ndaigana gũcoka kuuma bũrũri wake rĩngĩ o na atĩa; nĩ ũndũ mũthamaki wa Babuloni nĩaatunyanire bũrũri wothe ũrĩa warĩ wa mũthamaki wa Misiri kuuma karũũĩ ka Misiri nginya o rũũĩ rũa Farati.
2Kings24:8 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings24:9 Nake agĩgĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ moru nĩ Jehova
2Kings24:10 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings24:11 Nake Nebukadinezaru
2Kings24:12 nake Jehoiakini
2Kings24:13 Nake Nebukadinezaru agĩkuua indo ciothe cia bata iria ciaigagwo nyũmba ya Jehova agĩthiĩ nacio
2Kings24:14 Nake agĩtaha andũ othe a Jerusalemu
2Kings24:15 Agĩgĩthiĩ na Jehoiakini Babuloni
2Kings24:16 Nao andũ othe arĩa maarĩ hinya
2Kings24:17 Nake mũthamaki wa Babuloni agĩtua Matania
2Kings24:18 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings24:19 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ moru nĩ Jehova
2Kings24:20 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings25:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings25:2 Itũũra rĩu rĩgĩkĩrigicĩrio nĩ getha rĩtunyanwo o nginya mwaka wa ikũmi na ũmwe ĩrĩa Zedekia aakorirũo athamakĩte.
2Kings25:3 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings25:4 Hĩndĩ ĩo rũthingo rũa itũũra rũgĩthario handũ
2Kings25:5 No rĩrĩ
2Kings25:6 Hĩndĩ ĩo Akalidei magĩkĩnyita mũthamaki makĩmũtwara kwĩ mũthamaki wa Babuloni o kũu Ribila; makĩmũtuĩra cira wa ũrĩa mekũmwĩka.
2Kings25:7 Nao makĩũragĩra ariũ a Zedekia o hau mbere yake ameroreire
2Kings25:8 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings25:9 nake agĩgĩcina nyũmba ya Jehova
2Kings25:10 Nayo mbũtũ yothe ya ita cia Akalidei
2Kings25:11 O namo matigari ma andũ arĩa maatigarĩte kũu itũũra-inĩ
2Kings25:12 No rĩrĩ
2Kings25:13 Nacio itugĩ cia icango iria ciarĩ o kũu nyũmba ya Jehova thĩinĩ
2Kings25:14 O nacio nyũngũ
2Kings25:15 O nacio ngĩo cia makara o na mbakũri-rĩ
2Kings25:16 Nacio itugĩ icio cierĩ
2Kings25:17 Ũraihu wa gĩtugĩ kĩmwe warĩ mĩkono ikũmi na ĩnana
2Kings25:18 Nake mũnene ũcio wa arangĩri akĩnyita Seraia
2Kings25:19 nakuo kũu itũũra-inĩ thĩinĩ akĩnyita mũrori ũmwe wa maũndũ ma nyũmba ya mũthamaki ũrĩa wehokeirũo ũrori wa andũ a ita; o na andũ atano thĩinĩ wa arĩa maaikaranagia na mũthamaki
2Kings25:20 Nebuzaradani
2Kings25:21 Nake mũthamaki wa Babuloni akĩmahũra akĩmoragĩra o kũu Ribila
2Kings25:22 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings25:23 Na rĩrĩ
2Kings25:24 Nake Gedalia akĩaria nao akĩmera na mwĩhĩtwa
2Kings25:25 No rĩrĩ
2Kings25:26 Nao andũ othe arĩa anyinyi o na arĩa anene
2Kings25:27 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Kings25:28 nake akĩmwarĩria na ũhoreri
2Kings25:29 Nake akĩmũkũũranĩria nguo ciake cia korokoro-inĩ
2Kings25:30 Naho ha ũhoro wa indo cia kũmũtũũria-rĩ

1Chronicles6:57 Ningĩ ariũ a Haruni makĩheo matũũra ma kũũrĩrũo nĩ mũũragani
1Chronicles6:58 na Hileni
1Chronicles6:59 na Ashani hamwe na ithaka irĩrigicĩirie cia ũrĩithio
1Chronicles6:60 Ningĩ mũhĩrĩga-inĩ wa Benjamini makĩheo Geba hamwe na ithaka irĩrigicĩirie cia ũrĩithio
1Chronicles6:61 Nao arĩa maatigarĩte thĩinĩ wa ariũ a Kohathu
1Chronicles6:62 Nao ariũ a Gerishomu makĩheo matũũra ikũmi na matatũ
1Chronicles6:63 O nao ariũ a Merari makĩheo matũũra ikũmi na merĩ
1Chronicles6:64 Ũguo nĩguo ciana cia Isiraeli ciakĩheire Alawii matũũra hamwe na ithaka imarigicĩirie cia ũrĩithio.
1Chronicles6:65 Nacio ciaheanire matũũra macio magwetetwo marĩĩtwa mamo na ũndũ wa kũmacukĩra mĩtĩ
1Chronicles6:66 Na mbarĩ imwe cia ariũ a Kohathu ikĩheo matũũra ma gũtuĩka ma cio mũhĩrĩga-inĩ wa Efiraimu.
1Chronicles6:67 Andũ magĩkĩmahe matũũra ma kũũrĩrũo nĩ mũũragani
1Chronicles6:68 na Jokimeamu hamwe na ithaka irĩrigicĩirie cia ũrĩithio

1Chronicles6:77 Nao Alawii arĩa maatigarire

1Chronicles9:20 nake Finehasi
1Chronicles9:21 O nake Zekaria
1Chronicles9:22 Nao arĩa othe maathurirũo matuĩke aikaria mĩrango maarĩ andũ magana merĩ na ikũmi na erĩ. Nao maatarirũo o ta ũrĩa njiaro ciao ciatariĩ tũtũũra-inĩ twao
1Chronicles9:23 Tondũ ũcio andũ acio o ene
1Chronicles9:24 Nao aikaria acio a mĩrango maaigĩtwo mĩena ĩna
1Chronicles9:25 Nao ariũ a ithe wao a matũũra mao magĩathĩrũo matuanĩra ma gũũkaga kuo mahinda o mahinda
1Chronicles9:26 nĩ gũkorũo aikaria mĩrango arĩa anene ana
1Chronicles9:27 Nao maaraaraga marigicĩirie nyũmba ya Jehova
1Chronicles9:28 Na andũ amwe thĩinĩ wao nĩo maarĩ amenyereri a indo iria ciarutagwo wĩra nacio; nĩ gũkorũo nĩciataragwo igĩtonyio nyũmba thĩinĩ; o na ningĩ ĩkĩrutwo nja no ciataragwo.
1Chronicles9:29 O na ningĩ andũ amwe ao maatuirũo arori a indo iria ciarutagwo wĩra nacio
1Chronicles9:30 Nao andũ amwe thĩinĩ wa athĩnjĩri-Ngai magatukangania mahuti macio manungi wega.

1Chronicles10:4 Hĩndĩ ĩo Saulu agĩkĩĩra mũmũkuuĩri indo ciake cia mbaara atĩrĩ
1Chronicles10:5 Na rĩrĩ

1Chronicles10:7 Na rĩrĩ
1Chronicles10:8 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Chronicles10:9 Magĩkĩmũcuma indo ciake cia mbaara na magĩthiĩ na mũtwe wake; magĩcoka makĩrekania kũndũ guothe bũrũri wa Afilisiti nĩguo makahunjie ũhoro ũcio harĩ ngai ciao cia mĩhianano
1Chronicles10:10 Nacio nguo ciake cia kĩgera cia mbaara magĩciiga nyũmba ya ngai ciao; naguo mũtwe wake makĩwoherera nyũmba ya Dagoni thĩinĩ.

1Chronicles10:12 andũ othe arĩa maarĩ njamba magĩũkĩra

1Chronicles10:14 na ndaigana gũtuĩria ũhoro he Jehova; na tondũ ũcio
1Chronicles11:1 Hĩndĩ ĩo Aisiraeli othe magĩgĩĩcokanĩrĩria he Daudi kũu Hebironi
1Chronicles11:2 O na tene
1Chronicles11:3 Tondũ ũcio athuri othe a Isiraeli magĩthiĩ magĩkinya he mũthamaki o kũu Hebironi; nake Daudi ũcio akĩrĩkanĩrĩra nao kũu Hebironi mbere ya Jehova; nao magĩgĩitĩrĩria Daudi maguta atuĩke mũthamaki wa gũthamakĩra Isiraeli
1Chronicles11:4 Nake Daudi

1Chronicles11:9 Daudi agĩgĩkĩrĩrĩria kũgĩa na ũnene

1Chronicles11:13 Ũcio nĩwe warĩ hamwe na Daudi Pasi-damimu

1Chronicles12:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Chronicles12:2 Nao maakuuaga mota; ningĩ nĩmaahotaga gũikia mahiga na kĩgũtha
1Chronicles12:3 Nake mũnene wao nĩ Ahiezeri
1Chronicles12:4 na Ishimaia
1Chronicles12:5 na Eluzai
1Chronicles12:6 na Elikana
1Chronicles12:7 na Joela
1Chronicles12:8 Na thĩinĩ wa Agadi kwarĩ amwe meamũrire magĩthiĩ kwĩ Daudi kĩhingo-inĩ kĩu gĩaakĩtwo na hinya o kũu werũ-inĩ; nao maarĩ njamba irĩ hinya
1Chronicles12:9 Ezeri nĩwe warĩ mũnene wao
1Chronicles12:10 na wa kana nĩ Mishimana
1Chronicles12:11 na wa gatandatũ nĩ Atai
1Chronicles12:12 na wa anana nĩ Johanani
1Chronicles12:13 na wa ikũmi nĩ Jeremia
1Chronicles12:14 Andũ acio a ariũ a Gadi maarĩ anene a athigari a mbũtũ ya ita; ũrĩa warĩ mũnyinyi gũkĩra arĩa angĩ thĩinĩ wao-rĩ
1Chronicles12:15 Acio nĩo maathiire makĩringa Jorodani
1Chronicles12:16 Nakuo kũu gũgĩthiĩ ciana imwe cia Benjamini
1Chronicles12:17 Nake Daudi akiumagara nĩguo agacitũnge
1Chronicles12:18 Hĩndĩ ĩo Amasai
1Chronicles12:19 Ningĩ haarĩ andũ amwe a Manase morĩire he Daudi hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aathiire hamwe na Afilisiti kũhũrana na Saulu; no matiamateithirie; nĩ gũkorũo aathani a Afilisiti
1Chronicles12:20 Na rĩrĩ
1Chronicles12:21 Nao magĩgĩteithia Daudi kũhũrana na gĩtungati kĩrĩa gĩatharĩkanĩire; nĩ ũndũ othe maarĩ njamba irĩ hinya
1Chronicles12:22 Nĩ ũndũ he Daudi mũthenya o mũthenya nĩhaathiaga andũ makamũteithie
1Chronicles12:23 Na rĩrĩ
1Chronicles12:24 Thĩinĩ wa ciana cia Juda-rĩ
1Chronicles12:25 Ningĩ thĩinĩ wa ciana cia Simeoni
1Chronicles12:26 Ningĩ thĩinĩ wa ciana cia Lawii kwarĩ ngiri inya na magana matandatũ.
1Chronicles12:27 Nake Jehoiada nĩwe warĩ mũtongoria wa nyũmba ya Haruni
1Chronicles12:28 magĩũka na Zadoku
1Chronicles12:29 Ningĩ thĩinĩ wa ciana cia Benjamini
1Chronicles12:30 O na thĩinĩ wa ciana cia Efiraimu maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na magana manana
1Chronicles12:31 O na thĩinĩ wa nuthu ĩrĩa ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase maarĩ ngiri ikũmi na inyanya
1Chronicles12:32 Ningĩ thĩinĩ wa ciana cia Isakaru-rĩ
1Chronicles12:33 O na thĩinĩ wa Zebuluni arĩa maahotaga kuumagara mathiĩ na mbũtũ ya ita
1Chronicles12:34 Na thĩinĩ wa Nafitali kwarĩ anene a ita ngiri ĩmwe; nao andũ arĩa maarĩ hamwe nao magwatĩte ngo na matimũ maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩtatũ na mũgwanja.
1Chronicles12:35 Ningĩ thĩinĩ wa ciana cia Dani kwarĩ andũ ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na inyanya na magana matandatũ arĩa maahotaga kwarania ita.
1Chronicles12:36 O na thĩinĩ wa Asheri kwarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩna arĩa maahotaga kuumagara mathiĩ na mbũtũ ya ita
1Chronicles12:37 Na rĩrĩ
1Chronicles12:38 Acio othe-rĩ
1Chronicles12:39 Nao maaikarire na Daudi mĩthenya ĩtatũ kũu aarĩ
1Chronicles12:40 O na ningĩ-rĩ
1Chronicles13:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Chronicles13:2 Nake Daudi agĩkĩĩra kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩothe gĩa Isiraeli atĩrĩ
1Chronicles13:3 tũgĩcoke tũgĩre ithandũkũ rĩa Ngai tũrĩcokie gũkũ tũrĩ; nĩ gũkorũo tũtiatuĩragia mohoro harĩ rĩo matukũ-inĩ ma Saulu.
1Chronicles13:4 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩothe gĩkiuga atĩ nĩgĩgwika ũguo; nĩ gũkorũo ũndũ ũcio nĩwonagwo wagĩrĩire nĩ andũ acio othe.
1Chronicles13:5 Tondũ ũcio Daudi agĩcokanĩrĩria kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩothe gĩa Isiraeli hamwe
1Chronicles13:6 Nake Daudi agĩkĩambata me hamwe na andũ acio othe a Isiraeli
1Chronicles13:7 Narĩo ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa Ngai makĩrĩruta mũciĩ wa Abinadabu
1Chronicles13:8 Nake Daudi o na Isiraeli othe makĩinĩra mbere ya Jehova na hinya wao wothe
1Chronicles13:9 Nao maakinya kĩhuhĩro-inĩ gĩa Kidoni
1Chronicles13:10 Nake Jehova agĩcinwo nĩ marakara nĩ ũndũ wa Uza
1Chronicles13:11 Nake Daudi akĩigua ũũru nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo Jehova aaguthũkĩire Uza; agĩgĩĩta handũ hau Perezu-uza
1Chronicles13:12 Nake Daudi agĩgĩĩtigĩra Jehova mũthenya ũcio
1Chronicles13:13 Tondũ ũcio Daudi ndaigana gũthamĩria ithandũkũ rĩu kũu aatũire itũũra rĩa Daudi
1Chronicles13:14 Narĩo ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa Ngai rĩgĩikara kũu mũciĩ wa Obedi-edomu mĩeri ĩtatũ hamwe na andũ a nyũmba yake. Nake Jehova akĩrathima andũ acio a nyũmba ya Obedi-edomu
1Chronicles14:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Chronicles14:2 Nake Daudi agĩkĩona atĩ Jehova nĩamũhandĩte atũũre e mũthamaki wa gũthamakĩra Isiraeli
1Chronicles14:3 Nake Daudi akĩĩhikĩria aka angĩ kũu Jerusalemu; ningĩ Daudi agĩciara ihĩĩ ingĩ o na airĩtu.
1Chronicles14:4 Namo marĩĩtwa ma ciana iria aagĩire nacio kũu Jerusalemu nĩmo maya: nĩ Shamua
1Chronicles14:5 na Ibiharu
1Chronicles14:6 na Noga
1Chronicles14:7 na Elishama
1Chronicles14:8 Na rĩrĩ
1Chronicles14:9 Nao Afilisiti magĩkorũo mathiĩte gũtharĩka gĩtuamba kĩa Refaimu.
1Chronicles14:10 Nake Daudi agĩgĩtuĩria ũhoro he Ngai
1Chronicles14:11 Tondũ ũcio magĩkĩambata magĩkinya Baali-perazimu
1Chronicles14:12 Nao magĩgĩtiga ngai ciao hau; nake Daudi agĩathana
1Chronicles14:13 Ningĩ Afilisiti magĩtharĩka gĩtuamba kĩu o rĩngĩ.
1Chronicles14:14 Nake Daudi agĩcoka agĩtuĩria ũhoro he Ngai rĩngĩ; Ngai agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Chronicles14:15 Na gũgatuĩka atĩrĩ
1Chronicles14:16 Nake Daudi agĩgĩĩka o ta ũguo Ngai aamwathire; nao makĩhũra mbũtũ ĩo ya ita ya Afilisiti mamĩrutĩtie Gibeoni o nginya Gezeri.
1Chronicles14:17 Nayo ngumo ya Daudi ĩkĩiyũra mabũrũri mothe
1Chronicles15:1 Nake Daudi eakithĩirie nyũmba o kũu itũũra rĩa Daudi; narĩo ithandũkũ rĩa Ngai akĩrĩthondekera handũ
1Chronicles15:2 Hĩndĩ ĩo Daudi agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Chronicles15:3 Nake Daudi agĩgĩcokanĩrĩria Isiraeli othe kũu Jerusalemu
1Chronicles15:4 Daudi agĩgĩcokanĩrĩria ariũ a Haruni
1Chronicles15:5 Na rĩrĩ
1Chronicles15:6 ningĩ thĩinĩ wa ariũ a Merari
1Chronicles15:7 na thĩinĩ wa ariũ a Gerishomu agĩĩta Joeli
1Chronicles15:8 ningĩ thĩinĩ wa ariũ a Elizafani
1Chronicles15:9 na thĩinĩ wa ariũ a Hebironi agĩĩta Elieli
1Chronicles15:10 ningĩ thĩinĩ wa ariũ a Uzieli
1Chronicles15:11 Ningĩ Daudi agĩĩtithia Zadoku na Abiatharu
1Chronicles15:12 agĩkĩmera atĩrĩ
1Chronicles15:13 Nĩ gũkorũo tondũ wa ũrĩa mwaagire kũrĩkuua o mbere-rĩ
1Chronicles15:14 Tondũ ũcio athĩnjĩri-Ngai o na Alawii magĩĩtheria nĩguo makaambatie ithandũkũ rĩa Jehova
1Chronicles15:15 Nacio ciana cia Alawii igĩkuua ithandũkũ rĩa Ngai na ciande ciacio iciigĩrĩire mĩtĩ yarĩo ĩrĩa mĩraya
1Chronicles15:16 Nake Daudi akĩaria na mũnene wa Alawii nĩguo athure ariũ a ithe wao arĩa aini
1Chronicles15:17 Tondũ ũcio Alawii magĩthura Hemani wa Joeli; ningĩ thĩinĩ wa ariũ a ithe magĩthura Asafu wa Berekia; o na ningĩ thĩinĩ wa ariũ a Merari
1Chronicles15:18 na ningĩ hamwe na acio magĩthura ariũ a ithe wao arĩa anyinyanyinyi
1Chronicles15:19 Tondũ ũcio aini arĩa metagwo Hemani na Asafu na Ethani magĩgĩthurũo a kũhũra thani cia gĩcango cia kũhũrithanio igambe mũno;
1Chronicles15:20 nake Zekaria
1Chronicles15:21 na Matithia
1Chronicles15:22 Nake Kenania
1Chronicles15:23 Nao Berekia na Elikana nĩo maaikaragia ikunĩkĩro rĩa ithandũkũ rĩa Ngai.
1Chronicles15:24 Ningĩ Shebania
1Chronicles15:25 Ũguo nĩguo Daudi na athuri a Isiraeli
1Chronicles15:26 na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
1Chronicles15:27 Nake Daudi aakĩĩhumbĩte nguo ndaya ya gatani ĩrĩa njega mũno me na Alawii othe arĩa maakuuĩte ithandũkũ rĩa Jehova
1Chronicles15:28 Ũguo nĩguo Aisiraeli othe maambatirie ithandũkũ rĩa Jehova rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro
1Chronicles15:29 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ

1Chronicles16:11 Rongoragiai Jehova
1Chronicles16:12 Ririkanagai maũndũ ma kũgegania marĩa aaneka
1Chronicles16:13 Inyuĩ mbeũ ya Isiraeli
1Chronicles16:14 Ũcio nĩwe Jehova
1Chronicles16:15 Tũũrai mũririkaine kĩrĩkanĩro gĩake tene na tene

1Chronicles16:17 Agĩcoka agĩkĩrũmĩria Jakubu gĩtuĩke watho wa kũrũmagĩrĩrũo
1Chronicles16:18 Akiuga atĩrĩ
1Chronicles16:19 Na no hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mwarĩ andũ anyinyi mũgĩtarũo; Ĩĩ-ni
1Chronicles16:20 Na no gũthama maathamangaga makoima rũrĩrĩ-inĩ rũmwe magathiĩ rũrĩrĩ-inĩ rũngĩ

1Chronicles16:26 Thima-rĩ

1Chronicles16:28 Kumiai Jehova
1Chronicles16:29 Ĩkĩrĩrai Jehova nĩ kũgwetaga rĩĩtwa rĩake rĩĩ riri; Ũkai na ihaki
1Chronicles16:30 Inainai mwĩ mbere yake
1Chronicles16:31 Igũrũ ta nĩrĩkene
1Chronicles16:32 Iria rĩrĩa inene nĩrĩrurume
1Chronicles16:33 Hĩndĩ ĩo o nayo mĩtĩ ya mũtitũ no ĩkũngũĩre mbere ya Jehova nĩ gũkena
1Chronicles16:34 Ĩ gĩcokeriei Jehova ngatho
1Chronicles16:35 Inyuĩ na inyuĩ ugai atĩrĩ

1Chronicles16:39 nake Zadoku
1Chronicles16:40 nĩguo marutagĩre Jehova mahaki ma njino igũrũ rĩa kĩgongona kĩa mahaki macio ma njino hĩndĩ ciothe rũcinĩ na hwaĩ-inĩ
1Chronicles16:41 Nao maarĩ hamwe na Hemani

1Chronicles17:4 Thiĩ ũkere Daudi ndungata yakwa atĩrĩ
1Chronicles17:5 kuona atĩ ndirĩ ndatũũra nyũmba kuuma mũthenya ũrĩa ndaambatirie Isiraeli
1Chronicles17:6 Atĩrĩrĩ
1Chronicles17:7 Na rĩu tondũ ũcio nĩ wega ũkere Daudi ndungata yakwa atĩrĩ
1Chronicles17:8 na nĩnjikarĩte hamwe nawe kũndũ kũrĩa guothe wanathiĩ
1Chronicles17:9 Nao andũ akwa Isiraeli nĩngũmathurĩra handũ
1Chronicles17:10 o na ta ũrĩa gwatariĩ kuuma mũthenya ũrĩa ndaathanire ngiuga atĩ atiirĩrĩri-bũrũri akwa matuĩke a gwathaga andũ akwa Isiraeli. Na nĩngatoria thũ ciaku ciothe. O na ningĩ ngũkwĩra atĩ Jehova nĩakahanda nyũmba yaku thutha waku.

1Chronicles18:4 Nake Daudi agĩkĩmũtunya ngari cia ita ngiri ĩmwe
1Chronicles18:5 Na rĩrĩa Asuriata a Dameski maathiire gũteithia Hadarezeri
1Chronicles18:6 Thutha wa ũguo Daudi akĩiga athigari a kũrangĩra kũndũ o kũndũ kũu Suriata ya Dameski; nao Asuriata magĩgĩtuĩka ndungata cia Daudi
1Chronicles18:7 Nake Daudi akĩoya ngo cia thahabu iria ndungata cia Hadarezeri ciarĩ nacio

1Chronicles22:2 Nake Daudi agĩathana akiuga atĩ ageni arĩa maarĩ bũrũri wa Isiraeli macokererio hamwe; akĩhe abundi amwe a mahiga wĩra wa gwacũhia mahiga ma gwaka nyũmba ya Ngai.
1Chronicles22:3 Nake Daudi agĩkĩigithia igera nyingĩ mũno cia gũthondekwo mĩcumarĩ ya mĩrango ya gwĩkĩrũo mĩromo
1Chronicles22:4 o na mĩtarakwa ĩtangĩtarĩka; nĩ gũkorũo Azidoni o na andũ a Turo nĩmaatwarĩire Daudi mĩtarakwa mĩingĩ mũno.

1Chronicles22:10 Ũcio nĩwe ũgaaka nyũmba ĩĩtanĩtio na rĩĩtwa rĩakwa; na nĩagatuĩka mũrũ wakwa
1Chronicles22:11 Tondũ ũcio

1Chronicles22:13 Ũngĩtũũra ũmenyereire irĩra cia watho wa kũrũmĩrĩrũo

1Chronicles22:19 Rĩu kĩroriei ngoro cianyu
1Chronicles23:1 Na rĩrĩ
1Chronicles23:2 Ningĩ agĩcokanĩrĩria anene othe a Isiraeli hamwe
1Chronicles23:3 Nao Alawii magĩgĩtarũo marutĩtio arĩa maakinyĩtie mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ o na magakĩria hau; nao arĩa monekire maatarũo mĩtwe yao
1Chronicles23:4 Nao andũ ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na inya thĩinĩ wa andũ acio-rĩ
1Chronicles23:5 nao andũ ngiri inya maarĩ aikaria mĩromo; nao andũ angĩ ngiri inya nĩo a gũkumagia Jehova na inanda cia mĩthemba yothe iria ndathondekithirie
1Chronicles23:6 Nake Daudi agĩkĩgayũkania Alawii ikundi ithatũ cia kũruta wĩra o ta ũrĩa ariũ a Lawii maatariĩ
1Chronicles23:7 Nao a Agerishoni nĩ aya
1Chronicles23:8 Nao ariũ a Ladani nĩ aya
1Chronicles23:9 Nao ariũ a Shimei nĩ aya
1Chronicles23:10 Nao ariũ a Shimei nĩ aya
1Chronicles23:11 Nake Jahathu nĩwe warĩ mũnene wao
1Chronicles23:12 Nao ariũ a Kohathu nĩ aya
1Chronicles23:13 Nao ariũ a Amuramu nĩ aya
1Chronicles23:14 No rĩrĩ
1Chronicles23:15 Nao ariũ a Musa nĩ aya
1Chronicles23:16 Naho ha ũhoro wa ariũ a Gerishomu
1Chronicles23:17 Naho ha ũhoro wa Eliezeri
1Chronicles23:18 Naho ha ũhoro wa ariũ a Iziharu
1Chronicles23:19 O nao ariũ a Hebironi nĩ aya
1Chronicles23:20 Nao ariũ a Uzieli nĩ aya
1Chronicles23:21 Nao ariũ a Merari nĩ aya
1Chronicles23:22 Nake Eleazaru agĩkua
1Chronicles23:23 Nao ariũ a Mushi nĩ aya
1Chronicles23:24 Acio nĩo maarĩ ariũ a Lawii o ta ũrĩa nyũmba cia maithe mao ciarũmanĩrĩire
1Chronicles23:25 Nĩ gũkorũo Daudi oigire atĩrĩ
1Chronicles23:26 o na ningĩ Alawii matigacoka kũgĩa na bata wa gũkuuaga gĩikaro kĩa Jehova
1Chronicles23:27 Nĩ gũkorũo ariũ a Lawii arĩa maakinyĩtie mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ o na magakĩria hau maatarirũo na ũndũ wa uuge wa Daudi wa kũrigĩrĩria.
1Chronicles23:28 Nĩ ũndũ wĩra wao warĩ wa kũrutagĩra ariũ a Haruni wĩra
1Chronicles23:29 o na ũhoro-inĩ wa mĩgate ĩrĩa yaigagwo mbere ya Ngai
1Chronicles23:30 Ningĩ marũgamage marũcinĩ mothe magĩcokeria Jehova ngatho
1Chronicles23:31 o na marutĩre Jehova mahaki mothe ma njino marĩa marutagĩrũo mbere yake
1Chronicles23:32 Na atĩ matũũre matuanagĩra wĩra wa hema-ya-gũtũnganwo

2Chronicles1:1 NA RĨRĨ
2Chronicles1:2 Nake Suleimani agĩkĩaria na andũ othe a Isiraeli o arĩa maarĩ anene a athigari ngiri o ngiri
2Chronicles1:3 Na gũgĩtuĩka atĩrĩ
2Chronicles1:4 No ithandũkũ rĩa Ngai Daudi nĩaarĩambatĩtie akarĩruta Kiriathu-jearimu akarĩiga harĩa aarĩthondekeire; nĩ gũkorũo nĩaarĩambĩire hema kũu Jerusalemu.
2Chronicles1:5 O nakĩo kĩgongona gĩa gĩcango kĩrĩa Bezaleli wa Uri
2Chronicles1:6 Nake Suleimini agĩkĩambata agĩthiĩ kĩgongona-inĩ kĩu gĩa gĩcango o hau mbere ya Jehova
2Chronicles1:7 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles1:8 Nake Suleimani agĩkĩĩra Ngai atĩrĩ
2Chronicles1:9 Na rĩu
2Chronicles1:10 Rĩu ndagĩgũthaitha ũ’he ũũgĩ
2Chronicles1:11 Nake Ngai agĩkĩĩra Suleimani atĩrĩ
2Chronicles1:12 nĩndetĩkĩra gũkũhe ũũgĩ
2Chronicles1:13 Thutha wa ũguo Suleimani agĩkiuma itĩri-inĩ rĩu rĩa handũ hatũũgĩru kũu Gibeoni
2Chronicles1:14 Nake Suleimani akĩĩũnganithĩria ngari cia ita
2Chronicles1:15 Nake mũthamaki ũcio agĩkĩingĩhia betha na thahabu
2Chronicles1:16 Nacio mbarathi iria Suleimani aarĩ nacio ciarutĩtwo Misiri
2Chronicles1:17 Nacio ngari cia ita iria maambatagia marutĩte Misiri
2Chronicles2:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles2:2 Tondũ ũcio Suleimani agĩgĩthura andũ ngiri mĩrongo mũgwanja a gũkuuaga mĩrigo
2Chronicles2:3 Ningĩ Suleimani akĩrekia andũ kwĩ Huramu
2Chronicles2:4 Atĩrĩrĩ
2Chronicles2:5 Nayo nyũmba ĩrĩa ngwaka nĩ nene mũno; nĩ gũkorũo Ngai witũ nĩ mũnene gũkĩra ngai ciothe.
2Chronicles2:6 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles2:7 Tondũ ũcio ndehithĩrie mũndũ mũũhĩgĩrĩru ũruti wa wĩra na thahabu
2Chronicles2:8 O na ningĩ-rĩ
2Chronicles2:9 nĩguo injigithĩrie mĩtĩ mĩingĩ; tondũ nyũmba ĩrĩa njitĩkĩte gwaka nĩĩgatuĩka ya kũgegania nĩ ũndũ wa kũneneha.
2Chronicles2:10 Na atĩrĩrĩ
2Chronicles2:11 Hĩndĩ ĩo Huramu
2Chronicles2:12 Ningĩ Huramu agĩkĩrĩrĩria kuuga atĩrĩ
2Chronicles2:13 Na rĩu nĩndakũrehithĩrie mũndũ mũũgĩ
2Chronicles2:14 na nĩ mũrũ wa mũndũ-wa-nja wa airĩtu a Dani
2Chronicles2:15 Tondũ ũcio rĩu gĩtũrehithĩrie ithuĩ ndungata ciaku ngano
2Chronicles2:16 na ithuĩ nĩtũgũtema mĩtĩ mĩingĩ o ta ĩrĩa ũkabatario nĩyo
2Chronicles2:17 Nake Suleimani agĩtara andũ a ndũrĩrĩ ingĩ arĩa maarĩ kũu bũrũri wa Isiraeli
2Chronicles2:18 Nao andũ ngiri mĩrongo mũgwanja thĩinĩ wao-rĩ
2Chronicles3:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles3:2 Nake aambĩrĩirie kũmĩaka mũthenya wa ĩĩrĩ wa mweri wa kerĩ
2Chronicles3:3 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles3:4 Nakĩo gĩthaku kĩrĩa kĩarĩ mbere ya nyũmba ĩo-rĩ
2Chronicles3:5 Nake akĩarithia mbaũ cia mĩthengera kũndũ guothe igũrũ rĩa nyũmba ĩrĩa nene; agĩcoka agĩcihumbithia na thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno
2Chronicles3:6 Agĩkĩgemithia nyũmba ĩo na mahiga ma goro nĩguo ĩthakare; nayo thahabu ĩo yarĩ thahabu ya Paravaimu.
2Chronicles3:7 Nayo nyũmba ĩo akĩmĩhumbithia igũrũ guothe na thahabu
2Chronicles3:8 Agĩcoka agĩthondekithia kanyũmba karĩa gatheru mũno; naguo ũraihu wako ũkĩiganana na wariĩ wako
2Chronicles3:9 Naguo ũritũ wa mĩcumarĩ warĩ cekeri mĩrongo ĩtano cia thahabu. Natuo tũnyũmba twa igũrũ agĩtũhumbithia kũndũ guothe na thahabu.
2Chronicles3:10 Nakuo kũu kanyũmba kau gatheru mũno thĩinĩ
2Chronicles3:11 Namo mathagu ma makerubi macio maarĩ mĩkono mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ magĩthimwo kũraiha makigiĩ; narĩo ithagu rĩa ikerubi rĩmwe rĩarĩ mĩkono ĩtano
2Chronicles3:12 O narĩo ithagu rĩa ikerubi rĩu rĩngĩ rĩarĩ mĩkono ĩtano
2Chronicles3:13 Nakuo gũtambũrũka kwa mathagu ma makerubi macio kwarĩ mĩkono mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ namo merũgamĩtie na magũrũ mamo; namo mothiũ mamo maarorete kũu nyũmba thĩinĩ.
2Chronicles3:14 Ningĩ agĩgĩthondekithia gĩtama gĩa kũhakania na ndigi cia rangi wa bururu
2Chronicles3:15 Ningĩ mwena wa na mbere wa nyũmba ĩo agĩthondekithĩria itugĩ igĩrĩ cia mĩkono mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ĩtano kũraiha na igũrũ; nacio ciongo iria irĩ mũnduru cia itugĩ-inĩ icio igũrũ
2Chronicles3:16 Ningĩ agĩthondekithĩria irengeri handũ harĩa hatheru mũno
2Chronicles3:17 Nacio itugĩ icio agĩcihanda hau mbere ya hekarũ
2Chronicles4:1 Ningĩ agĩthondekithia kĩgongona gĩa gĩcango
2Chronicles4:2 Ningĩ agĩthondekithia itangi rĩrĩa rĩĩtagwo karia ga gĩcango gĩtweketio rĩa mĩkono ikũmi kuuma mwena ũmwe o nginya mwena ũrĩa ũngĩ
2Chronicles4:3 Nakuo na mũhuro warĩo mĩena-inĩ kwarĩ tũmĩhianano twa ndegwa twarĩthiũrũrũkĩirie mbarĩ ciothe
2Chronicles4:4 Ningĩ karia kau kaaigĩrĩirũo igũrũ rĩa ndegwa ikũmi na igĩrĩ
2Chronicles4:5 O naguo ũtungu wa gĩcango gĩako waiganaine na rũhĩ kwarama
2Chronicles4:6 Ningĩ agĩthondekithia inyũngũ ikũmi
2Chronicles4:7 Ningĩ agĩthondekithia mĩtĩ ikũmi ya kũigĩrĩrũo matawa ya thahabu
2Chronicles4:8 Ningĩ agĩthondekithia metha ikũmi
2Chronicles4:9 Thutha wa ũguo agĩthondekithia nja ya athĩnjĩri-Ngai
2Chronicles4:10 Nako karia kau agĩkaigithia mwena wa ũrĩo wa nyũmba ĩo
2Chronicles4:11 Ningĩ Huramu agĩthondeka nyũngũ
2Chronicles4:12 nacio indo iria aathondekithirie nĩ itugĩ cierĩ
2Chronicles4:13 o na makomamanga macio magana mana marĩa maarĩ mĩnyamũ-inĩ ĩo ĩĩrĩ ĩtumanĩtio ta rũgara
2Chronicles4:14 ningĩ agĩthondeka inyamũ ihaana ta ngari
2Chronicles4:15 na karia kau hamwe na ndegwa icio ikũmi na igĩrĩ cia kũgĩa mũhuro wako.
2Chronicles4:16 Ningĩ nyũngũ
2Chronicles4:17 Nake mũthamaki aatwekithagĩria indo icio werũ-inĩ wa Jorodani
2Chronicles4:18 Ũguo nĩguo Suleimani aathondekithirie indo icio ciothe
2Chronicles4:19 O nacio indo iria ingĩ ciothe cia kũigwo nyũmba ya Ngai-rĩ
2Chronicles4:20 na mĩtĩ ya kũigĩrĩrũo matawa hamwe na matawa mayo
2Chronicles4:21 namo mahũa
2Chronicles4:22 natuo tũmĩĩhato twa mũrarĩ wa ndambĩ
2Chronicles5:1 Ũguo nĩguo wĩra wothe ũrĩa Suleimani aarutithirie ũkoniĩ nyũmba ya Jehova warĩkire. Nake Suleimani agĩtonyia indo iria Daudi
2Chronicles5:2 Hĩndĩ ĩo Suleimani agĩkĩũnganithia athuri a Isiraeli moke kũu Jerusalemu
2Chronicles5:3 Nao andũ acio othe a Isiraeli magĩgĩtũngana he mũthamaki gĩathĩ-inĩ mweri wa mũgwanja.
2Chronicles5:4 Athuri othe a Isiraeli magĩgĩthiĩ kuo
2Chronicles5:5 Nao makĩambatia ithandũkũ rĩu
2Chronicles5:6 Nake mũthamaki Suleimani
2Chronicles5:7 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai magĩgĩtonyia ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Jehova handũ harĩo
2Chronicles5:8 Nĩ ũndũ makerubi macio maatambũrũkĩtie mathagu mamo igũrũ rĩa hau haaigĩtwo ithandũkũ rĩu
2Chronicles5:9 Nayo mĩtĩ ĩo mĩraya nĩyaraihĩte mũno o nginya mĩthia yayo ĩkoneka nĩ mũndũ e nyumĩrĩra-inĩ ya hau ithandũkũ rĩa kĩrĩkanĩro rĩrĩ
2Chronicles5:10 Narĩo ithandũkũ-inĩ rĩu thĩinĩ-rĩ
2Chronicles5:11 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Chronicles5:12 o nao Alawii arĩa aini nyĩmbo othe maarĩ ho
2Chronicles5:13 gũgĩgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Chronicles5:14 o nginya athĩnjĩri-Ngai makĩremwo nĩ kũrũgama marute wĩra nĩ ũndũ wa itu rĩu; nĩ gũkorũo riri wa Jehova nĩwaiyũire nyũmba ĩo ya Ngai.
2Chronicles6:1 Hĩndĩ ĩo Suleimani agĩkĩaria akiuga atĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:2 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:3 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩhũgũra ũthiũ
2Chronicles6:4 Agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:5 Gwata mũthenya ũrĩa ndoimagaririe andũ akwa
2Chronicles6:6 no rĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:7 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:8 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:9 no rĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:10 Nake Jehova nĩahingĩtie ũhoro wake
2Chronicles6:11 Na gũkũ nĩkuo njigĩte ithandũkũ rĩrĩa rĩĩ na kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Jehova kĩrĩa aarĩkanĩire na ciana cia Isiraeli gĩĩ thĩinĩ warĩo.
2Chronicles6:12 Nake Suleimani agĩkĩrũgama hau mbere ya kĩgongona kĩa Jehova
2Chronicles6:13 (nĩ gũkorũo nĩaakĩte rũtara rũa gĩcango rũa mĩkono ĩtano kũraiha rũkĩgiĩ
2Chronicles6:14 nake agĩkiuga ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:15 wee ũtũire ũrũmĩtie ũndũ ũrĩa werĩire awa
2Chronicles6:16 Tondũ ũcio wee
2Chronicles6:17 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:18 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:19 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:20 nĩ getha maitho maku maikarage maracũrĩirio nyũmba ĩno mũthenya o na ũtukũ
2Chronicles6:21 na ũthikĩrĩrie gũthaithana gwakwa
2Chronicles6:22 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:23 ndagũthaitha ũkaigua ũhoro ũcio ũrĩ o kũu igũrũ
2Chronicles6:24 Ningĩ-rĩ
2Chronicles6:25 ndagũthaitha ũkamaigua ũrĩ o kũu igũrũ
2Chronicles6:26 Ningĩ-rĩ
2Chronicles6:27 ndagũthaitha ũkamaigua ũrĩ o kũu igũrũ
2Chronicles6:28 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:29 ihoya rĩrĩa rĩkahoyũo hĩndĩ ĩo
2Chronicles6:30 ndagũthaitha ũkaigua
2Chronicles6:31 nĩ getha igwĩtigagĩre
2Chronicles6:32 O na ningĩ atĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:33 ndagũthaitha ũkamaigua ũrĩ o kũu igũrũ
2Chronicles6:34 Ningĩ andũ aku mangĩkoimagara mathiĩ ita-inĩ makahũrane na thũ ciao-rĩ
2Chronicles6:35 ndagũthaitha ũkaigua ihoya rĩao
2Chronicles6:36 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:37 nao mangĩgacoka gwĩciria ũrĩa ũhoro wao ũtariĩ marĩ o kũu bũrũri ũrĩa maatwarirũo maatahwo
2Chronicles6:38 nao magũcokerere na ngoro ciao ciothe
2Chronicles6:39 ndagũthaitha ũkaigua ihoya rĩao
2Chronicles6:40 Na rĩu
2Chronicles6:41 Tondũ ũcio rĩu wee
2Chronicles6:42 Ndagũthaitha wee
2Chronicles7:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles7:2 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai makĩremwo nĩ gũtonya nyũmba ya Jehova
2Chronicles7:3 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli ciothe ikĩĩrorera mwaki ũcio ũgĩikũrũka
2Chronicles7:4 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũthamaki o na andũ othe makĩrutĩra igongona mbere ya Jehova.
2Chronicles7:5 Nake Suleimani
2Chronicles7:6 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai makĩrũgama makarute wĩra wao o ũrĩa maatuĩrĩirũo; o nao Alawii makĩrũgama me na inanda ciao iria mũthamaki Daudi aathondekithĩtie cia kũgathaga Jehova nacio
2Chronicles7:7 O na ningĩ Suleimani akĩamũra kũu gatagatĩ ka nja ĩrĩa ya mwena wa na mbere wa nyũmba ĩo ya Jehova
2Chronicles7:8 Ũguo nĩguo Suleimani aathondekire gĩathĩ kĩu mĩthenya mũgwanja ihinda rĩu
2Chronicles7:9 Ningĩ mũthenya wa ĩnana makĩgĩa na gĩtũngano kĩngĩ gĩtheru; nĩ ũndũ maaninire mĩthenya mũgwanja makĩamũra kĩgongona; o nakĩo gĩathĩ kĩu kĩaninire mĩthenya mũgwanja.
2Chronicles7:10 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles7:11 Ũguo nĩguo Suleimani aarĩkirie mwako wa nyũmba ya Jehova
2Chronicles7:12 Ningĩ Jehova akiumĩrĩra Suleimani ũtukũ
2Chronicles7:13 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles7:14 andũ acio akwa
2Chronicles7:15 Gwata rĩu maitho makwa nĩmekũracũrio
2Chronicles7:16 Nĩ gũkorũo rĩu nĩ’thurĩte nyũmba ĩno ngamĩamũra
2Chronicles7:17 Naho ha ũhoro waku-rĩ
2Chronicles7:18 nĩngatũma ũhoro waku wa gũikarĩra gĩtĩ gĩaku kĩa ũnene ũtũũre ũrũmĩte wega
2Chronicles7:19 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles7:20 hĩndĩ ĩo nĩngamunyanĩria andũ aku na mĩri yao ndĩmarute bũrũri wakwa ũyũ ndĩmaheete; o nayo nyũmba ĩno nyamũrĩte ngamĩtheria nĩguo ĩĩtanio na rĩĩtwa rĩakwa-rĩ
2Chronicles7:21 Nayo nyũmba ĩno ndaya mũno na igũrũ ũũ-rĩ
2Chronicles7:22 Nao andũ nĩmagacokia
2Chronicles8:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Chronicles8:2 agĩgĩcoka agĩaka matũũra marĩa aaheetwo nĩ Huramu
2Chronicles8:3 Ningĩ Suleimani agĩgĩthiĩ Hamathu-zoba
2Chronicles8:4 Nake agĩaka Tadimori
2Chronicles8:5 O na ningĩ agĩaka Bethi-horoni ya rũgongo igũrũ
2Chronicles8:6 na Baalathu
2Chronicles8:7 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles8:8 ciana ciao iria ciatigirũo kũu bũrũri ũcio thutha wao
2Chronicles8:9 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles8:10 Na nĩkwarĩ andũ magana merĩ ma mĩrongo ĩtano maarĩ anyabara arĩa anene a mũthamaki Suleimani a kũroraga andũ.
2Chronicles8:11 Ningĩ Suleimani akĩambatia mwarĩ wa Firauni
2Chronicles8:12 Hĩndĩ ĩo Suleimani agĩkĩgwata kũrutĩra Jehova mahaki ma njino kĩgongona-inĩ kĩa Jehova
2Chronicles8:13 o ta ũrĩa maagĩrĩire kũrutwo mũthenya o mũthenya; o na akamarutaga mĩthenya ya thabatũ
2Chronicles8:14 Nake aatuire atĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai matuanagĩre mawĩra mao o ta ũrĩa maatariĩ
2Chronicles8:15 Nao matiatigire kũrũmĩrĩra wathani wa mũthamaki ũcio ũrĩa aathĩte athĩnjĩri-Ngai
2Chronicles8:16 Ũguo nĩguo wĩra ũrĩa wothe Suleimani aarutire wahaarĩirio nginya o mũthenya ũrĩa gĩtina kĩa nyũmba ya Jehova gĩaakirũo
2Chronicles8:17 Ningĩ Suleimani agĩgĩthiĩ Ezioni-geberi
2Chronicles8:18 Nake Huramu akĩmũtwarithĩria marikabu na ndungata ciake
2Chronicles9:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles9:2 Nake Suleimani akĩmũtaũrĩra maũndũ mothe marĩa aamũũririe
2Chronicles9:3 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles9:4 o na irio cia metha-inĩ yake
2Chronicles9:5 Nake agĩkĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Chronicles9:6 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles9:7 Gũkena-rĩ
2Chronicles9:8 Jehova Ngai waku arogoocwo
2Chronicles9:9 Nake agĩkĩhe mũthamaki ti Suleimani taranda igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ cia thahabu
2Chronicles9:10 Nacio ndungata cia Huramu
2Chronicles9:11 Nake mũthamaki agĩgĩthondeka ngathĩ cia nyũmba ya Jehova
2Chronicles9:12 Nake mũthamaki Suleimani agĩkĩhe mũthamaki mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio wa Sheba indo ciothe iria eriragĩria
2Chronicles9:13 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles9:14 thengia ĩrĩa yatwaragwo kuo nĩ athũgũri indo
2Chronicles9:15 Nake Suleimani
2Chronicles9:16 Ningĩ agĩthondeka ngo cia mũthemba mũnyinyi magana matatũ cia thahabu ĩturĩtwo; o ĩmwe yacio ĩgĩthirĩra cekeri magana matatũ cia thahabu; nake mũthamaki agĩciiga nyũmba ya kĩrĩti kĩa Lebanoni thĩinĩ.
2Chronicles9:17 O na ningĩ mũthamaki ũcio agĩthondeka gĩtĩ-gĩa-ũthamaki kĩnene mũno kĩa mĩguongo
2Chronicles9:18 Nakĩo gĩtĩ kĩu kĩarĩ na ngathĩ ya makinya matandatũ ya gũkĩhaica
2Chronicles9:19 ningĩ mĩhianano ĩngĩ ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ ya mĩrũthi ĩkarũgamio mwena ũyũ
2Chronicles9:20 Nacio indo ciothe iria mũthamaki Suleimani aanyuagĩra ciarĩ cia thahabu
2Chronicles9:21 Nĩ gũkorũo mũthamaki ũcio aarĩ na marikabu ciathiaga Tarishishi itwaranĩte na ndungata cia Huramu; na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles9:22 Tondũ ũcio
2Chronicles9:23 Nao athamaki othe a thĩ magacaragia ũrĩa mangĩhota kuona Suleimani ũthiũ
2Chronicles9:24 Nao othe
2Chronicles9:25 Nake Suleimani akĩgĩa na tũnyũmba ngiri inya twa mbarathi
2Chronicles9:26 Nake agagĩathaga athamaki othe kuuma Rũũĩ rũa Farati o nginya bũrũri wa Afilisiti
2Chronicles9:27 Nake mũthamaki ũcio agĩkĩingĩhia betha o nginya ĩkonagwo ĩhaana o ta ĩrĩ mahiga matheri kũu Jerusalemu o nayo mĩtarakwa akĩmĩingĩhia o ta mĩborothandi ĩrĩa ĩiyũrĩte bũrũri ũrĩa mũgũu nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa yaingĩhĩte.
2Chronicles9:28 Nao andũ magagĩtwarithagĩria Suleimani mbarathi macirutĩte Misiri
2Chronicles9:29 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles9:30 Nake Suleimani agĩgĩthamakĩra Aisiraeli othe arĩ kũu Jerusalemu mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna.
2Chronicles9:31 Nake Suleimani agĩkoma hamwe na maithe

2Chronicles10:8 No rĩrĩ

2Chronicles11:2 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles11:3 Aria na Rehoboamu
2Chronicles11:4 Jehova oigĩte ũũ: Mũtikwambata
2Chronicles11:5 Nake Rehoboamu agĩtũũra Jerusalemu
2Chronicles11:6 Namo matũũra marĩa aakire nĩ Bethi-lehemu
2Chronicles11:7 na Bethi-zuri
2Chronicles11:8 na Gathu
2Chronicles11:9 na Adoraimu
2Chronicles11:10 na Zora
2Chronicles11:11 Nacio ihingo iria cia hinya agĩkĩrĩrĩria gũciĩkĩra hinya
2Chronicles11:12 Namo matũũra macio akĩmaiga ngo na matimũ o itũũra
2Chronicles11:13 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai o na Alawii arĩa maarĩ kũu Isiraeli guothe magĩĩtwara harĩ we moimĩte ng’ongo ciao ciothe.
2Chronicles11:14 Nĩ gũkorũo Alawii nĩmaatigire ithaka ciao cia ũrĩithio
2Chronicles11:15 nake Jeroboamu agĩtua andũ o ro ũguo matuĩke athĩnjĩri-Ngai a matĩri-inĩ
2Chronicles11:16 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles11:17 Acio nĩo mekĩrire ũthamaki wa Juda hinya

2Chronicles13:3 Nake Abija agĩgĩthiĩ ita arĩ na mbũtũ ya andũ njamba cia ita ngiri magana mana mathurĩtwo; nake Jeroboamu akĩarania ita yake nĩguo mahũrane nake arĩ na andũ ngiri magana manana mathurĩtwo
2Chronicles13:4 Nake Abija akĩrũgama o igũrũ rĩa kĩrĩma gĩa Zemaraimu
2Chronicles13:5 githĩ mũtiũĩ atĩ Jehova
2Chronicles13:6 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles13:7 Naho hagĩkĩũngana harĩ we andũ matarĩ kĩene
2Chronicles13:8 Na rĩu mwĩcirĩtie atĩ mwahota gwĩtiiria ũthamaki wa Jehova ũrĩa ũnyitĩrĩirũo nĩ ariũ a Daudi; na mũrĩ kĩrĩndĩ kĩingĩ

2Chronicles13:16 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli igĩkĩũrĩra Ajuda nake Ngai agĩcirekereria
2Chronicles13:17 Nake Abija na andũ ake magĩciũraga nyingĩ mũno; naho hakĩgũa andũ a Isiraeli ngiri magana matano moragĩtwo

2Chronicles14:1 Nake Abija agĩgĩkoma hamwe na maithe
2Chronicles14:2 Nake Asa agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo nĩ Jehova Ngai wake marĩ mega na merekereire;
2Chronicles14:3 nĩ ũndũ nĩeheririe igongona cia mũthemba wa kũngĩ
2Chronicles14:4 nake agĩgĩatha Ajuda akĩmera marongorie Jehova
2Chronicles14:5 Ningĩ akĩeheria matĩri ma kũndũ gũtũũgĩru matũũra-inĩ mothe ma Juda
2Chronicles14:6 Ningĩ agĩaka matũũra mairigĩtwo kũu Juda; nĩ gũkorũo bũrũri nĩwahoreire ũkĩaga mbaara mĩaka ĩo; nĩ ũndũ Jehova nĩaamũheete ũhurũko.

2Chronicles14:10 Nake Asa agĩkiumagara nĩguo akamũtũnge
2Chronicles14:11 Hĩndĩ ĩo Asa agĩgĩkaĩra Jehova

2Chronicles15:11 Naguo mũthenya ũcio makĩrutĩra Jehova igongona rĩa ndegwa magana mũgwanja
2Chronicles15:12 Nao magĩkĩrĩkanĩra kĩrĩkanĩro gĩa atĩ nĩmegũtũũra marongoragia Jehova

2Chronicles16:14 Nao andũ makĩmũthika mbĩrĩra-inĩ ciake we mwene iria eyenjithĩirie o kũu itũũra rĩa Daudi

2Chronicles17:4 no aarongoragia Ngai wa ithe
2Chronicles17:5 Tondũ ũcio Jehova agĩgĩtũma ũthamaki ũrũme wega wĩ moko-inĩ make
2Chronicles17:6 Nayo ngoro yake ĩgĩtũma erirĩrie mũno kũrũmĩrĩra Jehova; o na agĩkĩrĩrĩria kweheria matĩri ma kũndũ gũtũũgĩru

2Chronicles17:9 Nao makĩruta andũ maũndũ kũu Juda
2Chronicles17:10 Nake Jehova agĩtũma andũ a mabũrũri mothe marĩa maarigicĩirie kũu Juda magwatwo nĩ guoya; na tondũ ũcio matiigana kũrutithia mbaara atĩ nĩguo mahũrane na Jehoshafatu.
2Chronicles17:11 Nao Afilisiti amwe magĩtwarĩra Jehoshafatu iheo
2Chronicles17:12 Nake Jehoshafatu agĩkĩrĩrĩria kũgĩa na hinya mũno; nakuo kũu Juda agĩgĩaka ihingo cia hinya

2Chronicles20:28 Nao magĩthiĩ magĩkinya nyũmba ya Jehova o kũu Jerusalemu me na inanda cia kĩnubi

2Chronicles21:4 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles21:5 Nake Jehoramu aaninĩte mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ĩĩrĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka; agĩgĩthamaka mĩaka ĩnana kũu Jerusalemu.
2Chronicles21:6 Nake agĩthiĩ na mĩthiĩre ta ĩrĩa ya athamaki a Isiraeli

2Chronicles21:8 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles21:9 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jehoramu akĩringĩrĩra Aedomu me na anene ake a ita o na ngari ciake ciothe cia ita; nake akĩarahũka ũtukũ
2Chronicles21:10 Ũguo nĩguo Aedomu mokĩrĩire athamaki a Juda
2Chronicles21:11 O na ningĩ nĩaakithirie matĩri ma kũndũ gũtũũgĩru irĩma-inĩ cia Juda
2Chronicles21:12 Na atĩrĩrĩ
2Chronicles21:13 no nĩ gũthiĩ ũthiĩte na mĩthiĩre ya athamaki a Isiraeli
2Chronicles21:14 Jehova nĩekũhũra andũ aku na ihũra inene mũno
2Chronicles21:15 nawe nĩũkũrũara mũrimũ mũnene mũno nda

2Chronicles21:18 Na thutha wa maũndũ macio mothe

2Chronicles22:2 Nake Ahazia
2Chronicles22:3 O nake agĩthiĩ na mĩthiĩre ta ĩrĩa ya nyũmba ya Ahabu
2Chronicles22:4 Nake agĩgĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ moru nĩ Jehova
2Chronicles22:5 Ningĩ tondũ wa kũrũmĩrĩra kĩrĩra kĩao
2Chronicles22:6 Nake agĩkĩhũndũka nĩguo akahonerio kũu Jezireeli nguraro icio aagurarĩirio Rama makĩhũrana mbaara na Hazaeli
