2Chronicles22:12 Nake agĩgĩtũũra ahithĩtwo nĩo kũu nyũmba ya Ngai mĩaka ĩtandatũ; nake Athalia agĩtũũra athamakaga bũrũri ũcio.
2Chronicles23:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles23:2 Nao magĩgĩthiĩ kũndũ guothe kũu Juda
2Chronicles23:3 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩothe kĩa andũ gĩkĩrĩkanĩra kĩrĩkanĩro na mũthamaki kũu nyũmba ya Ngai thĩinĩ. Nake Jehoiada akĩmera ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
2Chronicles23:4 Ũndũ ũrĩa mũgũgĩĩka nĩ ũyũ
2Chronicles23:5 nakĩo gĩcunjĩ kĩrĩa kĩngĩ gĩa gatatũ kĩrangĩre nyũmba ya mũthamaki; nakĩo gĩcunjĩ kĩrĩa kĩngĩ gĩa gatatũ o ro ũguo
2Chronicles23:6 No mũtikanareke mũndũ atonye nyũmba ya Jehova tiga o athĩnjĩri-Ngai
2Chronicles23:7 Nao Alawii marigicĩrie mũthamaki na mĩena yothe
2Chronicles23:8 Nao Alawii o na Ajuda othe magĩĩka kũringana na maũndũ mothe marĩa Jehoiada mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai amaathĩte
2Chronicles23:9 Nake Jehoiada ũcio mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai agĩkĩrutĩra anene arĩa maathaga athigari igana matimũ
2Chronicles23:10 Nake agĩkĩarania andũ othe wega
2Chronicles23:11 Hĩndĩ ĩo magĩkĩruta mũrũ wa mũthamaki
2Chronicles23:12 Nake Athalia aaigua inegene rĩa andũ magĩteng’era makĩgoocaga mũthamaki-rĩ
2Chronicles23:13 agĩcũthĩrĩria
2Chronicles23:14 Nake Jehoiada
2Chronicles23:15 Tondũ ũcio magĩkĩmweherera nake agĩkinya itonyero-inĩ rĩa kĩhingo kĩa mbarathi o kũu nyũmba ya mũthamaki; nao makĩmũũragĩra ho.
2Chronicles23:16 Nake Jehoiada agĩkĩrĩkanĩra na andũ othe
2Chronicles23:17 Nao andũ othe magĩgĩthiĩ nyũmba ya Baali
2Chronicles23:18 Nake Jehoiada agĩcoka agĩtua andũ amwe anene matuĩke arori a nyũmba ya Jehova
2Chronicles23:19 Ningĩ akĩiga andũ a gũikaria mĩrango ya nyũmba ya Jehova
2Chronicles23:20 Nake agĩkĩoya anene a andũ igana
2Chronicles23:21 Tondũ ũcio andũ othe a bũrũri magĩgĩkena
2Chronicles24:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles24:2 Nake Joashu agĩgĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ mega nĩ Jehova ihinda rĩrĩa rĩothe Jehoiada
2Chronicles24:3 Nake Jehoiada akĩmũhikithĩria airĩtu erĩ matuĩke atumia ake; nake agĩgĩciara ihĩĩ na airĩtu.
2Chronicles24:4 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Chronicles24:5 Nake agĩkĩũngania athĩnjĩri-Ngai o na Alawii
2Chronicles24:6 Nake mũthamaki agĩgĩĩta Jehoiada mũnene ũcio
2Chronicles24:7 Nĩ gũkorũo ariũ a Athalia
2Chronicles24:8 Tondũ ũcio mũthamaki agĩgĩatha andũ
2Chronicles24:9 Nao makĩhunjanĩria ũhoro kũu Juda na Jerusalemu guothe
2Chronicles24:10 Nao anene othe
2Chronicles24:11 Na gũgĩtuĩka atĩrĩ
2Chronicles24:12 Nake mũthamaki me na Jehoiada magĩcinengera arĩa mehokeirũo wĩra ũcio wa nyũmba ya Jehova; nao magĩkĩandĩka aaki na mahiga
2Chronicles24:13 Tondũ ũcio aruti acio a wĩra magĩkĩũruta
2Chronicles24:14 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles24:15 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles24:16 Nao andũ makĩmũthika kũu itũũra rĩa Daudi hamwe na athamaki
2Chronicles24:17 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles24:18 Nao magĩgĩte nyũmba ya Jehova
2Chronicles24:19 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles24:20 Nake Roho wa Ngai agĩkora Zekaria
2Chronicles24:21 Nao magĩkĩgĩa ndundu mamũũkĩrĩre
2Chronicles24:22 Ũguo nĩguo Joashu
2Chronicles24:23 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Chronicles24:24 Nĩ ũndũ mbũtũ ĩo ya ita ya Asuriata yathiĩte kũu ĩĩ gĩkundi kĩnyinyi kĩa andũ
2Chronicles24:25 Na rĩrĩa mbũtũ ĩo yacokire kũinũka ĩkĩmweherera
2Chronicles24:26 Nao arĩa maagĩire ndundu ya kũmũũkĩrĩra nĩ aya; nĩ Zabadi
2Chronicles24:27 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles25:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles25:2 Nake agĩgĩĩka mũndũ marĩa monagwo maagĩrĩire nĩ Jehova
2Chronicles25:3 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Chronicles25:4 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles25:5 O na ningĩ Amazia agĩcokanĩrĩria Ajuda othe hamwe
2Chronicles25:6 O na ningĩ akĩandĩka andũ njamba irĩ hinya ngiri igana rĩmwe moimĩte kũu Isiraeli
2Chronicles25:7 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles25:8 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles25:9 Nake Amazia agĩkĩũria mũndũ ũcio wa Ngai atĩrĩ
2Chronicles25:10 Hĩndĩ ĩo Amazia agĩkĩamũrania mbũtũ ĩo yoimĩte Efiraimu na ĩrĩa ĩngĩ
2Chronicles25:11 Nake Amazia agĩkĩĩũmĩrĩria
2Chronicles25:12 Ningĩ ciana icio cia Juda ikĩgwata andũ angĩ ngiri ikũmi mĩgwate ikĩmatwara o igũrũ gacũmbĩrĩ ka rũaro rũa ihiga
2Chronicles25:13 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles25:14 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Chronicles25:15 Tondũ ũcio Jehova agĩgĩcinwo nĩ marakara nĩ ũndũ wa Amazia
2Chronicles25:16 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Chronicles25:17 Hĩndĩ ĩo Amazia
2Chronicles25:18 Nake Joashu
2Chronicles25:19 Atĩrĩrĩ
2Chronicles25:20 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles25:21 Tondũ ũcio Joashu
2Chronicles25:22 Nao Juda magĩgĩtorio nĩ Isiraeli nao mũndũ o mũndũ makĩũrĩra hema-inĩ ciao.
2Chronicles25:23 Nake Joashu
2Chronicles25:24 Nake agĩgĩthiĩ na thahabu yothe
2Chronicles25:25 Nake Amazia
2Chronicles25:26 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles25:27 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles25:28 Thutha wa ũguo makĩmũcokia aigĩrĩirũo mbarathi igũrũ
2Chronicles26:1 Nao andũ othe a Juda magĩkĩoya Uzia
2Chronicles26:2 Nĩwe waakithirie Elothu
2Chronicles26:3 Hĩndĩ ĩo Uzia aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka-rĩ
2Chronicles26:4 Nake agĩgĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ mega nĩ Jehova
2Chronicles26:5 Nake agĩkĩgwata kũrongoria Ngai matukũ ma Zekaria
2Chronicles26:6 Nake agĩthiĩ kũhũrana mbaara na Afilisiti
2Chronicles26:7 Nake Ngai akĩmũteithia akĩhũrana na Afilisiti
2Chronicles26:8 Nao Aamoni makĩhe Uzia iheo; narĩo rĩĩtwa rĩake rĩgĩkĩgĩa igweta mũno rĩkĩya gũkinya o itonyero-inĩ rĩa Misiri; nĩ gũkorũo nĩaagĩire na hinya mũno mũno.
2Chronicles26:9 Ningĩ Uzia agĩaka mĩthiringo ya nyũmba ndaya na igũrũ kũu Jerusalemu kĩhingo-inĩ gĩa koine-inĩ
2Chronicles26:10 O na agĩaka mĩthiringo ya nyũmba ndaya na igũrũ werũ-inĩ
2Chronicles26:11 O na ningĩ-rĩ
2Chronicles26:12 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles26:13 Nao acio nĩo maathaga mbũtũ cia ita cia andũ ngiri magana matatũ na mũgwanja na magana matano
2Chronicles26:14 Nake Uzia agĩthondekithĩria andũ acio othe a ita ngo
2Chronicles26:15 Ningĩ agĩthondekithia kũu Jerusalemu mĩnyamũ ihaana ta igũtha mĩnene mũno
2Chronicles26:16 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles26:17 Nake Azaria
2Chronicles26:18 nao makĩgiria Uzia ũcio mũthamaki eke ũndũ ũcio
2Chronicles26:19 Nake Uzia agĩkĩrakara; na agĩkorũo arĩ na rũgĩo rũa gũcinĩra ũbumba aanyitĩte na guoko; na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles26:20 Nake Azaria
2Chronicles26:21 Nake Uzia
2Chronicles26:22 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles26:23 Nake Uzia agĩgĩkoma hamwe na maithe; nao andũ makĩmũthika hamwe na maithe gĩthaka-inĩ kũrĩa kwarĩ mbĩrĩra cia athamaki; nĩ gũkorũo moigire atĩrĩ
2Chronicles27:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles27:2 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ mega nĩ Jehova
2Chronicles27:3 Ũcio nĩwe waakire kĩhingo kĩa mwena wa igũrũ wa nyũmba ya Jehova
2Chronicles27:4 O na ningĩ agĩaka matũũra bũrũri ũrĩa wĩ irĩma nyingĩ wa Juda
2Chronicles27:5 O na ningĩ akĩhũrana na mũthamaki wa ciana cia Amoni
2Chronicles27:6 Tondũ ũcio Jothamu agĩkĩgĩa na hinya
2Chronicles27:7 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles27:8 Nake aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtano hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka
2Chronicles27:9 Nake Jothamu agĩgĩkoma hamwe na maithe
2Chronicles28:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles28:2 no rĩrĩ
2Chronicles28:3 O na ningĩ agĩcinĩra ũbumba gĩtuamba-inĩ kĩa mũrũ wa Hinomu; o na agĩcina ciana ciake na mwaki
2Chronicles28:4 Ningĩ nĩaakĩrutagĩra magongona
2Chronicles28:5 Tondũ ũcio Jehova Ngai wake agĩkĩmũrekereria akĩmũneana moko-inĩ ma mũthamaki wa Suriata; nao makĩmũhũra
2Chronicles28:6 Nĩ gũkorũo Peka
2Chronicles28:7 Nake Zikiri
2Chronicles28:8 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli igĩkĩgwata andũ ngiri magana merĩ thĩinĩ wa ariũ a ithe wao mĩgwate
2Chronicles28:9 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles28:10 Na rĩu inyuĩ na inyuĩ mũcirĩire gũtua ciana cia Juda na Jerusalemu ngombo cianyu cia arũme
2Chronicles28:11 Tondũ ũcio thikĩrĩriai ũhoro ũyũ ngũmũhe
2Chronicles28:12 Hĩndĩ ĩo anene amwe a ciana cia Efiraimu
2Chronicles28:13 nao makĩmera atĩrĩ
2Chronicles28:14 Tondũ ũcio andũ acio meohete indo cia mbaara magĩgĩtiga andũ acio maagwatĩtwo mĩgwate
2Chronicles28:15 Nao andũ acio magwetetwo marĩĩtwa mao makĩarahũka makĩnyita andũ acio maagwatĩtwo mĩgwate
2Chronicles28:16 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles28:17 Nĩ ũndũ Aedomu nĩmaacokete gũũka kũhũra Juda
2Chronicles28:18 O nao Afilisiti nĩmaatharikĩte matũũra ma bũrũri ũrĩa mũgũu
2Chronicles28:19 Nĩ ũndũ Jehova nĩaagithirie Juda gĩtĩo nĩ ũndũ wa Ahazu
2Chronicles28:20 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles28:21 Nĩ ũndũ Ahazu nĩaakuuire indo imwe cia goro cia nyũmba ya Jehova
2Chronicles28:22 Ningĩ mũthamaki ũcio ti Ahazu
2Chronicles28:23 Nĩ ũndũ nĩaarutĩire ngai cia Dameski igongona
2Chronicles28:24 Nake Ahazu agĩcokereria indo cia nyũmba ya Ngai
2Chronicles28:25 O na matũũra-inĩ mothe ma Juda
2Chronicles28:26 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles28:27 Nake Ahazu agĩgĩkoma hamwe na maithe
2Chronicles29:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles29:2 Nake agĩgĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ mega nĩ Jehova
2Chronicles29:3 Naguo mwaka wa mbere ũrĩa aakorirũo athamakĩte
2Chronicles29:4 Nake akĩrehithie athĩnjĩri-Ngai o na Alawii hau
2Chronicles29:5 agĩkĩmera atĩrĩ
2Chronicles29:6 Nĩ ũndũ maithe maitũ nĩmaagararire watho wa Jehova Ngai witũ
2Chronicles29:7 o na ningĩ makahinga mĩrango ya gĩthaku
2Chronicles29:8 Na tondũ ũcio matũkũya ma Jehova magĩkora Juda na Jerusalemu
2Chronicles29:9 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
2Chronicles29:10 Na rĩu ndĩĩcirĩtie na ngoro yakwa atĩ nĩtũkũrĩkanĩra na Jehova
2Chronicles29:11 Atĩrĩrĩ
2Chronicles29:12 Hĩndĩ ĩo Alawii magĩkĩarahũka; nao nĩ Mahathu wa Amasai
2Chronicles29:13 ningĩ thĩinĩ wa ariũ a Elizafani nĩ Shimuri na Jeueli; o na thĩinĩ wa ariũ a Asafu nĩ Zekaria na Matania;
2Chronicles29:14 ningĩ thĩinĩ wa ariũ a Hemani nĩ Jehueli na Shimei; o na thĩinĩ wa ariũ a Jeduthuni nĩ Shemaia na Uzieli.
2Chronicles29:15 Nao magĩkĩũngania ariũ a ithe wao
2Chronicles29:16 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai magĩtonya handũ harĩa he thĩinĩ mũno ha nyũmba ya Jehova
2Chronicles29:17 Naguo mũthenya wa mbere wa mweri wa mbere nĩguo maambĩrĩirie wĩra ũcio wa gũtheria nyũmba ĩo
2Chronicles29:18 Thutha wa ũguo magĩtonya he mũthamaki
2Chronicles29:19 O nacio indo ciothe iria Ahazu
2Chronicles29:20 Hĩndĩ ĩo Hezekia
2Chronicles29:21 Thutha wa ũguo magĩtwara ndegwa mũgwanja
2Chronicles29:22 Magĩgĩthĩnja ndegwa icio
2Chronicles29:23 Nacio thenge magĩcitwaratwarithia hakuhĩ
2Chronicles29:24 nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai magĩcithĩnja
2Chronicles29:25 Nake agĩkĩiga Alawii kũu nyũmba ya Jehova me na thani iria ihũrithanagio ikagamba
2Chronicles29:26 Nao Alawii acio magĩkĩrũgama me na inanda cia Daudi cia kũina nacio
2Chronicles29:27 Nake Hezekia agĩathana atĩ ihaki rĩa njino rĩrutĩrũo kĩgongona-inĩ igũrũ. Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles29:28 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ gĩothe gikiinamĩrĩra gĩkĩhoya Ngai
2Chronicles29:29 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles29:30 O na ningĩ makĩria
2Chronicles29:31 Hĩndĩ ĩo Hezekia agĩgĩcokia akiuga atĩrĩ
2Chronicles29:32 Naguo mũigana wa indo cia mahaki ma njino iria ciatwarirũo nĩ kĩrĩndĩ kĩu warĩ ndegwa mĩrongo mũgwanja
2Chronicles29:33 Nacio indo iria ciaamũrĩirũo Jehova ciarĩ ndegwa magana matandatũ
2Chronicles29:34 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles29:35 O na ningĩ indo cia mahaki ma njino ciarĩ nyingĩ mũno
2Chronicles29:36 Nake Hezekia agĩkena me hamwe na andũ ake othe nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ macio Ngai aamahaarĩirie; nĩ gũkorũo ũndũ ũcio wekirũo na mbũkĩrĩra.
2Chronicles30:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles30:2 Nĩ ũndũ mũthamaki
2Chronicles30:3 Nĩ gũkorũo matiahotire kũmĩrĩa ihinda rĩayo kĩũmbe
2Chronicles30:4 Naguo ũndũ ũcio ũkĩonwo nĩ mũthamaki o na kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩothe atĩ nĩwagĩrĩire gwĩkwo.
2Chronicles30:5 Tondũ ũcio magĩgĩtua watho wa atĩ ũhoro ũhunjanĩrio kũu Isiraeli guothe
2Chronicles30:6 Tondũ ũcio atwari marũa magĩgĩthiĩ namo moimĩte he mũthamaki
2Chronicles30:7 Na mũtigatuĩke ta maithe manyu
2Chronicles30:8 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles30:9 Nĩ ũndũ mũngĩcokerera Jehova-rĩ
2Chronicles30:10 Tondũ ũcio atwari marũa magĩgĩthiĩ makĩgeraga itũũra o itũũra kũndũ guothe bũrũri wa Efiraimu na Manase
2Chronicles30:11 No o na gwatuĩka ũguo-rĩ
2Chronicles30:12 O nakuo Juda-rĩ
2Chronicles30:13 Nakuo kũu Jerusalemu gũgĩkĩgomana andũ aingĩ
2Chronicles30:14 Nao makĩarahũka
2Chronicles30:15 Magĩgĩthĩnja Bathaka mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna mweri wa kerĩ; nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai o na Alawii magĩgĩconoka
2Chronicles30:16 Nao magĩkĩrũgama handũ hao o ta ũrĩa mũtugo wao watuĩtwo
2Chronicles30:17 Nĩ ũndũ kwarĩ andũ aingĩ kĩrĩndĩ-inĩ kĩu mateamũrĩte
2Chronicles30:18 Nĩ ũndũ kĩrĩndĩ kĩingĩ kĩa andũ
2Chronicles30:19 ũrĩa ũroretie ngoro yake ũrongoria-inĩ wa Ngai
2Chronicles30:20 Nake Jehova agĩkĩigua Hezekia
2Chronicles30:21 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli
2Chronicles30:22 Nake Hezekia agĩkĩhe Alawii othe arĩa maarĩ ogĩ na ũtungati ũcio wa Jehova ndeto cia kũmomĩrĩria. Nakĩo gĩathĩ kĩu gĩgĩkĩrĩo mĩthenya ĩo yothe mũgwanja
2Chronicles30:23 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩothe gĩgĩciranĩra atĩ gĩikare gĩathĩ-inĩ kĩu mĩthenya ĩngĩ mũgwanja; nakĩo gĩgĩikara mĩthenya ĩngĩ mũgwanja gĩathĩ-inĩ gĩkenete mũno.
2Chronicles30:24 Nĩ ũndũ Hezekia
2Chronicles30:25 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩothe kĩa Juda
2Chronicles30:26 Na tondũ ũcio gũkĩgĩa gĩkeno kĩnene mũno kũu Jerusalemu; nĩ ũndũ kuuma o ihinda rĩa Suleimani
2Chronicles30:27 Hĩndĩ ĩo athĩnjĩri-Ngai acio Alawii magĩgĩũkĩra makĩrathima andũ; naguo mũgambo wao ũkĩiguwo nĩ Ngai
2Chronicles31:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles31:2 Nake Hezekia agĩtua atĩ gũcoke kũgĩa matuanĩra ma athĩnjĩri-Ngai o na Alawii o ta ũrĩa matuanĩra mao ma mawĩra maatariĩ
2Chronicles31:3 O na ningĩ gĩcunjĩ kĩrĩa kĩaagĩrĩirũo nĩ kũrutwo nĩ mũthamaki
2Chronicles31:4 O na ningĩ agĩatha andũ arĩa maatũũraga Jerusalemu atĩ marutage gĩcunjĩ kĩa indo ciao gĩa kũheo athĩnjĩri-Ngai o na Alawii
2Chronicles31:5 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles31:6 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles31:7 Naguo mweri wa ĩtatũ nĩguo ciaitĩkire kũrũnda indo icio irũndo
2Chronicles31:8 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles31:9 Hĩndĩ ĩo Hezekia akĩhoya athĩnjĩri-Ngai o na Alawii ũhoro wa irũndo icio.
2Chronicles31:10 Nake Azaria
2Chronicles31:11 Hĩndĩ ĩo Hezekia agĩgĩathana akiuga atĩ tũnyũmba tũmwe twa nyũmba ya Jehova tũthondekwo; nao andũ magĩgĩtũthondeka o ta ũguo.
2Chronicles31:12 Nao magĩgĩtonyia indo icio ciarutĩtwo
2Chronicles31:13 Nao Jehieli
2Chronicles31:14 Nake Kore wa Imuna
2Chronicles31:15 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles31:16 thengia arũme a thiritũ ya arĩa maakinyĩtie mĩaka ĩtatũ o na magakĩria hau magĩtarũo ta ũrĩa njiaro ciao ciatariĩ
2Chronicles31:17 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai maatarirũo o ta ũrĩa njiaro ciao ciatariĩ
2Chronicles31:18 Nao maatarirũo o ta ũrĩa njiaro cia ciana ciao ciothe
2Chronicles31:19 o na ningĩ ha ũhoro wa ariũ a Haruni arĩa athĩnjĩri-Ngai
2Chronicles31:20 Ũguo nĩguo Hezekia ekire kũu Juda guothe
2Chronicles31:21 Na mawĩra-inĩ mothe marĩa aaitĩkire kũruta makonainie na wĩra wa nyũmba ya Ngai
2Chronicles32:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles32:2 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles32:3 agĩciranĩra na anene ake
2Chronicles32:4 Tondũ ũcio hagĩkĩũngana andũ aingĩ mũno
2Chronicles32:5 Nake akĩĩũmĩrĩria
2Chronicles32:6 Nao anene a ita akĩmatua arori a andũ
2Chronicles32:7 Gĩai na hinya
2Chronicles32:8 Senakeribu ũcio-rĩ
2Chronicles32:9 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles32:10 Senakeribu
2Chronicles32:11 Githĩ Hezekia rĩrĩa ekuuga atĩ
2Chronicles32:12 Hezekia o ro ũcio-rĩ
2Chronicles32:13 Kaĩ mũtoĩ ũrĩa niĩ mwene
2Chronicles32:14 Nĩ ngai ĩrĩkũ
2Chronicles32:15 Tondũ ũcio menyai mũreke Hezekia amũhenie
2Chronicles32:16 Nacio ndungata ciake igĩkĩrĩrĩria kwaria ndeto cia gũcambia Jehova Ngai
2Chronicles32:17 Ningĩ akĩandĩka marũa ma kũmenereria Jehova
2Chronicles32:18 Nao andũ acio makĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene makĩarĩria andũ a Jerusalemu arĩa maarĩ rũthingo-inĩ igũrũ na mwarĩrie wa Ayahudi
2Chronicles32:19 Nao magĩkĩaria ũhoro wa Ngai wa Jerusalemu
2Chronicles32:20 Nake Hezekia
2Chronicles32:21 Nake Jehova agĩkĩrekia mũraika
2Chronicles32:22 Ũguo nĩguo Jehova aahonokirie Hezekia
2Chronicles32:23 Nao andũ aingĩ magĩgĩtwarĩra Jehova iheo o kũu Jerusalemu
2Chronicles32:24 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles32:25 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles32:26 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles32:27 Nake Hezekia aakĩrĩ na ũtonga mũingĩ mũno
2Chronicles32:28 o na agĩakithia makũmbĩ ma gũitwo uumithio wa irio
2Chronicles32:29 O na ningĩ agĩĩthurĩra matũũra mamwe matuĩke make
2Chronicles32:30 Ningĩ Hezekia o ro ũcio nĩwe wahingĩrĩirie gĩthima kĩa rũgongo igũrũ kĩa maĩ ma Gihoni agĩtũma matherere makinye o mũhuro mwena wa ithũĩro wa itũũra rĩa Daudi. Nake Hezekia agĩgĩikara agaacĩire mawĩra-inĩ make mothe marĩa aarutaga.
2Chronicles32:31 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles32:32 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles32:33 Nake Hezekia agĩkoma hamwe na maithe
2Chronicles33:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles33:2 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ moru nĩ Jehova
2Chronicles33:3 Nĩ ũndũ nĩaacokire gwaka matĩri marĩa ithe Hezekia aatharĩtie; o na agĩakithia igongona cia kũhoerũo Mabaali
2Chronicles33:4 Ningĩ agĩakithia igongona kũu nyũmba ya Jehova thĩinĩ
2Chronicles33:5 Nake agĩakithĩria mbũtũ yothe ya igũrũ igongona o kũu nja cierĩ cia nyũmba ya Jehova.
2Chronicles33:6 O na ningĩ akĩhĩtũkithĩria ciana ciake mwaki-inĩ kũu gĩtuamba-inĩ kĩa mũrũ wa Hinomu
2Chronicles33:7 Naguo mũhianano wa gwacũhio
2Chronicles33:8 na ndĩgatũma magũrũ ma Aisiraeli macoke kũũrũra o na hanini moime bũrũri ũrĩa ndatuire wa maithe manyu
2Chronicles33:9 Nake Manase agĩkĩhĩtithia Juda
2Chronicles33:10 Nake Jehova akĩarĩria Manase
2Chronicles33:11 Na tondũ ũcio Jehova agĩkĩmarehĩthirie anene a mbũtũ cia ita cia mũthamaki wa Ashuri
2Chronicles33:12 Na rĩrĩa aagwatirũo nĩ thĩna ũcio agĩgĩthaitha Jehova
2Chronicles33:13 Nake akĩmũhoya
2Chronicles33:14 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles33:15 O nacio ngai iria cia kũngĩ agĩciruta nyũmba ya Jehova
2Chronicles33:16 Ningĩ agĩcokereria kĩgongona kĩa Jehova
2Chronicles33:17 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles33:18 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles33:19 O narĩo ihoya rĩake
2Chronicles33:20 Nake Manase agĩkoma hamwe na maithe
2Chronicles33:21 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles33:22 Nake agĩgĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ moru nĩ Jehova
2Chronicles33:23 Nake ndaigana kwĩnyihĩria Jehova
2Chronicles33:24 Nacio ndungata ciake igĩkĩmũgĩĩra ndundu imũũkĩrĩre
2Chronicles33:25 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles34:1 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles34:2 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo nĩ Jehova marĩ mega
2Chronicles34:3 Nĩ ũndũ mwaka wa ĩnana ĩrĩa aakorirũo athamakĩte
2Chronicles34:4 Nao andũ ake magĩkiunanga igongona cia Mabaali arĩ o ho akĩĩonagĩra ũndũ ũcio
2Chronicles34:5 Namo mahĩndĩ ma athĩnjĩri-Ngai ayo akĩmacinithĩria igongona-inĩ igũrũ; agĩgĩtheria kũu Juda na Jerusalemu.
2Chronicles34:6 Ningĩ ũguo noguo ekire matũũra ma Manase na Efiraimu
2Chronicles34:7 Agĩcoka akiunangithia igongona
2Chronicles34:8 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles34:9 Nao magĩkinya he Hilikia
2Chronicles34:10 Nao magĩcinengera aruti wĩra arĩa arori a nyũmba ya Jehova; nao andũ arĩa maarutaga wĩra kũu nyũmba ya Jehova thĩinĩ magĩcineana ithondekithie nyũmba ĩo
2Chronicles34:11 naguo ũguo nĩ ta kuuga magĩcinengera atharamara
2Chronicles34:12 Nao andũ acio magĩkĩruta wĩra ũcio o wega mehokekete; nao anyabara ao a kũrutithia wĩra ũcio maarĩ Jahathu na Obadia
2Chronicles34:13 Ningĩ andũ acio nĩo maarĩ anyabara a arĩa maakuuaga mĩrigo
2Chronicles34:14 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maarutaga mbia iria ciatwarĩtwo nyũmba ya Jehova
2Chronicles34:15 Nake Hilikia agĩgĩcokia akĩĩra Shafani
2Chronicles34:16 Nake Shafani akĩrĩtwarĩra mũthamaki
2Chronicles34:17 O nacio mbia iria cionekire nyũmba ya Jehova-rĩ
2Chronicles34:18 Ningĩ Shafani
2Chronicles34:19 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
2Chronicles34:20 Nake mũthamaki agĩatha Hilikia
2Chronicles34:21 Thiĩi mũnduĩrĩrie ũhoro he Jehova twĩ na andũ arĩa matigarĩte Isiraeli o na Juda
2Chronicles34:22 Tondũ ũcio Hilikia
2Chronicles34:23 Nake akĩmera atĩrĩ
2Chronicles34:24 Jehova oigĩte ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
2Chronicles34:25 nĩ ũndũ nĩmaatiganire na niĩ
2Chronicles34:26 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles34:27 tondũ ngoro yaku nĩyororoire
2Chronicles34:28 Atĩrĩrĩ
2Chronicles34:29 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũthamaki agĩkĩrekania akĩũnganithia athuri othe a Juda o na a Jerusalemu.
2Chronicles34:30 Agĩkĩambata agĩkinya nyũmba ya Jehova
2Chronicles34:31 Nake mũthamaki akĩrũgama handũ hake
2Chronicles34:32 Ningĩ agĩtũma atĩ andũ othe arĩa monekire kũu Jerusalemu na Benjamini meĩkĩre ho kĩrĩkanĩro-inĩ kĩu. Nao andũ a Jerusalemu magĩgĩtũũra mekaga maũndũ maringaine na kĩrĩkanĩro kĩu kĩarĩkanĩirũo nĩo na Ngai
2Chronicles34:33 Nake Josia agĩkĩeheria maũndũ mothe marĩa me thahu ma mabũrũri ma ciana cia Isiraeli
2Chronicles35:1 Nake Josia agĩkĩrĩĩra Bathaka ya Jehova o kũu Jerusalemu; nao andũ magĩthĩnja Bathaka ĩo mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri wa mbere.
2Chronicles35:2 Nake akĩiga athĩnjĩri-Ngai mawĩra-inĩ mao
2Chronicles35:3 Nao Alawii arĩa maarutaga Aisiraeli othe maũndũ
2Chronicles35:4 Na mwĩhaarĩrie o ta ũrĩa mbarĩ cia maithe manyu itariĩ
2Chronicles35:5 Na mũrũgamage handũ harĩa haamũre o ta ũrĩa mbarĩ cia maithe ma ariũ a ithe wanyu
2Chronicles35:6 Mũgĩcoke mũthĩnje Bathaka
2Chronicles35:7 Nake Josia agĩkĩhe ciana cia andũ acio mataarĩ Alawii tũtũrũme
2Chronicles35:8 Nao anene ake makĩruta indo cia magongona na kwĩendera na ngoro ciao
2Chronicles35:9 Nao anene amwe a Alawii
2Chronicles35:10 Ũguo nĩguo wĩra ũcio watabarĩirũo
2Chronicles35:11 Nayo Bathaka ĩgĩgĩthĩnjwo
2Chronicles35:12 Nao makĩeheria nyama iria cia mahaki ma njino
2Chronicles35:13 Nao makĩhĩhia nyama cia Bathaka na mwaki o ta ũrĩa mũtugo wa kũrũmĩrĩrũo watuĩtwo; nacio nyama iria nyamũrĩre igongona magĩciruga na nyũngũ
2Chronicles35:14 Thutha wa ũguo magĩgĩĩthondekera o ene
2Chronicles35:15 Nao aini nyĩmbo arĩa ariũ a Asafu maaikarĩte o handũ hao
2Chronicles35:16 Ũguo nĩguo wĩra ũcio wothe wa Jehova wa kũrĩa Bathaka wathondekirũo mũthenya o ro ũcio
2Chronicles35:17 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli iria ciakĩrĩ ho ikĩrĩa Bathaka hĩndĩ ĩo o na gĩathĩ kĩa mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩimbie matukũ mũgwanja.
2Chronicles35:18 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles35:19 Nakĩo gĩathĩ kĩu kĩa Bathaka kĩarĩirũo mwaka wa ikũmi na ĩnana ĩrĩa Josia aakorirũo athamakĩte.
2Chronicles35:20 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles35:21 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles35:22 No rĩrĩ
2Chronicles35:23 Nao andũ arĩa maarathanaga na mĩguĩ makĩratha mũthamaki Josia nayo; nake mũthamaki ũcio agĩkĩĩra ndungata ciake atĩrĩ
2Chronicles35:24 Tondũ ũcio ndungata ciake igĩkĩmũruta ngari-inĩ yake ya ita
2Chronicles35:25 O nake Jeremia akĩrĩrĩra Josia; nao arũme othe o na andũ-a-nja arĩa maainaga nyĩmbo makĩgweta ũhoro wa Josia kĩrĩro-inĩ kĩao
2Chronicles35:26 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles35:27 o na ciĩko ciake cia mbere o na cia kũrigĩrĩria-rĩ
2Chronicles36:1 Hĩndĩ ĩo andũ a bũrũri ũcio magĩkĩoya Jehoahazu
2Chronicles36:2 Nake Jehoahazu aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtatũ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka
2Chronicles36:3 Nake mũthamaki wa Misiri agĩkĩmũtunya ũthamaki wake kũu Jerusalemu
2Chronicles36:4 Ningĩ mũthamaki ũcio wa Misiri agĩtua Eliakimu
2Chronicles36:5 Nake Jehoiakimu aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtano hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka; agĩthamaka mĩaka ikũmi na ũmwe kũu Jerusalemu; nake agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ moru nĩ Jehova Ngai wake.
2Chronicles36:6 Nake Nebukadinezaru
2Chronicles36:7 O na ningĩ Nebukadinezaru agĩkuua indo imwe cia nyũmba ya Jehova
2Chronicles36:8 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles36:9 Nake Jehoiakini aarĩ wa mĩaka ĩnana hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka
2Chronicles36:10 Na mwaka ũyũ ũngĩ ũgĩũka kwambĩrĩrio-rĩ
2Chronicles36:11 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles36:12 nake agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ moru nĩ Jehova Ngai wake; na ndaigana kwĩnyihĩria Jeremia
2Chronicles36:13 O na nĩngĩ akĩrema mũthamaki Nebukadinezaru
2Chronicles36:14 O na ningĩ atĩrĩ
2Chronicles36:15 Nake Jehova
2Chronicles36:16 no rĩrĩ
2Chronicles36:17 Tondũ ũcio agĩkĩmatwarithĩria mũthamaki wa Akalidei
2Chronicles36:18 O nacio indo ciothe cia nyũmba ya Ngai
2Chronicles36:19 Nao magĩgĩcina nyũmba ya Ngai
2Chronicles36:20 Nao andũ arĩa maahonokire kũũragwo na hiũ cia njora
2Chronicles36:21 nĩ getha ũhoro wa Jehova ũrĩa waaririo na kanua ka Jeremia ũhingio
2Chronicles36:22 Na rĩrĩ
2Chronicles36:23 Atĩrĩrĩ
Ezra1:1 NA RĨRĨ
Ezra1:2 Atĩrĩrĩ
Ezra1:3 Tondũ ũcio
Ezra1:4 Na rĩrĩ
Ezra1:5 Hĩndĩ ĩo hagĩgĩũkĩra anene a nyũmba cia maithe ma andũ a Juda na Benjamini
Ezra1:6 Nao andũ othe arĩa maamaikarĩte na ndwere ciothe makĩmekĩra hinya makĩmahe indo cia betha
Ezra1:7 Ningĩ Kurusu
Ezra1:8 nacio indo icio-rĩ
Ezra1:9 Naguo mũigana wacio nĩ ũyũ: nĩ thani nene mĩrongo ĩtatũ cia thahabu
Ezra1:10 na tũbakũri mĩrongo ĩtatũ twa thahabu
Ezra1:11 Indo icio ciothe cia thahabu na cia betha ciarĩ ngiri ithano na magana mana igĩtarũo. Nacio indo icio ciothe-rĩ
Ezra2:1 Na
Ezra2:2 makĩrehane na Zerubabeli
Ezra2:3 ciana cia Paroshu ciarĩ ngiri igĩrĩ na igana rĩmwe rĩa mĩrongo mũgwanja na igĩrĩ.
Ezra2:4 Na ciana cia Shefatia ciarĩ magana matatũ ma mĩrongo mũgwanja na igĩrĩ.
Ezra2:5 Na ciana cia Ara ciarĩ magana mũgwanja ma mĩrongo mũgwanja na ithano.
Ezra2:6 Na ciana cia Pahathu-moabi
Ezra2:7 Na ciana cia Elamu ciarĩ ngiri ĩmwe na magana merĩ ma mĩrongo ĩtano na inya.
Ezra2:8 Na ciana cia Zatu ciarĩ magana kenda ma mĩrongo ĩna na ithano.
Ezra2:9 Na ciana cia Zakai ciarĩ magana mũgwanja ma mĩrongo ĩtandatũ.
Ezra2:10 Na ciana cia Bani ciarĩ magana matandatũ ma mĩrongo ĩna na igĩrĩ.
Ezra2:11 Na ciana cia Bebai ciarĩ magana matandatũ ma mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ithatũ.
Ezra2:12 Na ciana cia Azigadi ciarĩ ngiri ĩmwe na magana merĩ ma mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na igĩrĩ.
Ezra2:13 Na ciana cia Adonikamu ciarĩ magana matandatũ ma mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na ithathatũ.
Ezra2:14 Na ciana cia Bigivai ciarĩ ngiri igĩrĩ na mĩrongo ĩtano na ithathatũ.
Ezra2:15 Na ciana cia Adini ciarĩ magana mana ma mĩrongo ĩtano na inya.
Ezra2:16 Na ciana cia Ateri wa Hezekia ciarĩ mĩrongo kenda na inyanya.
Ezra2:17 Na ciana cia Bezai ciarĩ magana matatũ ma mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ithatũ.
Ezra2:18 Na ciana cia Jora ciarĩ igana rĩmwe rĩa ikũmi na igĩrĩ.
Ezra2:19 Na ciana cia Hashumu ciarĩ magana merĩ ma mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ithatũ.
Ezra2:20 Na ciana cia Gibari ciarĩ mĩrongo kenda na ithano.
Ezra2:21 Na ciana cia Bethi-lehemu ciarĩ igana rĩmwe rĩa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ithatũ.
Ezra2:22 Na andũ a Netofa maarĩ mĩrongo ĩtano na atandatũ.
Ezra2:23 Na andũ a Anathothu maarĩ igana rĩmwe rĩa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na anana.
Ezra2:24 Na ciana cia Azimavethu ciarĩ mĩrongo ĩna na igĩrĩ.
Ezra2:25 Na ciana cia Kiriathu-arimu na Kefira na Beerothu ciarĩ magana mũgwanja ma mĩrongo ĩna na ithatũ.
Ezra2:26 Na ciana cia Rama na Geba ciarĩ magana matandatũ ma mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ũmwe.
Ezra2:27 Na andũ a Mikimasi maarĩ igana rĩmwe rĩa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na erĩ.
Ezra2:28 Na andũ a Beth-eli na Ai maarĩ magana merĩ ma mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na atatũ.
Ezra2:29 Na ciana cia Nebo ciarĩ mĩrongo ĩtano na igĩrĩ.
Ezra2:30 Na ciana cia Magibishi ciarĩ igana rĩmwe rĩa mĩrongo ĩtano na ithathatũ.
Ezra2:31 Na ciana cia Elamu ũrĩa ũngĩ ciarĩ ngiri ĩmwe na magana merĩ ma mĩrongo ĩtano na inya.
Ezra2:32 Na ciana cia Harimu ciarĩ magana matatũ ma mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ.
Ezra2:33 Na ciana cia Lodi na Hadidi na Ono ciarĩ magana mũgwanja ma mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ithano.
Ezra2:34 Na ciana cia Jeriko ciarĩ magana matatũ ma mĩrongo ĩna na ithano.
Ezra2:35 Na ciana cia Senaa ciarĩ ngiri ithatũ na magana matandatũ ma mĩrongo ĩtatũ.
Ezra2:36 Naho ha ũhoro wa athĩnjĩri-Ngai
Ezra2:37 Na ciana cia Imeri ciarĩ ngiri ĩmwe na mĩrongo ĩtano na igĩrĩ.
Ezra2:38 Na ciana cia Pashuri ngiri ĩmwe na magana merĩ ma mĩrongo ĩna na mũgwanja.
Ezra2:39 Na ciana cia Harimu ngiri ĩmwe na ikũmi na mũgwanja.
Ezra2:40 Naho ha ũhoro wa Alawii
Ezra2:41 Naho ha ũhoro wa aini nyĩmbo
Ezra2:42 Naho ha ũhoro wa ciana cia andũ arĩa maaikaragia mĩrango
Ezra2:43 O naho ha ũhoro wa Anethini
Ezra2:44 na ciana cia Keroso
Ezra2:45 na ciana cia Lebana
Ezra2:46 na ciana cia Hagabu
Ezra2:47 na ciana cia Gideli
Ezra2:48 na ciana cia Rezini
Ezra2:49 na ciana cia Uza
Ezra2:50 na ciana cia Asina
Ezra2:51 na ciana cia Bakabuku
Ezra2:52 na ciana cia Baziluthu
Ezra2:53 na ciana cia Barikosi
Ezra2:54 na ciana cia Nezia
Ezra2:55 Naho ha ũhoro wa ciana cia ndungata cia Suleimani
Ezra2:56 na ciana cia Jaaia
Ezra2:57 na ciana cia Shefatia
Ezra2:58 Na rĩrĩ
Ezra2:59 Nao aya nĩo maambatire moimĩte Teli-mela
Ezra2:60 nĩ ciana cia Delaia
Ezra2:61 Ningĩ thĩinĩ wa ciana cia athĩnjĩri-Ngai kwarĩ ciana cia Habaia
Ezra2:62 Andũ acio nĩmaacaririe ũhoro wa njiaro ciao thĩinĩ wa marĩĩtwa ma andũ arĩa maandĩkĩtwo o ta ũrĩa njiaro ciao ciatariĩ
Ezra2:63 Nake barũthi akĩmera matikarĩe indo iria nyamũre mũno
Ezra2:64 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩothe hamwe kĩarĩ andũ ngiri mĩrongo ĩna na igĩrĩ
Ezra2:65 thengia ndungata ciao cia arũme na cia andũ-a-nja; nacio ndungata icio ciarĩ andũ ngiri mũgwanja na magana matatũ ma mĩrongo ĩtatũ na mũgwanja; o na ningĩ maarĩ hamwe na andũ magana merĩ arĩa maainaga nyĩmbo
Ezra2:66 Nacio mbarathi ciao ciarĩ magana mũgwanja ma mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ithathatũ; nacio nyũmbũ ciao ciarĩ magana merĩ ma mĩrongo ĩna na ithano;
Ezra2:67 nacio ngamĩra ciao ciarĩ magana mana ma mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ithano; o nacio ndigiri ciao ciarĩ ngiri ithathatũ na magana mũgwanja ma mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ.
Ezra2:68 Na rĩrĩ
Ezra2:69 nao magĩkĩruta indo icio o ta ũrĩa hinya wao waiganĩte
Ezra2:70 Ũguo nĩguo athĩnjĩri-Ngai
Ezra3:1 Na rĩrĩ
Ezra3:2 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jeshua wa Jozadaku
Ezra3:3 Nakĩo kĩgongona kĩu magĩkĩhanda o handũ hakĩo
Ezra3:4 Ningĩ makĩgĩa na gĩathĩ kĩrĩa gĩĩtagwo Gĩathĩ gĩa Ithũnũ
Ezra3:5 na thutha wa ũguo gũgacoka kũrutwo ihaki rĩa njino rĩa gũtũũra rĩrutagwo hĩndĩ ciothe
Ezra3:6 Nao maambĩrĩirie kũrutĩra Jehova mahaki ma njino kuuma o mũthenya wa mbere wa mweri wa mũgwanja; no rĩrĩ
Ezra3:7 O na ningĩ makĩhe aaki mbia
Ezra3:8 Na rĩrĩ
Ezra3:9 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jeshua na ariũ ake
Ezra3:10 Na rĩrĩ
Ezra3:11 Nao magĩkĩinanĩra o mũndũ na mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ
Ezra3:12 No rĩrĩ
Ezra3:13 Na tondũ ũcio andũ matiigana gũkũũrana rĩanĩrĩra rĩa gĩkeno o na rĩa andũ acio maarĩraga; nĩ gũkorũo andũ nĩmaanagĩrĩra rĩanĩrĩra inene mũno
Ezra4:1 Na rĩrĩ
Ezra4:2 igĩthengerera Zerubabeli
Ezra4:3 No rĩrĩ
Ezra4:4 Hĩndĩ ĩo andũ acio maatũire bũrũri ũcio makĩagia andũ a Juda hinya
Ezra4:5 o na makĩhaka aheani kĩrĩra nĩguo mathũkie wĩra wao matukũ mothe ma Kurusu
Ezra4:6 Ningĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Ahasuerusu aarĩ mũthamaki
Ezra4:7 Na rĩrĩ
Ezra4:8 Nake Rehumu
Ezra4:9 Marũa maya maandĩkwo nĩ niĩ Rehumu
Ezra4:10 o na ndũrĩrĩ iria ingĩ iria Osinapari
Ezra4:11 Ĩno nĩyo kobi ya marũa marĩa maatwarithĩirio Aritashashita
Ezra4:12 Nĩkũmenyeke nĩwe
Ezra4:13 Nĩgũkĩmenyeke nĩwe
Ezra4:14 Na rĩrĩ
Ezra4:15 nĩ getha ũhoro ũrĩa wandĩkĩtwo ibuku-inĩ rĩa mathoguo rĩa maũndũ ma ihinda rĩao ũtuĩrio wega; na nĩũrĩona ũhoro wao ibuku-inĩ rĩu rĩa maũndũ macio ma ihinda rĩu
Ezra4:16 Na rĩu ũrĩa tũgũgĩkũmenyithia
Ezra4:17 Nake mũthamaki wao agĩkĩandĩka marũa agĩtwarithĩria Rehumu
Ezra4:18 Atĩrĩrĩ
Ezra4:19 Na tondũ ũcio nĩndaathanire
Ezra4:20 Ningĩ mahinda mamwe nĩkwagĩaga athamaki me hinya mũno maathamakaga Jerusalemu
Ezra4:21 Tondũ ũcio athanai mwĩre andũ acio matige wĩra ũcio
Ezra4:22 Na mwĩmenyerere mũtikagĩe na thiea ũhoro-inĩ ũcio; kaĩ maũndũ ma kũgerithia athamaki ngero megũkĩrekwo maingĩhe nĩ ũndũ kĩ?
Ezra4:23 Na rĩrĩ
Ezra4:24 Hĩndĩ ĩo wĩra ũcio warutagwo wa nyũmba ya Ngai ĩrĩa ĩĩ kũu Jerusalemu ũgĩgĩtigwo; naguo ũgĩtiga kũrutwo o nginya mwaka wa kerĩ ĩrĩa Dario
Ezra5:1 Na rĩrĩ
Ezra5:2 Hĩndĩ o ro ĩo Zerubabeli wa Shealitieli na Jeshua wa Jozadaku magĩkĩarahũka makĩambĩrĩria gwaka nyũmba ya Ngai o ĩo ĩrĩ kũu Jerusalemu; na magĩkorũo me hamwe na anabii a Ngai
Ezra5:3 Na rĩrĩ
Ezra5:4 Ningĩ makĩmoria ũũ: Andũ arĩa maraaka nyũmba ĩno metagwo aa ũ?
Ezra5:5 No rĩrĩ
Ezra5:6 Na rĩrĩ
Ezra5:7 makĩmũtwarithĩria marũa maandĩkĩtwo ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Ezra5:8 Atĩrĩrĩ
Ezra5:9 Na ithuĩ tũgĩkĩũria athuri acio atĩrĩ
Ezra5:10 O na tũkĩmoria marĩĩtwa mao nĩguo tũkũmenyithie ũhoro ũcio wega
Ezra5:11 Namo macokio marĩa maatũcokeirie maatariĩ ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Ezra5:12 No rĩrĩ
Ezra5:13 No rĩrĩ
Ezra5:14 O nacio indo cia thahabu na cia betha cia nyũmba ya Ngai iria Nebukadinezaru aarutire hekarũ-inĩ ĩno ĩĩ gũkũ Jerusalemu
Ezra5:15 na akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Ezra5:16 Hĩndĩ ĩo Sheshibazaru o ro ũcio agĩgĩũka
Ezra5:17 Na rĩrĩ
Ezra6:1 Hĩndĩ ĩo Dario
Ezra6:2 Nakuo kũu Akimetha
Ezra6:3 Atĩrĩrĩ
Ezra6:4 na ĩĩkĩrũo mĩhari ĩtatũ ya mahiga manene mũno
Ezra6:5 o na ningĩ indo cia thahabu na cia betha cia nyũmba ya Ngai
Ezra6:6 Na rĩrĩ
Ezra6:7 tiganai na wĩra ũcio wa nyũmba ĩo ya Ngai
Ezra6:8 O na ningĩ atĩrĩ
Ezra6:9 Na rĩrĩ
Ezra6:10 nĩ getha marutagĩre Ngai wa igũrũ magongona ma mũtararĩko ũrĩa ũnungaga wega
Ezra6:11 O na ningĩ nĩnjathanĩte atĩ mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũkagarũra ũhoro ũcio
Ezra6:12 nake Ngai ũrĩa watũmire rĩĩtwa rĩake rĩtũũre kuo arong’aũrania athamaki othe
Ezra6:13 Hĩndĩ ĩo Tatenai
Ezra6:14 Nao athuri a Ayahudi magĩgĩaka nyũmba ĩo
Ezra6:15 Nayo nyũmba ĩo yarĩkirio mũthenya wa ĩtatũ wa mweri wa Adari wa mwaka-inĩ wa ĩtandatũ ĩrĩa Dario
Ezra6:16 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli
Ezra6:17 Naguo ũhoro-inĩ ũcio wa kwamũrĩra Ngai nyũmba ĩo ĩtuĩke yake
Ezra6:18 Nao makĩiga athĩnjĩri-Ngai magayanĩtio o ikundi o ikundi
Ezra6:19 Nao andũ acio
Ezra6:20 Nĩ gũkorũo athĩnjĩri-Ngai o na Alawii nĩmetheririe me hamwe
Ezra6:21 Nacio ciana cia Isiraeli iria ciacokire ciumĩte ndaho-inĩ
Ezra6:22 o na kĩa mĩgate ĩrĩa ĩtarĩ mĩimbie
Ezra7:1 Na rĩrĩ
Ezra7:2 wa Shalumu
Ezra7:3 wa Amaria
Ezra7:4 wa Zerahia
Ezra7:5 wa Abishua
Ezra7:6 Ezara ũcio nĩaambatire oimĩte Babuloni; nake aarĩ mwandĩki-marũa mũũgĩ mũno ũhoro-inĩ wa watho wa Musa
Ezra7:7 Nakuo gũgĩkĩambata andũ amwe a ciana cia Isiraeli
Ezra7:8 Nake Ezara agĩgĩkinya Jerusalemu mweri wa ĩtano wa mwaka wa mũgwanja ĩrĩa mũthamaki aakorirũo athamakĩte.
Ezra7:9 Nĩ gũkorũo mũthenya wa mbere wa mweri wa mbere nĩguo aambĩrĩirie kwambata oimĩte Babuloni
Ezra7:10 Nĩ ũndũ Ezara nĩaatuĩte na ngoro yake atĩ arongorie watho wa Jehova
Ezra7:11 Na rĩrĩ
Ezra7:12 Nĩ niĩ
Ezra7:13 Nĩ gwatha ngwathana atĩ Aisiraeli othe arĩa me gũkũ bũrũri ũyũ njathanaga
Ezra7:14 nĩ ũndũ nĩũtũmĩtwo nĩ mũthamaki o na andũ ake mũgwanja arĩa mamũheaga kĩrĩra
Ezra7:15 o na ũkuue betha na thahabu
Ezra7:16 hamwe na betha na thahabu ciothe iria ũkona bũrũri ũyũ wothe ũthamakagwo nĩ mũthamaki wa Babuloni
Ezra7:17 Nĩũgekĩra kĩyo mũno gĩa kũgũra ndegwa na mbia icio
Ezra7:18 Na rĩrĩ
Ezra7:19 O nacio indo iria ũheetwo nĩ ũndũ wa wĩra wa nyũmba ya Ngai waku
Ezra7:20 O na ningĩ atĩrĩ
Ezra7:21 Na rĩu niĩ
Ezra7:22 o na angĩkoiga kũrutwo taranda igana cia betha
Ezra7:23 Ũndũ ũrĩa wothe wathanĩtwo nĩ Ngai wa igũrũ-rĩ
Ezra7:24 O na ningĩ nĩtũkũmwĩra o ma atĩ ũhoro wa mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ wa athĩnjĩri-Ngai
Ezra7:25 Naho ha ũhoro waku wee
Ezra7:26 Na rĩrĩ
Ezra7:27 Nake Ezara akiuga atĩrĩ
Ezra7:28 o na agĩtũma njiguĩrũo tha nĩ mũthamaki

Ezra8:16 Ngĩkĩrekia mũndũ agete Eliezeri
Ezra8:17 Ngĩcoka ngĩmatũma mathiĩ kwĩ Ido

Ezra8:19 o na Hashabia
Ezra8:20 o na thĩinĩ wa Anethini
Ezra8:21 Hĩndĩ ĩo ngĩhunjanĩria ũhoro atĩ andũ mehinge kũrĩa irio
Ezra8:22 Nĩ ũndũ nĩndaconokire nĩ kũhoya mũthamaki gĩtungati gĩa athigari
Ezra8:23 Tondũ ũcio tũgĩkĩĩhinga kũrĩa irio o ro ũguo
Ezra8:24 Hĩndĩ ĩo ngĩkĩamũra anene ikũmi a athĩnjĩri-Ngai
Ezra8:25 Ngĩcoka ngĩmathimĩra betha
Ezra8:26 ngĩkĩmathimĩra ngĩmane taranda magana matandatũ ma mĩrongo ĩtano cia betha
Ezra8:27 o na mbakũri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ cia thahabu ingiuma mbaũni ngiri ĩmwe
Ezra8:28 Ngĩkĩmera atĩrĩ
Ezra8:29 Ĩkaragai mwĩhũgĩte
Ezra8:30 Ũguo nĩguo athĩnjĩri-Ngai o na Alawii maaiyũkĩrie indo icio cia betha na thahabu
Ezra8:31 Hĩndĩ ĩo tũgĩkiuma kũu rũũĩ-inĩ rũu rũa Ahava mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ wa mweri wa mbere
Ezra8:32 Na twakinya Jerusalemu
Ezra8:33 naguo mũthenya wa kana

Ezra9:1 Na rĩrĩ

Ezra10:1 Na rĩrĩ
Ezra10:2 Nake Shekania wa Jehieli
Ezra10:3 Tondũ ũcio rekei tũrĩkanĩre na Ngai witũ atĩ tũte andũ-a-nja acio othe tũhikĩtie
Ezra10:4 Kĩarahũke
Ezra10:5 Hĩndĩ ĩo Ezara agĩkĩarahũka
Ezra10:6 Hĩndĩ ĩo Ezara agĩkĩarahũka akiuma hau mbere ya nyũmba ya Ngai
Ezra10:7 Naguo ũhoro ũgikĩhunjanĩrio kũu Juda na Jerusalemu harĩ andũ acio othe maatahĩtwo
Ezra10:8 o na wa atĩ mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũtarĩkinya kuo mĩthenya ĩtatũ ĩtanathira
Ezra10:9 Hĩndĩ ĩo arũme othe a Juda na Benjamini magĩkĩũngana Jerusalemu mĩthenya ĩo ĩtatũ ĩtanathira; naguo mũthenya wa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ wa mweri wa kenda
Ezra10:10 Nake Ezara
Ezra10:11 Na tondũ ũcio umbũrĩrai Jehova
Ezra10:12 Hĩndĩ ĩo kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩothe gĩgĩcokia gĩkiuga na mũgambo mũnene atĩrĩ
Ezra10:13 No rĩrĩ
Ezra10:14 Tondũ ũcio reka atongoria aitũ matuwo arori a kĩrĩndĩ gĩothe
Ezra10:15 Na gũgĩtuĩka atĩrĩ
Ezra10:16 Nao andũ acio maatahĩtwo magĩĩka o ta ũrĩa kwarĩkanĩrĩtwo; nake Ezara
Ezra10:17 Naguo mũthenya wa mbere wa mweri wa mbere nĩguo maarĩkirie gũcira ũhoro wa andũ acio othe maahikĩtie andũ-a-nja arĩa matarĩ a rũrĩrĩ rũao.
Ezra10:18 Na thĩinĩ wa ariũ a athĩnjĩri-Ngai nĩkwonekire andũ amwe maahikĩtie andũ-a-nja matarĩ a rũrĩrĩ rũao

Nehemiah1:2 Hanani

Nehemiah1:5 ngiuga atĩrĩ

Nehemiah1:7 Nĩtũgwĩkĩte maũndũ moru mũno mũno

Nehemiah2:2 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩnjũria atĩrĩ

Nehemiah2:4 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩnjũria atĩrĩ
Nehemiah2:5 Ngĩcoka ngĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
Nehemiah2:6 Nake mũthamaki akĩnjũria atĩrĩ
Nehemiah2:7 O na ningĩ ngĩĩra mũthamaki ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Nehemiah2:8 o na ũ’he marũa ma gũtwarĩra Asafu
Nehemiah2:9 Hĩndĩ ĩo ngĩgĩthiĩ ngĩkinya harĩ abarũthi arĩa maarĩ mũrĩmo ũcio ũngĩ wa rũũĩ rũu
Nehemiah2:10 Na rĩrĩ
Nehemiah2:11 Tondũ ũcio ngĩkinya Jerusalemu; na ndanina mĩthenya ĩtatũ kuo
Nehemiah2:12 ngĩcoka ngĩũkĩra ũtukũ
Nehemiah2:13 Ngĩkiuma ũtukũ
Nehemiah2:14 Hĩndĩ ĩo ngĩthiathia ngĩkinya Kĩhingo-inĩ gĩa Gĩthima
Nehemiah2:15 Thutha wa ũguo ngĩkĩambata kũrĩ o ũtukũ
Nehemiah2:16 Nao aathani akuo matiamenyire na kũrĩa ’thiĩte
Nehemiah2:17 Hĩndĩ ĩo ngĩkĩmera atĩrĩ
Nehemiah2:18 Ngĩcoka ngĩmahe ũhoro wa ũrĩa Ngai wakwa arĩ hamwe na niĩ andeithie
Nehemiah2:19 No rĩrĩ
Nehemiah2:20 Hĩndĩ ĩo ngĩmacokeria
Nehemiah3:1 Hĩndĩ ĩo Eliashibu
Nehemiah3:2 Nao andũ arĩa maariganĩtie nake magĩaka-rĩ
Nehemiah3:3 Nakĩo Kĩhingo gĩa Ciũngũyũ nĩ ariũ a Hasenaa maagĩakire
Nehemiah3:4 Ningĩ arĩa maarigainie na acio magĩcokereria rũthingo rũu
Nehemiah3:5 O nao arĩa maariganĩtie na acio makĩrũcokereria nĩ Atekoa; no rĩrĩ
Nehemiah3:6 Ningĩ Kĩhingo gĩa Tene-rĩ
Nehemiah3:7 O nao arĩa maariganĩtie nao icokererio-inĩ rĩa rũthingo rũu
Nehemiah3:8 Nao arĩa maariganĩtie nao icokererio-inĩ rĩa rũthingo rũu nĩ Ũzieli wa Harihaia
Nehemiah3:9 Nake mũndũ ũrĩa wariganĩtie nao icokererio-inĩ rĩaruo
Nehemiah3:10 Nake mũndũ ũrĩa wariganĩtie nake icokererio-inĩ rĩaruo
Nehemiah3:11 Nao Malikija wa Harimu
Nehemiah3:12 Nake mũndũ ũrĩa wariganĩtie nao icokererio-inĩ rĩaruo
Nehemiah3:13 Nakĩo Kĩhingo gĩa Kĩanda gĩgĩcokererio nĩ Hanuni
Nehemiah3:14 Nakĩo Kĩhingo kĩu gĩa Kĩara-inĩ gĩgĩcokererio nĩ Malikija wa Rekabu
Nehemiah3:15 Nakĩo Kĩhingo gĩa Gĩthima gĩgĩcokererio nĩ Shalumu wa Kolihoze
Nehemiah3:16 Nake mũndũ ũrĩa wariganĩtie nake icokererio-inĩ rĩu

Nehemiah11:1 Na rĩrĩ
Nehemiah11:2 Nao andũ acio makĩrathima andũ othe arĩa megathũrire o ene atĩ magatũũre Jerusalemu na ũndũ wa kwĩendera na ngoro ciao.
Nehemiah11:3 Na rĩrĩ
Nehemiah11:4 Nakuo kũu Jerusalemu gũgĩtũũra andũ amwe a ciana cia Juda
Nehemiah11:5 na Maaseia
Nehemiah11:6 Nao ariũ a Perezu othe arĩa maatũire Jerusalemu maarĩ andũ njamba magana mana ma mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na anana.
Nehemiah11:7 Nao ariũ a Benjamini nĩ aya: nĩ Salu
Nehemiah11:8 na thutha wake haarĩ Gabai
Nehemiah11:9 Nake Joeli wa Zikiri nĩwe warĩ mũnyabara wao; nake Juda wa Hasenua nĩwe warĩ mũrori itũũra wa kerĩ.
Nehemiah11:10 Nao a athĩnjĩri-Ngai nĩ Jedaia wa Joiaribu
Nehemiah11:11 na Seraia
Nehemiah11:12 nao ariũ a ithe wao arĩa maarutaga wĩra wa nyũmba ĩo ya Ngai
Nehemiah11:13 na ariũ a ithe
Nehemiah11:14 na ariũ a ithe wao
Nehemiah11:15 Nao Alawii
Nehemiah11:16 na Shabethai na Jozabadi
Nehemiah11:17 na Matania
Nehemiah11:18 Nao Alawii othe arĩa maarĩ itũũra rĩu rĩamũre maarĩ magana merĩ ma mĩrongo ĩnana na ana.
Nehemiah11:19 Ningĩ aikaria mĩrango
Nehemiah11:20 Namo matigari ma Isiraeli
Nehemiah11:21 No rĩrĩ
Nehemiah11:22 Nake mũrori wa Alawii
Nehemiah11:23 Nĩ ũndũ kwarĩ watho waathanĩtwo nĩ mũthamaki ũmakoniĩ
Nehemiah11:24 Na rĩrĩ
Nehemiah11:25 Naho ha ũhoro wa tũtũũra na mĩgũnda yatuo-rĩ
Nehemiah11:26 o na Jeshua
Nehemiah11:27 na Hazaru-shuali
Nehemiah11:28 na Zikilagi
Nehemiah11:29 na Eni-rimoni
Nehemiah11:30 na Zanoa

Nehemiah11:33 na Hazoru
Nehemiah11:34 na Hadidi
Nehemiah11:35 na Lodi

Nehemiah12:25 Nao Matania

Nehemiah12:27 Na rĩrĩ

Nehemiah12:29 o na ĩkiuma Bethi-giligali

Nehemiah12:33 na Azaria
Nehemiah12:34 na Juda

Nehemiah12:38 O nakĩo gĩkundi kĩrĩa kĩngĩ kĩa andũ acio maacokagia ngatho gĩgĩthiĩ gũcemania na acio angĩ
Nehemiah12:39 o na tũgĩthiĩ igũrũ rĩa Kĩhingo kĩa Efiraimu
Nehemiah12:40 Ũguo nĩguo ikundi icio cierĩ cia andũ acio maacokagia ngatho hau hang’etheire nyũmba ya Ngai ciarũgamire
Nehemiah12:41 o na athĩnjĩri-Ngai amwe
Nehemiah12:42 o na Maaseia
Nehemiah12:43 Nao andũ magĩkĩruta magongona manene mũthenya ũcio
Nehemiah12:44 Ningĩ mũthenya o ro ũcio andũ amwe magĩtuwo arori a tũnyũmba tũrĩa tũigagwo mũthithũ wa indo cia bata
Nehemiah12:45 Nao magĩgĩikara mamenyereire matuanĩra ma wĩra wa Ngai wao
Nehemiah12:46 Nĩ gũkorũo matukũ ma Daudi na Asafu
Nehemiah12:47 Nao Aisiraeli othe
Nehemiah13:1 Na rĩrĩ
Nehemiah13:2 nĩ ũndũ matiigana gũthagania ciana cia Isiraeli na irio o na maĩ; no nĩ kũhaka maacihakanĩrĩire he Balaamu nĩguo acirume; no Ngai witũ akĩgarũra kĩrumi kĩu gĩake gĩtuĩke kĩrathimo.
Nehemiah13:3 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Nehemiah13:4 Na rĩrĩ
Nehemiah13:5 nĩaamũthondekithĩirie kanyũmba kanene
Nehemiah13:6 No ihinda rĩu rĩothe niĩ ndiarĩ kũu Jerusalemu; nĩ ũndũ mwaka wa mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ĩĩrĩ ĩrĩa Aritashashita
Nehemiah13:7 ngĩcoka Jerusalemu
Nehemiah13:8 Naguo ũndũ ũcio ũkĩnjiguithia ũũru mũno; na tondũ ũcio indo ciothe cia Tobia
Nehemiah13:9 Ngĩgĩcoka ngĩatha andũ
Nehemiah13:10 Ngĩgĩcoka ngĩona atĩ Alawii matiaheetwo igai rĩao rĩa indo iria maagĩrĩirũo nĩ kũheo
Nehemiah13:11 Hĩndĩ ĩo ngĩgĩtetania na aathani
Nehemiah13:12 Hĩndĩ ĩo andũ othe a Juda makĩrehe gĩcunjĩ kĩao gĩa ikũmi kĩa ngano
Nehemiah13:13 Ngĩgĩcoka ngĩthura aigi mũthithũ a kũndũ kũu kwaigagwo mũthithũ wa indo cia bata
Nehemiah13:14 Ndagũthaitha
Nehemiah13:15 Ningĩ matukũ-inĩ o ro macio
Nehemiah13:16 Ningĩ nĩgwatũire andũ amwe a Turo kũu Jerusalemu
Nehemiah13:17 Na niĩ hĩndĩ ĩo ngĩtetia anene a Juda
Nehemiah13:18 Githĩ maithe manyu ũguo toguo mekire? Ningĩ-rĩ
Nehemiah13:19 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Nehemiah13:20 Na tondũ ũcio onjorithia
Nehemiah13:21 Hĩndĩ ĩo ngĩkĩmarũithia ngĩmoria atĩrĩ
Nehemiah13:22 Ngĩgĩcoka ngĩatha Alawii ngĩmera metherie mokage gũikaria ihingo nĩ getha matũme mũthenya wa thabatũ wamũragwo ũgatherio. Wee Ngai wakwa
Nehemiah13:23 Ningĩ matukũ-inĩ o ro macio ngĩona Ayahudi arĩa maahikĩtie andũ-a-nja a Ashidodi
Nehemiah13:24 nacio ciana ciao ikĩaria-rĩ
Nehemiah13:25 Na niĩ ngĩgĩtetania nao ngĩmarũithia njĩhĩte
Nehemiah13:26 Githĩ Suleimani
Nehemiah13:27 Rĩu-rĩ
Nehemiah13:28 Nake mũndũ ũmwe wa ariũ a Joiada
Nehemiah13:29 Ndagũthaitha
Nehemiah13:30 Ũguo nĩguo ndakĩmatheririe meheranĩre na andũ othe a kũngĩ
Nehemiah13:31 o na ũhoro wa ũrĩa ngũ irĩrutagwo mahinda marĩa matuĩtwo nĩ ũndũ wa magongona
Esther1:1 GWAKINYIRE atĩrĩrĩ
Esther1:2 o matukũ macio-rĩ
Esther1:3 na agĩkorũo athamakĩte mĩaka ĩtatũ-rĩ
Esther1:4 Nake akĩnina matukũ maingĩ
Esther1:5 Na rĩrĩ
Esther1:6 Na rĩrĩ
Esther1:7 Nao andũ makĩheo gĩa kũnyua na ikombe cia thahabu
Esther1:8 Naguo ũhoro wa kũnyua watariĩ o ta ũrĩa gwaathanĩtwo nĩ mũthamaki
Esther1:9 O nake Vashiti
Esther1:10 Na rĩrĩ
Esther1:11 akĩmera magĩre Vashiti
Esther1:12 No rĩrĩ
Esther1:13 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũthamaki agĩgĩtuĩria ũhoro kũrĩ andũ arĩa ogĩ
Esther1:14 nao arĩa maamũrũmĩrĩire wathani-inĩ nĩ Karishena
Esther1:15 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩũria andũ acio ũũ: Rĩu-rĩ
Esther1:16 Nake Memukani agĩcokia ũhoro e hau mbere ya mũthamaki o na anene ake
Esther1:17 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Esther1:18 Na rĩrĩ
Esther1:19 Tondũ ũcio
Esther1:20 Na rĩrĩ
Esther1:21 Naguo uuge ũcio wa Memukani ũgĩkenia mũthamaki o na anene ake; nake mũthamaki agĩgĩĩka o ta ũguo Memukani oigĩte
Esther1:22 nĩ ũndũ nĩaatwarithirie marũa mabũrũri mothe marĩa maathagwo nĩ abarũthi arĩa aarekagia
Esther2:1 Na rĩrĩ
Esther2:2 Hĩndĩ ĩo ndungata cia mũthamaki iria ciamũtungatagĩra igĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Esther2:3 nawe
Esther2:4 Nake mũirĩtu ũrĩa ũrĩgũkenia
Esther2:5 Na rĩrĩ
Esther2:6 nake nĩ gũtahwo aatahĩtwo akarutwo Jerusalemu
Esther2:7 Nake agĩkorũo nĩwe warerete Hadasa
Esther2:8 Na tondũ ũcio gũgĩgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Esther2:9 Nake mũirĩtu ũcio nĩaamũkenirie
Esther2:10 Nake Esiteri ndaakiumbũrĩte rũrĩrĩ rũao
Esther2:11 Nake Moridekai agĩtũũra ahĩtũkagĩra hau nja ya nyũmba ĩo yaikaragwo nĩ andũ-a-nja mĩthenya yothe
Esther2:12 Na rĩrĩ
Esther2:13 hĩndĩ ĩo-rĩ
Esther2:14 Na hwaĩ-inĩ agagĩtonya kuo
Esther2:15 Na rĩrĩ
Esther2:16 Nake Esiteri agĩgĩtwarũo he Ahasuerusu
Esther2:17 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩenda Esiteri gũkĩra andũ-a-nja arĩa angĩ othe
Esther2:18 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũthamaki agĩkĩrugithĩria anene ake othe
Esther2:19 Na rĩrĩ
Esther2:20 Nake Esiteri ndaakorirũo oimbũrĩte ũhoro wa andũ ao
Esther2:21 Na rĩrĩ
Esther2:22 Naguo ũhoro ũcio ukĩmenyũo nĩ Moridekai
Esther2:23 Na rĩrĩ
Esther3:1 Na rĩrĩ
Esther3:2 Nacio ndungata ciothe cia mũthamaki
Esther3:3 Hĩndĩ ĩo ndungata cia mũthamaki iria ciaikaraga kĩhingo-inĩ kĩa mũciĩ wa mũthamaki ikĩũria Moridekai ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Esther3:4 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Esther3:5 Na rĩrĩ
Esther3:6 No agĩĩciria atĩ kũnyitithia Moridekai wiki gũtingĩmũguna
Esther3:7 Naguo mweri wa mbere

Esther3:9 Nawe

Esther3:11 Ningi mũthamaki akĩĩra Hamani atĩrĩ
Esther3:12 Hĩndĩ ĩo aandĩki-marũa a mũthamaki magĩĩtwo
Esther3:13 Ũguo nĩguo marũa maatwarirũo nĩ atwari-marũa mabũrũri mothe ma mũthamaki ũcio
Esther3:14 Nayo kobi ya marũa macio ĩkĩhunjĩrio ndũrĩrĩ ciothe
Esther3:15 Nao andũ acio atwari-marũa makiuma magĩthiĩ narua nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa maathĩtwo nĩ mũthamaki
Esther4:1 Na rĩrĩ
Esther4:2 ningĩ agĩthiĩ akĩrũgama kĩhingo-inĩ kĩa mũthamaki nja
Esther4:3 Na bũrũri o bũrũri kũrĩa guothe ũhoro wa ũndũ ũcio mũthamaki aathanĩte wakinyire
Esther4:4 Nacio ndungata cia airĩtu cia Esiteri
Esther4:5 Hĩndĩ ĩo Esiteri agĩĩtithia Hathaka
Esther4:6 Tondũ ũcio Hathaka akiumagara agĩthiĩ he Moridekai
Esther4:7 Nake Moridekai akĩmũhe ũhoro wothe wa maũndũ marĩa maamũkorete
Esther4:8 O na akĩmũhe kobi ya watho wa kũrũmĩrĩrũo ũrĩa waandĩkĩtwo wa kũhunjanĩrio kũu Shushani
Esther4:9 Nake Hathaka agĩcoka akĩhe Esiteri ũhoro ũcio aaheetwo nĩ Moridekai.
Esther4:10 Nake Esiteri agĩkĩaria na Hathaka
Esther4:11 Atĩrĩrĩ
Esther4:12 Nake Moridekai akĩheo ũhoro ũcio waarĩtio nĩ Esiteri.
Esther4:13 Hĩndĩ ĩo Moridekai akĩmera macokerie Esiteri ũhoro ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ

Esther4:15 Nake Esiteri agĩkĩmera macokerie Moridekai ũhoro ũũ:
Esther4:16 Atĩrĩrĩ
Esther4:17 Tondũ ũcio Moridekai agĩĩthiĩra

Esther6:1 Na rĩrĩ
Esther6:2 Hakĩonwo haandĩkĩtwo thĩinĩ warĩo atĩ Moridekai nĩwe woimbũrire ũhoro wa Bigithani na Tereshu
Esther6:3 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩũria atĩrĩ
Esther6:4 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩũria atĩrĩ
Esther6:5 Nacio ndungata cia mũthamaki ikĩmwĩra ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Esther6:6 Tondũ ũcio Hamani agĩgĩtonya. Nake mũthamaki akĩmũũria ũũ: Mũndũ ũrĩa mũthamaki endete gũtĩithia-rĩ
Esther6:7 Nake Hamani agĩkĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
Esther6:8 nĩ wega nguo cia mũthamaki iria wee
Esther6:9 nacio nguo icio

Esther6:12 Nake Moridekai agĩgĩcoka o kĩhingo-inĩ kĩa nyũmba ya mũthamaki. No Hamani akĩinũka gwake mũciĩ na ihenya
Esther6:13 Nake Hamani agĩkĩhe Zereshu
Esther6:14 Na rĩrĩ

Esther7:2 Naguo mũthenya ũcio wa ĩĩrĩ iruga-inĩ rĩu rĩa ndibei

Esther7:4 Nĩ ũndũ tũrĩ endie
Esther7:5 Hĩndĩ ĩo Ahasuerusu
Esther7:6 Nake Esiteri akiuga atĩrĩ
Esther7:7 Nake mũthamaki agĩũkĩra atũkũyanĩte
Esther7:8 Nake mũthamaki akiuma mũgũnda ũcio wa nyũmba-inĩ ya mũthamaki
Esther7:9 Hĩndĩ ĩo Haribona
Esther7:10 Andũ acio magĩgĩcuuria Hamani mũtĩ-inĩ ũcio aathondekithĩtie nĩ ũndũ wa Moridekai. Hĩndĩ ĩo mũthamaki agĩgĩthirũo nĩ matũkũya.
Esther8:1 Na rĩrĩ
Esther8:2 Nake mũthamaki akĩruta gĩcũhĩ gĩake kĩrĩa aacokerire Hamani
Esther8:3 Ningĩ Esiteri agĩkĩaria rĩngĩ arĩ mbere ya mũthamaki
Esther8:4 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũthamaki agĩgĩtambũrũkĩria Esiteri rũthanju rũake rũa ũnene rũa thahabu. Na tondũ ũcio Esiteri akĩarahũka
Esther8:5 akiuga atĩrĩ
Esther8:6 nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Esther8:7 Hĩndĩ ĩo Ahasuerusu
Esther8:8 Rĩu o na inyuĩ andĩkĩrai Ayahudi marũa mũmere ũrĩa mũkwenda
Esther8:9 Narĩo ihinda rĩu aandĩki-marũa a mũthamaki magĩĩtwo
Esther8:10 Nake akĩandĩkithia marũa macio
Esther8:11 Na rĩrĩ
Esther8:12 mũthenya o ro ũmwe
Esther8:13 Nayo kobi ya marũa macio ĩkĩhunjĩrio ndũrĩrĩ ciothe
Esther8:14 Na tondũ ũcio atwari-marũa arĩa maahaicaga mbarathi iria irĩ ihenya mũno
Esther8:15 Nake Moridekai akiuma he mũthamaki ehumbĩte nguo cia mũthamaki cia rangi wa bururu na rangi mwerũ
Esther8:16 Nao Ayahudi magĩikara matherete gĩthiithi
Esther8:17 Na gũgĩtuĩka atĩrĩ
Esther9:1 Na rĩrĩ
Esther9:2 mũthenya o ro ũcio-rĩ
Esther9:3 Nao anene othe a mabũrũri marĩa maathagwo nĩ mũthamaki wao
Esther9:4 Nĩ ũndũ Moridekai ũcio nĩonagwo arĩ mũnene kũu nyũmba ya mũthamaki
Esther9:5 Nao Ayahudi makĩhũra thũ ciao ciothe na hiũ cia njora
Esther9:6 Nao Ayahudi makĩũraga andũ magana matano kũu Shushani mũciĩ wa mũthamaki
Esther9:7 Nao makĩũraga Parishandatha
Esther9:8 na Poratha
Esther9:9 na Parimashata
Esther9:10 nao nĩo ihĩĩ iria ikũmi cia Hamani
Esther9:11 Na rĩrĩ
Esther9:12 Nake mũthamaki agĩkĩĩra Esiteri
Esther9:13 Hĩndĩ ĩo Esiteri agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Esther9:14 Nake mũthamaki agĩathana atĩ ũndũ ũcio ũgekwo o ro ũguo
Esther9:15 Nao Ayahudi arĩa maarĩ kũu Shushani magĩĩcokanĩrĩria mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri ũcio wa Adari
Esther9:16 Nao Ayahudi arĩa angĩ arĩa maarĩ mabũrũri-inĩ marĩa maathagwo nĩ mũthamaki ũcio magĩĩcokanĩrĩria
Esther9:17 Ũndũ ũcio wekirũo mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩtatũ wa mweri wa Adari; naguo mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri o ro ũcio makĩhurũka
Esther9:18 No rĩrĩ
Esther9:19 Ũndũ ũcio nĩguo ũtũmaga Ayahudi a tũtũũra-inĩ
Esther9:20 Nake Moridekai akĩandĩka maũndũ macio
Esther9:21 nĩ getha amere mũno maikare mamenyereire mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri wa Adari
Esther9:22 maririkanage atĩ nĩyo Ayahudi maaninirũo thĩna wa thũ ciao
Esther9:23 Nao Ayahudi magĩĩtĩkĩra gwĩkaga o ta ũguo maambĩrĩirie gwĩka
Esther9:24 nĩ gũkorũo Hamani
Esther9:25 no rĩrĩ
Esther9:26 Na tondũ ũcio magĩĩta matukũ macio Purimu
Esther9:27 Ayahudi magĩgĩtua atĩ kũgĩe mũtugo wa kũrũmĩrĩrũo nĩo o ene
Esther9:28 na atĩ mĩthenya ĩo ĩtũũre ĩririkanagwo na ĩmenyagĩrĩrũo njiaro-inĩ ciothe
Esther9:29 Hĩndĩ ĩo Esiteri wa Abihaili
Esther9:30 Nake Moridekai agĩgĩtwarithĩria Ayahudi othe arĩa maatũire mabũrũri marĩa igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na mũgwanja
Esther9:31 na wa atĩ mekĩre mũtugo ũcio wa kũmenyerera mĩthenya ĩo ya Purimu hinya o ihinda rĩayo rĩrĩa rĩtuĩtwo
Esther9:32 Naguo wathani ũcio wa Esiteri ũgĩĩkĩra maũndũ macio maathanĩtwo mekagwo hĩndĩ ĩo ya Purimu hinya; naguo ũhoro wamo ũkĩandĩkwo ibuku-inĩ rĩrĩa rĩa maũndũ ma ihinda rĩu.
Esther10:1 Nake Ahasuerusu
Esther10:2 Na rĩrĩ
Esther10:3 Nĩ gũkorũo Moridekai
Job1:1 KWARĨ mũndũ bũrũri wa Uzu

Job3:1 THUTHA ũcio Ayubu agĩtumũra kanua
Job3:2 We Ayubu agĩgĩcokia ũhoro akiuga:
Job3:3 Mũthenya ũrĩa niĩ ndaciarirũo-rĩ
Job3:4 Mũthenya ũcio ũrotuĩka o nduma; Ngai nĩamenye gũkaũrũmbũiya arĩ igũrũ
Job3:5 Nduma-rĩ
Job3:6 Ũtukũ ũcio naguo-rĩ
Job3:7 Ĩĩ-ni
Job3:8 Ũroekĩrũo ndirũ nĩ arĩa mekagĩra mĩthenya ndirũ
Job3:9 Njata ciaguo cia hĩndĩ ya gũkĩa irotuĩka nduma; ũrokĩrorereria ũtheri na ũwage
Job3:10 Nĩ ũndũ ndũigana kũhinga mĩirigo ya nda ya maitũ
Job3:11 Ĩ nĩ kĩ kĩagiririe ngue o ndaciarũo? nĩ kĩ kĩagiririe nduĩkane o ndoima nda?
Job3:12 Nĩ ũndũ kĩ niĩ ndaamũkĩirũo maru-inĩ
Job3:13 Tiga nĩ ũguo
Job3:14 Hamwe na athamaki na ene-kĩrĩra a mabũrũri
Job3:15 Kana ngagĩa hamwe na anene arĩa maarĩ na thahabu
Job3:16 O na nĩ kaba itangĩatuĩkire mũndũ

Job4:1 HĨNDĨ ĩo Elifazu

Job4:4 Ndeto ciaku-rĩ

Job4:6 Mwĩhoko waku githĩ ti gwĩtigĩra Ngai
Job4:7 Ta ririkana atĩrĩ
Job4:8 Niĩ
Job4:9 Acio nĩ kũninwo maninagwo nĩ mĩhũmũ ya Ngai
Job4:10 O hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũrũthi ũrathunguruma
Job4:11 Mũrũthi ũrĩa mũkũrũ ũgagĩkua nĩ kũũrũo nĩ ndĩa
Job4:12 Gwĩ kohoro kaanginyĩrĩire na ngunguĩ

Job4:14 Ngĩnyitwo nĩ guoya

Job4:16 Nakĩo kĩndũ kĩu gĩkĩrũgama
Job4:17 Mũndũ na nĩagakua-rĩ

Job5:1 Ta gĩĩtane; nĩngarĩ kũrĩ ũngĩgwĩtĩka? acio atheru-rĩ
Job5:2 Amu kĩng’ũrĩko kĩa ngoro nĩ kũũraga kĩũragaga kĩrimũ
Job5:3 Ndanona mũndũ kĩrimũ akĩgwata na mĩri: no rĩrĩ
Job5:4 Ciana ciake nĩiraihĩrĩirio nĩ ũhonokio
Job5:5 Magetha ma cio
Job5:6 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ

Job5:8 Korũo nĩ niĩ-rĩ

Job5:10 O we ũrĩa uuragĩria thĩ mbura
Job5:11 Andũ arĩa matetũũgĩragia amaigaga handũ hatũũgĩru
Job5:12 Methugunda ma andũ arĩa aara nĩ gũthatia amathatagia
Job5:13 Nĩ kũgwatia agwatagia andũ arĩa ogĩ na wara wao ene
Job5:14 Matũngagwo nĩ nduma mũthenya
Job5:15 Nĩ kũhonokania ahonokanagia harĩ rũhiũ rũrĩa ruumaga tũnua twao
Job5:16 Ũrĩa mũhũthũ agakĩgĩa na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro
Job5:17 Atĩrĩrĩ
Job5:18 Nĩ gũkorũo nĩatuuragia mũndũ
Job5:19 We nĩegũgũteithũra o na ũrĩ na mathĩna matandatũ
Job5:20 Hingo ya ng’aragu no agũkũũre harĩ gĩkuũ
Job5:21 Ũgũtũũra ũhithĩtwo mĩario mĩũru ĩhaana ta rũcamiũ
Job5:22 Mwanangĩko-rĩ
Job5:23 Amu ũgũtũũra wĩ karĩko na mahiga ma werũ-inĩ
Job5:24 Ũrĩikaraga ũũĩ atĩ hema-inĩ yaku kũrĩ o na thayũ
Job5:25 O na ningĩ ũgũtũũra ũmenyete atĩ mbeũ yaku nĩ kũingĩha ĩkaingĩha
Job5:26 Ũgakinya ithikĩro-inĩ rĩaku ũhingĩtie ũkũrũ

Job6:1 HĨNDĨ ĩo Ayubu agĩcokia akiuga atĩrĩ
Job6:2 Na arĩ korũo gĩtubunyĩko gĩkĩ ndĩ nakĩo nĩ kũgerũo kĩgeretwo
Job6:3 Amu wakorũo wĩ mũritũ kũrĩ mũthanga ũrĩa wĩ maria-inĩ marĩa manene: nĩkĩo niĩ njarĩtie ndeto itekũigeterera.
Job6:4 Tondũ rĩrĩ
Job6:5 Njagĩ-rĩ
Job6:6 Kĩndũ gĩtarĩ mũcamo nĩkĩngĩrĩĩka gĩtekĩrĩtwo cumbĩ? kana rũrenda rũa itumbĩ-rĩ
Job6:7 Ngoro yakwa nĩĩrarega kũihutia; harĩ niĩ nĩ ta irio ii magigi.
Job6:8 Ĩ korũo ndetĩkĩrio ũndũ ũrĩa ndĩrahoya! korũo Ngai aanjĩtĩkĩria ũndũ ũrĩa ngwĩrirĩria!
Job6:9 Na nĩguo atĩ Ngai etĩkĩre kũ’memenda; arekererie guoko gwake
Job6:10 Hĩndĩ ĩo ndingĩaga kũnyamarũka o na rĩu; ĩĩ-ni
Job6:11 Kaĩ hinya wakwa ũkĩrĩ ũrĩkũ
Job6:12 Hinya wakwa ũkĩrĩ guo hinya wa mahiga? mwĩrĩ wakwa anga nĩ wa kĩgera kĩa rũthuku?
Job6:13 Ũndũ kũrĩ
Job6:14 Mũndũ ũkiriĩ kũhooteka-rĩ
Job6:15 Ariũ a awa nĩ kũngarũka mangarũkĩte ta karũũĩ
Job6:16 Tũrĩa tũkoragwo tuunjugũkĩte nĩ makangaĩ ma mbarabu
Job6:17 Ningĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa twagwata ũrugarĩ
Job6:18 Ng’endo iria igendagĩra kũu tũrĩ nĩikerũraga na harĩ tuo
Job6:19 Ng’endo cioimĩte Tema nĩciatũroragĩrĩria
Job6:20 Igĩgĩconoka
Job6:21 Nĩ amu rĩu inyuĩ na inyuĩ mũtuĩkĩte a tũhũ; nĩ icanjama muonete
Job6:22 Nĩngarĩ njugire
Job6:23 Kana ngoiga

Job6:27 Inyuĩ no gũcukĩra mwana wa ngoriai mĩtĩ
Job6:28 Rĩu-rĩ
Job6:29 Ta cokerai

Job7:1 Anga mũndũ to ta kũgererũo agereirũo ihinda rĩake rĩa gũtũũrio ita-inĩ gũkũ thĩ? namo matukũ make anga to ta matukũ ma ũrĩa mwandĩke wĩra?
Job7:2 Niĩ-rĩ
Job7:3 Niĩ nĩguo nduĩrĩirũo atĩ ngĩe na mĩeri ya tũhũ
Job7:4 Rĩrĩa ndakoma

Job7:6 Matukũ makwa nĩmarathira na ihenya rĩkĩrĩte rĩa kanyamũ karĩa gakonjanithagia uthi tama ũgĩtumwo
Job7:7 No kĩririkane atĩ muoyo wakwa no rũhuho; riitho rĩakwa rĩtigacoka kuona ũndũ mwega.

Job7:15 Ngoro yakwa ĩgagĩthura nĩ kaba gũitwo
Job7:16 Muoyo nĩ gũthũũra ndĩũthũũrĩte; ndikwenda gũtũũra hingo ciothe; tigana na niĩ
Job7:17 Mũndũ-rĩ

Job7:20 O na ingĩkorũo ’hĩtĩtie-rĩ
Job7:21 Nawe nĩ kĩ gĩkũgiria ũnjohere wĩhia wakwa

Job8:3 Kaĩ Mũrungu ahong’oraga cira? kana we Mwene-Hinya nĩangĩkĩogomia kĩhooto?
Job8:4 O na gwatuĩka atĩ ciana ciaku nĩciamwĩhirie
Job8:5 Ũngĩĩtĩkĩra kũrongoria Mũrungu na kĩyo
