Job9:1 HĨNDĨ ĩo Ayubu agĩcokia akiuga atĩrĩ
Job9:2 Ti-itherũ nĩnjũĩ atĩ ũhoro ũcio noguo: no rĩrĩ
Job9:3 Angĩenda kũgariũranĩra ũhoro nake
Job9:4 Ngoro yake ĩĩ na ũũgĩ-ũrĩa-wa-ma
Job9:5 Akĩrĩ we ũrĩa ũthengagia irĩma
Job9:6 Na nowe ũthukathukaga thĩ ĩkoima handũ hayo
Job9:7 Na nowe wathaga riũa
Job9:8 Na nowe watambũrũkirie igũrũ arĩ o wiki
Job9:9 Ningĩ nowe mũũmbi wa njata iria ciĩtagwo Nduba
Job9:10 Arĩ we mwĩki maũndũ manene matangĩtuĩrĩka
Job9:11 Atĩrĩ
Job9:12 Kwĩnyitĩra nĩenyitagĩra: nũ ũngĩhota kũmũgiria? nũ ũngĩkĩmũũria
Job9:13 Ngai-rĩ
Job9:14 Makĩria githĩ ti niĩ itangĩhota kũmũcokeria ũhoro
Job9:15 O na ingĩtuĩka ndĩ na kĩhooto
Job9:16 O na ingĩkorũo ndĩmwĩtĩte
Job9:17 Amu no kũnyuna anyunangaga na kĩhuhũkanio
Job9:18 Ndarekaga ’hũmũke
Job9:19 Korũo nĩ ũhoro wa hinya wa makarau ngwaria
Job9:20 O na ndatuĩka ndĩ na kĩhooto
Job9:21 O na rĩu ndirĩ hĩndĩ itarĩ mwagu-ũcuke! niĩ-rĩ
Job9:22 Ũhoro no ũmwe; tondũ ũcio nĩngiugĩte atĩrĩ
Job9:23 Korũo nĩ mũmitĩko ũhobanĩirie andũ ũkamamitũra-rĩ
Job9:24 Thĩ nĩ kũrekererio ĩrekereirio moko-inĩ ma andũ arĩa aaganu; atua-cira arĩa me kuo nĩamahumbĩte mothiũ: aagĩkorũo tiwe
Job9:25 Matukũ makwa nĩmarathira na ihenya rĩkĩrĩte rĩa mũkinyia-wa-ũhoro; no kũhuhũka mahuhũkaga; matirĩ mũnyaka wonekaga.
Job9:26 Mabuĩragia magathiĩ
Job9:27 Ndoiga
Job9:28 Ndoiga ũguo-rĩ
Job9:29 Ndirĩ hĩndĩ itarĩtuwo o mwĩhia; ngũkĩĩnogia tũhũ nĩ ũndũ kĩ?
Job9:30 O na ingĩĩthamba na maĩ ma tharunji
Job9:31 Wee ndũrĩ hingo ũtangĩndikia gĩcoro-inĩ
Job9:32 Amu-rĩ
Job9:33 Gũtirĩ wa gũtũtuithania
Job9:34 Ta nĩanjehererie rũthanju rũake
Job9:35 Hĩndĩ ĩo ndakĩaria
Job10:1 Ngoro yakwa nĩĩgĩĩte na kĩnyiria nĩ gũtũũra muoyo: nĩngwĩtetera itekwĩrigĩrĩria; ngwaria nĩ ũrĩa ngoro yakwa ĩĩ na ũcũngũ.
Job10:2 Ngwĩra Ngai atĩrĩ
Job10:3 Githĩ wona arĩ wega ũhinyanĩrĩrie
Job10:4 Anga maitho maku no ta ma mwĩrĩ
Job10:5 Anga matukũ maku namo no ta ma mũndũ
Job10:6 Tondũ ũrakĩũrĩrĩria waganu wakwa
Job10:7 Na no ũkĩũĩ ndirĩ mwaganu
Job10:8 Moko maku nomo maangũmbanirie
Job10:9 Ta no kĩririkane atĩ wanyũmbire ta rĩũmba: ningĩ nĩũcoke ũndue o rũkũngũ?
Job10:10 Anga ndwanyonoririe ta iria
Job10:11 Wa’humbĩrire na rũũa na nyama
Job10:12 Wanjĩtĩkĩririe kũgĩa na muoyo
Job10:13 No rĩrĩ
Job10:14 Ndahĩtia
Job10:15 Ndakĩagana-rĩ
Job10:16 Na mũtwe wakwa wetiira-rĩ
Job10:17 Nĩ gwĩthĩhia wĩthĩhagia aira aku a kũnyumbũra
Job10:18 Nĩ ũndũ ũrĩkũ wagĩtũmire ũndute ihu-inĩ? nĩ gũtuĩkana ingĩatuĩkanire
Job10:19 Ingĩatuĩkĩte ta itarĩ ndagĩa; no gũkuuo ingĩakuuirũo ndwarũo mbĩrĩra-inĩ o ndoima ihu-inĩ.
Job10:20 Matukũ makwa githĩ to manyinyi? No gĩtige; tigana na niĩ
Job10:21 Itanathiĩ kũndũ kũrĩa itagacoka kuuma
Job10:22 Nĩguo bũrũri ũrĩa wĩ nduma ndumanu
Job11:1 HĨNDĨ ĩo Zofaru
Job11:2 Ũingĩ wa ciugo-rĩ
Job11:3 Andũ no mekirĩre nĩ ũndũ wa mwĩraho ũcio wĩ naguo? wakĩaria ũhoro wa kĩnyarari-rĩ
Job11:4 Amu wee
Job11:5 Na arĩ korũo Ngai aaria arĩ we
Job11:6 Na acoke akuonie maũndũ marĩa ma hitho ma ũũgĩ-ũrĩa-wa-ma
Job11:7 Githĩ wee wahota gũtuĩria maũndũ marĩa marikĩru ma Ngai? Mwene-Hinya-rĩ
Job11:8 Ũhoro wake ũtũũgĩire ta igũrũ; wee nĩ atĩa ũngĩĩĩkĩra? kũrika ũrikĩte gũkĩra kwa-ngoma; wee nĩ ũndũ ũrĩkũ ũngĩĩmenyera?
Job11:9 Mũigana waguo nĩ mũraya kũrĩ thĩ
Job11:10 Aatua kũhungurĩra harĩ andũ akĩmahingagĩra kĩoho-inĩ
Job11:11 Amu andũ arĩa a tũhũ
Job11:12 No andũ-rĩ
Job11:13 Wee-rĩ
Job11:14 Na gwakorũo guoko gwaku nĩgũkumbatĩirie ũndũ mwaganu
Job11:15 Ũngĩĩka ũguo-rĩ
Job11:16 Kĩnyamaro gĩkĩ wĩ nakĩo nĩ kũriganĩrũo ũngĩriganĩrũo nĩkĩo; wakĩririkana
Job11:17 Mũtũũrĩre waku ũngĩtheraga gũkĩra mũthenya barigici
Job11:18 Watũũra o na mwĩhoko nĩ ũndũ ũkĩrĩ na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro; ũngĩng’etangagia ũrĩa gũtariĩ
Job11:19 O na gũkoma ũngĩkomaga
Job11:20 Ĩndĩ andũ arĩa aaganu-rĩ
Job12:1 HĨNDĨ ĩo Ayubu agĩcokia ũhoro akiuga
Job12:2 Kaĩ no kwĩrũo nĩ inyuĩ kĩrĩndĩ inyuiki-ĩ! ũũgĩ-ũrĩa-wa-ma ũgathiranĩra na inyuĩ o rĩrĩa mũgakua!
Job12:3 No rĩrĩ
Job12:4 Niĩ-rĩ
Job12:5 Ũrĩa ũtũire earaganĩtie-rĩ
Job12:6 Hema cia atunyani nĩcio ciikaraga igaacĩire; andũ arĩa marakaragia Mũrungu-rĩ
Job12:7 Ta no kĩũrie nyamũ
Job12:8 Kana ũkĩarĩrie thĩ
Job12:9 Indo icio ciothe-rĩ
Job12:10 Nake
Job12:11 Githĩ gũtũ gũtiroragia ciugo o ta ũrĩa karakara ĩĩcamagĩra irio?
Job12:12 Ũũgĩ
Job12:13 Atĩrĩrĩ
Job12:14 We nĩamomoraga
Job12:15 We-rĩ
Job12:16 Nĩwe mwene hinya o na mũhingia wa maũndũ; mũhenio na mũhenania
Job12:17 Ene-kĩrĩra
Job12:18 Wohani wa athamaki nĩaũregerũraga
Job12:19 Athĩnjĩri-Ngai o nao
Job12:20 Andũ arĩa mehokeirũo ũciri
Job12:21 Anene-rĩ
Job12:22 Aguũragia maũndũ marĩa marikĩru akamaruta nduma-inĩ
Job12:23 Nĩwe ũnenehagia ndũrĩrĩ
Job12:24 Atongoria a irĩndĩ cia thĩ
Job12:25 Magatũũra mahambatangaga nduma-inĩ matarĩ ũtheri mangĩona
Job13:1 Atĩrĩrĩ
Job13:2 Ũrĩa inyuĩ mũũĩ
Job13:3 No niĩ-rĩ
Job13:4 Inyuĩ-rĩ
Job13:5 Na arĩ korũo mwetĩkĩra gũkira ki! ũguo watuĩka ũũgĩ harĩ inyuĩ.
Job13:6 Rĩu iguai ihooto ciakwa
Job13:7 Nĩ Mũrungu mũracirĩrĩra na wogogi? na nĩ ũndũ wake mũraaria ũrĩa-ma?
Job13:8 Nĩ kũmũtĩa mũmũtĩĩire maũthĩ? nĩ Mũrungu mwendete kũrũĩrĩra?
Job13:9 Angĩkĩmũtuĩria-rĩ
Job13:10 We ndarĩ hingo atarĩmũkũma
Job13:11 Githĩ ũtũũgĩru wake ndũngĩgĩtũma mũmake
Job13:12 Mĩgambo ĩo yanyu ya ũcamba nĩ thimo hũthũ o ta mũhu
Job13:13 Ta ĩkirĩrei
Job13:14 No kwĩrĩa ngwĩrĩa mwĩrĩ wakwa na magego
Job13:15 Kũnjũraga nĩekũnjũraga; ndirĩ ũndũ ũngĩ njetereire; no ndirĩ hingo itegũtiirĩrĩra ikĩro ciakwa ndĩ o harĩ we.
Job13:16 Ũndũ ũyũ naguo nĩguo ũgũtuĩka wa gũtũma ’honoke
Job13:17 Ta gĩthikĩrĩriei ũhoro wakwa wega
Job13:18 Cira wakwa nĩndĩũthuranĩire; nĩnjũĩ atĩ ngũkorũo ndĩ o wa kĩhooto.
Job13:19 Nũ ũngĩhota kũngararia? korũo nĩkũrĩ
Job13:20 No rĩrĩ
Job13:21 Atĩrĩ
Job13:22 Hĩndĩ ĩo no gĩĩtane
Job13:23 Nĩ rĩrĩ
Job13:24 Wĩhithĩte ũthiũ nĩ ũndũ kĩ
Job13:25 Nĩũngĩgariũrana na ithangũ rĩragũrũkio nĩ rũhuho? nĩũngĩthingatana na maragara?
Job13:26 Amu nĩ maũndũ marũrũ wandĩkĩte nĩ ũndũ wakwa
Job13:27 Na nĩũnjohereire ndungu cia mĩtĩ magũrũ
Job13:28 Niĩ mũndũ ũtuĩkĩte ta kĩndũ kĩoru
Job14:1 Mũndũ mũciare nĩ mũndũ mũka-rĩ
Job14:2 Atumũkaga ta kĩro
Job14:3 Nawe githĩ mũndũ ta ũcio wamũkũũrĩra maitho; nĩ mũndũ ta niĩ ũngĩtwara cira-inĩ atĩ tũcire nawe?
Job14:4 Nũ ũngĩkĩhota kũruta kĩndũ gĩtheru thĩinĩ wa kĩrĩa kĩĩ gĩko? gũtirĩ o na ũmwe ũngĩhota.
Job14:5 Kuona atĩ matukũ ma mũndũ nĩ matare
Job14:6 Mũhũgũkĩre
Job14:7 Amu mũtĩ-rĩ
Job14:8 O na mũri waguo wakũrĩra thĩ
Job14:9 Tondũ wa mũrukĩ wa maĩ-rĩ
Job14:10 No mũndũ-rĩ
Job14:11 O ta ũrĩa maĩ mahũaga magathira iria-inĩ
Job14:12 No taguo mũndũ akomaga thĩ atarĩcoka gũũkĩra: nginya o rĩrĩa igũrũ rĩkarindũka
Job14:13 Na arĩ korũo nĩ kũ’hitha wetĩkĩra kũ’hitha kwa ngoma
Job14:14 Mũndũ aakua-rĩ
Job14:15 Hĩndĩ ĩo wetana
Job14:16 No rĩu nĩ gũtara ũtaraga makinya makwa; ũhĩtia wakwa anga to kũrĩithia ũrĩĩthanagia naguo?
Job14:17 Wĩhia wakwa nĩ mũtonyie mondo
Job14:18 No rĩrĩ
Job14:19 Maĩ nĩmathiragia mahiga; mũiyũro wamo nĩũikũrũkagia tĩri wa thĩ: o nawe-rĩ
Job14:20 Mũndũ nĩ gũtoria ũmũtoragia tene na tene
Job14:21 Ariũ ake macokaga gũtuĩka a gũtĩwo
Job14:22 No gũtuurũo atuuragwo nĩ mwĩrĩ wake mwene
Job15:1 HĨNDĨ ĩo Elifazu
Job15:2 Mũndũ mũũgĩ-rĩ
Job15:3 Nĩangĩgĩcira akiugaga mohoro matarĩ kĩguni
Job15:4 Wee-rĩ
Job15:5 Kanua gaku
Job15:6 Kanua gaku mwene nĩko karagũtua mwĩhia
Job15:7 Wee nĩwe mũndũ ũrĩa waambire gũciarũo? kana nĩ gũkonorũo wagĩkonorirũo o gũtaanagĩa irĩma?
Job15:8 Wee anga ũrĩ mũthikĩrĩria wa ndundu ya Ngai? ũũgĩ nĩwe wĩrigĩirie naguo?
Job15:9 Nĩ atĩa ũũĩ
Job15:10 Ithuĩ tũrĩ na athuri arĩa marĩ mbuĩ
Job15:11 Ũthathai ũrĩa uumĩte kwĩ Mũrungu
Job15:12 Ngoro yaku ĩragũikia nĩkĩ? na nĩ kĩ gĩgũtũma ũmenamenie maitho
Job15:13 Ũgakĩhũgũrĩra Mũrungu roho waku na rũng’athio
Job15:14 Mũndũ akĩrĩ kĩo kĩ
Job15:15 Atĩrĩrĩ
Job15:16 Githĩ makĩria ti mũndũ
Job15:17 Atĩrĩrĩ
Job15:18 (Nĩ ũhoro ũtũire ũheanagwo nĩ andũ arĩa ogĩ maheetwo nĩ maithe mao
Job15:19 Na nĩ arĩa maaheetwo bũrũri ũgĩtuĩka wao oiki
Job15:20 Nĩ atĩrĩ
Job15:21 Matũ make maikaraga o makĩiguaga mĩrurumo ĩkũmũtuĩkĩria; o rĩrĩa aikaire na thayũ akaharũkĩrũo nĩ mũtahani.
Job15:22 Ndetĩkagia atĩ nĩagacoka kuuma nduma-inĩ; ũrĩa onaga nĩ atĩ nĩetereirũo nĩ njomo.
Job15:23 Onaga ta angĩtuĩka wa kũũrũra ahaarage irio
Job15:24 Mĩnyamaro na ruo rũa ngoro nĩ kũmũmakia imũmakagia; igakĩmũhoota o ta atharĩkĩirũo nĩ mũthamaki wĩthagathagĩire ita:
Job15:25 Na gĩtũmi nĩ ũndũ nĩ Mũrungu atambũrũkĩirie guoko akamũũgita
Job15:26 Nĩ kũmũguthũkĩra aamũguthũkĩire na nditi eũmĩtie ngingo agwete ngo yake ĩĩ na ngundi iria ndungu:
Job15:27 Tondũ ningĩ nĩeguĩkĩire ũthiũ wake na ũnoru
Job15:28 Ningĩ nĩetũũrĩire mĩciĩ ĩrĩa yorĩte
Job15:29 Ndangĩtũũra e mũtongu; indo ciake itigaikara
Job15:30 Ndarĩ hingo agacoka kuuma nduma-inĩ; honge ciake nĩ kũũmio ĩkomio nĩ rũrĩrĩmbĩ
Job15:31 Nĩatige kwĩhoka maũndũ ma tũhũ
Job15:32 Kũhingio ũkahingio o ihinda rĩake rĩtanakinya; mathũmbĩ make matigatũũra me maigũ.
Job15:33 Agaita thabibu ciake iteruĩte ta ũrĩa mũthabibu ũitaga
Job15:34 Amu arĩa a thiritũ ya ithagathago matũũraga marĩ athatu
Job15:35 Ihu rĩrĩa magĩaga narĩo nĩ rĩa kĩũnũhu
Job16:1 HĨNDĨ ĩo Ayubu agĩcokia akiuga atĩrĩ
Job16:2 Maũndũ ta macio nĩndĩkĩiguĩte maingĩ: inyuothe mũrĩ o athathayani a kĩnyamaro!
Job16:3 Ũhoro wa mũhũhũtĩko-rĩ
Job16:4 Niĩ na niĩ ndahota kwaria o ta ũguo mũraaria; ngoro cianyu ingĩrĩ harĩa ngoro yakwa ĩrĩ
Job16:5 Kanua
Job16:6 Ningĩ
Job16:7 Ĩndĩ rĩu We nĩa’nogetie
Job16:8 Na niĩ nĩ kũngũgũnyaria ũngũgũnyarĩtie
Job16:9 Nĩ kũndambura arandambura nĩ ũrĩa arakarĩte; atuĩkĩte o wa kũ’nyarira; kũhagarania nĩa’hagaranagĩria magego; mũmuku ũcio wakwa nĩ kũngũũrĩra angũũragĩra maitho.
Job16:10 Andũ-rĩ
Job16:11 Mũrungu nĩa’nenganĩrĩte harĩ arĩa ithagathago
Job16:12 Ndaikaire o ’horoheirũo
Job16:13 Mĩguĩ yake ĩkũngora yumĩte mĩena mĩena; nĩanjatũranĩtie o higo gatagatĩ
Job16:14 Andũrangĩte akanjĩkĩra mĩahuha o handũ na handũ; akanguthũkagĩra na nditi ta njamba ya hinya.
Job16:15 Rũũa rũa mwĩrĩ wakwa nĩndumĩrĩire makũnia
Job16:16 Ũthiũ wakwa nĩ gũthũkio ũthũkĩtio nĩ kũrĩra
Job16:17 Na itakĩrĩ na ũndũ wa ũtoi moko makwa mekĩte
Job16:18 Wee thĩ ĩno-rĩ
Job16:19 Atĩrĩ
Job16:20 Arata akwa no kũndenda marandenda
Job16:21 Etĩkĩre gũtiirĩrĩra kĩhooto kĩa mũndũ harĩ Ngai
Job16:22 Amu tũmĩaka tũngĩ tũnini twahinga
Job17:1 Roho wakwa nĩ mũcingĩrĩru
Job17:2 Aya twĩ nao anga to a kĩnyarari? ruurugĩ rũao noruo riitho rĩakwa rĩrona.
Job17:3 Ta ngwatia ithaga rĩa atĩ nĩũgũtuĩka mũndũgamĩrĩri harĩ wee mwene
Job17:4 Nĩ gũkorũo nĩũhithĩte ngoro ciao ũgerereri
Job17:5 Mũndũ wa gũcuka arata ake
Job17:6 Niĩ-rĩ
Job17:7 Maitho makwa makinyĩte kũira nĩ ũrĩa njikaraga o na mwĩthikĩro
Job17:8 Andũ arĩa arũngĩrĩru no kũgegio nĩ ũhoro ũcio
Job17:9 No rĩrĩ
Job17:10 Ta no gĩcokei ho
Job17:11 Matukũ makwa nĩmarĩkĩtie kũhĩtũka
Job17:12 O nĩ kũgarũra mekũngarũrĩra ũtukũ ũtuĩke mũthenya
Job17:13 Ongorũo mũciĩ ũrĩa njĩrĩgĩrĩire ũtuĩke wakwa no kwa-ngoma
Job17:14 Ndagĩkorũo kũu rĩorero-inĩ ndĩkwĩrĩte atĩrĩ
Job17:15 Kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro gĩakwa gĩkĩrĩ ha? kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro gĩakwa kĩngĩkĩonwo nũ?
Job17:16 Nĩ rĩrĩ
Job18:1 HĨNDĨ ĩo Bilidadi ũrĩa Mũshuhi agĩcokia akĩũria atĩrĩ
Job18:2 Inyuĩ-rĩ
Job18:3 Tũtuĩtwo ta nyamũ nĩkĩ
Job18:4 Wee ũrehanyũrũra nĩ ũrĩa ũrakaire-rĩ
Job18:5 Ũndũ kũrĩ: mũndũ mwaganu-rĩ
Job18:6 Ũtheri ũrĩa ũikaraga hema yake ũgatuĩka o nduma
Job18:7 Mũkinyũkĩrie ũcio wake wa hinya nĩ gũtĩmĩra ũgatĩmĩra
Job18:8 Amu magũrũ make mwene no mamũtware wabu-inĩ ndege
Job18:9 Arĩgwatwo nĩ mũtego ndiira ya kũgũrũ
Job18:10 Oimbĩkĩirũo kĩana kĩa rũrigi tĩri-inĩ
Job18:11 Arĩmakagio nĩ matebebia me mbarĩ ciothe
Job18:12 Hinya wake ũrĩikaraga ta ũrĩĩtwo nĩ ng’aragu
Job18:13 Ikonde cia mwĩrĩ wake igathũgũnagwo nĩ mũrimũ
Job18:14 Nĩ gũkonorũo agakonorũo oimio thĩinĩ wa hema yake ĩo ehokete
Job18:15 Nayo hema yake ĩgatũũrũo nĩ arĩa matarĩ ake: gĩtũũro gĩake nĩgĩgaitĩrĩrio ũbiriti.
Job18:16 Mĩri yake nĩ kũũma ĩkomĩra thĩ
Job18:17 Kũririkanwo gwake no kũriganĩre gũthire thĩ
Job18:18 Akarutũrũrũo ũtheri-inĩ athiĩ nduma-inĩ
Job18:19 Ndagakorũo e na mũriũ kana mũcũkũrũwe mũhĩrĩga-inĩ wao
Job18:20 Andũ arĩa magoka thutha makagegagio nĩ mũthenya ũcio wake
Job18:21 Ũguo nĩguo kũhaanaga itũũro-inĩ cia arĩa matarĩ athingu
Job19:1 HĨNDĨ ĩo Ayubu agĩcokia akĩũria atĩrĩ
Job19:2 Nĩ hingo ĩigana atĩa mũgũikara o mũkĩnjĩkagĩra kĩeha ngoro
Job19:3 Mũnjukĩte maita o ta ikũmi
Job19:4 O na ingĩtuĩka atĩ ndirĩ hingo itahĩtĩtie-rĩ
Job19:5 Ongorũo no mũkwĩĩ’neneheria
Job19:6 No kĩmenyei atĩ ũhoro wakwa nĩ Ngai ũũinamanĩtie
Job19:7 Nĩ rĩrĩi
Job19:8 Nĩ kũhinga a’hingĩire njĩra
Job19:9 Riri wakwa nĩ kũnjuma anjumĩte
Job19:10 Nĩ kũ’momora a’momorete mbarĩ ciothe
Job19:11 Anjakanĩirie marakara make ta mwaki
Job19:12 Ita ciake injerekagĩra irehanĩte o hamwe
Job19:13 Andũ aitũ nĩamathengetie haraya na niĩ
Job19:14 Arĩa a gĩthaku giitũ nĩ kũnjeherera manjehereire
Job19:15 Andũ a gwakwa mũciĩ
Job19:16 Ndungata yakwa ngamĩĩta ĩkarega gwĩtĩka
Job19:17 Mĩrukĩ ya kanua gakwa nĩ mĩthũũre nĩ mũtumia wakwa
Job19:18 ’Menetwo nĩ kinya tũhĩĩ tũrĩa tũnini; rĩrĩa ngũũkĩra
Job19:19 Arata arĩa a ngoro yakwa othe nĩma’thũũrĩte
Job19:20 Mahĩndĩ makwa nĩmagwatanĩte na rũũa o na nyama; ’honokete na kĩni kĩa magego o giiki.
Job19:21 Mũtikĩnjiguĩre tha
Job19:22 Mũthingatanĩte na niĩ nĩkĩ ta arĩ inyuĩ Mũrungu
Job19:23 Na arĩ korũo ciugo ciakwa nĩ kwandĩkwo ikĩandĩkĩtwo! korũo nĩ gũtemwo itemetwo thĩinĩ wa ibuku!
Job19:24 Na arĩ korũo icanĩtwo na karamu ga kĩgera na igekĩrũo ngocorai
Job19:25 No ningĩ nĩnjũĩ atĩrĩ
Job19:26 Na ikonde ici ciakwa ciakĩrĩkia kwĩha
Job19:27 Nĩ kwĩonera ngamwĩonera arĩ wa mwena wakwa
Job19:28 Akorũo inyuĩ muugĩte atĩrĩ
Job19:29 Tuĩkai a gwĩtigĩra njomo! amu mĩherithanĩrie ya rũhiũ nĩ ya marũrũ
Job20:1 HĨNDĨ ĩo Zofaru ũrĩa Mũnaamathi agĩcokia akiuga atĩrĩ
Job20:2 Tondũ wa ũhoro ũcio-rĩ
Job20:3 Ndĩ kũigua mũcirĩre wanjonorithia
Job20:4 Githĩ ndũũĩ ũhoro ũyũ
Job20:5 Atĩ kũrũhia kwa andũ arĩa aaganu nĩ kwa hingo nguhĩ
Job20:6 O na mwĩtũũgĩrio wake wakorũo ũhaicĩrĩire o kinya igũrũ
Job20:7 Ndarĩ hingo atarĩtoma nginya tene o ta mai make mwene: arĩa maramuonaga nĩ kũũria makoragia
Job20:8 Kũirĩra arĩirĩra ta kĩroto na ndacoke kuoneka: ĩĩ-ni
Job20:9 Riitho rĩrĩa rĩramuonaga rĩtigacoka kũmuona rĩngĩ
Job20:10 Ciana ciake igatuĩka cia kwĩendereria harĩ andũ arĩa ahũthũ; moko make mwene magacokia indo ciake na kũrĩa aacirutire.
Job20:11 Mahĩndĩ make rĩu nĩmaiyũire hinya wa wĩthĩ wake
Job20:12 O na gwatuĩka atĩ ũũru wĩ mũrĩo wĩ kanua gake
Job20:13 Ningĩ o na gwatuĩka nĩaũiguagĩra tha
Job20:14 Irio icio ciake nĩ kũgarũrũka imũgarũrũkaga ii thĩinĩ wa nda
Job20:15 Kũmeria nĩameretie ũtonga
Job20:16 Nĩ ũrũrũ wa nduĩra ongete
Job20:17 We ndakerorera mĩtaro ĩrĩa
Job20:18 Kĩrĩa arĩmĩte o na thĩna nĩ gũcokia agagĩcokia
Job20:19 Nĩ gũkorũo aanahinyĩrĩria andũ arĩa ahũthũ agacoka akamatiganĩria; gũtunya aanatunyana nyũmba na hinya atarĩ we wamĩakire.
Job20:20 Tondũ nda yake ndĩarĩ hĩndĩ ĩngĩmũhurũkia
Job20:21 Ndarĩ kĩndũ aatigaririe atarĩĩte; tondũ ũcio wega ũcio onaga o naguo ndũgatũũra.
Job20:22 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aiganĩtie indo o kũigania nĩrĩo agatonya hatĩka-inĩ; nĩ gũkinyĩrĩrũo agakinyĩrĩrũo nĩ moko ma arĩa othe a kĩnyamaro.
Job20:23 Nĩguo nda yake ihũne-rĩ
Job20:24 Akorĩra itimũ rĩa kĩgera
Job20:25 Akarika gwĩcomora mũguĩ
Job20:26 Nduma yothe nĩyo aigĩirũo ĩtuĩke mũthithũ wake: mwaki ũtarĩ mũndũ ũhuhĩrĩirie nĩguo ũkamũrambia
Job20:27 Igũrũ matu-inĩ nĩgũkaguũranĩria waganu wake
Job20:28 Wongerereku wa indo cia gwake nĩ kwehuta ũkamwehutĩra
Job20:29 Rũu nĩruo rũatũ rũrĩa mũndũ mwaganu aatũragĩrũo nĩ Ngai
Job21:1 HĨNDĨ ĩo Ayubu agĩcokia akiuga atĩrĩ
Job21:2 Ta thikĩrĩriai ũhoro wakwa mũũrũmbũiye wega; naguo ũtuĩke nĩguo mũthathaĩre wanyu.
Job21:3 Njĩtĩkĩriai
Job21:4 Niĩ-rĩ
Job21:5 Njerekai mũigue
Job21:6 O ndaririkana ũhoro ũcio-rĩ
Job21:7 Nĩ rĩ
Job21:8 Mbeũ yao nĩĩgwataga hinya kũu marĩ
Job21:9 Mĩciĩ yao ĩikaraga ĩhoroheirũo
Job21:10 Njamba ciao cia ndegwa itihĩtagĩra kũgwatia
Job21:11 Twana twao rĩrĩa maatwĩra tuumagare nĩ tũingĩ o ta rũũru
Job21:12 Nao ene kũina nĩmainaga
Job21:13 Makinyagia matukũ mao o monaga maũndũ mega
Job21:14 Na no-o merire Mũrungu atĩrĩ
Job21:15 Mwene-Hinya kaĩ akĩrĩ kĩ
Job21:16 No atĩrĩ
Job21:17 Nĩ kaigana tawa wa andũ arĩa aaganu ũkĩhoragio? nĩ kaigana mũtino ũrĩa ũmerekeire ũmakinyagĩrĩra? nĩ mahinda maigana Ngai aanamagaĩra ruo nĩ ũndũ wa kũmarakarĩra?
Job21:18 Nĩ kaigana matuĩkaga ta rũhuti rũgĩtindĩkwo nĩ rũhuho
Job21:19 Inyuĩ no kuuga atĩrĩ
Job21:20 Reke maitho make meonere kũnyarirũo gwake
Job21:21 Amu-rĩ
Job21:22 Githĩ kwĩ mũndũ ũngiuga arute Mũrungu
Job21:23 Mũndũ ũmwe egũkua arĩ o na hinya wake wothe
Job21:24 Itete ciake ciiyũire iria
Job21:25 Ũngĩ agakua arĩ o na ũcũngũ ngoro
Job21:26 Makomaga thĩ tĩri-inĩ o ũndũ ũmwe
Job21:27 Atĩrĩrĩi
Job21:28 Amu mũroria atĩrĩ
Job21:29 Kaĩ mũtarĩ mworia agendi na njĩra? nĩ kũrũmbũiya mũtarũmbũyagia ũira wao?
Job21:30 Atĩ mũthenya kwĩ mũtino mũndũ mũũru nĩ gũtigio atigagio
Job21:31 Ikĩro ciake-rĩ
Job21:32 O na nĩ gũkuuo agakuuo atwarũo irima
Job21:33 Marũrũa ma gĩtuamba magaikara ta me na mũrĩo harĩ we
Job21:34 Nĩ atĩa mũrakĩ’horeria na ũhoro wa tũhũ
Job22:1 HĨNDĨ ĩo Elifazu ũrĩa Mũtemani agĩcokia
Job22:2 Mũndũ-rĩ
Job22:3 No anga Mwene-Hinya nĩangĩĩkenera nĩ ũndũ waku gũtuĩka mũthingu? arĩ nyongeri angĩgwata nĩ ũndũ waku kwagĩria mĩthiĩre yaku nĩguo ĩtuĩke mĩkinyanĩru?
Job22:4 No anga nĩarakũrũithia nĩ ũndũ atĩ nĩũmwĩtigagĩra? nĩngarĩ arĩ guo gĩtũmi gĩa agũtonyie cira-inĩ?
Job22:5 Ũndũ kũrĩ
Job22:6 Amu wanenyitĩra ngwatio harĩ mũrũ wa thoguo na hatarĩ thirĩ
Job22:7 Ũtũire ũregaga kũhe andũ arĩa anogu maĩ manyue
Job22:8 No rĩrĩ
Job22:9 Ũtũire ũhũndũraga atumia a ndigwa matarĩ na kĩndũ
Job22:10 Nĩkĩo rĩu ũthiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ mĩtego
Job22:11 O na kana ũgatumanĩrũo nĩ nduma
Job22:12 Githĩ Ngai ndarĩ o igũrũ igũrũ? ningĩ ũraihĩrĩru wa njata-rĩ
Job22:13 Nawe ũkuuga atĩrĩ
Job22:14 Athiĩkĩrĩirio nĩ matu mamata
Job22:15 Njĩra ĩo ngũrũ nĩyo ũkũrũmĩrĩra
Job22:16 Nao makĩhurio magĩthengio ihinda rĩao rĩtaanakinya
Job22:17 O arĩa merire Mũrungu
Job22:18 Na nowe waiyũrĩtie nyũmba ciao indo njega. (Ũtaaro wa acio aaganu ũrondaihĩrĩria mũno!)
Job22:19 Arĩa athingu monaga ũguo magakena
Job22:20 Makiugaga atĩrĩ
Job22:21 Ta no kĩĩmenyithanie na Ngai
Job22:22 Ta ĩtĩkĩra kĩrĩra kĩrĩa gĩkuuma kanua gake
Job22:23 Wacokerera Mwene-Hinya-rĩ
Job22:24 Ningĩ mũthithũ waku wa ũtonga ũũrekie thĩ tĩri-inĩ
Job22:25 Nake Mwene-Hinya nĩwe ũgũtuĩka mũthithũ waku
Job22:26 Amu Mwene-Hinya hĩndĩ ĩo nĩ kũmwĩkenera ũrĩmwĩkenagĩra
Job22:27 Kũhoya ũrĩmũhoyaga
Job22:28 Ningĩ watua atĩ kũrĩ ũndũ ũgwĩka
Job22:29 Rĩrĩa ũngĩkorũo ũthikanĩtio ũkagũa
Job22:30 Akahatũra o kinya ũrĩa ũtangĩaga ũcuke: ĩĩ-ni
Job23:1 HĨNDĨ ĩo Ayubu agĩcokia akiuga atĩrĩ
Job23:2 O na ũmũthĩ ningĩ gũteta gwakwa no kũrũrũ: ihũra rĩrĩa ’hũrĩtwo nĩ iritũ gũkĩra mũcaĩre ũyũ ndĩ naguo.
Job23:3 Na arĩ korũo nĩnjũĩ harĩa ingĩmuona
Job23:4 Ndatandaiya cira wakwa mbere yake
Job23:5 Ndenda kũmenya ciugo iria angĩnjokeria
Job23:6 Nĩ kũgariũrana angĩgariũrana na niĩ na ũhoti ũcio wake mũnene? Aca! nĩ kũrũmbũiya angĩrũmbũiya ũhoro wakwa.
Job23:7 Hau-rĩ
Job23:8 Atĩrĩrĩ
Job23:9 Ngarora ningĩ na mwena wa ũmotho harĩa araruta wĩra
Job23:10 No rĩrĩ
Job23:11 Kũgũrũ gwakwa kũrũmagia o mũrato wa makinya make; njĩra yake nĩyo ndũire nũmĩrĩire
Job23:12 Ndirĩ ndahũndũka ngatigana na watho wa mĩromo yake; ciugo cia kanua gake ndĩcituĩte mũthithũ wĩ bata gũkĩra kwĩatha niĩ mwene.
Job23:13 No ĩndĩ we nĩ wa kĩrĩko o kĩmwe
Job23:14 Ũndũ ũrĩa njathĩrĩirĩo nĩguo arahingia; nake nĩ wa maũndũ maingĩ mahaana ũguo.
Job23:15 Tondũ ũcio nĩ gũtebeba ndebebaga ndĩ ũthiũ-inĩ wake; ndecũranĩria ũhoro wake
Job23:16 Nĩ amu Mũrungu nĩaagithĩtie ngoro yakwa hinya
Job23:17 Nĩ gũkorũo ti nduma ĩno ĩtũmĩte ’make
Job24:1 Nĩ kĩ kĩgiragia Mwene-Hinya araaragĩrie mahinda? nĩ kĩ gĩkĩgiragia arĩa mamũũĩ mone mĩthenya ĩo yake?
Job24:2 Kũrĩ andũ makũũraga itĩ cia mũhaka; kũrĩ matunyanaga ndũru cia mbũri makerĩithĩria.
Job24:3 Maingataga ndigiri ya ũrĩa ũtarĩ ithe magathiĩ nayo
Job24:4 Nĩ gũthengia mathengagia andũ arĩa akĩa njĩra
Job24:5 Ta monei
Job24:6 Nĩmetuagĩra ngaragatha mĩgũnda-inĩ
Job24:7 Maraaraga njaga
Job24:8 Maconjoragio nĩ mbura ĩrĩa ya irĩma-inĩ
Job24:9 Kũrĩ andũ mahuragia mwana wa ngoriai o nyondo-inĩ
Job24:10 Nao magagĩthiaga njaga
Job24:11 Nĩo a gũthondekaga maguta kwa andũ acio nja; nĩo makinyaga ihihĩro ciao cia ndibei o makĩrĩagwo nĩ nyota.
Job24:12 Thĩinĩ wa itũũra kũrĩa andũ maingĩhĩire nĩ gũcayũo gũcayagwo
Job24:13 Aya ningĩ nĩ a gĩkundi kĩa arĩa meregithanĩtie na ũtheri; njĩra ciaguo matingĩmenyana nacio
Job24:14 Mũũragani-rĩ
Job24:15 Riitho rĩa gĩtharia narĩo rĩetagĩrĩra kũgĩe mairia
Job24:16 Rĩrĩa kwĩ nduma nĩmenjaga nyũmba; mũthenya magatinda mehingĩire: matingĩmenyana na ũtheri.
Job24:17 Amu harĩ o othe rũcinĩ nĩ ta nduma ya gĩkuũ
Job24:18 Inyuĩ mũkuuga atĩ mũndũ ta ũcio ahutũkaga narua ta arĩ o maĩ igũrũ: rũgai rũao gũkũ thĩ nĩ kũrumwo rũĩ rũrume; ndacokaga gũkerũra na ya mĩgũnda ya mĩthabibu.
Job24:19 Riũa na ũrugarĩ nĩininaga maĩ ma tharunji
Job24:20 Nda ĩrĩa yamũciarire nĩ kũriganĩrũo ĩkariganĩrũo nĩwe; akarĩo nĩ igunyũ ikĩiguaga mũrĩo; ndarĩ hingo agacoka kũririkanwo: wogogani-rĩ
Job24:21 Amu nĩarĩaga indo cia atumia arĩa thata mataciaraga akainina
Job24:22 No rĩrĩ
Job24:23 We nĩetĩkagĩria andũ acio matũũre na mwĩgangaro
Job24:24 Gũtũũgĩra nĩmatũũgĩraga
Job24:25 Na akorũo tiguo gũtariĩ
Job25:1 HĨNDĨ ĩo Bilidadi ũrĩa Mũshuhi agĩcokia akiuga atĩrĩ
Job25:2 Kũrĩ We-rĩ
Job25:3 Ita ciake no anga ingĩtarĩka? naguo ũtheri wake nũ ũtarathagĩrũo nĩguo?
Job25:4 Mũndũ-rĩ
Job25:5 Atĩrĩ
Job25:6 Makĩria anga ti mũndũ
Job26:1 HĨNDĨ ĩo Ayubu agĩcokia akiuga atĩrĩ
Job26:2 Kaĩ ũrĩ gũteithia ũrĩa ũtoima na ũhoti-ĩ! kaĩ ũrĩ kũhonokia guoko kũrĩa gũtoima na hinya-ĩ!
Job26:3 Kaĩ ũrĩ gũtaara wega mũndũ ũtoima na ũũgĩ-ĩ! na woimbũra ũmenyo mũingĩ ũrĩa mũkinyanĩru-ĩ!
Job26:4 Ũhoro ũcio nũ wahee? roho ũcio nĩ wa ũ ũkuumanaga nawe?
Job26:5 Atĩrĩrĩ
Job26:6 Kwa ngoma-rĩ
Job26:7 Mwena wa gathigathini nĩaũtambũrũkĩtie itheri-inĩ rĩtarĩ kĩndũ
Job26:8 Athaĩkanagia maĩ thĩinĩ wa matu make mamata
Job26:9 Nĩ kũhitha ahithĩte gĩthiithi kĩa gĩtĩ gĩake kĩa ũnene
Job26:10 Ũthiũ wa maĩ nĩaũthiũrũrũkĩirie mũhaka
Job26:11 Itugĩ iria itiirĩte igũrũ nĩciinainaga na ikagegeara nĩ mĩkũmĩre yake.
Job26:12 Tondũ wa ũhoti ũcio wake ahotaga kũhoreria iria
Job26:13 Nĩ mĩhũmũ yake ĩthakaragia igũrũ; guoko gwake nĩkuo gũthecaga njoka ĩrĩa hiũ.
Job26:14 Atĩrĩrĩi
Job27:1 NAKE Ayubu agĩcoka agĩtwara thimo ciake na mbere
Job27:2 Na tondũ Mũrungu e muoyo-rĩ
Job27:3 (Amu muoyo wakwa o na rĩu no ũnjiyũire
Job27:4 Nĩ ma
Job27:5 Kũrogira ingĩĩtĩkia atĩ nĩ inyuĩ mwĩ na kĩhooto: nginya ngakua ndigetĩkĩra gũkaana wĩkindĩru wa ngoro yakwa ũ’thengere.
Job27:6 Ũthingu wakwa no ndĩũrũmĩtie
Job27:7 Thũ yakwa ĩroona ta ũrĩa mũndũ mwaganu onaga
Job27:8 Tondũ-rĩ
Job27:9 Mũrungu e hingo angĩkĩigua ikaya rĩake rĩrĩa mĩnyamaro ĩmũkinyĩrĩire?
Job27:10 Nĩngarĩ ũcio arĩ wa gwĩkenagĩra nĩ ũndũ wa Mwene-Hinya
Job27:11 Inyuĩ-rĩ
Job27:12 Inyuĩ inyuothe githĩ mũtimeoneire? nĩ kĩ gĩgĩtũmĩte mũtuĩke andũ a tũhũ o biũ?
Job27:13 Rũrũ-rĩ
Job27:14 Ciana ciake ingĩingĩha
Job27:15 Ndigwa ciake igathikwo na mũthiro
Job27:16 O na angĩonganĩrĩria betha ĩigana ta rũkũngũ
Job27:17 Gũtumithia nĩegũtumithia
Job27:18 Nyũmba ĩo eakĩire no ta ya mbũmbũĩ
Job27:19 Egũkoma e mũtongu
Job27:20 Akinyagĩrĩrũo nĩ matebebia ta arĩ maĩ ma kĩguũ; ahuragio ũtukũ nĩ kĩhuhũkanio agatwarũo.
Job27:21 Rũhuho rũrĩa ruumaga na irathĩro rũmũũmbũraga agathiĩ naruo
Job27:22 Nĩ gũkorũo Ngai arĩmũhũraga na ngurukuhĩ atekũmũiguĩra tha: nĩ kwenda arĩendaga o kũũra ehere guoko-inĩ gwake.
Job27:23 Andũ marĩmũhũragĩra hĩ nĩ kũmũkenerera
Job28:1 MŨTHIMA wa betha nĩkũrĩ
Job28:2 Kĩgera nĩkĩrutagwo mũthanga-inĩ
Job28:3 Andũ nĩmakinyagia nduma o gĩturi-inĩ kĩayo magĩtuĩragia mahiga kinya o mũhaka ũrĩa wa kũrigĩrĩria
Job28:4 Matũrĩkagia irima thĩ makaya gũtigana na kũrĩa andũ matũũraga
Job28:5 Thĩ igũrũ-rĩ
Job28:6 Mahiga-inĩ mayo nĩkuo kwĩ na yakuti iria ihaana bururu
Job28:7 Njĩra ĩo-rĩ
Job28:8 Nyamũ iria ii na ngũrũ gũtirĩ ĩrĩ yamĩkinya
Job28:9 Andũ matambararagia moko makanyita rũaro o rũrĩa rũũmũ mũno; o gwata irĩma nĩ gũturũra maciturũraga o na mĩri.
Job28:10 Matũraga mĩirigo o thĩinĩ wa rũhiga
Job28:11 Mathingaga mĩnyũrũrũ ya maĩ ĩgatiga gũtherera; kĩndũ kĩrĩa gĩtũire gĩĩ kĩhitharu magakiumĩria ũtheri-inĩ.
Job28:12 No ũũgĩ-rĩ
Job28:13 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũũĩ ũrĩa ũngĩgũrũo; kuoneka ndũngĩoneka bũrũri wa arĩa me muoyo.
Job28:14 Kũrĩa kũriku mũno gũkuuga atĩrĩ
Job28:15 Ndũngĩgũrĩka na thahabu
Job28:16 Ndũngĩhota kũringanio na thahabu ya Ofiri
Job28:17 Thahabu kana icicio-rĩ
Job28:18 Maricani kana ngenyekenyi iria cia goro itingĩgwetanio naguo o na hanini: thogora wa ũũgĩ-rĩ
Job28:19 Yakuti ĩhaana ngoikoni
Job28:20 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Job28:21 Amu nĩ kũhithwo ũtũire ũhithĩtwo maitho ma arĩa othe me muoyo
Job28:22 Ininanĩro-inĩ o nakĩo Gĩkuũ
Job28:23 Ngai-rĩ
Job28:24 Amu we nĩaikagia maitho o kinya ituri cia thĩ
Job28:25 Rĩrĩa aathimĩire rũhuho nditi yaruo
Job28:26 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aatuĩrĩire mbura watho wa kũmĩathaga
Job28:27 Nĩrĩo aawonire
Job28:28 Nao andũ akĩmera atĩrĩ
Job29:1 NAKE Ayubu agĩcoka agĩtwara thimo ciake na mbere
Job29:2 Na arĩ korũo ndariĩ ta ũrĩa ndahaanaga mĩeri ĩrĩa ya tene
Job29:3 Rĩrĩa tawa wake wamũrĩkaga igũrũ rĩa mũtwe wakwa
Job29:4 Korũo ndariĩ ta ũrĩa ndahaanaga rĩrĩa matukũ makwa maarĩ makũgũku
Job29:5 Mwene-Hinya ataanatiga gũikarania na niĩ
Job29:6 O rĩo rĩrĩa makinya makwa maathiaga magĩthambagio nĩ iria imata
Job29:7 Hĩndĩ ĩo ndoima na gwakwa ngathiĩ kĩhingo-inĩ gĩa itũũra
Job29:8 Aanake makanyona
Job29:9 Athamaki nĩmaatigaga kwaria
Job29:10 Mĩgambo ya atongoria ĩgakira
Job29:11 Nĩ amu gũtũ rĩrĩa kwaigua ũhoro wakwa no kũndathima kwandathimaga
Job29:12 Nĩ ũndũ mũndũ mũthĩni aakaya nĩndamũhatũraga
Job29:13 Ndagũagĩrũo nĩ kĩrathimo kĩa ũrĩa wakiriĩ gũthira
Job29:14 Nĩ ũthingu ndeguĩkĩte
Job29:15 Nĩ niĩ ndarĩ maitho ma ũrĩa mũtumumu
Job29:16 Ũrĩa mũkĩaru-rĩ
Job29:17 Mũndũ ũrĩa muogogani
Job29:18 Hingo ĩo ndeĩraga atĩrĩ
Job29:19 Mũri wakwa ũtambĩte ũgakinya o maĩ-inĩ
Job29:20 Riri wakwa ũtũũraga ũrĩ o mwanakahu
Job29:21 Niĩ-rĩ
Job29:22 Ndanina ũhoro wakwa
Job29:23 Magakĩnjeterera o ta ũrĩa gũtanyagwo mbura
Job29:24 Rĩrĩa maakorũo morĩtwo nĩ mwĩhinyo
Job29:25 Nĩ niĩ ndamathuragĩra njĩra
Job30:1 Ĩndĩ
Job30:2 Hinya wa moko mao-rĩ
Job30:3 Wagi na ng’aragu nĩitũmĩte mamoce; matũire macukumaga thĩ nyũmũ o maikaire mamithimithi-inĩ kũu kwĩ rũng’ũrĩ na gũgakira ihooru.
Job30:4 Matuaga mũyuyu ihinga-inĩ; irio ciao nĩ mĩri ya mahĩnga.
Job30:5 Nĩ kũingatwo maingatagwo mũingi-inĩ; makayagĩririo ta ũrĩa gũkayagĩrĩrio mũici.
Job30:6 No mũhaka matũũre mĩkuru-inĩ ĩĩ cianda-inĩ
Job30:7 Kũu ihinga-inĩ nĩkuo maikaraga o makĩraramaga; kũu mahuti-inĩ-rĩ
Job30:8 O nĩ ciana cia arĩa matarĩ mbuguĩro
Job30:9 Na rĩu acio nĩ gũtuĩka nduĩkĩte rũĩmbo rũao
Job30:10 Nĩ gũ’thũũra ma’thũũrĩte
Job30:11 Nĩ gũkorũo We nĩ gũtungũra atungũrĩte rũga rũakwa
Job30:12 Mwena wakwa wa ũrĩo gwĩ kĩbeũ kĩũru gĩũkĩrĩte; nĩ gũikia maikagia magũrũ makwa njehere
Job30:13 Njĩra yakwa nĩ kũmĩhianyũra mamĩhianyũrĩte
Job30:14 Mangorete ta matonyete na mwahuha mwariĩ
Job30:15 No matebebia njerekeirio: gĩtĩo gĩakwa kĩũmbũrĩtwo ta kĩgũrũkĩtio nĩ rũhuho
Job30:16 Na rĩu ngoro yakwa nĩ gũtwekũka ĩtwekũkĩte thĩinĩ wakwa; nĩ matukũ ma mĩtandiũko meĩngwatĩrĩire.
Job30:17 Ũtukũ mahĩndĩ ma mwĩrĩ wakwa maraaraga magĩthecangwo
Job30:18 Tondũ wa ũrĩa mũrimũ wĩ na hinya
Job30:19 Ngai nĩ kũndekania andekanĩtie ndaka-inĩ
Job30:20 Wee-rĩ
Job30:21 Nĩ kũngarũrũka ũngarũrũkĩte ũkanyũmĩra ĩhu; nĩ gũ’thũkĩra ũ’thũkĩire na ũhoti wa guoko gwaku.
Job30:22 Ũnjoete na igũrũ rũhuho-inĩ
Job30:23 Amu nĩnjũĩ ũrĩnginyia o gĩkuũ-inĩ
Job30:24 No rĩrĩ
Job30:25 Niĩ githĩ ndiarĩragio nĩ ũhoro wa mũndũ ũkinyĩrĩirũo nĩ mũthenya mũũru? ngoro yakwa anga ndĩaiguagĩra arĩa aagi kĩeha?
Job30:26 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa niĩ ndatanyaga ũhoro mwega
Job30:27 Njikaraga o ngĩgariũkagwo nĩ mara
Job30:28 ’Thiaga ndĩ mũthitu nĩ kĩeha
Job30:29 Nduĩkĩte wa nyina na ngũcũ
Job30:30 Rũũa rũa mwĩrĩ wakwa nĩ kũhunyũka rũhunyũkĩte
Job30:31 Tondũ ũcio kĩnanda gĩakwa rĩu gĩtuĩkĩte o mũgirĩko
Job31:1 Niĩ nĩtwarĩkanĩire na maitho makwa: ingĩkĩhota atĩa gũcoka kwĩrorera mũirĩtu?
Job31:2 Amu-rĩ
Job31:3 Githĩ arĩa matarĩ athingu ti mũtino matũmagĩrũo
Job31:4 Githĩ we ndonaga ikĩro ciakwa
Job31:5 Korũo ndanacangania na ũndũ ũrĩa ũtarĩ wa ma

Job31:8 Hĩndĩ ĩo-rĩ

Job31:11 Tondũ ũcio watuĩka ũmaramari ũrĩa mũnene; ĩĩ-ni
Job31:12 Amu ũcio nĩ mwaki ũrambanagia o kinya Ininanĩro-inĩ
Job31:13 Korũo kwĩ hingo ndarurũkire cira wa ndungata yakwa
Job31:14 Ingĩgĩĩka atĩa Mũrungu aarahũka? ingĩkĩmũcokeria ũhoro ũrĩkũ aandokera?
Job31:15 Ũrĩa niĩ wanyũmbire ihu-inĩ towe wombire ũcio ũngĩ o nake? to ũmwe wagĩtũthondekire twĩ nda?
Job31:16 Korũo ndanagiria arĩa ahũthũ magĩe na kĩrĩa mendaga
Job31:17 Na korũo ndanerĩĩra tũirio twakwa ndĩ nyiki
Job31:18 (Na tiguo; amu kuuma ũnyinyi wakwa mwana ta ũcio akũrĩire harĩ niĩ ta arĩ niĩ ithe
Job31:19 Korũo ndanakĩona mũndũ agĩkua nĩ ũndũ wa kwaga nguo
Job31:20 Korũo thũnũ ciake itianandathima
Job31:21 Korũo ndanakĩoera arĩa matarĩ maithe guoko ndĩmahũre
Job31:22 Hĩndĩ ĩo kĩande gĩakwa kĩroteithũkana na mũrĩnga
Job31:23 Amu nĩndetigagĩra mũno mũtino ũrĩa ũngiuma kwĩ Mũrungu
Job31:24 Ingĩkorũo kwĩ hĩndĩ ndanatua atĩ thahabu nĩyo kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro gĩakwa
Job31:25 Korũo nĩndakenaga nĩ ũndũ ũtonga wakwa warĩ mũnene
Job31:26 Korũo ndĩ hĩndĩ ndakĩonire riũa rĩkĩara kana ngĩona mweri ũgĩceera na ũcangararu waguo
Job31:27 Na ngoro yakwa ĩkĩhenererio na hitho
Job31:28 Ũguo naguo watuĩka waganu ũrĩa ũngĩherithanĩrio nĩ kĩama
Job31:29 Korũo ndĩ hĩndĩ ndakenire nĩ ũndũ wa iharagana rĩa ũrĩa ũ’thũire
Job31:30 (Niĩ-rĩ

Job31:33 Niĩ

Job31:35 Ĩ na arĩ korũo ndĩ na wa kũnjigua! (Onei
Job31:36 Ndirĩ hĩndĩ itangĩmakuua ndĩmaigĩrĩire o kĩande; nĩ kwĩoha ingĩmeoha ta kĩremba.
Job31:37 Makinya makwa mothe ndamwĩra mũigana wamo; nĩ gũthengerera ingĩmũthengerera ta ndĩ mũnene.

Job31:40 Hĩndĩ ĩo

Job38:1 HĨNDĨ ĩo Jehova agĩcokeria Ayubu ũhoro e kĩhuhũkanio-inĩ
Job38:2 Nũ ũyũ ũrekĩra kĩrĩra nduma na ndeto itarĩ cia ũmenyo?
Job38:3 Ta ĩhotore rĩu ta mũndũ mũrũme! amu nĩngũkũũria
Job38:4 Atĩrĩ
Job38:5 Nũ wathimire kũrĩa ĩgũkinya? amu wee nĩũkĩũĩ; kana nũ wamĩtambũrũkĩirie rũrigi rũa kũgera?
Job38:6 Makinya ma itugĩ ciayo-rĩ
Job38:7 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa njata cia rũcinĩ ciainire o hamwe
Job38:8 Kana nũ wahingĩire iria rĩrĩa inene na mĩrango rĩrĩa rĩatothokire rĩkiuma ĩhu-inĩ

Job38:11 Ngiuga
Job38:12 Gwata kĩambĩrĩria kĩa matukũ maku ũrĩ weathĩra atĩ gũkĩe
Job38:13 Nĩguo ũkĩnyite thĩ icũrĩ ciayo
Job38:14 Hĩndĩ ĩo thĩ nĩĩgarũrũkaga ũrĩa ĩkũhaanaga
Job38:15 Nao acio aaganu magagĩtunyũo ũtheri ũrĩa wao
Job38:16 Iria rĩrĩa inene-rĩ
Job38:17 Ũrĩ hingo wanaguũrĩrio ihingo cia gĩkuũ? igukumo icio cia nduma ya gĩkuũ-rĩ
Job38:18 Ĩ wariĩ wa thĩ
Job38:19 Ũtheri-rĩ
Job38:20 Nĩguo ũmĩtware ũmĩcokie mũhaka wayo
Job38:21 Wee no ũkĩũĩ
Job38:22 Tharunji-rĩ
Job38:23 Ĩrĩa njigĩire hingo ya gũtũma mĩnyamaro
Job38:24 Nĩ njĩra ĩrĩkũ ũtheri ũgayanganagĩrio nayo? kana ĩrĩa rũhuho rũa irathĩro rũhunjagio nayo gũkũ thĩ?
Job38:25 Kĩboboto kĩa mbura-rĩ
Job38:26 Nĩguo atũme mbura yurage bũrũri ũtarĩ andũ
Job38:27 Nĩ getha ĩhũnagie rũng’ũrĩ
Job38:28 Mbura-rĩ
Job38:29 Mbarabu-rĩ
Job38:30 Nĩrĩo maĩ mehithaga ta mekunĩkĩirie na ihiga
Job38:31 Wee-rĩ
Job38:32 Njata iria ciĩtagwo Mazarothu
Job38:33 Mĩathĩre ya kũrĩa igũrũ
Job38:34 Wee nĩũĩyũkagĩrĩria mũgambo waku ũkaarĩria matu
Job38:35 Wee nĩwe ũtũmaga heni
Job38:36 Matu na mũthimbĩre wamo-rĩ
Job38:37 Matu-rĩ
Job38:38 Rĩrĩa rũkũngũ rũtondorokaga
Job38:39 Mũrũthi wa mũgoma-rĩ
Job38:40 Rĩrĩa ciĩkonotete ciemo-inĩ ciacio
Job38:41 Ĩ ihuru-rĩ
Job39:1 Wee-rĩ
Job39:2 Wee nĩwe ũtuaga mĩeri ĩrĩa irĩhingagia
Job39:3 Ciĩthunanagĩra
Job39:4 Ciũri icio ciacio nĩigarĩĩraga; ciĩreraga o kũu rũriĩ gũtheri
Job39:5 Njagĩ-rĩ
Job39:6 To niĩ ndamĩheire werũ ũtuĩke mũciĩ wayo
Job39:7 Yo nĩ kũnyarara ĩnyaraire ironja rĩa itũũra
Job39:8 Mũtambũko-inĩ wa irĩma nĩkuo ũrimũtho wayo
Job39:9 Mbogo-rĩ
Job39:10 Wakĩhota kuoha mbogo na mũkwa ĩgucagie mũraũ? yagĩĩtĩkĩra kũrĩma ituamba na ngari ĩkuumĩte o thutha?
Job39:11 Wamĩĩhoka
Job39:12 Wakĩmĩĩtĩkia atĩ nĩĩrĩkũinũkagĩria kĩmera gĩaku
Job39:13 Ithagu rĩa nyaga-rĩ
Job39:14 Tondũ-rĩ
Job39:15 Ĩgakĩriganĩrũo nĩ atĩ maahota kũũragwo nĩ kũgũrũ kwene
Job39:16 Ĩthũkĩire ciana ciayo o ta itarĩ ciayo; ndĩnehaga
Job39:17 Nĩ gũkorũo Ngai nĩamĩagithĩtie ũũgĩ
Job39:18 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ningĩ yatua kwĩarahũra yũre-rĩ
Job39:19 Ĩ mbarathi-rĩ
Job39:20 Wee nĩwe ũtũmaga ĩrũũge ta ngigĩ? riri wa mũtiihĩre wayo-rĩ
Job39:21 Nĩ gũtutia ĩtutagia kũu gĩtuamba-inĩ ĩgĩĩkenagĩra nĩ ũhoti ũrĩa ĩĩ naguo
Job39:22 Guoya nĩ gũtheka ĩũthekagĩrĩra
Job39:23 Ĩthiaga ĩgĩkorakoragĩrũo nĩ thiaka wa mũmĩhaici
Job39:24 Ĩgakĩhũmbũra thĩ nĩ ũrĩa ĩĩ na ũrũme na ĩkeha; karumbeta karĩ kũgamba ndĩngĩrũgama.
Job39:25 O karumbeta kaagamba ĩkoiga
Job39:26 Ũũgĩ waku-rĩ
Job39:27 Ĩ nderi-rĩ
Job39:28 Yo ĩtũũraga ihiga-inĩ o igũrũ; nĩho gĩikaro kĩayo
Job39:29 Kũu nĩkuo ĩcũagĩra ĩyonere ndĩa; maitho mayo makamĩonera kũraya mũno.
Job39:30 Njui ciayo ikundaga o thakame
Job40:1 NINGĨ Jehova agĩcokeria Ayubu atĩrĩ
Job40:2 Ũrĩa ũkwenda kũng’otha-rĩ
Job40:3 Hĩndĩ ĩo Ayubu agĩcokeria Jehova
Job40:4 Niĩ-rĩ
Job40:5 Kwaria nĩnjarĩtie rĩmwe
Job40:6 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jehova agĩcokeria Ayubu ũhoro e kĩhuhũkanio-inĩ
Job40:7 Rĩu ta ĩhotore ta mũndũ mũrũme: nĩngũkũũria
Job40:8 Kĩhooto kĩrĩa nduaga maũndũ nakĩo
Job40:9 Anga wee ũkĩrĩ na guoko ta kwa Mũrungu? nawe-rĩ
Job40:10 Ta kĩĩguĩke rĩu ũnene o na ũtũũgĩru; ĩhumbe ũtĩĩku o na ũkaru!
Job40:11 Itũrũra mĩiyũro ya marakara maku
Job40:12 Kĩbare acio egereri
Job40:13 Moimbĩkanie tĩri-inĩ o hamwe; kĩmathae mothiũ na nduma kũu hitho-inĩ.
Job40:14 Hĩndĩ ĩo niĩ na niĩ nĩngũgwĩtĩkĩrĩria atĩ guoko kwa ũrĩo gwaku mwene kwahota gũkũhonokia.
Job40:15 Rĩu-rĩ
Job40:16 Rora ũkandĩru ũrĩa ĩĩ naguo njohero
Job40:17 Gĩthita kĩayo ĩgĩkĩhang’ia
Job40:18 Mahĩndĩ mayo mahaana ta mĩberethi ya rũthuku; mbaru no ta irung’o cia igera.
Job40:19 Nyamũ ĩo nĩyo kĩndũ kĩa mbere cĩũmbe-inĩ cia Mũrungu: rũhiũ rũu rũayo nĩ mũmĩũmbi wamĩheire.
Job40:20 Irio ciayo nĩ irĩma imĩciaragĩra
Job40:21 Ĩmamaga mĩtĩ-inĩ ĩrĩa ĩrĩ mwĩgunyĩ
Job40:22 Mĩtĩ ĩo ĩrĩ mwĩgunyĩ ĩmĩgitagĩra na kĩĩgunyĩ kĩayo
Job40:23 O na rũũĩ rũaiyũra mũno
Job40:24 Gũkĩrĩ mũndũ ũngĩmĩnyita rĩrĩa ĩĩhũgĩte
Job41:1 Nyamũ ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo kĩng’ang’i-rĩ
Job41:2 Wahota kũmĩĩkĩra mũhĩndo mũniũrũ? kana ũtũrĩkanie rũthĩa rũayo na mbogoro?
Job41:3 Nĩngarĩ ĩngĩtindĩrĩra ĩgĩgũthaitha
Job41:4 Ĩĩ hingo ĩngĩĩtĩkĩra gwĩkĩra kĩrĩko nawe
Job41:5 Wathaka nayo ta ũrĩa nyoni ĩthakagio
Job41:6 Gĩtaatĩ gĩa ategi-a-ciũngũyũ-rĩ
Job41:7 Nĩũngĩhota kũmĩiyũria rũũa rũayo mĩrarangai
Job41:8 Ta kĩmĩigĩrĩre guoko! ririkana mbaara ĩo
Job41:9 Atĩrĩ! kũmĩĩrĩgĩrĩra nĩ wĩra wa tũhũ: anga mũndũ to kũmaka aamĩona?
Job41:10 Gũtirĩ o na ũrĩ ũrũme ũngĩeta kũmĩarahũra: nake akĩrĩ ũ
Job41:11 Niĩ-rĩ
Job41:12 Ũhoro wa miutha yayo-rĩ
Job41:13 Nguo ĩo ĩĩ nayo mwĩrĩ
Job41:14 Nũ ũngĩhota kũmĩemũria mĩrango ya ũthiũ wayo? magego mayo
Job41:15 Mĩtaratara ya makaracũ mayo nĩyo mwĩraho wayo
Job41:16 Tondũ wa ũrĩa matumaine mũno
Job41:17 Nĩ kũgwatana magwataine
Job41:18 Mĩathimũro yayo nĩ kũmenũria ĩmenũragia ũtheri
Job41:19 Kanua kayo koimaga icinga njakanu
Job41:20 Marima-inĩ ma iniũrũ rĩayo nĩhoimaga ndogo
Job41:21 Mĩhũmũ yayo no kũgwatia makara mwaki
Job41:22 Ngingo yayo nĩho hinya ũtũũraga
Job41:23 Mĩnono ya nyama ciayo ĩnyitaine o kũnyitana: nĩ kũrũma ĩmĩĩrũmĩrĩirie; ndĩngĩenyenyeka.
Job41:24 Ngoro yayo ĩrũmĩte ta ihiga; ĩĩ-ni
Job41:25 Yeambararia-rĩ
Job41:26 Mũndũ aamĩikia rũhiũ
Job41:27 Kĩgera yonaga ta arĩ o mũnyeki mũũmũ
Job41:28 Mũguĩ ndũngĩtũma ĩhahũke; mahiga ma kĩgũtha harĩ yo magarũrũkaga magatuĩka maragara.
Job41:29 Njũgũma cionagwo nĩyo ta arĩ o rũhuti; mũhiũko wa gatimũ karĩa gaikĩtio thũgo no gũtheka ĩũthekagĩrĩra.
Job41:30 Mwara-nda wayo nĩ ta warĩtwo ngĩo njũgĩ: ĩiyũragia ndaka-inĩ ngururo ta cia ngari ĩrĩa ĩrigithaga ngano.
Job41:31 Ĩtũmaga ndia ĩtherũke ta nyũngũ; maĩ ma iria ĩgakĩhũra makahaana ta maguta makĩringio
Job41:32 Thutha wayo ĩtigaga yekĩra mũkirito ũgũkenga; mũndũ no kuuga ndia ĩrĩ na mbuĩ.
Job41:33 Gũkũ thĩ gũtirĩ nyamũ ĩngĩ ĩhaana tayo
Job41:34 Indo iria ndũũgĩru ciothe no kũrora ĩciroraga manyiira; nĩyo mũthamaki wa rũciaro ruothe rũrĩa rũĩ ngũrũ.
Job42:1 HĨNDĨ ĩo Ayubu agĩcokeria Jehova
Job42:2 Nĩndamenya atĩ wee ndũrĩ ũndũ o wothe ũtangĩhota; ndũngĩgirĩka ũndũ waku o na ũrĩkũ ũrĩa wĩthugundĩire.
Job42:3 Ũyũ
Job42:4 Wee
Job42:5 Nĩ atĩrĩrĩ
Job42:6 Na tondũ ũcio nĩndethũũra
Job42:7 NA gũgĩtuĩka atĩrĩ
Job42:8 Tondũ ũcio rĩu no kĩoei ndegwa mũgwanja na ndũrũme mũgwanja
Job42:9 Tondũ ũcio Elifazu ũrĩa Mũtemani
Job42:10 Na hĩndĩ ĩo aahoeire arata ake
Job42:11 Hĩndĩ ĩo ariũ a nyina othe
Job42:12 Jehova agĩkĩrathimĩra Ayubu ihinda rĩake rĩa mũrigĩrĩrio gũkĩra rĩa kĩambĩrĩria: akĩgĩa na ng’ondu ngiri ikũmi na inya
Job42:13 Ningĩ akĩgĩa na ariũ mũgwanja na airĩtu atatũ.
Job42:14 Ũrĩa mũkũrũ akĩmũtua Jemima
Job42:15 Na bũrũri wothe gũtingĩonekire andũ-a-nja athaka ta airĩtu acio a Ayubu: nake ithe wao akĩmatua amũgai o hamwe na ariũ a nyina wao.
Job42:16 Na thutha wa maũndũ macio Ayubu agĩikara mĩaka igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩna
Job42:17 Nake Ayubu agĩgĩkua
Psalms1:1 GŨKENA-RĨ
Psalms1:2 No rĩ’
Psalms1:3 Agakĩhaanaga ta mũtĩ wahandirũo mĩtaro-inĩ ya maĩ
Psalms1:4 Arĩa aaganu matihaana ũguo; o matariĩ ta mũũngũ ũrĩa ũũmbũragwo nĩ rũhuho.
Psalms1:5 Tondũ ũcio
Psalms1:6 Amu Jehova
Psalms2:1 NDŨRĨRĨ nĩ kĩ gĩtũmĩte ithogonjeke? nĩ ũndũ kĩ irĩndĩ iranogona na ũhoro wa tũhũ?
Psalms2:2 Athamaki a thĩ megwĩkinyĩra
Psalms2:3 Makoiga
Psalms2:4 Ũrĩa ũikarĩire gĩtĩ matu-inĩ no gũtheka aratheka
Psalms2:5 Rĩrĩ rĩngĩ no amaarĩrie na marakara make
Psalms2:6 Niĩ nĩ niĩ ngĩigĩte mũthamaki wakwa kĩrĩma gĩa Zayuni igũrũ
Psalms2:7 Nĩngũkiumbũra itua ũrĩa rĩatuirũo: Jehova aanjĩrire atĩrĩ
Psalms2:8 ’Hoya
Psalms2:9 Wee no ũciunange na njũgũma ya kĩgera; kũmemenda ũcimemende ta nyũngũ ya mũmĩũmbi.
Psalms2:10 Tondũ ũcio
Psalms2:11 Tungatĩrai Jehova mũkĩmwĩtigagĩra
Psalms2:12 Mumunyani mũriũ
Psalms3:1 Ĩ JEHOVA
Psalms3:2 Kũingĩha nĩ arĩa mekuuga ũhoro wa ngoro yakwa atĩrĩ

Psalms3:4 Ngayagĩra Jehova na mũgambo
Psalms3:5 Niĩ-rĩ
Psalms3:6 Andũ
Psalms3:7 Arahũka
Psalms3:8 Ũhonokio no wa Jehova: kĩrathimo gĩaku kĩrotũũra na kĩrĩndĩ gĩaku.
Psalms4:1 NYAMŨKĨRIA ndakaya
Psalms4:2 Inyuĩ ariũ a andũ-rĩ
Psalms4:3 No rĩ’
Psalms4:4 Gĩani na guoya
Psalms4:5 Rutai magongona mũrutĩre o ũrĩa wa ũthingu
Psalms4:6 Nĩ aingĩ maroria atĩrĩ
Psalms4:7 Wee nĩũnjĩkĩrĩte gĩkeno ngoro-inĩ yakwa gĩkĩrĩte kĩao rĩrĩa ngano yao na ndibei ciamaingĩhĩra.
Psalms4:8 Ngũgĩĩkomera ndĩ na thayũ
Psalms5:1 JEHOVA
Psalms5:2 Thikĩrĩria mũgambo wakwa ngĩkũrĩrĩra
Psalms5:3 Ĩ Jehova
Psalms5:4 Amu wee ndũrĩ Mũrungu wa gũkenera ũmaramari; mũndũ mũũru-rĩ
Psalms5:5 Arĩa erahi matingĩĩkinyĩra maitho-inĩ maku; andũ othe arĩa eki maũndũ maaganu
Psalms5:6 Arĩa maaragia mathara
Psalms5:7 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms5:8 Ndongoria
Psalms5:9 Amu tũnua twao tũtirĩ na ũhoro ũngĩĩhokeka; ngoro ciao thĩinĩ no maũndũ ma ũthũkia kũrĩ; mĩmero yao nĩ ta marima iceng’ũ ma gũthikanwo; nĩmĩ ciao nĩ kũgathima macigathimaga.
Psalms5:10 Ngai
Psalms5:11 Nao andũ othe arĩa megiritagia harĩ we
Psalms5:12 Amu mũndũ mũthingu-rĩ
Psalms6:1 Ĩ JEHOVA
Psalms6:2 Nginyĩria wega waku
Psalms6:3 O nayo ngoro yakwa nĩĩcanjamĩte mũno: ĩ nawe
Psalms6:4 Jehova
Psalms6:5 Thima-rĩ
Psalms6:6 Ndĩ mũnogu mũno nĩ ũndũ wa gũcaya; ũtukũ o ũtukũ nĩ gũconjoria njonjoragia ũrĩrĩ wakwa
Psalms6:7 Riitho rĩakwa nĩ ithirĩrĩkĩru nĩ ũndũ wa kũigua ũũru
Psalms6:8 Njehererai
Psalms6:9 Jehova nĩaaigua ngĩmũthaitha; ihoya rĩakwa
Psalms6:10 Thũ ciakwa ciothe gũconoka no iconoke
Psalms7:1 Ĩ JEHOVA
Psalms7:2 Ũrĩa we ndakae gũtamburura muoyo wakwa ta ngatia
Psalms7:3 Jehova
Psalms7:4 Korũo nĩ’thukĩire mũndũ ũũru
Psalms7:5 Korũo nĩguo-rĩ
Psalms7:6 Arahũka
Psalms7:7 Kĩũngano kĩa ndũrĩrĩ nĩgĩgũthiũrũrũkĩrie
Psalms7:8 Nĩ Jehova ũciragĩra irĩndĩ agaituĩra: tua ũhoro wakwa
Psalms7:9 Ũũru wa arĩa aaganu ta nĩũkinye gĩturi
Psalms7:10 Harĩ Ngai noho ngo yakwa ĩrĩ
Psalms7:11 Ngai-rĩ
Psalms7:12 Mũndũ aaga kũgarũrũka
Psalms7:13 Indo cia kũmũũraga
Psalms7:14 Mũndũ nĩ ũcio! kũrũmwo nĩararũmwo nĩguo aciare waganu; nda ĩrĩa agĩĩte nayo nĩ ya kĩũnũhu
Psalms7:15 Enjete irima
Psalms7:16 Ũũnũhu wake nĩũkamũcokerera o kĩongo-inĩ gĩake
Psalms7:17 Nĩngũcokeria Jehova ngatho ta ũrĩa ũthingu wake wagĩrĩirũo
Psalms8:1 Ĩ JEHOVA
Psalms8:2 Tũnua-inĩ o twa twana na twa ngenge nĩũtũmĩte hoime hinya na ũkaũrũmia
Psalms8:3 Rĩrĩa ngũrora igũrũ rĩu rĩaku
Psalms8:4 Ngoria atĩrĩ
Psalms8:5 Nĩ amu-rĩ
Psalms8:6 Wamũtuire wa gwathaga mawĩra marĩa marute nĩ moko maku; indo ciothe ũgakĩiga thĩ ya makinya make:
Psalms8:7 Mbũri ciothe
Psalms8:8 Nyoni cia rĩera-inĩ
Psalms8:9 Ĩ Jehova
Psalms9:1 NĨ NGATHO ngũcokeria Jehova na ngoro yakwa yothe; ngũgana maũndũ mothe ma magegania marĩa wĩkĩte.
Psalms9:2 Nĩ gũkena ngũkena nĩ ũndũ waku
Psalms9:3 Nĩ amu thũ ciakwa nĩ njoku na thutha
Psalms9:4 Nĩ gũkorũo nĩũtiirĩrĩire kĩhooto gĩakwa
Psalms9:5 Ndũrĩrĩ nĩũcirũithĩtie
Psalms9:6 Thũ-rĩ
Psalms9:7 No rĩ’
Psalms9:8 Nake arĩciragĩra mabũrũri na ũthingu
Psalms9:9 Jehova-rĩ
Psalms9:10 Nao arĩa moĩ rĩĩtwa rĩaku nĩwe marĩĩhokaga
Psalms9:11 Inĩrai Jehova mũmũkumie
Psalms9:12 Amu acio
Psalms9:13 Nginyĩria wega waku
Psalms9:14 Nĩ getha ngĩmemerekie ũkumio waku wothe: ihingo-inĩ cia mwarĩ wa Zayuni-rĩ
Psalms9:15 Ndũrĩrĩ-rĩ
Psalms9:16 Jehova nĩakĩĩmenyithanĩtie
Psalms9:17 Andũ arĩa aaganu-rĩ
Psalms9:18 Amu mũndũ ũrĩa mwagi ndangĩtũũra o ariganĩire hingo ciothe; gĩeterero kĩa arĩa athĩnĩki gĩtigatũũra o kĩhukĩte nginya tene.
Psalms9:19 Arahũka
Psalms9:20 Ciguoithie
Psalms10:1 JEHOVA
Psalms10:2 Tondũ wa mwĩono wa andũ arĩa aaganu
Psalms10:3 Amu-rĩ
Psalms10:4 Ũcio mwaganu-rĩ
Psalms10:5 Maũndũ make maikaraga marĩ o manyitu hingo ciothe: matuĩro maku-rĩ
Psalms10:6 Ũrĩa eĩraga na ngoro nĩ atĩrĩ
Psalms10:7 Kanua gake kaiyũraga irumi
Psalms10:8 Aikaraga ehetereirie tũheta-inĩ tũrĩa twĩ mĩciĩ-inĩ; kũrĩa kũgitaru nĩkuo oragagĩra ũrĩa ũtarĩ na ũũru; maitho make maikaraga macũthĩrĩirie na hitho mũndũ ũrĩa ũtarĩ na mũmũteithia.
Psalms10:9 Kũu kũgitaru aikaraga ohanĩirie ta mũrũthi wĩ kĩmamo-inĩ kĩaguo
Psalms10:10 Nĩ gũkunga akungaga
Psalms10:11 Akeĩra na ngoro atĩrĩ
Psalms10:12 Kĩarahũke
Psalms10:13 Nĩ ũndũ kĩ mũndũ mwaganu aagĩtũũra arurũkaga Ngai
Psalms10:14 Kuona-rĩ
Psalms10:15 Kiune ũrĩa mwaganu guoko; mũndũ ũrĩa mũũru-rĩ
Psalms10:16 Jehova nĩwe Mũthamaki kinya tene o na tene: ndũrĩrĩ nĩ gũtoma itomete igathira bũrũri wake.
Psalms10:17 Wee
Psalms10:18 Ũgagĩtua cira wa mwana wa ngoriai
Psalms11:1 NĨ JEHOVA ndĩĩgiritĩtie harĩ we: nĩ atĩa ũguo mũrera roho wakwa
Psalms11:2 Nĩ ũndũ andũ arĩa aaganu nĩmagetete mota mao
Psalms11:3 Gĩtina kĩa nyũmba gĩgĩtharagio-rĩ
Psalms11:4 Jehova arĩ o kuo thĩinĩ wa hekarũ yake theru
Psalms11:5 Jehova nĩatigaga aaroria ũrĩa mũthingu
Psalms11:6 Acio aaganu-rĩ
Psalms11:7 Nĩ gũkorũo Jehova nĩ mũthingu; maũndũ ma ũthingu nomo endete: andũ arĩa arũngĩrĩru nĩo marĩonaga ũthiũ wake.
Psalms12:1 TŨHONOKIE
Psalms12:2 Kwaragio o ũhoro ũrĩa ũtarĩ guo nĩ mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ; gũkaario gũkĩanjanjanagwo na mĩromo
Psalms12:3 Mĩromo ĩo yothe yanjanjanaga
Psalms12:4 Nĩ ũrĩa moigĩte atĩrĩ
Psalms12:5 Tondũ wa ũrĩa athĩni magũmagio
Psalms12:6 Ciugo cia Jehova nĩ ciugo thuranĩre; itherete ta betha ĩrĩa ĩthereirio kĩrugutĩro-inĩ ĩkanyũrũrũka thĩ
Psalms12:7 Wee
Psalms12:8 Mbarĩ ciothe gũcangacangagwo nĩ arĩa aaganu rĩrĩa gũtũũgĩrĩtio waganu gwa ciana cia kĩrĩndĩ.
Psalms13:1 Ĩ JEHOVA
Psalms13:2 Nĩ ihinda rĩigana atĩa ngũtũũra ndĩĩgiyaga thĩinĩ wa roho wakwa

Psalms13:4 Thũ yakwa ndĩgakiuge atĩrĩ
Psalms13:5 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms13:6 Nĩ kũina ngũinĩra Jehova
Psalms14:1 MŨNDŨ ũrĩa ũtarĩ mbuguĩro etuĩrĩire atĩrĩ
Psalms14:2 Jehova nĩaacũthĩrĩirie ciana cia kĩrĩndĩ arĩ igũrũ
Psalms14:3 Othe-rĩ
Psalms14:4 Kaĩ matarĩ na ũmenyo
Psalms14:5 Hau kaĩ nĩmaakĩnyitirũo nĩ guoya mũnene-ĩ! amu Ngai aikaraga hamwe na rũciaro rũrĩa rũthingu.
Psalms14:6 Ũhoro wa mũthĩni
Psalms14:7 Na arĩ korũo kũhonokio gwa Isiraeli nĩ gũkinyu
Psalms15:1 JEHOVA
Psalms15:2 Nĩ rĩrĩ
Psalms15:3 Mũndũ ũtarĩ na njambanio rũrĩmĩ-inĩ rũake
Psalms15:4 Maitho-inĩ make mũũra-huhũ nĩ gĩthemba kĩrurũke
Psalms15:5 Ndohoranagĩra mbia ciake nĩ getha one nyongeri
Psalms16:1 Ĩ MŨRUNGU
Psalms16:2 Nĩndĩkĩtie kwĩra Jehova atĩrĩ
Psalms16:3 Nao andũ arĩa atheru a bũrũri
Psalms16:4 Cieha cia andũ arĩa mekũũranĩirie Jehova na ngai ĩngĩ-rĩ
Psalms16:5 Jehova nĩwe rũgai rũrĩa ngaĩte
Psalms16:6 Thanju ciakwa njatũrĩirũo kũndũ kũrĩa gũthaka; ĩĩ-ni
Psalms16:7 Nĩ kũgatha ngũgatha Jehova
Psalms16:8 Jehova nĩndĩmwĩigĩire mbere yakwa hingo ciothe
Psalms16:9 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Psalms16:10 Amu wee ndũkarekereria roho wakwa ũũrĩre kwa ngoma; ndũgetĩkĩra ũrĩa waku mũigua-Ngai akĩonane na kuora.
Psalms16:11 Ũrĩnyonagia njĩra o ĩrĩa ya muoyo: harĩa wee ũrĩ he na hũni cia gĩkeno; guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo
Psalms17:1 Ĩ JEHOVA
Psalms17:2 Ituĩro rĩakwa ta nĩriumĩrio
Psalms17:3 Ngoro yakwa nĩũmĩgeretie; wanoka kũng’ethera ũtukũ; kũndoria niũndoranĩtie
Psalms17:4 Ha ũhoro wa maũndũ ma andũ
Psalms17:5 Makinya makwa matũire makinyĩrĩirie o ing’aratua ciaku
Psalms17:6 Niĩ o niĩ ndĩragũkaĩra
Psalms17:7 Tũma ũtugi waku wonekane ũrĩ wa kũgegania
Psalms17:8 Kĩ’menyagĩrĩre o ta kĩũma kĩa riitho; ’hitha kĩĩgunyĩ-inĩ kĩa mathagu maku
Psalms17:9 Ndigakorũo nĩ andũ aaganu arĩa mang’ũmagia
Psalms17:10 Ngoro ciao nĩmakibibanĩtie; tũnua twao twaragia o ndeto cia ngũrũ.
Psalms17:11 Rĩu nĩmatũũmbagĩrĩra o makinya-inĩ maitũ; matũkarangagĩra maitho nĩguo mone hingo ya gũtũrũnda.
Psalms17:12 Mwene ũhoro ũcio ahaana ta mũrũthi hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũcemekeire ndĩa yaguo
Psalms17:13 Arahũka
Psalms17:14 ’Honokia na guoko gwaku
Psalms17:15 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms18:1 NĨNGWENDETE mũno
Psalms18:2 Jehova-rĩ
Psalms18:3 Ngayagĩra Jehova
Psalms18:4 Nderigicĩirio nĩ mĩgeto ya gĩkuũ
Psalms18:5 Mĩgeto ya kwa-ngoma nĩyo yeĩ’thiorereire; ngagwatwo nĩ mĩtego ya gĩkuũ.
Psalms18:6 Ndĩ na mĩnyamaro ĩo
Psalms18:7 Hĩndĩ ĩo thĩ ĩgĩkĩrika kwerera o ĩgĩtetemaga
Psalms18:8 Hagĩkĩambata ndogo yumĩte maniũrũ make
Psalms18:9 Agĩcuhĩrĩria matu
Psalms18:10 Agĩgĩthiĩ akuuĩtwo nĩ kerubi
Psalms18:11 Nduma nĩyo aatuĩte wĩhitho wake
Psalms18:12 Kuuma ũkengi-inĩ ũrĩa warĩ harĩ we
Psalms18:13 Ningĩ we Jehova akĩrurumia marurumĩ e kũu matu-inĩ
Psalms18:14 Agĩikia mĩguĩ yake
Psalms18:15 Hĩndĩ ĩo ndĩra cia maria ikĩonekana
Psalms18:16 Agĩtambũrũkia guoko arĩ igũrũ
Psalms18:17 Kũndeithũra nĩaandeithũrire kũrĩ thũ yakwa ĩo ya hinya
Psalms18:18 Maa’harũkĩire mũthenya ũrĩa ndonete mũtino
Psalms18:19 O na nĩaanyumĩririe kũndũ kwariĩ; nĩaagĩ’tharire akĩnduta ũgwati-inĩ
Psalms18:20 Jehova-rĩ
Psalms18:21 Nĩ amu ndũire nũmĩrĩire o njĩra cia Jehova
Psalms18:22 Nĩ gũkorũo matuĩro make mothe maaikaraga o mbere yakwa
Psalms18:23 O na harĩ we ndiarĩ ũcuke
Psalms18:24 Tondũ ũcio Jehova nĩa’thukĩire kũringana na ũthingu wakwa
Psalms18:25 Wee-rĩ
Psalms18:26 Kũrĩ ũrĩa mwĩtheria
Psalms18:27 Amu andũ arĩa athĩnie
Psalms18:28 Amu tawa wakwa wee nĩwe mũnjakĩria; Jehova Ngai wakwa atũmaga nduma yakwa ĩtuĩke ũtheri.
Psalms18:29 Amu tondũ waku ndahota gũtharĩkĩra mbũtũ ng’ima; tondũ wa Ngai wakwa ndahota kũrũũga rũirigo.
Psalms18:30 Mũrungu-rĩ
Psalms18:31 Thima-rĩ
Psalms18:32 Nowe Mũrungu ũrĩa ũ’hotoraga ũhoti
Psalms18:33 Magũrũ makwa amekagĩra ihenya ta ma thwariga ya mũgoma
Psalms18:34 Amenyithagia moko makwa mũrũĩre wa mbaara
Psalms18:35 O na ningĩ-rĩ
Psalms18:36 Nĩ kwaramia ũnjaramĩirie ũthiĩro wa makinya makwa
Psalms18:37 Thũ ciakwa ndĩĩthingatanaga nacio
Psalms18:38 Ndĩrĩcihehenjaga ikaremwo nĩ gũũkĩra: nĩ kũgũa irĩkĩgũaga thĩ makinya-inĩ makwa.
Psalms18:39 Nĩ gũkorũo wee nĩũ’hotorete ũhoti
Psalms18:40 Watũmire thũ ciakwa inyonie ciande
Psalms18:41 Moigire mbu
Psalms18:42 Hĩndĩ ĩo ngĩmathuthura o kũmathuthura makĩhaana ta rũkũngũ rũkĩũmbũrũo nĩ rũhuho; ngĩmahakũra ta ndaka ya njĩra-inĩ.
Psalms18:43 Wee-rĩ
Psalms18:44 O rĩrĩa maaigua ngumo yakwa makagwata o kũnjathĩkĩra; andũ acio a kũngĩ nĩ kwĩnyihĩrĩria marĩĩnyihagĩrĩria harĩ niĩ.
Psalms18:45 Ageni acio no kũhinyara makahinyara
Psalms18:46 Jehova e muoyo we ndũmba yakwa ya ihiga arogathwo! we Ngai mwene ũhonokio wakwa arotũũra atũũgĩrĩte!
Psalms18:47 Nowe Mũrungu ũrĩa ũndĩhagĩria
Psalms18:48 Thũ ciakwa nowe ũ’hatũraga harĩ cio; ĩĩ-ni
Psalms18:49 Tondũ wa ũguo
Psalms18:50 Ũhonokio nĩ mũnene
Psalms19:1 IGŨRŨ nĩ kũmemerekia rĩmemerekagia riri wa Mũrungu
Psalms19:2 Mũthenya nĩũkinyagĩria mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ ũhoro
Psalms19:3 Ciugo gũtirĩ
Psalms19:4 Mũhaka wakuo ũtambũrũkĩte mabũrũri mothe
Psalms19:5 narĩo no ta mũhikania akĩroka kuuma thingira wake
Psalms19:6 Kuumĩra kwarĩo
Psalms19:7 Kĩrĩra kĩa Jehova nĩ gĩkinyanĩru
Psalms19:8 Mataaro ma Jehova nĩ merekereru
Psalms19:9 Gwĩtigĩra Jehova nĩ ũndũ mũtheru
Psalms19:10 Maũndũ macio nĩ ma kwĩrirĩrio kũrĩ thahabu
Psalms19:11 Na ningĩ nĩmo ndungata yaku ĩtaarĩkaga nĩmo; kũmamenyerera kwĩ na uumithio mũnene.
Psalms19:12 Nũ ũngĩhota gwĩkũũranĩra kũrĩa ahĩtagia? mahĩtia macio mehithaga-rĩ
Psalms19:13 Ningĩ ũgiranagie ndungata yaku na mehia ma mwĩĩro; ndũkanareke njathagwo nĩmo: nĩguo njikarage ndĩ mũkinyanĩru
Psalms19:14 Ciugo cia kanua gakwa
Psalms20:1 JEHOVA arokwamũkĩria mũthenya wa kũhatĩkwo; rĩĩtwa rĩa Ngai wa Jakubu rĩrokũiga handũ haraihu na igũrũ;
Psalms20:2 Agũtũmĩre ũteithio arĩ harĩa hake haamũre
Psalms20:3 Aroririkana mahaki mothe marĩa wanaruta o agĩĩtĩkagĩra ihaki rĩaku rĩrĩa rĩa njino;
Psalms20:4 Arokũhe o ũrĩa ngoro yaku ĩkwenda
Psalms20:5 Hĩndĩ ĩo nĩ kũrũhia tũkarũhia nĩ ũndũ wa ũhonokio waku
Psalms20:6 Rĩu ndĩ kũmenya atĩ Jehova nĩahonokagia ũrĩa wake mũitĩrĩrie-maguta; nĩarĩmwamũkagĩria arĩ igũrũ rĩu rĩake rĩamũre
Psalms20:7 Andũ amwe marahaga ngari cia ita
Psalms20:8 O nĩ gũkurumana makurumanĩte
Psalms20:9 Ĩ Jehova

Psalms22:1 NGAI wakwa
Psalms22:2 Ĩ Ngai wakwa

Psalms22:5 We nĩwe maakayagĩra
Psalms22:6 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms22:7 Arĩa othe maranyona no gũ’thekerera mara’thekerera; nĩ gũ’thiorera mara’thiorera mĩromo
Psalms22:8 No kĩrekererie Jehova ũhoro waku! rekei akĩmũhatũre arĩ we; nĩamũteithũrithie
Psalms22:9 Nĩ ma
Psalms22:10 No harĩ wee ndaikirio kuuma o ndaciarũo; kuuma o rĩrĩa ndarĩ nda ya maitũ ũtũire ũrĩ o Mũrungu wakwa.
Psalms22:11 Tiga kũnjikara haraya
Psalms22:12 Ndĩ mũrigicĩrie nĩ ndegwa nyingĩ cia njamba
Psalms22:13 Ikũnjathamĩria inua ciacio
Psalms22:14 Njitĩkĩte thĩ ta maĩ
Psalms22:15 Hinya wakwa ũũmagarĩte ta rũgĩo
Psalms22:16 Amu ndĩ mũrigicĩrie nĩ magui
Psalms22:17 Mahĩndĩ makwa
Psalms22:18 Magwete kũgayana nguo ciakwa
Psalms22:19 No wee
Psalms22:20 Teithũra muoyo wakwa harĩ rũhiũ rũa njomo; ũyũ wakwa wa mũmwe-rĩ
Psalms22:21 ’Honokia kanua-inĩ ka ngatia
Psalms22:22 Rĩu no ’memerekerie andũ aitũ ngumo ya rĩĩtwa rĩaku; ngũgũkumĩria kĩũngano-inĩ gĩa kĩrĩndĩ gatagatĩ.
Psalms22:23 Inyuĩ etigĩri Jehova
Psalms22:24 Tondũ ndarurũkĩte mĩtandiũko ya ũrĩa mũtandiũre
Psalms22:25 Gĩtũmi gĩa gũkumia kũrĩa ndĩragũkumia ndĩ kĩũngano-inĩ kĩnene kiumĩte o harĩ wee: ngũkĩhingia mĩĩhĩtwa yakwa ndĩ mbere ya arĩa amwĩtigĩri.
Psalms22:26 Andũ arĩa ahoreri nĩmarĩe mahũne; nĩmagooce Jehova
Psalms22:27 Ituri ciothe cia thĩ no ikaririkana
Psalms22:28 Tondũ ũthamaki nĩ wa Jehova; nowe mũthamaki wa ndũrĩrĩ.
Psalms22:29 Andũ arĩa aaramu a thĩ othe nĩ kũrĩa makarĩa na mamũinamĩrire; arĩa othe aikũrũki rũkũngũ-inĩ no magaturia ndu mbere yake
Psalms22:30 Mbeũ ĩrĩ o kuo ya kũmũtungatagĩra; ũhoro wa Mwathani-rĩ
Psalms22:31 Acio nĩmagoka maheane ũhoro wa ũthingu wake harĩ kĩrĩndĩ kĩrĩa gĩgaciarũo
Psalms23:1 JEHOVA nĩwe mũrĩithi wakwa; ndirĩ kĩndũ ingĩkĩaga.

Psalms23:3 Nĩ kũriũkia ariũkagia ngoro yakwa
Psalms23:4 O na ingĩtuĩka ndĩrahungurĩra mũkuru wĩ nduma ta ya gĩkuũ

Psalms24:4 No ũrĩa wĩ na moko matheru
Psalms24:5 Ũcio nĩwe wa kwamũkĩra kĩrathimo harĩ Jehova

Psalms25:2 Wee
Psalms25:3 Ĩĩ-ni
Psalms25:4 Menyithia njĩra ciaku
Psalms25:5 Ndwaragĩra o ũhoro-inĩ waku wa ma
Psalms25:6 Ririkana matha maku
Psalms25:7 Ndũkaririkane mahĩtia marĩa ma ũnyinyi wakwa
Psalms25:8 Jehova nĩ mwega
Psalms25:9 Arĩa ahoreri arĩmatwaraga na mĩthiĩre o ĩrĩa ya kĩhooto: acio ahoreri-rĩ
Psalms25:10 Ikĩro ciothe cia Jehova no cia ũtugi na ũhoro-wa-ma harĩ arĩa marũmagia kĩrĩkanĩro gĩake
Psalms25:11 Ĩ Jehova
Psalms25:12 Nĩ mũndũ ũrĩkũ mwĩtigĩri Jehova? ũcio-rĩ
Psalms25:13 Ngoro yake nĩĩrĩikaraga o ĩhorereire
Psalms25:14 Ndundu ya Jehova nĩ ya acio amwĩtigĩri; nĩo arĩmenyithagia kĩrĩkanĩro gĩake.
Psalms25:15 Maitho makwa hingo ciothe marorete o harĩ Jehova
Psalms25:16 Wĩĩ’hũgũrĩre
Psalms25:17 Kũrĩa ngoro yakwa ĩhatĩkĩirũo
Psalms25:18 Rora mathĩna makwa o na ũrĩa nditũhĩirũo; ũkĩndekere mahĩtia makwa mothe.
Psalms25:19 Rora thũ ciakwa
Psalms25:20 Menyagĩrĩra ngoro yakwa
Psalms25:21 Wĩkindĩru wa ngoro
Psalms25:22 Ĩ Ngai
Psalms26:1 JEHOVA
Psalms26:2 Ngeria
Psalms26:3 Amu ũtugi waku nĩũikaraga o mbere ya maitho makwa
Psalms26:4 Ndirĩ ndatuĩka wa gũikaranagia na andũ a tũhũ
Psalms26:5 Kĩũngano kĩa arĩa eki-naĩ no gũthũũra ndĩgĩthũire; arĩa aaganu-rĩ
Psalms26:6 Ngwĩthambia moko rĩĩthambĩro-inĩ rĩa kũnina ũũru
Psalms26:7 Nĩguo ndũme kũiguwo mũgambo wa gũcokia ngatho
Psalms26:8 Ĩ Jehova
Psalms26:9 Ndũkanonganie ngoro yakwa hamwe na andũ arĩa mehagia; muoyo wakwa-rĩ
Psalms26:10 Arĩa me na mauungumania moko-inĩ mao
Psalms26:11 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms26:12 Rĩu kũgũrũ gwakwa nĩ gũkinyu harĩa haaraganu wega: ciũngano-inĩ cia kĩrĩndĩ nĩkuo ndĩrĩkĩgathagĩra Jehova.
Psalms27:1 JEHOVA nĩwe ũtheri wakwa
Psalms27:2 Rĩrĩa ndaharũkĩirũo nĩ arĩa eki-naĩ
Psalms27:3 O na ita ingĩnjakĩrĩra iraaro
Psalms27:4 Ndĩ o ũndũ ũmwe nyendete harĩ Jehova
Psalms27:5 Amu-rĩ
Psalms27:6 Na rĩu nĩ hĩndĩ mũtwe wakwa ũgũtũũgĩrio na igũrũ harĩ thũ ciakwa iria i’thiũrũrũkĩirie; nĩngaruta magongona me na ndũhiũ ndĩ hema-inĩ yake; kũina nĩngaina
Psalms27:7 Ĩ Jehova
Psalms27:8 Harĩa woigire
Psalms27:9 Tiga kwĩĩ’hithĩra ũthiũ; tiga gũkĩingata ndungata yaku na marakara: nĩwe ũtũire ũndeithagia; ndũkande
Psalms27:10 Amu nĩndiganĩirio nĩ awa o na maitũ
Psalms27:11 Nyonagĩrĩria njĩra yaku
Psalms27:12 Ndũka’nenganĩre mwĩrirĩrio-inĩ wa arĩa me muku na niĩ
Psalms27:13 Guca njĩtĩkĩtie atĩ nĩngeyonera wega wa Jehova ndĩ bũrũri wa arĩa me muoyo
Psalms27:14 Eterera o Jehova: gĩa na hinya
Psalms28:1 WEE
Psalms28:2 Igua mũgambo wakwa wa gũgũthaitha ngĩkũrĩragĩra
Psalms28:3 Ndũkangucũrũranĩrie na andũ arĩa amaramari
Psalms28:4 Acio kĩmahe kĩrĩa kĩringaine na wĩki wao
Psalms28:5 Tondũ o matirũmbũyagia mawĩko ma Jehova
Psalms28:6 Jehova arogathwo
Psalms28:7 Jehova-rĩ
Psalms28:8 Jehova nowe hinya wa andũ ake
Psalms28:9 Kĩhonokie kĩrĩndĩ gĩaku; ũkĩrathime igai rĩrĩ rĩaku; o na kũrĩithia ũkĩrĩithagie
Psalms29:1 RAHAI Jehova
Psalms29:2 Rahai Jehova mũkĩgane riri wa rĩĩtwa rĩake; thathaiyai Jehova mwĩgemetie na ũgemu ũrĩa wa ũtheru.
Psalms29:3 Mũgambo wa Jehova nĩ kũgamba ũragamba na kũu iria-inĩ; rungu
Psalms29:4 Mũgambo wa Jehova wĩ na hinya; mũgambo wa Jehova nĩ mũkaru o gũkara.
Psalms29:5 Mũgambo wa Jehova-rĩ
Psalms29:6 O na gũtũhatũhia akamĩtũhatũhia ta gacaũ
Psalms29:7 Mũgambo wa Jehova ũthendũkithagia nĩnĩmbĩ cia mwaki.
Psalms29:8 Mũgambo wa Jehova nĩũthingithagia werũ; o nginya werũ wa Kadeshi
Psalms29:9 Mũgambo wa Jehova ũtũmaga thwariga irike kũrũmwo igagĩciara
Psalms29:10 Jehova-rĩ
Psalms29:11 Jehova nĩarĩheaga kĩrĩndĩ gĩake hinya; Jehova arĩrathimaga kĩrĩndĩ gĩake agĩkĩheaga thayũ.
Psalms30:1 NĨNGŨGĨKŨGOOCA ngũtũũgĩrie
Psalms30:2 Ĩ Jehova
Psalms30:3 Ĩ Jehova
Psalms30:4 Inĩrai Jehova mũmũgooce
Psalms30:5 Amu marakara make no ma kahinda kanini
Psalms30:6 Niĩ hakwa-rĩ
Psalms30:7 Wee
Psalms30:8 Ngĩcoka ngĩgũkaĩra
Psalms30:9 Atĩrĩ
Psalms30:10 Jehova
Psalms30:11 Rĩu nĩũngarũranĩirie mũcayo ũcio ndĩrarĩ naguo ũgatuĩka ndũrũhĩ; ũngundũrĩte nguo ya ikũnia
Psalms30:12 Nĩ getha riri wakwa ũkũinagĩre
Psalms31:1 WEE
Psalms31:2 Nyinamĩrĩria gũtũ
Psalms31:3 Nĩ amu rũaro rũakwa rũa ihiga
Psalms31:4 Ndeithũkithia wabu-inĩ ya mũtego
Psalms31:5 Roho wakwa nĩndaũiga moko-inĩ maku: wee
Psalms31:6 Arĩa marũmbũyagia maũndũ matarĩ kĩene
Psalms31:7 Niĩ no njanjamũke ngĩkenagĩra ũtugi waku
Psalms31:8 Ũkaaga kũ’hingĩrĩria moko-inĩ ma thũ
Psalms31:9 Nginyĩria wega waku
Psalms31:10 Nĩ gũkorũo muoyo wakwa nĩũhũahũĩte nĩ ũndũ wa kĩeha
Psalms31:11 Tondũ wa andũ arĩa othe me muku na niĩ nĩnduĩkĩte kĩmene
Psalms31:12 Ndĩ mũriganĩru o ta mũndũ wakuire
Psalms31:13 Amu nĩnjiguĩte njambio cia andũ aingĩ
Psalms31:14 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms31:15 Mahinda makwa marĩ o guoko-inĩ gwaku: ndeithũra moko-inĩ ma thũ ciakwa
Psalms31:16 Tũma ũthiũ waku warĩre ndungata yaku: tondũ wa ũtugi ũcio waku-rĩ
Psalms31:17 Wee
Psalms31:18 Mĩromo ĩo ya maheni nĩĩtumane ĩremwo nĩ kwaria
Psalms31:19 Wega waku-rĩ
Psalms31:20 O hau wee ũrĩ
Psalms31:21 Jehova arogathwo! tondũ nĩanyonetie ũtugi wake ndĩ thĩinĩ wa gĩtũũro kĩirige
Psalms31:22 Niĩ-rĩ
Psalms31:23 Ĩ kĩendei Jehova
Psalms31:24 Gĩai na hinya
Psalms32:1 MŨNDŨ gũkena
Psalms32:2 Gũkena-rĩ
Psalms32:3 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndaikarĩte o ndumĩtie
Psalms32:4 Nĩ gũkorũo guoko gwaku nĩkwanditũhagĩra mũthenya o na ũtukũ; ũruru wakwa ũgĩkĩgarũrũka ũgĩtuĩka ta ũnyotu wa hingo ya themithũ.
Psalms32:5 Ngĩtua gũkũmenyithia kũhĩtia gwakwa
Psalms32:6 Tondũ ũcio
Psalms32:7 Wee nowe wĩhitho wakwa; harĩ mĩnyamaro-rĩ
Psalms32:8 Nĩngũkũũhĩgia
Psalms32:9 Inyuĩ
Psalms32:10 Mũndũ mwaganu-rĩ
Psalms32:11 No gĩkenerei Jehova
Psalms33:1 INYUĨ athingu
Psalms33:2 Cokeriani Jehova ngatho na kĩnanda kĩa mũgeto; mũmũinĩre mũkĩmũgoocaga na kĩnanda kĩrĩa kĩgete na nga ikũmi.
Psalms33:3 Itĩkai kũmũinĩra rũĩmbo rũerũ; iniai inanda na ũgereki
Psalms33:4 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Psalms33:5 Ũndũ ũrĩa enda nĩ ũthingu
Psalms33:6 Kũũmbwo kwa igũrũ
Psalms33:7 Maĩ ma iria rĩrĩa inene amonganĩtie magaikara ta kĩhumbu; marĩa ma kũrĩa kũriku mũno amekĩrĩte nyũmba cia kũmaiga mũthithũ.
Psalms33:8 Andũ a thĩ yothe nĩmagĩĩtigĩre Jehova; mabũrũri mothe arĩa mamatũũraga nĩmamũguoyohere.
Psalms33:9 Amu nĩwe woigire
Psalms33:10 Jehova-rĩ
Psalms33:11 Ũndũ ũrĩa Jehova etaarĩte arĩ we ũtũũraga wĩ mũrũmu nginya mĩndĩ na mĩndĩ
Psalms33:12 Gũkena
Psalms33:13 Jehova e kũrĩa igũrũ nĩacũthagĩrĩria; kũbara nĩabaraga ciana cia kĩrĩndĩ o ciothe:
Psalms33:14 E kũu gĩtũũro-inĩ gĩake nĩ kũng’etia ang’etagia andũ othe arĩa matũũraga thĩ;
Psalms33:15 O we mũũmbi wa ngoro ciao othe
Psalms33:16 Mũthamaki gũtirĩ ũngĩhonoka nĩ kũgĩa na ita nyingĩ; njamba ndĩngĩĩteithũra nĩ ũrĩa ĩĩ ngandĩru mũno.
Psalms33:17 Ha ũhoro wa kũhonokia mũndũ
Psalms33:18 Atĩrĩrĩi
Psalms33:19 Nĩguo ateithũrage maroho mao gĩkuũ-inĩ
Psalms33:20 Maroho maitũ-rĩ
Psalms33:21 Nĩ amu ngoro ciitũ igũtũũra o ikenaga nĩwe
Psalms33:22 Ũtugi waku
Psalms34:1 NĨNDĨRĨGATHAGA Jehova o hingo ciothe; kanua gakwa kũmũkumia gatirĩ hĩndĩ gatarĩmũkumagia.
Psalms34:2 Jehova nowe ngoro yakwa ĩrĩĩrahagĩra: arĩa ahoreri marĩiguaga ũguo magakena.
Psalms34:3 Ĩ kĩgoocei Jehova mũmũnenehie mwĩ hamwe na niĩ
Psalms34:4 Ndarongoririe Jehova
Psalms34:5 Andũ aya-rĩ
Psalms34:6 Mũthĩnĩki ũyũ aakaire
Psalms34:7 Arĩa etigĩri-Jehova-rĩ
Psalms34:8 Ĩ camai muone atĩ Jehova nĩ mwega: gũkena-rĩ
Psalms34:9 Ĩtigagĩrei Jehova
Psalms34:10 Mĩrũthi mĩĩthĩ
Psalms34:11 Ũkai
Psalms34:12 Nĩ mũndũ ũrĩkũ wĩriragĩria gũtũũra muoyo
Psalms34:13 Atĩrĩ
Psalms34:14 Wĩthemagie ũũru-inĩ
Psalms34:15 Maitho ma Jehova merekeire na kũrĩ arĩa athingu
Psalms34:16 Arĩa mekaga ũũru-rĩ
Psalms34:17 Arĩa athingu maakaire
Psalms34:18 Jehova nĩakoragwo hakuhĩ na arĩa athuthĩku ngoro; acio maherete roho-rĩ
Psalms34:19 Maũũru no maingĩ makoraga ũrĩa mũthingu
Psalms34:20 Kũmenyerera nĩamenyagĩrĩra mahĩndĩ make mothe: gũtirĩ o na rĩmwe rĩngiunĩka.
Psalms34:21 Arĩa aaganu-rĩ
Psalms34:22 Jehova nĩ gũkũũra akũũraga ngoro cia ndungata ciake: arĩa marahagĩra harĩ we gũtirĩ ũngĩtuwo mwĩhia.
Psalms35:1 Ĩ JEHOVA
Psalms35:2 Oya ngo
Psalms35:3 Ruta itimũ o narĩo
Psalms35:4 Acio macaragia muoyo wakwa-rĩ
Psalms35:5 Nĩmatuĩke ta mũũngũ mũũmbũre nĩ rũhuho
Psalms35:6 Njĩra yao ĩrogĩa nduma
Psalms35:7 Nĩ ũndũ nĩmanyembeire wabu ya kũndega
Psalms35:8 Mwĩki ũguo arokorererũo nĩ mwanangĩko na aterĩgĩrĩire; wabu ĩo embanĩire ĩromũgwatia we mwene: arogũa thĩinĩ wayo aanangĩke arĩ we.
Psalms35:9 Nayo ngoro yakwa hĩndĩ ĩo no ĩcanjamũkĩre Jehova
Psalms35:10 Mahĩndĩ makwa mothe no makiuge atĩrĩ
Psalms35:11 Nĩgũũkĩrĩte aiganĩrĩri igenyo; makanjũria maũndũ marĩa itekũmenya.
Psalms35:12 Wega wakwa mandĩhaga na ũũru
Psalms35:13 No niĩ hakwa-rĩ
Psalms35:14 Ndaikaraga ta arĩ mũrata wakwa kana mũrũ wa maitũ ũrũarĩte; ngethikĩra o ’thitĩte nĩ kĩeha
Psalms35:15 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms35:16 O ta ũrĩa gwĩkagwo nĩ ithagathago iria ithekererithagia andũ maruga-inĩ
Psalms35:17 Jehova
Psalms35:18 Nĩ ngatho ndĩĩgĩgũcokagĩria ndĩ kĩũngano-inĩ kĩrĩa kĩnene; kũu gwĩ kĩrĩndĩ kĩingĩ nĩkuo ndĩrĩgũkumagĩria.
Psalms35:19 Acio metuĩte thũ ciakwa tũhũ
Psalms35:20 Amu o ti ndeto cia thayũ maaragia
Psalms35:21 Ĩĩ-ni
Psalms35:22 Ũhoro ũcio
Psalms35:23 Ĩribaribe
Psalms35:24 Jehova Ngai wakwa-rĩ
Psalms35:25 Nĩmatige kũrekwo moige atĩrĩ
Psalms35:26 Andũ acio mangenagĩrĩra rĩrĩa ndona ũũru-rĩ
Psalms35:27 Nao arĩa a kũigua wega ũthingu wakwa wahandĩka
Psalms35:28 Na niĩ rũrĩmĩ rũakwa no rũng’ung’uage ndeto cia ũthingu waku
Psalms36:1 ŨREMI wa mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu nĩ wa kũndĩkĩria ngoro-inĩ yakwa atĩrĩ
Psalms36:2 Amu maitho-inĩ make mwene ecaaraga akĩĩĩraga atĩ waganu wake ndũkamenyeka nĩguo ũgĩthũũrũo.
Psalms36:3 Ndeto cia kanua gake no ũmaramari na ũrĩa-ma; nĩatigĩte gũtuĩka mũndũ mũũgĩ wa gwĩkaga wega.
Psalms36:4 Arĩ ũrĩrĩ no maũndũ ma waganu arathugunda; eigĩte njĩra-inĩ ĩrĩa ĩtarĩ njega; ũũru-rĩ
Psalms36:5 Ũtugi waku
Psalms36:6 Ũthingu waku no ta irĩma cia Mũrungu; matuĩro maku marikĩte ta kũrĩa kũriku iria-inĩ: wee Jehova-rĩ
Psalms36:7 Ĩ na kaĩ ũtugi waku
Psalms36:8 Irĩhũnagio ũnoru wa nyũmba yaku
Psalms36:9 Nĩ gũkorũo itherũkĩro rĩa muoyo nĩ harĩ wee rĩrĩ; tũrĩ ũtheri-inĩ waku nĩho tũrĩĩonagĩra ũtheri.
Psalms36:10 Andũ acio makũũĩ-rĩ
Psalms36:11 Ndũkanareke ’hatĩkwo nĩ kũgũrũ kũrĩa kwa mwĩono; tiga gũkareka nindũrũo nĩ guoko kwa arĩa amaramari.
Psalms36:12 Acio eki maũndũ ma waganu
Psalms37:1 TIGAGA gwakanwo nĩ ngoro nĩ ũndũ wa arĩa eki ũũru; arĩa eki maũndũ ma wogogi-rĩ
Psalms37:2 Tondũ ica-ikuhĩ nĩ gũtemwo marĩtemwo ta mahuti
Psalms37:3 Wĩhokage o Jehova
Psalms37:4 Nĩrĩo ũngĩtũũra wĩkenagĩra nĩ ũndũ wa Jehova
Psalms37:5 Ũhoro wa njĩra yaku
Psalms37:6 Ũthingu waku nĩakauumĩria ware ta ũtheri
Psalms37:7 Kindagĩria harĩ Jehova
Psalms37:8 Eheragia marakara
Psalms37:9 Tondũ arĩa mekaga ũũru nĩ kũng’ũrio makang’ũrio
Psalms37:10 Amu-rĩ
Psalms37:11 No rĩrĩ
Psalms37:12 Ũrĩa mwaganu nĩoingumanagĩria ũrĩa mũthingu maũndũ
Psalms37:13 Ũcio-rĩ
Psalms37:14 Acio aaganu nĩmacomorete rũhiũ
Psalms37:15 Rũhiũ rũu rũao nĩ ngoro ciao ene rũrĩtheca
Psalms37:16 Kĩndũ kĩnyinyi kĩĩ na mũndũ mũthingu gĩĩ kĩguni kũrĩ ũingĩ wa ũtonga wĩ na andũ aingĩ aaganu.
Psalms37:17 Tondũ-rĩ
Psalms37:18 Andũ arĩa akinyanĩru-rĩ
Psalms37:19 Hingo ya mũtino
Psalms37:20 No atĩrĩ
Psalms37:21 Ũrĩa mwaganu ohoraga
Psalms37:22 Nĩ amu arĩa arathime nĩ Jehova nĩo makagaya thĩ
Psalms37:23 Makinya ma mũndũ nĩ Jehova ũmũrũmagĩria
Psalms37:24 O na aagũa
Psalms37:25 Ndarĩ mũnyinyi
Psalms37:26 Atindaga agĩĩkana uuma-andũ
Psalms37:27 Wĩthemagie ũũru-inĩ
Psalms37:28 Amu Jehova enda o maũndũ ma kĩhooto
Psalms37:29 Arĩa athingu nĩo makagaya thĩ
Psalms37:30 Ũrĩa mũthingu-rĩ
Psalms37:31 Kĩrĩra kĩa Ngai wake kĩrĩ o ngoro-inĩ yake; makinya make gũtirĩ o na rĩmwe rĩngĩgĩtenderũka.
Psalms37:32 Ũrĩa mwaganu aikaraga agĩcũthagĩrĩria ũrĩa mũthingu
Psalms37:33 Jehova nake ndangĩmũtiga moko-inĩ make
Psalms37:34 Etagĩrĩra Jehova
Psalms37:35 Ndanona mũndũ mwaganu arĩ na itua-nda inene
Psalms37:36 Ngĩcoka kũhĩtũka-rĩ
Psalms37:37 Bara wega mũndũ ũrĩa mũkinyanĩru ũrĩa mũrũngĩrĩru-rĩ
Psalms37:38 Ha ũhoro wa arĩa aremi
Psalms37:39 Arĩa athingu
Psalms37:40 Jehova nĩ kũmateithia amateithagia
Psalms38:1 Ĩ JEHOVA
Psalms38:2 Amu-rĩ
Psalms38:3 Nyama cia mwĩrĩ wakwa itirĩ na handũ o na hamwe hega nĩ ũndũ wa mang’ũrĩka maku; na tondũ wa wĩhia wakwa mahĩndĩ makwa matingĩkirĩĩrĩria.
Psalms38:4 Amu mawaganu makwa nĩ kũ’huba ma’hubĩte nginya o kĩongo; kũnditũhĩra nĩmandĩtũhĩire gũkĩra
Psalms38:5 Nguraro iria ndĩ nacio inungĩte kũnunga
Psalms38:6 Njikaraga o ’hacĩkĩte
Psalms38:7 Nĩ gũkorũo hũnĩro ciakwa ciiyũire ruo ta rũa mwaki; mwĩrĩ wakwa ndũrĩ na handũ o na hamwe hega.
Psalms38:8 Nĩ kũrigoya ndigoete
Psalms38:9 Mwathani
Psalms38:10 Ngoro yakwa gũtuuma nĩĩratuuma mũno
Psalms38:11 Andũ arĩa anyendi
Psalms38:12 Arĩa nao macaragia muoyo wakwa nĩ mĩtego mandegagĩra; acio mendaga kũnjĩka ũũru magakĩaragia ũhoro o wa kĩũnũhu
Psalms38:13 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms38:14 Ĩĩ-ni
Psalms38:15 Nĩ gũkorũo wee
Psalms38:16 Nĩ tondũ njugĩte atĩrĩ
Psalms38:17 Na tondũ nĩngiriĩ gũtuĩka kĩgitũ
Psalms38:18 Tondũ ningĩ
Psalms38:19 No rĩ’
Psalms38:20 Acio nao arĩhi wega na ũũru nĩ muku mandumĩte
Psalms38:21 Ĩ Jehova
Psalms38:22 Hiũha kũndeithia
Psalms39:1 NDOIGIRE atĩrĩ
Psalms39:2 Ngĩgĩikara ta mũndũ ũtangĩhota kwaria
Psalms39:3 Ngoro yakwa ĩgĩkĩhĩahĩĩra thĩinĩ wakwa; o hĩndĩ ĩo ndecũranagia
Psalms39:4 Ĩ Jehova
Psalms39:5 Matukũ makwa anga ndũmaigananĩtie na marata marĩa maratagwo? ũkũrũ wakwa-rĩ
Psalms39:6 Nĩma
Psalms39:7 Na rĩu
Psalms39:8 Mehia makwa mothe
Psalms39:9 Ndaikaire itekwaria
Psalms39:10 Njehereria itũhũhũ rĩrĩ rĩaku rĩnyume; mbaara ya guoko gwaku-rĩ
Psalms39:11 Wee waitĩka gũtaara mũndũ
Psalms39:12 Igua ihoya rĩakwa
Psalms39:13 Hũgũka
Psalms40:1 GWETERERA ndetereire Jehova o ngirĩrĩirie
Psalms40:2 Akĩnduta thĩinĩ wa irima rĩũru rĩĩ mũũro
Psalms40:3 Agĩgĩĩkĩra kanua gakwa rũĩmbo rũerũ
Psalms40:4 Gũkena-rĩ
Psalms40:5 Wee Jehova Ngai wakwa-rĩ
Psalms40:6 Wee-rĩ
Psalms40:7 Hĩndĩ ĩo ngĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Psalms40:8 Niĩ ngenagio no gwĩka ũrĩa wendaga
Psalms40:9 Ũhoro mwega
Psalms40:10 Ũthingu waku ti kũhitha ndĩũhithĩte thĩinĩ wa ngoro yakwa; kwĩhokeka gwaku o na kũhonokania gwaku-rĩ
Psalms40:11 Nawe
Psalms40:12 Tondũ nĩ’hĩtĩrĩirũo nĩ maũũru maingĩ matangĩtarĩka; mawaganu makwa nĩmanginyĩrĩire
Psalms40:13 Ĩ Jehova
Psalms40:14 Andũ arĩa macaragia muoyo wakwa atĩ maũnine-rĩ
Psalms40:15 Nĩmakire ihooru nĩ ũndũ wa njono
Psalms40:16 Nao arĩa othe makũrongoragia wee
Psalms40:17 Na niĩ ndĩ mũndũ mũthĩnĩki
Psalms41:1 GŨKENA-RĨ
Psalms41:2 Jehova nĩarĩkĩmũmenyagĩrĩra
Psalms41:3 E kĩrumia-inĩ
Psalms41:4 Niĩ hakwa-ĩ
Psalms41:5 Thũ ciakwa nĩcinjaragĩrĩra ikĩũragia atĩrĩ
Psalms41:6 Ũmwe wao oka kũndora
Psalms41:7 Andũ acio othe a’thũũri nĩ kũheehana maheehanaga nĩ ũndũ wakwa; ũũru nĩguo niĩ ma’thugundagĩra.
Psalms41:8 Arĩ na ng’ũki ũmwĩgwatĩrĩire
Psalms41:9 Ĩĩ
Psalms41:10 No wee
Psalms41:11 Ũhoro ũyũ nĩguo ũtũmĩte ’menye atĩ nĩwĩkenagĩra nĩ niĩ
Psalms41:12 Niĩ-rĩ
Psalms41:13 Jehova
Psalms42:1 O TA thwariga rĩrĩa ĩraanĩria ithima cia maĩ-rĩ
Psalms42:2 Ngoro yakwa nĩ Ngai ĩnyoteire
Psalms42:3 Maithori makwa matuĩkĩte nĩmo irio ciakwa mũthenya o na ũtukũ
Psalms42:4 Maũndũ maya no ngũmaririkana ngĩmeciragia ngoro-inĩ yakwa
Psalms42:5 Wee
Psalms42:6 Ĩ Ngai
Psalms42:7 Ndia ĩmwe nĩĩreta ndia ĩrĩa ĩngĩ na mũgambo wa mũrurumo wa ndurumo ciaku cia maĩ; ndihũ ciaku ciothe
Psalms42:8 No rĩrĩ
Psalms42:9 Ngũũria Mũrungu
Psalms42:10 Nĩ ta ngũmemendwo mahĩndĩ rĩrĩa a-muku akwa mekũ’herekia
Psalms42:11 Wee
Psalms43:1 NDUĨRA ũhoro wakwa
Psalms43:2 Amu nĩwe Ngai ũrĩa we kĩirigo gĩakwa kĩa hinya: ũkĩnyingatĩte nĩkĩ? ’thiaga ndĩ na kĩeha nĩkĩ nĩ ũndũ wa kũhinyĩrĩrio nĩ thũ?
Psalms43:3 Tũma ũtheri waku o na ũhoro waku wa ma
Psalms43:4 Nĩguo ngĩkinye kĩgongona-inĩ kĩa Ngai
Psalms43:5 Wee
Psalms44:1 TWANAIGUA na matũ maitũ
Psalms44:2 Wee-rĩ
Psalms44:3 Amu matiagwatire bũrũri na hinya wa rũhiũ rũao
Psalms44:4 Ĩ Ngai
Psalms44:5 Tondũ wa hinya waku
Psalms44:6 Thima-rĩ
Psalms44:7 Nĩ gũkorũo
Psalms44:8 Ngai nowe tũtindaga tũkĩĩrahĩra mũthenya wothe
Psalms44:9 Ĩndĩ rĩu nĩ gũte ũtũteete
Psalms44:10 Ũtũmaga tuonie mũmaitha ciande; acio matũthũũrĩte magetahagĩra mataha.
Psalms44:11 Ũtũnenganĩrĩte ta igondu ituĩkĩte cia kũrĩo; ũgatũhurunjĩra ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ.
Psalms44:12 Kĩrĩndĩ gĩaku ũkĩendetie tũhũ; ndũrĩ uumithio wonete harĩ thogora ũcio ũkĩendetie:
Psalms44:13 Ũtũtuĩte kĩmene harĩ arĩa tũhakaine nao
Psalms44:14 Ũtũtuĩte kĩgano harĩ ndũrĩrĩ
Psalms44:15 Mũthenya wothe ũnyararĩku wakwa ũndindaga o maitho-inĩ
Psalms44:16 Nĩ ũndũ wa mũgambo wa ũrĩa ũmenanagia o akĩrumanaga; na tondũ wa gũkĩonaga mũndũ ũrĩa thũ
Psalms44:17 Tũkoretwo nĩ maũndũ macio mothe
Psalms44:18 Ngoro ciitũ iticokete na thutha
Psalms44:19 O na tondũ wee ũtũthuthurĩire imamo-inĩ cia mbwe
Psalms44:20 Kũngĩkorũo twanariganĩrũo nĩ rĩĩtwa rĩa Ngai witũ
Psalms44:21 Githĩ Ngai ndangĩthuuthuuria ũhoro ũcio? nĩ gũtuĩka nĩwe ũũĩ hitho cia ngoro.
Psalms44:22 Ĩĩ-ni
Psalms44:23 Ramũka! ũgĩkomete nĩkĩ
Psalms44:24 Wĩhithĩte ũthiũ nĩ ũndũ kĩ
Psalms44:25 Thima-rĩ
Psalms44:26 Arahũka nĩ getha ũtũteithie
Psalms45:1 NGORO yakwa nĩ gũtherũka ĩratherũka ũhoro mwega; ngwaria ndeto iria ngerekete nĩ ũndũ wa mũthamaki; rũrĩmĩ rũakwa no ta karamu ka mwandĩki ũrĩa mũũgĩ.
Psalms45:2 Wee-rĩ
Psalms45:3 Wĩohe rũhiũ rũaku njohero
Psalms45:4 Wĩ na ũkaru ũcio waku-rĩ
Psalms45:5 Mĩgũĩ yaku nĩ mĩũgĩ
Psalms45:6 Gĩtĩ gĩaku gĩa ũthamaki
Psalms45:7 Ũthingu nĩguo wendete
Psalms45:8 Nguo ciaku ciothe inungĩte o manemane na thubiri na mũndarathini; nĩũrakenio nĩ inanda cia nga ikĩinio nyũmba cia ũnene ng’emie na mĩguongo.
Psalms45:9 Thĩinĩ wa andũ-a-nja aku atĩĩku harĩ o aa mwarĩ wa mũnene; mwena waku wa ũrĩo hakarũgama mũtumia waku mũthamaki
Psalms45:10 Mwarĩ ũyũ
Psalms45:11 Nĩrĩo mũthamaki angĩĩrirĩria ũthaka waku: amu nĩwe mwathani waku; nawe no ũmwĩkĩrĩre.
Psalms45:12 Mwarĩ wa kũrĩa Turo nake nĩagakĩrehe itega; gwata itonga iria nene cia bũrũri igatuĩka cia kwĩendereria harĩ wee.
Psalms45:13 Kũu thĩinĩ-rĩ
Psalms45:14 Ekũrehwo kwĩ mũthamaki e na nguo iria njarĩrĩre igema; airĩtu amuumi thutha
Psalms45:15 Mekũrehwo na gĩkeno na ndũrũhĩ
Psalms45:16 Handũ ha mathoguo hagacoka ciana ciaku
Psalms45:17 Nĩngũtũma rĩĩtwa rĩaku rĩtuĩke rĩa kũririkanagwo nĩ njiarũa na njiarũa
Psalms46:1 NGAI nĩwe mũrahĩro witũ
Psalms46:2 Tondũ ũcio tũtingĩĩtigĩra
Psalms46:3 O na maĩ marĩo mangĩkorũo nĩmararuruma o makĩhũranaga
Psalms46:4 Kwĩ na rũũĩ-ĩ
Psalms46:5 Ngai nĩaikaraga kuo gatagatĩ karĩo; kwenyenyeka rĩtikenyenyeka: Ngai nĩwe wa kũrĩteithia
Psalms46:6 Ndũrĩrĩ nĩiraronjete
Psalms46:7 Jehova mwene mbũtũ cia ita nĩwe twĩ nake; Ngai wa Jakubu-rĩ
Psalms46:8 Ũkai
Psalms46:9 Nĩ mũnini mbaara nginya o gĩturi gĩa thĩ: ũta akauunanga
Psalms46:10 Tigani
Psalms46:11 Jehova mwene mbũtũ cia ita nĩwe twĩ nake; Ngai wa Jakubu-rĩ
Psalms47:1 INYUĨ iruka ciothe cia andũ
Psalms47:2 Nĩ amu Jehova Ũrĩa-Wĩ-Igũrũ-Mũno nĩ wa gĩĩtigĩrithanio kĩnene; nĩ Mũthamaki mũnene wĩ igũrũ rĩa thĩ yothe.
Psalms47:3 Irĩndĩ cia thĩ nĩwe mũtũhootithia
Psalms47:4 Igai riitũ nĩwe mũtũthurĩri
Psalms47:5 Ngai-rĩ
Psalms47:6 Inĩrai Ngai; mũgoocei na rũĩmbo: inĩrai Mũthamaki witũ
Psalms47:7 Nĩ amu Ngai nowe Mũthamaki wa thĩ yothe: kĩmũgoocei na rũĩmbo o rũrĩa rũgereke wega.
Psalms47:8 Ngai rĩu nĩagwete gũthamakĩra ndũrĩrĩ; we Ngai nĩaikarĩire gĩtĩ kĩrĩa gĩa ũtheru wake.
Psalms47:9 Anene a irĩndĩ nĩmeturanĩire matuĩke andũ a Ngai wa Iburahimu: amu ngo cia thĩ-rĩ
Psalms48:1 KŨNENEHA
Psalms48:2 Kĩo nĩ gĩthaka mũno mũtũũgĩrĩre wakĩo; gĩkenagĩrũo nĩ thĩ yothe
Psalms48:3 Kũu nyũmba-inĩ ciakuo cia ũnene Ngai nĩemenyithanĩtie atĩ nĩwe rĩangĩro iraya na igũrũ.
Psalms48:4 Amu-rĩ
Psalms48:5 Magĩkĩĩonera

Psalms48:8 O ta ũrĩa twanaigua
Psalms48:9 Ũtugi waku

Psalms48:12 Ceeraceerai Zayuni
Psalms48:13 Rũmbũiyai mũno ũrĩa kũirigĩtwo
Psalms48:14 Amu Ngai ũcio nowe Ngai witũ tene na tene; nĩwe ũrĩtũtongoragia nginya hingo ĩtagathira.
Psalms49:1 IGUAI ũhoro ũyũ
Psalms49:2 Gwata inyuĩ andũ o ũguo
Psalms49:3 Kanua gakwa nĩgekwaria ciugo cia ũũgĩ ũrĩa wa ma; mwĩrurumio wa ngoro yakwa-rĩ
Psalms49:4 Ngũinamĩrĩria gũtũ ndĩĩiguĩre ngerekano; ũhoro ũyũ wakwa mũhumbĩke ngũũhumbũria ngĩinagia kĩnanda kĩa mũgeto.
Psalms49:5 Nĩ kĩ kĩngĩtũma ndĩĩtigĩre matukũ maakinya marĩa moru
Psalms49:6 O arĩa mehokaga ũtonga wao
Psalms49:7 Gũtirĩ ũngĩhota o na atĩa gwĩkũũrĩra mũrũ wa nyina
Psalms49:8 (Nĩ gũkorũo ũkũũri wa mĩoyo yao nĩ goro o mũno; no ũtiganwo naguo o nginya tene;)
Psalms49:9 Gũtingĩhoteka
Psalms49:10 Tondũ nĩ kuona akona atĩ andũ arĩa ogĩ no makuaga
Psalms49:11 Mbĩrĩra nĩcio ituĩkaga nyũmba ciao cia tene na tene
Psalms49:12 Andũ-rĩ
Psalms49:13 Ĩo nĩyo njĩra ya arĩa irimũ cia mwĩiganio: nao amarũmĩrĩri nĩmagathagĩrĩria ndeto ciao.
Psalms49:14 Nĩ kwa ngoma merekeirio
Psalms49:15 Ĩndĩ muoyo wakwa-rĩ
Psalms49:16 Ndũkanetigĩre
Psalms49:17 Tondũ-rĩ
Psalms49:18 O na angĩtuĩka atĩ rĩrĩa aarĩ muoyo nĩegathagĩrĩria-rĩ
Psalms49:19 Gũthiĩ agathiĩ o kũrĩ riika rĩrĩa rĩa maithe
Psalms49:20 Andũ-rĩ
Psalms50:1 MŨRUNGU
Psalms50:2 Nĩ hĩndĩ Ngai acangarũrũkĩte arĩ Zayuni
Psalms50:3 Ngai witũ nĩ gũũka aroka
Psalms50:4 Nĩareta matu-mairũ
Psalms50:5 Ũnganiai arĩa tũrĩ ũiguano nao
Psalms50:6 Narĩo igũrũ nĩrĩanĩrĩre ũthingu wake
Psalms50:7 Inyuĩ kĩrĩndĩ gĩakwa
Psalms50:8 Ti magongona maku ngũkũrũithĩria; mahaki maku ma njino maikaraga mbere yakwa hingo ciothe.
Psalms50:9 Ndegwa ya mũciĩ waku
Psalms50:10 Nĩ gũkorũo nyamũ ciothe cia gĩthaka no ciakwa
Psalms50:11 Nyamũ ciothe ii njoya

Psalms50:13 O nĩ ndĩe nyama cia ndegwa
Psalms50:14 Atĩrĩ
Psalms50:15 Ningĩ mũthenya ũrĩa ũkona mĩnyamaro
Psalms50:16 No rĩrĩ
Psalms50:17 Kuona nĩũgĩthũire gũtaarũo
Psalms50:18 Wona mũici-rĩ
Psalms50:19 Ũrekagĩrĩria kanua gaku kaarie ndeto njũru
Psalms50:20 Ũikaraga thĩ ũgacambia mũrũ wa nyũkwa; o ro ũcio mũrĩ a nda ĩmwe nake-rĩ
Psalms50:21 Maũndũ macio ũtũire ũmekaga
Psalms50:22 Rĩu gĩcũraniei ũhoro ũyũ

Psalms51:1 NGINYĨRIA wega waku
Psalms51:2 ’Thambia mũno
Psalms51:3 Amu nĩnjũĩ mehia makwa
Psalms51:4 Wee nĩwe njĩhĩtie
Psalms51:5 Niĩ-rĩ
Psalms51:6 Wee wĩkenagĩra no mũndũ kũgĩa na ũhoro-wa-ma o ngoro thĩinĩ; hau thĩinĩ hahitharu nĩho ũrĩtũmaga ’menyagĩre ũũgĩ.
Psalms51:7 Njitũrũria na mũthobi
Psalms51:8 Njiguithia gĩkeno na mũcanjamũko wa ngoro
Psalms51:9 Wĩgitie ũthiũ
Psalms51:10 Ngai
Psalms51:11 Ndũkanyingate nyume harĩ wee
Psalms51:12 ’Hũndũrĩra gĩkeno kĩrĩa kĩa ũhonokio waku
Psalms51:13 Na niĩ nĩndĩĩkĩrutaga arĩa ehia magerage njĩra ciaku
Psalms51:14 Ĩ Ngai
Psalms51:15 Mwathani
Psalms51:16 Amu wee ti igongona ũkenagĩra
Psalms51:17 Magongona ma Ngai nĩ roho ũrĩa mũthuthĩku; ngoro ĩrĩa ĩthuthĩkĩte na ĩkahera-rĩ
Psalms51:18 Gĩĩke Zayuni wega nĩ ũndũ wa wega ũrĩa waku; aka njirigo cia Jerusalemu.
Psalms51:19 Nĩrĩo ũgagĩkenagĩra magongona marĩa ma ũthingu
Psalms52:1 WĨRAHAGĨRA maũndũ moru nĩkĩ
Psalms52:2 Rũrĩmĩ rũaku rũthugundaga o ũhoro wa ũmaramari; nĩ ta rũenji rũrĩa rũũgĩ
Psalms52:3 Maũndũ moru nĩmo wendete gũkĩra marĩa mega
Psalms52:4 Ndeto ciothe iria ininithagia andũ nĩcio wendete
Psalms52:5 Mũrungu nake nĩ kũmomora agakũmomora nginya tene na tene; kũnyita agakũnyita akũhurie akũrute hema-inĩ yaku
Psalms52:6 Nao arĩa athingu makona ũguo
Psalms52:7 Onei
Psalms52:8 No niĩ hakwa-rĩ
Psalms52:9 Ngũtũũra ngũcokagĩria ngatho o nginya tene
Psalms53:1 MŨNDŨ ũrĩa ũtarĩ mbuguĩro etuĩrĩire atĩrĩ
Psalms53:2 Ngai nĩaacũthĩrĩirie ciana cia kĩrĩndĩ arĩ igũrũ
Psalms53:3 Othe-rĩ
Psalms53:4 Kaĩ matarĩ na ũmenyo
Psalms53:5 Hau kaĩ nĩmaakĩnyitirũo nĩ guoya mũnene-ĩ
Psalms53:6 Na arĩ korũo kũhonokio gwa Isiraeli nĩ gũkinyu
Psalms54:1 Ĩ NGAI
Psalms54:2 Ngai

Psalms54:6 Niĩ nĩ igongona ndĩĩkũrutĩra

Psalms55:1 NGAI
Psalms55:2 Thikĩrĩria ũhoro wakwa
Psalms55:3 Nĩ ũndũ wa mũgambo wa thũ
Psalms55:4 Ngoro yakwa nĩ nduure mũno thĩinĩ wakwa
Psalms55:5 Ndĩ mũtonye nĩ guoya o na gĩtetemo
Psalms55:6 Ndĩrakiuga atĩrĩ
Psalms55:7 Hĩndĩ ĩo ndethiĩra
Psalms55:8 Nĩ kũhanyũka ingĩhanyũka nginye harĩa he na mwĩgitio
Psalms55:9 Mwathani
Psalms55:10 Mũthenya o na ũtukũ marĩthiũrũrũkaga marĩ igũrũ rĩa rũirigo rũarĩo: kuo thĩinĩ gũikaraga waganu o na kĩũnũhu.
Psalms55:11 Gatagatĩ-inĩ karĩo no maũndũ ma ũmaramari kũrĩ; mathome-inĩ marĩo gũtirĩ hingo kwagaga ũhahanyi o na ũrĩa-ma.
Psalms55:12 Amu ningĩ ũrĩa ũ’hereketie ti thũ; hĩndĩ ĩo ndahota gwĩtiirĩrĩria: ningĩ ti ũrĩa mũ’thũũri wĩĩ’neneheirie; ũcio nĩ kwĩhitha ingĩmwĩhithĩte:
Psalms55:13 No rĩ’
Psalms55:14 Nĩtũragĩaga ndundu njega nawe
Psalms55:15 Marohobanĩrio nĩ gĩkuũ
Psalms55:16 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms55:17 Hwaĩ-inĩ
Psalms55:18 Rĩu nĩakũũrĩte muoyo wakwa njikare na thayũ itegũthengererũo nĩ mũndũ
Psalms55:19 Kũigua-rĩ
Psalms55:20 Mũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Psalms55:21 Kanua gake kaanyorokete ta ngorono
Psalms55:22 Rekereria mũrigo waku na harĩ Jehova; nĩwe ũrĩgũtiiragĩrĩra; ndarĩ hingo angĩreka ũrĩa mũthingu enyenyeke.
Psalms55:23 No andũ acio-rĩ
Psalms56:1 NGINYĨRIA wega waku
Psalms56:2 Acio manjoheirie nĩ gũtinda matindaga mũthenya wothe makĩendaga kũ’merũkia: amu acio manyonagia mbaara o metũũgĩirie nĩ aingĩ.
Psalms56:3 Mũthenya ũrĩa ngwĩtigĩra
Psalms56:4 Tondũ wa hinya wa Ngai
Psalms56:5 Mũthenya wothe o matindaga o makĩhotomia ndeto ciakwa; meciria mao mothe no niĩ meciragĩria manjĩke ũũru.
Psalms56:6 Nĩ kũũngana monganaga
Psalms56:7 Ĩ nĩmakĩhonoke nĩ waganu ũcio wao? wee
Psalms56:8 Morũra makwa wee nawe nĩũmagerete: maithori makwa ta kĩmekĩre cuba-inĩ waku; githĩ to maandĩke mbuku-inĩ yaku?
Psalms56:9 Mũthenya ũrĩa ingĩkaya-rĩ
Psalms56:10 Tondũ wa hinya wa Ngai
Psalms56:11 Ũrĩa ndĩĩhokete nĩ Ngai
Psalms56:12 Mĩĩhĩtwa ĩrĩa ndĩĩhĩtĩte harĩ wee
Psalms56:13 Nĩ ũndũ wee nĩũteithũrĩte muoyo wakwa harĩ gĩkuũ; anga wee towe ũgirĩtie magũrũ makwa mahigũrũo? nĩ getha ng’endage ndĩ mbere-inĩ ya Ngai ngĩonaga ũtheri ũrĩa wonagwo nĩ arĩa me muoyo.
Psalms57:1 NGINYĨRIA wega waku
Psalms57:2 Ngũkaĩra Ngai o Ũrĩa-wĩ-Igũrũ-Mũno
Psalms57:3 Gũtũmana no atũmane arĩ igũrũ
Psalms57:4 Ngoro yakwa ĩrĩ o gatagatĩ ka mĩrũthi; no nginya ngome harĩ arĩa maakanĩte mwaki
Psalms57:5 Tũũgĩra
Psalms57:6 Nĩ kwamba maambĩire nyarĩrĩ ciakwa wabu ya gũtegana; ngoro yakwa ĩgagĩĩthikĩra: menjete irima mbere yakwa rĩa kũndekia; o ene magakĩgũa o rĩo thĩinĩ.
Psalms57:7 Ĩ Ngai
Psalms57:8 Ũkĩra
Psalms57:9 Ngũgũcokeria ngatho
Psalms57:10 Nĩ gũkorũo ũtugi waku nĩ mũnene
Psalms57:11 Gĩtũũgĩre
Psalms58:1 MAŨNDŨ ma kĩhooto nomo mũkiugaga
Psalms58:2 Aca
Psalms58:3 Andũ arĩa aaganu matuĩkaga orũri o kuuma maaciarũo; o moima nda norĩo magwataga kũũngũtũka
Psalms58:4 Ũrũrũ wao nĩ ta ũrũrũ wa nyamũ-ya-thĩ; matariĩ ta nduĩra gĩtaigua
Psalms58:5 Ĩrĩa ĩtangĩthikĩrĩria mĩgambo ya arĩa macithuuthagĩra
Psalms58:6 Ng’ethũranga magego mao
Psalms58:7 Andũ acio nĩmahũĩrĩrĩre mathire
Psalms58:8 Marotuĩka ta ndinoho
Psalms58:9 O nyũngũ cianyu itanaigua mwaki wa mĩigua-rĩ
Psalms58:10 Ũrĩa mũthingu nĩ gũkena agakena akĩona irĩhanĩria rĩu: acio aaganu
Psalms58:11 Nao andũ makiuge atĩrĩ
Psalms59:1 Ĩ NGAI wakwa
Psalms59:2 Ndeithũra harĩ acio eki maũndũ ma waganu

Psalms59:4 O na hatarĩ waganu njĩkĩte-rĩ
Psalms59:5 Wee

Psalms59:7 Onei
Psalms59:8 Ĩndĩ wee
Psalms59:9 Wee
Psalms59:10 Ngai wakwa nĩekũndũnga na ũtugi wake; we Ngai niarĩnjĩtĩkĩria nyone ũrĩa ngwenda harĩ acio manjohagĩria.
Psalms59:11 Kũũraga ndũkamorage-ĩ
Psalms59:12 Tondũ wa wĩhia wa tũnua twao
Psalms59:13 Manine nĩ ũrĩa ũmarũrĩire
