Psalms59:16 Ĩndĩ niĩ-rĩ
Psalms59:17 Wee
Psalms60:1 Ĩ NGAI
Psalms60:2 Nĩũtũmĩte bũrũri ũthingithe; gwatũra nĩũwatũrĩte: thondeka mĩatũka yaguo
Psalms60:3 Kĩrĩndĩ gĩaku nĩũkĩonetie maũndũ maritũ; ũtũnyuithĩtie ndibei ĩrĩa ya gũtũgũgania.
Psalms60:4 Andũ arĩa agwĩtigĩri nĩũmaheete kĩbebero
Psalms60:5 Nĩguo endwa aku matharũo ũũru-inĩ-rĩ
Psalms60:6 Ngai nĩaarĩtie arĩ na ũtheru wake
Psalms60:7 Gileadi nĩ gwakwa
Psalms60:8 Moabi nĩ rũgĩo rũakwa rũa gwĩthambĩra; na harĩ Edomu-rĩ
Psalms60:9 Nũ ũkũnginyia thĩinĩ wa gĩtũũro kĩrĩa kĩirige? nũ ũngĩkĩndwara o kũu Edomu?
Psalms60:10 Githĩ tiwe
Psalms60:11 Gĩtũteithie harĩ ũrĩa wĩ muku na ithuĩ
Psalms60:12 Tondũ wa hinya wa Ngai no twĩke maũndũ ma ũcamba
Psalms61:1 KAYŨ gakwa ta kaigue
Psalms61:2 Ngũgũkaĩra ndĩ o mũthia-inĩ wa thĩ
Psalms61:3 Nĩ tondũ nĩwe ũtũire ũrĩ irahĩro rĩakwa
Psalms61:4 Nĩndekwo ndũũre ndĩ mũgeni wa hema-inĩ yaku nginya tene; nĩngĩrekwo ndahĩre o wĩhitho-inĩ wa mathagu maku.
Psalms61:5 Amu wee
Psalms61:6 Matukũ ma mũthamaki nĩũkũmonganĩrĩria na mangĩ; mĩaka yake ikaigana ta ya njiaro nyingĩ.
Psalms61:7 Egũtũũra aikarĩire gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene mbere-inĩ ya Ngai o nginya tene: athĩrĩra ũtugi o na ũhoro ũrĩa wa ma mamũrindagĩrĩre.
Psalms61:8 Na nĩndĩĩkĩinagĩra rĩĩtwa rĩaku ngĩrĩkumagia mĩndĩ na mĩndĩ
Psalms62:1 NGORO yakwa nĩ gũkindĩria ĩkindĩirie ĩgeterera o Ngai: ũhonokio wakwa uumaga na kũrĩ we.
Psalms62:2 Nowe wiki ndũmba yakwa ya ihiga
Psalms62:3 Nĩ hingo ĩigana atĩa mũgũtũũra mũharũkagĩra mũndũ
Psalms62:4 Maciranagĩra no getha mamũikanie mamũthengie ũnene-inĩ wake; ũrongo nĩguo makenagĩra: kanua-rĩ
Psalms62:5 Ngoro yakwa-ĩ
Psalms62:6 Nowe wiki ndũmba yakwa ya ihiga
Psalms62:7 Harĩ Ngai noho ũhonokio wakwa o na riri wakwa irĩ; ndũmba ya ihiga ĩrĩa nyene hinya wakwa
Psalms62:8 Inyuĩ kĩrĩndĩ kĩa bũrũri-rĩ
Psalms62:9 Andũ o ũguo-rĩ
Psalms62:10 Mũtigakĩĩhoke ũhinyanĩrĩria
Psalms62:11 Ngai nĩoigire ũhoro ũyũ rĩmwe
Psalms62:12 Na atĩ ũtugi o naguo no waku
Psalms63:1 Ĩ NGAI
Psalms63:2 Nĩ ta ũguo ndanagũcũthĩrĩria ndĩ handũ harĩa haamũre
Psalms63:3 Amu ũtugi waku nĩ mwega gũkĩra muoyo; mĩromo yakwa nĩ kũraha ĩrĩkũrahaga.
Psalms63:4 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Psalms63:5 Ngoro yakwa ĩrĩhũnaga wega ta ĩrĩĩte maguta
Psalms63:6 Rĩrĩa ngũkũririkana ndĩ ũrĩrĩ
Psalms63:7 Nĩ gũkorũo nĩwe ũtũire ũndeithagia

Psalms64:1 NGAI

Psalms64:4 Nĩguo maikĩrie mũndũ ũrĩa mũkinyanĩru maikaire kũrĩa kwĩhithu; o rĩmwe magakĩmũikĩria
Psalms64:5 Nĩmeũmagĩrĩria nĩguo mageke ũũru ũrĩa me naguo; ũhoro ũrĩa materetaga nĩ wa wembanĩri wa mĩtego; makoragia atĩrĩ

Psalms66:1 ANĨRĨRAI Ngai na gĩkeno

Psalms66:3 Ĩrai Ngai atĩrĩ

Psalms66:6 Iria rĩrĩa inene
Psalms66:7 Tondũ wa ũguo arĩ ũhoti
Psalms66:8 Ĩ no kĩgathei Ngai witũ

Psalms66:10 Amu wee
Psalms66:11 Watũmire tũgwatio nĩ wabu ya mũtego; watũigĩrĩire mũrigo mũgongo watũhihinyaga mũno.
Psalms66:12 Watũmire andũ mahaicĩte mbarathi matũrange mĩtwe; twatuĩkanĩirie mwaki-inĩ o na tũgĩtuĩkanĩria maĩ-inĩ: no rĩrĩ
Psalms66:13 Nĩngũtonya nyũmba yaku ndĩ na mahaki ma gũcinwo
Psalms66:14 O yo ĩrĩa mĩromo yakwa yatumũrire

Psalms66:19 No kaĩ we Ngai nĩakĩnjiguĩte-ĩ! gũthikĩrĩria nĩathikĩrĩirie mũgambo wakwa ngĩmũhoya.

Psalms69:18 Thengerera harĩ ngoro yakwa

Psalms69:23 Maitho mao marogĩa nduma
Psalms69:24 Maitũrũrĩre mang’ũrĩka maku; nĩmakinyĩrĩrũo nĩ marakara maku marĩa mahiũ!
Psalms69:25 Harĩa maakĩte harokira ihooru; hema ciao irokĩaga wa kũitũũra!
Psalms69:26 Nĩ gũkorũo ũrĩa wee ũringĩte nĩmamũthingataga
Psalms69:27 Onganĩrĩria waganu wao na waganu ũngĩ
Psalms69:28 Nĩmathario mbuku-inĩ ya arĩa a gũtũũra muoyo

Psalms69:31 Naguo ũndũ ũcio no gũkenia Jehova kũrĩ kũmũhe ndegwa

Psalms69:33 Amu andũ arĩa aagi

Psalms71:1 WEE
Psalms71:2 Tondũ wa ũthingu waku-rĩ
Psalms71:3 Harĩ niĩ tuĩka ta ndũmba ya ihiga
Psalms71:4 Ĩ Ngai wakwa
Psalms71:5 Nĩ gũkorũo wee
Psalms71:6 Ndũire ndiirĩrĩirũo nĩwe kuuma o ndaciarũo; wee nĩwe wandutire nda ya maitũ; hingo ciothe nowe ndĩĩgĩkumagia.
Psalms71:7 Harĩ andũ aingĩ niĩ nduĩkĩte ta ũrirũ; no rĩ’
Psalms71:8 Kanua gakwa karĩiyũraga o ũhoro wa gũgũkumia
Psalms71:9 Ndũkae kũnde hingo ya ũkũrũ; menya gũkandiganĩria hinya wakwa watua kũnyihĩrĩra.
Psalms71:10 Nĩ gũthima thũ ciakwa nĩciaragia ũhoro wakwa; acio moheirie muoyo wakwa nĩmarĩkanagĩra

Psalms71:23 Rĩrĩa ngũkũgooca na rũĩmbo
Psalms71:24 Rũrĩmĩ rũakwa rũrĩtindaga rũkĩaria ũhoro wa ũthingu waku mũthenya wothe: nĩ gũkorũo arĩa endi kũnjĩka ũũru nĩ gũconoka maconokete
Psalms72:1 Ĩ NGAI
Psalms72:2 Nake no aciragĩre kĩrĩndĩ gĩaku na mĩcirĩre ya ũthingu
Psalms72:3 Irĩma no iciaragĩre kĩrĩndĩ thayũ
Psalms72:4 Athĩnĩki arĩa me kĩrĩndĩ-inĩ
Psalms72:5 Andũ no matũũre magwĩtigĩrĩte o ũrĩa riũa rĩgũtũũra
Psalms72:6 Arĩikũrũkagĩra thĩ ta mbura ĩkiura nyeki-inĩ kũrĩa gũtue
Psalms72:7 Matukũ make ũrĩa mũthingu nĩ kũhamba arĩhambaga
Psalms72:8 Nĩagĩe na watho kuuma iria-inĩ rĩmwe o nginya rĩrĩa rĩngĩ
Psalms72:9 Atũũri bũrũri ũrĩa wa rũng’ũrĩ nĩmainamĩrĩre mbere yake
Psalms72:10 Athamaki a Tarashishi na a mabũrũri ma iria-inĩ
Psalms72:11 Ĩĩ-ni
Psalms72:12 Nĩ ũndũ mũndũ mũkĩa aakaya
Psalms72:13 Ũcio ũtarĩ na hinya
Psalms72:14 We nĩ gũkũũra arĩkũũraga muoyo wao harĩ ũhahanyi
Psalms72:15 Gũtũũra arotũũra na aheagwo thahabu ĩrĩa yumaga Sheba
Psalms72:16 Bũrũri ũrogĩaga na bũthi wa ngano nginya o irĩma igũrũ; maciaro mayo nĩmagĩthũngũthanage ta mĩtĩ ĩrĩa ya Lebanon: nakuo itũũra-inĩ andũ nĩmahambage o ta mahuti ma thĩ.
Psalms72:17 Rĩĩtwa rĩake rĩrotũũra tene o na tene; riũa rĩtarindũkĩte-rĩ
Psalms72:18 Jehova Ngai arogathwo
Psalms72:19 Rĩtwa rĩake narĩo
Psalms72:20 Mahoya ma Daudi
Psalms73:1 ACA
Psalms73:2 No niĩ hakwa-rĩ
Psalms73:3 Nĩ amu ndĩrarĩ na ũiru nĩ ũndũ wa andũ arĩa erahi
Psalms73:4 Nĩ gũkorũo matiiguaga ruo magĩkua; hinya wao ũkoragwo ũrĩ o mũnyitu.
Psalms73:5 Mationanaga na nditikũ ta andũ arĩa angĩ
Psalms73:6 Nĩkĩo mwĩtĩo ũmaikaraga ta kĩrengeri ngingo-inĩ yao; ũtoi-rĩ
Psalms73:7 Maitho mao tondũ wa ũnoru nĩ kuumĩra moimĩrĩte; indo me nacio gũkĩra ũrĩa ngoro ingĩĩrirĩria.
Psalms73:8 O nĩ a kĩnyũrũri
Psalms73:9 Kanua kao nĩ ta makaigĩte o igũrũ matu-inĩ
Psalms73:10 Tondũ ũcio andũ ake magacoka naho; riita rĩa maĩ rĩiyũru rĩgakĩinĩkĩrĩrio nĩo.
Psalms73:11 Makoiga
Psalms73:12 Onei
Psalms73:13 Aca
Psalms73:14 Amu ndindagio na mahũra mũthenya wothe
Psalms73:15 Ingĩroigire
Psalms73:16 Na ndaikara o ngĩĩciria ũhoro ũcio ndĩũmenye
Psalms73:17 Onginya ndatonya handũ harĩa haamũre ha Mũrungu
Psalms73:18 Aca
Psalms73:19 Nĩ atĩa ũguo maagĩkira ihooru o kahinda kanini! nĩ anine nĩ matebebia o kũninwo.
Psalms73:20 Ta kĩroto hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ aahindũka
Psalms73:21 Hĩndĩ ĩo ngoro yakwa ĩrathitĩte nĩ kĩeha
Psalms73:22 Ndĩraikarĩte ta ndĩ kĩnunwa
Psalms73:23 No kaĩ hingo ciothe tũrĩ o hamwe nawe-ĩ; nĩ kũ’nyita ũ’nyitĩte guoko kwa ũrĩo.
Psalms73:24 Ũrĩndongoragia na ũtaari waku
Psalms73:25 Nũ ũngĩ ndĩ nake kũu igũrũ? twĩ nawe-rĩ
Psalms73:26 Mwĩrĩ wakwa o na ngoro no kũhinyara
Psalms73:27 Amu-rĩ
Psalms73:28 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms74:1 Ĩ NGAI
Psalms74:2 Ta kĩririkane kĩũngano gĩaku
Psalms74:3 Kũũra magũrũ werekere mwanangĩko-inĩ ũrĩa ũtũire kuo
Psalms74:4 A-muku aku nĩmaararamaga o gĩtũngano-inĩ gĩaku gatagatĩ; marũũri mao ene nĩmo maahandire matuĩke atĩ nomo marũũri.
Psalms74:5 O
Psalms74:6 Rĩrĩ rĩngĩ wĩra ũrĩa mũrame wothe ũrĩa wĩ kuo makaũmomora na ngomi o na nyondo.
Psalms74:7 Nyũmba ĩo yaku nyamũre nĩmaamĩmundirie mwaki; nĩ gũthahia mathahĩtie gĩtũũro kĩa rĩĩtwa rĩaku nĩ kũmĩgũithia o thĩ.
Psalms74:8 Moigire atĩrĩ
Psalms74:9 Marũũri maitũ rĩu tũtimonaga: gũtitũire na mũnabii; o na thĩinĩ witũ gũtitũire wa kũmenya nĩ nginya rĩ.
Psalms74:10 Ĩ Ngai
Psalms74:11 Ũhetete guoko nĩkĩ
Psalms74:12 No ningĩ-rĩ
Psalms74:13 Wee-rĩ
Psalms74:14 Wee-rĩ
Psalms74:15 Wee-rĩ
Psalms74:16 Mũthenya nĩ waku
Psalms74:17 Wee-rĩ
Psalms74:18 Ta kĩririkane ũũ
Psalms74:19 Ndũgakĩnenganĩre muoyo wa gatutura gaka gaku harĩ nyamũ; tiga gũgĩtũũra ũriganĩirũo nĩ mĩoyo ya athĩnĩki aku o nginya tene.
Psalms74:20 Ta bara wega kĩrĩkanĩro
Psalms74:21 Ndũgakĩreke ũrĩa mũhinyĩrĩrie ahũndũke anyararĩkĩte; andũ arĩa athĩnĩki
Psalms74:22 Arahũka
Psalms74:23 Tiga gũkĩriganĩrũo nĩ mũgambo wa acio me muku nawe; ngũĩ ya acio magũũkĩrĩire-rĩ
Psalms75:1 NGAI
Psalms75:2 Ndakinyĩrĩra ihinda rĩrĩa rĩathe
Psalms75:3 Thĩ-rĩ
Psalms75:4 Arĩa erahi ndĩmeraga atĩrĩ
Psalms75:5 Tigai kwambararia hĩa cianyu na igũrũ; tigagai gũkĩaria mũũinĩtie ngingo.
Psalms75:6 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Psalms75:7 No rĩrĩ
Psalms75:8 Nĩ gũkorũo guoko kwa Jehova kũgwete gĩkombe
Psalms75:9 Ĩndĩ niĩ-rĩ
Psalms75:10 Nacio hĩa ciothe cia andũ arĩa aaganu nĩ kũrenga ngacirenga; no hĩa cia arĩa athingu-rĩ
Psalms76:1 THĨINĨ wa Juda
Psalms76:2 Nakĩo gĩthũnũ gĩake kĩa mwĩgunyĩ kĩrĩ o Salemu
Psalms76:3 Kũu nĩkuo oinangĩire mĩguĩ ya ũta; ngo
Psalms76:4 Wee-rĩ
Psalms76:5 Arĩa omĩrĩru ngoro nĩ acume
Psalms76:6 Tondũ wa kũrũithania gwaku
Psalms76:7 Wee
Psalms76:8 Nĩũratũmire ituĩro rĩiguwo riumĩte igũrũ; thĩ ĩrakĩmaka
Psalms76:9 Hĩndĩ ĩo Ngai ararũgamire ekĩre ituĩro
Psalms76:10 Marũrũ ma andũ-rĩ
Psalms76:11 Ĩhĩtei
Psalms76:12 We maroho ma atongoria nĩamatinagia: athamaki a thĩ-rĩ
Psalms77:1 NĨ NGAI ngũkaĩra
Psalms77:2 Mũthenya wa mĩnyamaro yakwa nĩ Mwathani ndakĩrongoririe; guoko gwakwa kwaraire kwarĩtwo na gũtiregere; ngoro yakwa ĩgakĩrega kũhorereka.
Psalms77:3 Ndenda kũririkana Ngai
Psalms77:4 Wee wagiragia imone cia maitho makwa ihingĩke; ndanyamarĩkaga o mũno ngakĩremwo nĩ kwaria.
Psalms77:5 Ngĩgĩtarania ũhoro wa matukũ marĩa mahĩtũku
Psalms77:6 Ngĩĩririkania ningĩ ũrĩa ndainaga ũtukũ
Psalms77:7 Ngĩkĩũria
Psalms77:8 Ũtugi wake nĩ mũhuku o kũhuka kinya tene na tene? uuge wake anga ũgũtũũra ũtahingĩte nginya njiarũa na njiarũa?
Psalms77:9 Mũrungu-rĩ
Psalms77:10 Ngĩya kuuga atĩrĩ
Psalms77:11 Kwĩririkania nĩngwĩririkania mawĩko ma Jehova; amu ngũkĩĩririkania maũndũ maku ma kĩgeganio marĩa wekaga tene.
Psalms77:12 Ngwĩrurumia ũhoro wa wĩra ũcio waku wothe
Psalms77:13 Njĩra ĩrĩa ũgeraga
Psalms77:14 Wee-rĩ
Psalms77:15 Guoko gwaku nĩ gũkũũra wakũũrire kĩrĩndĩ gĩaku nakuo
Psalms77:16 Maĩ ma iria-inĩ nĩmaakuonire
Psalms77:17 Matu namo magĩiturũra maĩ o boo! kũu igũrũ nĩ kũruruma kwarurumaga; mĩguĩ yaku nayo ĩkĩrathũkanga.
Psalms77:18 Mũgambo wa ngwa ciaku nĩ kĩhuhũkanio-inĩ wagambagĩra; heni igakĩmũrĩkaga mabũrũri; thĩ ĩkĩrika gũthingitha o na gũtetema ĩgagĩtetema.
Psalms77:19 Njĩra yaku nĩ iria-inĩ yagereire
Psalms77:20 Watongoririe kĩrĩndĩ gĩaku ta ũrĩa rũũru rũtongoragio
Psalms78:1 ATĨRĨRĨ
Psalms78:2 Ngũtumũra kanua njarie na ngerekano; njitũrũre thimo cia maũndũ ma tene
Psalms78:3 Marĩa twanaigua na tũkamamenya
Psalms78:4 Tũtingĩmahitha ciana ciao
Psalms78:5 Nĩ gũkorũo nĩ ũira aahandire harĩ mbarĩ ya Jakubu
Psalms78:6 Nĩguo rũciaro rũrĩa rũĩ thutha rũmamenye
Psalms78:7 Nĩ getha itue Ngai mwĩhoko wacio
Psalms78:8 Na itikahaane ta maithe ma cio
Psalms78:9 Ariũ a Efiraimu-rĩ
Psalms78:10 Matiarũmirie kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Ngai
Psalms78:11 Na nĩ kũriganĩrũo maariganĩirũo nĩ mĩĩkĩre yake
Psalms78:12 We nĩ maũndũ ma kĩgeganio ekire maitho-inĩ ma maithe mao
Psalms78:13 Nĩ gwatũrania aatũranirie iria
Psalms78:14 Ningĩ mũthenya nĩaamatongoragia na itu
Psalms78:15 Kũu werũ-inĩ nĩaatũranirie ndũmba cia mahiga
Psalms78:16 Rũaro rũa ihiga o naruo agĩtũma ruume ithima cia maĩ
Psalms78:17 Nao no gũkĩrĩrĩria o kũmwĩhia
Psalms78:18 Ningĩ ngoro-inĩ ciao makĩgeria Mũrungu nĩ gwĩtia irio nĩ ũndũ wa njeme ĩrĩa maarĩ nayo.
Psalms78:19 Ĩĩ-ni Ngai nĩ kwarĩrĩra maamwarĩrĩire; makĩũrania ũũ: Mũrungu-rĩ
Psalms78:20 Ndũmba ya ihiga
Psalms78:21 Jehova rĩrĩa aaiguire ũguo agĩtũkũya; mbarĩ ya Jakubu makĩgwatĩrio mwaki wa kũmehia
Psalms78:22 Nĩ ũndũ matietĩkirie Ngai
Psalms78:23 No we agĩatha kũrĩa matu-inĩ
Psalms78:24 Akĩmaitũrũrĩra mana ta mbura marĩe
Psalms78:25 Andũ magĩkĩrĩa irio o iria cia ihoti; nĩ rĩĩgu mũingĩ aamarehithĩirie
Psalms78:26 Aatũmire igũrũ gũũke rũhuho rũrĩa ruumaga na irathĩro
Psalms78:27 Akĩmaharũrũkĩria nyama nyingĩ ta rũkũngũ
Psalms78:28 Agĩcigũithangia gatagatĩ-inĩ ga kambĩ yao
Psalms78:29 Magĩkĩrĩa
Psalms78:30 O mataanakĩiguĩra njeme yao kĩnyiria
Psalms78:31 Marakara ma Ngai magĩtogororoka nĩ ũndũ wao
Psalms78:32 O na gũtuĩkĩte ũguo
Psalms78:33 Tondũ ũcio matukũ mao agĩtũma mathire o tũhũ
Psalms78:34 Rĩrĩa aamoraga-rĩ
Psalms78:35 Na makaririkana atĩ Ngai nĩwe ndũmba yao ya ihiga
Psalms78:36 No nĩ kũgathima maamũgathimagĩra kanua
Psalms78:37 Nĩ gũtuĩka ngoro ciao itiakindĩirie harĩ we
Psalms78:38 Nake-rĩ
Psalms78:39 Akaririkana atĩ o no mwĩrĩ o ũguo
Psalms78:40 Nĩ kaingĩ atĩa maamũng’athĩirie me kũu werũ-inĩ
Psalms78:41 No gũcoka maacokaga o kũgeria Mũrungu
Psalms78:42 Matiaririkanaga guoko gwake
Psalms78:43 Makĩririkane ũrĩa aaringire ciama ciake thĩinĩ wa bũrũri wa Misiri
Psalms78:44 Akĩgarũrania njũĩ cia ene-kuo igĩtuĩka thakame
Psalms78:45 Agĩtũma ngi kũrĩ o
Psalms78:46 Uumithio wao wa mĩgũnda naguo akĩũhe itono
Psalms78:47 Mĩthabibu yao akĩmĩanangithia mbura ya mbembe
Psalms78:48 Mahiũ mao o namo akĩmanenganĩra harĩ mbura ĩo ya mbembe
Psalms78:49 Agĩcoka akĩrekia marakara make marĩa maakanu mamagũĩre
Psalms78:50 Agĩkĩnyorokeria marakara macio make njĩra; agĩtiga kũriganĩrĩria ngoro ciao na gĩkuũ
Psalms78:51 Akĩringa marigithathi mothe ma andũ a Misiri
Psalms78:52 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ gĩake agĩkiumagaria ta ng’ondu
Psalms78:53 Akĩmatwara o megangarĩte
Psalms78:54 Akĩya gũkamakinyia rũtere-inĩ rũa kũndũ gwake kwamũre
Psalms78:55 Ningĩ akĩrutũrũra ndũrĩrĩ ithenge mbere yao
Psalms78:56 Ĩndĩ o
Psalms78:57 Nĩ gũcoka maacokire na thutha
Psalms78:58 Amu nĩmaamũthirĩkagia nĩ kũgĩa na marutĩro mao ma igongona matĩri-inĩ ma kũndũ gũtũũgĩru
Psalms78:59 Ũhoro ũcio Ngai nĩaaũiguire
Psalms78:60 Agĩthama gĩikaro gĩake kĩrĩa kĩarĩ Shilo
Psalms78:61 Akĩneana kĩrĩa kĩo hinya wake gĩtahwo
Psalms78:62 Kĩrĩndĩ gĩake nakĩo agĩkĩnenganĩra harĩ rũhiũ rũa njora; igai rĩu rĩake-rĩ
Psalms78:63 Aanake ao makĩrambio nĩ mwaki; airĩtu ao magikĩaga kũinagĩrũo rũĩmbo rũa ũhiki.
Psalms78:64 Athĩnjĩri-Ngai ao makĩirũrũo nĩ njomo
Psalms78:65 Hĩndĩ ĩo Mwathani akĩhindũka ta mũndũ uuma toro
Psalms78:66 Akĩhũra a-muku ake akĩmacokia na thutha; akĩmatua imene cia tene na tene.
Psalms78:67 Agĩcoka ningĩ akĩrega hema ya Jusufu
Psalms78:68 Agĩthura mũhĩrĩga wa Juda; nĩ kĩrĩma gĩa Zayuni aathurire
Psalms78:69 Agĩaka nyũmba yake nyamũre ĩhaana ta irĩma iria ndaya
Psalms78:70 Ningĩ agĩthura Daudi ndungata yake
Psalms78:71 Agĩkĩmũruta kũu aarũmagĩrĩra ng’ondu iria njiairĩ
Psalms78:72 Nake agĩtũũra amarĩithagia kũringana na wagĩrĩru wa ngoro yake; agĩkĩmerekagĩria na wara wa moko make.
Psalms79:1 Ĩ NGAI
Psalms79:2 Ciimba cia ndungata ciaku macitigĩire marera ma igũrũ
Psalms79:3 Maitangĩte thakame yao ta maĩ mbarĩ ciothe cia Jerusalemu
Psalms79:4 Nĩ gũtuĩka tũtuĩkĩte kĩmene harĩ arĩa tũhakaine nao
Psalms79:5 Ĩ Jehova
Psalms79:6 Itũrũrĩra ndũrĩrĩ marũrũ maku arĩ cio
Psalms79:7 Nĩ ũndũ Jakubu nĩ kũmũrambũra mamũrambũrĩte
Psalms79:8 Ndũgatũririkanĩre mawaganu ma maithe maitũ; ta tũtũngie matha maku na ihenya
Psalms79:9 Tũteithie
Psalms79:10 Nĩ kĩ kĩngĩgĩtũma andũ a ndũrĩrĩ moragie
Psalms79:11 Gũcaya kwa mũgwate-rĩ
Psalms79:12 Nao andũ acio tũhakaine nao
Psalms79:13 Weka ũguo-rĩ
Psalms80:1 WEE MŨRĨITHI wa Isiraeli-rĩ
Psalms80:2 Wĩ hau mbere ya Efiraimu na Benjamini na Manase-rĩ
Psalms80:3 Ngai
Psalms80:4 Ĩ Jehova
Psalms80:5 Ũtũire ũkĩheaga irio o cia maithori
Psalms80:6 Ũtũtuĩte kĩndũ gĩa kũrũagĩrũo nĩ arĩa tũhakaine nao; thũ ciitũ igagĩtũthekaga o gũtũtheka.
Psalms80:7 Wee Ngai mwene mbũtũ cia ita
Psalms80:8 Warehire mũthabibu ũrutĩte Misiri
Psalms80:9 Nĩwaũthereirie handũ
Psalms80:10 Irĩma nĩciahumbĩirũo nĩ kĩĩgunyĩ kĩaguo
Psalms80:11 Ũgĩtambia honge ciaguo kinya o iria-inĩ
Psalms80:12 Nĩ ũndũ kĩ ũkiunangĩte njirigo ciaguo
Psalms80:13 Ngũrũe ĩrĩa yumaga kĩrĩti nĩĩũgũmagia
Psalms80:14 Tũcokerere
Psalms80:15 O guo mũtĩ ũrĩa guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo kwahandire
Psalms80:16 Gũcinwo nĩ mũcine nĩ mwaki
Psalms80:17 Mũndũ ũcio wahandirũo nĩ guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo-rĩ
Psalms80:18 Na ithuĩ-rĩ
Psalms80:19 Jehova Ngai mwene mbũtũ cia ita
Psalms81:1 KŨNGŨIYAI Ngai na kayũ kanene
Psalms81:2 Arũkanai na thaburi
Psalms81:3 Huhai coro karũgamo ka mweri
Psalms81:4 Nĩ amu gĩathĩ kĩu nĩ mũtugo waathirũo Isiraeli
Psalms81:5 Nĩ gwathĩrĩria aagĩathĩrĩirie gĩtuĩke ũira kwa Jusufu
Psalms81:6 Atĩrĩrĩ
Psalms81:7 Wee-rĩ
Psalms81:8 Iguai
Psalms81:9 Gwaku menya gũkagĩa na ngai ng’eni; ngai yumĩte kũngĩ-rĩ
Psalms81:10 Nĩ niĩ Jehova Ngai waku
Psalms81:11 No rĩ’
Psalms81:12 Ngĩkĩmarekereria marũmĩrĩre ũremi wa ngoro ciao
Psalms81:13 Na arĩ korũo kĩrĩndĩ gĩakwa gĩetĩkĩra kũnjigua
Psalms81:14 Ndahoria thũ ciao o narua
Psalms81:15 Athũũri Jehova nĩ kwĩnyihĩrĩria mangĩĩnyihĩrĩria harĩ we: no-o

Psalms82:1 KĨŨNGANO-INĨ kĩa Mũrungu

Psalms82:3 Mũtithondekage ũhoro wa ũrĩa ũtarĩ na hinya
Psalms82:4 Tangagĩrai ũcio ũtarĩ na hinya

Psalms82:7 No rĩrĩ

Psalms83:1 Ĩ NGAI
Psalms83:2 Tondũ atĩrĩ
Psalms83:3 Kĩrĩndĩ gĩaku nĩmakĩgĩĩrĩire ndundu ya wara
Psalms83:4 Moigĩte atĩrĩ
Psalms83:5 Amu nĩ gũciranĩra maciranĩire na ngoro o ĩmwe; wee nĩwe maragĩa na kĩrĩkanĩro nĩ ũndũ waku;
Psalms83:6 A hema cia Edomu na cia Aishumaeli
Psalms83:7 A Gebali
Psalms83:8 A Ashuri o nao nĩmegwatanĩtie nao
Psalms83:9 Meke o ta ũrĩa wekire a Midiani; ta ũrĩa ningĩ wekire Sisera
Psalms83:10 O acio maaninĩirũo Eni-doru
Psalms83:11 Makang’ũ mao-rĩ
Psalms83:12 Nĩo moigire
Psalms83:13 Ĩ Ngai wakwa
Psalms83:14 Ta mwaki ũrahĩhia mũtitũ
Psalms83:15 Titimũrana nao o ro ũguo na kĩhuhũkanio gĩaku
Psalms83:16 Tũma mothiũ mao maiyũrũo nĩ thoni
Psalms83:17 Gũconoka nĩmaconoke
Psalms83:18 Nĩguo mamenye atĩ wee
Psalms84:1 Ĩ JEHOVA mwene mbũtũ cia ita
Psalms84:2 Roho wakwa wĩ na mĩĩto mũno
Psalms84:3 Kanyoni nĩ konu nyũmba
Psalms84:4 Gũkena nĩ arĩa maikaraga nyũmba yaku: o matirĩ hĩndĩ matarĩkũgoocaga.
Psalms84:5 Gũkena-rĩ
Psalms84:6 Rĩrĩa mekũhungura gĩtuamba kĩrĩa gĩa Kĩrĩro magĩtuaga kũndũ kwĩ na ithima; ĩĩ-ni
Psalms84:7 Mathiaga o makĩĩongagĩrĩra hinya
Psalms84:8 Ĩ Jehova
Psalms84:9 Ĩ Ngai
Psalms84:10 Amu mũthenya ũmwe ũtindĩtwo nja ciaku nĩ mwega kũrĩ ĩrĩa ĩngĩ o na ĩngĩrĩ ngiri. Ndenda kaba ndũgamage hingĩro-inĩ cia nyũmba ya Ngai wakwa
Psalms84:11 Nĩ ũndũ Jehova Ngai nĩ riũa
Psalms84:12 Ĩ Jehova mwene mbũtũ cia ita
Psalms85:1 Ĩ JEHOVA
Psalms85:2 Kuohera nĩwoheire kĩrĩndĩ gĩaku waganu wakĩo
Psalms85:3 Matũkũya maku nĩ gũthengia wamathengetie mothe
Psalms85:4 Gĩtũcokererie
Psalms85:5 Kaĩ ũgũtũũra ũtũrakarĩire o kinya tene? nĩ gũtambia ũgũtambia marakara maku nginya njiarũa na njiarũa?
Psalms85:6 Githĩ wee ndũngĩĩtĩkĩra gũcoka kũrurumũkia ngoro ciitũ
Psalms85:7 Tuonie ũtugi waku
Psalms85:8 Nĩngũthikĩrĩria njigue ũrĩa Mũrungu
Psalms85:9 Gũtirĩ nganja ũhonokania wake ũikaraga hakuhĩ na arĩa amwĩtigĩri
Psalms85:10 Ũtugi na ũhoro-wa-ma ituĩke nĩicemainie
Psalms85:11 Ũhoro-wa-ma ũtuĩke nĩũramera ũgĩkunũkaga thĩ
Psalms85:12 Ĩĩ-ni
Psalms85:13 Ũthingu-rĩ
Psalms86:1 TA INAMĨRĨRIA gũtũ gwaku

Psalms86:3 Kĩnginyĩrie wega waku
Psalms86:4 Ndungata yaku gĩkenie ngoro yayo
Psalms86:5 Nĩ gũkorũo wee
Psalms86:6 Jehova
Psalms86:7 Mũthenya wa mĩnyamaro yakwa nowe ngũgĩkaĩra
Psalms86:8 Gatagatĩ-inĩ ka ngai iria ii kuo-rĩ
Psalms86:9 Ndũrĩrĩ ciothe iria wombire nĩigoka igũthathaiye ii mbere-inĩ yaku
Psalms86:10 Amu wee wĩ mũnene
Psalms86:11 Nyonagĩrĩria njĩra yaku
Psalms86:12 Nĩ ngatho ndĩrĩgũcokagĩria na ngoro yakwa yothe
Psalms86:13 Nĩ gũkorũo gũtuga kũrĩa ũndugaga nĩ kũnene ma; wee nĩũteithũrĩte muoyo wakwa kwa ngoma o kũu kũrĩ thĩ mũno.
Psalms86:14 Ĩ Ngai
Psalms86:15 No wee
Psalms86:16 Ta kĩĩ’hũgũrĩre
Psalms86:17 Nyonia kĩmenyithia kĩa wega waku
Psalms87:1 IRĨMA-INĨ iria nyamũre nĩkuo kĩea gĩake kĩrĩ.
Psalms87:2 Jehova nĩenda ihingo cia Zayuni gũkĩra itũũro cia Jakubu ciothe.
Psalms87:3 Nĩ maũndũ ma riri mũno moigagwo nĩ ũndũ waku
Psalms87:4 Nĩngagwetanĩria Rahabu o na Babuloni hamwe na arĩa manjũĩ: rorai Filisitia
Psalms87:5 Ĩĩ-ni
Psalms87:6 Jehova
Psalms87:7 Ningĩ aini
Psalms88:1 Ĩ JEHOVA
Psalms88:2 Ihoya rĩakwa ta reke rĩgĩtonye hau ũrĩ; inamĩrĩria gũtũ ũigue kayũ gakwa.
Psalms88:3 Nĩ gũkorũo ngoro yakwa nĩ kũhũna ĩhũniĩ maũũru marĩa nyonete
Psalms88:4 Ndaranĩirio na arĩa matonyaga irima; ndariĩ ta mũndũ ũtangĩona wa kũmũtangĩra;
Psalms88:5 Ngaikanio harĩ arĩa akuũ
Psalms88:6 Ũngometie thĩinĩ wa irima
Psalms88:7 Ndĩ mũmamĩre mũno nĩ marũrũ maku
Psalms88:8 Andũ arĩa tũmenyaine ũndigithanĩtie nao o kũnene; ũtũmĩte nduĩke kĩndũ kĩĩ magigi harĩ o; ndĩ mũhingĩrĩrie
Psalms88:9 Riitho rĩakwa nĩ ithirĩrĩkĩru tondũ wa ũrĩa ndandiũkĩte: ndirĩ mũthenya itagũkayagĩra
Psalms88:10 Andũ arĩa akuũ-rĩ
Psalms88:11 Ũhoro wa ũtugi waku nĩũngĩkĩhunjĩka thĩinĩ wa mbĩrĩra? kana kwĩhokeka gwaku kũganĩke kũu Mũũrĩro-inĩ?
Psalms88:12 Kũu nduma-inĩ-rĩ
Psalms88:13 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms88:14 Ngoro yakwa ũmĩikanĩtie nĩkĩ
Psalms88:15 Kuuma ndĩ o mũnyinyi ndũire o ’thĩnĩkĩte na ngakuhĩrĩria gũtumbũka; ndũire ndĩĩtiirĩtie matebebia maku o nginya ngenda kũhũgũya.
Psalms88:16 Kũbucuna gwaku nĩ kũ’hubĩkania kũ’hubĩkanĩtie; matua-nda maku nĩma’ninĩte o kũ’nina.
Psalms88:17 ’Thiũrũrũkagĩrio nĩmo mũthenya wothe o ta maĩ; nĩ kũ’hĩtĩrĩra ma’hĩtĩrĩire mothe o hamwe.
Psalms88:18 Andũ arĩa anyendi o na arata nĩũtũtigithanĩtie nao o kũraya; nduma noyo thiritũ yakwa.
Psalms89:1 MOTUGI ma Jehova ngũtũũra ndĩmainagĩra o nginya tene
Psalms89:2 Nĩ amu njugĩte atĩrĩ
Psalms89:3 Niĩ-rĩ
Psalms89:4 Mbeũ yaku ngũmĩtũũria ĩĩ nũmu o nginya tene na tene
Psalms89:5 Narĩo igũrũ nĩrĩgathagĩrĩria maũndũ maku ũrĩa me kĩgeganio
Psalms89:6 Nĩ amu kũu matu-inĩ nũ ũngĩgerekanĩka na Jehova? nũ ũkĩhaana ta Jehova kũu thĩinĩ wa ariũ a Mũrungu
Psalms89:7 Akĩrĩ we Mũrungu ũrĩ itua-nda mũno arĩ ndundu-inĩ ya acio atheru
Psalms89:8 Ĩ Jehova Ngai mwene mbũtũ cia ita
Psalms89:9 Wee-rĩ
Psalms89:10 Wee-rĩ
Psalms89:11 Igũrũ nĩ rĩaku
Psalms89:12 Gĩturi gĩa gathigathini o na gĩa gũthini nĩwe watũmire kũgĩe; Taboru na Herimoni nĩikũngũyagia nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩaku.
Psalms89:13 Gĩcoka gĩaku nĩ kĩrĩa kĩrĩ ũhoti; guoko gwaku-rĩ
Psalms89:14 Ũthingu o na kĩhooto nĩcio gĩtina gĩa gĩtĩ gĩaku kĩa ũnene
Psalms89:15 Gũkena-rĩ
Psalms89:16 Gĩtindaga gĩcanjamũkĩte mũthenya wothe nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩu rĩaku
Psalms89:17 Nĩ gũkorũo wee nowe igema rĩa hinya wakĩo
Psalms89:18 Nĩ gũkorũo ngo iitũ mwene yo nĩ Jehova; mũthamaki witũ nĩ wa Ũrĩa Mũtheru wa Isiraeli.
Psalms89:19 Hĩndĩ o ĩo nĩwaarĩirie acio maarĩ ũiguano nawe na njĩra ya kĩoneki
Psalms89:20 Nĩndĩĩoneire Daudi ndungata yakwa
Psalms89:21 Nĩwe guoko gwakwa kũrĩikaraga harĩ we kũmũrũmagie
Psalms89:22 Thũ gũtirĩ ĩkamwĩka naĩ; mwana wa ũgenyũ-rĩ
Psalms89:23 Arĩa me muku nake nĩndĩĩthiaga ngĩmathetherangaga magagĩthenga mbere yake
Psalms89:24 Nake-rĩ
Psalms89:25 Na nĩngaigĩrĩra guoko gwake iria-inĩ rĩrĩa inene
Psalms89:26 We arĩĩtanaga na kũrĩ niĩ ta uũ: Wee nĩwe awa
Psalms89:27 Niĩ na niĩ ndĩmũtue mwana wakwa wa irigithathi
Psalms89:28 Ũtugi wakwa ngũtũũra ndĩmũrũmĩirie kinya o tene na tene
Psalms89:29 Mbeũ yake nayo nĩngatũma ĩtũũre nginya hingo itagathira
Psalms89:30 Ciana ciake ingĩgatigana na kĩrĩra gĩakwa
Psalms89:31 Ingĩgathahia mĩtugo yakwa ĩrĩa nduĩte
Psalms89:32 Hĩndĩ ĩo nĩngaciherithia na rũthanju nĩ ũndũ wa ũremi wacio
Psalms89:33 No rĩrĩ
Psalms89:34 Niĩ kĩrĩkanĩro gĩakwa ndigagĩthũkia
Psalms89:35 Ũndũ ũyũ nĩndĩĩhĩtĩte na ndingĩũcoka
Psalms89:36 Mbeũ yake ĩgũtũũra o nginya tene na tene
Psalms89:37 Gĩgũtũũra kĩrũmĩtio kinya tene o ta mweri
Psalms89:38 No rĩrĩ
Psalms89:39 Kĩrĩkanĩro kĩu kĩrĩkanĩre na ndungata yaku nĩ gwĩthamba ũgĩĩthambĩte; gũthahia nĩũthahĩtie thũmbĩ yake ya ũnene nĩ kũmĩgũithia o thĩ.
Psalms89:40 Njirigo ciake ciothe nĩũcimomorete; ihingo ciake iria njirige mũno ũtũmĩte ituĩke o mĩomokanĩro.
Psalms89:41 Arĩa othe ehĩtũkĩri na njĩra nĩ kũmũthara mamũtharaga; atuĩkĩte o kĩmene harĩ arĩa mahakaine nao.
Psalms89:42 Nĩũtũũgĩrĩtie guoko kwa ũrĩo kwa arĩa me muku nake; ũtũmĩte thũ ciake ciothe ikene.
Psalms89:43 Ĩĩ-ni
Psalms89:44 Ũkengi wake nĩũũninĩte ũgathira
Psalms89:45 Nĩũkuhĩhĩtie matukũ ma ũnyinyi wake; nĩ kũmũhumba ũmũhumbĩte o thoni.
Psalms89:46 Ĩ Jehova
Psalms89:47 Ta ririkana ũrĩa ndĩ wa ihinda inyinyi: ciana ciothe cia kĩrĩndĩ
Psalms89:48 Nĩ mũndũ ũrĩkũ ũgatũũra o gũtũũra na ndonane na gĩkuũ? nĩ ta ũrĩkũ ũngĩĩhatũra muoyo harĩ hinya wa kwa-ngoma?
Psalms89:49 Motugi maku marĩa ma tene maagĩire kũ
Psalms89:50 Ririkana
Psalms89:51 Marĩa thũ ciaku cianacukana namo
Psalms89:52 Jehova arogathagwo tene o na tene. Amen
Psalms90:1 MWATHANI
Psalms90:2 O mbere irĩma itaanaciarũo
Psalms90:3 Ũhũndũraga andũ magacoka gũtuĩka mũthegethege; ũkoiga
Psalms90:4 Amu harĩ wee
Psalms90:5 Ũmahaatũrũragia ta megũtwarũo nĩ mbura ya kĩboboto makahaana ta maakoma: rũcinĩ makoragwo matariĩ ta nyeki ĩrĩa ĩraringũra;
Psalms90:6 Rũcinĩ-rĩ
Psalms90:7 Amu ithuĩ nĩ gũthira tũrathira nĩ marakara maku
Psalms90:8 Mawaganu maitũ wee nĩũmaigĩte o mbere-inĩ yaku
Psalms90:9 Nĩ amu

Psalms90:12 Gĩtũmenyithie gũtara matukũ maitũ nĩ getha tũgĩe na ngoro cia kũũhĩga.
Psalms90:13 Garũrũka
Psalms90:14 Rũcinĩ ũroke gũtũhũnia ũtugi waku; nĩguo tũtũũre tũkũngũyagia o tũgĩkenaga matukũ maitũ mothe.
Psalms90:15 Tũkenie matukũ maiganaine na marĩa ũtuonetie thĩna
Psalms90:16 Wĩko waku ũroonwo kũrĩ ndungata ciaku
Psalms90:17 Wega wa Mwathani Ngai witũ ũrokĩgĩa igũrũ riitũ: wĩra wa moko maitũ naguo
Psalms91:1 ŨRĨA ũtũire ahithĩtwo ũhitho-inĩ wa Ũrĩa-wĩ-Igũrũ-Mũno arĩikaraga kĩĩgunyĩ-inĩ kĩa Mwene-Hinya.
Psalms91:2 Ngũkiuga atĩrĩ

Psalms91:4 Arĩkũgitagĩra na njoya ciake cia mĩhĩko

Psalms95:1 ŨKANI

Psalms95:4 Thĩ thĩinĩ kũrĩa kũriku kũrĩ o rũhĩ-inĩ rũake
Psalms95:5 Iria nĩ rĩake
Psalms95:6 Gĩũkeni
Psalms95:7 Nĩ gũkorũo we nĩwe Ngai witũ
Psalms95:8 Tigai kũũmia ngoro cianyu
Psalms95:9 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maithe manyu maangeririe

Psalms96:1 Ĩ ITĨKAI kũinĩra Jehova rũĩmbo rũerũ! mũinĩre Jehova
Psalms96:2 Inĩrai Jehova
Psalms96:3 Ganai ũhoro wa riri wake ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ
Psalms96:4 Nĩ ũndũ Jehova nĩ mũnene
Psalms96:5 Thima-rĩ
Psalms96:6 Mbere-inĩ yake hatũũraga ũtĩĩku o na ũkaru; kũu gwake kwamũre gũgagĩtũũra hinya o na ũthaka.
Psalms96:7 Rahai Jehova
Psalms96:8 Rahai Jehova nĩ kũgwetaga riri wa rĩĩtwa rĩake: ũkai na ihaki
Psalms96:9 Ĩ gĩthathaiyei Jehova mũgemete ũgemu ũrĩa wa ũtheru; tetemekai mwĩ mbere yake
Psalms96:10 Ugai ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ atĩrĩ
Psalms96:11 Igũrũ ta nĩrĩkene
Psalms96:12 Werũ-inĩ nakuo nĩgũkenũrũrũke
Psalms96:13 Nĩgwĩkwo ũguo mbere-inĩ ya Jehova
Psalms97:1 NĨ HĨNDĨ Jehova agwatĩte gũthamaka; thĩ ta nĩĩcanjamũke; mabũrũri marĩa ma iria-inĩ o namo nĩmagĩkene o ũguo maingĩhĩte.
Psalms97:2 Matu o na nduma nĩcio imũthiũrũrũkĩirie; gĩtĩ gĩake kĩa ũnene
Psalms97:3 Kwĩ mwaki ũmũthiaga mbere
Psalms97:4 Heni ciake nĩciamũrĩkire mabũrũri
Psalms97:5 Ithuri nĩciaringũkire o ta mũhũra mbere ya Jehova
Psalms97:6 Igũrũ nĩrĩraanĩrĩra ũthingu wake
Psalms97:7 Arĩa othe matungatagĩra mĩhianano mĩacũhie-rĩ
Psalms97:8 A Zayuni nĩmaaiguire
Psalms97:9 Nĩ gũkorũo wee
Psalms97:10 Inyuĩ endi Jehova
Psalms97:11 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu nĩahurĩirũo ũtheri
Psalms97:12 No gĩkenerei Jehova
Psalms98:1 Ĩ KĨARŨKEI kũinĩra Jehova rũĩmbo rũerũ
Psalms98:2 Jehova nĩatũmĩte ũhonokania wake ũmenyeke wega; ũthingu wake nĩaũguũrĩirie maitho-inĩ ma ndũrĩrĩ.
Psalms98:3 Kũririkana nĩakĩririkanĩte ũtugi wake o na wĩhokeku wake
Psalms98:4 Inyuĩ andũ othe a thĩ
Psalms98:5 Inĩrai Jehova mũkĩmũgoocaga na inanda cia mũgeto; inanda-ni
Psalms98:6 Inai na tũrumbeta
Psalms98:7 Iria rĩrĩa inene nĩrĩrurume
Psalms98:8 Njũĩ nacio nĩikĩhũre hĩ
Psalms98:9 Nĩgwĩkwo ũguo mbere-inĩ ya Jehova
Psalms99:1 JEHOVA nĩ hĩndĩ agwatĩte gũthamaka; irĩndĩ cia thĩ nĩikĩinaine: gũikarĩra aikarĩire makerubi; thĩ nĩĩteteme.
Psalms99:2 Jehova gwake Zayuni nĩ mũnene
Psalms99:3 Andũ ta nĩmacokerie rĩĩtwa rĩaku ngatho
Psalms99:4 Hinya wa mũthamaki ũyũ ningĩ nĩwenda ũciranĩri ũrĩa wa kĩhooto; wee-rĩ
Psalms99:5 Tũũgĩriai Jehova Ngai witũ
Psalms99:6 Athĩnjĩri-inĩ ake kwĩ Musa na Haruni
Psalms99:7 Aamaaragĩria arĩ thĩinĩ wa mũthũrũriga wa itu
Psalms99:8 Wee
Psalms99:9 Gĩtũũgĩriei Jehova Ngai witũ
Psalms100:1 ANĨRĨRAI Jehova na gĩkeno
Psalms100:2 Tungatĩrai Jehova mũkenete; ũkai mbere-inĩ yake mũgĩkũnguyagia.
Psalms100:3 Menyai atĩ we Jehova nĩwe Ngai: nĩwe watũũmbire
Psalms100:4 Tonyerai ihingo ciake mwĩ na ngatho
Psalms100:5 Nĩ gũkorũo Jehova nĩ mwega; ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene
Psalms101:1 NĨNGŨINA ũhoro wa ũtugi
Psalms101:2 Niĩ ngũtũũra na mĩthiĩre ya ũũgĩ ũrĩa wa ma
Psalms101:3 Ũndũ wa ũgenyũ gũtirĩ ngaiga maitho-inĩ makwa o na ũrĩkũ; ciĩko cia arĩa mehũkaga nĩ gũthũũra ndĩcithũire; ndingĩĩtĩkĩra ikeĩngwatĩrĩra.
Psalms101:4 Ngoro hotomu no mũhaka ĩnjeherere; ũũru-rĩ

Psalms102:1 IGUA kũhoya gwakwa
Psalms102:2 Ndũkeĩ’hithĩre ũthiũ mũthenya ũrĩa ndanyamarĩka; inamĩrĩria gũtũ ũnjigue; mũthenya ũrĩa ndakaya-rĩ
Psalms102:3 Nĩ amu matukũ makwa nĩmarathirĩrĩkĩra ta ndogo
Psalms102:4 Ngoro yakwa nĩ kũringĩka ĩringĩkĩte ta nyeki
Psalms102:5 Tondũ wa mũcayo ũrĩa njayaga mahĩndĩ makwa nĩmagwatanĩte na nyama.
Psalms102:6 ’Huana o ta gakuua-ũrogi karĩa ka werũ-inĩ; nduĩkĩte ta ndundu
Psalms102:7 Ndaaraga itahingĩte riitho
Psalms102:8 Thũ ciakwa itindaga mũthenya wothe o igĩ’thirĩkia; acio mangũrũkĩire-rĩ
Psalms102:9 Nĩ gũkorũo ndĩaga mũhu o ta arĩ irio
Psalms102:10 Nĩ ũndũ wa mang’ũrĩka maku na gũthũgũta kũu ũ’thũgũtĩire: nĩ amu ũnjoete na igũrũ ũkandungumania na thĩ.
Psalms102:11 Matukũ makwa mahaanĩte ta kĩĩruru rĩrĩa kĩratambũrũka gĩcoke kĩbuĩrie; nĩ kũhoha ndĩrahoha ta nyeki.
Psalms102:12 No rĩrĩ
Psalms102:13 We nĩũkaarahũka ũiguĩre Zayuni tha
Psalms102:14 Amu mahiga marĩa makuo
Psalms102:15 Nĩrĩo ndũrĩrĩ igetigĩra rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova
Psalms102:16 Nĩ tondũ Jehova agakorũo acokete gwaka Zayuni
Psalms102:17 Agakorũo etĩkĩrĩte mahoya ma ũrĩa ũtigĩtwo e mwagi
Psalms102:18 Ũhoro ũcio no nginya wandĩkwo nĩ ũndũ wa rũciaro rũrĩa rũĩ thutha
Psalms102:19 Nĩ tondũ nĩaaikirie maitho thĩ e kũu gwake gũtheru; e kũu igũrũ-rĩ
Psalms102:20 Atĩ aigue gũcaya kwa mũgwate
Psalms102:21 Nĩguo andũ maganage rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova Zayuni
Psalms102:22 Rĩrĩa irĩndĩ cia thĩ igakorũo ciũnganĩte
Psalms102:23 Niĩ hinya wakwa nĩaũnyihĩtie ndĩ njĩra
Psalms102:24 Ngakiuga atĩrĩ
Psalms102:25 Tene tene nĩwe waarire gĩtina gĩa thĩ
Psalms102:26 Icio no gũthira igathira
Psalms102:27 Ĩndĩ wee-rĩ
Psalms102:28 Ciana cia ndungata ciaku nĩ gũtũũra igagĩtũũra
Psalms103:1 NGORO yakwa
Psalms103:2 Ngoro yakwa
Psalms103:3 Arĩ we ũkuohagĩra waganu waku wothe; ndũari ciaku ciothe o nacio nowe mũkũhonia;
Psalms103:4 O we mũkũũri muoyo waku harĩ irima rĩa gĩkuũ
Psalms103:5 Ningĩ nowe ũrĩa ũhũnagia kanua gaku hũni ya wega
Psalms103:6 Jehova-rĩ
Psalms103:7 Mĩthiĩre ĩo yake nĩaamenyithirie Musa
Psalms103:8 Jehova nĩ wa matha maingĩ na nĩ muuma-andũ mũno; ndahiũhaga kũrakara
Psalms103:9 Ndangĩikara o acirithanagia hĩndĩ ciothe
Psalms103:10 Ndatwĩkĩte ta ũrĩa mahĩtia maitũ maagĩrĩirũo
Psalms103:11 Nĩ amu-rĩ
Psalms103:12 O ta ũrĩa irathĩro kũraihanĩrĩirie na ithũĩro
Psalms103:13 O ũrĩa mũthuri aiguagĩra ciana ciake tha
Psalms103:14 Nĩ gũkorũo we nĩoĩ ũũmbe ũrĩa twombirũo; nĩaririkanaga atĩ ithuĩ tũrĩ o rũkũngũ.
Psalms103:15 Mũndũ-rĩ
Psalms103:16 Amu kĩhũragwo nĩ rũhuho
Psalms103:17 No rĩrĩ
Psalms103:18 Arĩa marũmagia kĩrĩkanĩro gĩake
Psalms103:19 Jehova ahandĩte gĩtĩ gĩake kĩa ũnene kũrĩa igũrũ; ũthamaki wake wathaga maũndũ mothe.

Psalms104:1 NGORO yakwa
Psalms104:2 Ũtũire wĩhumbĩte ũtheri ta nguo; wee nĩwe ũtambũrũkĩtie igũrũ ta kĩandarũa.
Psalms104:3 Nowe ũrĩa ũigĩrĩire mĩgamba ĩrĩa yakĩrĩirũo nyũmba ciake cia ngoroba igũrũ rĩa maĩ; nowe ũrĩa ũtuaga matu ngari yake ya kũmũkuua; nowe ũrĩa ũthiaga agĩtwaragwo nĩ mathagu ma rũhuho;
Psalms104:4 O ũrĩa ningĩ ũtũmaga huho ituĩke arekio ake
Psalms104:5 Thĩ-rĩ
Psalms104:6 Wamĩhumbĩrire iria rĩrĩa inene ta arĩ itonyo
Psalms104:7 Ningĩ wamakũma makĩũra
Psalms104:8 (Irĩma ikiumĩra
Psalms104:9 Wamekĩrĩire mũhaka ũrĩa matangĩagarara
Psalms104:10 Nĩwe ũrĩa ũtherũkagia ithima cianda-inĩ
Psalms104:11 Nĩcio inyuagwo nĩ ndaara-gĩthaka o yothe; nĩho njagĩ ciĩnyotoragĩra.
Psalms104:12 Kũu ngurumo-inĩ ciacio nĩkuo nyoni cia rĩera-inĩ itũũraga
Psalms104:13 Aitagĩrĩria irĩma maĩ moimĩte ciũmba-inĩ ciake iria cia igũrũ: wee-rĩ
Psalms104:14 Nĩwe ũtũmaga nyeki ĩringũre ya kũrĩo nĩ mahiũ
Psalms104:15 O na ndibei

Psalms104:17 Thĩinĩ wayo nĩkuo nyoni ciaraga itara ciacio
Psalms104:18 Irĩma iria ndaya nĩkuo gwa tũbũri twa werũ; ndwaro-inĩ cia mahiga-rĩ
Psalms104:19 Mweri-rĩ
Psalms104:20 Wee ũtũmaga kũgĩe nduma

Psalms104:24 Ĩ Jehova

Psalms104:26 Nĩkuo marikabu ithiagĩra; nyamũ ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo rĩwiathani nĩkuo ĩrĩ
Psalms104:27 Icio ciothe nowe iroragĩrĩria
Psalms104:28 O kĩrĩa wacihe nĩkĩo cioyaga; ũkumbatũragia guoko

Psalms104:30 Gũtũma ũtũmaga roho waku
Psalms104:31 Riri wa Jehova ũrotũũra tene o na tene; Jehova arokenagĩra mawĩra marĩa arutĩte
Psalms104:32 O we ũcio ũringagia thĩ riitho

Psalms105:7 We Jehova-rĩ
Psalms105:8 Kĩrĩkanĩro gĩake nĩakĩririkanaga nginya tene na tene
Psalms105:9 O kĩo kĩrĩkanĩro kĩrĩa aarĩkanĩire na Iburahimu
Psalms105:10 Agĩcoka agĩkĩrũmia harĩ Jakubu
Psalms105:11 Akiuga

Psalms105:17 Na nĩaatũmĩte mũndũ aambe athiĩ mbere yao; we Jusufu-rĩ

Psalms105:19 O nginya uuge wake ũgĩgakinyĩrĩra

Psalms105:21 Agĩcoka akĩmũtua wa gwathaga mũciĩ wake

Psalms105:23 Isiraeli nake agĩgĩkinya Misiri
Psalms105:24 Kĩrĩndĩ kĩu gĩake Jehova agĩtũma gĩciare mũno
Psalms105:25 Acio nĩaagarũrire ngoro ciao nĩguo mathũũre kĩrĩndĩ gĩake
Psalms105:26 Agĩgĩtũma Musa

Psalms105:29 Maĩ ma kwao nĩ kũgarũra aagarũrire ũrĩa maahaanaga magĩtuĩka thakame
Psalms105:30 Bũrũri wao ũgĩcoka ũkĩhunja ciũra o kũhunja
Psalms105:31 Kwaria akĩaria
Psalms105:32 Ningĩ handũ ha mbura ya ndũire
Psalms105:33 Agĩkĩhũra mĩthabibu yao o na mĩkũyũ yao ya kũrĩyo; akiunanga mĩtĩ ĩrĩa yarĩ kũu kwao o nginya ndere.
Psalms105:34 Kwaria akĩaria
Psalms105:35 Ikĩrĩa ihuti o rĩothe rĩrĩa rĩarĩ thĩ ĩo yao
Psalms105:36 Ningĩ akĩringa marigithathi mothe ma thĩ yao akĩmoraga
Psalms105:37 Agĩkĩya kũmaruta kuo marĩ na betha na thahabu
Psalms105:38 Misiri nĩ gũkenwo gwakenirũo moima kuo
Psalms105:39 Nĩ gũtambũrũkia aamatambũrũkĩirie itu rĩmathiĩkagĩrĩrie
Psalms105:40 Magĩĩtia

Psalms105:43 Akĩruta kĩrĩndĩ gĩake kũu kĩĩ na gĩkeno
Psalms105:44 Akĩmahe mabũrũri ma ndũrĩrĩ; indo iria cianogeirũo nĩ irĩndĩ icio magĩkĩĩgĩĩra nacio:
Psalms105:45 Na nĩ getha matũũre marũmĩtie mĩtugo ĩrĩa aatuanĩire

Psalms106:3 Gũkena-rĩ
Psalms106:4 Ĩ Jehova
Psalms106:5 Nĩ getha nduĩke wa gũkona athurũo aku magaacĩire
Psalms106:6 Ithuĩ nĩtũhĩtĩtie o ũndũ ũmwe na maithe maitũ
Psalms106:7 Maithe maitũ matiarũmbũirie maũndũ maku ma magegania marĩa wekĩte me Misiri; matiaririkanaga ũrĩa ũtugi waku waingĩhĩte; no nĩ kũhanda maahandire rũng’athio me rũtere rũa iria
Psalms106:8 No we
Psalms106:9 Agĩgĩkũma Iria Itune
Psalms106:10 Akĩmahonokia guoko-inĩ kwa ũrĩa mũmathũũri
Psalms106:11 Namo maĩ makihuba acio maarĩ muku nao; gũtirĩ o na ũmwe watigarire.
Psalms106:12 Hĩndĩ ĩo magĩĩtĩkia uuge ũrĩa wake
Psalms106:13 No rĩrĩ
Psalms106:14 No gũitĩka maaitĩkire kũgĩa na thuti me kũrĩa werũ-inĩ
Psalms106:15 Nake akĩmahe kĩrĩa maamwĩtagia; no ngoro ciao
Psalms106:16 Ningĩ makĩiguĩra Musa ũiru maikaire kũu iraaro-inĩ
Psalms106:17 Thĩ ĩgĩkĩemũka ĩkĩmerũkia Dathani
Psalms106:18 Na gĩkundi-inĩ kĩao hagĩakana mwaki
Psalms106:19 Marĩ Horebu nĩ gũthondeka maathondekire gĩcaũ
Psalms106:20 Magĩgĩkũũrania riri ũrĩa wao na kĩndũ gĩtuĩtwo ta ng’ombe ĩrĩaga nyeki.
Psalms106:21 Makĩriganĩrũo nĩ Mũrungu mũhonokia wao
Psalms106:22 Ageka mawĩko ma magegania thĩ ĩo ya Hamu
Psalms106:23 We agĩkiuga atĩ nĩekũmanina
Psalms106:24 Bũrũri ũrĩa wa kwendeka mũno
Psalms106:25 Magĩgĩikara makĩng’ong’oraga me thĩinĩ wa hema ciao
Psalms106:26 Tondũ ũcio akĩmoera guoko na igũrũ
Psalms106:27 Na mbeũ yao amĩhurunje ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ
Psalms106:28 Ningĩ nĩmegwatanirie na Baali-Peoru
Psalms106:29 Magĩgĩtũma athirĩke nĩ maũndũ mao; makĩya kũharũkĩrũo nĩ mũmitũko.
Psalms106:30 Hĩndĩ ĩo gũkĩrũgama Finehasi
Psalms106:31 Ũndũ ũcio akĩĩrũo nĩ ũthingu ekĩte
Psalms106:32 Na ningĩ makĩmũrakarĩria maĩ-inĩ ma Meriba
Psalms106:33 Nĩ gũtuĩka nĩmaang’athĩirie Roho wake
Psalms106:34 Ningĩ matiigana kũnina irĩndĩ cia bũrũri ta ũrĩa merĩtwo nĩ Jehova;
Psalms106:35 No rĩ’
Psalms106:36 Magĩtuĩka a gũtungatĩra mĩhianano ĩrĩa yacio
Psalms106:37 Ĩĩ-ni
Psalms106:38 Magagĩita thakame ĩrĩa ĩtehĩtie
Psalms106:39 Ũguo nĩguo methũkirie na ciĩko icio ciao
Psalms106:40 Marakara ma Jehova magĩgĩakanĩra kĩrĩndĩ gĩake
Psalms106:41 Akĩmaneana moko-inĩ ma ndũrĩrĩ
Psalms106:42 Thũ icio ciao igĩikara o imakũrĩire
Psalms106:43 Mahinda nĩ maingĩ aamateithũrire
Psalms106:44 No we nĩaaroragĩrĩria mĩnyamaro yao
Psalms106:45 Akaririkana kĩrĩkanĩro gĩake nĩ ũndũ wao
Psalms106:46 Na nĩaatũmaga matuĩke a kũiguĩrũo nĩ arĩa othe maamatahĩte makamatua mĩgwate.
Psalms106:47 Tũhonokie
Psalms106:48 Jehova arogathagwo
Psalms107:1 Ĩ GĨCOKERIEI Jehova ngatho
Psalms107:2 Arĩa akũũre nĩ Jehova nĩmakiuge ũguo
Psalms107:3 Agakĩmongania amarutĩte mabũrũri-inĩ
Psalms107:4 Kũrĩ maakorirũo makĩũrũra werũ-inĩ
Psalms107:5 Tondũ wa ũrĩa maarĩ ahũtu na makanyota
Psalms107:6 Magĩgĩkaĩra Jehova tondũ wa ũrĩa mathĩnĩkĩte
Psalms107:7 Akĩmatwara o na njĩra nũngarũ
Psalms107:8 O
Psalms107:9 Nĩ amu ngoro ĩrĩa ĩĩ na nyota nĩamĩhũnagia
Psalms107:10 Kũrĩ maaikaire nduma-inĩ
Psalms107:11 Nĩ ũndũ nĩmaang’athĩirie ndeto cia Mũrungu
Psalms107:12 Agĩkĩhoria ngoro ciao na mĩnoga ya wĩra
Psalms107:13 Magĩgĩkaĩra Jehova tondũ wa ũrĩa mathĩnĩkĩte
Psalms107:14 Nĩ kũruta aamarutire nduma-inĩ
Psalms107:15 O
Psalms107:16 Nĩ amu mĩrango ĩrĩa ya rũthuku nĩamĩthuthangĩte
Psalms107:17 Ora-matũ-rĩ
Psalms107:18 Ngoro ciao igakinya kũnyira irio mĩthemba yothe
Psalms107:19 Magagĩkaĩra Jehova tondũ wa ũrĩa mathĩnĩkĩte
Psalms107:20 Atũmaga ũhoro wake
Psalms107:21 O
Psalms107:22 Nĩmamũrutagĩre magongona ma gũcokia ngatho
Psalms107:23 Andũ arĩa maikũrũkaga magathiĩ na iria me thĩinĩ wa marikabu
Psalms107:24 Acio nĩmonaga mawĩko ma Jehova; maũndũ make me magegania magakĩmeonera me maĩ-inĩ macio mariku.
Psalms107:25 Amu rĩrĩa oiga
Psalms107:26 Andũ makoyũo na igũrũ o nginya matu-inĩ
Psalms107:27 Nĩ kwagaaga maagaagaga magĩtũgũgangaga ta mũndũ mũrĩu
Psalms107:28 Magagĩkaĩra Jehova tondũ wa ũrĩa mathĩnĩkĩte
Psalms107:29 Atũmaga kĩhuhũkanio gĩcoke kũhorera
Psalms107:30 Nao magakena nĩ ũndũ rĩu mo nĩmahorerete
Psalms107:31 O
Psalms107:32 Nĩmamũtũũgĩragie rĩrĩa kĩrĩndĩ kĩũngaine
Psalms107:33 Kũrĩa kwĩ na njũĩ atũmaga kũgarũrũke gũgatuĩka werũ mũũmũ
Psalms107:34 Thĩ ĩrĩa yumaga irio mũno agakĩmĩtua o rũng’ũrĩ rũa igata
Psalms107:35 Ningĩ atũmaga werũ ũgarũrũke ũgatuĩka iria rĩa maĩ
Psalms107:36 Nakuo agatũma gũikarũo nĩ andũ arĩa ahũtu
Psalms107:37 Na mehandĩre mĩgũnda
Psalms107:38 Kũrathima nĩamarathimaga
Psalms107:39 Na rĩrĩa maanyihĩrĩra
Psalms107:40 Anene-rĩ
Psalms107:41 Ĩndĩ mũndũ ũrĩa mũkĩa-rĩ
Psalms107:42 Andũ arĩa arũngĩrĩru monaga ũguo magakena
Psalms107:43 Mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ wĩ na ũũgĩ nĩakĩrũmie maũndũ macio
Psalms108:1 Ĩ NGAI
Psalms108:2 Gĩũkĩrei
Psalms108:3 Ngũgũcokeria ngatho
Psalms108:4 Nĩ gũkorũo ũtugi waku nĩ mũnene
Psalms108:5 Gĩtũũgĩre
Psalms108:6 Nĩguo endwa aku matharũo ũũru-inĩ-rĩ
Psalms108:7 Ngai nĩaarĩtie e na ũtheru ũrĩa wake
Psalms108:8 Gileadi nĩ gwakwa; Manase no gwakwa; Efiraimu nakuo nĩkuo mwĩgito wa mũtwe wakwa; Juda nĩ mũthĩgi wakwa wa ũthamaki.
Psalms108:9 Moabi nĩ rũgĩo rũakwa rũa gwĩthambĩra; na harĩ Edomu-rĩ
Psalms108:10 Nũ ũkũnginyia thĩinĩ wa gĩtũũro kĩrĩa kĩirige? nũ ũngĩkĩndwara o kũu Edomu?
Psalms108:11 Githĩ tiwe
Psalms108:12 Gĩtũteithie harĩ ũrĩa wĩ muku na ithuĩ
Psalms108:13 Tondũ wa hinya wa Ngai no twĩke maũndũ ma ũcamba
Psalms109:1 Ĩ NGAI ũrĩa ngumagia
Psalms109:2 Amu kanua ka mũndũ mũmaramari
Psalms109:3 Ĩĩ-ni
Psalms109:4 Handũ ha wendani ũrĩa niĩ ndĩ naguo matuĩkĩte o a kũng’endagĩra
Psalms109:5 Ithenya rĩa wega nĩ ũũru manjigĩrĩire
Psalms109:6 Ũrĩa wĩkĩte ũguo-rĩ
Psalms109:7 Aacirithio-rĩ
Psalms109:8 Matukũ make maronyiha; ũramati wake ũrooyũo nĩ mũndũ ũngĩ!
Psalms109:9 Ciana ciake nĩituĩke cia ngoriai
Psalms109:10 Ningĩ ciana ciake irotuĩka ndũgũgi
Psalms109:11 Indo ciake iroetahĩrũo nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa me thirĩ nake
Psalms109:12 Arohĩtanagia na mũndũ ũngĩmũtuga
Psalms109:13 Njiarũa ciake irong’ũrio; hingo ya rũciaro rũa kerĩ rĩĩtwa rĩao nĩrĩthario o gũthario!
Psalms109:14 Waganu wa maithe make ũrotũũra ũririkainwo nĩ Jehova; gwata mehia ma nyina o namo nĩmamenye gũkanathario!
Psalms109:15 Marogĩtũũra hau mbere-inĩ ya Jehova o hingo ciothe
Psalms109:16 Nĩ ũndũ we ndaaririkanaga gũtugana
Psalms109:17 Kwenda endaga o kũgekana
Psalms109:18 Ũgekani-rĩ
Psalms109:19 Ũrotuĩka ta nguo harĩ we
Psalms109:20 Ũcio nĩguo mũcara wa acio mandumĩte muku
Psalms109:21 No rĩrĩ
Psalms109:22 Nĩ gũkorũo niĩ ndĩ mũthĩnĩki
Psalms109:23 Ndĩ mũthiu o ta kĩĩruru rĩrĩa kĩgwete gũtambũrũka kĩbuĩrie; ’huhũragwo ta ngigĩ.
Psalms109:24 Maru makwa nĩ kũregera maregerete nĩ ũrĩa ndĩĩimĩte irio; mwĩrĩ wakwa ũgagĩtharara nĩ kwaga maguta.
Psalms109:25 Niĩ-rĩ
Psalms109:26 Ĩ Jehova
Psalms109:27 Nĩguo mamenye nĩ guoko gwaku kwĩ ho
Psalms109:28 O
Psalms109:29 Acio ang’enderi marohumbwo ũnyararĩku
Psalms109:30 Nĩngũcokeria Jehova ngatho na kanua gakwa mũno mũno; ĩĩ-ni
Psalms109:31 Amu mwena wa ũrĩo wa mũndũ ũrĩa mwagi
Psalms110:1 JEHOVA nĩerire mwathani wakwa atĩrĩ
Psalms110:2 Mũthĩgi wa hinya waku
Psalms110:3 Mũthenya wa ita ciaku kĩrĩndĩ gĩaku gĩkerehage o na mwĩendero
Psalms110:4 Jehova nĩehĩtĩte
Psalms110:5 E guoko-inĩ gwaku kwa ũrĩo-rĩ
Psalms110:6 Nĩ gũcirithia agacirithia ndũrĩrĩ o agĩcituagĩra
Psalms110:7 Akanyua maĩ ma gĩthima e njĩra
Psalms111:1 GOOCAI Jehova! Ngũcokeria Jehova ngatho na ngoro yakwa yothe
Psalms111:2 Mawĩko ma Jehova-rĩ
Psalms111:3 Wĩra wake nĩ mũtĩĩku o na nĩ mũkaru
Psalms111:4 Atũmĩte maũndũ make ma magegania matuĩke ma kũririkanagwo: Jehova-rĩ
Psalms111:5 Atũire aheaga amwĩtigĩri gĩa kũrĩa; kĩrĩkanĩro gĩake egũtũũra akĩririkaine o kinya tene.
Psalms111:6 Nĩonirie kĩrĩndĩ gĩake ũrĩa mawĩko make me na hinya
Psalms111:7 Mawĩko ma moko make nĩ maũndũ ma ma
Psalms111:8 Nĩ kũrũmio marũmĩtio kinya tene na tene
Psalms111:9 Nĩakinyĩirie kĩrĩndĩ gĩake ũkũũri
Psalms111:10 Gwĩtigĩra Jehova nĩkuo kĩrutĩrĩrio kĩa ũũgĩ-ũrĩa-wa-ma; arĩa othe eki maũndũ makuo nĩ ũgerereri mwega me naguo: ũkumio wake-rĩ
Psalms112:1 GOOGAI Jehova! Gũkena nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa mwĩtigĩri Jehova
Psalms112:2 Mbeũ yake ĩrĩtuĩkaga o ing’ara bũrũri-inĩ; andũ arĩa arũngĩrĩru
Psalms112:3 Gwake gũikaraga kwĩ na ũrugarĩ o na ũtonga
Psalms112:4 Acio arũngĩrĩru-rĩ
Psalms112:5 Mũndũ ũrĩa wĩkanaga uuma-andũ na akohoranĩra
Psalms112:6 Amu gũtirĩ hingo angĩenyenyeka; mũndũ mũthingu nĩ wa gũtũũra aririkainwo o kinya tene.
Psalms112:7 Ndangĩĩtigĩra ũhoro ũrĩa angĩigua mũũru; ngoro yake nĩĩĩkindĩire
Psalms112:8 Ngoro yake nĩ nũmie
Psalms112:9 Nĩatũire aitangaga
Psalms112:10 Mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu arĩonaga ũguo
Psalms113:1 GOOCAI Jehova! Mũgoocei
Psalms113:2 Rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova rĩrotũũra rĩgathagwo kuuma rĩu nginya tene na tene.
Psalms113:3 Kuuma o irathĩro rĩa riũa nginya o ithũĩro rĩarĩo
Psalms113:4 Jehova-rĩ
Psalms113:5 Nũ ũhaana ta Jehova Ngai witũ
Psalms113:6 O ũcio wĩnyihagia arorererie maũndũ ma igũrũ o na ma gũkũ thĩ?
Psalms113:7 Gũũkĩria nĩokĩragia mũndũ ũrĩa mũhũthũ
Psalms113:8 Agatũma aikaranagie na anene
Psalms113:9 Atũmaga mũtumia arĩ thata agĩe na nyũmba
Psalms114:1 HINGO ĩrĩa Isiraeli moimire Misiri
Psalms114:2 Hĩndĩ ĩo kwa Juda nĩkuo gwatuĩkire handũ hake haamũre
Psalms114:3 Iria rĩrĩa inene nĩrĩonire ũguo
Psalms114:4 Ithuri nĩciatũhatũhire ta ndũrũme
Psalms114:5 Kaĩ ũkĩonete atĩa
Psalms114:6 Na inyuĩ ithuri ici
Psalms114:7 Wee
Psalms114:8 O we ũcio mũgarũri ndũmba ya ihiga ĩgatuĩka iria rĩa maĩ
Psalms115:1 TI ITHUĨ
Psalms115:2 Nĩ kĩ kĩngĩgĩtũma andũ a ndũrĩrĩ moragie
Psalms115:3 Na rĩrĩ
Psalms115:4 Mĩhianano ĩo yao no betha na thahabu
Psalms115:5 Tũnua ĩĩ natuo
Psalms115:6 Ĩĩ na matũ
Psalms115:7 Ĩrĩ o na moko
Psalms115:8 Arĩa mamĩthondekaga nĩ kũhaana makahaana o tayo; ĩĩ-ni
Psalms115:9 Wee Isiraeli-rĩ
Psalms115:10 Inyuĩ nyũmba ya Haruni-rĩ
Psalms115:11 Inyuĩ etigĩri Jehova-rĩ
Psalms115:12 Jehova nĩatũririkanĩte; nĩarĩtũrathimaga: nyũmba ya Isiraeli-rĩ
Psalms115:13 O acio etigĩri Jehova-rĩ
Psalms115:14 Jehova aromuongerera
Psalms115:15 Inyuĩ mũrĩ arathime nĩ Jehova
Psalms115:16 Igũrũ-rĩ
Psalms115:17 Arĩa akuũ matigoocaga Jehova
Psalms115:18 No ithuĩ-rĩ
Psalms116:1 NĨNYENDA Jehova
Psalms116:2 Kuona nĩaanyinamĩrĩirie gũtũ-rĩ
Psalms116:3 Nderigicĩirio nĩ mĩgeto ya gĩkuũ
Psalms116:4 Ngĩkaĩra rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova
Psalms116:5 Jehova-rĩ
Psalms116:6 Jehova nĩamenyagĩrĩra arĩa matarĩ ogĩ: nĩ kũhinyio ndahinyĩtio
Psalms116:7 Wee
Psalms116:8 Amu wee
Psalms116:9 Nĩndĩĩgendaga ndĩ ũthiũ-inĩ wa Jehova o mabũrũri-inĩ ma arĩa me muoyo.
Psalms116:10 No ndetĩkĩtie ũhoro wake
Psalms116:11 Na ngiuga atĩrĩ
Psalms116:12 Nĩ kĩ ngũthukĩra Jehova nakĩo nĩ ũndũ wa wega wake wothe ũrĩa anjĩkĩte?
Psalms116:13 Nĩ kuoya nguoya gĩkombe kĩrĩa kĩa ũhonokio
Psalms116:14 Ngũkĩhingĩria Jehova mĩĩhĩtwa ĩrĩa ndehĩtire
Psalms116:15 Arĩa marĩ ũiguano nake-rĩ
Psalms116:16 Ĩ Jehova
Psalms116:17 No ngũrutĩre magongona ma gũcokia ngatho
Psalms116:18 Ngũkĩhingĩria Jehova mĩĩhĩtwa ĩrĩa ndehĩtire
Psalms116:19 Nja-inĩ cia nyũmba ya Jehova
Psalms117:1 KĨGOOCEI Jehova
Psalms117:2 Tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ kũneneha ũtũnenehagĩra; naguo ũhoro wa Jehova
Psalms118:1 Ĩ GĨCOKERIEI Jehova ngatho
Psalms118:2 A Isiraeli ta nĩmoige ũguo
Psalms118:3 Nyũmba ya Haruni
Psalms118:4 Andũ arĩa etigĩri Jehova-rĩ
Psalms118:5 Ndakaĩire Jehova ndĩ hatĩka-inĩ: we Jehova-rĩ
Psalms118:6 Jehova e mwena wakwa; ndingĩĩtigĩra: mũndũ-rĩ
Psalms118:7 Jehova e mwena wakwa o harĩ ateithia akwa: tondũ ũcio nĩngona ũrĩa nyendete harĩ andũ arĩa ma’thũire.
Psalms118:8 Nĩ wega kũrahĩra Jehova gũkĩra kwĩhoka andũ.
Psalms118:9 Nĩ wega kũrahĩra Jehova gũkĩra kwĩhoka anene.
Psalms118:10 Ndacigĩrĩirio nĩ ndũrĩrĩ ciothe
Psalms118:11 Kũ’hĩtĩrĩra nĩcia’hĩtĩrĩire
Psalms118:12 Cianjigĩrĩirie o ta njũkĩ; rĩu ikĩrĩ horu ta mwaki wa mĩigua: tondũ wa kwĩhoka rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova-rĩ
Psalms118:13 Wandurumire mũno nĩ getha ngũe
Psalms118:14 Jehova-rĩ
Psalms118:15 Hema-inĩ cia arĩa athingu nĩ mũgambo wa rũũhiũ kũrĩ
Psalms118:16 Guoko kwa ũrĩo kwa Jehova nĩgwĩtũũgĩrĩire; guoko kwa ũrĩo kwa Jehova-rĩ
Psalms118:17 Niĩ gũkua-rĩ
Psalms118:18 Kũ’herithia
Psalms118:19 ’Hingũrĩrai ihingo cia ũthingu; ngũtonya thĩinĩ
Psalms118:20 Kĩhingo gĩkĩ-rĩ
Psalms118:21 Nĩ ngatho ngũgũcokeria
Psalms118:22 Ihiga rĩrĩa rĩaregirũo nĩ aaki nĩrĩo rĩtuĩkĩte o rĩrĩa inene rĩa koine.
Psalms118:23 Ũndũ ũcio uumĩte kwĩ Jehova
Psalms118:24 Mũthenya ũyũ nĩ Jehova ũtũmĩte ũgĩe; nĩtũcanjamũkei tũkĩũkenagĩra.
Psalms118:25 Ĩ Jehova
Psalms118:26 Mũrathimwo-rĩ
Psalms118:27 Jehova nowe Mũrungu
Psalms118:28 Wee ũrĩ Mũrungu wakwa
Psalms118:29 Ĩ gĩcokeriei Jehova ngatho
Psalms119:1 GŨKENA-RĨ
Psalms119:2 Andũ gũkena no arĩa marũmagia maũira macio make
Psalms119:3 Nĩo arĩa matekaga waganu o na ũrĩkũ
Psalms119:4 Wee mwene nĩwatwathire tũiguage mataaro maku
Psalms119:5 Na arĩ korũo mĩthiĩre yakwa ĩkĩrĩ mĩkindĩru
Psalms119:6 Hĩndĩ ĩo-rĩ
Psalms119:7 Nĩ ngatho ndĩrĩgũcokagĩria ndĩ o na ngoro nũngĩrĩru
Psalms119:8 Mĩtugo ĩo mĩathane nĩwe
Psalms119:9 Mũndũ mwanake-rĩ
Psalms119:10 Niĩ nĩngũrongoretie na ngoro yakwa yothe: ndũkanakĩreke njange ndigane na maathani maku.
Psalms119:11 Uuge waku nĩndĩwĩigĩire thĩinĩ wa ngoro yakwa
Psalms119:12 Wee Jehova
Psalms119:13 Niĩ-rĩ
Psalms119:14 Njĩra ĩo ya maũira maku ndĩmĩiguagĩra wega gũkĩra ũtonga o ũrĩkũ kana ũrĩkũ.
Psalms119:15 Mataaro maku nĩmo ndĩrĩtaranagia ũhoro wamo
Psalms119:16 Mĩtugo ĩo mĩathane nĩwe
Psalms119:17 Niĩ
Psalms119:18 ’Humbũria maitho
Psalms119:19 Niĩ ndĩ mũgeni gũkũ thĩ: ndũgakĩ’hithe maathani maku.
Psalms119:20 Ngoro yakwa nĩ gũthuthĩka ĩthuthĩkĩte nĩ kwĩriragĩria matuĩro maku o mahinda mothe.
Psalms119:21 Arĩa egereri-rĩ
Psalms119:22 Njaũra kĩnyenyo
Psalms119:23 Gwata anene maanaikara makĩnjiragĩra
Psalms119:24 Ĩĩ-ni
Psalms119:25 Ngoro yakwa ĩgwataine o na tĩri: kĩrurumũkie muoyo wakwa kũringana na ũrĩa wanoiga.
Psalms119:26 Nĩndakuonirie ikĩro ciakwa
Psalms119:27 Njiguithia ũrĩa njĩra ĩthiĩte ya mataaro macio maku
Psalms119:28 Ngoro yakwa nĩ gũtwekũka ĩratwekũka nĩ ũndũ wa kĩeha: njĩkĩra hinya kũringana na ũrĩa wanoiga.
Psalms119:29 ’Thengeria njĩra ya ũrongo-rĩ
Psalms119:30 Njĩra ya wĩhokeku nĩyo ’thurĩte; matua maku-rĩ
Psalms119:31 Maũira macio maku ndũire ngwatanĩte o namo: Jehova
Psalms119:32 Ndĩĩhanyũkaga o na njĩra ya maathani maku
Psalms119:33 Jehova
Psalms119:34 Njĩkĩra mbuguĩro
Psalms119:35 Tũma ’thiage na njĩra o ĩo ya maathani maku
Psalms119:36 Erekeria ngoro yakwa na kũrĩ maũira macio maku
Psalms119:37 Hũgũra maitho makwa matige kwĩrorera maũndũ matarĩ ma ma; rurumũkia muoyo wakwa ngĩthiaga o na njĩra ciaku.
Psalms119:38 Ndungata ĩno yaku
Psalms119:39 Njehereria kĩnyenyo kĩrĩa ndĩĩtigagĩra
Psalms119:40 Atĩrĩrĩ
Psalms119:41 Reke mĩtuganĩre yaku
Psalms119:42 Nĩguo ngagĩkoragwo ndĩ na ũndũ wa gũcokeria ũrĩa ũngĩnjuka
Psalms119:43 Ndũgagĩtunye kanua gakwa kiugo kĩrĩa kĩa ma o gũtunya
Psalms119:44 Na niĩ nĩngũtũũra ’menyereire kĩrĩra gĩaku o ro hĩndĩ ciothe nginya tene o na tene;
Psalms119:45 Na ng’endage itarĩ na ũndũ ũkũ’hatĩka
Psalms119:46 O na maũira macio maku-rĩ
Psalms119:47 Ngũtũũra ndĩĩkenagĩra nĩ ũndũ wa maathani maku
Psalms119:48 O na kwarĩra nĩndĩrĩaragĩra maathani macio maku hĩ
Psalms119:49 Ririkanaga ũhoro ũrĩa werire ndungata ĩno yaku
Psalms119:50 Ũndũ ũcio nĩũ’horeragia ndĩ mĩtandiũko-inĩ
Psalms119:51 Andũ arĩa egereri
Psalms119:52 Ndirikanaga matuĩro maku
Psalms119:53 Nĩ’nyitagwo nĩ marakara marĩa maakanu nĩ ũndũ wa arĩa aaganu
Psalms119:54 Mĩtugo ĩrĩa mĩathane nĩwe nĩyo ndũire nyinaga ndĩ mũciĩ ũyũ njikaire ndĩ mũgeni.
Psalms119:55 Nĩndirikanaga rĩĩtwa rĩaku
Psalms119:56 Ũguo-rĩ
Psalms119:57 Jehova
Psalms119:58 Ngũthaithĩte na ngoro yakwa yothe atĩ ũndugage: tũma wega waku ũnginyagĩre kũringana o na uuge ũrĩa waku.
Psalms119:59 Ndĩĩciragia ũhoro wa mĩthiĩre yakwa
Psalms119:60 Nĩ kũhiũha ’hiũhaga
Psalms119:61 Ndanarigicĩrio nĩ mĩũgũ ya andũ arĩa aaganu
Psalms119:62 Ndĩrĩũkagĩra o ũtukũ gatagatĩ nĩ getha ngũcokerie ngatho nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa matua maku me ma kĩhooto.
Psalms119:63 Thiritũ yakwa no ya arĩa othe agwĩtigĩri
Psalms119:64 Ũtugi waku
Psalms119:65 Ndungata ĩno yaku nĩũmĩĩkĩte o wega
Psalms119:66 Kĩndutage gũkũũrana maũndũ wega o na kũmamenya
Psalms119:67 Mbere itaanona thĩna nĩndahĩtagia
Psalms119:68 Wee wĩ mwega
Psalms119:69 Andũ arĩa egereri nĩ gũ’thondekera ma’thondekeire maheni
Psalms119:70 Ngoro ciao-rĩ
Psalms119:71 Kuonio thĩna kũu nyonetio nĩkũnjagĩrĩire
Psalms119:72 Kĩrĩra gĩa kanua gaku nĩ kĩega harĩ niĩ gũkĩra ngiri cia thahabu na betha.
Psalms119:73 Moko maku nĩmo maanyũmbire na magĩ’thondeka ũguo ndariĩ: kĩnjĩtĩire mbuguĩro
Psalms119:74 Arĩa agwĩtigĩri marĩnyonaga magakena
Psalms119:75 Jehova
Psalms119:76 Ta kĩreke ũtugi waku ũtuĩke nĩguo ũkũ’nyamarũra
Psalms119:77 Matha maku ta nĩmanginyĩrĩre
Psalms119:78 Arĩa egereri-rĩ
Psalms119:79 Andũ arĩa agwĩtigĩri nĩmanjerekere
Psalms119:80 Tũma ngoro yakwa ĩtuĩke nginyanĩru ũhoro-inĩ wa mĩtugo ĩrĩa mĩathane nĩwe
Psalms119:81 Ngoro yakwa nĩ kũũrũo yũrĩtwo nĩ hinya nĩ kwĩrirĩria ũhonokio waku
Psalms119:82 Maitho makwa nĩ kũira mairĩte nĩ ũrĩa ndũire ndoragĩrĩria uuge ũcio waku
Psalms119:83 Amu ’haanĩte ta mondo ya rũũa ĩrĩa itũire ndogo-inĩ
Psalms119:84 Matukũ ma ndungata ĩno yaku makĩrĩ maigana? arĩa mathingatanĩte na niĩ
Psalms119:85 Andũ arĩa egereri nĩmanyenjeire marima ma kũndekia
Psalms119:86 Maathani maku mothe nĩ mehokeku: o no ũrongo ma’thingatagia; wee
Psalms119:87 Maratigarĩtie hanini ma’nine njehere gũkũ thĩ
Psalms119:88 Kĩrurumũkie muoyo wakwa kũringana o na ũtugi waku
Psalms119:89 Gwata o tene na tene
Psalms119:90 Wĩhokeku waku nĩ wa njiarũa na njiarũa: thĩ nĩwe ũmĩrũmĩtie
Psalms119:91 Gũikarĩte o ũguo kinya ũmũthĩ kũringana na matua marĩa watuire
Psalms119:92 Guca ngenagio nĩ kĩrĩra gĩaku-rĩ
Psalms119:93 Niĩ ndirĩ hĩndĩ ngariganĩrũo nĩ mataaro macio maku
Psalms119:94 Ndĩ waku niĩ
Psalms119:95 Andũ arĩa aaganu nĩmanjohagĩria nĩguo ma’nine
Psalms119:96 Ũndũ o wothe
Psalms119:97 Kĩrĩra gĩaku-rĩ
Psalms119:98 Maathani maku matũmaga njũhĩge gũkĩra thũ ciakwa
Psalms119:99 Ndĩ na ũgerereri kũrĩ arĩa othe anduti ũhoro
Psalms119:100 Ndĩ mũtaũku gũkĩra athuri arĩa akũrũ
Psalms119:101 Nĩndigagĩrĩria magũrũ makwa matikanakinye njĩra njũru o na ĩrĩkũ
Psalms119:102 Matuĩro maku niĩ ndirĩ ndehũka ngĩtigana namo
Psalms119:103 Ciugo ciaku
Psalms119:104 Tondũ wa mataaro maku nĩndĩĩgĩagĩra na mbuguĩro
Psalms119:105 Ũhoro waku nĩ tawa ũmũrĩkagĩra makinya makwa
Psalms119:106 Kwĩhĩta nĩndĩĩhĩtĩte
Psalms119:107 Gũthĩnio nĩ’thĩnagio mũno: Jehova
Psalms119:108 Ta ĩtĩkĩra mahaki ma kanua gakwa
Psalms119:109 Muoyo wakwa ndũire ndĩũgwatĩrĩirie na hĩ
Psalms119:110 Andũ arĩa aaganu nĩmaandegeire mũtego
Psalms119:111 Maũira maku-rĩ
Psalms119:112 Ngoro yakwa ndĩmĩerekeirie gwĩkaga mĩtugo o ĩo wathanĩte
Psalms119:113 Andũ a ngoro igĩrĩ-rĩ
Psalms119:114 Wee nĩwe wĩhitho wakwa o na ngo yakwa; ũhoro ũrĩa uugĩte noguo ndĩĩrĩgĩrĩire.
Psalms119:115 Njehererai
Psalms119:116 Wee
Psalms119:117 Ũndiiragĩrĩre
Psalms119:118 Arĩa othe macangaga matiganĩte na mĩtugo ĩo yaku-rĩ
Psalms119:119 Nĩ kũhakũra ũhakũraga acio aaganu a thĩ othe ũkamate ta nganga cia ũturi: tondũ ũcio-rĩ
Psalms119:120 Mwĩrĩ wakwa nĩũringagwo nĩ thithi nĩ ũndũ wa guoya waku
Psalms119:121 Niĩ maũndũ marĩa ndũire njĩkaga no marĩa ma kĩhooto
Psalms119:122 Ndungata ĩno yaku
Psalms119:123 Maitho makwa nĩ kũira mairĩte nĩ ũrĩa ndũire ndoragĩrĩria ũhonokio waku
Psalms119:124 Ndungata yaku
Psalms119:125 Tondũ ndĩ o ndungata yaku-rĩ
Psalms119:126 Hingo nĩ nginyu Jehova eke ũndũ
Psalms119:127 Tondũ ũcio nĩ kwenda niĩ ngĩendete maathani maku o na gũkĩra thahabu
Psalms119:128 Na nĩkĩo nyonaga atĩ mataaro maku mothe no marũngĩrĩru
Psalms119:129 Maũira maku-rĩ
Psalms119:130 Mohoro maku magĩtaũrũo nĩmarehage ũtheri; kũũhĩgia nĩmohĩgagia ũrĩa ũtarĩ mũũgĩ.
Psalms119:131 Njathamĩtie kanua o na ngatuumatuuma ngoro
Psalms119:132 Njerekera
Psalms119:133 Rũngagĩrĩria makinya makwa na uuge waku
Psalms119:134 Ngũũra ũndute ũhinyanĩrĩria-inĩ wa andũ
Psalms119:135 Tũma ũthiũ waku waragĩre ndungata ĩno yaku
Psalms119:136 Maitho makwa manyũrũrũkagia maĩ maigana ta rũũĩ
Psalms119:137 Wee
Psalms119:138 Maũira marĩa maku ũmaathanĩte o na ũthingu na wĩhokeku o ũrĩa mũnene.
Psalms119:139 Kĩyo kĩrĩa ndĩ nakĩo no kũnjũraga
Psalms119:140 Uuge waku-rĩ
Psalms119:141 Ndĩ wa gĩikaro kĩnyinyi
Psalms119:142 Ũthingu waku nĩ uthingu wa tene na tene
Psalms119:143 Nĩnginyĩrĩirũo nĩ mĩnyamaro o na ruo rũa ngoro
Psalms119:144 Maũira maku no ma ũthingu kinya tene na tene: kĩnjĩkĩre mbuguĩro
Psalms119:145 Njĩtanĩte na ngoro yakwa yothe; ĩ Jehova
Psalms119:146 Nĩ na kũrĩ we njĩtanĩte; kĩ’honokie
Psalms119:147 Njũkagĩra tene mũno o gũtaanakĩa
Psalms119:148 Maitho makwa makoragwo maramũkĩte ngahĩtaga matuanĩra ma macamu ma ũtukũ
Psalms119:149 Ndũkĩigue mũgambo wakwa kũringana o na ũtugi waku; rurumũkia muoyo wakwa
Psalms119:150 Arĩa marũmagĩrĩra uungumania nĩmara’thengerera: acio-rĩ
Psalms119:151 Wee
Psalms119:152 Kuuma o tene nĩ’menyete nĩ ũndũ wa maũira maku atĩ ũmahandĩte me ma gũtũũra nginya tene na tene.
Psalms119:153 Ta rora thĩna ũrĩa nyonete
Psalms119:154 Cira wakwa njirĩrĩra
Psalms119:155 Arĩa aaganu-rĩ
Psalms119:156 Matha maku
Psalms119:157 Arĩa mathingatanaga na niĩ nĩ aingĩ
Psalms119:158 Nĩnyonete andũ arĩa mĩgarũka
Psalms119:159 Mataaro maku ta kĩrore ũrĩa niĩ ndĩmendete; rurumũkia muoyo wakwa
Psalms119:160 Ũhoro wothe ũrĩa uugĩte-rĩ
Psalms119:161 ’Thingatanĩtwo na niĩ nĩ anene hatarĩ na gĩtũmi
Psalms119:162 Uuge waku-rĩ
Psalms119:163 Ũrongo ndĩũthũire ngaũnyira; kĩrĩra gĩaku nĩkĩo nyendete.
Psalms119:164 Nĩngũgoocaga o mũthenya maita mũgwanja
Psalms119:165 Arĩa menda kĩrĩra gĩaku matũũraga na thayũ mũnene
Psalms119:166 Niĩ ndũire njĩrĩgĩrĩire ũhonokio waku
Psalms119:167 Maũira macio maku-rĩ
Psalms119:168 Niĩ mataaro maku
Psalms119:169 Kayũ gakwa ta reke gathengerere harĩ wee
Psalms119:170 Ũgũthaithi ũyũ wakwa reke ũkinye o harĩ wee; ndeithũra kũringana o na uuge ũcio waku.
Psalms119:171 Mĩromo yakwa nĩĩheanage ũhoro wa gĩkũgooca
Psalms119:172 Uuge waku
Psalms119:173 Reke guoko gwaku gũkoragwo kwĩhaarĩirie kũndeithia
Psalms119:174 Ndũire o ndĩĩriragĩria ũhonokio waku
Psalms119:175 Ngoro yakwa ĩrotũũra
Psalms119:176 Ndururĩte ta mbũri yũrĩte; gĩcarie ndungata yaku
Psalms120:1 NDAGĨA hatĩka-inĩ-rĩ
Psalms120:2 Jehova-ĩ
Psalms120:3 Ũkũheo kĩ
Psalms120:4 Nĩ rĩrĩ
Psalms120:5 Kaĩ ndĩ wa mũtino-ĩ
Psalms120:6 Nĩ hingo ndaya mũno ngoro yakwa ĩikarĩte kwa ũrĩa ũthũire thayũ.
Psalms120:7 Niĩ nyendaga thayũ
Psalms121:1 NĨNGŨTIIRA maitho ndorererie irĩma-inĩ: ĩ ũteithio wakwa ũgũkiuma na kũ?
Psalms121:2 Ũteithio wakwa-rĩ
Psalms121:3 We ndarĩ hĩndĩ angĩreka kũgũrũ gwaku gũtirũke: ũcio mũmenyereri waku ndarĩ hingo angĩcũnga.
Psalms121:4 Mũmenyereri wa Isiraeli-rĩ
Psalms121:5 Jehova nĩwe mũkũmenyereri; Jehova-rĩ
Psalms121:6 Mũthenya
Psalms121:7 Ũũru wothe nĩ Jehova ũrĩkũriragĩra; muoyo waku nĩarĩũmenyagĩrĩra.
Psalms121:8 Ũkiumagara ũthiĩ
Psalms122:1 NĨ GUKENA ndĩrakenire maanjĩra tũthiĩ nyũmba-inĩ ya Jehova.
Psalms122:2 Magũrũ maitũ rĩu nĩkuo marũngiĩ
Psalms122:3 Jerusalemu
Psalms122:4 Nĩkuo mĩhĩrĩga ĩthiaga ĩkĩambatagĩrĩra
Psalms122:5 Nĩ gũtuĩka nĩkuo kwaigĩtwo itĩ iria cia cira
Psalms122:6 Kĩhoerei Jerusalemu thayũ: arĩa wee makwendete-rĩ
Psalms122:7 Gwaku o ũguo kũirigĩtwo kũroikara o thayũ
Psalms122:8 Tondũ wa andũ aitũ
Psalms122:9 Tondũ wa nyũmba ya Jehova Ngai witũ-rĩ
Psalms123:1 WEE NĨWE ndiirĩire maitho
Psalms123:2 Atĩrĩrĩ
Psalms123:3 Tũkinyĩrie wega waku
Psalms123:4 Ngoro ciitũ kũhũna ihũnĩte o mũno ndendwa cia arĩa maikaraga o mearaganĩtie
Psalms124:1 TIGA arĩ Jehova ũrarĩ mwena witũ
Psalms124:2 Tiga arĩ Jehova ũrarĩ mwena witũ rĩrĩa andũ maratũũkĩrĩire
Psalms124:3 Nĩmangĩratũmeririe tũrĩ o muoyo hĩndĩ ĩo marakara mao maratwakanĩire ta mwaki;
Psalms124:4 Nĩ kũhubwo tũngĩrahubirũo nĩ maria
Psalms124:5 Maria macio megũgũmi nĩmangĩraagararire igũrũ rĩa mĩoyo iitũ.
Psalms124:6 Jehova we arogathwo! nĩ ũndũ ndanatũrekereria tũtuĩke a gũtamburũo nĩ magego mao.
Psalms124:7 Muoyo witũ ũrĩ kũhonoka ta nyoni ĩhonokete mũtego-inĩ wa arĩa maitegaga; mũtego watuĩka
Psalms124:8 Gũteithio gwitũ kuumaga harĩ rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova
Psalms125:1 ARĨA mehokete Jehova matariĩ ta kĩrĩma gĩa Zayuni
Psalms125:2 O ta ũguo irĩma irigicĩirie Jerusalemu-rĩ
Psalms125:3 Amu mũthĩgi ũrĩa wa ũmaramari ndũgũtũũra ũmamĩire iringa rĩrĩa rĩringithĩtio arĩa athingu o gũtũũra
Psalms125:4 Ĩ Jehova
Psalms125:5 No rĩrĩ
Psalms126:1 RĨRĨA Jehova aagarũrire a Zayani arĩa atahe akĩmainũkia-rĩ
Psalms126:2 Tũnua twitũ hĩndĩ ĩo tũkĩiyũra mĩtheko
Psalms126:3 Ĩĩ-ni
Psalms126:4 Ĩ Jehova
Psalms126:5 Arĩa marahanda na maithori makagetha o magĩkũngũyagia.
Psalms126:6 Mũndũ o na angĩthiĩ akĩrĩraga
Psalms127:1 TIGA nyũmba yakirũo nĩ Jehova-rĩ

Psalms127:3 Ciana-rĩ
Psalms127:4 Ta mĩguĩ ĩĩ guoko kwa njamba
Psalms127:5 Gũkena-rĩ
Psalms128:1 GŨKENA-RĨ
Psalms128:2 Kĩrĩa ũnogeire na moko maku-rĩ
Psalms128:3 Mũtumia waku egũikara ta mũthabibu ũrĩa mũciari mũno e kũu nyũmba yaku thĩinĩ; ciana ciaku nacio ituĩke ta mĩtamaiyũ ya mũmerano ĩthiũrũrũkĩirie metha yaku.
Psalms128:4 Onei
Psalms128:5 Jehova arokũrathima arĩ Zayuni
Psalms128:6 Ĩĩ
Psalms129:1 NĨ KAINGĨ maana’nyamaria kuuma ndĩ o mũnyinyi
Psalms129:2 Nĩ kaingĩ maana’nyamaria kuuma ndĩ o mũnyinyi
Psalms129:3 Arĩa arĩmi na mũraũ nĩmaanĩmire mũgongo; mĩkururo yao nĩ kũraihia maamĩraihirie.
Psalms129:4 Jehova no mũthingu; mĩhĩndo ya arĩa aaganu nĩakĩmĩtinangĩtie.
Psalms129:5 Maroconoka
Psalms129:6 Nĩmatuĩke ta nyeki ĩrĩa ĩmerete nyũmba igũrũ
Psalms129:7 O ĩrĩa mũtui atangĩiyũria ngundi
Psalms129:8 Nao arĩa mahĩtũkagĩra ho matangiuga atĩrĩ

Psalms130:3 Wee
Psalms130:4 No rĩ’

Psalms130:7 Ĩ Isiraeli-ĩ

Psalms131:3 Ĩ Isiraeli-ĩ
Psalms132:1 Ĩ JEHOVA
Psalms132:2 Ũririkane ũrĩa ehĩtire harĩ Jehova
Psalms132:3 Niĩ-rĩ
Psalms132:4 Maitho makwa-rĩ
Psalms132:5 O nginya ngonera Jehova handũ ha gũikara
Psalms132:6 Nĩ kũigua twaiguire atĩ rĩtũire Efiratha
Psalms132:7 Nĩtũgakĩingĩre gĩikaro-inĩ gĩake! nĩtũinamĩrĩre gĩturũa-inĩ kĩa makinya make.
Psalms132:8 Arahũka
Psalms132:9 Athĩnjĩri aku ta nĩmehumbe ũthingu; andũ arĩa maiguaine nawe nĩmakũngũiye nĩ gũkena!
Psalms132:10 Tondũ wa ndungata yaku Daudi-rĩ
Psalms132:11 Jehova nĩehĩtire akĩrĩkĩria Daudi na ma
Psalms132:12 Ariũ aku mangĩtũũra mamenyereire kĩrĩkanĩro gĩakwa
Psalms132:13 Nĩ gũtuĩka Jehova nĩethurĩire Zayuni
Psalms132:14 Gũkũ nĩkuo kĩhurũko gĩakwa o nginya tene; nĩkuo ngũtũũra
Psalms132:15 Ũmathi wakuo nĩ kũrathima ndĩĩũrathimaga mũno; ngĩa ciakuo nĩ kũhũnia ndĩrĩcihũnagia irio.
Psalms132:16 Athĩnjĩri-Ngai akuo ngũmahumba ũhonokio
Psalms132:17 Nĩkuo ngatũma rũhĩa rũa Daudi rũthundũkĩre; ũcio wakwa mũitĩrĩrie-maguta nĩ tawa ndĩmũigĩire wa gwakanaga.
Psalms132:18 Thũ ciake nĩ kũhumba ngacihumbaga njono
Psalms133:1 NĨ ŨHORO mwega atĩa
Psalms133:2 No ta maguta mathaka me mũtwe
Psalms133:3 Ningĩ ta ireera rĩa Herimoni
Psalms134:1 TA KĨGATHEI Jehova
Psalms134:2 Arai hĩ mũcierekeirie na handũ harĩa haamũre
Psalms134:3 Jehova arokũrathima e Zayuni
Psalms135:1 GOOCAI Jehova! Goocai rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova; mũgoocei
Psalms135:2 Inyuĩ mũrũgamaga thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ya Jehova
Psalms135:3 Goocai Jehova
Psalms135:4 Nĩ gũkorũo Jehova nĩethurĩire Jakubu atuĩke wake
Psalms135:5 Amu niĩ nĩnjũĩ atĩ Jehova nĩ mũnene; atĩ Mwathani witũ atũũgĩrĩte agakĩra ngai ciothe.
Psalms135:6 Jehova-rĩ
Psalms135:7 Nĩwe ũtũmaga matu maambatage makiumaga o ituri-inĩ cia thĩ; nĩwe ũthondekete heni irehanage na mbura; nĩwe ũrutaga rũhuho kũrĩa arũigĩte mũthithũ.
Psalms135:8 Nowe waringire marigithathi ma Misiri akĩmoraga
Psalms135:9 Wee Misiri-rĩ
Psalms135:10 Nowe wahũrire ndũrĩrĩ nyingĩ
Psalms135:11 Sihoni
Psalms135:12 Akĩheana bũrũri wao ũtuĩke igai
Psalms135:13 Rĩĩtwa rĩaku
Psalms135:14 Amu Jehova nĩagacirĩra kĩrĩndĩ gĩake
Psalms135:15 Mĩhianano ĩrĩa ya ndũrĩrĩ no betha na thahabu
Psalms135:16 Tũnua ĩĩ natuo
Psalms135:17 Ĩĩ na matũ
Psalms135:18 Arĩa mamĩthondekaga nĩ kũhaana makahaana o tayo; ĩĩ-ni
Psalms135:19 Inyuĩ nyũmba ya Isiraeli-rĩ
Psalms135:20 Inyuĩ nyũmba ya Lawii-rĩ
Psalms135:21 Jehova arogathwo na ngatho ikuuma Zayuni
Psalms136:1 Ĩ GĨCOKERIEI Jehova ngatho
Psalms136:2 Ũcio Ngai wa ngai ciothe-rĩ
Psalms136:3 We Mwathani wa aathani othe-rĩ
Psalms136:4 Mũgathei arĩ we wiki wĩkaga magegania manene: tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:5 O we ũrĩa wombire igũrũ na ũtaũku wake: tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:6 O ũrĩa watambũrũkirie thĩ igũrũ rĩa maĩ: tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:7 O ũrĩa wombire imũrĩ nene: tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:8 Riũa rĩathage mũthenya: tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:9 Mweri na njata ciathage ũtukũ: tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:10 O we ũrĩa waringire a Misiri nĩ kũmoragĩra marigithathi mao: tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:11 Akĩruta a Isiraeli kũu gatagatĩ kao: tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:12 Agĩĩka ũguo na guoko kwĩ hinya
Psalms136:13 O we ũrĩa waatũrire Iria Itune njatũ igĩrĩ: tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:14 Agĩgĩtũma a Isiraeli matuĩkanie gatagatĩ karĩo: tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:15 Nake Firauni na ita ciake akĩmathinĩkania kũu Iria Itune thĩinĩ: tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:16 O we ũrĩa watongoririe kĩrĩndĩ gĩake agĩgĩtuĩkanithĩria werũ-inĩ: tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:17 Ũrĩa waringire athamaki anene: tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:18 Agĩkĩũraga athamaki maarĩ igweta: tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:19 Sihoni
Psalms136:20 Na Ogu
Psalms136:21 Akĩheana bũrũri wao ũtuĩke igai: tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:22 Ũtuĩke igai rĩa Isiraeli
Psalms136:23 O we ũrĩa watũririkanire rĩrĩa twanyihĩrĩire: tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:24 Agĩtũhatũra harĩ arĩa maarĩ a-muku aitũ: tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:25 Arĩa othe me mwĩrĩ
Psalms136:26 Ĩ no gĩcokiei ngatho harĩ Mũrungu

Proverbs2:1 MŨRŨ wakwa
Proverbs2:2 Ũgĩtuĩke atĩ ũũgĩ-ũrĩa-wa-ma nĩguo ũrĩtegagĩra matũ
Proverbs2:3 Akorũo nĩũgũtuĩka wa kwanĩria ũũgĩ wa kũhota gũkũũrana maũndũ
Proverbs2:4 Akorũo ningĩ nĩũgũtuĩka wa kũũcaragĩrĩria o ta ũrĩa betha ĩcaragio
Proverbs2:5 Weka ũguo-rĩ
Proverbs2:6 Amu ũũgĩ-ũrĩa-wa-ma nĩ Jehova ũheanaga
Proverbs2:7 Andũ arĩa arũngĩrĩru nĩamaigĩire mũthithũ wa ũũgĩ mũkinyanĩru; andũ acio me na mĩthiĩre mĩgima-rĩ
Proverbs2:8 Nĩ getha agitagĩre ikĩro iria cia kĩhooto
Proverbs2:9 Ningĩ weka ũguo nĩrĩo ũrĩtaũkagĩrũo nĩ ũhoro ũrĩa wa ũthingu na wa kĩhooto
Proverbs2:10 Nĩ gũkorũo ũũgĩ no ũgũtonye o ngoro-inĩ thĩinĩ
Proverbs2:11 Ũgerereri-rĩ
Proverbs2:12 Ũteithũrithagio harĩ njĩra ĩrĩa ya ũũru
Proverbs2:13 O arĩa matigaga mĩthiĩre ĩrĩa mĩerekereru
Proverbs2:14 Nĩo arĩa makenagio nĩ gwĩka ũũru
Proverbs2:15 No-o arĩa mahotomagia mĩthiĩre yao
Proverbs2:16 Gũteithũrũo ũteithũragwo ningĩ harĩ mũndũ mũka wa kwene
Proverbs2:17 Ũrĩa ũtigĩte mũratawe ũrĩa maatumire ndũgũ e mũirĩtu
Proverbs2:18 Amu nyũmba yake nĩ kĩharũrũka kĩinamĩrĩire gĩkuũ-inĩ
Proverbs2:19 Arĩa mamũceeragĩra gũtirĩ ũcokaga kuuma ho
Proverbs2:20 Wee-rĩ
Proverbs2:21 Nĩ gũkorũo andũ arĩa arũngĩrĩru nĩo a gũtũũra bũrũri
Proverbs2:22 No andũ arĩa aaganu nĩ kũrindũrũo makarindũrũo bũrũri
Proverbs3:1 MŨRŨ wakwa
Proverbs3:2 Thima-rĩ

Proverbs3:4 Weka ũguo
Proverbs3:5 Ĩhokage Jehova na ngoro yaku yothe
Proverbs3:6 Mwĩtĩkagĩre o we mĩthiĩre-inĩ yaku yothe
Proverbs3:7 Tigaga kwĩona wee mwene ta wĩ mũũgĩ; ĩtigagĩre Jehova
Proverbs3:8 Na ũhoro ũcio no ũtuĩke wa gũtũũria mũkonyo waku na hinya na wa gũikaragia mahĩndĩ maku na ũigũ
Proverbs3:9 Tĩithagia Jehova na indo iria ũrĩ nacio

Proverbs3:13 Gũkena-rĩ
Proverbs3:14 Amu wonjoria waguo nĩ mwega kũrĩ wonjoria wa betha

Proverbs3:16 Rũhĩ-inĩ rũake rũa ũrĩo arĩ na ũraihu wa matukũ
Proverbs3:17 Njĩra ciake irĩ o maũndũ ma kũiguithia mũndũ wega
Proverbs3:18 Harĩ arĩa mamwĩgwatĩrĩire nĩ mũtĩ wa muoyo; mũndũ wa gũtũũra amwĩnyitĩrĩire

Proverbs3:26 Nĩ gũkorũo Jehova nĩwe ũgũtuĩka mwĩhoko waku

Proverbs4:1 ARIŨ akwa

Proverbs4:4 Baba nake nĩ kũnduta aandutaga

Proverbs4:19 Njĩra ya arĩa aaganu ĩhaana ta nduma nene; o matimenyaga kĩrĩa kĩamahĩnga.

Proverbs4:23 Makĩria ma wĩgitĩri waku wothe

Proverbs4:25 Maitho maku ta nĩmarorage o na mbere
Proverbs4:26 Araganagia wega ũthiĩro wa magũrũ maku
Proverbs4:27 Menya ũkehũka na mwena wa ũrĩo kana wa ũmotho; kinyũkagia kũgũrũ kuume ũũru-inĩ.

Proverbs6:26 Amu-rĩ

Proverbs6:28 Kana mũndũ akinyange makara me mwaki
Proverbs6:29 No taguo mũndũ ũtonya kwa mũka wa mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ: gũtirĩ ũngĩhutia mũka ta ũcio na ndatuĩke mũgeru ngero.

Proverbs7:1 MŨRŨ wakwa

Proverbs7:3 Ciĩoherere ciara-inĩ ciaku cia moko; ciandĩke kĩhengere-inĩ gĩaku kĩa ngoro.
Proverbs7:4 Ĩra ũũgĩ-wa-ma atĩrĩ

Proverbs10:1 ICI NĨ THIMO cia Suleimani. Mwana mũũgĩ atũmaga ithe akene
Proverbs10:2 Mĩthithũ yumaine na ũmaramari ndĩrĩ ũndũ ĩgunaga
Proverbs10:3 Jehova ndangĩreka ngoro ya mũndũ mũthingu ĩrĩo nĩ ng’aragu
Proverbs10:4 Mũruti wĩra na guoko kũregeru atuĩkaga o mũthĩni
Proverbs10:5 Mũũngania na riũa nĩ mwana wĩ na ũũgĩ: mũtindi-toro hingo ya magetha nĩ mwana wa kũrehe njono.
Proverbs10:6 Mũtwe wa mũndũ mũthingu ũtũũraga ũikarĩirũo nĩ irathimo
Proverbs10:7 Arĩa athingu makĩririkanwo nĩ kũrathimwo marathimagwo
Proverbs10:8 Ũrĩa wĩ na ũũgĩ wa ngoro nĩetĩkagĩra mawatho
Proverbs10:9 Mũthii na mĩthiĩre mĩkinyanĩru athiaga e na mwĩhoko
Proverbs10:10 Muunĩri ũrĩa ũngĩ riitho nĩ mũrehi wa haaro: mũndũ wa kũrũithia ũrĩa ũngĩ ũtheri-inĩ nĩ mũrehi wa thayũ.
Proverbs10:11 Kanua ka mũndũ mũthingu nĩ gĩthima kĩa muoyo
Proverbs10:12 Rũthũũro rũtombothorithagia mahiũrania
Proverbs10:13 Mĩromo-inĩ ya mũndũ ũũĩ gũkũũrana
Proverbs10:14 Andũ arĩa ogĩ meigagĩra ũmenyo mũthithũ
Proverbs10:15 Ũtonga wa mũndũ gĩtonga nĩ ta gĩtũũro e nakĩo kĩirige na hinya: ũkĩa wa arĩa ahũthũ nĩguo ũmaanangithagia.
Proverbs10:16 Ũrĩmi wa andũ arĩa athingu uumaga muoyo: uumithio wa arĩa aaganu uumaga o mahĩtia.
Proverbs10:17 Ũrĩa ũiguaga agĩtaarũo
Proverbs10:18 Mũhitha rũthũũro na ngoro aaragia na mĩromo ya ũrongo
Proverbs10:19 Kwaria ndeto nyingĩ
Proverbs10:20 Rũrĩmĩ rũa mũndũ mũthingu nĩ ta betha ya ũthuro: nayo ngoro ya mũndũ mwaganu
Proverbs10:21 Mĩromo ya arĩa athingu nĩĩheaga andũ aingĩ gĩa kũrĩa
Proverbs10:22 Kĩrathimo kĩa Jehova nĩkĩo kĩrehage ũtonga
Proverbs10:23 Harĩ mũndũ kĩrimũ gwĩka naĩ nĩ ta ithako
Proverbs10:24 Mũndũ mwaganu
Proverbs10:25 Kĩhuhũkanio kĩahĩtũka
Proverbs10:26 Ta rũgagati rũa thiki magego-inĩ
Proverbs10:27 Gwĩtigĩra Jehova nĩkuongererithagia mũndũ matukũ
Proverbs10:28 Itanya rĩa arĩa athingu
Proverbs10:29 Njĩra ya Jehova harĩ ũrĩa mwĩkindĩru nĩ kĩirigo kĩa hinya
Proverbs10:30 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu ndarĩ hingo akenyenyeka
Proverbs10:31 Kanua ka mũndũ mũthingu gathundũraga ũũgĩ-ũrĩa-wa-ma
Proverbs10:32 Arĩa athingu
Proverbs11:1 Ratiri ya kũhenania nĩ kĩndũ kĩĩ magigi harĩ Jehova
Proverbs11:2 Gwoka mwĩgerero
Proverbs11:3 Andũ arĩa arũngĩrĩru
Proverbs11:4 Ũtonga ndũrĩ kũguna ũngĩgunana mũthĩ ũrĩa wa matũkũya
Proverbs11:5 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũkinyanĩru
Proverbs11:6 Ũthingu wa arĩa arũngĩrĩru nĩ kũmateithũra ũrĩmateithũraga
Proverbs11:7 Mũndũ mwaganu aakua
Proverbs11:8 Ũrĩa mũthingu nĩatharagwo mĩnyamaro-inĩ
Proverbs11:9 Mũndũ ũtatĩĩte Ngai aaninithia mũndũ wa itũũra rĩao na kanua
Proverbs11:10 Rĩrĩa arĩa athingu maragaacĩra
Proverbs11:11 Tondũ wa kĩrathimo kĩa andũ arĩa athingu
Proverbs11:12 Mũndũ kũrurũka ũrĩa ũngĩ nĩ wĩcirio atarĩ
Proverbs11:13 Mũcangi na ndeto cia mũhuhu nĩatuhũraga maũndũ ma ndundu
Proverbs11:14 Kũndũ gũtarĩ mĩtabarĩre mĩega
Proverbs11:15 Ũrĩa ũtuĩkĩte ithenya rĩa mũndũ mũgeni no agatuurũo
Proverbs11:16 Mũtumia ũrĩa wĩ ngoga agĩaga na gĩtĩo
Proverbs11:17 Mũiguanĩri-tha nĩ mwĩĩki wega ngoro yake mwene
Proverbs11:18 Mũndũ mwaganu
Proverbs11:19 Ũrĩa ũrũmainie na ũthingu
Proverbs11:20 Arĩa a ngoro hotomu nĩ kĩndũ kĩĩ magigi harĩ Jehova
Proverbs11:21 Ona kwanyitanwo moko
Proverbs11:22 Gĩcũhĩ gĩa thahabu kĩĩ iniũrũ rĩa ngũrũe: nĩ taguo mũka mũthaka atariĩ ũtarĩ ũgerereri.
Proverbs11:23 Wega noguo mwĩrirĩrio wa mũndũ mũthingu
Proverbs11:24 Kũrĩ ũitangaga
Proverbs11:25 Wa ngoro ngamini nĩ kũnorio arĩnoragio
Proverbs11:26 Mũrega na mbembe aigĩte
Proverbs11:27 Ũrĩa ũcaragĩrĩria o maũndũ mega
Proverbs11:28 Mwĩhoki ũtonga wake nĩ kũgũa akagũa
Proverbs11:29 Mũnyamaria mũciĩ wake
Proverbs11:30 Maciaro ma andũ arĩa athingu matuĩkaga mũtĩ wa muoyo; mũndũ wĩ na ũũgĩ-ũrĩa-wa-ma nĩatahaga ngoro cia andũ.
Proverbs11:31 Rĩrĩi! Andũ arĩa athingu makĩrĩ a kũherithio me gũkũ thĩ-rĩ
Proverbs12:1 Mwendi gũtaarũo nĩ mwenda ũmenyi

Proverbs12:3 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩĩhanda na maũndũ ma waganu
Proverbs12:4 Mũtumia ũrĩa ngatha nĩwe thũmbĩ ya mũthuriwe
Proverbs12:5 Methugunda ma mũndũ mũthingu nĩ ma kĩhooto
Proverbs12:6 Ndeto cia arĩa aaganu no cia kuoheria andũ mamaite thakame

Proverbs12:9 Kaba mũndũ wonagwo ta atarĩ bata
Proverbs12:10 Mũndũ mũthingu nĩamenyagĩrĩra muoyo wa nyamũ yake

Proverbs12:13 Kwĩhia na mĩromo nĩ mũtego ũgwatagia mwene yo ũcio mũũru
Proverbs12:14 Mũndũ nĩarĩhũnagio wega nĩ maciaro ma kanua gake

Proverbs12:17 Mũtumũri na ndeto cia ma nĩ ũthingu oimũkanagia

Proverbs12:19 Mũromo mwaria-ma ũgũtũũra na hinya kinya tene

Proverbs12:21 Mũtino gũtirĩ ũngĩgwata andũ arĩa athingu
Proverbs12:22 Mĩromo ya maheni nĩ kĩndũ kĩĩ magigi harĩ Jehova

Proverbs12:28 Muoyo wonekaga na njĩra ya ũthingu
Proverbs13:1 Mwana mũũgĩ nĩaiguaga ũtaari wa ithe
Proverbs13:2 Mũndũ arĩrĩaga wega wa maciaro ma kanua gake
Proverbs13:3 Mwĩmenyereri kanua nĩ muoyo wake agitagĩra: mũtumũri mĩromo mũno nĩ mwanangĩko akagĩa naguo.
Proverbs13:4 Ngoro ya kĩgũta nĩĩĩriragĩria

Proverbs13:6 Mũndũ wa mĩthiĩre mĩgima

Proverbs13:8 Gĩkũũri kĩa muoyo wa mũndũ nĩ ũtonga wake
Proverbs13:9 Ũtheri wa andũ arĩa athingu nĩ gũcangarara ũcangararaga
Proverbs13:10 Mwĩgerero ũrehage o njũgitano
Proverbs13:11 Indo cia njũka-narua nĩ kũhũa irĩhũagĩrĩra
Proverbs13:12 Ũndũ mũtanye watũũrĩrĩra mũno

Proverbs13:14 Kĩrĩra kĩa mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩ gĩthima kĩa muoyo
Proverbs13:15 Ũgerekereri mwega wa maũndũ ũtũmaga mwene endeke
Proverbs13:16 Mũndũ o wothe mũbarĩrĩri ekaga maũndũ make na ũmenyi
Proverbs13:17 Mũtũmwo mwaganu athiaga kũingĩra ũũru-inĩ

Proverbs13:20 Thiaga thiritũ na andũ arĩa ogĩ
Proverbs13:21 Andũ a mahĩtia

Proverbs13:25 Mũndũ mũthingu arĩaga akehũnĩra
Proverbs14:1 Mũtumia o wothe mũũgĩ nĩ gwaka aakaga nyũmba yake
Proverbs14:2 Mũndũ ũtũũraga e na mĩikarĩre mĩrũngĩrĩru nĩwe mwĩtigĩri Jehova
Proverbs14:3 Kanua ga kĩrimũ ke na rũthanju rũa gũgĩĩtĩũkithia
Proverbs14:4 Kũrĩa gũtatũire ng’ombe
Proverbs14:5 Mũira mwĩhokeku ndangĩaria mathara

Proverbs14:7 Tigana na kĩrimũ
Proverbs14:8 Ũũgĩ wa mũndũ mũbarĩrĩri nĩ kũmenya ũhoro wa njĩra ĩrĩa erekeire
Proverbs14:9 Irimũ cia ũũra-matũ
Proverbs14:10 Nĩ ngoro ĩĩmenyagĩra ũcũngũ ũrĩa ĩĩ naguo
Proverbs14:11 Nyũmba ya mũndũ mwaganu nĩ gũturũrũo ĩgaturũrũo
Proverbs14:12 Kwĩ njĩra mũndũ onaga ta arĩ yo nũngarũ
Proverbs14:13 O na mũndũ agĩtheka
Proverbs14:14 Mũcoki na thutha ngoro-inĩ arĩhũnaga mĩthiĩre ĩo yake
Proverbs14:15 Mũndũ ũtarĩ mũũgĩ etĩkagia ũndũ o wothe
Proverbs14:16 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũũgĩ nĩ gwĩtigĩra etigagĩra
Proverbs14:17 Mũrakari narua nĩekaga maũndũ ma ũkĩgu
Proverbs14:18 Arĩa matarĩ ogĩ
Proverbs14:19 Andũ arĩa oru nĩ a kũinamĩrĩra harĩ arĩa ega

Proverbs14:21 Mũndũ ũmenete ũrĩa ũngĩ wa itũũra nĩ kũhĩtia ahĩtĩtie
Proverbs14:22 Athugundi a ũũru

Proverbs14:24 Andũ arĩa ogĩ
Proverbs14:25 Mũira mwaria-ma nĩateithũrithagia mĩoyo ya andũ
Proverbs14:26 Mũndũ gwĩtigĩra Jehova nĩ kũgĩa na mwĩhoko wa hinya; gwata ciana ciake nĩirĩonaga handũ ha kũũrĩra.
Proverbs14:27 Gwĩtigĩra Jehova nĩ gĩthima kĩa muoyo
Proverbs14:28 Ũndũ wĩkĩrĩrithagia mũthamaki nĩ kũgĩa na kĩrĩndĩ kĩingĩ
Proverbs14:29 Mũndũ ũtahiũhaga kũrakara nĩ mũtaũku mũno

Proverbs15:1 Icokia ihoreri nĩ gũthengia rĩthengagia marũrũ
Proverbs15:2 Rũrĩmĩ rũa mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩrũhũthagĩra ũmenyi na njĩra njega
Proverbs15:3 Maitho ma Jehova monaga kũndũ guothe
Proverbs15:4 Rũrĩmĩ rũrĩa rũhoreragia nĩ ta mũtĩ wa muoyo

Proverbs15:6 Mũciĩ wa mũndũ mũthingu gũikaraga mũthithũ mũnene
Proverbs15:7 Mĩromo ya andũ arĩa ogĩ ĩhunjagia ũmenyi

Proverbs15:11 Kwa-ngoma
Proverbs15:12 Mũtendi ndendaga kũrũithio; ndangĩĩtĩkĩra gũthiĩ harĩ andũ arĩa ogĩ.
Proverbs15:13 Ngoro ngenu ĩtũmaga gĩthiithi kĩa mwene gĩthere
