Jeremiah7:3 Jehova Mũnene wa Ita
Jeremiah7:4 Tigai gũtũũra mwĩhokete mohoro ma kũhenania

Jeremiah7:7 hĩndĩ ĩo nĩngareka mũtũũre kũndũ gũkũ

Jeremiah7:9 Anga nĩ kũiya mũgũkĩiya
Jeremiah7:10 na ningĩ mũgacoka gũũka kũrũgama mbere yakwa
Jeremiah7:11 Anga nyũmba ĩno ĩĩtanĩtio na rĩĩtwa rĩakwa mũkuona ta ĩgĩtuĩtwo ngurunga ya atunyani? Atĩrĩrĩ

Jeremiah8:2 nĩ getha mamaanĩkĩre riũa o na mweri o na mbũtũ ciothe cia njata iria maatũire mendete na magacitungatĩra
Jeremiah8:3 Nakĩo gĩkuũ nĩgĩkeriragĩrio gũkĩra gũtũũra muoyo nĩ andũ arĩa magatigara a kĩruka gĩkĩ kĩũru

Jeremiah8:8 Mwahota atĩa kuuga atĩ
Jeremiah8:9 Andũ arĩa metuaga ogĩ nĩ gũconoka maconokete; nĩ agegearu
Jeremiah8:10 Tondũ ũcio aka ao ngamahe andũ angĩ
Jeremiah8:11 Nĩ kũhoreria mahoreretie mwarĩ wa andũ akwa makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah8:12 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mekaga maũndũ me thahu-rĩ
Jeremiah8:13 Ningĩ Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Nĩ kũnina ngamanina biũ
Jeremiah8:14 Rĩu tũikarĩte o ro ũguo tũkirĩte ki nĩ ũndũ kĩ? Wĩcokanĩrĩnei hamwe
Jeremiah8:15 Tũtũire tũtanyaga atĩ kũgĩe thayũ

Jeremiah10:3 nĩ ũndũ irĩra cia andũ a cio no cia tũhũ. Amu gũtemagwo mũtĩ mũtitũ

Jeremiah10:15 Mĩhianano ĩo no ya tũhũ
Jeremiah10:16 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah10:17 Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah10:18 Nĩ ũndũ Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Ihinda rĩrĩ nĩrĩo ngũingata andũ arĩa matũũraga bũrũri ũyũ ta maikĩtio na kĩgũtha
Jeremiah10:19 Wũi-ĩiya-wakwa nĩ ũndũ wa itihia rĩrĩa ndĩhĩtio-ĩ! Itihia rĩakwa nĩ rĩũru mũno! No nĩ kuuga njugĩte ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah10:20 Hema yakwa nĩyanangĩtwo
Jeremiah10:21 Nĩ gũkorũo arĩithi o nao nĩmatwarĩrĩirio nĩ thuti ta marĩ nyamũ

Jeremiah11:1 ĨNO NĨYO ndũmĩrĩri ĩrĩa yakinyĩrĩire Jeremia yumĩte he Jehova
Jeremiah11:2 Ta thikĩrĩriai mohoro ma kĩrĩkanĩro gĩkĩ
Jeremiah11:3 Mere ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah11:4 o gĩkĩ ndarĩkanĩire na maithe manyu mũthenya ũrĩa ndamarutire bũrũri wa Misiri
Jeremiah11:5 nĩ getha ndũme mwĩhĩtwa ũtũũre ũrũmĩte ũrĩa ndehĩtire ngĩĩra maithe manyu atĩ nĩngamahe bũrũri wĩ bũthi wa iria o na ũũkĩ
Jeremiah11:6 Nake Jehova akĩnjĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah11:7 Nĩ ũndũ ndũire ndaaraga maithe manyu na kĩyo mũno gwata mũthenya ũrĩa ndamarutire bũrũri wa Misiri
Jeremiah11:8 No matiigana kũwathĩkĩra
Jeremiah11:9 Ningĩ Jehova akĩnjĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah11:10 Nĩmacokereire mawaganu ma maithe mao
Jeremiah11:11 Tondũ ũcio Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah11:12 Hĩndĩ ĩo andũ a matũũra ma Juda
Jeremiah11:13 Nĩ ũndũ atĩrĩ
Jeremiah11:14 Tondũ ũcio tiga kũhoera andũ aya

Jeremiah23:1 Hĩ! kaĩ arĩithi arĩa maninaga mbũri cia rũũru rũakwa o na magacihurunja marĩ na haaro-ĩ! Ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga.
Jeremiah23:2 Tondũ ũcio
Jeremiah23:3 Niĩ na niĩ nĩngacokereria mbũri iria itigarĩte cia rũũru rũakwa
Jeremiah23:4 Na rĩ nĩngaciigĩra arĩithi a gũcirĩithia; na itigacoka gwĩtigĩra o na rĩ
Jeremiah23:5 Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah23:6 Matukũ-inĩ make-rĩ
Jeremiah23:7 Tondũ ũcio Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ

Jeremiah23:10 Nĩ gũkorũo thĩ nĩĩiyũrĩte itharia
Jeremiah23:11 Nĩ gũkorũo anabii o na athĩnjĩri-Ngai nĩmethahĩtie
Jeremiah23:12 Tondũ ũcio njĩra ĩrĩa mathiagĩra ĩkamatuĩkĩra o ta kũndũ gũtenderu nduma-inĩ
Jeremiah23:13 Nao anabii arĩa matũũraga Samaria-rĩ
Jeremiah23:14 No rĩrĩ

Jeremiah23:21 Anabii acio-rĩ
Jeremiah23:22 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah23:23 Anga nyonagwo ndĩ Ngai o gũkũ gũkuhĩ
Jeremiah23:24 Anga he mũndũ ũngĩhota kwĩhitha handũ hahitharu mũno na njage kũmuona? Ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekũũria. Githĩ ndiiyũrĩte kũndũ guothe igũrũ na thĩ? Ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekũũria.
Jeremiah23:25 Nĩnjiguĩte ũrĩa anabii moigĩte
Jeremiah23:26 Nĩ nginya hĩndĩ ĩ ũndũ ũcio ũgũtũũra ngoro-inĩ cia anabii acio marathaga ũhoro wa maheni
Jeremiah23:27 o acio macirĩire gũtũma andũ akwa mariganĩrũo nĩ rĩĩtwa rĩakwa nĩ ũndũ wa iroto icio ciao iria maheanaga ũhoro wacio o mũndũ na mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ
Jeremiah23:28 Mũnabii ũrĩa ũrotete kĩroto-rĩ
Jeremiah23:29 Githĩ ũhoro wakwa ndũtariĩ o ta mwaki? Ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekũũria. O na ningĩ githĩ ndũtariĩ o ta nyondo ĩrĩa ĩhehenjaga rũaro rũa ihiga?

Jeremiah25:15 Nĩ ũndũ Jehova Ngai wa Isiraeli anjĩrĩte atĩrĩ
Jeremiah25:16 Nacio nĩikanyua icoke ĩtũgũge na igũrũke
Jeremiah25:17 Hĩndĩ ĩo na niĩ ngĩkĩoya gĩkombe kĩu kĩarĩ guoko-inĩ kwa Jehova
Jeremiah25:18 naguo ũguo nĩ ta kuuga Jerusalemu

Jeremiah25:30 Tondũ ũcio marathĩre mohoro maya mothe

Jeremiah25:34 Atĩrĩrĩ

Jeremiah25:36 Mũgambo wa kĩrĩro kĩa arĩithi
Jeremiah25:37 O naguo ũrĩithio ũrĩa ũtararĩ na ũgwati nĩ gũkira ũkirĩte ihooru nĩ ũndũ wa marakara marĩa manene ma Jehova.
Jeremiah25:38 Nĩ kuumagara oimagarĩte ta mũrũthi ũkiuma kĩmamo-inĩ kĩaguo

Jeremiah30:1 NINGĨ ĩno nĩyo ndũmĩrĩri ĩrĩa yakinyĩrĩire Jeremia yumĩte he Jehova
Jeremiah30:2 Jehova Ngai wa Isiraeli nĩwe ũrakwarĩria
Jeremiah30:3 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Jeremiah30:4 Namo mohoro marĩa Jehova aaririe makoniĩ Isiraeli na Juda nĩmo maya.
Jeremiah30:5 Nĩ gũkorũo Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Nĩtũiguĩte mũgambo wĩ itua-nda
Jeremiah30:6 Rĩu-rĩ
Jeremiah30:7 Hĩ! Gĩtũmi nĩ ũndũ nĩ mũthenya mũnene mũno na gũtirĩ kwagĩa ũngĩ taguo; narĩo nĩ ihinda rĩa Jakubu rĩa kũnyarirĩka
Jeremiah30:8 Ningĩ Jehova Mũnene wa Ita ekuuga ũũ: Nĩgũgakinya atĩrĩ
Jeremiah30:9 no rĩrĩ
Jeremiah30:10 Tondũ ũcio
Jeremiah30:11 Nĩ gũkorũo ndĩ hamwe nawe ngũhonokie; ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga; nĩ ũndũ nĩnganina ndũrĩrĩ ciothe cia kũndũ guothe kũrĩa ngũharaganĩirie
Jeremiah30:12 Nĩ ũndũ Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Nguraro yaku ndĩngĩhoneka
Jeremiah30:13 Gũtirĩ mũndũ wa gũgũthaithanĩrĩra nĩguo wohwo
Jeremiah30:14 Anyanya aku othe nĩmariganĩirũo nĩwe; matikũrongoragia
Jeremiah30:15 Ũgũkĩrĩra nĩ ũndũ wa nguraro ĩo ũgurarĩtio nĩkĩ? Ruo rũrĩa wĩ naruo rũtingĩhoneka
Jeremiah30:16 Tondũ ũcio andũ othe arĩa makũrĩaga o nao nĩmakario; o nacio thũ ciaku ciothe
Jeremiah30:17 Nĩ ũndũ nĩngagũcokeria hinya waku
Jeremiah30:18 Ningĩ Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah30:19 Na thĩinĩ wao nĩgũkaiguagwo ũhoro wa gũcokanĩria ngatho
Jeremiah30:20 Ciana ciao nĩikonagwo itariĩ o ta ũrĩa ciatariĩ tene
Jeremiah30:21 Nake mũnene wa andũ ao akoima o thĩinĩ wao kĩũmbe
Jeremiah30:22 Inyuĩ na inyuĩ nĩmũgatuĩka andũ akwa
Jeremiah30:23 Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah30:24 Ningĩ marakara marĩa meĩ ma Jehova matikahũahũa tiga o hĩndĩ ĩrĩa agakorũo ekĩte na akahingia ũndũ o ũrĩa acirĩire gwĩka na ngoro yake; na rĩrĩ
Jeremiah31:1 Ihinda rĩu-rĩ
Jeremiah31:2 Ningĩ Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah31:3 Nake Jehova aanyumĩrĩire kũu kũraya akĩnjĩra ũũ: Ti-itherũ ngwendete wendo ũrĩa ũtũũraga tene na tene; tondũ ũcio no ngirĩrĩirie gũgwĩka maũndũ ma ũtugi.
Jeremiah31:4 Na nĩngacoka gũgwaka
Jeremiah31:5 O na ningĩ nĩũgacoka kũhanda mĩgũnda ya mĩthabibu irĩma-inĩ cia Samaria igũrũ
Jeremiah31:6 Nĩ ũndũ nĩhakagĩa mũthenya
Jeremiah31:7 Nĩ ũndũ Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Kũngũĩrai Jakubu
Jeremiah31:8 Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah31:9 Nao magoka makĩrĩraga
Jeremiah31:10 Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah31:11 Nĩ ũndũ Jehova nĩakũũrĩte Jakubu
Jeremiah31:12 Nao magoka mainĩre kĩrĩma-inĩ gĩa Zayuni
Jeremiah31:13 Hĩndĩ ĩo airĩtu nĩmagakena marĩ rũĩmbo-inĩ
Jeremiah31:14 O nacio ngoro cia athĩnjĩri-Ngai nĩngacihũnia na bũthi
Jeremiah31:15 Ningĩ Jehova ekuuga ũũ: He mũgambo ũraiguwo Rama wa gũcakaya na wa kũrĩra na kĩgi
Jeremiah31:16 Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Wĩgirĩrĩrie mũgambo waku ũtige kũiguwo ũkĩrĩra
Jeremiah31:17 Ningĩ kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro kĩĩ ho gĩa atĩ ũhoro waku nĩũkaagĩrĩra thutha-inĩ. Ũguo nĩguo Jehova ekuuga. Nacio ciana ciaku nĩigacoka gũũka ikinye bũrũri ũyũ wacio kĩũmbe.
Jeremiah31:18 Ti-itherũ nĩnjiguĩte Efiraimu agĩĩcakaĩra we mwene akiugaga ũũ: Wee nĩũ’herithĩtie
Jeremiah31:19 Ĩĩ
Jeremiah31:20 Anga Efiraimu towe mũrũ wakwa ũrĩa nyendete mũno? Anga towe mwana wa rũendo? Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Jeremiah31:21 Wĩhandĩrei inyamũ cia gwĩkĩra kĩmenyithia njĩra-inĩ
Jeremiah31:22 Nĩ nginya hĩndĩ ĩ ũgũtũũra ũriũngaga ũũ na ũũ

Jeremiah31:40 Nakĩo gĩtuamba gĩothe kĩrĩa gĩteagwo ciimba
Jeremiah32:1 NINGĨ ĩno nĩyo ndũmĩrĩri ĩrĩa yakinyĩrĩire Jeremia yumĩte he Jehova mwaka wa ikũmi ĩrĩa Zedekia

Jeremiah32:20 Wee nĩwe waringire ciama o na ũkĩonania morirũ kũu bũrũri wa Misiri
Jeremiah32:21 Ningĩ ũkĩruta andũ aku bũrũri wa Misiri na ũndũ wa kũringa ciama o na kuonania morirũ
Jeremiah32:22 nawe ũgĩkĩmahe bũrũri ũyũ
Jeremiah32:23 nao magĩtonya kuo
Jeremiah32:24 Ta rora ihumbu cia tĩri iria ciũmbĩtwo nĩ andũ arĩa mokĩte itũũra-inĩ rĩrĩ marĩĩgwatĩre; ti-therũ itũũra rĩrĩ nĩrĩrekereirio rĩkaneanwo moko-inĩ ma Akalidei arĩa mekũrũa mbaara narĩo
Jeremiah32:25 Wee nawe Mwathani Ngai ũnjĩrĩte ũũ: Wĩgũrĩre mũgũnda ũyũ na mbia

Jeremiah32:32 nĩ ũndũ wa ũũru wothe wa ciana cia Isiraeli

Jeremiah33:1 Ningĩ ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova ĩgĩkinyĩrĩra Jeremia ihinda rĩa kerĩ arĩ o muohe kũu kĩhingo-inĩ kĩa arangĩri

Jeremiah33:4 Nĩ gũkorũo Jehova

Jeremiah33:8 Na nĩngamatheria mathirũo nĩ ũmaramari wao wothe ũrĩa maananjĩka; o ũmaramari wao wothe ũrĩa maananjĩka ndĩmohere

Jeremiah36:1 NA GŨGĨKINYA atĩrĩ

Jeremiah36:3 Hihi no gũkorũo andũ a nyũmba ya Juda nĩmekũigua ũhoro wa ũũru wothe ũrĩa njirĩire kũmeka
Jeremiah36:4 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jeremia agĩgĩĩta Baruku wa Neria; nake Baruku agĩkĩandĩka mohoro mothe ma Jehova marĩa moimaga kanua ka Jeremia

Jeremiah49:39 No nĩgũgakinya atĩrĩ
Jeremiah50:1 ĨNO NĨYO ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova ĩkoniĩ Babuloni
Jeremiah50:2 Umbũranĩrai ũhoro harĩ ndũrĩrĩ
Jeremiah50:3 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Jeremiah50:4 Matukũ-inĩ macio
Jeremiah50:5 Nĩigatuĩria njĩra ya gũthiĩ Zayuni cierekeire kuo
Jeremiah50:6 Andũ akwa matuĩkĩte o ta mbũri iria ciũrĩte
Jeremiah50:7 nao arĩa othe maamonaga makamarĩa. Nacio thũ ciao ikoiga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah50:8 Ũrai muume Babuloni mwehere bũrũri wa Akalidei
Jeremiah50:9 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Jeremiah50:10 Kalidei nĩ gũtahwo gũgatahanwo
Jeremiah50:11 
Jeremiah50:12 Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah50:13 Tondũ wa marakara ma Jehova-rĩ
Jeremiah50:14 Wĩthabei wega mũtharĩkĩre Babuloni na ndwere ciothe
Jeremiah50:15 Riugĩrĩriei na ndwere ciothe ciarĩo; rĩu nĩrĩĩneanite rĩo rĩene; njirigo ciarĩo cia hinya nĩ ngũu thĩ
Jeremiah50:16 Ninai ahandi mehere kũu Babuloni
Jeremiah50:17 Isiraeli atariĩ ta ng’ondu yũrũrĩte
Jeremiah50:18 Tondũ ũcio Jehova Mũnene wa Ita
Jeremiah50:19 nake Isiraeli ndĩmũcokie ũrĩithio-inĩ wake
Jeremiah50:20 Matukũ-inĩ macio
Jeremiah50:21 Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah50:22 Kĩgirĩko gĩa ita nĩkĩraiguwo bũrũri ũcio
Jeremiah50:23 Hĩ! Kaĩ nyondo ĩrĩa ĩtũire ĩhũraga thĩ yothe nĩĩtemengetwo ĩkoinangwo-ĩ! Hĩ! Kaĩ Babuloni nĩrĩkirĩte ihooru thĩinĩ wa ndũrĩrĩ-i!
Jeremiah50:24 Nĩngũigĩire mũtego wa gũkũgwatia
Jeremiah50:25 Jehova nĩ kũhingũra ahingũrĩte ũigo wake wa indo cia mbaara
Jeremiah50:26 Thiĩi mũgagũũkĩrĩre mũkuumĩte na ndwere ciothe; hokorai indo ciakuo iria irĩ makũmbĩ thĩinĩ; mũkũhĩbe o hĩba
Jeremiah50:27 Ũragai ndegwa ciakuo ciothe
Jeremiah50:28 He mũgambo ũraiguwo wa arĩa maroora magethara moimĩte bũrũri wa Babuloni
Jeremiah50:29 Ĩtai andũ arĩa maikagia mĩguĩ mokĩrĩre Babuloni
Jeremiah50:30 Tondũ ũcio aanake arĩo nĩ kũgũa makagũa njĩra-inĩ ciarĩo moragĩtwo
Jeremiah50:31 Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah50:32 Mwĩtĩi ũcio nĩekũhĩngwo agũe thĩ
Jeremiah50:33 Ningĩ Jehova Mũnene wa Ita ekuuga ũũ: Ciana cia Isiraeli o na cia Juda nĩihinyĩrĩirio ciothe hamwe
Jeremiah50:34 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah50:35 He rũhiũ rũa njora rũcomoreirũo Akaiidei o na andũ arĩa matũũraga Babuloni
Jeremiah50:36 Ningĩ rũhiũ rũa njora rũgacomorerũo andũ akuo arĩa a mwĩnyogoro
Jeremiah50:37 Ningĩ he rũhiũ rũa njora rũcomoreirũo mbarathi ciakuo
Jeremiah50:38 Maĩ makuo nĩ kũhũithio mahũithĩtio
Jeremiah50:39 Tondũ ũcio nyamũ cia gĩthaka na mbwe nĩcio igatũũra kuo
Jeremiah50:40 O ta ũrĩa gwatuĩkire Ngai aang’aũrania Sodomu na Gomora
Jeremiah50:41 Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah50:42 Andũ acio maroka magwete mota mao na matimũ
Jeremiah50:43 Mũthamaki wa Babuloni nĩaiguĩte ngumo yao
Jeremiah50:44 Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah50:45 Tondũ wa maũndũ macio ta thikĩrĩriai kĩrĩra kĩa Jehova kĩrĩa athugundĩire Babuloni; o na matanya marĩa atanyĩte eke andũ arĩa matũũraga Kalidei; ti-itherũ nĩ gũkururio magakururio marutwo kuo
Jeremiah50:46 Thĩ nĩ gũthingitha ĩrathingitha nĩ mũrurumo wa Babuloni rĩkĩĩgwatĩrũo
Jeremiah51:1 ATĨRĨRĨ
Jeremiah51:2 Nakuo kũu Babuloni ndĩgũtwarithie andũ a gũkũhurunja
Jeremiah51:3 Mũikia wa mũguĩ nĩatunge ũta wake
Jeremiah51:4 Kũu bũrũri wa Akalidei makagũa moragĩtwo
Jeremiah51:5 Nĩ gũkorũo Isiraeli ndatirikĩtwo
Jeremiah51:6 Wĩtharei muume kũu Babuloni
Jeremiah51:7 Babuloni rĩratariĩ ta gĩkombe gĩa thahabu gĩĩ guoko kwa Jehova
Jeremiah51:8 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:9 Nĩtũngihonetie Babuloni
Jeremiah51:10 Na rĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:11 Noorai mĩguĩ yũhĩge mũno
Jeremiah51:12 Handai kĩbebero kũng’ethanĩra na njirigo cia Babuloni
Jeremiah51:13 Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:14 Jehova Mũnene wa Ita nĩ kwĩhĩta ehĩtĩte akĩgwetaga rĩĩtwa rĩake we mwene
Jeremiah51:15 Ngai nĩwe wombire thĩ na hinya wake
Jeremiah51:16 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aagũũthũka-rĩ
Jeremiah51:17 Andũ othe nĩmaagĩte ũmenyo
Jeremiah51:18 Mĩhianano ĩo no ya tũhũ
Jeremiah51:19 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:20 Wee nĩwe ithanwa rĩakwa rĩa kũrũa mbaara
Jeremiah51:21 ningĩ ’hehenjange mbarathi na mũmĩhaici na ũndũ wa hinya ũcio waku
Jeremiah51:22 o na ningĩ na ũndũ wa hinya ũcio waku ’hehenjange ngari ya ita o na mũmĩtwari
Jeremiah51:23 na ningĩ na ũndũ wa hinya waku ’hehenjange mũrĩithi o na rũũru rũake rũa mbũri; na ningĩ na ũndũ wa hinya waku ’hehenjange mũrĩmi wa mũgũnda o na ndegwa ciake cia kũrĩma; o na ningĩ na ũndũ wa hinya o ro ũcio waku
Jeremiah51:24 Na rĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:25 Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:26 Na andũ matikoya harĩ wee ihiga rĩa koine
Jeremiah51:27 Handai kĩbebero bũrũri ũcio
Jeremiah51:28 Thagathagai andũ a ndũrĩrĩ marĩũkĩrĩre
Jeremiah51:29 Bũrũri wothe nĩ gũthingitha ũrathingitha na ũkagwatwo nĩ ruo
Jeremiah51:30 Njamba cia Babuloni nĩitigĩte kũrũa mbaara
Jeremiah51:31 Mũtwari ndũmĩrĩri ũmwe agateng’era agatũngana na ũngĩ
Jeremiah51:32 Ningĩ mariũko nĩmegwatĩirũo
Jeremiah51:33 Nĩ gũkorũo Jehova Mũnene wa Ita
Jeremiah51:34 Nebukadirezaru
Jeremiah51:35 Andũ arĩa matũũraga Zayuni makoiga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:36 Tondũ ũcio Jehova ekuuga ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:37 Narĩo Babuloni rĩgatuĩka hĩba cia mahuti o ro ũguo
Jeremiah51:38 Makararamanĩra ta nyanake cia mĩrũthi; na marume ta njaũ cia mĩrũthi.
Jeremiah51:39 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa magakorũo macinĩtwo nĩ thuti-rĩ
Jeremiah51:40 Ngamaikũrũkia ta tũgondu tũgũthiĩ gũthĩnjwo
Jeremiah51:41 Hĩ! Kaĩ Sheshaka nĩrĩigwatĩirũo-i! Kaĩ itũũra rĩrĩa igooce nĩ thĩ yothe nĩ ikorerere na kĩguũ-i! Hĩ! Kaĩ Babuloni nĩrĩtigĩtwo thĩinĩ wa ndũrĩrĩ rĩkirĩte ihooru-ĩ!
Jeremiah51:42 Babuloni nĩ rĩhube nĩ iria
Jeremiah51:43 Matũũra marĩo nĩmakirĩte ihooru
Jeremiah51:44 Beli ngamĩcirithĩria o kũu Babuloni
Jeremiah51:45 Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:46 Na mũtikareke ngoro cianyu ciikare ta iringĩkĩte
Jeremiah51:47 Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:48 Hĩndĩ ĩo igũrũ na thĩ
Jeremiah51:49 O ta ũrĩa Babuloni rĩatũmire andũ a Isiraeli magũe thĩ moragĩtwo-rĩ
Jeremiah51:50 Atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:51 Tũrĩ aconoku nĩ kũigua ũrĩa tũmenereirio; tũhaana ta tũrĩ ahumbe ũthiũ nĩ thoni; nĩ gũkorũo andũ a kũngĩ nĩmetonyetie handũ harĩa haamũre ha nyũmba ĩrĩa ya Jehova.
Jeremiah51:52 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:53 O na kũngĩtuĩka atĩ Babuloni rĩĩtũũgĩrĩtie rĩgakinya o matu-inĩ
Jeremiah51:54 He mũgambo wa kĩrĩro ũraiguwo uumĩte Babuloni
Jeremiah51:55 Nĩ ũndũ Jehova nĩwe ũratahana kũu Babuloni
Jeremiah51:56 nĩ gũkorũo mũtahani nĩarĩkorereire
Jeremiah51:57 Anene arĩo nĩngatũma marĩwo nĩ njohi
Jeremiah51:58 Ningĩ Jehova Mũnene wa Ita ekuuga ũũ: Thingo iria njariĩ cia kũu Babuloni nĩikang’aũranio biũ
Jeremiah51:59 Ũyũ nĩguo ũhoro ũrĩa mũnabii Jeremia aathire Seraia
Jeremiah51:60 Nake Jeremia akĩandĩka maũũru mothe marĩa magakinya kũu Babuloni
Jeremiah51:61 Nake Jeremia agĩkĩĩra Seraia atĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:62 ũcoke uuge atĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:63 Na nĩgũgakinya atĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:64 uuge atĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:1 NA RĨRĨ
Jeremiah52:2 Nake agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa monagwo marĩ moru nĩ Jehova
Jeremiah52:3 Na rĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:4 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:5 Itũũra rĩu rĩgĩkĩrigicĩrio nĩ getha rĩtunyanwo o nginya mwaka wa ikũmi na ũmwe ĩrĩa Zedekia aakorirũo athamakĩte.
Jeremiah52:6 Na rĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:7 Hĩndĩ ĩo rũthingo rũa itũũra rĩu rũgĩtuwo mwanya wa gũtonyerũo; nao mona ũguo andũ othe a ita magĩkĩũra ũtukũ
Jeremiah52:8 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:9 Hĩndĩ ĩo Akalidei magĩkĩnyita mũthamaki
Jeremiah52:10 Nake mũthamaki wa Babuloni akĩũragithĩria ariũ a Zedekia o hau mbere yake ameroreire o ro ũguo
Jeremiah52:11 nake Zedekia we mwene akĩmũkũũrithia maitho; ningĩ mũthamaki ũcio wa Babuloni agĩcoka akĩmuoha na bĩngũ akĩmũtwara Babuloni
Jeremiah52:12 Na rĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:13 nake agĩgĩcina nyũmba ya Jehova
Jeremiah52:14 Nayo mbũtũ yothe ya ita ya Akalidei ĩrĩa yarĩ na mũnene ũcio wa arangĩri ĩgĩtharia thingo cia Jerusalemu mbarĩ ciothe.
Jeremiah52:15 Nake Nebuzaradani
Jeremiah52:16 No rĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:17 Na rĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:18 O nacio nyũngũ
Jeremiah52:19 Ningĩ thĩinĩ wa ikombe
Jeremiah52:20 Na rĩri
Jeremiah52:21 Naguo ũraihu wa gĩtugĩ o gĩtugĩ warĩ mĩkono ikũmi na ĩnana
Jeremiah52:22 Ningĩ kĩarĩ kĩongo kĩrĩ mũnduru gĩa gĩcango igũrũ rĩakĩo
Jeremiah52:23 Na rĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:24 Nake mũnene ũcio wa arangĩri akĩnyita Seraia
Jeremiah52:25 nakuo kũu itũũra-inĩ thĩinĩ akĩnyita mũrori ũmwe wa maũndũ ma nyũmba ya mũthamaki
Jeremiah52:26 Nake Nebuzaradani
Jeremiah52:27 Nake mũthamaki wa Babuloni akĩmahũra
Jeremiah52:28 Aya nĩo andũ arĩa Nebukadirezaru aatahire agĩthiĩ nao; mwaka wa mũgwanja-rĩ
Jeremiah52:29 naguo mwaka wa ikũmi na ĩnana ĩrĩa Nebukadirezaru aakorirũo athamakĩte
Jeremiah52:30 o naguo mwaka wa mĩrongo iĩrĩ na ĩtatũ ĩrĩa Nebukadirezaru aakorirũo athamakĩte-rĩ
Jeremiah52:31 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:32 nake akĩmwarĩria na ũhoreri
Jeremiah52:33 Nake akĩmũkũũranĩria nguo ciake cia korokoro-inĩ
Jeremiah52:34 Naho ha ũhoro wa indo cia kũmũtũũria-rĩ
Lamentations1:1 HĨ! Ĩ kaĩ gĩtũũro nĩgĩikaire gĩĩkonotete-ĩ
Lamentations1:2 Ũtukũ araaraga akĩrĩra
Lamentations1:3 Juda nĩ gũthama athamĩrĩire kwene nĩ ũndũ wa mathĩna na tondũ wa ũkombo mũnene; atũire rũrĩrĩ-inĩ rũcenji
Lamentations1:4 Mathiĩro ma gũthiĩ Zayuni no gũcakaya macakayaga nĩ tondũ gũtirĩ andũ mokaga gĩathĩ kĩrĩa gĩathane; ihingo ciake ciothe
Lamentations1:5 Amuku ake matuĩkĩte atĩ nĩo mũtwe
Lamentations1:6 Mwarĩ ũyũ
Lamentations1:7 Matukũ maya ma thĩna wake o na ma kũnyarirĩka gwake Jerusalemu no aririkaine maũndũ mothe marĩa maamũkenagia
Lamentations1:8 Jerusalemu we nĩahĩtĩtie ũũru mũno
Lamentations1:9 Gĩko gĩake nĩkĩregwatĩrĩire marinda-inĩ make; mũrigĩrĩrio wake
Lamentations1:10 Mũmuku we nĩatambũrũkĩtie guoko akanyita indo ciake ciothe iria iramũkenagia: nĩeoneire ũrĩa arĩa acenji metonyetie handũ harĩa hake haamũre
Lamentations1:11 Andũ ake othe no gũcaya macayaga magĩcaragĩrĩria gĩa kũrĩa; marutĩte indo ciao iria iramakenagia nĩ getha mone irio cia kũriũkia ngoro ciao: Jehova
Lamentations1:12 Nĩ inyuĩ inyuothe ahĩtũki! anga ũhoro ũyũ mũkuona ta mũtarĩ ũndũ naguo? rorai
Lamentations1:13 Andũmĩire mwaki uumĩte igũrũ ũkandonya mahĩndĩ thĩinĩ
Lamentations1:14 Icoki rĩrĩa rĩa mehia makwa
Lamentations1:15 Ihoti ciakwa ciothe iria ii thĩinĩ wakwa
Lamentations1:16 Tondũ wa maũndũ macio njikaire o ngĩrĩraga; riitho rĩakwa
Lamentations1:17 Zayuni aikaire o ro aarĩte moko; gũtingĩoneka mũndũ o na ũmwe wa kũmũkiria; Jehova nĩaathanĩte ũhoro wa Jakubu
Lamentations1:18 Jehova nĩ wa kĩhooto
Lamentations1:19 Ndetire arĩa twendaine
Lamentations1:20 Jehova
Lamentations1:21 Nĩkũiguĩtwo ũrĩa njayaga
Lamentations1:22 Ũũru wacio wothe ta nĩũkinye mbere-inĩ yaku; nawe gĩciĩke o ta ũguo na niĩ ũnjĩkĩte nĩ ũndũ wa mahĩtia makwa mothe
Lamentations2:1 HĨ! Ĩ kaĩ Mwathani nĩakĩhubĩte mwarĩ ũyũ
Lamentations2:2 Mwathani nĩamerũkĩtie itũũro ciothe cia Jakubu
Lamentations2:3 Rũhĩa rũa Isiraeli arũrengete ruothe arĩ na marakara marĩa mahiũ; guoko gwake kwa ũrĩo nĩakũgũithĩtie gũgathengera thũ
Lamentations2:4 Agetete ũta wake o ta thũ
Lamentations2:5 Mwathani nĩagĩtuĩkĩte ta thũ; nĩ kũmerũkia amerũkĩtie Isiraeli; amerũkĩtie nyũmba ciake ciothe iria cia ũnene
Lamentations2:6 Ningĩ gĩthũnũ gĩake nĩagĩthengetie o na hinya
Lamentations2:7 Kĩgongona gĩake
Lamentations2:8 Rũirigo rũa kwa mwarĩ ũyũ
Lamentations2:9 Ihingo ciakuo ihorokeire na thĩ; mĩgĩĩko yakuo nayo ya kũhinga
Lamentations2:10 Athuri a kwa mwarĩ ũyũ
Lamentations2:11 Maitho makwa nĩ kũira mairĩte nĩ gũita maithori
Lamentations2:12 Tũroria manyina atĩrĩ
Lamentations2:13 Hĩ! ngũkuonia ũhoro na kĩhooto kĩrĩkũ? ngũgerekanie na kĩ
Lamentations2:14 Anabii a gwaku
Lamentations2:15 Ahĩtũki othe nĩ hĩ makũhũrahũragĩra; o wee mwarĩ ũyũ
Lamentations2:16 Thũ ciaku ciothe nĩigwathamĩirie tũnua; nĩ mĩnjũri iringaga ikĩhagaranagia magego; ciugaga atĩrĩ
Lamentations2:17 Jehova nĩarĩkĩtie gwĩka ũrĩa aathugundire
Lamentations2:18 Ngoro cia kĩrĩndĩ nĩciakaĩire Mwathani: Ĩ rũirigo rũa mwarĩ ũyũ
Lamentations2:19 Arahũka
Lamentations2:20 Ĩ Jehova-ĩ
Lamentations2:21 Tũmwana o na athuri nĩ akomu thĩ o gũkũ mabarabara-inĩ; airĩtu akwa o na aanake akwa nĩ airũre nĩ njomo: nĩ kũmoraga ũramoragire mũthenya ũrĩa ũrarakaire; ũmaitĩte mũito
Lamentations2:22 Ũnjĩtĩire matebebia ma kũndebebia mandigicĩrie mĩena yothe
Lamentations3:1 NIĨ-RĨ
Lamentations3:2 Nĩwe ũndwarĩte akanjeeria nduma-inĩ
Lamentations3:3 Ti-itherũ atindaga akĩhiũria guoko nĩ ũndũ wakwa rĩngĩ na rĩngĩ o mũthenya wothe.
Lamentations3:4 Nyama cia mwĩrĩ wakwa
Lamentations3:5 Nĩ kũnjakĩrĩra anjakĩrĩire
Lamentations3:6 Andũirie kũndũ kũrĩa kwĩ nduma
Lamentations3:7 Anjirigĩire na mbarĩ ciothe
Lamentations3:8 Ĩĩ-ni
Lamentations3:9 Ĩng’aratua ciakwa cia gũthiĩra acihingĩte na mahiga marĩa maacũhie
Lamentations3:10 Anduĩkĩire ta nyamũ ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo nduba rĩrĩa yoheirie
Lamentations3:11 Nĩ kũhong’ora ahong’orete mĩgendere yakwa
Lamentations3:12 Agetete ũta wake na aka’handa nduĩke cabaa wa kũrathagwo na mũguĩ.
Lamentations3:13 Atũmĩte ciano cia thiaka wake i’hungure o higo-inĩ.
Lamentations3:14 Nduĩkĩte wa gũthekagĩrĩrũo nĩ kĩrĩndĩ giitũ gĩothe; nĩ niĩ rũĩmbo rũakĩo rũrĩa gĩtindaga gĩkĩina.
Lamentations3:15 Anjiyũrĩtie maũndũ marũrũ
Lamentations3:16 Ningĩ nĩang’ethũrangithĩtie magego makwa na mũthanga
Lamentations3:17 Wee-rĩ
Lamentations3:18 Ngiuga atĩrĩ
Lamentations3:19 Ta kĩririkane thĩna wakwa na kĩnyarirĩko
Lamentations3:20 Maũndũ macio ngoro yakwa no ĩmaririkaine
Lamentations3:21 Ũhoro ũyũ nĩguo ngwĩririkania
Lamentations3:22 Atĩ nĩ ũndũ wa mĩtugĩre ya Jehova
Lamentations3:23 Mĩtugĩre yake ĩrokaga ĩrĩ o mĩerũ rũcinĩ o rũcinĩ; kwĩhokeka gwaku-rĩ
Lamentations3:24 Ngoro yakwa yugaga ũũ
Lamentations3:25 Jehova nĩaagagĩrĩra arĩa mamwetagĩrĩra
Lamentations3:26 Nĩ wega mũndũ atanyage ũhonokio wa Jehova
Lamentations3:27 Mũndũ nĩaagĩrĩirũo nĩ gũikara na icoki ta ng’ombe rĩrĩa e mwanake.
Lamentations3:28 Nĩecũnjũme
Lamentations3:29 Nĩarũmanie kanua na tĩri; no gũgĩkorũo aahota kũgĩa na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro.
Lamentations3:30 Nĩerekerie rũthĩa na harĩ ũrĩa ũkũmũgũtha; nĩakĩiyũre kũmeneka o kũiyũra.
Lamentations3:31 Amu Mwathani ndangĩteana iteana rĩa tene na rene.
Lamentations3:32 Thima-rĩ
Lamentations3:33 Amu ndonagia ciana cia kĩrĩndĩ thĩna kana agaciĩkĩra kĩeha nĩ kwenda kwa ngoro yake.
Lamentations3:34 Gũthethera mĩgwate yothe ya thĩ nĩ kũmĩranga na makinya-rĩ
Lamentations3:35 Kũhong’orera mũndũ ũndũ wake ũrĩa wa kĩhooto ũthiũ-inĩ wa Ũrĩa-wĩ-Igũrũ-Mũno-rĩ
Lamentations3:36 Kũhotomeria mũndũ cira wake-rĩ
Lamentations3:37 Nũ ũrĩa uugaga ũndũ
Lamentations3:38 Githĩ kanua ka Ũrĩa-wĩ-Igũrũ-Mũno tiho hoimaga maũndũ marĩa moru o na marĩa mega?
Lamentations3:39 Mũndũ ũrĩ muoyo-rĩ
Lamentations3:40 Nĩtwĩthuuthuuriei mĩthiĩre iitũ
Lamentations3:41 Nituoere Mũrungu o ũcio wĩ matu-inĩ ngoro ciitũ o hamwe na moko maitũ.
Lamentations3:42 Ithuĩ-rĩ
Lamentations3:43 Nĩwĩhumbĩire na marakara ũgagĩtũthingata; kũũragana nĩũũraganĩte na ndũnaigua tha.
Lamentations3:44 Wĩhumbĩire na itu
Lamentations3:45 Ũtũmĩte tũtuĩke ta makũro na mahuti gatagatĩ ka iruka cia andũ.
Lamentations3:46 Thũ ciitũ ciothe nĩitwathamĩirie tũnua.
Lamentations3:47 Tũkorereirũo nĩ guoya o na irima rĩrĩa rĩa gĩkuũ
Lamentations3:48 Riitho rĩakwa rĩikaire o rĩkĩnyũrũrũkagia maĩ maigana ta njũĩ
Lamentations3:49 Riitho rĩakwa rĩitaga maĩ rĩtegũtumia
Lamentations3:50 Kinya rĩrĩa Jehova arĩng’etia arĩ igũrũ
Lamentations3:51 Riitho rĩakwa no kũnduura rĩnduuraga
Lamentations3:52 Arĩa matuĩkĩte thũ ciakwa tũhũ-rĩ
Lamentations3:53 Nĩmatinĩrĩirie muoyo wakwa nĩ kũnjikia thĩinĩ wa kanyũmba ga korokoro karĩ thĩ mũno
Lamentations3:54 Ndahubirũo nĩ maĩ magĩikũrũkagĩra igũrũ rĩa mũtwe wakwa; ngĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Lamentations3:55 Ngĩkaĩra rĩĩtwa rĩaku
Lamentations3:56 Wee nawe ũkĩigua mũgambo ũcio wakwa
Lamentations3:57 Mũthenya ũcio ndagũkaĩire-rĩ
Lamentations3:58 Ĩ Mwathani-ĩ
Lamentations3:59 Wee Jehova
Lamentations3:60 Wee nĩwonete mwĩrĩhĩrio wao wothe
Lamentations3:61 Kũigua nĩũkĩiguĩte rũnyenya rũao
Lamentations3:62 Nĩũiguĩte mĩromo ya acio maanjũkĩrĩire
Lamentations3:63 Ta no kĩĩrorere magĩikara thĩ o na magĩũkĩra: no niĩ rũĩmbo rũao.
Lamentations3:64 Wee Jehova
Lamentations3:65 Ũkamekĩra ngoro nyũmũ: kĩrumi gĩaku kĩroikara nao!
Lamentations3:66 Ũkaingatana nao ũrĩ o na marakara
Lamentations4:1 HĨ! Ĩ kaĩ thahabu ĩrĩ gũgĩthita-ĩ! thahabu o ĩrĩa ngembu mũno kaĩ ĩrĩ kũgarũrũka-ĩ! mahiga ma nyũmba ĩrĩa nyamũre nĩ maite magomano-inĩ ma ing’aratua ciothe cia itũũra.
Lamentations4:2 Ihĩĩ cia Zayuni-rĩ
Lamentations4:3 Gwata o mbwe nĩiheanaga nyondo
Lamentations4:4 Rũrĩmĩ rũa kaana karĩa kongero rũanagwatana na karakara nĩ kũnyota: twana-rĩ
Lamentations4:5 Arĩa mararĩaga irio thuranĩre rĩu maikaraga mabarabara-inĩ mekonotete; arĩa maarerirũo na nguo iria ndune
Lamentations4:6 Nĩ ũndũ waganu wa mwarĩ ũyũ wa kĩrĩndĩ giitũ nĩ mũnene o na kũrĩ ũhĩtia wa Sodomu
Lamentations4:7 Andũ a kũu gwake arĩa ekĩrĩre maatherete gwĩ tharunji
Lamentations4:8 Na rĩu mothiũ mao mairĩte o na gũkĩra ikara; magĩthiĩ na cia barabara matingĩmenyeka; ikonde cia mĩĩrĩ yao ciũmanĩrĩire na mahĩndĩ; nĩ ngũgũnyaru
Lamentations4:9 Kaba arĩa moragagwo na rũhiũ kũrĩ acio mekũũragwo nĩ ng’aragu
Lamentations4:10 Moko ma aka o arĩa maarĩ tha nĩmarugĩte ciana ciao ene; nĩcio iratuĩkĩte irio ciao hingo ĩo ya kwanangwo kwa mwarĩ ũyũ wa kĩrĩndĩ giitũ.
Lamentations4:11 Jehova nĩakĩhingĩtie marũrũ make na ndatigĩrĩre
Lamentations4:12 Athamaki a thĩ
Lamentations4:13 Na gwĩkĩtwo ũguo nĩ ũndũ wa mahĩtia ma anabii akuo
Lamentations4:14 Rĩu no gũturura matururaga mabarabara-inĩ ta ndumumu; nĩ athũkie nĩ thakame
Lamentations4:15 Makamakaĩrĩria makoiga
Lamentations4:16 Marakara ma Jehova nĩmo mamanyaganĩtie; ndarĩcoka kũmarũmbũiya: andũ nĩmatigĩte gũtĩa maũthĩ ma athĩnjĩri-Ngai acio
Lamentations4:17 Maitho maitũ no marathirĩrĩkĩra tũkĩrorereria gĩteithio giitũ tũhũ: twĩ gĩcũĩro-inĩ giitũ-rĩ
Lamentations4:18 Makinya maitũ nĩmarũmanagĩrĩrũo namo
Lamentations4:19 Atũthingati maarĩ ihenya gũkĩra nderi cia igũrũ: maatũhanyũkirie irĩma-inĩ
Lamentations4:20 Ũrĩa warĩ ta mĩheehũ ya maniũrũ maitũ
Lamentations4:21 No kĩigue wega
Lamentations4:22 Wee mwarĩ ũyũ wĩtagwo Zayuni-rĩ
Lamentations5:1 Ĩ JEHOVA-Ĩ
Lamentations5:2 Igai riitũ rĩrĩa twagaĩirũo nĩ igarũre rĩkarorio na kũrĩ andũ ageni
Lamentations5:3 Tũtuĩkĩte ciana cia ngoriai ciũrĩtwo nĩ maithe
Lamentations5:4 Maĩ maitũ tũkĩnyua
Lamentations5:5 Arĩa matũthingataga marĩ o makano-inĩ maitũ: tũnogete
Lamentations5:6 Nĩtũng’athanĩte na andũ a Misiri
Lamentations5:7 Maithe maitũ nĩmaahĩtirie
Lamentations5:8 Twathagwo nĩ ndungata
Lamentations5:9 Tuonaga irio nĩ gũtonyia mĩoyo iitũ ũgwati-inĩ nĩ ũndũ wa njomo ĩrĩa ĩrĩ werũ-inĩ.
Lamentations5:10 Njũa cia mĩĩrĩ iitũ ii na mwaki o ta icua nĩ ũndũ wa ũrugarĩ ũrĩa mũnene wa mũndũ mũrĩe nĩ ng’aragu.
Lamentations5:11 Atumia nĩ kũgwatwo maagwatagwo na hinya gũkũ Zayuni
Lamentations5:12 Anene akuo
Lamentations5:13 Aanake magĩtuĩka a gũkuuithagio mahiga ma gĩthĩi
Lamentations5:14 Athuri-rĩ
Lamentations5:15 Ngoro ciitũ rĩu nĩithirĩte gĩkeno; ndũrũhĩ ciitũ ikagarũrũka igatuĩka mũcakayo.
Lamentations5:16 Thũmbĩ ya ũnene nĩ ngũu ĩgatuuma mũtwe: kaĩ ithuĩ twĩ na haaro-ĩ! amu kũhĩtia nĩ ithuĩ twanahĩtia.
Lamentations5:17 Tondũ ũcio ngoro ciitũ nĩciũrĩtwo nĩ hinya; tondũ wa maũndũ macio-rĩ
Lamentations5:18 Tondũ atĩrĩ
Lamentations5:19 Wee
Lamentations5:20 Nĩ ũndũ kĩ ũkũriganĩrũo nĩ ithuĩ gwata tene
Lamentations5:21 Jehova
Lamentations5:22 Tiga ũgĩkorirũo ũtũregete o gũtũrega
Ezekiel1:1 ATĨRĨRĨ
Ezekiel1:2 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel1:3 mũthenya o ro ũcio-rĩ
Ezekiel1:4 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel1:5 O na ningĩ kũu thĩinĩ warĩo gũkiumĩra mĩhianĩre ya ciũmbe inya irĩ muoyo. Naguo ũrĩa cionagwo ihaana nĩ ũũ: mũhianĩre wacio ciothe watariĩ ta wa mũndũ
Ezekiel1:6 ningĩ nyamũ o yothe yacio ĩkagĩa na mothiũ mana
Ezekiel1:7 Namo magũrũ ma cio mehandĩte marũngarĩte ki; namo makinya ma magũrũ ma cio maatariĩ ta mahũngũ ma gacaũ
Ezekiel1:8 Na ningĩ nguruĩ ya mathagu ma cio ciarĩ na moko ta ma mũndũ na mĩena yacio yothe ĩna. Ningĩ mothiũ ma cio
Ezekiel1:9 mathagu ma cio-rĩ
Ezekiel1:10 Naho ha ũhoro wa mũhianĩre wa mothiũ ma cio-rĩ
Ezekiel1:11 Ũguo nĩguo mothiũ ma cio maatariĩ. Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel1:12 Nacio ciathiaga irorete na mbere ĩrũngĩrĩirie
Ezekiel1:13 Naho ha ũhoro wa ciũmbe icio irĩ muoyo-rĩ
Ezekiel1:14 Nacio ciũmbe icio irĩ muoyo ciateng’eraga
Ezekiel1:15 Na ndarora ciũmbe icio irĩ muoyo-rĩ
Ezekiel1:16 Naguo mũhianĩre wa magũrũ macio
Ezekiel1:17 Namo magĩthiĩ-rĩ
Ezekiel1:18 Nayo mĩrĩnga ya mbara ĩrĩa yarĩ mĩena-inĩ ya magũrũ macio yarĩ mĩtungu mũno na ya kũmakania
Ezekiel1:19 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel1:20 Nakuo kũndũ kũrĩa guothe roho wendaga gũthiĩ
Ezekiel1:21 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa marĩa maathiĩ
Ezekiel1:22 Narĩo igũrũ rĩa kĩũmbe kĩu gĩothe kĩrĩ muoyo-rĩ
Ezekiel1:23 Nakuo na ruungu rũa itu rĩu nĩkuo mathagu ma cio maatambũrũkĩtio
Ezekiel1:24 Nacio rĩrĩa ciathiĩ ngaigua mathagu ma cio makĩhuruta rũhuho ta arĩ mũrurumo wa maĩ maingĩ
Ezekiel1:25 Na igũrũ rĩa mũtambũrũko ũcio warĩ igũrũ rĩa mĩtwe yacio-rĩ
Ezekiel1:26 O na ningĩ igũrũ rĩa itu rĩu
Ezekiel1:27 Ngĩcoka ngĩona ta gũtunĩhĩte ta rangi wa ũũkĩ-wa-ngoma
Ezekiel1:28 Naguo ũtheri ũcio wamũrigicĩirie mĩena yothe-rĩ

Ezekiel5:4 O na ningĩ ũcoke woe tũmwe twatuo ũtũikie mwaki-inĩ thĩinĩ

Ezekiel6:4 nacio igongona cianyu nĩigatirikwo ikire ihooru
Ezekiel6:5 Nĩngaikia ciimba cia ciana cia Isiraeli o hau mbere ya mĩhianano yacio ya kũhoyũo

Ezekiel6:10 Nao mamenye atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova; tondũ ndiaaririe ndeto cia tũhũ rĩrĩa ndoigire atĩ nĩngameka ũũru ũcio.

Ezekiel7:2 Atĩrĩrĩ
Ezekiel7:3 Rĩu nĩguo ithirĩro rĩgũkinyĩrĩire
Ezekiel7:4 Narĩo riitho rĩakwa rĩtigagũcaĩra
Ezekiel7:5 Mwathani Jehova oigĩte ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Ezekiel7:6 Na ithirĩro narĩo nĩ ikinyu o gũkinya; nĩrĩkwarahũkĩire
Ezekiel7:7 Wĩ mũkore nĩ mũtino
Ezekiel7:8 Na rĩu ngiriĩ gũkũguthũkĩra na mathũgũta makwa
Ezekiel7:9 Narĩo riitho rĩakwa rĩtigagũcaĩra
Ezekiel7:10 Atĩrĩrĩ
Ezekiel7:11 Maũndũ ma ũhinya nĩmaarahũrĩtwo magatuĩka ta rũthanju rũa kũhũra waganu
Ezekiel7:12 Ihinda nĩ ikinyu; mũthenya nĩũkuhĩhĩirie; mũgũri wa indo nĩatige gũkena
Ezekiel7:13 Nĩ gũkorũo mwendia ndagacokera kĩrĩa endetie
Ezekiel7:14 Nĩmahuhĩte coro
Ezekiel7:15 Hiũ cia njora nĩimũrigicĩirie na kũu nja
Ezekiel7:16 No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel7:17 Moko mothe nĩmakaaga hinya
Ezekiel7:18 Ningĩ andũ acio nĩ kuoha makeyoha matama ma makũnia
Ezekiel7:19 Betha ciao magaciikia njĩra-inĩ
Ezekiel7:20 O naho ha ũhoro wa ũthaka wa mathaga mao ma kwĩgemia-rĩ
Ezekiel7:21 Niĩ na niĩ nĩngaũneana harĩ andũ a ndũrĩrĩ ũtuĩke itaha rĩao
Ezekiel7:22 O na ningĩ ndĩmahutatĩre
Ezekiel7:23 Tura mũnyororo
Ezekiel7:24 Tondũ ũcio ngarehithie imaramari cia ndũrĩrĩ iria itetĩkĩtie
Ezekiel7:25 Ũhoro wa kũninana nĩũroka
Ezekiel7:26 Maũndũ moru ma mbũkĩrĩra marĩũkaga mategũtigithĩria
Ezekiel7:27 Mũthamaki nĩagakorũo ethikĩire nĩ kĩeha
Ezekiel8:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Ezekiel8:2 Hĩndĩ ĩo ngĩkĩrora
Ezekiel8:3 Ngĩgĩcoka ngĩigua ta atambararĩtie guoko
Ezekiel8:4 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Ezekiel8:5 Hĩndĩ ĩo akĩnjĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel8:6 Nake akĩnjĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel8:7 Nake akĩndwara mũrango-inĩ wa nja ĩo; na rĩrĩa ndacũthĩrĩirie
Ezekiel8:8 Hĩndĩ ĩo nake akĩnjĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel8:9 Nake akĩnjĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel8:10 Ngĩgĩtonya; na atĩrĩrĩ
Ezekiel8:11 Naho hau mbere yayo hakarũgama andũ mĩrongo mũgwanja a athuri a nyũmba ya Isiraeli
Ezekiel8:12 Hĩndĩ ĩo agĩkĩnjĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel8:13 Ningĩ akĩnjĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel8:14 Hĩndĩ ĩo akĩndwara mũrango-inĩ wa kĩhingo kĩa nyũmba ya Jehova ũrĩa warorete gathigathini; na atĩrĩ
Ezekiel8:15 Nake agĩkĩnjĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel8:16 Nake akĩndwara o nja ĩrĩa ya thĩinĩ mũno ya nyũmba ya Jehova
Ezekiel8:17 Hĩndĩ ĩo akĩnjũria atĩrĩ
Ezekiel8:18 Tondũ ũcio niĩ o na niĩ-rĩ
Ezekiel9:1 Hĩndĩ ĩo agĩkĩanĩrĩra o matũ-inĩ makwa na mũgambo mũnene
Ezekiel9:2 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Ezekiel9:3 Naguo riri wa Ngai wa Isiraeli ũgĩkorũo wambatĩte na igũrũ uumĩte Akerubi-inĩ
Ezekiel9:4 Nake Jehova akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel9:5 Naho ha ũhoro wa andũ arĩa angĩ-rĩ
Ezekiel9:6 ũragai
Ezekiel9:7 Nake agĩcoka akĩmera atĩrĩ
Ezekiel9:8 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ

Ezekiel9:10 O naho ha ũhoro wakwa-rĩ
Ezekiel9:11 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Ezekiel10:1 Hĩndĩ ĩo ngĩcũthĩrĩria
Ezekiel10:2 Nake akĩarĩria mũndũ ũcio wehumbĩte nguo cia gatani
Ezekiel10:3 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel10:4 Naguo riri wa Jehova ũkĩambata na igũrũ uumĩte harĩ Akerubi
Ezekiel10:5 Naguo mũrurumo wa mathagu ma Akerubi ũkĩiguwo na kũu nja ĩrĩa ya nyumĩrĩra
Ezekiel10:6 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Ezekiel10:7 Nake Mũkerubi ũmwe agĩtambũrũkĩria guoko gwake gatagatĩ-inĩ ka Akerubi
Ezekiel10:8 Nao Akerubi acio makĩonwo ta me na moko o ta ma mũndũ hau ruungu rũa mathagu mao.
Ezekiel10:9 Na niĩ ngĩcũthĩrĩria
Ezekiel10:10 Naho ha ũhoro wa ũrĩa monagwo mahaana-rĩ
Ezekiel10:11 Ningĩ rĩrĩa megũthiĩ
Ezekiel10:12 Naguo mwĩrĩ wao wothe
Ezekiel10:13 Ngĩgĩcoka ngĩĩiguĩra magũrũ macio magĩĩtwo ũũ: magũrũ marĩa mathiũrũrũkaga.
Ezekiel10:14 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel10:15 Nao Akerubi acio makĩambata na igũrũ. Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel10:16 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel10:17 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maarũgama
Ezekiel10:18 Naguo riri wa Jehova ũgĩcoka ũkiuma igũrũ rĩa hingĩro ya mũromo wa nyũmba ĩo
Ezekiel10:19 Nao Akerubi makĩambararia mathagu mao na igũrũ
Ezekiel10:20 Kĩu nokĩo kĩũmbe kĩrĩ muoyo kĩrĩa ndonete kĩĩ mũhuro wa Ngai wa Isiraeli
Ezekiel10:21 Nao o ũmwe ũmwe aarĩ na mothiũ mana
Ezekiel10:22 Naho ha ũhoro wa mũhianĩre wa mothiũ mao-rĩ
Ezekiel11:1 O na ningĩ
Ezekiel11:2 Nake akĩnjĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel11:3 ningĩ nĩo moigaga atĩrĩ

Ezekiel11:5 Ngĩgĩcoka ngĩgũĩrũo nĩ Roho wa Jehova
Ezekiel11:6 Inyuĩ nĩ inyuĩ mũtũmĩte andũ arĩa moragĩtwo maingĩhe itũũra-inĩ rĩrĩ

Ezekiel13:1 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel13:2 Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel13:3 Mwathani Jehova oigĩte ũũ: Hĩ! Kaĩ anabii acio akĩgu marĩ na haaro-ĩ
Ezekiel13:4 Atĩrĩrĩ
Ezekiel13:5 Mũtiambatĩte mũgathinge mĩanya ĩrĩa mĩtharũku ya rũthingo
Ezekiel13:6 Andũ acio nĩ cioneki cia tũhũ monete
Ezekiel13:7 Githĩ ti kĩoneki gĩa tũhũ muonete? Ningĩ-rĩ
Ezekiel13:8 Tondũ ũcio Mwathani Jehova oigĩte ũũ: Tondũ nĩ kwaria mwarĩtie ũhoro wa tũhũ
Ezekiel13:9 Nakuo guoko gwakwa nĩgũgũũkĩrĩra anabii arĩa monaga maũndũ ma tũhũ
Ezekiel13:10 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Ezekiel13:11 Acio marũtenderagia na mũũnyũ ũtoirugĩtwo wega mere atĩrĩ
Ezekiel13:12 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel13:13 Tondũ ũcio Mwathani Jehova oigĩte ũũ: Ti-itherũ nĩ gwatũra ngarũatũranga na kĩhuhũkanio kĩa rũhuho nĩ ũndũ wa mathũgũta makwa; na nĩgũkagĩa mbura ya kĩboboto nĩ ũndũ wa marakara makwa
Ezekiel13:14 Ũguo nĩguo ngagũithia rũthingo rũu mũtenderetie na mũũnyũ ũtoirugĩtwo wega
Ezekiel13:15 Ũguo nĩguo ngahingĩria rũthingo rũu mathũgũta makwa
Ezekiel13:16 naguo ũguo nĩ ta kuuga anabii a Isiraeli arĩa marathaga ũhoro ũkoniĩ Jerusalemu

Ezekiel13:19 Na nĩmũnjambĩtie kũrĩ andũ akwa
Ezekiel13:20 Tondũ ũcio Mwathani Jehova oigĩte ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Ezekiel13:21 O nacio nguo icio cianyu nĩngacitembũranga ’honokie andũ akwa ndĩmarute moko-inĩ manyu
Ezekiel13:22 Nĩ gũkorũo tondũ wa maheni manyu nĩmũiguithĩtie ngoro cia andũ arĩa athingu ũũru
Ezekiel13:23 Tondũ ũcio mũtigacoka kuona cioneki icio cia tũhũ o na atĩa
Ezekiel14:1 Hĩndĩ ĩo athuri amwe a Isiraeli magĩũka harĩ niĩ

Ezekiel14:3 Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel14:4 Tondũ ũcio aria nao
Ezekiel14:5 nĩ getha nyone ha kũnyitĩra andũ a nyũmba ya Isiraeli na maũndũ marĩa marĩ ngoro-inĩ ciao o ene; nĩ ũndũ othe ma’thiĩte haraya maga’thengera na ũndũ wa mĩhianano ĩo yao ya kũhoyũo.
Ezekiel14:6 Tondũ ũcio ĩra andũ acio a nyũmba ya Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Ezekiel14:7 Nĩ gũkorũo mũndũ o wothe wa nyũmba ya Isiraeli
Ezekiel14:8 Na nĩngatũma ũthiũ wakwa ũũmĩre mũndũ ũcio
Ezekiel14:9 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel14:10 Nao nĩmagacoka kũherithĩrio waganu wao
Ezekiel14:11 nĩ getha andũ a nyũmba ya Isiraeli matikanacoke gwĩtwarĩrĩria na njĩra ciao o ene
Ezekiel14:12 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel14:13 Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel14:14 o na kũngĩkorũo andũ aya atatũ
Ezekiel14:15 Ningĩ ingĩtũma nyamũ njũru igere bũrũri ũcio
Ezekiel14:16 o na andũ acio atatũ mangĩkorũo marĩ kuo hĩndĩ ĩo
Ezekiel14:17 O na kana hihi ingĩkarehithie rũhiũ rũa njora kũu bũrũri ũcio
Ezekiel14:18 o na andũ acio atatũ mangĩkorũo marĩ kuo hĩndĩ ĩo-rĩ
Ezekiel14:19 O na ningĩ-rĩ
Ezekiel14:20 o na Nuhu

Ezekiel16:1 Ningĩ ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova ĩkĩnginyĩrĩra
Ezekiel16:2 Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel16:3 ũrĩĩre atĩrĩ
Ezekiel16:4 Naho ha ũhoro waku wa gũciarũo-rĩ
Ezekiel16:5 Gũtirĩ riitho o na rĩmwe rĩakũiguĩrĩire tha
Ezekiel16:6 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndahĩtũkĩire harĩ wee ngĩkuona ũgaragarĩte thakame-inĩ
Ezekiel16:7 Na niĩ ngĩgĩcoka ngĩtũma ũingĩhe o ta kĩro kĩrĩa gĩa gĩthaka-inĩ
Ezekiel16:8 Ningĩ Mwathani Jehova oigĩte atĩrĩ
Ezekiel16:9 Hĩndĩ ĩo ngĩgĩgũthambia na maĩ; ĩĩ-ni
Ezekiel16:10 O na ningĩ ngĩkũhumba nguo ng’emie wega irĩ marooro
Ezekiel16:11 O na ningĩ ngĩkũgemia na mathaga mega
Ezekiel16:12 Ningĩ ngĩgwĩkĩra gĩcũhĩ iniũrũ
Ezekiel16:13 Ũguo nĩguo wakĩgemirio na thahabu o na betha; nacio nguo ciaku ciarĩ cia gatani ĩrĩa njega
Ezekiel16:14 Nayo ngumo ya ũthaka waku ĩkĩhunja ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ ciothe nĩ ũndũ ũthaka ũcio waku warĩ mũkinyanĩru nĩ ũndũ wa riri wa ũkaru wakwa ũrĩa ndakũheete; ũguo nĩguo Mwathani Jehova oigĩte.
Ezekiel16:15 No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel16:16 Ningĩ ũkĩoya nguo imwe ciaku
Ezekiel16:17 Ningĩ ũgĩcoka ũkĩoya indo ciaku cia goro cia thahabu yakwa
Ezekiel16:18 ningĩ ũkĩoya nguo ciaku ng’emie wega wega ĩrĩ marooro
Ezekiel16:19 O naguo mũgate wakwa ũrĩa ndakũheire
Ezekiel16:20 O na ningĩ-rĩ
Ezekiel16:21 tondũ nĩwagĩcokire kũũraga ciana ciakwa
Ezekiel16:22 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel16:23 Wũi-ĩiya-wakwa
Ezekiel16:24 nĩweyakĩire nyũmba handũ hatũũgĩru
Ezekiel16:25 Ituri-inĩ ciothe cia njĩra nĩkuo wĩyakĩire macoorero macio maku
Ezekiel16:26 O na ningĩ nĩũtharanĩtie na Amisiri
Ezekiel16:27 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Ezekiel16:28 O na ningĩ nĩũhũrĩte maraya na Aashuri
Ezekiel16:29 O na ningĩ ũtharia waku ũũingĩhĩirie makĩria o kũu bũrũri wa Kanaani
Ezekiel16:30 Hĩ! Mwathani Jehova ekuuga atĩrĩ
Ezekiel16:31 nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa wĩyakĩire nyũmba yaku handũ hatũũgĩru ituri-inĩ cia njĩra ciothe
Ezekiel16:32 Wee mũtumia ũyũ wĩ mũtharia! O wee wĩtaga mũrũrĩrĩ ithenya rĩa mũthuriguo!
Ezekiel16:33 Maraya marĩa mangĩ mothe nĩmaheagwo iheo
Ezekiel16:34 Nĩ ũndũ ũhoro waku wa ũtharia nĩwĩkũũranĩte na wa aka arĩa angĩ othe a maraya
Ezekiel16:35 Tondũ ũcio
Ezekiel16:36 Mwathani Jehova oigĩte ũũ: Tondũ mbeca ciaku nĩũciitangĩte
Ezekiel16:37 atĩrĩrĩ
Ezekiel16:38 Na nĩngagũtuĩra cira o ta ũrĩa aka matuagĩrũo cira arĩa mathahagia ũhiki na magaitithia thakame; na nĩngatũma ũkorũo nĩ mathũgũta
Ezekiel16:39 O na ningĩ nĩngakũneana moko-inĩ mao
Ezekiel16:40 O na ningĩ nĩmagakũrehithĩrie andũ monganĩte magũũkĩrĩre
Ezekiel16:41 Nacio nyũmba ciaku nĩmagacimundia mwaki
Ezekiel16:42 Ũguo nĩguo ngehoreria mathũgũta makwa nawe
Ezekiel16:43 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Ezekiel16:44 Atĩrĩrĩ
Ezekiel16:45 Wee-rĩ
Ezekiel16:46 Nake mwarĩ wa nyũkwa ũrĩa mũkũrũguo nĩ Samaria
Ezekiel16:47 No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel16:48 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel16:49 Atĩrĩrĩ
Ezekiel16:50 Nao maarĩ a mwĩĩkĩrĩro
Ezekiel16:51 Ningĩ Samaria ndaigana kwĩhia mehia ta ma nuthu ĩmwe ya mehia maku; no rĩrĩ
Ezekiel16:52 Wee nawe tũũra ũconokaga
Ezekiel16:53 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel16:54 nĩguo ũtũũre ũconokaga
Ezekiel16:55 Nao airĩtu a nyũkwa nĩmagacoka gũtũũra o ta ũrĩa maatũire tene; Sodomu na airĩtu ake macoke gũtuĩka o ta ũrĩa maatariĩ tene
Ezekiel16:56 Amu nĩwaregaga kũgweta Sodomu mwarĩ wa nyũkwa na kanua gaku
Ezekiel16:57 o mbere waganu waku ũtanaguũka ũmenyũo wega
Ezekiel16:58 Nĩ gũcokererũo ũcokereirũo nĩ ũhoro waku wa waga-thoni o na maũndũ maku marĩa waneka me thahu; ũguo nĩguo Jehova oigĩte.
Ezekiel16:59 Nĩ ũndũ Mwathani Jehova oigĩte ũũ: Niĩ o na niĩ ngagwĩka o ta ũrĩa wee mwene wĩkĩte
Ezekiel16:60 No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel16:61 Na hĩndĩ ĩo wee nawe nĩũkaririkana mĩthiĩre yaku
Ezekiel16:62 Na niĩ nĩngarũmia kĩrĩkanĩro giitũ nawe
Ezekiel16:63 nĩ getha ũririkane maũndũ macio
Ezekiel17:1 Ningĩ ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova ĩkĩnginyĩrĩra
Ezekiel17:2 Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel17:3 ũmere atĩrĩ
Ezekiel17:4 ĩgĩgĩtua kahonge ka mũthia-inĩ ga tũhonge twĩthĩ tũrĩa tũrĩ o igũrũ gacũmbĩrĩ-inĩ kaguo
Ezekiel17:5 O na ningĩ ĩkĩoya mbeũ ya bũrũri ũcio
Ezekiel17:6 Nayo ĩkĩmera ĩgĩtuĩka mũthabibu mũhambu mũno wa mũthemba mũkuhĩ
Ezekiel17:7 O na ningĩ haarĩ nderi ĩngĩ nene ĩĩ na mathagu manene na njoya nyingĩ; na atĩrĩrĩ
Ezekiel17:8 o na harĩa wahandirũo tĩri-inĩ ũrĩa mwega wĩ hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia maĩ maingĩ
Ezekiel17:9 Wee kiuge atĩrĩ
Ezekiel17:10 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Ezekiel17:11 O na ningĩ ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova ĩkĩnginyĩrĩra
Ezekiel17:12 Rĩu ta ũrĩa andũ a kĩruka gĩkĩ kĩremu atĩrĩ
Ezekiel17:13 ningĩ akĩoya mũndũ ũmwe wa rũciaro rũa mũthamaki
Ezekiel17:14 nĩ getha ũthamaki ũcio ũnyihe
Ezekiel17:15 No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel17:16 Mwathani Jehova oigĩte atĩrĩ
Ezekiel17:17 O nake Firauni arĩ hamwe na mbũtũ yake ya ita ĩrĩa ĩrĩ hinya
Ezekiel17:18 Nĩ ũndũ nĩaamenire muuma ũrĩa aanyuithirio na ũndũ wa gũthũkia kĩrĩkanĩro kĩrĩa kĩarĩkanĩirũo; kuona atĩ nĩoigire na ma atĩ nĩekũhingia kĩrĩkanĩro kĩu
Ezekiel17:19 Tondũ ũcio Mwathani Jehova oigĩte ũũ: O ta ũrĩa niĩ ndũũraga muoyo-rĩ
Ezekiel17:20 Nĩ kwamba ngamwambĩra mũtego wakwa
Ezekiel17:21 Nao andũ ake othe arĩa makora a mbũtũ-inĩ ciake ciothe cia ita
Ezekiel17:22 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Ezekiel17:23 nakĩo kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩrĩa gĩtũũgĩru kĩa Isiraeli nĩkuo ngakahanda; nako nĩgakaruta honge gaciare maciaro
Ezekiel17:24 Nayo mĩtĩ yothe ya werũ nĩĩkamenya atĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova ’hometie mũtĩ ũrĩa mũraihu na igũrũ mũno
Ezekiel18:1 Na rĩrĩ

Ezekiel18:3 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel18:4 Atĩrĩrĩ
Ezekiel18:5 No rĩrĩ

Ezekiel18:9 na akahingia irĩra cia watho wakwa wa kũrũmĩrĩrũo
Ezekiel18:10 No rĩrĩ

Ezekiel18:12 na akehia mũthĩni na mũndũ mũkĩa
Ezekiel18:13 na akohoranĩra indo agĩĩtagia uumithio wacio ũtarĩ wa kĩhooto
Ezekiel18:14 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel18:15 akĩage kũrĩa irio iria irutĩirũo kĩrĩma igũrũ cia magongona o na kana ainamũrĩre mĩhianano ya nyũmba ya Isiraeli maitho
Ezekiel18:16 na akorũo atehĩtie mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ
Ezekiel18:17 ũrĩa ũtagũthaga mũthĩni
Ezekiel18:18 Naho ha ũhoro wa ithe-rĩ
Ezekiel18:19 No inyuĩ muugaga atĩrĩ
Ezekiel18:20 Roho ũrĩa wĩhagia noguo ũgakua; no rĩrĩ
Ezekiel18:21 No mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu angĩgarũrũka atigane na mehia make mothe marĩa ehĩtie
Ezekiel18:22 Hatirĩ ihĩtia o na rĩmwe rĩa mahĩtia marĩa ekĩte ma kwagarara watho rĩgacoka kũririkanwo ũhoro-inĩ wake; maũndũ make ma ũthingu marĩa ekĩte nĩmo magatũma atũũre muoyo.
Ezekiel18:23 Anga kwĩ hĩndĩ ingĩkena nĩ ũndũ wa gĩkuũ kĩa mũndũ mwaganu? Ũguo nĩguo Mwathani Jehova ekuuga. Githĩ ti kwenda ingĩenda atĩ kaba agarũrũke atigane na mĩthiĩre ĩo yake

Ezekiel23:1 Ningĩ ndũmĩrĩri ya Jehova ĩkĩnginyĩrĩra o rĩngĩ
Ezekiel23:2 Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel23:3 nao makĩhũrĩra maraya Misiri; nao maahũrire maraya rĩrĩa maarĩ ethĩ; nakuo nĩkuo maahihinyĩirũo nyondo ciao
Ezekiel23:4 Nao ũrĩa mũkũrũ etagwo Ohola
Ezekiel23:5 Nake Ohola aahũrire maraya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aatuĩkĩte wakwa; nake agĩkĩgucĩrĩrio nĩ ũnyanya wa andũ arĩa mendaine nao
Ezekiel23:6 nao maarĩ abarũthi na aathani arĩa mehumbaga nguo cia rangi wa bururu
Ezekiel23:7 Nake akĩmagwatia mĩĩto ya ũmaraya ũcio wake
Ezekiel23:8 Nake ndaatiganire na ũmaraya ũcio wake gwata o matukũ marĩa aarĩ Misiri; nĩ ũndũ nĩo maakomaga nake gwata o hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aarĩ mwĩthĩ
Ezekiel23:9 Tondũ ũcio ngĩkĩmũrekereria ngĩmũneana moko-inĩ ma anyanya acio ake
Ezekiel23:10 Nao acio makĩmũguũria nguo agĩtigwo njaga; ningĩ magĩtaha aanake ake o na airĩtu
Ezekiel23:11 Nake mwarĩ wa nyina Oholiba akĩĩonera ũndũ ũcio
Ezekiel23:12 Agĩkĩgucĩrĩrio nĩ ũnyanya wa Aashuri arĩa maarĩ abarũthi na aathani
Ezekiel23:13 Niĩ na niĩ ngĩkĩona atĩ nĩ mũthũkie
Ezekiel23:14 Nake agĩkĩingĩhia ũmaraya wake mũno
Ezekiel23:15 nake agĩkĩona ũrĩa mohetwo na mĩĩhotoro njohero-inĩ ciao
Ezekiel23:16 Nake aamona akĩũmbwo nĩo
Ezekiel23:17 Nao Ababuloni magĩgĩthiĩ kũrĩ we o kũu kĩrĩrĩ-inĩ kĩa ũnyanya wao thĩinĩ
Ezekiel23:18 Ũguo nĩguo aaguũranĩirie ũhoro wa ũmaraya wake
Ezekiel23:19 No rĩrĩ
Ezekiel23:20 Nake agĩkĩũmbwo nĩ anyanya ake
Ezekiel23:21 Tondũ wa gwĩka ũguo
Ezekiel23:22 Tondũ ũcio-rĩ
Ezekiel23:23 Nao nĩo Ababuloni o na Akalidei othe
Ezekiel23:24 Nao magoka magũũkĩrĩre me na indo cia mbaara
Ezekiel23:25 Na niĩ nĩngerutanĩria ngũhũre
Ezekiel23:26 Nĩ gũcuma magagũcuma nguo ciaku ũtigwo ũtheri
Ezekiel23:27 Ũguo nĩguo ngatũma ũthirũo nĩ ũhoro waku wa wagathoni
Ezekiel23:28 Nĩ gũkorũo Mwathani Jehova oigĩte ũũ: Atĩrĩ
Ezekiel23:29 nao nĩmagagwĩka maũndũ na rũmena
Ezekiel23:30 Maũndũ macio nĩmo ũgekwo
Ezekiel23:31 Wee ũrũmĩrĩire mĩthiĩre ya mwarĩ wa nyũkwa
Ezekiel23:32 Mwathani Jehova oigĩte ũũ: Gĩkombe kĩa mwarĩ wa nyũkwa nĩkĩo ũkanyuĩra

Ezekiel23:40 O na ningĩ atĩrĩ
Ezekiel23:41 ũgĩcoka ũgĩikarĩra urĩrĩ warĩtwo na ũkagemio mũno
Ezekiel23:42 Nakuo kũu gwake gũkĩiguwo mũgambo ta wa kĩrĩndĩ kĩingĩ gĩikaranĩtie nake kĩgaacĩire

Ezekiel24:1 O na ningĩ mwaka wa kenda na mweri wa ikũmi

Ezekiel24:4 ũkĩũnganĩrie mĩnuku
Ezekiel24:5 Ningĩ ũnyite ndũrũme ĩrĩa noru rũũru-inĩ
Ezekiel24:6 Tondũ ũcio Mwathani Jehova oigĩte ũũ: Kaĩ itũũra rĩrĩa rĩitithagia thakame rĩĩ na haaro-ĩ! Narĩo nĩrĩo rĩtuĩkĩte ta nyũngũ ĩrotete
Ezekiel24:7 Nĩ gũkorũo thakame ĩrĩa rĩitithĩtie ĩrĩ o kũu thĩinĩ warĩo; rĩamĩitire o kũu rũaro-inĩ rũa ihiga ĩgũrũ
Ezekiel24:8 Niĩ o na niĩ njitĩte thakame yarĩo rĩo rĩene rũaro-inĩ rũa ihiga igũrũ
Ezekiel24:9 Tondũ ũcio Mwathani Jehova oigĩte ũũ: Kaĩ itũũra rĩrĩa rĩitithagĩrio thakame rĩĩ na haaro-ĩ! Niĩ na niĩ-rĩ
Ezekiel24:10 Ũmbĩrĩra ngũ nyingĩ nĩguo mwaki wakane mũno

Ezekiel24:13 Waga-thoni waku wĩ magigi: nĩ ũndũ nĩngũtheretie na ũkaaga gũthera
Ezekiel24:14 Niĩ Jehova nĩ niĩ njarĩtie ũhoro ũcio

Ezekiel26:4 Nacio nĩigatharia thingo cia Turo
Ezekiel26:5 Itũũra rĩu rĩgatuĩka kũndũ gwa gũtambũrũkagĩrio mĩtego ya kũgwatia ciũngũyũ o kũu iria-inĩ thĩinĩ; nĩ ũndũ ũhoro ũcio nĩ niĩ ndĩwarĩtie
Ezekiel26:6 Nao airĩtu arĩo arĩa magakorũo me mũgũnda nĩ kũũragwo makoragwo na hiũ cia njora; nao andũ akuo nĩmakamenya atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ Jehova.
Ezekiel26:7 Amu Mwathani Jehova oigĩte ũũ: Atĩrĩrĩ
Ezekiel26:8 Na orage airĩtu aku arĩa magakorũo me mũgũnda na hiũ cia njora; na aakithie inyamũ ndaya na igũrũ cia mũtharĩko ikũrigicĩrie

Ezekiel27:5 Mbaũ ciaku ciothe iria ndungu maacithondekire cia mĩthengera ĩrutĩtwo Seniru; ningĩ makĩoya mĩtarakwa mamĩrutĩte Lebanoni nĩguo magũthondekere mũtĩ ũrĩa mũraya wa kĩbebero.
Ezekiel27:6 O nayo mĩtĩ yaku ya gũtwara marikabu maamĩthondekire na mĩgandi ya Bashani; o nacio mbaũ ciaku magĩcithondeka na mĩguongo ĩhumbĩrĩte mĩtĩ ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo mĩhugu ĩrutĩtwo ithama-inĩ cia Kitimu.
Ezekiel27:7 O naguo tama waku ũrĩa ũtwaraga marikabu warĩ wa gatani ĩrĩa njega ĩtirihĩtwo wega ĩrutĩtwo Misiri

Ezekiel27:14 Andũ a nyũmba ya Togarima maakũũranagia indo ciaku cia wonjorithia na mbarathi ciao
Ezekiel27:15 Ningĩ andũ a Dedani o nao mwonjorithanagĩria nao ithama-inĩ nyingĩ ta irĩ ing’ang’a
Ezekiel27:16 Suriata nakuo nĩkuo wagĩraga thũgũrĩ na indo ciaku cia wĩra wa moko maku iria waingĩhĩtie mũno
Ezekiel27:17 Ningĩ andũ a Juda o na a bũrũri wa Isiraeli nĩo mwonjorithagia nao
Ezekiel27:18 Ningĩ Dameski nĩkuo wagĩraga thũgũrĩ wa indo ciaku cia wĩra wa moko maku iria waingĩhĩtie mũno
Ezekiel27:19 O na ningĩ Vedani na Javani nĩo maagĩraga indo ciaku cia wonjorithia mokĩte na ciohe cia ndigi; ningĩ igera iria ndure
Ezekiel27:20 Dedani nĩwe mwonjorithagia nake na nguo iria irĩ goro cia matandĩko ma mbarathi.

Ezekiel31:6 Nacio nyamũ ciothe cia rĩera-inĩ igĩaka tũnyũmba twacio hwang’a-inĩ ciaguo

Ezekiel31:12 Nao andũ a kũngĩ

Ezekiel31:14 nĩ getha gũtikanagĩe mũtĩ ũngĩ o na ũmwe wa mĩtĩ ĩrĩa yothe ĩĩ gũkuhĩ na maĩ ũngĩĩtũũgĩria nĩ ũndũ wa kĩũga kĩaguo

Ezekiel32:1 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Ezekiel32:2 Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel32:3 Mwathani Jehova oigĩte atĩrĩ
Ezekiel32:4 Na niĩ ngũtige wĩ thĩ nyũmũ o ro ũguo
Ezekiel32:5 Ningĩ njaraganie nyama cia mwĩrĩ waku irĩma-inĩ
Ezekiel32:6 O naguo bũrũri ũrĩa ũtubagĩra ndĩũiyũrie thakame yaku
Ezekiel32:7 Ningĩ rĩrĩa ngakũhoria nduma-rĩ
Ezekiel32:8 Ningĩ ’thiĩkĩrĩrie motheri marĩa maaraga igũrũ ndũme matuĩke nduma theri ĩkũhumbe
Ezekiel32:9 O na ningĩ nĩngatũma ngoro cia andũ a ndũrĩrĩ nyingĩ ithite hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ngaheana ũhoro wa kũninwo gwaku ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ
Ezekiel32:10 Ĩĩ
Ezekiel32:11 Amu Mwathani Jehova oigĩte ũũ: Nĩũgacomorithĩrio rũhiũ rũa njora rũa mũthamaki wa Babuloni
Ezekiel32:12 na njũragithie kĩrĩndĩ gĩaku na hiũ cia njora cia andũ njamba
Ezekiel32:13 O nacio nyamũ cia gĩthaka ciakuo ciothe nĩngacinina ciume hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia maĩ macio maingĩ

Ezekiel32:19 Wee-rĩ
Ezekiel32:20 Nao andũ acio makaharũkanĩra maikare hamwe na arĩa angĩ moragĩtwo na rũhiũ rũa njora
Ezekiel32:21 Na rĩrĩ
Ezekiel32:22 Kũu nĩkuo Mũashuri arĩ
Ezekiel32:23 nacio mbĩrĩra icio ciao cienjetwo kũndũ kũrĩa kũriku mũno irima-inĩ rĩu
Ezekiel32:24 Nake Mũelamu nĩkuo arĩ
