Matthew6:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew6:3 Nowe-rĩ
Matthew6:4 nĩ getha ciĩko ciaku cia tha ituĩke cia hitho-inĩ: na Thoguo ũrĩa wonaga hitho-inĩ nĩagakũhe ngatho.
Matthew6:5 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũkũhoya
Matthew6:6 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũkũhoya
Matthew6:7 Na ningĩ mũkĩhoya-rĩ
Matthew6:8 No inyuĩ-rĩ
Matthew6:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Matthew6:10 Ũthamaki waku ũũke. O ũrĩa wendete Wee
Matthew6:11 Tũhe ũmũthĩ irio ciitũ cia gũtũigana.
Matthew6:12 Na ũtũrekere mathirĩ maitũ
Matthew6:13 Na ndũgatũtware magerio-inĩ
Matthew6:14 Nĩ ũndũ akorũo inyuĩ nĩmuohagĩra andũ angĩ mehia mao
Matthew6:15 No akorũo mũtiohagĩra andũ angĩ mehia mao
Matthew6:16 Ningĩ rĩrĩa mũkwĩhinga kũrĩa irio
Matthew6:17 Nowe-rĩ
Matthew6:18 nĩ getha ndũkae kuonwo nĩ andũ atĩ nĩwĩhingĩte kũrĩa irio
Matthew6:19 Tigagai kwĩigĩra ũtonga gũkũ thĩ
Matthew6:20 no mwĩigagĩrei ũtonga Igũrũ
Matthew6:21 tondũ-rĩ
Matthew6:22 Tawa wa mwĩrĩ nĩguo riitho: nĩ ũndũ ũcio ũngĩkorũo riitho rĩaku nĩ rĩgima
Matthew6:23 No rĩrĩ
Matthew6:24 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota gũtungatĩra aathani erĩ: nĩ ũndũ no kinya athũũre ũmwe
Matthew6:25 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew6:26 Ta rorai nyoni cia rĩera-inĩ
Matthew6:27 Na inyuĩ-rĩ
Matthew6:28 Na nĩ kĩ gĩtũmaga mũtangĩkĩre nguo? Taranagiai ũhoro wa itoka cia gĩthaka
Matthew6:29 no ngũmwĩra atĩ Solomoni
Matthew6:30 Atĩrĩrĩ
Matthew6:31 Tondũ ũcio-rĩ
Matthew6:32 Nĩ ũndũ indo icio ciothe nĩcio imathagwo nĩ andũ a Ndũrĩrĩ; tondũ Ithe wanyu wĩ Igũrũ nĩoĩ atĩ nĩmũbataragio nĩ indo icio ciothe.
Matthew6:33 No ambai mũcarie ũthamaki wa Ngai o na ũthingu wake
Matthew6:34 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Matthew7:1 MŨTIKANEKŨŨANĨRE
Matthew7:2 Nĩ gũkorũo gwĩkũũanĩra kũrĩa mwĩkũũanagĩra nakuo
Matthew7:3 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Matthew7:4 Kana rĩrĩ
Matthew7:5 Wee
Matthew7:6 Tigagai kũhe magui kĩndũ kĩrĩa kĩamũre o na mũtigaitĩre ngũrũe ruru cianyu
Matthew7:7 Hoyai
Matthew7:8 nĩ ũndũ o mũndũ ũrĩa ũhoyaga
Matthew7:9 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew7:10 Kana hihi angĩĩtio kĩũngũyũ
Matthew7:11 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Matthew7:12 Tondũ ũcio-rĩ
Matthew7:13 Tonyerai mũromo ũrĩa mũceke: nĩ gũkorũo mũromo nĩ mwariĩ
Matthew7:14 Nĩ gũkorũo mũromo nĩ mũceke
Matthew7:15 Wĩmenyagĩrĩrei anabii a mathara
Matthew7:16 Nĩmũrĩmamenyaga nĩ ũndũ wa maciaro mao. Kaĩ thabibu ituagwo ciigua-inĩ
Matthew7:17 No taguo o mũtĩ ũrĩa mwega ũciaraga maciaro mega; naguo mũtĩ ũrĩa mũthũku ũciaraga maciaro moru.
Matthew7:18 Mũtĩ ũrĩa mwega ndũngĩhota gũciara maciaro moru
Matthew7:19 O mũtĩ ũrĩa ũtaciaraga maciaro mega nĩ gũtemwo ũtemagwo ũgaikio mwaki-inĩ.
Matthew7:20 Ũguo noguo mũrĩmamenyaga nĩ ũndũ wa maciaro mao.
Matthew7:21 To mũndũ ũrĩa ũnjĩtaga
Matthew7:22 Mũthenya ũcio andũ aingĩ nĩmakanjũria
Matthew7:23 Na hĩndĩ ĩo nĩngamoimĩrĩria ndĩmere atĩrĩ
Matthew7:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Matthew7:25 nayo mbura ĩkiura
Matthew7:26 No rĩrĩ
Matthew7:27 nayo mbura ĩkiura
Matthew7:28 Gũgĩgĩtuĩka atĩrĩ
Matthew7:29 amu nĩaakĩrutaga ta mũndũ waathanaga
Matthew8:1 NA aaikũrũka kĩrĩma
Matthew8:2 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Matthew8:3 Nake agĩtambũrũkia guoko
Matthew8:4 Ningĩ Jesu agĩcoka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:5 Na aarĩkia gũtonya Kaperinaumu
Matthew8:6 akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:7 Nake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:8 Na mũnene ũcio wa athigari igana akĩmũcokeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:9 Nĩ ũndũ o na niĩ ndĩ mũndũ wathagwo
Matthew8:10 Nake Jesu aaigua ũguo
Matthew8:11 No ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:12 no ciana cia ũthamaki ũcio nĩ gũikio igaikio na nja nduma-inĩ: na kũu nĩkuo gũkagĩa kĩrĩro na kũhagarania magego.
Matthew8:13 Nake Jesu akĩĩra mũnene ũcio wa athigari igana
Matthew8:14 Nake Jesu aatonya nyũmba ya Petero
Matthew8:15 Akĩmũhutia guoko
Matthew8:16 Na gwatua gũtuka
Matthew8:17 nĩguo atĩ ciugo iria cia mũnabii Isaia ihingio
Matthew8:18 Nake Jesu ona athĩũrũrũkĩirio nĩ kĩrĩndĩ kĩingĩ
Matthew8:19 Na mwandĩki-marũa ũmwe agĩũka kũrĩ we
Matthew8:20 Nake Jesu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:21 Na mũrutwo ũngĩ wake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:22 Nowe Jesu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:23 Na aarĩkia gũtonya marikabu
Matthew8:24 Na atĩrĩ
Matthew8:25 Magĩthiĩ kũrĩ we
Matthew8:26 Nake akĩmera
Matthew8:27 Na andũ acio makĩgega
Matthew8:28 Na aarĩkia gũkinya mũrĩmo
Matthew8:29 Na atĩrĩ
Matthew8:30 Na kwarĩ rũũru rũnene rũa ngũrũe rũarĩithagio haraya na hau.
Matthew8:31 Nacio ndaimono ikĩmũthaitha
Matthew8:32 Nake agĩciĩra
Matthew8:33 Nao arĩithi makĩũra
Matthew8:34 Na atĩrĩ
Matthew9:1 AGĨGĨTONYA marikabu
Matthew9:2 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew9:3 Na atĩrĩ
Matthew9:4 Nake Jesu
Matthew9:5 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Matthew9:6 No nĩ getha mũmenye atĩ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩarĩ na hinya gũkũ thĩ wa kuohanĩra mehia (agĩcoka akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio warĩ na mũrimũ wa gũkua ciĩga)
Matthew9:7 Nake agĩũkĩra
Matthew9:8 Na kĩrĩndĩ kĩona ũguo
Matthew9:9 Nake Jesu akiuma hau aarĩ
Matthew9:10 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Matthew9:11 Na Afarisai mona ũguo
Matthew9:12 Nake aigua ũguo
Matthew9:13 Thiĩi mũkerute gĩtũmi gĩa ciugo ici
Matthew9:14 Hĩndĩ ĩo arutwo a Johana nĩmokire kũrĩ we
Matthew9:15 Nake Jesu akĩmoria atĩrĩ
Matthew9:16 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩrata nguo ngũrũ na ndamĩ ya tama mwerũ; nĩ ũndũ ndamĩ ĩo ĩmĩratĩte yamĩgucia
Matthew9:17 Ningĩ andũ matingĩĩkĩra ndibei ya mũhihano mondo ngũrũ; nĩ gũkorũo mangĩĩkĩra
Matthew9:18 Rĩrĩa aameraga mohoro macio
Matthew9:19 Nake Jesu agĩũkĩra
Matthew9:20 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Matthew9:21 nĩ ũndũ eĩraga
Matthew9:22 Nake Jesu akĩĩhũgũra
Matthew9:23 Nake Jesu
Matthew9:24 akiuga
Matthew9:25 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew9:26 Nayo ngumo ya ũhoro ũcio ĩkĩhunja bũrũri ũcio wothe.
Matthew9:27 Na rĩrĩa Jesu oimaga kũu
Matthew9:28 Na aatonya nyũmba
Matthew9:29 Hĩndĩ ĩo agĩkĩmahutia maitho
Matthew9:30 Namo maitho mao makĩhingũka. Nake Jesu akĩmakania mũno
Matthew9:31 No rĩrĩ
Matthew9:32 Na rĩrĩa moimaga hau
Matthew9:33 Na ndaimono yaingatwo
Matthew9:34 No Afarisai makiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew9:35 Nake Jesu agĩcanga matũũra-inĩ mothe na mĩciĩ-inĩ yothe
Matthew9:36 Na rĩrĩa onire mĩrũrũngano ya andũ
Matthew9:37 Hĩndĩ ĩo akĩĩra arutwo ake atĩrĩ
Matthew9:38 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio thaithai Mwathani mwene magetha atĩ arekie aruti wĩra mathiĩ magetha-inĩ make.
Matthew10:1 AGĨGĨĨTA arutwo ake arĩa ikũmi na erĩ moke harĩ we
Matthew10:2 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew10:3 na Filipu
Matthew10:4 na Simoni
Matthew10:5 Andũ acio ikũmi na erĩ nĩo Jesu aatũmire
Matthew10:6 nĩ kaba mũthiĩ kũrĩ mbũri iria ciũrĩte cia mbarĩ ya Isiraeli.
Matthew10:7 Na mũgĩthiĩ-rĩ
Matthew10:8 Honagiai andũ arĩa arũaru
Matthew10:9 Mũtigekĩre mbia cia thahabu kana cia betha kana thendi ndoho-inĩ cianyu;
Matthew10:10 o na mũtigekuuĩre mburungo ya rũgendo; na mũndũ wanyu ndagathiĩ na nguo igĩrĩ
Matthew10:11 Na ningĩ o itũũra rĩrĩa mũgatonya kana mũciĩ
Matthew10:12 Na mũgĩtonya nyũmba ĩo
Matthew10:13 Na nyũmba ĩo yakorũo nĩyagĩrĩire
Matthew10:14 Nake mũndũ ũrĩa ũtakamũgwata ũgeni
Matthew10:15 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew10:16 Atĩrĩrĩ
Matthew10:17 No rĩrĩ
Matthew10:18 ningĩ mũgatwarũo kũrĩ athani na athamaki nĩ ũndũ wakwa
Matthew10:19 Na rĩrĩa makamũneana-rĩ
Matthew10:20 Nĩ ũndũ ti inyuĩ mũgakorũo mũkĩaria
Matthew10:21 Ningĩ mũndũ nĩagakunyanĩra mũrũ wa nyina oragwo
Matthew10:22 Na mũgathũũrũo nĩ andũ othe nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa: no ũrĩa wa gũkirĩrĩria o nginya hĩndĩ ya marigĩrĩrio
Matthew10:23 Na rĩrĩa makamũnyarira itũũra rĩrĩa mũrĩ
Matthew10:24 Mũrutwo ti mũnene kũrĩ mũmũruti
Matthew10:25 Mũrutwo angĩiganana na mũmũruti
Matthew10:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũtikanametigĩre: nĩ ũndũ gũtirĩ ũndũ mũguĩkĩre ũtakaguũrio; o na kana ũndũ mũrinde ũtakamenyeka.
Matthew10:27 Ũhoro ũrĩa ngũmwĩrĩra nduma-inĩ
Matthew10:28 Ningĩ tigagai gwĩtigĩra arĩa moragaga o mwĩrĩ
Matthew10:29 Githĩ tũnyoni twĩrĩ tũtiendagio thendi ĩmwe? Natuo gũtirĩ o na kamwe kangĩgũa thĩ Ithe wanyu atoĩ.
Matthew10:30 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew10:31 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Matthew10:32 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Matthew10:33 No mũndũ ũrĩa ũkangaana kũrĩ andũ
Matthew10:34 Tigagai kwĩgereria atĩ ndokire kũrehe thayũ gũkũ thĩ: ndiokire kũrehe thayũ
Matthew10:35 Nĩ gũkorũo ndokire kũmenithania mũndũ na ithe
Matthew10:36 o nacio thũ cia mũndũ igatuĩka o andũ a nyũmba yake kĩũmbe.
Matthew10:37 Ũrĩa wenda ithe kana nyina kũngĩra
Matthew10:38 Na ũrĩa ũtekuoya mũtĩ wake wa kwambĩrũo
Matthew10:39 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũkwenda gũtũũria muoyo wake
Matthew10:40 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũkũmwĩtĩkĩra inyuĩ
Matthew10:41 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũgwĩtĩkĩra mũnabii tondũ nĩ mũnabii
Matthew10:42 Nao andũ aya anyinyi-rĩ
Matthew11:1 NA gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Matthew11:2 Na rĩrĩa Johana aaiguĩrĩire korokoro-inĩ ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa Kristo ekaga
Matthew11:3 makamũũrie atĩrĩ
Matthew11:4 Nake Jesu akĩmacokeria akĩmera atĩrĩ
Matthew11:5 atĩ atumumu nĩmacokete kuona
Matthew11:6 Na gũkena-rĩ
Matthew11:7 Nao maathiĩ-rĩ
Matthew11:8 No rĩrĩ
Matthew11:9 No rĩrĩ
Matthew11:10 Ũcio nĩwe ũhoro ũyũ wandĩkĩtwo nĩ ũndũ wake
Matthew11:11 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew11:12 Na gwata matukũ ma Johana Mũbatithania nginya rĩu
Matthew11:13 Nĩ ũndũ anabii othe
Matthew11:14 Na mũngĩkĩenda gwĩtĩkĩra
Matthew11:15 Mũndũ ũrĩa wĩ na matũ ma kũigua nĩakĩigue.
Matthew11:16 No rĩrĩ
Matthew11:17 tũgatwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew11:18 Nĩ gũkorũo Johana okire atekũrĩa kana kũnyua
Matthew11:19 Nake Mũrũ wa Mũndũ okire akĩrĩaga na akĩnyuaga
Matthew11:20 Hĩndĩ ĩo agĩitĩka gũtetia matũũra marĩa maaringĩirũo ciama ciake iria nyingĩ
Matthew11:21 Wee
Matthew11:22 No ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew11:23 Nawe
Matthew11:24 No ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew11:25 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jesu agĩcoka akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew11:26 noguo
Matthew11:27 Nĩ nengeretwo maũndũ mothe nĩ Awa: na gũtirĩ mũndũ ũũĩ Mũriu tiga Ithe witũ: ningĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ ũũĩ Ithe witũ tiga o Mũriũ
Matthew11:28 Ũkai kũrĩ niĩ inyuothe anogu
Matthew11:29 Oyai icoki rĩakwa mwĩĩkĩre
Matthew11:30 Nĩ gũkorũo icoki rĩakwa nĩ rĩnyoroku
Matthew12:1 HĨNDĨ ĩo Jesu akĩgera mĩgũnda-inĩ ya ngano mũthenya wa thabatũ; na arutwo ake maarĩ ahũtu
Matthew12:2 Nao Afarisai mona ũguo
Matthew12:3 Nake akĩmoria atĩrĩ
Matthew12:4 ũrĩa aatonyire nyũmba ya Ngai na akĩrĩa mĩgate ĩrĩa yaigagĩrũo Ngai
Matthew12:5 O na ningĩ
Matthew12:6 No ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew12:7 No rĩrĩ
Matthew12:8 Nĩ ũndũ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩ mwathani wa gwathaga mũthenya wa thabatũ.
Matthew12:9 Agĩkiuma hau
Matthew12:10 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Matthew12:11 Nake akĩmoria atĩrĩ
Matthew12:12 Kaĩ mũndũ atakĩrĩ bata gũkĩra mbũri? Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩ gwĩtĩkĩrie gwĩkagwo wega mĩthenya ya thabatũ.
Matthew12:13 Agĩcoka akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio
Matthew12:14 No rĩrĩ
Matthew12:15 Nake Jesu aamenya ũguo
Matthew12:16 akĩmakaania matikae kũmuonithania:
Matthew12:17 nĩ getha ciugo iria ciaaririo nĩ Isaia ũrĩa mũnabii ihingio
Matthew12:18 Atĩrĩrĩ
Matthew12:19 Ndĩgatetania
Matthew12:20 Kamũrangi kagondoku ndĩgakoina
Matthew12:21 Narĩo rĩĩtwa rĩake nĩrĩo andũ a Ndũrĩrĩ makerĩgagĩrĩra.
Matthew12:22 Hĩndĩ ĩo akĩreherũo mũndũ warĩ na ndaimono
Matthew12:23 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ gĩothe kĩrĩa kĩarĩ ho gĩkĩgega
Matthew12:24 No rĩrĩa Afarisai maaiguire ũhoro ũcio
Matthew12:25 Nake aamenya meciria mao
Matthew12:26 na angĩkorũo Shaitani nĩagwete kũingata Shaitani-rĩ
Matthew12:27 Na niĩ-rĩ
Matthew12:28 No rĩrĩ
Matthew12:29 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew12:30 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtarĩ thiritũ na niĩ nĩ thũ yakwa; na ũrĩa ũtacokagĩrĩria hamwe na niĩ
Matthew12:31 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew12:32 Na ũrĩa ũgacambia Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩakoherũo; no ũrĩa ũgacambia Roho Mũtheru ndakoherũo o na rĩ
Matthew12:33 Agĩriai mũtĩ
Matthew12:34 Inyuĩ njiaro cia nyamũ-cia-thĩ
Matthew12:35 Mũndũ ũrĩa mwega arutaga maũndũ mega mũthithũ-inĩ wake mwega: na mũndũ ũrĩa mũũru arutaga maũndũ moru mũthithũ-inĩ wake mũũru.
Matthew12:36 Na ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew12:37 Nĩ gũkorũo ciugo ciaku nĩcio igatũma ũtuwo mũthingu
Matthew12:38 Hĩndĩ ĩo aandĩki-marũa amwe na Afarisai amwe makĩmũcokeria makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew12:39 Nake akĩmacokeria akĩmera
Matthew12:40 nĩ ũndũ o ta ũrĩa Jona aagĩtire matukũ matatũ
Matthew12:41 Andũ arĩa a Nineve nĩmakarũgama mũthenya ũrĩa wa cira hamwe na andũ a rũciaro rũrũ na mamatue ehia: nĩ ũndũ o nĩmaaherire
Matthew12:42 Mũtumia mũthamaki
Matthew12:43 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew12:44 Hĩndĩ ĩo ũgakiuga
Matthew12:45 Hĩndĩ ĩo ũgagĩthiĩ
Matthew12:46 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Matthew12:47 Akĩĩrũo nĩ mũndũ atĩrĩ
Matthew12:48 Nowe agĩcokia
Matthew12:49 Nake akĩorota arutwo ake na guoko
Matthew12:50 Nĩ gũkorũo mũndũ o wothe ũrĩĩkaga maũndũ marĩa Awa ũrĩa wĩ Igũrũ endaga
Matthew13:1 MŨTHENYA ũcio Jesu nĩoimire nyũmba
Matthew13:2 Na kĩrĩndĩ kĩingĩ ma nĩkĩamũũnganĩire
Matthew13:3 Nake akĩmaarĩria mohoro maingĩ na ngerekano
Matthew13:4 na rĩrĩa aahuraga
Matthew13:5 na ingĩ ikĩgũa rũnyanjara-inĩ
Matthew13:6 na riũa rĩara
Matthew13:7 Na ingĩ ikĩgũa mĩigua-inĩ; nayo mĩigua ĩgĩkũra
Matthew13:8 na ingĩ ikĩgũa tĩri-inĩ ũrĩa mũnoru igĩciara; imwe maita igana
Matthew13:9 Ũrĩa wĩ na matũ ma kũigua nĩakĩigue.
Matthew13:10 Na arutwo ake magĩũka kũrĩ we makĩmũũria
Matthew13:11 Nake akĩmacokeria akĩmera atĩrĩ
Matthew13:12 Nĩ ũndũ o mũndũ ũrĩa wĩ na indo
Matthew13:13 Nĩkĩo njaragia nao na ngerekano: nĩ ũndũ kuona mationaga
Matthew13:14 Nĩo makinyĩirũo nĩ ũhoro ũrĩa warathirũo nĩ Isaia
Matthew13:15 Nĩ ũndũ ngoro cia andũ aya nĩ ngingitaru
Matthew13:16 No rĩrĩ
Matthew13:17 Tondũ ngũmwĩra na ma
Matthew13:18 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Matthew13:19 Mũndũ aigua Ũhoro wa ũthamaki
Matthew13:20 Na ũrĩa wahurirũo rũnyanjara-inĩ
Matthew13:21 nake ndarĩ mĩri thĩinĩ wake
Matthew13:22 Nake ũrĩa wahurirũo mĩigua-inĩ
Matthew13:23 Na ũrĩa wahurirũo tĩri-inĩ ũrĩa mũnoru
Matthew13:24 Nake akĩmahe ũhoro na ngerekano ĩngĩ
Matthew13:25 na rĩrĩa andũ maarĩ toro
Matthew13:26 Na rĩrĩa nguha ciamerire igĩciara-rĩ
Matthew13:27 Na ngombo cia mwene mũciĩ igĩũka ikĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew13:28 Nake akĩmera
Matthew13:29 Nowe akiuga
Matthew13:30 Rekei ikũranĩre hamwe o cierĩ nginya hĩndĩ ya magetha: o na hĩndĩ ĩo ya magetha nĩngera agethi
Matthew13:31 Akĩmahe ũhoro na ngerekano ĩngĩ
Matthew13:32 Nako nĩ kanini gũkĩra mbeũ ciothe; no gaakũra-rĩ
Matthew13:33 Nake akĩmera ngerekano ĩngĩ; Ũthamaki wa Igũrũ ũhaanaine na ndawa ya kũimbia mũgate
Matthew13:34 Jesu nĩerire kĩrĩndĩ maũndũ macio mothe na ngerekano; na ndaigana kũmera ũndũ o na ũmwe hatarĩ ngerekano:
Matthew13:35 nĩguo ciugo iria cia mũnabii ihingio
Matthew13:36 Hĩndĩ ĩo agĩtigana na kĩrĩndĩ
Matthew13:37 Nake akĩmacokeria akĩmera atĩrĩ
Matthew13:38 naguo mũgũnda nĩ gũkũ thĩ; nacio mbeũ icio njega
Matthew13:39 nayo thũ ĩrĩa yarĩhandire
Matthew13:40 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Matthew13:41 Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩakarekia araika ake
Matthew13:42 mamaikie icua-inĩ rĩrĩa inene rĩa mwaki: kũu nĩkuo gũkagĩa kĩrĩro
Matthew13:43 Hĩndĩ ĩo nĩyo arĩa athingu makaara o ta riũa kũrĩa Ithe wao aathanaga. Ũrĩa wĩ na matũ ma kũigua nĩakĩigue.
Matthew13:44 Ũthamaki wa Igũrũ ũhaanaine na mũthithũ wa indo wahithĩtwo mũgũnda; na rĩrĩa wonirũo nĩ mũndũ
Matthew13:45 Ningĩ
Matthew13:46 na ona ruru ĩmwe yarĩ goro mũno
Matthew13:47 Ningĩ
Matthew13:48 naruo rũaiyũra
Matthew13:49 Ũguo no taguo gũgekwo ithirĩro-inĩ rĩa mahinda maya: araika nĩmagoka mamũranie arĩa oru na arĩa athingu
Matthew13:50 na maikie arĩa oru icua-inĩ rĩrĩa inene rĩa mwaki: kũu nĩkuo gũkagĩa kĩrĩro
Matthew13:51 Rĩu-rĩ
Matthew13:52 Nake akĩmera
Matthew13:53 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Matthew13:54 Nake aakinya bũrũri wao
Matthew13:55 Githĩ ũyũ tiwe mũrũ wa mũndũ ũrĩa mũtharamara? Nake nyina ndetagwo Mariamu? Nao ariũ a nyina ti aa Jakubu
Matthew13:56 Nao airĩtu a nyina
Matthew13:57 Nao makĩhĩngithio nĩ ũndũ wake. Nake Jesu akĩmera
Matthew13:58 Nake ndaigana gwĩka ciĩko nyingĩ cia hinya kũu nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa maagĩte kũmwĩtĩkia.
Matthew14:1 O hĩndĩ ĩo-rĩ
Matthew14:2 agĩkĩĩra ndungata ciake atĩrĩ
Matthew14:3 Tondũ Herode nĩaanyitĩte Johana
Matthew14:4 Tondũ Johana nĩerĩte Herode atĩrĩ
Matthew14:5 Nake rĩrĩa endaga kũmũũraga
Matthew14:6 Na mũthenya wa gũciarũo kwa Herode wakinya
Matthew14:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Herode akĩĩhĩta
Matthew14:8 Nake mũirĩtu ũcio
Matthew14:9 Nake mũthamaki akĩigua ũũru; no nĩ ũndũ wa mĩĩhĩtwa yake
Matthew14:10 akĩrekania
Matthew14:11 Naguo mũtwe wake ũkĩrehwo na kiuga
Matthew14:12 Na arutwo ake magĩthiĩ
Matthew14:13 Nake Jesu rĩrĩa aaiguire ũguo
Matthew14:14 Nake akiuma marikabu-inĩ
Matthew14:15 Na gwatua gũtuka
Matthew14:16 Nowe Jesu akĩmera
Matthew14:17 Nao makĩmwĩra
Matthew14:18 Nake akĩmera atĩrĩ
Matthew14:19 Akĩĩra kĩrĩndĩ gĩikare thĩ nyeki-inĩ; nake akĩoya mĩgate ĩo ĩtano
Matthew14:20 Nao andũ acio othe makĩrĩa
Matthew14:21 Na arĩa maarĩire maarĩ arũme ta ngiri ithano
Matthew14:22 Na hĩndĩ o ĩo akĩhatĩrĩria arutwo ake mahaice marikabu
Matthew14:23 Na aarĩkia kuugĩra kĩrĩndĩ ũhoro
Matthew14:24 Nayo marikabu hĩndĩ ĩo yarĩ gatagatĩ ka iria
Matthew14:25 Na ta thaa kenda cia ũtukũ agĩthiĩ kũrĩ o
Matthew14:26 Nao arutwo ake maamuona agĩthiĩ agĩkinyaga maĩ igũrũ
Matthew14:27 Nake Jesu hĩndĩ o ĩo akĩmaarĩria
Matthew14:28 Nake Petero akĩmũcokeria akĩmwĩra
Matthew14:29 Nake akĩmwĩra
Matthew14:30 Na ona rũhuho
Matthew14:31 Na hĩndĩ o ĩo Jesu agĩtambũrũkia guoko akĩmũgwata
Matthew14:32 Nao maahaica marikabu rũhuho rũgĩtuĩka.
Matthew14:33 Nao arĩa maarĩ marikabu thĩinĩ makĩmũturĩria ndu makiuga
Matthew14:34 Nao maaringa iria
Matthew14:35 Na rĩrĩa andũ akuo maamũmenyire
Matthew14:36 nao makĩmũthaitha atĩ metĩkĩrio mahutie o ciohe cia ndigi cia nguo yake; na arĩa othe maacihutirie makĩhona.
Matthew15:1 THUTHA ũcio Afarisai amwe na aandĩki-marũa amwe magĩũka kũrĩ Jesu moimĩte Jerusalemu
Matthew15:2 Arutwo aku mathahagia kĩrĩra gĩa athuri nĩ ũndũ kĩ? Amu matiĩthambaga moko rĩrĩa mekũrĩa irio.
Matthew15:3 Nake akĩmacokeria akĩmera atĩrĩ
Matthew15:4 Tondũ Ngai nĩoigire
Matthew15:5 No inyuĩ muugaga
Matthew15:6 ũcio ndabatiĩ nĩ gũtĩa ithe. Na nĩmũrarĩtie Ũhoro wa Ngai nĩ ũndũ wa kĩrĩra kĩanyu.
Matthew15:7 Hinga ici! Isaia nĩaarathire wega ũhoro wanyu
Matthew15:8 Andũ aya mandĩaga na mĩromo
Matthew15:9 No kaĩ maturagia ndu ma’hoyage tũhũ
Matthew15:10 Nake agĩgĩĩta kĩrĩndĩ gĩũke harĩ we agĩkĩĩra
Matthew15:11 ti kĩrĩa gĩtonyaga na kanua ka mũndũ kĩmwĩkagĩra thahu; no kĩrĩa kiumaga kanua nĩkĩo kĩmwĩkagĩra thahu.
Matthew15:12 Hĩndĩ ĩo arutwo ake magĩũka kũrĩ we makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew15:13 Nowe akĩmacokeria akĩmera
Matthew15:14 Matigei: nĩo atongoria atumumu; na mũtumumu angĩtongoria mũtumumu ũngĩ
Matthew15:15 Na Petero akĩmũcokeria akĩmwĩra
Matthew15:16 Nake akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew15:17 Kaĩ mũtoĩ atĩ kĩndũ kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩtonyaga na kanua gĩthiaga nda
Matthew15:18 No maũndũ marĩa moimaga kanua
Matthew15:19 Nĩ ũndũ ngoro-inĩ nĩkuo kuumaga meciria moru
Matthew15:20 namo nĩmo mekagĩra mũndũ thahu: no rĩrĩ
Matthew15:21 Nake Jesu akiuma hau
Matthew15:22 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew15:23 Nowe ndaigana kũmũcokeria o na kiugo kĩmwe. Nao arutwo ake magĩũka makĩmũthaitha
Matthew15:24 Nake agĩcokia akiuga
Matthew15:25 Nowe mũtumia ũcio agĩũka harĩ we akĩmũturĩria ndu
Matthew15:26 Nake agĩcokia akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew15:27 Nowe mũtumia ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew15:28 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jesu akĩmũcokeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew15:29 Nake Jesu akiuma hau
Matthew15:30 Na kĩrĩndĩ kĩingĩ gĩgĩũka kũrĩ we
Matthew15:31 o nginya atĩrĩ
Matthew15:32 Nake Jesu agĩĩta arutwo ake moke harĩ we
Matthew15:33 Nao arutwo ake makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew15:34 Nake Jesu akĩmoria atĩrĩ
Matthew15:35 Nake akĩĩra kĩrĩndĩ gĩikare thĩ;
Matthew15:36 akĩoya mĩgate ĩo mũgwanja
Matthew15:37 Nao andũ othe makĩrĩa
Matthew15:38 Nao andũ arĩa maarĩire maarĩ arũme ngiri inya
Matthew15:39 Nake akiugĩra kĩrĩndĩ ũhoro
Matthew16:1 NA rĩrĩ
Matthew16:2 Nake akĩmacokeria akĩmera atĩrĩ
Matthew16:3 Ningĩ rũcinĩ muugaga
Matthew16:4 Rũciaro rũrũ rũaganu na rũa ũtharia rũĩtagia kĩama; na gũtirĩ kĩama rũkaringĩrũo tiga kĩama kĩrĩa kĩa Jona. Nake agĩtigana nao
Matthew16:5 Nao arutwo ake maakinya mũrĩmo ũrĩa ũngĩ
Matthew16:6 Nake Jesu akĩmera atĩrĩ
Matthew16:7 Nao magĩtarania makiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew16:8 Nake Jesu aamenya
Matthew16:9 Kaĩ mũtarĩ mũrakuũka
Matthew16:10 O na kana mĩgate ĩrĩa mũgwanja ya andũ ngiri inya
Matthew16:11 Nĩ kĩ gĩkũgiria mũmenye atĩ ndikũmwaragĩria ũhoro wa mĩgate? Ĩndĩ mwĩmenyagĩrĩre ndawa ya kũimbia mũgate ĩrĩa ya Afarisai na Asadukai.
Matthew16:12 Hĩndĩ ĩo magĩkĩmenya atĩ ndaamerire memenyagĩrĩre ndawa ya kũimbia mũgate
Matthew16:13 Na rĩrĩa Jesu aakinyire hari-inĩ cia Kaisarea-kwa-Filipu
Matthew16:14 Nao makiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew16:15 Nake akĩmoria
Matthew16:16 Nake Simoni Petero akĩmũcokeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew16:17 Nake Jesu akĩmũcokeria akĩmwĩra
Matthew16:18 Na niĩ ngũkwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew16:19 Nĩngakũhe ihingũro cia ũthamaki wa Igũrũ: na kĩrĩa o gĩothe ũkoha gũkũ thĩ nĩgĩkohwo Igũrũ: na kĩrĩa o gĩothe ũkohora gũkũ thĩ
Matthew16:20 Hĩndĩ ĩo agĩkaania arutwo ake matikae kwĩra mũndũ o na ũmwe atĩ nĩwe Kristo.
Matthew16:21 Gwata hĩndĩ ĩo Jesu agĩitĩka kũmenyithia arutwo ake atĩ no kinya athiĩ Jerusalemu
Matthew16:22 Nake Petero akĩmũhira ndundu
Matthew16:23 Nake Jesu akĩĩhũgũrĩra Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew16:24 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jesu akĩĩra arutwo ake atĩrĩ
Matthew16:25 Nĩ ũndũ mũndũ ũrĩa wendaga gũtũũria muoyo wake
Matthew16:26 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Matthew16:27 Tondũ rĩrĩ
Matthew16:28 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma

Matthew17:11 Nake akĩmacokeria akĩmera
Matthew17:12 no ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ

Matthew18:1 O thaa ĩo arutwo magĩũka kũrĩ Jesu makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew18:2 Nake agĩĩta kaana goke harĩ we
Matthew18:3 akiuga
Matthew18:4 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew18:5 Na ũrĩa ũgwĩtĩkĩra kaana kamwe ta gaka nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa
Matthew18:6 no ũrĩa ũkahĩngithia kamwe ga twana tũtũ tũnjĩtĩkĩtie
Matthew18:7 Kaĩ gũkũ thĩ kwĩ na haaro-ĩ
Matthew18:8 Na kũngĩtuĩka atĩ guoko gwaku kana kũgũrũ gwaku nĩ gwa gũkũhĩngithia
Matthew18:9 Na kũngĩtuĩka atĩ riitho rĩaku nĩ rĩa gũkũhĩngithia
Matthew18:10 Menyai mũkanyarara kamwe ga twana tũtũ; nĩ gũkorũo ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew18:11 [Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Matthew18:12 Rĩu-rĩ
Matthew18:13 Na angĩmĩona-rĩ
Matthew18:14 O ũguo nake Ithe wanyu
Matthew18:15 Na mũrũ wa thoguo angĩkwĩhia-rĩ
Matthew18:16 No rĩrĩ
Matthew18:17 Nake angĩrega kũigua acio
Matthew18:18 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew18:19 Ningĩ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew18:20 Tondũ harĩa andũ erĩ kana atatũ monganĩte hamwe nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa
Matthew18:21 Hĩndĩ ĩo Petero agĩũka kũrĩ we akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew18:22 Jesu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew18:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ũthamaki wa Igũrũ nĩ wa kũhaananio na mũthamaki mũna ũrĩa wendaga kũheo ũhoro wa mbia ciake nĩ ngombo ciake.
Matthew18:24 Na aambĩrĩria kwĩrũo ũhoro ũcio
Matthew18:25 Na tondũ nĩyaremetwo nĩ kũrĩha
Matthew18:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngombo ĩo ĩkĩĩgũithia thĩ ĩkĩmũthaitha
Matthew18:27 Na mwathani wa ngombo ĩo akĩringwo nĩ tha
Matthew18:28 No rĩrĩ
Matthew18:29 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo ngombo ĩo yarutaga wĩra nayo ĩkĩĩgũithia thĩ ĩkĩmĩthaitha
Matthew18:30 Nayo ĩkĩrega
Matthew18:31 Na rĩrĩa ngombo iria ingĩ ciarutaga wĩra nayo cionire ũrĩa gwekirũo
Matthew18:32 Hĩndĩ ĩo mwathani wayo akĩmĩĩta akĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew18:33 githĩ ndũkwagĩrĩirũo o nawe nĩ kũiguĩra tha ngombo ĩrĩa mũrutaga wĩra nayo
Matthew18:34 Nake mwathani wayo akĩrakara
Matthew18:35 Ũguo noguo Awa ũrĩa wĩ Igũrũ akamwĩka inyuĩ

Matthew19:2 na kĩrĩndĩ kĩingĩ gĩkĩmũhikĩra

Matthew19:4 Nake agĩcokia ũhoro akĩmoria atĩrĩ
Matthew19:5 na akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew19:6 Tondũ wa ũguo matigacoka gũtuĩka erĩ
Matthew19:7 Nao makĩmũũria; Nĩ kĩ gĩagĩtũmire Musa aathane atĩ mũndũ ahe mũtumia wake marũa ma gũtigana nake
Matthew19:8 Nake akĩmera
Matthew19:9 Na ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew19:10 Nao arutwo ake makĩmwĩra; Ũhoro wa mũndũ na mũtumia wake ũngĩkorũo ũtariĩ ũguo
Matthew19:11 Nowe akĩmera atĩrĩ
Matthew19:12 Amu-rĩ
Matthew19:13 Hĩndĩ ĩo akĩreherũo twana nĩ getha atũigĩrĩre moko
Matthew19:14 Nowe Jesu akĩmera
Matthew19:15 Nake agĩtũigĩrĩra moko
Matthew19:16 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Matthew19:17 Nake akĩmũcokeria atĩrĩ
Matthew19:18 Nake akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew19:19 Tĩaga thoguo na nyũkwa: na ningĩ
Matthew19:20 Nake mwanake ũcio akĩmwĩra Maũndũ macio mothe ndũire ndĩmarũmĩtie: nĩ ũndũ ũrĩkũ ũngĩ ndigairie?
Matthew19:21 Nake Jesu akĩmwĩra
Matthew19:22 No rĩrĩa mwanake ũcio aaiguire ciugo icio
Matthew19:23 Nake Jesu akĩĩra arutwo ake
Matthew19:24 Na ningĩ ngũmwĩra atĩ
Matthew19:25 Na rĩrĩa arutwo ake maaiguire ũguo

Matthew20:1 TONDŨ rĩrĩ
Matthew20:2 Na rĩrĩa aarĩkanĩire na andũ acio a wĩra magwate ciringi o mũthenya
Matthew20:3 Agĩcoka akiumagara ta thaa ithatũ
Matthew20:4 o nao akĩmera
Matthew20:5 Agĩcoka akiumagara rĩngĩ ta thaa thita
Matthew20:6 Agĩcoka akiumagara ta thaa ikũmi na ĩmwe
Matthew20:7 Nao makĩmũcokeria
Matthew20:8 Na gwakinya hwaĩ-inĩ
Matthew20:9 Nao arĩa maandĩkirũo thaa ikũmi na ĩmwe moka kũrĩ we
Matthew20:10 Nao arĩa a mbere moka
Matthew20:11 Na maarĩkia kũheo
Matthew20:12 makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew20:13 Nake agĩcokia ũhoro akĩĩra ũmwe wao
Matthew20:14 Oya o kĩrĩa gĩaku
Matthew20:15 Githĩ ndiagĩrĩirũo nĩ gwĩka o ũrĩa ngwenda na indo ciakwa mwene? Kana hihi riitho rĩaku rĩĩ na rũitho
Matthew20:16 Ũguo no taguo andũ arĩa marĩ a thutha magatuĩka a mbere
Matthew20:17 Na rĩrĩa Jesu aambataga Jerusalemu
Matthew20:18 Twaambata Jerusalemu; nake Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩakaneanwo kũrĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene
Matthew20:19 na mamũneane kũrĩ andũ a Ndũrĩrĩ mamũnyũrũrie
Matthew20:20 Thutha ũcio nyina wa ariũ a Zebedi agĩũka kũrĩ we me na ariũ ake
Matthew20:21 Nake akĩmũũria Nĩ ũndũ ũrĩkũ ũkwenda? Akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew20:22 Nowe Jesu agĩcokia akĩmera
Matthew20:23 Nake akĩmera
Matthew20:24 Na rĩrĩa arĩa angĩ ikũmi maaiguire ũndũ ũcio
Matthew20:25 Nowe Jesu akĩmeta moke harĩ we
Matthew20:26 Tiguo gũgatuĩka thĩinĩ wanyu: no ũrĩa ũngĩenda gũtuĩka mũnene thĩinĩ wanyu nĩatuĩke o ndungata yanyu;
Matthew20:27 na ũrĩa ũngĩenda gũtuĩka wa mbere thĩinĩ wanyu nĩatuĩke o ngombo yanyu:
Matthew20:28 o ta ũrĩa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ atokire gũtungatĩrũo no atungatanĩre
Matthew20:29 Na rĩrĩa moimaga Jeriko
Matthew20:30 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Matthew20:31 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ gĩkĩmakaania
Matthew20:32 Nake Jesu akĩrũgama
Matthew20:33 Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew20:34 Nake Jesu akĩringwo nĩ tha
Matthew21:1 NA rĩrĩa maakuhĩhĩirie Jerusalemu
Matthew21:2 Thiĩi mũtonye mũciĩ ũrĩa mũringaine naguo
Matthew21:3 Na mũngĩũrio ũndũ nĩ mũndũ
Matthew21:4 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew21:5 Ĩrai mwarĩ wa Sayuni
Matthew21:6 Nao arutwo magĩgĩthiĩ
Matthew21:7 makĩrehe ndigiri ĩo na njaũ yayo
Matthew21:8 Na andũ arĩa aingĩ a kĩrĩndĩ kĩrĩa kĩarĩ ho makĩara nguo ciao njĩra-inĩ; angĩ magĩtua mathĩgĩ mĩtĩ-inĩ
Matthew21:9 Na kĩrĩndĩ kĩrĩa kĩamũtongoretie
Matthew21:10 Nake aakinya Jerusalemu
Matthew21:11 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ gĩgĩcokia atĩrĩ
Matthew21:12 Nake Jesu agĩtonya hekarũ ya Ngai
Matthew21:13 agĩkĩmera
Matthew21:14 Na atumumu na ithua magĩthiĩ kũrĩ we hekarũ-inĩ: nake akĩmahonia.
Matthew21:15 No rĩrĩa athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene o na aandĩki-marũa monire ciĩko cia kũgegania iria ekire
Matthew21:16 makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew21:17 Nake agĩtigana nao
Matthew21:18 Na rũcinĩ
Matthew21:19 Na ona mũkũyũ njĩra-inĩ
Matthew21:20 Na rĩrĩa arutwo ake monire ũguo
Matthew21:21 Nake Jesu agĩcoka akĩmera
Matthew21:22 O na maũndũ marĩa mothe mũkahoya mwĩtĩkĩtie
Matthew21:23 Na rĩrĩa aatonyire hekarũ thĩinĩ
Matthew21:24 Nake Jesu akĩmacokeria akĩmera atĩrĩ
Matthew21:25 Atĩrĩrĩi
Matthew21:26 No rĩrĩ
Matthew21:27 Nao magĩcokeria Jesu makiuga
Matthew21:28 Ĩndĩ-rĩ
Matthew21:29 Nake agĩcokia akĩmwĩra
Matthew21:30 Ningĩ ithe agĩcoka agĩthiĩ kũrĩ ũrĩa wa kerĩ
Matthew21:31 Acio erĩ-rĩ
Matthew21:32 Nĩ ũndũ Johana nĩokire kũrĩ inyuĩ na njĩra ya ũthingu
Matthew21:33 Ta iguai ngerekano ĩngĩ: Kwarĩ mũndũ mwene mũciĩ wahandire mũgũnda wa mĩthabibu
Matthew21:34 Na hingo ya kũgetha maciaro yakuhĩhĩria
Matthew21:35 Na arĩmi acio makĩnyita ngombo ciake
Matthew21:36 Ningĩ agĩcoka akĩrekia ngombo ingĩ nyingĩ kũrĩ icio cia mbere: nao magĩciĩka o ũguo.
Matthew21:37 Thutha wa ũguo akĩmarekeria mũriũ
Matthew21:38 No arĩmi acio mona mũriũ
Matthew21:39 Magĩkĩmũnyita
Matthew21:40 Rĩu-rĩ
Matthew21:41 Nao andũ makĩmũcokeria atĩrĩ
Matthew21:42 Nake Jesu akĩmoria atĩrĩ
Matthew21:43 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew21:44 Na mũndũ ũrĩa ũkagũĩra ihiga rĩu nĩagathuthĩka: no ũrĩa ũkagũĩrũo nĩrĩo
Matthew21:45 Na rĩrĩa athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na Afarisai maaiguire ngerekano ciake
Matthew21:46 Na rĩrĩa maacaragia ũrĩa mangĩmũnyita
Matthew22:1 NAKE Jesu akĩmahe ũhoro rĩngĩ na ngerekano
Matthew22:2 Ũthamaki wa Igũrũ nĩ wa kũhaananio na mũthamaki mũna warugire iruga mũriũ akĩhikania
Matthew22:3 agĩtũma ngombo ciake igete arĩa metĩtwo
Matthew22:4 Nake agĩcoka agĩtũma ngombo ingĩ
Matthew22:5 No rĩrĩ
Matthew22:6 na arĩa angĩ makĩnyita ngombo ciake
Matthew22:7 Nake mũthamaki ũcio akĩrakara; akĩrekia mbũtũ ciake
Matthew22:8 Hĩndĩ ĩo akĩĩra ngombo ciake atĩrĩ
Matthew22:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio thiĩi magomano-inĩ ma ing’aratua
Matthew22:10 Na ngombo icio ikiumagara
Matthew22:11 No rĩrĩa mũthamaki ũcio aatonyire arore ageni acio
Matthew22:12 akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew22:13 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũthamaki akĩĩra ngombo ciake
Matthew22:14 Nĩ ũndũ arĩa metĩtwo nĩ aingĩ
Matthew22:15 Hĩndĩ ĩo Afarisai magĩthiĩ ndundu mamenye ũrĩa mangĩhota kũmũtega akĩaria.
Matthew22:16 Magĩtũma arutwo ao me na Aherodia kũrĩ we
Matthew22:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Matthew22:18 Nowe Jesu akĩmenya ũũru wao akĩmacokeria atĩrĩ
Matthew22:19 Nyoniai kĩrĩa mũrutaga kĩa igoti. Nao makĩmũtwarĩra ciringi.
Matthew22:20 Nake akĩmoria atĩrĩ
Matthew22:21 Makĩmwĩra
Matthew22:22 Nao maaigua ũguo
Matthew22:23 Mũthenya ũcio Asadukai
Matthew22:24 Mũrutani
Matthew22:25 Rĩu-rĩ
Matthew22:26 na ũrĩa wa kerĩ
Matthew22:27 Na thutha wao othe
Matthew22:28 Rĩu-rĩ
Matthew22:29 Nake Jesu akĩmacokeria akĩmera
Matthew22:30 Tondũ rĩrĩa arĩa akuũ makariũka
Matthew22:31 Naho ha ũhoro wa kũriũka kwa arĩa akuũ-rĩ
Matthew22:32 Nĩ niĩ Ngai wa Iburahimu
Matthew22:33 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ kĩaigua ũguo
Matthew22:34 No Afarisai
Matthew22:35 Na ũmwe wao
Matthew22:36 Mũrutani
Matthew22:37 Nake akĩmũcokeria atĩrĩ
Matthew22:38 Rĩu nĩrĩo rĩathani rĩrĩa inene
Matthew22:39 Narĩo rĩa kerĩ
Matthew22:40 Maathani macio merĩ nĩmo gatũũrũ ka watho wothe
Matthew22:41 Na hĩndĩ ĩo Afarisai monganĩte-rĩ
Matthew22:42 Ha ũhoro wa Kristo
Matthew22:43 Nake akĩmoria atĩrĩ
Matthew22:44 Mwathani nĩerire Mwathani wakwa atĩrĩ
Matthew22:45 Rĩu-rĩ
Matthew22:46 Na gũtirĩ mũndũ wahotire kũmũcokeria kiugo o na kĩmwe: na kuuma mũthenya ũcio gũtirĩ mũndũ wacokire gweta kũmũũria ciũria ingĩ.
Matthew23:1 HĨNDĨ ĩo Jesu akĩarĩria kĩrĩndĩ o na arutwo ake
Matthew23:2 akĩmera atĩrĩ
Matthew23:3 nĩ ũndũ ũcio maũndũ marĩa mothe mamwĩraga mwĩke
Matthew23:4 Na nĩmohaga mĩrigo mĩritũ
Matthew23:5 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew23:6 na nĩmendaga gũikara handũ harĩa ha gũtĩo maruga-inĩ
Matthew23:7 na kũgeithio nĩ andũ ing’ang’a-inĩ
Matthew23:8 No inyuĩ-rĩ
Matthew23:9 Ningĩ mũtikanete mũndũ o na ũmwe ithe wanyu gũkũ thĩ: nĩ gũkorũo ũmwe nĩwe Ithe wanyu
Matthew23:10 Ningĩ mũtikanetwo atongoria: nĩ gũkorũo ũmwe nĩwe Mũtongoria wanyu
Matthew23:11 No rĩrĩ
Matthew23:12 Na mũndũ o wothe wĩtũũgagĩria
Matthew23:13 No kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro-ĩ
Matthew23:14 [Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro-ĩ
Matthew23:15 Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro-ĩ
Matthew23:16 Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro-ĩ
Matthew23:17 Inyuĩ irimũ ici na atumumu! Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Matthew23:18 Na ningĩ muugaga
Matthew23:19 Inyuĩ atumumu aya! Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Matthew23:20 Tondũ ũcio-rĩ
Matthew23:21 Nake ũrĩa ũkwĩhĩta na hekarũ
Matthew23:22 Nake ũrĩa ũkwĩhĩta na Igũrũ
Matthew23:23 Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro-ĩ
Matthew23:24 Inyuĩ atongoria atumumu! O inyuĩ mũkeeraga rũmuru
Matthew23:25 Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro-ĩ
Matthew23:26 Wee Mũfarisai ũyũ mũtumumu! Amba ũtherie gĩkombe na thani na thĩinĩ
Matthew23:27 Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro-ĩ
Matthew23:28 No taguo o na inyuĩ muonagwo na igũrũ athingu mũrĩ
Matthew23:29 Kaĩ mũrĩ na haaro-ĩ
Matthew23:30 Tũngĩarĩ muoyo ithuĩ matukũ ma maithe maitũ
Matthew23:31 Ũguo nĩguo mwĩumbũraga atĩ nĩ inyuĩ ariũ a arĩa moragire anabii.
Matthew23:32 No kĩiyũrĩrĩriei kĩgeri kĩrĩa kĩa maithe manyu.
Matthew23:33 Inyuĩ nyamũ-cia-thĩ! Njiaro cia ndwĩra! Mũkahonoka atĩa mũtigatuĩrũo ituĩro rĩa Jehanumu?
Matthew23:34 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Matthew23:35 nĩguo atĩ inyuĩ mũcokererũo nĩ thakame ya andũ othe athingu ĩrĩa yanaitwo thĩ
Matthew23:36 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew23:37 Atĩrĩrĩ
Matthew23:38 Atĩrĩrĩ
Matthew23:39 Nĩ ũndũ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew24:1 NAKE Jesu akiuma hekarũ akĩgwata gwĩthiĩra; na arutwo ake magĩũka kũrĩ we mamuonie mĩako ya hekarũ.
Matthew24:2 Nowe agĩcokia ũhoro akĩmoria atĩrĩ
Matthew24:3 Na rĩrĩa aaikarĩte thĩ kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa Mĩtamaiyũ
Matthew24:4 Nake Jesu akĩmacokeria akĩmera atĩrĩ
Matthew24:5 Nĩ gũkorũo andũ aingĩ nĩmagoka magĩĩtuaga rĩĩtwa rĩakwa
Matthew24:6 Na nĩmũkaigua ũhoro wa mbaara
Matthew24:7 Tondũ rĩrĩ
Matthew24:8 Namo maũndũ macio mothe no kĩambĩrĩria kĩa ruo ta rũa kũrũmwo.
Matthew24:9 Hĩndĩ ĩo nĩyo andũ makamũneana mũnyarirũo
Matthew24:10 Na hĩndĩ ĩo andũ aingĩ nĩmakahĩngithio
Matthew24:11 Na anabii aingĩ a mathaara nĩmagokĩra
Matthew24:12 Na tondũ waganu nĩũgakorũo ũingĩhĩtio
Matthew24:13 No ũrĩa ũgũkirĩrĩria nginya o ithirĩro
Matthew24:14 Naguo Ũhoro-ũyũ-Mwega wa ũthamaki nĩũkahunjio thĩ yothe
Matthew24:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew24:16 hĩndĩ ĩo-rĩ
Matthew24:17 nake ũrĩa wĩ nyũmba igũrũ nĩatige gũikũrũka akarute indo ii nyũmba yake thĩinĩ:
Matthew24:18 na ũrĩa wĩ mũgũnda nĩatige gũcoka na thutha akoe nguo yake.
Matthew24:19 Na arĩa magakorũo marĩ na mahu
Matthew24:20 Na mũhoyage atĩ muunĩko wanyu ndũkagĩe hingo ya heho
Matthew24:21 nĩ ũndũ hĩndĩ ĩo nĩgũkagĩa thĩna mũnene ũtarĩ wonwo taguo gwata kĩambĩrĩria gĩa thĩ nginya rĩu
Matthew24:22 Na tiga matukũ macio maakuhĩhirio
Matthew24:23 Hĩndĩ ĩo
Matthew24:24 Nĩ ũndũ nĩgũgokĩra makristo ma maheni o na anabii a maheni
Matthew24:25 Atĩrĩrĩ
Matthew24:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũngĩkerũo
Matthew24:27 Tondũ o ta ũrĩa rũheni ruumaga o kũrĩa irathĩro
Matthew24:28 O kũrĩa kũrĩ kĩimba-rĩ
Matthew24:29 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew24:30 na hĩndĩ ĩo kĩmenyithia kĩa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩgĩkoneka kũrĩa igũrũ: ningĩ hĩndĩ ĩo iruka ciothe cia thĩ nĩikagĩa na kĩeha
Matthew24:31 Nake nĩagatũma araika ake kwĩ na mũgambo mũnene wa coro; nao monganie arĩa ake aamũre moime mĩena ĩrĩa ĩna yumaga rũhuho
Matthew24:32 Naguo mũkũyũ-rĩ
Matthew24:33 noguo na inyuĩ
Matthew24:34 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew24:35 Igũrũ na thĩ nĩgũgathira
Matthew24:36 Naguo ũhoro wa mũthenya ũcio
Matthew24:37 Na ta ũrĩa gwatariĩ matukũ ma Nuhu
Matthew24:38 Nĩ gũkorũo
Matthew24:39 nao matiamenyire kinya rĩrĩa kĩguũ kĩu kĩnene gĩokire gĩkĩmatwara othe-rĩ; o ũguo noguo gũũka kwa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ gũkahaana.
Matthew24:40 Hĩndĩ ĩo arũme erĩ magakorũo mũgũnda; ũmwe nĩagatwarũo
Matthew24:41 atumia erĩ magakorũo magĩthĩa gĩthĩi-inĩ; ũmwe nĩagatwarũo
Matthew24:42 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio wĩhũgagei
Matthew24:43 Ĩndĩ menyai ũũ
Matthew24:44 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio o na inyuĩ ikaragai mwĩhaarĩirie: nĩ gũkorũo Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩagoka thaa ĩrĩa mũtegereirie.
Matthew24:45 Rĩu-rĩ
Matthew24:46 Gũkena-rĩ
Matthew24:47 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew24:48 No rĩrĩ
Matthew24:49 nayo ĩitĩke kũhũra ngombo iria ingĩ
Matthew24:50 mwathani wa ngombo ĩo nĩagoka mũthenya ũrĩa ĩtegereirie
Matthew24:51 nake nĩakamĩhũra mũno
Matthew25:1 HĨNDĨ ĩo ũthamaki wa Igũrũ ũkahaananio na airĩtu ikũmi
Matthew25:2 Na atano ao maarĩ akĩgu
Matthew25:3 Nĩ ũndũ arĩa akĩgu-rĩ
Matthew25:4 no arĩa ogĩ nĩmaakuuire maguta thĩinĩ wa macuba mao
Matthew25:5 Na rĩrĩa mũhikania aaikarire
Matthew25:6 Na ũtukũ gatagatĩ gũkĩanĩrĩrũo atĩrĩ
Matthew25:7 Hĩndĩ ĩo airĩtu acio othe magĩũkĩra
Matthew25:8 Na arĩa akĩgu makĩĩra arĩa ogĩ atĩrĩ
Matthew25:9 No acio ogĩ magĩcokia makiuga
Matthew25:10 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maathiĩte kũgũra
Matthew25:11 Thutha ũcio airĩtu arĩa angĩ magĩũka o nao
Matthew25:12 Nake agĩcokia akĩmera
Matthew25:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio wĩhũgagei
Matthew25:14 Nĩ ũndũ gũkahaana ta arĩ
Matthew25:15 Akĩne ĩmwe yacio taranda ithano
Matthew25:16 Na kahinda o kau ĩrĩa yaneirũo taranda ithano ĩgĩthiĩ
Matthew25:17 Nayo ĩrĩa yaneirũo igĩrĩ ĩgĩĩka o taguo
Matthew25:18 No ĩrĩa yaneirũo ĩmwe ĩgĩthiĩ ĩkĩenja thĩ
Matthew25:19 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew25:20 Na ĩrĩa yaneirũo taranda ithano ĩgĩũka ĩkiuga
Matthew25:21 Nake mwathani wayo akĩmĩĩra
Matthew25:22 Nayo ĩrĩa yaneirũo taranda igĩrĩ o nayo ĩgĩũka ĩkĩmwĩra
Matthew25:23 Nake mwathani wayo akĩmĩĩra
Matthew25:24 Nayo ĩrĩa yaneirũo taranda ĩmwe ĩgĩũka kũrĩ we ĩkĩmwĩra
Matthew25:25 ngĩgĩĩtigĩra
Matthew25:26 Nowe mwathani wayo agĩcokia akĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew25:27 nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩwaagĩrĩirũo nĩ kũiga mbia ciakwa kũrĩ andũ arĩa monjorithagia mbia
Matthew25:28 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũtunyei taranda ĩo
Matthew25:29 Nĩ gũkorũo mũndũ o wothe wĩ na indo
Matthew25:30 Nayo ngombo ĩo ĩtarĩ bata mũmĩikie na kũu nja kwĩ na nduma: kũu nĩkuo gũkagĩa kĩrĩro na kũhagarania magego.
Matthew25:31 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew25:32 na ndũrĩrĩ ciothe nĩikonganio mbere yake: nake nĩagaciamũrania
Matthew25:33 aige ng’ondu mwena wake wa ũrĩo
Matthew25:34 Hĩndĩ ĩo Mũthamaki nĩakera arĩa marĩ mwena wake wa ũrĩo atĩrĩ
Matthew25:35 nĩ gũkorũo ndarĩ mũhũtu
Matthew25:36 ndarĩ njaga
Matthew25:37 Hĩndĩ ĩo arĩa athingu nĩmakamũcokeria mamũũrie atĩrĩ
Matthew25:38 Ningĩ nĩ rĩ twakuonire wĩ mũgendi
Matthew25:39 Na nĩ rĩ twakuonire wĩ mũrũaru
Matthew25:40 Nake Mũthamaki nĩagacokia amere
Matthew25:41 Hĩndĩ ĩo nĩakera arĩa marĩ mwena wake wa ũmotho atĩrĩ
Matthew25:42 nĩ gũkorũo ndarĩ mũhũtu
Matthew25:43 ndarĩ mũgendi
Matthew25:44 Hĩndĩ ĩo o nao nĩmagacokia mamũũrie atĩrĩ
Matthew25:45 Hĩndĩ ĩo nĩagacokia amere
Matthew25:46 Nao andũ acio nĩmagathiĩ kũrĩa kũherithanagĩrio tene na tene: no rĩrĩ
Matthew26:1 NA gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Matthew26:2 Nĩmũũĩ atĩ mĩthenya ĩĩrĩ yathira gĩathĩ kĩa Bathaka nĩgĩgakinya
Matthew26:3 Hĩndĩ ĩo athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na athuri a kĩrĩndĩ makĩũngana kũu nja kwa mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene
Matthew26:4 magĩthiĩ ndundu nĩ getha manyitithie Jesu na wara
Matthew26:5 No makiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew26:6 Na rĩrĩa Jesu aarĩ Bethania
Matthew26:7 mũtumia warĩ na cuba wa maguta me goro mũno agĩũka kũrĩ we
Matthew26:8 No rĩrĩa arutwo monire ũguo
Matthew26:9 Nĩ ũndũ maguta macio nĩmangĩahota kwendio mbia nyingĩ
Matthew26:10 Nowe Jesu aamenya ũguo
Matthew26:11 Nĩ gũkorũo arĩa athĩni
Matthew26:12 Nĩ ũndũ rĩrĩa aitĩrĩirie maguta macio mwĩrĩ wakwa
Matthew26:13 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew26:14 Hĩndĩ ĩo ũmwe wa arĩa ikũmi na erĩ
Matthew26:15 akĩmoria atĩrĩ
Matthew26:16 Na kuuma hĩndĩ ĩo nĩ gũcaria aacaragia hĩndĩ njagĩrĩru ya kũmũneana.
Matthew26:17 Na mũthenya ũrĩa wa kwambĩrĩria kũrĩa mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndawa ya kũimbia
Matthew26:18 Nake akĩmera atĩrĩ
Matthew26:19 Nao arutwo magĩĩka o ta ũrĩa Jesu aamaathire; magĩgĩthondeka Bathaka.
Matthew26:20 Na gwakinya hwaĩ-inĩ
Matthew26:21 na makĩrĩa-rĩ
Matthew26:22 Nao makĩigua kĩeha kĩnene
Matthew26:23 Nake agĩcokia akĩmera atĩrĩ
Matthew26:24 Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩegũthiĩ o ta ũrĩa ũhoro wake wandĩkĩtwo: no mũndũ ũrĩa ũgũkunyanĩra Mũrũ wa Mũndũ
Matthew26:25 Nake Judasi
Matthew26:26 Na o makĩrĩaga-rĩ
Matthew26:27 Agĩcoka akĩoya gĩkombe
Matthew26:28 nĩ gũkorũo ino nĩyo thakame yakwa ya kĩrĩkanĩro ĩrĩa ĩitĩirũo andũ aingĩ
Matthew26:29 No ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew26:30 Na maarĩkia kũina rũĩmbo makiumagara
Matthew26:31 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jesu akĩmera atĩrĩ
Matthew26:32 No rĩrĩ
Matthew26:33 Nowe Petero agĩcokia akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew26:34 Nake Jesu akĩmwĩra
Matthew26:35 Nake Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew26:36 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jesu agĩkinya nao handũ hetagwo Gethisemane
Matthew26:37 Agĩtwara Petero na ariũ arĩa erĩ a Zebedi
Matthew26:38 Na hĩndĩ ĩo akĩmera atĩrĩ
Matthew26:39 Agĩthiathia hanini
Matthew26:40 Agĩcoka harĩ arutwo
Matthew26:41 Wĩhũgagei na mũhoyage
Matthew26:42 Agĩcoka agĩthiĩ rĩa kerĩ
Matthew26:43 Agĩcoka rĩngĩ
Matthew26:44 Akĩmatiga rĩngĩ
Matthew26:45 Hĩndĩ ĩo agĩcoka harĩ arutwo akĩmera atĩrĩ
Matthew26:46 Ũkĩrai
Matthew26:47 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew26:48 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew26:49 Agĩthiĩ o rĩmwe kũrĩ Jesu
Matthew26:50 Nake Jesu akĩmwĩra
Matthew26:51 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew26:52 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jesu akĩmwĩra
Matthew26:53 Kana ũgwĩciria atĩ ndingĩhota kũhoya Awa
Matthew26:54 No rĩrĩ
Matthew26:55 O thaa ĩo Jesu akĩũria kĩrĩndĩ kĩu atĩrĩ
Matthew26:56 Ĩndĩ ũũ wothe wekĩka nĩ getha maũndũ marĩa maandĩkĩtwo nĩ anabii mahingio. Hĩndĩ ĩo arutwo othe magĩkĩmũtiga makĩũra.
Matthew26:57 Nao acio maanyitĩte Jesu makĩmũtwara gwa Kaiafa
Matthew26:58 Nowe Petero akĩmũrũmĩrĩra arĩ haraya
Matthew26:59 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew26:60 nao matiigana kuona
Matthew26:61 makiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew26:62 Nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene akĩrũgama akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew26:63 Nowe Jesu agĩkira ki. Nake mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew26:64 Nake Jesu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew26:65 Hĩndĩ ĩo mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũcio mũnene agĩtembũra nguo ciake
Matthew26:66 mũgwĩciria atĩa? Nao makĩmũcokeria makiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew26:67 Hĩndĩ ĩo makĩmũtuĩra mata ũthiũ
Matthew26:68 makĩmwĩraga
Matthew26:69 Nake Petero nĩ gũikara aaikaire kũu nja; na mũirĩtu ũmwe wa wĩra akĩmũkora akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew26:70 Nake agĩkaana mbere yao othe akiuga
Matthew26:71 Na rĩrĩa aathiire kĩhingo-inĩ
Matthew26:72 Nake agĩkaana rĩngĩ na mwĩhĩtwa
Matthew26:73 Na kahinda kanini gaathira
Matthew26:74 Hĩndĩ ĩo agĩitĩka kwĩgirithia na kwĩhĩta
Matthew26:75 Nake Petero akĩririkana ũhoro ũrĩa Jesu aramwĩrire ũũ
Matthew27:1 NA rũcinĩ
Matthew27:2 makĩmuohithia
Matthew27:3 Hĩndĩ ĩo Judasi ũrĩa wamũkunyanĩire ona atĩ nĩaatuĩrũo ituĩro rĩũru
Matthew27:4 akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew27:5 Nake agĩikania mbia icio thĩ kũu hekarũ thĩinĩ
Matthew27:6 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene makĩoya mbia icio makiuga
Matthew27:7 Na magĩthiĩ ndundu
Matthew27:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio gĩthaka kĩu gĩĩtagwo Gĩthaka gĩa thakame
Matthew27:9 Hĩndĩ ĩo nĩyo ciugo iria cia mũnabii Jeremia ciahingirio
Matthew27:10 nao magĩcineana ikagũre gĩthaka kĩrĩa kĩa mũũmbi
Matthew27:11 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew27:12 Na rĩrĩa aathitakirũo nĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na athuri
Matthew27:13 Hĩndĩ ĩo Pilato akĩmũũria
Matthew27:14 Nake ndaigana kũmũcokeria kiugo o na kĩmwe: na tondũ ũcio barũthi agĩkĩgega mũno.
Matthew27:15 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew27:16 Na hĩndĩ ĩo maarĩ na mũndũ muohe woĩo mũno
Matthew27:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew27:18 Nĩ ũndũ nĩoĩ atĩ nĩmaamũneanĩte nĩ ũndũ wa ũiru.
Matthew27:19 Na hĩndĩ ĩo aaikarĩire gĩtĩ kĩrĩa gĩa ciira
Matthew27:20 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na athuri makĩringĩrĩria kĩrĩndĩ atĩ gĩĩtie Baraba
Matthew27:21 Nowe barũthi agĩcokia ũhoro akĩmoria atĩrĩ
Matthew27:22 Nake Pilato akĩmoria atĩrĩ
Matthew27:23 Nake akĩmoria
Matthew27:24 Na rĩrĩa Pilato onire atĩ nĩekũũmĩrũo
Matthew27:25 Nao andũ othe magĩcokia makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew27:26 Hĩndĩ ĩo agĩkĩmohorera Baraba: nowe Jesu-rĩ
Matthew27:27 Hĩndĩ ĩo athigari a barũthi magĩtwara Jesu nyũmba-inĩ ĩrĩa ya gũciirĩrũo
Matthew27:28 Na makĩmũruta nguo ciake
Matthew27:29 Magĩtuma thũmbĩ ya mĩigua
Matthew27:30 Na makĩmũtuĩra mata
Matthew27:31 Na maarĩkia kũmũnyũrũria
Matthew27:32 Na rĩrĩa moimagaraga
Matthew27:33 Na rĩrĩa maakinyire handũ hetagwo Gologotha
Matthew27:34 makĩmũnengera ndibei ĩtukanĩtio na maĩ ma nyongo anyue: nake aamĩcama
Matthew27:35 Na maarĩkia kũmwamba mũtĩ igũrũ
Matthew27:36 Na magĩikara thĩ ho
Matthew27:37 Na igũrũ rĩa mũtwe wake magĩĩkĩra irũa rĩandĩkĩtwo ũndũ ũrĩa aathitakĩirũo
Matthew27:38 Hĩndĩ ĩo atunyani erĩ makĩambwo mĩtĩ igũrũ hamwe nake
Matthew27:39 Na andũ arĩa maahĩtũkagĩra ho makamũrumaga
Matthew27:40 makiugaga atĩrĩ
Matthew27:41 Ũguo no taguo athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene o nao magĩkĩmũnyũrũria
Matthew27:42 Nĩaahonokagia andũ angĩ; na ndangĩhota kwĩhonokia we mwene. Nĩwe Mũthamaki wa Isiraeli: ta nĩakiume rĩu mũtĩ-inĩ
Matthew27:43 Nĩehokaga Ngai-ĩ; nĩakĩmũhonokie rĩu
Matthew27:44 Nao atunyani arĩa maambĩtwo mĩtĩ igũrũ hamwe nake o nao makĩmũruma o ũguo.
Matthew27:45 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew27:46 Na ta thaa kenda Jesu akĩgũũthũka na mũgambo mũnene akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew27:47 Nao andũ arĩa maarũngiĩ ho
Matthew27:48 Na kahinda o kau ũmwe wao agĩteng’era akĩoya thibonji
Matthew27:49 Nao andũ arĩa angĩ makiuga
Matthew27:50 Nake Jesu aagũũthũka rĩngĩ na mũgambo mũnene
Matthew27:51 Na atĩrĩ
Matthew27:52 nacio mbĩrĩra ikĩhingũka; na ciimba nyingĩ cia andũ aamũre arĩa maakomete ikĩriũkio;
Matthew27:53 nake Jesu aarĩkia kũriũka
Matthew27:54 Nake mũnene ũrĩa wa athigari igana na andũ arĩa maarĩ nake makĩĩrorera Jesu
Matthew27:55 Na nĩhaarĩ atumia aingĩ meroragĩra marĩ haraya arĩa maarũmĩrĩire Jesu moimĩte Galili makĩmũtungatagĩra;
Matthew27:56 nao amwe nĩ aa Mariamu Mũmagidali
Matthew27:57 Na hwaĩ-inĩ wakinya-rĩ
Matthew27:58 ũcio agĩthiĩ kwĩ Pilato
Matthew27:59 Nake Jusufu agĩkuua mwĩrĩ
Matthew27:60 akĩũiga mbĩrĩra yake njerũ ĩrĩa enjithĩtie rũaro-inĩ rũa ihiga ta muungu: na akĩgaragarĩria mũromo wa mbĩrĩra ĩo ihiga rĩnene
Matthew27:61 Nake Mariamu Mũmagidali aarĩ ho o na Mariamu ũrĩa ũngĩ
Matthew27:62 Na mũthĩ ũyũ ũngĩ
Matthew27:63 makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew27:64 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Matthew27:65 Nake Pilato akĩmera atĩrĩ
Matthew27:66 Magĩgĩthiĩ
Matthew28:1 NAYO thabatũ yathira
Matthew28:2 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Matthew28:3 Na mũhaanĩre wake aahaanaga ta rũheni
Matthew28:4 nao aikaria makĩinaina nĩ ũndũ wa kũmwĩtigĩra
Matthew28:5 Nowe mũraika agĩcokia akĩĩra atumia acio atĩrĩ
Matthew28:6 Ndarĩ haha: nĩ ũndũ nĩaariũka o ta ũrĩa oigire. Ũkani muone handũ harĩa Mwathani arakomete.
Matthew28:7 Na thiĩi narua mũkere arutwo ake atĩ
Matthew28:8 Nao magĩkiuma mbĩrĩra-inĩ narua marĩ na guoya o na gĩkeno kĩnene
Matthew28:9 Na rĩrĩ
Matthew28:10 Hĩndĩ ĩo Jesu akĩmera
Matthew28:11 Na rĩrĩa maathiaga
Matthew28:12 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai acio maarĩkia kũũngana hamwe na athuri
Matthew28:13 makĩmera atĩrĩ
Matthew28:14 Naguo ũhoro ũcio ũngĩya kũiguwo nĩ barũthi
Matthew28:15 Nao magĩkĩoya mbia icio
Matthew28:16 No rĩrĩ
Matthew28:17 Nao maamuona
Matthew28:18 Nake Jesu agĩũka akĩmaarĩria
Matthew28:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew28:20 mũkĩmarutaga kũrũmia maũndũ marĩa mothe ndĩmwathĩte inyuĩ: na atĩrĩrĩ
Mark1:1 KĨAMBĨRĨRIA kĩa Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega wa Jesu Kristo
Mark1:2 O ta ũrĩa ũhoro wandĩkĩtwo marũa-inĩ ma Isaia ũrĩa mũnabii
Mark1:3 Mũgambo wa mũndũ ũkwanĩrĩra werũ-inĩ
Mark1:4 noguo Johana okire
Mark1:5 Na kĩrĩndĩ gĩothe kĩa Judea kĩoimagaraga gĩgathiĩ kũrĩ we
Mark1:6 Nake Johana nĩehumbaga nguo ya guoya wa ngamĩra
Mark1:7 Na nĩaaheanaga ũhoro
Mark1:8 Niĩ ndĩmũbatithĩtie na maĩ; ũcio akamũbatithia na Roho Mũtheru.
Mark1:9 Na nĩgwekirũo atĩrĩ
Mark1:10 Na kahinda o kau oimĩra maĩ-inĩ
Mark1:11 ningĩ mũgambo ũkiuma Igũrũ ũkiuga atĩrĩ
Mark1:12 Ihinda o rĩu Roho akĩmũtwara werũ-inĩ na hinya.
Mark1:13 Akĩnina matukũ mĩrongo ĩna kũu werũ-inĩ akĩgeragio nĩ Shaitani; na aarĩ hamwe na nyamũ cia gĩthaka-inĩ; nao araika nĩmaamũtungatagĩra.
Mark1:14 Na rĩrĩ
Mark1:15 Hingo nĩĩhingĩte
Mark1:16 Na rĩrĩa aathiaga na rũtere rũa iria rĩa Galili nĩonire Simoni
Mark1:17 Nake Jesu akĩmera atĩrĩ
Mark1:18 Nao magĩtiga ngara ciao cia ndigi o ihinda o rĩu
Mark1:19 Ningĩ aathianga hanini
Mark1:20 O rĩmwe akĩmeta: nao magĩtiga ithe wao Zebedi kũu marikabu thĩinĩ hamwe na ndungata iria cia wĩra
Mark1:21 Magĩthiĩ Kaperinaumu
Mark1:22 Nao makĩgega nĩ ũhoro ũrĩa aarutanaga: tondũ aamarutaga ta mũndũ wathanaga
Mark1:23 Na ihinda o rĩu kũu thunagogi yao gũgĩkorũo kwĩ na mũndũ wĩ na ngoma thũku; nake akĩgũũthũka
Mark1:24 Ũhoro witũ nawe ũkĩrĩ ũrĩkũ
Mark1:25 Nake Jesu akĩmĩkaania
Mark1:26 Nayo ngoma ĩo thũku
Mark1:27 Andũ othe magĩkĩgega
Mark1:28 Nayo ngumo yake o hingo ĩo ĩkĩhunja guothe
Mark1:29 Ningĩ o hĩndĩ ĩo moima thunagogi
Mark1:30 Na rĩrĩ
Mark1:31 nake agĩthiĩ akĩmũnyita guoko
Mark1:32 Ningĩ hwaĩ-inĩ
Mark1:33 Na andũ othe a itũũra makĩũngana hau mũromo-inĩ wa nyũmba.
Mark1:34 Nake akĩhonia andũ aingĩ arĩa maarũarĩte mĩrimũ mĩthemba mĩingĩ
Mark1:35 Ningĩ rũcinĩ
Mark1:36 Nake Simoni na arĩa angĩ maarĩ nao makĩmũkinyĩra;
Mark1:37 makĩmũkora
Mark1:38 Nake akĩmera atĩrĩrĩ
Mark1:39 Agĩthiĩ agĩtonyaga thunagogi ciao kũu Galili guothe
Mark1:40 Na kwĩ mũndũ wamũkorire warũarĩte mangũ; agĩũka akĩmũthaithaga
Mark1:41 Nake agĩkĩringwo nĩ tha
Mark1:42 Na kahinda o kau agĩthirũo nĩ mangũ
Mark1:43 Nake akĩmũkaania na hinya
Mark1:44 ningĩ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark1:45 No we agĩĩthiĩra akĩrika kuumbũra mũno na kũmemerekia ũhoro ũcio
Mark2:1 MATUKŨ maathiranga
Mark2:2 Andũ magĩkĩũngana aingĩ
Mark2:3 Na andũ magĩũka mamũreheire mũndũ wĩ na mũrimũ wa gũkua ciĩga
Mark2:4 Na maaremwo nĩ gũkinya hakuhĩ nake nĩ ũndũ wa kĩhatĩkano kĩa andũ
Mark2:5 Nake Jesu ona ũrĩa metĩkĩtie
Mark2:6 Na kwarĩ na aandĩki-marũa amwe maikaire kuo magĩĩciragia na ngoro ciao atĩrĩ
Mark2:7 Nĩ kĩ gĩatũma mũndũ ũyũ oige ũguo? Nĩ kũruma aaruma Ngai. Nũ ũngĩhota kuohanĩra mehia tiga o ũmwe
Mark2:8 Nake Jesu
Mark2:9 Ũndũ ũrĩa ũtarĩ hinya nĩ ũrĩkũ
Mark2:10 No nĩguo mũkĩmenye atĩ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩarĩ na hinya gũkũ thĩ wa kuohanĩra mehia (agĩcoka akĩĩra ũcio wĩ na mũrimũ wa gũkua ciĩga)
Mark2:11 Ndakwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark2:12 Nake agĩũkĩra
Mark2:13 Na rĩngĩ akiumagara agĩceeranga rũtere-inĩ rũa iria; nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ gĩothe gĩgĩthiĩ kũrĩ we
Mark2:14 Na akĩhĩtũka-rĩ
Mark2:15 Ningĩ gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Mark2:16 Nao aandĩki-marũa a thiritũ ya Afarisai mona akĩrĩa irio hamwe na andũ ehia na arĩa metagia mbia cia igoti
Mark2:17 Nake Jesu aaigua ũguo akĩmera atĩrĩ
Mark2:18 Na rĩrĩ
Mark2:19 Nake Jesu akĩmera atĩrĩ
Mark2:20 No kwĩ matukũ magoka rĩrĩa mũhikania agathengio kũrĩ o
Mark2:21 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩrata nguo ngũrũ na ndamĩ ya tama mwerũ: tondũ angĩĩka ũguo
Mark2:22 Na gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩĩkĩra mondo ngũrũ ndibei ya mũhihano: tondũ angĩĩkĩra
Mark2:23 Ningĩ gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Mark2:24 Nao Afarisai makĩmwĩra
Mark2:25 Nake akĩmoria atĩrĩ
Mark2:26 Agĩtonya nyũmba ya Ngai rĩrĩa Abiatharu aarĩ mũthĩnjĩri-Ngai ũrĩa mũnene
Mark2:27 Agĩcoka akĩmera atĩrĩrĩ
Mark2:28 gũgagĩtuĩka atĩ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩ mwathani o na wa gwathaga mũthenya wa thabatũ.
Mark3:1 NINGI agĩtonya rĩngĩ thunagogi; nakuo kwarĩ mũndũ wonjete guoko.
Mark3:2 Nao magĩikara mamũcũthĩrĩirie
Mark3:3 Nake akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio wonjete guoko
Mark3:4 Agĩcoka akĩũria andũ acio atĩrĩ
Mark3:5 Na aarĩkia kũmaroranga arakaire
Mark3:6 Nao Afarisai makiuma nja
Mark3:7 Nake Jesu akĩĩeherera me na arutwo ake
Mark3:8 na Jerusalemu
Mark3:9 Nake akĩĩra arutwo ake atĩ macua ĩikare hakuhĩ nake nĩ ũndũ wa kĩrĩndĩ kĩu kĩonganĩte
Mark3:10 nĩ gũkorũo nĩaahonetie andũ aingĩ; na tondũ ũcio arĩa othe maarĩ na mĩrimũ magĩkĩmũtindĩka nĩ getha mamũhutie.
Mark3:11 Nacio ngoma thũku
Mark3:12 Nake agacikaanagia mũno itikamuumbũre.
Mark3:13 Agĩcoka akĩhaica kĩrĩma-inĩ
Mark3:14 Akĩamũra ikũmi na erĩ
Mark3:15 na magĩe na wathani wa gũtũma ndaimono ciume andũ.
Mark3:16 Nao nĩ aya
Mark3:17 na nĩ Jakubu wa Zebedi
Mark3:18 na nĩ Andarea
Mark3:19 o na Judasi Mũisikariota
Mark3:20 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ gĩkĩũngana rĩngĩ
Mark3:21 Na andũ a kwao maaigua ũguo
Mark3:22 Nao aandĩki-marũa arĩa maaikũrũkire moimĩte Jerusalemu
Mark3:23 Nake akĩmeta akĩmera atĩrĩrĩ na ngerekano
Mark3:24 Na ningĩ ũthamaki o wothe
Mark3:25 O na nyũmba o yothe
Mark3:26 Nake Shaitani angĩkorũo nĩeũkĩrĩire ehũre
Mark3:27 No gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota gũtonya nyũmba ya mũndũ karau na atahe indo ciake
Mark3:28 Ndamwĩra atĩrĩrĩ o ma
Mark3:29 no mũndũ o wothe angĩruma Roho Mũtheru ndarĩ hingo akoherũo; nĩehĩtie rĩĩhia rĩgũtũũra tene na tene.
Mark3:30 Akiuga ũguo nĩ ũndũ nĩmoigire
Mark3:31 Na rĩrĩ
Mark3:32 Nao andũ nĩmaaikaire thĩ mamũrigicĩirie kĩrĩndĩ kĩingĩ; makĩmwĩra
Mark3:33 Nake akĩmacokeria ũhoro
Mark3:34 Akĩroranga andũ acio maaikaire thĩ mamũrigicĩirie
Mark3:35 Amu-rĩ
Mark4:1 NA rĩngĩ akĩgwata kũruta andũ ũhoro hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia iria. Na kĩrĩndĩ gĩkĩũngana harĩ we kĩingĩ mũno
Mark4:2 Akĩmaruta maũndũ maingĩ na ngerekano
Mark4:3 Iguai: rĩu-rĩ
Mark4:4 na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Mark4:5 Na ingĩ ikĩgũa rũnyanjara-inĩ
Mark4:6 na riũa rĩaara
Mark4:7 Na ingĩ ikĩgũa mĩigua-inĩ
Mark4:8 Ingĩ nacio ikĩgũa tĩri-inĩ ũrĩa mũnoru
Mark4:9 Agĩcoka akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark4:10 Ningĩ aakorũo e wiki
Mark4:11 Nake akĩmera atĩrĩrĩ
Mark4:12 nĩguo kũrora marorage
Mark4:13 Agĩcoka akĩmoria atĩrĩ
Mark4:14 Mũhuri ũcio nĩ Ũhoro ahuraga.
Mark4:15 Aya nao nĩ arĩa me mũkĩra-inĩ wa njĩra
Mark4:16 Aya nao
Mark4:17 na matirĩ na mĩri thĩinĩ wao ene
Mark4:18 Na angĩ nĩ arĩa mahurĩtwo mĩigua-inĩ; acio nĩ arĩa maiguĩte Ũhoro
Mark4:19 namo mabata ma gũkũ thĩ
Mark4:20 Nao arĩa angĩ nĩo maahurirũo tĩri-inĩ ũrĩa mũnoru; nĩ ta arĩa maiguaga Ũhoro
Mark4:21 Agĩcoka akĩmera atĩrĩrĩ
Mark4:22 Tondũ gũtirĩ ũndũ ũhithĩtwo tiga o ũkonanio; na gũtirĩ ũndũ warindirũo tiga o ũkoimĩrio.
Mark4:23 Akorũo mũndũ e na matũ ma kũigua
Mark4:24 Agĩcoka akĩmera atĩrĩ
Mark4:25 Tondũ mũndũ ũrĩa wĩ na indo
Mark4:26 Agĩcoka akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark4:27 na akomage agĩũkagĩra ũtukũ na mũthenya
Mark4:28 Thĩ ĩĩciaragia yo nyene; ĩkaamba kũmeria nguha
Mark4:29 Ningĩ irio cioma
Mark4:30 Agĩcoka akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark4:31 Nĩ ta kahĩndĩ ga karatarĩ
Mark4:32 kaahandwo-rĩ
Mark4:33 Na nĩaamaheaga ũhoro na ngerekano nyingĩ ta icio
Mark4:34 na ndaamaaragĩria hatarĩ ngerekano: no arutwo ake mwene
Mark4:35 Na mũthenya o ũcio
Mark4:36 Magĩtigana na kĩrĩndĩ kĩu
Mark4:37 Na gũkĩgĩa kĩhuhũkanio kĩnene kĩa rũhuho
Mark4:38 We nake aarĩ mũthia-inĩ wa thutha wa marikabu
Mark4:39 Nake agĩũkĩra
Mark4:40 Agĩcoka akĩmoria atĩrĩ
Mark4:41 Nao magĩĩtigĩra o mũno
Mark5:1 MAGĨKINYA mũrĩmo ũrĩa wa iria
Mark5:2 Na aarĩkia kuuma marikabu-inĩ
Mark5:3 watũire kũu mbĩrĩra-inĩ: na gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota gũcoka kũmuoha na kĩndũ
Mark5:4 nĩ gũkorũo aanohwo kaingĩ na bĩngũ cia magũrũ na mĩnyororo
Mark5:5 Na hingo ciothe
Mark5:6 Nake ona Jesu e haraya
Mark5:7 akĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene
Mark5:8 Tondũ we nĩaamwĩrire atĩrĩ
Mark5:9 Agĩcoka akĩmũũria
Mark5:10 Akĩmũthaitha mũno ndagaciingate ciume bũrũri ũcio.
Mark5:11 Na rĩrĩ
Mark5:12 Nacio ngoma ikĩmũthaitha
Mark5:13 Nake agĩciĩtĩkĩria. Nacio ngoma iria thũku ikiuma
Mark5:14 Nao arĩithi makĩũra
Mark5:15 Magĩkinya harĩ Jesu
Mark5:16 Arĩa nao meoneire ũndũ ũcio ũgĩĩkwo makĩmera ũrĩa mũndũ ũcio warĩ na ndaimono ekirũo
Mark5:17 Nao makĩrika kũmũthaitha oime bũrũri ũcio wao
Mark5:18 Na agĩthiĩ gũtonya marikabu-rĩ
Mark5:19 Nake ndaigana kũmwĩtĩkĩria; no kũmwĩra aamwĩrire atĩrĩ
Mark5:20 Nake agĩĩthiĩra
Mark5:21 Nake Jesu aarĩkia kũringa rĩngĩ na marikabu
Mark5:22 Na gũgĩũka mũnene ũmwe wa thunagogi
Mark5:23 akĩmũthaitha mũno akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark5:24 Magĩgĩthiĩ nake; na kĩrĩndĩ kĩingĩ gĩkĩmuuma thutha
Mark5:25 Na mũtumia watũire oiraga thakame mĩaka ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ
Mark5:26 akanyamario na maũndũ maingĩ nĩ athondekani aingĩ
Mark5:27 ũcio-rĩ
Mark5:28 Tondũ nĩoigire atĩrĩ
Mark5:29 Na kahinda o kau riurĩro rĩa thakame yake rĩgĩtuma
Mark5:30 Nake Jesu
Mark5:31 Nao arutwo ake makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark5:32 Nake akĩroranga one ũrĩa wĩkĩte ũguo.
Mark5:33 Nake mũtumia agĩũka o agĩĩtigagĩra na akĩinainaga
Mark5:34 Nake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩrĩ
Mark5:35 O hĩndĩ ĩo akĩaragia-rĩ
Mark5:36 Nake Jesu
Mark5:37 Na ndarĩ mũndũ etĩkiririe matwarane nake
Mark5:38 Magĩkinya nyũmba ya mũnene ũcio wa thunagogi; nakuo akĩona ironjo
Mark5:39 Na aarĩkia gũtonya akĩmoria atĩrĩ
Mark5:40 Nao makĩmũthekerera. Nake aarĩkia kũmoimia nja othe
Mark5:41 Akĩnyita mwana guoko
Mark5:42 Nako kairĩtu gagĩũkĩra o rĩmwe
Mark5:43 Nake akĩmakaania mũno matikamenyithie mũndũ ũhoro ũcio: agĩcoka akĩmaatha atĩ kairĩtu kaheo gĩa kũrĩa.
Mark6:1 AKIUMA kũndũ kũu
Mark6:2 Na mũthenya wa thabatũ wakinya akĩgwata kũruta andũ ũhoro thunagogi-inĩ: na andũ aingĩ maamũigua makĩgega
Mark6:3 Ũyũ anga towe mũtharamara
Mark6:4 Nake Jesu akĩmera atĩrĩ
Mark6:5 Agĩkĩremwo nĩ gwĩka wĩko wa hinya kũu
Mark6:6 Na nĩaagegire nĩ ũrĩa maaregete gwĩtĩkia. Agĩcoka gũceeranga mĩciĩ-inĩ akĩrutaga andũ ũhoro.
Mark6:7 Agĩcoka agĩĩta arĩa ikũmi na erĩ
Mark6:8 na akĩmera matigakuue kĩndũ kĩa njĩra
Mark6:9 na mathiĩ mekĩrĩte iratũ: akĩmera ningĩ
Mark6:10 Agĩcoka akĩmera atĩrĩ
Mark6:11 Na kũrĩa andũ matakamũgwata ũgeni
Mark6:12 Nao magĩthiĩ
Mark6:13 Na magĩtũma ndaimono nyingĩ ciume andũ
Mark6:14 Nake mũthamaki Herode akĩigua ũhoro ũcio; tondũ rĩĩtwa rĩa Jesu nĩrĩagĩĩte na ngumo. Akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark6:15 Andũ angĩ makiuga
Mark6:16 No Herode-rĩ
Mark6:17 Tondũ rĩrĩ
Mark6:18 Tondũ Johana nĩeraga Herode atĩrĩ
Mark6:19 Nake Herodia akĩmũtuma ũthũ
Mark6:20 nĩ gũkorũo Herode nĩetigĩrĩte Johana
Mark6:21 Na gũgĩkinya mũthenya mwagĩrĩru
Mark6:22 Nake mwarĩ wa Herodia aatonya kũu marĩ
Mark6:23 Akĩĩhĩta akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark6:24 Nake akiuma
Mark6:25 Kahinda o kau agĩcoka agĩtonya narua kwĩ mũthamaki
Mark6:26 Nake mũthamaki akĩigua kĩeha mũno; no ndangĩĩtĩkĩra kũrega ũhoro wake
Mark6:27 Ihinda o rĩu mũthamaki akĩrekia mũthigari ũmwe wa arĩa maamũrangagĩra
Mark6:28 akĩrehe mũtwe wake na kiuga
Mark6:29 Na arutwo ake maaigua ũhoro ũcio magĩthiĩ makĩoya kĩimba gĩake
Mark6:30 Nao atũmwo magĩcoka kũũngana kwĩ Jesu; na makĩmwĩra maũndũ mothe o marĩa mekĩte
Mark6:31 Nake akĩmera atĩrĩ
Mark6:32 Magĩgĩthiĩ na marikabu kũndũ gũtaarĩ andũ
Mark6:33 Nao andũ makĩmona magĩthiĩ
Mark6:34 Nake akiuma marikabu akĩona kĩrĩndĩ kĩingĩ
Mark6:35 Na gwatua gũtuka
Mark6:36 mere mathiĩ
Mark6:37 Nake agĩcokia ũhoro akĩmera atĩrĩ
Mark6:38 Nake akĩmera atĩrĩ
Mark6:39 Nake agĩathana atĩ andũ othe maikare thĩ ikundi ikundi nyeki-inĩ ĩrĩa yarĩ ho nduru.
Mark6:40 Magĩgĩikara thĩ mĩhari
Mark6:41 Nake akĩoya mĩgate ĩo ĩtano na ciũngũyũ icio cierĩ
Mark6:42 Magĩkĩrĩa othe
Mark6:43 Magĩcoka makĩoya cienyũ
Mark6:44 Na andũ arĩa maarĩire mĩgate ĩo nĩ arũme ngiri ithano.
Mark6:45 Na rĩrĩ
Mark6:46 Ningĩ aarĩkia kũmoigĩra ũhoro
Mark6:47 Na hwaĩ-inĩ ũgĩkinya marikabu yarĩ iria gatagatĩ
Mark6:48 Na ona mekũnoga nĩ gũtwara marikabu
Mark6:49 Nao maamuona agĩthiĩ agĩkinyaga maĩ igũrũ
Mark6:50 amu nĩmaamuonire othe
Mark6:51 Akĩmathengerera agĩtonya marikabu; naruo rũhuho rũgĩtuĩka. Nao makĩgegeara mũno na ngoro ciao:
Mark6:52 amu matiamenyete wega ũhoro wa mĩgate ĩrĩa
Mark6:53 Na maarĩkia kũringa
Mark6:54 Na maarĩkia kuuma marikabu-inĩ
Mark6:55 makĩrika kũhanyũkanga bũrũri ũcio wothe
Mark6:56 Na kũndũ o guothe aatonya
Mark7:1 GŨGĨTUĨKA ningĩ nĩonganĩirũo nĩ Afarisai na aandĩki-marũa amwe
Mark7:2 na makona atĩ arutwo ake amwe maarĩaga irio ciao na moko mathũku
Mark7:3 Amu Afarisai
Mark7:4 na moima kĩng’ang’a-inĩ
Mark7:5 Nao Afarisai acio na aandĩki-marũa makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Mark7:6 Nake akĩmera atĩrĩ
Mark7:7 No kaĩ maturagia ndu ma’hoyage tũhũ-ĩ
Mark7:8 Mũtiganaga na rĩathani rĩa Ngai
Mark7:9 Agĩcoka akĩmera
Mark7:10 Amu Musa nĩoigire atĩrĩ
Mark7:11 No inyuĩ muugaga
Mark7:12 mũkagiria acoke gũteithia ithe kana nyina
Mark7:13 mũgakĩagia Ũhoro wa Ngai bata na kĩrĩra kĩanyu kĩrĩa mũtiganagĩra. Na nĩmwĩkaga maũndũ maingĩ matariĩ ta ũcio.
Mark7:14 Agĩcoka agĩĩta kĩrĩndĩ gĩthengerere harĩ we
Mark7:15 gũtirĩ kĩndũ gĩtarĩ thĩinĩ wa mũndũ

Mark7:17 Ningĩ aarĩkia gũtonya nyũmba

Mark7:19 nĩ gũkorũo gĩtithiaga ngoro yake
Mark7:20 Agĩcoka akiuga
Mark7:21 Nĩ gũkorũo nĩ thĩinĩ

Mark7:32 Makĩmũrehere mũndũ gĩtaigua

Mark7:37 Na nĩmaagegete mũno mũno
Mark8:1 MATUKŨ o macio
Mark8:2 Nĩngũiguĩra kĩrĩndĩ tha
Mark8:3 na ingĩmera mainũke mahũtiĩ
Mark8:4 Nao arutwo ake makĩmũcokeria atĩrĩ
Mark8:5 Nake akĩmoria
Mark8:6 Nake akĩĩra kĩrĩndĩ gĩikare thĩ: agĩcoka akĩoya mĩgate ĩo mũgwanja
Mark8:7 Na ningĩ maarĩ na tũũngũyũ tũtarĩ tũingĩ: nake aarĩkia gũtũrathima
Mark8:8 Andũ magĩkĩrĩa
Mark8:9 Na andũ acio maarĩ ta ngiri inya: akĩmera mathiĩ.
Mark8:10 Na ihinda o rĩu agĩtonya marikabu me na arutwo ake
Mark8:11 Nao Afarisai makiumagara magĩũka
Mark8:12 Nake agĩthũmũka ithũmũka inene na roho wake
Mark8:13 Agĩtigana nao
Mark8:14 Na nĩmaariganĩirũo nĩ gũthiĩ na mĩgate; mũgate no ũmwe maarĩ naguo marikabu-inĩ
Mark8:15 Nake akĩmataara akĩmera atĩrĩrĩ
Mark8:16 Nao magĩtarania o ene makĩĩrana atĩrĩ
Mark8:17 Nake Jesu
Mark8:18 Anga mwĩ na maitho na mũtionaga? na mwĩ na matũ na mũtiiguaga? O na kũririkana githĩ mũtiririkanaga?
Mark8:19 Rĩrĩa ndagayanirie andũ arĩa ngiri ithano mĩgate ĩrĩa ĩtano
Mark8:20 Na rĩrĩa ndĩragayanirie andũ arĩa ngiri inya mĩgate ĩrĩa mũgwanja-rĩ
Mark8:21 Makĩmwĩra
Mark8:22 Magĩkinya Bethisaida. Na andũ makĩmũrehere mũndũ mũtumumu makĩmũthaitha amũhutie.
Mark8:23 Nake akĩnyita ũcio mũtumumu guoko
Mark8:24 Nake agĩtiira maitho
Mark8:25 Agĩkĩmũigĩrĩra moko rĩngĩ maitho; nake akĩrora mũno
Mark8:26 Akĩmwĩra ainũke kwao
Mark8:27 Nake Jesu akiuma kũu
Mark8:28 Makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark8:29 Agĩcoka akĩmoria
Mark8:30 Nake akĩmakaania matikere mũndũ ũhoro wake.

Mark8:32 Naguo ũhoro ũcio akĩwaria atekũhitha. Nake Petero akĩmũtwara ndundu agĩitĩka kũmũkaania.

Mark9:1 AGĨCOKA akĩmera
Mark9:2 Ningĩ mĩthenya yathira ĩtandatũ
Mark9:3 Nguo ciake igĩkenga
Mark9:4 Na makiumĩrĩrũo nĩ Elija me na Musa: nao makĩaranĩria na Jesu.
Mark9:5 Nake Petero agĩcokia ũhoro
Mark9:6 Amu nĩaarigĩtwo nĩ ũrĩa angĩcokia; tondũ nĩmaagwatĩtwo nĩ guoya mũnene.
Mark9:7 Ningĩ gũgĩũka itu rĩkĩmahumbĩra: na thĩinĩ wa itu gũkiuma mũgambo ũkiuga atĩrĩ
Mark9:8 Na kahinda o kanini
Mark9:9 Na rĩrĩa maaikũrũkaga kĩrĩma
Mark9:10 Nao magĩtũũra mamenyereire kiugo kĩu
Mark9:11 Makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Mark9:12 Nake akĩmera atĩrĩ
Mark9:13 Ĩndĩ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark9:14 Nao maakinya harĩ arutwo
Mark9:15 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ gĩothe
Mark9:16 Nake akĩmoria
Mark9:17 Na mũndũ ũmwe wa kĩrĩndĩ-inĩ kĩu akĩmũcokeria atĩrĩ
Mark9:18 nayo o harĩa yamũnyitĩra nĩĩmũtungumanagia ho: nake akaruta mũhũyũ
Mark9:19 Nake akĩmacokeria ũhoro akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark9:20 Makĩmũtwara harĩ we: nake aamuona
Mark9:21 Nake akĩũria ithe atĩrĩ
Mark9:22 Nayo yanamũikia kaingĩ mwaki-inĩ
Mark9:23 Nake Jesu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark9:24 Nake ithe wa mwana akĩgũũthũka o rĩmwe
Mark9:25 Nake Jesu ona atĩ kĩrĩndĩ no kĩroka gĩteng’erete
Mark9:26 Nayo yarĩkia gũkaya na kũmũthiora mũno
Mark9:27 No Jesu-rĩ
Mark9:28 Na aarĩkia gũtonya mũciĩ
Mark9:29 Nake akĩmera atĩrĩ
Mark9:30 Makiuma kũu
Mark9:31 Tondũ nĩ kũruta aarutaga arutwo ake ũhoro
Mark9:32 Nao matiigana gũtaũkĩrũo nĩ kiugo kĩu
Mark9:33 Magĩkinya Kaperinaumu: na aakorũo e nyũmba thĩinĩ akĩmoria atĩrĩ
Mark9:34 Nao magĩkira: tondũ nĩmaakararanagia me njĩra atĩ nĩ ũrĩkũ mũnene kũrĩ arĩa angĩ.
Mark9:35 Nake agĩikara thĩ
Mark9:36 Akĩrehe kaana
Mark9:37 Mũndũ o wothe wa gwĩtĩkĩra kaana kamwe ta gaka nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa
Mark9:38 Johana akĩmwĩra
Mark9:39 Nake Jesu akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark9:40 Amu-rĩ
Mark9:41 Amu mũndũ o wothe ũkamũhe gĩkombe kĩa maĩ mũnyue
Mark9:42 Na mũndũ o wothe ũgatũma twana tũtũ twĩĩ’hokete kamwe gatuo kahĩtie
Mark9:43 Na kũngĩtuĩka atĩ guoko gwaku nĩ gwa gũkũhĩngithia
Mark9:44 [kũrĩa kĩgunyũ kĩao gĩtakuaga
Mark9:45 Na kũngĩtuĩka atĩ kũgũrũ gwaku nĩ gwa gũkũhĩngithia
Mark9:46 [kũrĩa kĩgunyũ kĩao gĩtakuaga
Mark9:47 O na kũngĩtuĩka atĩ riitho rĩaku nĩ rĩa gũkũhĩngithia
Mark9:48 kũrĩa kĩgunyũ kĩao gĩtakuaga

Mark9:50 Cumbĩ nĩ mwega: no cumbĩ ũngĩkorũo nĩũthirĩte mũcamo waguo

Mark10:4 Makiuga
Mark10:5 Nake Jesu akĩmera atĩrĩ
Mark10:6 No kuuma o kĩambĩrĩria rĩrĩa indo ciothe ciombirũo
Mark10:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũndũ mũrũme nĩagatigana na ithe na nyina
Mark10:8 nao erĩ matuĩke mwĩrĩ ũmwe: ũguo-rĩ
Mark10:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Mark10:10 Na me nyũmba thĩinĩ
Mark10:11 Nake akĩmera atĩrĩ
Mark10:12 nake mũtumia we mwene angĩte mũthuriwe
Mark10:13 Ningĩ andũ makĩmũtwarĩra twana
Mark10:14 Nake Jesu ona ũguo akĩrakara
Mark10:15 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩrĩ na ma
Mark10:16 Agĩcoka agĩtũiyũkia moko-inĩ make
Mark10:17 Na hingo oimagaraga erekeire njĩra
Mark10:18 Nake Jesu akĩmũcokeria atĩrĩ

Mark10:20 Nake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark10:21 Nake Jesu
Mark10:22 Nowe agĩtuka gĩthiithi aaigua ũhoro ũcio
Mark10:23 Nake Jesu akĩroranga
Mark10:24 Nao arutwo makĩgega nĩ ciugo icio ciake. Nake Jesu agĩcokia ũhoro rĩngĩ
Mark10:25 Nĩ ũhũthũ ngamĩra ĩhungure kahoro ga cingano
Mark10:26 Nao makĩgega mũno mũno
Mark10:27 Nake Jesu akĩmera atĩrĩ

Mark10:29 Nake Jesu akiuga
Mark10:30 ũtakaheo rĩu matukũ maya tũrĩ
Mark10:31 Ĩndĩ aingĩ makĩrĩ a mbere nĩmagatuĩka a thutha; nao a thutha matuĩke a mbere.
Mark10:32 Na maarĩ njĩra-inĩ makĩambata Jerusalemu
Mark10:33 akiuga
Mark10:34 nao nĩmakamũnyũrũria
Mark10:35 Na rĩrĩ
Mark10:36 Nake akĩmoria
Mark10:37 Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark10:38 Nake Jesu akĩmera
Mark10:39 Makĩmwĩra
Mark10:40 ĩndĩ gũikara guoko-inĩ gwakwa kwa ũrĩo
Mark10:41 Arĩa angĩ ikũmi nao maaigua
Mark10:42 Nake Jesu akĩmeta
Mark10:43 No ti ũguo gatagatĩ-inĩ kanyu; no rĩrĩ
Mark10:44 na ũrĩa ũngĩenda gũtuĩka wa mbere thĩinĩ wanyu
Mark10:45 Tondũ ti-itherũ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ ndokire gũtungatĩrũo
Mark10:46 Nao magĩkinya Jeriko: na rĩrĩa oimaga kũu Jeriko
Mark10:47 Nake aaigua atĩ nĩ Jesu ũrĩa wa Nazarethi
Mark10:48 Na andũ aingĩ makĩmũkaania
Mark10:49 Nake Jesu akĩrũgama

Mark11:3 Na mũngĩũrio nĩ mũndũ
Mark11:4 Nao magĩthiĩ
Mark11:5 Na andũ arĩa maarũngiĩ ho
Mark11:6 Nao makĩmera o ta ũrĩa Jesu oigire: nao makĩmetĩkĩria.
Mark11:7 Magĩtwara njaũ ĩo kwĩ Jesu makĩmĩtandĩka nguo ciao; nake akĩmĩhaica.
Mark11:8 Ningĩ andũ aingĩ makĩara nguo ciao njĩra-inĩ; na angĩ makĩara mathĩgĩ maatuĩte mĩgũnda-inĩ.
Mark11:9 Na andũ arĩa maamũtongoretie
Mark11:10 Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Mark11:11 Agĩgĩtonya Jerusalemu
Mark11:12 Na mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ
Mark11:13 Na ona mũkũyũ wĩ haraya wĩ na mathangũ
Mark11:14 Nake akĩwarĩria akĩwĩra
Mark11:15 Magĩgĩkinya Jerusalemu: nake agĩtonya hekarũ
Mark11:16 na ndangĩĩtĩkĩria mũndũ ahungurĩrie kĩndũ kũu hekarũ.
Mark11:17 Akĩrutana
Mark11:18 Nao athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene o na aandĩki-marũa makĩigua ũhoro ũcio
Mark11:19 Na o mũthenya gwakinya hwaĩ-inĩ nĩ kuuma oimaga itũũra rĩu.
Mark11:20 Ningĩ rũcinĩ makĩhĩtũka
Mark11:21 Nake Petero aaririkana
Mark11:22 Nake Jesu akĩmacokeria
Mark11:23 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Mark11:24 Tondũ ũcio ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark11:25 Na ihinda o rĩothe mũrũngiĩ mũkĩhoya
Mark11:26 [Ĩndĩ mũngĩkorũo mũtiohanagĩra mehia
Mark11:27 Magĩkinya o rĩngĩ Jerusalemu: na rĩrĩa aacangacangaga hekarũ-inĩ agĩkorũo nĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene na aandĩki-marũa o na athuri;
Mark11:28 makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Mark11:29 Nake Jesu akĩmera atĩrĩ
Mark11:30 Nĩ atĩrĩrĩ
Mark11:31 Nao magĩĩciria
Mark11:32 Na tũngiuga atĩ
Mark11:33 Magĩgĩcokeria Jesu
Mark12:1 AGĨITĨKA kũmahe ũhoro na ngerekano. Atĩ mũndũ mũna nĩaahandire mũgũnda wa mĩthabibu
Mark12:2 Na kĩmera gĩakinya akĩrekeria arĩmi acio ngombo ĩkaneo maciaro mamwe na mũgũnda nĩ arĩmi acio.
Mark12:3 Nao makĩmĩnyita
Mark12:4 Agĩcoka akĩmarekeria ngombo ĩngĩ; nayo makĩmĩtihia mũtwe
Mark12:5 Agĩcoka akĩrekia ĩngĩ; nayo makĩmĩũraga: o na akĩrekia ingĩ nyingĩ
Mark12:6 Agĩtigwo na ũngĩ ũmwe
Mark12:7 Nao arĩmi acio makĩĩrana atĩrĩ
Mark12:8 Magĩkĩmũnyita
Mark12:9 Rĩu-rĩ
Mark12:10 Anga ũhoro ũyũ mwandĩke o naguo mũtirĩ mwaũthoma: Ihiga rĩrĩa rĩaregirũo nĩ aaki Nĩrĩo rĩtuĩkĩte o rĩrĩa inene rĩa koine:
Mark12:11 Ũndũ ũcio woimire kwĩ Mwathani
Mark12:12 Nao magĩgĩcaria ũrĩa mangĩmũnyitithia; magĩĩtigĩra kĩrĩndĩ; amu-rĩ
Mark12:13 Ningĩ makĩmũrekeria Afarisai amwe na Aherodia amwe
Mark12:14 Nao moka
Mark12:15 Tũrutage
Mark12:16 Nao makĩmĩrehe. Nake akĩmoria
Mark12:17 Nake Jesu akĩmera atĩrĩ
Mark12:18 Ningĩ agĩkorũo nĩ Asadukai
Mark12:19 Mũrutani ũyũ
Mark12:20 Rĩu-rĩ
Mark12:21 ningĩ ũrĩa wa kerĩ agĩthambia mũtumia ũcio
Mark12:22 nao othe mũgwanja gũtirĩ watigire mbeũ. Thutha wao othe mũtumia ũcio nake agĩkua.
Mark12:23 Rĩu-rĩ
Mark12:24 Nake Jesu akĩmera atĩrĩ
Mark12:25 Amu rĩrĩa andũ makariũka moime kũrĩ arĩa akuũ
Mark12:26 Naguo ũhoro wa arĩa akuũ
Mark12:27 Ngai-rĩ
Mark12:28 Na mwandĩki-marũa ũmwe nĩokire ho
Mark12:29 Nake Jesu agĩcokia atĩrĩrĩ
Mark12:30 nawe enda Mwathani Ngai waku na ngoro yaku yothe
Mark12:31 Narĩo rĩa kerĩ nĩ rĩrĩ
Mark12:32 Nake mwandĩki-marũa ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark12:33 ningĩ kũmwenda na ngoro yothe
Mark12:34 Nake Jesu ona atĩ nĩaacokia ũhoro ta mũndũ mũũgĩ
Mark12:35 Nake Jesu agĩcokia ũhoro rĩrĩa aarutanaga hekarũ-inĩ
Mark12:36 Daudi we mwene nĩoigire atĩrĩ
Mark12:37 Daudi we mwene nĩamũtuĩte Mwathani: angĩkĩhota atĩa gũtuĩka mũrũwe? Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ nĩgĩathikagĩrĩria ũhoro wake gĩkenete.
Mark12:38 Ningĩ akiuga atĩrĩrĩ
Mark12:39 na gũikaragĩra itĩ cia mbere me thunagogi
Mark12:40 na no-o manyamaragia nyũmba cia atumia a ndigwa
Mark12:41 Ningĩ agĩikara thĩ ang’etheire harĩa hekagĩrũo kĩgĩĩna
Mark12:42 Na gũgĩũka mũtumia wa ndigwa mũthĩni
Mark12:43 Nake agĩĩta arutwo ake
Mark12:44 tondũ acio othe nĩmekĩra mbia nĩ ũrĩa maingĩhĩtie; nake nĩekĩra indo ciake iria oima nacio ciothe
Mark13:1 NA rĩrĩa oimaga kũu hekarũ-inĩ
Mark13:2 Nake Jesu akĩmwĩra
Mark13:3 Na hingo aaikaire kĩrĩma-inĩ kĩa Mĩtamaiyũ ang’etheire hekarũ
Mark13:4 Twĩre atĩrĩ
Mark13:5 Nake Jesu akĩrika kũmera atĩrĩrĩ
Mark13:6 Andũ aingĩ magoka magĩĩtuaga rĩĩtwa rĩakwa
Mark13:7 Na rĩrĩa mũkaigua ũhoro wa mbaara na mbugĩrĩrio cia mbaara
Mark13:8 Tondũ o rũrĩrĩ nĩrũgokĩrĩra rũrĩa rũngĩ
Mark13:9 Na inyuĩ-rĩ
Mark13:10 Naguo Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega ndũrĩ hingo ũtakaamba kũhunjĩrio ndũrĩrĩ ciothe.
Mark13:11 Na maamũtwara cira-inĩ na maamũneana
Mark13:12 Na mũndũ nĩakaneana mũrũ wa nyina oragwo
Mark13:13 Na nĩmũgathũũrũo nĩ andũ othe nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa: no ũrĩa ũgũtũũra akirĩrĩirie nginya o ithirĩro
Mark13:14 No rĩrĩ
Mark13:15 nake ũrĩa wĩ nyũmba igũrũ nĩatige gũikũrũka
Mark13:16 nake ũrĩa wĩ mũgũnda ndagacoke na thutha akoe nguo yake.
Mark13:17 Nao arĩa magakorũo me na mahu
Mark13:18 Na mũhoyage atĩ ũndũ ũcio ndũgakinye hingo ya heho.
Mark13:19 Amu matukũ macio magatuĩka ma thĩna ũtarĩ wonwo taguo gwata kĩambĩrĩria rĩrĩa Ngai ombire indo ciothe nginya rĩu
Mark13:20 Na tiga Mwathani aakuhĩhirie matukũ macio
Mark13:21 Na hĩndĩ ĩo mũndũ angĩkamwĩra
Mark13:22 tondũ nĩgũkagĩa na Makristo ma maheni o na anabii a maheni
Mark13:23 No inyuĩ-rĩ
Mark13:24 No rĩrĩ
Mark13:25 nacio njata irike kũgũa ciume igũrũ
Mark13:26 Na hĩndĩ ĩo andũ nĩmakona Mũrũ wa Mũndũ agĩũka na matu e na hinya mũnene o na riri.
Mark13:27 Na hĩndĩ ĩo nĩagatũma araika
Mark13:28 Na rĩu mũkũyũ-rĩ
Mark13:29 noguo na inyuĩ
Mark13:30 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Mark13:31 Igũrũ na thĩ nĩgũgathira: no ũhoro wakwa ndũgathira.
Mark13:32 No ũhoro wa mũthenya ũcio kana wa ihinda rĩu
Mark13:33 Wĩmenyagĩrĩrei
Mark13:34 Nĩ ta mũndũ ũtũire ũgeni-inĩ
Mark13:35 Tondũ ũcio ikaragai mwĩhũgĩte: amu mũtiũĩ rĩrĩa mwene nyũmba arĩũka
Mark13:36 ndakae gũũka na kĩguũ amũkore mũkomete.
Mark13:37 Na ũguo ndamwĩra inyuĩ

Mark14:65 Na amwe magĩitĩka kũmũtuĩra mata

Mark14:67 nake ona Petero agĩota mwaki
Mark14:68 Nake agĩkaana

Mark15:27 Na makĩamba atunyani erĩ mĩtĩ igũrũ hamwe nake; ũmwe mwena wake wa ũrĩo
Mark15:28 [Naguo ũhoro ũkĩhingio ũrĩa wandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ

Mark15:32 Kristo ũyũ

Mark15:35 Na andũ amwe arĩa maarũngiĩ ho
Mark15:36 Na ũmwe agĩteng’era
Mark15:37 Nake Jesu akĩgũũthũka

Mark15:39 Nake mũnene ũrĩa wa athigari igana

Mark15:41 nĩo maamũrũmagĩrĩra rĩrĩa aarĩ Galili
Mark15:42 Na gwakinya hwaĩ-inĩ

Mark16:4 Na maatiira maitho
Mark16:5 Na maatonya mbĩrĩra thĩinĩ

Mark16:8 Nao makiuma mbĩrĩra-inĩ
Mark16:9 [Na rĩrĩ
Mark16:10 Ũcio agĩthiĩ akĩĩra arĩa maatũire na Jesu
Mark16:11 Nao maaigua atĩ e muoyo
Mark16:12 Na thutha wa maũndũ macio
Mark16:13 Nao acio magĩthiĩ makĩĩra arĩa angĩ; o nao magĩkĩrega kũmetĩkia.

Mark16:17 Nacio ciama ici nĩcio irĩtwaranaga na arĩa metĩkĩtie: nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa nĩmarĩtũmaga ndaimono ciume andũ; na nĩmarĩaragia thiomi njerũ;

Luke1:1 KUONA atĩ andũ aingĩ maanagwata kwandĩka marũa ma maũndũ marĩa tũhingĩirio
Luke1:2 o ta ũrĩa twaheirũo ũhoro wamo nĩ aira arĩa mameoneire
Luke1:3 kuona ũguo-rĩ
Luke1:4 nĩ getha ũmenye na ma maũndũ marĩa warutirũo.
Luke1:5 Atĩrĩrĩ
Luke1:6 Nao erĩ nĩmonagwo marĩ athingu nĩ Ngai
Luke1:7 Nao matiarĩ na mwana
Luke1:8 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Luke1:9 kũringana na ũrĩa athĩnjĩri-Ngai maamenyerete gwĩkaga. Na gwacukwo mĩtĩ-rĩ
Luke1:10 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ gĩothe nĩkĩahoyagĩra Ngai nja
Luke1:11 Nake Zakaria akiumĩrĩrũo nĩ mũraika wa Mwathani
Luke1:12 Nake Zakaria aamuona akĩmaka akĩigua guoya.
Luke1:13 Nowe mũraika akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke1:14 Ningĩ gũkena nĩũgakena na ũcanjamũke; o na andũ aingĩ nĩmagakena nĩ ũndũ wa gũciarũo gwake.
Luke1:15 Nĩ gũkorũo nĩagatuwo mũnene nĩ Mwathani
Luke1:16 Nake nĩakagarũra andũ aingĩ a mbarĩ ya Isiraeli macoke kũrĩ Mwathani Ngai wao.
Luke1:17 Na nĩagathiaga mbere ya Mwathani arĩ na roho na hinya wa Elija
Luke1:18 Nake Zakaria akĩũria mũraika ũcio atĩrĩ
Luke1:19 Na mũraika akĩmũcokeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke1:20 Na rĩrĩ
Luke1:21 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ nĩgĩetereire Zakaria
Luke1:22 Nake oima
Luke1:23 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Luke1:24 Na thutha wa matukũ macio Elizabethi mũtumia wake akĩgĩa ihu
Luke1:25 Ũguo nĩguo Mwathani anjĩkĩte matukũ maya anjũthĩrĩirie
Luke1:26 Naguo mweri wake wa ĩtandatũ wakinya-rĩ
Luke1:27 kwĩ mũirĩtu worĩtio nĩ mũndũ wetagwo Jusufu
Luke1:28 Nake mũraika agĩtonya harĩa aarĩ
Luke1:29 Nake agĩtangĩka mũno nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoro ũcio
Luke1:30 Nake mũraika akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke1:31 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Luke1:32 Nake nĩagatuĩka mũnene
Luke1:33 nake nĩagathamakagĩra nyũmba ya Jakubu mĩndĩ na mĩndĩ; naguo ũthamaki wake ndũgathira o na rĩ.
Luke1:34 Nake Mariamu akĩũria mũraika atĩrĩ
Luke1:35 Nake mũraika akĩmũcokeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke1:36 O na atĩrĩrĩ
Luke1:37 Nĩ gũkorũo hatirĩ kiugo o na kĩmwe kiumĩte kwĩ Ngai gĩkaaga kũhinga.
Luke1:38 Nake Mariamu akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke1:39 Nake Mariamu agĩũkĩra matukũ macio
Luke1:40 agĩtonya nyũmba ya Zakaria
Luke1:41 Na gũgĩtuĩka atĩrĩ
Luke1:42 akĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene
Luke1:43 Na niĩ-rĩ
Luke1:44 Nĩ ũndũ atĩrĩ
Luke1:45 Na gũkena-rĩ
Luke1:46 Nake Mariamu akiuga atĩrĩ: Ngoro yakwa nĩĩrakumia Mwathani
Luke1:47 Naguo roho wakwa nĩũkeneire Ngai Mũhonokia wakwa.
Luke1:48 Nĩ ũndũ nĩarorete ũrĩa ngombo yake ya mũirĩtu ĩĩnyihĩtie: Tondũ rĩrĩ
Luke1:49 Nĩ gũkorũo ũrĩa Mũhoti nĩanjĩkĩte maũndũ manene; Narĩo rĩĩtwa rĩake nĩ rĩtheru.
Luke1:50 Nacio tha ciake ikinyagĩra njiaro na njiaro Cia arĩa mamwĩtigagĩra.
Luke1:51 Nĩekĩte maũndũ ma hinya na guoko gwake; Na arĩa metĩĩte
Luke1:52 Nĩarutĩte aathani itĩ-inĩ ciao cia ũthamaki
Luke1:53 Nĩahũnĩtie arĩa ahũtu irio njega; Nacio itonga nĩaciingatĩte itarĩ na kĩndũ.
Luke1:54 Nĩateithĩtie Isiraeli
Luke1:55 O ta ũrĩa erĩire maithe maitũ
Luke1:56 Nake Mariamu agĩikara nake ta mĩeri ĩtatũ
Luke1:57 Na rĩrĩ
Luke1:58 Nao andũ a itũũra rĩao o na arĩa a mũhĩrĩga wao makĩigua atĩ Mwathani nĩakĩrĩrĩirie kũmũiguĩra tha; nao magĩgĩkena hamwe nake.
Luke1:59 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Luke1:60 Nowe nyina akĩmacokeria akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke1:61 Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke1:62 Magĩkĩũria ithe rĩĩtwa rĩrĩa ekwenda gatuwo na ũndũ wa kũmũheneria na moko.
Luke1:63 Nake agĩĩtia kahengere ga kwandĩka
Luke1:64 Nake akĩhingũrũo kanua kahinda o kau
Luke1:65 Nao andũ othe arĩa maatũire hakuhĩ na kwao makĩguoyoha: na mohoro macio mothe makĩmemerekio bũrũri wa Judea
Luke1:66 Nao arĩa othe maamaiguire makĩmaiga ngoro-inĩ ciao
Luke1:67 Nake Zakaria
Luke1:68 Mwathani Ngai wa Isiraeli arokumio; Tondũ nĩokĩte kũrora andũ ake akamakũũra
Luke1:69 Agatũtũũgĩrĩria rũhĩa rũa kũhonokania Ruumĩte nyũmba-inĩ ya Daudi ndungata yake
Luke1:70 O ta ũrĩa aanoiga na tũnua twa anabii ake atheru kuuma o kĩambĩrĩria-rĩ
Luke1:71 Nĩguo tũhonokio kũrĩ thũ ciitũ
Luke1:72 Nĩ getha aiguĩre maithe maitũ tha
Luke1:73 Naguo mwĩhĩtwa ũrĩa ehĩtĩire Iburahimu
Luke1:74 Atĩ nĩagatwĩtĩkĩria
Luke1:75 Na tũtũũre mbere yake matukũ maitũ mothe tũrĩ atheru na tũrĩ athingu.
Luke1:76 O nawe
Luke1:77 Ũtũme andũ ake mamenyithio ũhoro wa kũhonokio Nĩ ũndũ wa kuoherũo mehia mao
Luke1:78 Tondũ wa tha iria cia Ngai witũ. Na nĩ ũndũ wacio ũrĩa wĩtagwo Gũkĩa-kuumĩte-Igũrũ nĩagoka gũtũrora
Luke1:79 Nĩ getha aarĩre andũ arĩa maikarĩte nduma-inĩ na kĩĩgunyĩ-inĩ gĩa gĩkuũ; Na arũngĩrĩrie magũrũ maitũ njĩra-inĩ ya thayũ.
Luke1:80 Nako kaana kau gagĩkũra
Luke2:1 NA matukũ macio gũgĩĩkwo atĩrĩ
Luke2:2 Nakuo nĩkuo kwandĩkwo kũrĩa kwa mbere kwandĩkirũo rĩrĩa Kuirinio aathanaga Suriata.
Luke2:3 Nao andũ othe magĩthiĩ kwĩandĩkithia
Luke2:4 Nake Jusufu akiuma Galili
Luke2:5 nake aathiire kũu nĩ getha makeandĩkithie hamwe na Mariamu mũirĩtu ũrĩa orĩtie
Luke2:6 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Luke2:7 Nake akĩrigithatha kahĩĩ
Luke2:8 Nakuo kũu bũrũri ũcio nĩkwarĩ arĩithi maaikarĩte werũ-inĩ
Luke2:9 Nao makiumĩrĩrũo nĩ mũraika wa Mwathani
Luke2:10 Nake mũraika ũcio akĩmera atĩrĩ
Luke2:11 nĩ gũkorũo ũmũthĩ nĩmũciarĩirũo Mũhonokia o itũũra-inĩ rĩa Daudi
Luke2:12 Na rĩrĩ
Luke2:13 Na o kahinda kau-rĩ
Luke2:14 Ngai arokumagio Igũrũ o Igũrũ
Luke2:15 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Luke2:16 Nao magĩthiĩ mahiũhĩte
Luke2:17 Na maakona
Luke2:18 Nao andũ othe arĩa maaũiguire makĩgega nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ marĩa maarĩirio nĩ arĩithi acio.
Luke2:19 Nowe Mariamu agĩikara na maũndũ macio mothe
Luke2:20 Nao arĩithi acio makĩhũndũka
Luke2:21 Na matukũ manana maahinga ma kũruithia kaana kau
Luke2:22 Na matukũ mao ma gũtherio thutha wa gũciara maahinga
Luke2:23 (O ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩtwo Maandĩko-inĩ ma irĩra cia Mwathani atĩrĩ
Luke2:24 na ningĩ marute ihaki o ta ũrĩa gũtuĩtwo Maandĩko-inĩ ma irĩra cia Mwathani atĩrĩ
Luke2:25 Na rĩrĩ
Luke2:26 Na mũndũ ũcio nĩaaguũrĩirio nĩ Roho Mũtheru atĩ ndagakua atonete Kristo ũrĩa wa Mwathani.
Luke2:27 Nake agĩtonya hekarũ ya Ngai arĩ na Roho Mũtheru: na rĩrĩa aciari a kaana kau
Luke2:28 hĩndĩ ĩo Simeoni agĩkaiyũkia moko-inĩ make
Luke2:29 Rĩu Mwathani nĩ hĩndĩ ũkũnjugĩra ũhoro
Luke2:30 Nĩ gũkorũo maitho makwa nĩmonete ũhonokio waku
Luke2:31 Ũrĩa wathondekire mbere ya irĩndĩ ciothe;
Luke2:32 Nĩguo ũtheri wa kũguũrĩrio andũ a Ndũrĩrĩ
Luke2:33 Nao ithe na nyina nĩmaagegaga nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ marĩa maaririo nĩ ũndũ wako;
Luke2:34 nake Simeoni akĩmarathima
Luke2:35 o na rĩrĩ
Luke2:36 Na nĩkwarĩ mũtumia mũnabii wetagwo Anna
Luke2:37 na nĩaatũire arĩ wa ndigwa mĩaka ĩngĩ mĩrongo ĩnana na ĩna); mũtumia ũcio rĩ
Luke2:38 Nake agĩkinya o ro hĩndĩ ĩo
Luke2:39 Nao maahingia maũndũ marĩa mothe maathanĩtwo irĩra-inĩ cia Mwathani
Luke2:40 Nako kaana kau gagĩkũra
Luke2:41 Nao aciari ake nĩmaathiaga Jerusalemu
Luke2:42 Na rĩrĩa Jesu aahingirie mĩaka ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ
Luke2:43 Nao maanina matukũ ma gĩathĩ
Luke2:44 Nao magĩthiĩ rũgendo rũa mũthenya mũgima
Luke2:45 nao maamwaga-rĩ
Luke2:46 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Luke2:47 na andũ arĩa othe maamũiguaga makĩgega nĩ ũndũ wa ũũgĩ wake
Luke2:48 Nao aciari ake maamuona makĩgega mũno; nake nyina akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke2:49 Nake akĩmoria atĩrĩ
Luke2:50 Nao matiamenyire gĩtũmi gĩa ciugo icio aamerire.
Luke2:51 Nake agĩtherera nao
Luke2:52 Nake Jesu agĩkũra
Luke3:1 ATĨRĨRĨ
Luke3:2 Hĩndĩ ĩo-rĩ
Luke3:3 Nake agĩkinya ng’ongo ciothe iria ciarĩ hakuhĩ na Jorodani
Luke3:4 o ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩtwo ibuku-inĩ rĩa mohoro ma Isaia ũrĩa mũnabii
Luke3:5 Ihũhi ciothe nĩigathikwo
Luke3:6 O na andũ othe nĩmakona kũhonokania kũrĩa kwa Ngai.
Luke3:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩĩra andũ a kĩrĩndĩ arĩa moimĩte kwao magĩthiĩ kũbatithio nĩwe
Luke3:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Luke3:9 Na ningĩ rĩu ithanwa nĩrĩrĩkĩtie kũigwo itina-inĩ cia mĩtĩ: nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Luke3:10 Nao andũ a kĩrĩndĩ makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke3:11 Nake agĩcokia akĩmera atĩrĩ
Luke3:12 Ningĩ gũgĩũka etia mbia cia igoti makabatithio
Luke3:13 Nake akĩmera atĩrĩ
Luke3:14 Nao athigari makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke3:15 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa kĩrĩndĩ gĩatanyaga
Luke3:16 Johana agĩcokia akĩmera othe atĩrĩ
Luke3:17 gĩtarũrũ gĩake arĩ nakĩo guoko
Luke3:18 Ũguo noguo aahunjagia Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega
Luke3:19 no rĩrĩ
Luke3:20 akĩongerera macio mothe na ũndũ ũyũ ũngĩ
Luke3:21 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Luke3:22 nake Roho Mũtheru agĩikũrũka
Luke3:23 Nake Jesu we mwene
Luke3:24 wa Mathati
Luke3:25 wa Matathia
Luke3:26 wa Maathi
