Acts9:1 NO rĩrĩ
Acts9:2 akĩmũhoya marũa athiĩ namo kũrĩ ciama cia thunagogi cia kũrĩa Dameski
Acts9:3 Na arĩ njĩra agĩthiĩ-rĩ
Acts9:4 Nake akĩgũa thĩ
Acts9:5 Nake akĩũria
Acts9:6 no rĩrĩ
Acts9:7 Nao andũ arĩa maatwaranaga nake makĩrũgama makirĩte ki
Acts9:8 Nake Saulu agĩũkĩra
Acts9:9 Agĩikara mĩthenya ĩtatũ atekuona
Acts9:10 Na rĩrĩ
Acts9:11 Nake Mwathani akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts9:12 na nĩonete mũndũ ũgwĩtwo Anania aatonya aamũigĩrĩra moko nĩ getha acoke kuona.
Acts9:13 Nowe Anania akĩmũcokeria atĩrĩ
Acts9:14 na ningĩ gũkũ nĩaheetwo wathani nĩ athĩnjĩri-Ngai arĩa anene nĩguo ohithie arĩa othe makayagĩra rĩĩtwa rĩaku makĩhoya.
Acts9:15 Nowe Mwathani akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts9:16 tondũ nĩngũmuonia ũrĩa maũndũ maingĩhĩte marĩa atarĩ hingo atakanyamarĩka namo nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa.
Acts9:17 Nake Anania agĩthiĩ
Acts9:18 Na kahinda o kau hakĩgũa nyamũ itariĩ ta ngaracũ hũthũ ciumĩte maitho make
Acts9:19 agĩcoka akĩrĩa irio akĩgĩa na hinya. Nake agĩikara matukũ maigana ũna hamwe na arutwo arĩa maarĩ Dameski.
Acts9:20 Na hĩndĩ o ĩo akĩrika kũhunjagia ũhoro wa Jesu thunagogi-inĩ
Acts9:21 Na arĩa othe maamũiguire makĩgega mũno makiuga atĩrĩ
Acts9:22 Nowe Saulu akĩongererũo hinya o makĩria
Acts9:23 Na matukũ maingĩ maathira-rĩ
Acts9:24 ĩndĩ ndundu ĩo yao ĩkĩmenyeka nĩ Saulu. Na magĩikara mamuoheirie ihingo-inĩ
Acts9:25 no arutwo ake magĩthiĩ nake ũtukũ
Acts9:26 Nake aakinya Jerusalemu-rĩ
Acts9:27 Nowe Baranaba akĩmuoya
Acts9:28 Na kũu Jerusalemu Saulu agĩikara nao
Acts9:29 akahunjagia ũhoro na rĩĩtwa rĩa Mwathani ategwĩtigĩra. Na ningĩ akaaragia na Ayahudi arĩa maaciarĩirũo kwa Ayunani agĩkararanagia nao; magagĩcaria ũrĩa mangĩhota kũmũũraga.
Acts9:30 Nao ariũ a Ithe witũ maamenya ũhoro ũcio
Acts9:31 Naguo kanitha ũrĩa warĩ Judea na Galili na Samaria o guothe ũgĩgĩikara na thayũ ũkĩongagĩrĩrũo hinya; nao andũ aguo
Acts9:32 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Acts9:33 Kũu nakuo agĩkora mũndũ wetagwo Ainea
Acts9:34 Nake Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts9:35 Nao andũ othe arĩa maatũire Luda o na Sharoni makĩmuona
Acts9:36 Na rĩrĩ
Acts9:37 Na matukũ-inĩ macio gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Acts9:38 Na tondũ kũu Luda kwarĩ hakuhĩ na Jopa
Acts9:39 Nake Petero agĩgĩũkĩra magĩthiĩ hamwe. Na aakinya kuo
Acts9:40 Nowe Petero akĩmoimia nja othe
Acts9:41 Nake Petero akĩmũtambũrũkĩria guoko
Acts9:42 Naguo ũhoro ũcio ũkĩmenyeka Jopa guothe; na andũ aingĩ magĩgĩĩtĩkia Mwathani.
Acts9:43 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Acts10:1 RĨU-RĨ
Acts10:2 Mũndũ ũcio nĩeamũrĩire Ngai akamwĩtigagĩra marĩ hamwe na andũ ake othe
Acts10:3 Na rĩrĩ
Acts10:4 Nake Korinelio akĩmũcũthĩrĩria amakĩte
Acts10:5 Na rĩu rĩ
Acts10:6 nake nĩ mũgeni ũikaraga kwa mũndũ wĩtagwo Simoni wĩ mũtanduki wa njũa
Acts10:7 Nake mũraika ũcio wamwarĩirie aarĩkia gũthiĩ-rĩ
Acts10:8 na aarĩkia kũmera ũhoro ũcio wothe
Acts10:9 Na mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ-rĩ
Acts10:10 akĩigua ahũtiĩ akenda kũrĩa irio: no rĩrĩa irio ciathondekagwo-rĩ
Acts10:11 agĩcoka akĩona Igũrũ rĩhingũkĩte
Acts10:12 nakĩo gĩgĩkorũo kĩĩ na nyamũ cia mĩthemba yothe thĩinĩ wakĩo
Acts10:13 Hagĩcoka hagĩũka mũgambo ũkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts10:14 Nowe Petero akiuga atĩrĩ
Acts10:15 Naguo mũgambo ũkĩmwarĩria hĩndĩ ya kerĩ
Acts10:16 Naguo ũndũ ũcio ũgĩĩkwo gatatũ
Acts10:17 Na rĩrĩa Petero aakorirũo arigĩtwo mũno nĩ gĩtũmi gĩa kĩoneki kĩu onete
Acts10:18 magĩĩtana
Acts10:19 Na rĩrĩa Petero eciragia ũhoro wa kĩoneki kĩu
Acts10:20 No ũũkĩre
Acts10:21 Nake Petero agĩikũrũka harĩ andũ acio
Acts10:22 Nao makiuga atĩrĩ
Acts10:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩmera matonye nyũmba
Acts10:24 Naguo mũthenya wa kerĩ magĩtonya Kaisarea. Nake Korinelio nĩ kũmeterera aametereire
Acts10:25 Nake Petero aakorũo agĩtonya harĩa aarĩ
Acts10:26 Nowe Petero akĩmũũkĩria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts10:27 Na makĩaranagĩria
Acts10:28 Agĩkĩmera atĩrĩ
Acts10:29 Ũndũ ũcio nĩguo ũratũmire njũke itegũkararania rĩrĩa ndĩretirũo. Nĩkĩo ngũmũũria atĩ nĩ ũhoro ũrĩkũ ũtũmĩte mũnjĩte?
Acts10:30 Nake Korinelio akiuga atĩrĩ
Acts10:31 akĩnjĩra atĩrĩ
Acts10:32 Tondũ wa ũguo rekania Jopa
Acts10:33 Ngĩkĩrekania o rĩmwe kũrĩ wee; na rĩu nĩweka wega woka. Rĩu-rĩ
Acts10:34 Nake Petero agĩitĩka kwaria akiuga atĩrĩ
Acts10:35 no thĩinĩ wa ndũrĩrĩ ciothe mũndũ ũrĩa ũmwĩtigagĩra na ageka maũndũ ma ũthingu nĩetĩkagĩrũo nĩwe.
Acts10:36 Atĩrĩrĩ
Acts10:37 ũhoro ũcio-rĩ
Acts10:38 Naguo nĩ wa Jesu wa Nazarethi
Acts10:39 Na ithuĩ-rĩ
Acts10:40 Nĩwe Ngai aariũkirie mũthenya wa gatatũ
Acts10:41 no ti kuonwo nĩ andũ othe
Acts10:42 Na gũtwatha nĩaatwathire atĩ tũhunjagĩrie andũ
Acts10:43 Nao anabii othe nĩwe maheanagĩra ũira
Acts10:44 Na rĩrĩ
Acts10:45 Nao andũ arĩa etĩkia a thiritũ ya arĩa maruaga
Acts10:46 Nĩ gũkorũo nĩmaamaiguire magĩthioma thiomi na magĩkumagia Ngai. Hĩndĩ ĩo Petero agĩcoka akiuga atĩrĩ
Acts10:47 Kaĩ gũkĩrĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota kũgiria maĩ
Acts10:48 Agĩgĩathana atĩ mabatithio thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Jesu Kristo. Nao magĩcoka makĩmũringĩrĩria atĩ aikarange nao matukũ mamwe.
Acts11:1 NA rĩrĩ
Acts11:2 Na rĩrĩa Petero aambatire agakinya Jerusalemu
Acts11:3 makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts11:4 Nowe Petero agĩitĩka kũmera ũhoro wothe ũthingataine na ũrĩa ũtariĩ
Acts11:5 Ndarĩ itũũra rĩa Jopa ngĩhoyaga Ngai: na ngĩkorũo ningĩtwo nĩ iringi
Acts11:6 Na rĩrĩa ndakĩbarire mũno
Acts11:7 Ningĩ ngĩigua mũgambo ũkĩnjĩra atĩrĩ
Acts11:8 Ngĩkiuga
Acts11:9 Naguo mũgambo uumĩte Igũrũ ũkĩnjokeria hĩndĩ ya kerĩ ũkĩnjĩra atĩrĩ
Acts11:10 Naguo ũndũ ũcio ũgĩĩkwo gatatũ
Acts11:11 Na atĩrĩ
Acts11:12 Nake Roho Mũtheru akĩnjĩra atĩ ’thiĩ nao itegũthangania. Nao ariũ a Ithe witũ aya atandatũ tũgĩthiĩ nao: tũgĩgĩtonya nyũmba ya mũndũ ũcio.
Acts11:13 Nake agĩtwĩra ũrĩa onete mũraika arũgamĩte nyũmba yake thĩinĩ
Acts11:14 nake nĩwe ũrĩaria nawe ndeto iria igatũma ũhonokio we mwene mwĩ na andũ anyu othe.
Acts11:15 Na rĩrĩa ndaambĩrĩirie kwaria Roho Mũtheru akĩmaikũrũkĩrĩra
Acts11:16 Ngĩkĩririkana ciugo cia Mwathani iria oigire atĩrĩ
Acts11:17 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Acts11:18 Nao maaigua maũndũ macio magĩtiga ngarari
Acts11:19 Na rĩrĩ
Acts11:20 No andũ amwe ao
Acts11:21 Nakuo guoko kwa Mwathani kwarĩ hamwe nao; andũ aingĩ magĩgĩĩtĩkia
Acts11:22 Naguo ũhoro wa andũ acio ũgĩkinya kũrĩ andũ a kanitha ũrĩa warĩ Jerusalemu; nao makĩrekia Baranaba athiĩ o kinya Antiokia:
Acts11:23 nake aakinya
Acts11:24 nĩ gũkorũo aarĩ mũndũ mwega
Acts11:25 Nake agĩthiĩ Tariso agacarie Saulu:
Acts11:26 na aamuona
Acts11:27 Na rĩu-rĩ
Acts11:28 Hakĩrũgama ũmwe wao wetagwo Agabo
Acts11:29 Nao arutwo magĩtua atĩ matwarithĩrie ariũ a Ithe witũ arĩa maatũire Judea kĩndũ gĩa kũmateithia
Acts11:30 Na noguo mekire
Acts12:1 NA rĩrĩ
Acts12:2 Akĩũragithia Jakubu mũrũ wa nyina na Johana na rũhiũ.
Acts12:3 Na rĩrĩa onire atĩ ũguo ekire nĩũgũkenia Ayahudi
Acts12:4 Na aarĩkia kũmũnyitithia
Acts12:5 Tondũ wa ũguo Petero agĩikario korokoro-inĩ
Acts12:6 Na rĩrĩa Herode aatigairie hanini amũrute
Acts12:7 Na atĩrĩrĩ
Acts12:8 Nake mũraika akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts12:9 Nake Petero akiuma nja
Acts12:10 Na maarĩkia kũhĩtũka arangĩri arĩa a mbere o na arĩa a kerĩ
Acts12:11 Na rĩrĩa Petero eiguire
Acts12:12 Na rĩrĩ
Acts12:13 Na rĩrĩa aaringaringire kĩhingo gĩa thome
Acts12:14 Nake aamenya atĩ mũgambo ũcio waaria nĩ wa Petero
Acts12:15 Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts12:16 Nowe Petero agĩikara o akĩringaringaga kĩhingo: nao maarĩkia kũhingũra makĩmuona
Acts12:17 Nake aarĩkia kũmakiria na guoko
Acts12:18 Na rĩrĩ
Acts12:19 Na rĩrĩa Herode aarĩkirie kũmũcaria
Acts12:20 Na rĩu-rĩ
Acts12:21 Na gũgĩtuĩka atĩrĩ
Acts12:22 Nao andũ acio makĩanĩrĩra makiuga
Acts12:23 Na kahinda o kau akĩringwo nĩ mũraika wa Mwathani
Acts12:24 No rĩrĩ
Acts12:25 Nao Baranaba na Saulu
Acts13:1 NA rĩrĩ
Acts13:2 Na hĩndĩ ĩmwe maahoyaga Mwathani
Acts13:3 Na thutha ũcio
Acts13:4 Nao
Acts13:5 Na rĩrĩa maakorirũo marĩ Salamisi
Acts13:6 Na rĩrĩa maatuĩkanĩirie gĩthama kĩu gĩothe nginya o Pafo
Acts13:7 na nĩaaikaraga kwa barũthi wetagwo Serigio Paulo
Acts13:8 No rĩrĩ
Acts13:9 Nowe Saulu
Acts13:10 akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts13:11 Na atĩrĩ
Acts13:12 Hĩndĩ ĩo barũthi ona ũguo gwekwo
Acts13:13 Na rĩrĩ
Acts13:14 Nao maarĩkia gũtuĩkanĩria bũrũri ũcio moimĩte Periga
Acts13:15 Na kwarĩkia gũthomwo ũhoro wa watho o na wa anabii
Acts13:16 Nake Paulo agĩkĩrũgama
Acts13:17 Ngai wa rũrĩrĩ rũrũ rũa Isiraeli nĩaathurire maithe maitũ
Acts13:18 Na ihinda ta rĩa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna agĩkirĩrĩria mĩthiĩre ĩrĩa maathiaga nayo werũ-inĩ.
Acts13:19 Na aarĩkia kũnina ndũrĩrĩ mũgwanja bũrũri-inĩ wa Kanaani
Acts13:20 Na thutha wa maũndũ macio akĩmahe Atiirĩrĩri-bũrũri o nginya hĩndĩ ya mũnabii Samueli.
Acts13:21 Na thutha ũcio makĩhoya maheo mũthamaki: nake Ngai akĩmahe Saulu mũrũ wa Kishu
Acts13:22 Na aarĩkia kũmweheria
Acts13:23 Na rĩrĩ
Acts13:24 Ũcio atanoka-rĩ
Acts13:25 Nake Johana
Acts13:26 Atĩrĩrĩ
Acts13:27 Nĩ gũkorũo andũ arĩa matũũraga Jerusalemu
Acts13:28 Ningĩ-rĩ
Acts13:29 Na maarĩkia kũhingia maũndũ mothe marĩa maandĩkĩtwo ũhoro-inĩ wake
Acts13:30 No Ngai nĩaamũriũkirie oime kũrĩ arĩa akuũ:
Acts13:31 agĩcoka akĩonwo matukũ maingĩ nĩ andũ arĩa maambatĩte nake Jerusalemu moimĩte Galili
Acts13:32 Na ithuĩ nĩ kũmũrehere twamũrehere ndeto njega cia ũrĩa kĩĩranĩro kĩrĩa maithe maitũ merĩirũo
Acts13:33 kĩhingĩtio nĩ Ngai
Acts13:34 Naho ha ũhoro wa ũrĩa aamũriũkirie oime kũrĩ arĩa akuũ
Acts13:35 Nĩkĩo ekuuga thĩinĩ wa thaburi ĩngĩ atĩrĩ
Acts13:36 Amu-rĩ
Acts13:37 ĩndĩ ũcio Ngai aariũkirie ndaigana kuona ũhoro ũcio wa kuora.
Acts13:38 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Acts13:39 ningĩ atĩ mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũmwĩhokete nĩegũtuwo mũthingu nĩwe
Acts13:40 Tondũ ũcio-rĩ
Acts13:41 Rorai
Acts13:42 Na rĩrĩa andũ acio moimaga nja
Acts13:43 Na rĩrĩa kũu thunagogi-inĩ gwaitĩkire kũharaganio-rĩ
Acts13:44 Naguo mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ wa thabatũ gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Acts13:45 No rĩrĩa Ayahudi monire kĩrĩndĩ kĩrĩa kĩingĩ kĩonganĩte
Acts13:46 Nao Paulo na Baranaba magĩitĩka kwaria na ũcamba
Acts13:47 Nĩ gũkorũo ũguo nĩguo Mwathani atwathĩte twĩke
Acts13:48 Nao andũ arĩa mataarĩ Ayahudi maaigua ũhoro ũcio
Acts13:49 Naguo Ũhoro wa Mwathani ũgĩkĩhunja bũrũri ũcio wothe.
Acts13:50 No rĩrĩ
Acts13:51 No-o magĩthukia magũrũ mao rũkũngũ rũitĩke
Acts13:52 Nao arutwo magĩkena o gũkena
Acts14:1 NA kũu Ikonio gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Acts14:2 No Ayahudi arĩa maaregete gwĩtĩkia makĩhatĩrĩria andũ arĩa a Ndũrĩrĩ magĩthũkia ngoro ciao
Acts14:3 No rĩrĩ
Acts14:4 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ gĩothe gĩa itũũra gĩgĩatũkana
Acts14:5 Na rĩrĩa andũ arĩa a Ndũrĩrĩ o na Ayahudi
Acts14:6 magĩkĩmenya
Acts14:7 kũu nakuo makĩhunjia Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega.
Acts14:8 Nakuo kũu Lusitera nĩgwaikarĩte mũndũ ũtaahotaga gwĩtwara na magũrũ
Acts14:9 Mũndũ ũcio nĩaaiguire Paulo akĩaria: nake Paulo akĩmũkũũrĩra maitho
Acts14:10 akĩmwĩra na mũgambo mũnene atĩrĩ
Acts14:11 Nao andũ arĩa monganĩte mona ũrĩa Paulo eka
Acts14:12 Magĩgĩtua Baranaba Zeu
Acts14:13 Nake mũthĩnjĩri-ngai ĩo ĩĩtagwo Zeu
Acts14:14 No rĩrĩa atũmwo acio Paulo na Baranaba maaiguire ũhoro ũcio
Acts14:15 Athuri aya
Acts14:16 Nake nĩaatiganĩirie ndũrĩrĩ ciothe ithiage na mĩthiĩre yacio nyene mahinda marĩa ma njiarũa iria ithirĩte.
Acts14:17 Ĩndĩ ndakĩigana gwĩtiga atarĩ na ũira wa kũmuumbũra atĩ arĩ ho
Acts14:18 Na rĩrĩ
Acts14:19 No rĩrĩ
Acts14:20 No rĩrĩa arutwo maarũngiĩ mamũrigicĩirie
Acts14:21 Na maarĩkia kũhunjĩria andũ a itũũra rĩu Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega
Acts14:22 makĩũmagĩrĩria arutwo ngoro
Acts14:23 Na maarĩkia kũmathurĩra andũ a gũtuĩka athuri makanitha-inĩ mothe
Acts14:24 Magĩcoka magĩtuĩkanĩria bũrũri wa Pisidia
Acts14:25 Na maarĩkia kũheana Ũhoro wa Ngai kũu Periga
Acts14:26 makiuma kuo
Acts14:27 Na maakinya kuo
Acts14:28 Magĩgĩikara kuo hamwe na arutwo ihinda irayaraya.
Acts15:1 NA rĩrĩ
Acts15:2 Nao Paulo na Baranaba maarĩkia gũkararania nao makĩũranganagia ũndũ ũcio nao mũno
Acts15:3 Tondũ ũcio-rĩ
Acts15:4 Nao maakinya Jerusalemu
Acts15:5 No rĩrĩ
Acts15:6 Nao atũmwo na athuri magĩkĩũngana macirĩre ũndũ ũcio kĩũmbe.
Acts15:7 Na maarĩkia kũũrania ũhoro mũno
Acts15:8 Nake Ngai
Acts15:9 na ndaigana gũtũkũũrana ithuĩ nao
Acts15:10 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Acts15:11 Ĩndĩ nĩ gwĩtĩkia twĩtĩkĩtie atĩ nĩtũkahonokio nĩ ũndũ wa Wega wa Mwathani Jesu
Acts15:12 Nao andũ arĩa othe monganĩte magĩkira ki
Acts15:13 Na maakira
Acts15:14 Sumeoni nĩaatũhe ũhoro wa ũrĩa Ngai aambĩrĩirie gũceerera andũ arĩa a Ndũrĩrĩ
Acts15:15 Nacio ciugo cia anabii nĩiringaine na ũhoro ũcio
Acts15:16 Maũndũ macio maathira nĩngacoka
Acts15:17 Nĩ getha andũ arĩa magakorũo matigaire makarongorie Mwathani
Acts15:18 Ũguo nĩguo Mwathani oiga
Acts15:19 Tondũ wa ũguo niĩ ngũtua ũũ
Acts15:20 nĩ kaba tũmaandĩkĩre marũa tũmere atĩ mathemage indo cia mĩhianano iria irĩ thahu
Acts15:21 Nĩ ũndũ kuuma o njiarũa cia tene matũũra-inĩ mothe nĩkũrĩ andũ mahunjagia maũndũ marĩa maathanirũo nĩ Musa
Acts15:22 Na hĩndĩ ĩo-rĩ
Acts15:23 Magĩkĩandĩka marũa ma gũtwarũo nĩo
Acts15:24 Atĩrĩrĩ
Acts15:25 Na twakĩrĩkia kũiguanĩra ũhoro
Acts15:26 nao nĩo andũ metwarĩrĩire ũgwati-inĩ wa kũũragwo nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Mwathani witũ Jesu Kristo.
Acts15:27 Tondũ ũcio nĩtwarekia Judasi na Sila
Acts15:28 Tondũ atĩrĩ
Acts15:29 namo nĩ maya

Acts15:31 Nao maarĩkia kũmathoma
Acts15:32 Nao Judasi na Sila

Acts15:34 [Nowe Sila akĩona arĩ wega gũikara kuo.]
Acts15:35 No Paulo na Baranaba magĩikara kũu Antiokia
Acts15:36 Na matukũ maigana ũna maathira
Acts15:37 Nake Baranaba akĩenda atĩ mathiĩ na Johana ũrĩa wetagwo Mariko.

Acts15:40 Nowe Paulo agĩthura Sila
Acts15:41 Agĩgĩtuĩkanĩria mabũrũri ma Suriata na Kilikia agĩĩkagĩra makanitha hinya.
Acts16:1 AGĨCOKA agĩkinya Deribe na Lusitera: na atĩrĩrĩ
Acts16:2 Nake mũndũ ũcio aarĩ na ngumo njega kwĩ ariũ a Ithe witũ arĩa a Lusitera na Ikonio.
Acts16:3 Na nĩwe Paulo endaga mathiĩ nake; agĩkĩmuoya
Acts16:4 Na rĩrĩa maathiangaga matũũra-inĩ kũndũ o kũndũ
Acts16:5 Ũguo noguo makanitha makĩgĩa na hinya ũhoro-inĩ wa gwĩtĩkia
Acts16:6 Nao aa Paulo magĩtuĩkanĩria bũrũri wa Ferugia na Galatia
Acts16:7 na maarĩkia gũkuhĩhĩria Musia
Acts16:8 magĩkĩhĩtũka Musia

Acts16:10 Na aarĩkia kuona kĩoneki kĩu

Acts16:15 Na aarĩkia kũbatithio
Acts16:16 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Acts16:17 Nake agĩtũrũmĩrĩra tũrĩ na Paulo
Acts16:18 Na agĩikara matukũ maingĩ agĩĩkaga ũguo. Nowe Paulo akĩya kũigua kĩeha mũno
Acts16:19 No rĩrĩa ene mũirĩtu ũcio monire atĩ kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro kĩao gĩa kuona uumithio nĩkĩũrĩte-rĩ
Acts16:20 Na maarĩkia kũmatwara harĩ aciri
Acts16:21 makarutanaga mĩtugo ĩrĩa tũtarĩ na rũtha gwĩtĩkĩra o na kana tũmĩĩkage
Acts16:22 Nakĩo kĩrĩndĩ gĩothe gĩkĩmokĩrĩra kĩmeke ũũru; nao aciri makĩmaruta nguo ciao na hinya magĩcitehũrangaga
Acts16:23 Na maarĩkia kũmahũrithia mĩtunda mĩingĩ
Acts16:24 Nake mũnene ũcio
Acts16:25 No rĩrĩ
Acts16:26 na kahinda o kau hakĩgĩa gĩthingithia kĩnene gĩa thĩ
Acts16:27 Nake mũnene wa korokoro aarĩkia kũgurumũka toro
Acts16:28 Ĩndĩ Paulo akĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene
Acts16:29 Nake aarĩkia gwĩtia matawa
Acts16:30 agĩcoka akĩmoimia nja
Acts16:31 Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts16:32 Magĩcoka makĩmũhe Ũhoro wa Mwathani
Acts16:33 Na rĩrĩ
Acts16:34 Thutha ũcio akĩmatwara gwake mũciĩ
Acts16:35 No rĩrĩ
Acts16:36 Nake mũnene wa korokoro akĩĩra Paulo ũhoro ũcio
Acts16:37 Nowe Paulo akĩmera atĩrĩ
Acts16:38 Nao athigari magĩthiĩ kwĩra aciri ciugo icio
Acts16:39 magĩũka makĩmaarĩria na wega; na maarĩkia kũmoimia nja
Acts16:40 Nao magĩkiuma korokoro magĩthiĩ magĩtonya kwa Ludia. Na maarĩkia kuonana na ariũ a Ithe witũ
Acts17:1 NA rĩrĩ
Acts17:2 Nake Paulo agĩtonya harĩ andũ ayo
Acts17:3 akamataũragĩra na akarũmia atĩ kwarĩ bata Kristo anyarirĩke
Acts17:4 Na amwe ao maaigua ũhoro ũcio
Acts17:5 No Ayahudi
Acts17:6 Na maamaaga-rĩ
Acts17:7 nake Jasoni nĩamagwatĩte ũgeni; nao othe nĩmareganĩte na mawatho ma Kaisari na ciĩko ciao
Acts17:8 Magĩgĩtũma andũ a itũũra
Acts17:9 Na rĩrĩa anene acio metirie Jasoni na andũ arĩa angĩ kĩndũ gĩa gwĩkũũra
Acts17:10 Na kahinda o kau ariũ a Ithe witũ makĩhĩkĩrĩria Paulo na Sila makĩmatũma o ũtukũ makinye Beroia. Nao maakinya kuo
Acts17:11 Na rĩrĩ
Acts17:12 Tondũ wa ũguo andũ aingĩ ao magĩĩtĩkia
Acts17:13 No rĩrĩa Ayahudi arĩa a Thesalonike maamenyire atĩ Ũhoro wa Ngai nĩũkũhunjio nĩ Paulo kũu Beroia o nakuo
Acts17:14 Na hĩndĩ o ĩo ariũ a Ithe witũ makĩhĩkĩrĩria Paulo oime kuo athiĩ o nginya hũgũrũrũ-inĩ cia iria: nao Sila na Timotheo magĩtigwo kuo.
Acts17:15 Nao andũ arĩa moimagaririe Paulo makĩmũtwara o nginya Athene. Na maarĩkia kwĩrũo atĩ magaathe Sila na Timotheo moke kũrĩ we narua na matigaikare
Acts17:16 Na rĩu-rĩ
Acts17:17 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo
Acts17:18 Nao arutani a ũũgĩ-rĩ
Acts17:19 Magĩkĩmũnyita makĩmũtwara mbere ya kĩama kĩa Areopago
Acts17:20 Tondũ rĩrĩ
Acts17:21 Na rĩrĩ
Acts17:22 Nake Paulo akĩrũgama gatagatĩ-inĩ ga kĩama kĩa Areopago
Acts17:23 Nĩ gũkorũo rĩrĩa ndathiaga ngĩrorangaga indo cianyu iria nyamũre cia kũhoyũo
Acts17:24 Ngai ũrĩa wombire thĩ o na indo ciothe iria irĩ kuo
Acts17:25 Ningĩ ndatungatagĩrũo nĩ moko ma andũ
Acts17:26 Nake nĩwe watũmire andũ a ndũrĩrĩ ciothe moime thĩinĩ: wa mũndũ ũmwe
Acts17:27 nĩ getha marongoragie Ngai makĩhambatagĩria marore kana hihi maahota kũmuona
Acts17:28 Nĩ gũkorũo nĩ thĩinĩ wake we tũtũũraga muoyo
Acts17:29 Gwagĩtuĩka: atĩ tũrĩ a rũciaro rũa Ngai-rĩ
Acts17:30 Namo mahinda marĩa andũ maatũire matoĩ maũndũ macio Ngai ndaigana kũmoria: ĩndĩ rĩu nĩ gwatha aathaga andũ othe a kũndũ guothe atĩ merire.
Acts17:31 Amu nĩ gũtua atuĩte mũthenya ũrĩa agatuĩra andũ cira na kĩhooto
Acts17:32 Na rĩrĩ
Acts17:33 Ũguo noguo Paulo aatiganire nao.
Acts17:34 No andũ amwe maathiire thiritũ nake
Acts18:1 THUTHA ũcio Paulo agĩkiuma Athene agĩthiĩ Korintho.
Acts18:2 Agĩkora Mũyahudi ũmwe kuo wetagwo Akula warĩ wa bũrũri wa Ponto
Acts18:3 na tondũ wĩra wao warĩ wa mũthemba o ro ũmwe
Acts18:4 Na nĩaaheanaga ihooto
Acts18:5 Na rĩrĩa Sila na Timotheo moimire Makedonia
Acts18:6 Nao maarega gwĩtĩkĩra ũrĩa oigaga na makĩruma Ngai-rĩ
Acts18:7 Agĩkiuma hau
Acts18:8 Nake Kirisipo
Acts18:9 Nake Mwathani akĩĩra Paulo na kĩoneki kĩrĩa onire ũtukũ atĩrĩ
Acts18:10 amu niĩ ndĩ hamwe nawe
Acts18:11 Nake agĩgĩikara kuo mwaka ũmwe na mĩeri ĩtandatũ akĩmarutaga Ũhoro wa Ngai.
Acts18:12 No rĩrĩ
Acts18:13 makiuga atĩrĩ

Acts25:27 Nĩ gũkorũo nguona atĩ nĩ ũndũ ũtaagĩrĩire gũtũma mũndũ muohe itonanĩtie maũndũ marĩa athitakĩtwo namo.
Acts26:1 NAKE Agiripa akĩĩra Paulo
Acts26:2 Nĩngũigua ngenete mũno
Acts26:3 na makĩria nĩ ũndũ ũrĩ mũũgĩ na kũmenya mĩtugo yothe ya Ayahudi na maũndũ mothe marĩa moranagio nĩo: tondũ ũcio ndagũthaitha ũ’thikĩrĩrie ũtegũthethũka.
Acts26:4 Rĩu-rĩ
Acts26:5 nao nĩmanjũĩ kuuma o tene
Acts26:6 Na rĩu ndũgamĩte haha njirithĩrio ũhoro wa ũrĩa ndũire njĩrĩgĩrĩire kĩĩranĩro kĩrĩa Ngai erĩire maithe maitũ.
Acts26:7 Nakĩo nĩkĩo mĩhĩrĩga iitũ ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ ĩĩrĩgagĩrĩra kũhingĩrio
Acts26:8 Nĩ kĩ gĩgũtũma mũtue atĩ gũtingĩĩtĩkĩka atĩ Ngai nĩariũkagia andũ akuũ?
Acts26:9 Niĩ-rĩ
Acts26:10 Na noguo ndekire kũrĩa Jerusalemu: ngĩgĩikia andũ aingĩ aamũre korokoro-inĩ
Acts26:11 Ningĩ nĩ kũgeria ndageragia kũmaringĩrĩria marume Ngai
Acts26:12 Na rĩrĩa ndekaga ũguo-rĩ
Acts26:13 Na rĩrĩ
Acts26:14 Na rĩrĩa twagũire thĩ ithuĩ othe
Acts26:15 Ngĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Acts26:16 No rĩrĩ
Acts26:17 Nĩ kũhonokia ngakũhonokia kũrĩ andũ anyu
Acts26:18 nĩguo ũkamahingũre maitho
Acts26:19 Gwagĩtuĩka ũguo
Acts26:20 no kũheana ndaheanire ũhoro
Acts26:21 Ũndũ ũcio nĩguo watũmire Ayahudi ma’nyitĩre hekarũ thĩinĩ
Acts26:22 No rĩrĩ
Acts26:23 namo nĩmo maya
Acts26:24 Na rĩrĩa earagĩrĩria ũguo
Acts26:25 Nowe Paulo akiuga atĩrĩ
Acts26:26 Amu-rĩ
Acts26:27 Rĩu rĩ
Acts26:28 Nake Agiripa agĩcoka akĩĩra Paulo atĩrĩ

Acts26:30 Nake mũthamaki na barũthi na Berinike
Acts26:31 Na maarĩkia kwehera
Acts26:32 Nake Agiripa akĩĩra Fesito atĩrĩ
Acts27:1 NA rĩrĩ
Acts27:2 Na twarĩkia kũhaica marikabu yarĩ ya Aduramutio
Acts27:3 Na mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ tũkĩroka gũkinya Sidoni
Acts27:4 Na twoima kuo
Acts27:5 Na twarĩkia kũringa iria rĩrĩa rĩĩ gũkuhĩ na mabũrũri ma Kilikia na Pamfulia
Acts27:6 Kũu nĩkuo mũnene ũcio wa athigari igana onire marikabu ya Isikanderia yendaga gũthiĩ Italia
Acts27:7 Na rĩrĩa twathiaga o kahora mũno matukũ maingĩ
Acts27:8 Na twarĩkia gũthiathia na hinya mũno twĩgiritanĩtie na gĩthama kĩu
Acts27:9 Na gwagĩkorũo matukũ maingĩ nĩmathirĩte
Acts27:10 akĩmera atĩrĩ
Acts27:11 Ĩndĩ mũnene ũcio wa athigari igana endaga gũthikĩrĩria mwathi wa marikabu
Acts27:12 Na tondũ bandari ĩo ndĩagĩrĩire gũikarũo kĩmera kĩa heho
Acts27:13 Na rĩrĩa rũhuho ruumĩte gũthini rũagĩitĩkire kũhurutana kahora
Acts27:14 No rĩrĩ
Acts27:15 nayo marikabu yanyitwo nĩ rũhuho rũu ĩkĩremwo nĩ gũthiĩ na mbere kũrĩa yarorete
Acts27:16 Tũgĩcoka tũgĩtwarũo na ihenya tũrorete gathama-inĩ kanini getagwo Kauda
Acts27:17 Nao andũ maarĩkia gũkahaicia
Acts27:18 Na twaya kũhinyĩrĩrio mũno nĩ kĩhuhũkanio
Acts27:19 naguo mũthenya wa ĩtatũ rĩ
Acts27:20 Na rĩrĩa twaninire matukũ maingĩ tũtekwarĩruo nĩ riũa kana njata
Acts27:21 Nao andũ maakorũo maikarĩte hĩndĩ ndaya matekũrĩa irio
Acts27:22 No rĩu ndamũthaitha mũũmĩrĩrie: nĩ ũndũ gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wanyu ũkora
Acts27:23 Tondũ atĩrĩ
Acts27:24 nake aanjĩra atĩrĩ
Acts27:25 Tondũ wa ũguo
Acts27:26 No rĩrĩ
Acts27:27 Na rĩu-rĩ
Acts27:28 magĩgĩikia iria-inĩ kanyamũ ga kũgera ũrĩa maĩ marikĩte
Acts27:29 Na tondũ wa ũrĩa metigagĩra gũikio handũ harĩ rũaro rũa ihiga-rĩ
Acts27:30 Na rĩrĩa atwari a marikabu maacaragia njĩra ya kuuma marikabu-inĩ
Acts27:31 Paulo akĩĩra mũnene ũrĩa wa athigari igana o na athigari nao atĩrĩ
Acts27:32 Hĩndĩ ĩo athigari magĩgĩtinia mĩkanda ya kamacua kau
Acts27:33 Na ruoro rũgĩtema-rĩ
Acts27:34 Tondũ wa ũguo ndamũthaitha mũrĩe irio
Acts27:35 Na aarĩkia kuuga ũguo
Acts27:36 Nao othe magĩkĩũmĩrĩria
Acts27:37 Na ithuĩ othe arĩa twarĩ marikabu-inĩ
Acts27:38 Nao maarĩkia kũrĩa makĩhũna
Acts27:39 Na gwakĩa-rĩ
Acts27:40 Na maarĩkia kuohora marikabu ĩtigane na nanga
Acts27:41 No rĩrĩ
Acts27:42 Nao athigari magĩtaarana atĩ andũ arĩa ohe moragwo
Acts27:43 Nowe mũnene wao akĩmagiria meke ũguo mendete
Acts27:44 nao arĩa angĩ-rĩ
Acts28:1 NA twakĩrĩkia kũhonoka-rĩ

Acts28:3 No rĩrĩ
Acts28:4 Nao acenji mona nyamũ ĩo ĩcunjurĩte guoko-inĩ gwake

Acts28:6 Nao magĩeterera
Acts28:7 Na rĩrĩ
Acts28:8 Na gũgĩtuĩka atĩrĩ
Acts28:9 Na gwekwo ũguo
Acts28:10 Nao andũ akuo magĩtũhe iheo nyingĩ cia gũtuonia ũrĩa matũtĩĩte: na rĩrĩa twaitĩkire gũthiĩ na marikabu
Acts28:11 Na mĩeri ĩtatũ yathira-rĩ
Acts28:12 Na twakinya Surakusa
Acts28:13 Na twoima kũu tũgĩthiĩ tũkĩrigicũkaga tũgĩkinya itũũra rĩĩtagwo Regio. Na thutha wa mũthenya ũmwe gũkĩgĩa rũhuho ruumĩte gũthini
Acts28:14 Nĩkuo twonanire na ariũ a Ithe witũ amwe
Acts28:15 Nao ariũ a Ithe witũ arĩa maarĩ kuo
Acts28:16 Na twakinya Roma
Acts28:17 Na gũgĩkinya atĩrĩ
Acts28:18 Nao maarĩkia gũtuĩria ũhoro wakwa
Acts28:19 No rĩrĩa Ayahudi maakararirie ituĩro rĩu
Acts28:20 Ũndũ ũcio nĩguo watũmire ndĩmũthaithe mũũke tuonane na twaranĩrie. Nĩ gũkorũo kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro kĩrĩa gĩtũire kĩĩrĩgagĩrĩrũo nĩ Aisiraeli nokĩo gĩtũmĩte njikarage ndĩ muohe na mũnyororo ũyũ.
Acts28:21 Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts28:22 No rĩrĩ
Acts28:23 Nao maarĩkia gwathana gĩathĩ nake
Acts28:24 Na amwe ao magĩĩtĩkia mohoro marĩa maaheanirũo

Acts28:26 rĩrĩa oigire atĩrĩ

Acts28:31 akamahunjagĩria ũhoro wa ũthamaki wa Ngai

Romans2:18 o na ũkamenya ũrĩa enda gwĩkagwo

Romans3:4 Hĩ

Romans3:10 o ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩtwo

Romans3:12 Othe nĩmarĩkĩtie kwehũka

Romans3:14 Ningĩ atĩrĩ
Romans3:15 Mahanyũkaga mũno na magũrũ mathiĩ magaite thakame;
Romans3:16 Mwanangĩko o na mwĩthikĩro nĩcio igĩaga njĩra-inĩ iria makinyaga.

Romans3:23 nĩ gũkorũo andũ othe maanahĩtia
Romans3:24 na tondũ wa Wega wake magatuagwo athingu o ũguo

Romans6:10 Nĩ gũkorũo gũkua kũu aakuire
Romans6:11 Na inyuĩ
Romans6:12 Tondũ ũcio-rĩ
Romans6:13 na mũtigakĩneanage ciĩga cianyu harĩ ũhoro ũcio wa wĩhia atĩ ituĩke ta indo ciaguo cia ita cia kwagana nacio: no rĩrĩ
Romans6:14 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Romans6:15 Gwatuĩka ũguo-rĩ
Romans6:16 Kaĩ mũtegũkĩmenya atĩ mũndũ o ũrĩa mũngĩĩheana harĩ we atĩ mũtuĩke ngombo mwathĩkage nĩwe - o ũcio mwathĩkaga nĩwe
Romans6:17 No rĩrĩ
Romans6:18 na mwakĩrĩkia kuohorũo muume ũkombo-inĩ wa wĩhia
Romans6:19 Nĩ kũmũhe ndĩramũhe ũhoro ngĩũgerekanagia na maũndũ ma andũ

Romans6:21 Hĩndĩ ĩo-rĩ
Romans6:22 No rĩu

Romans7:1 ATĨRĨRĨ

Romans7:4 O ũguo na inyuĩ
Romans7:5 Tondũ-rĩ

Romans7:7 Gwakĩhaana ũguo rĩ

Romans7:9 Kwĩ hingo niĩ ndarĩ muoyo itaamenyete watho
Romans7:10 narĩo rĩathani-rĩ
Romans7:11 Amu ũhoro wa wĩhia
Romans7:12 Gũgagĩtuĩka atĩ watho
Romans7:13 Hau nĩ atĩa? Kaĩ akĩrĩ kĩndũ kĩega gĩatũmire ngue? Hĩ
Romans7:14 Nĩ gũkorũo nĩtũũĩ atĩ watho nĩ ũndũ uumanĩte na Roho
Romans7:15 Amu maũndũ marĩa njĩkaga ndikoragwo ngĩmenya: tondũ-rĩ
Romans7:16 Na rĩrĩ
Romans7:17 Tondũ ũcio-rĩ
Romans7:18 Nĩ gũkorũo nĩnjũĩ atĩ thĩinĩ wakwa (ũguo nĩ ta kuuga thĩinĩ wa mwĩrĩ wakwa) gũtitũũraga ũndũ o na ũmwe mwega: amu-rĩ
Romans7:19 Nĩ gũkorũo wega ũrĩa nyendaga gwĩka

Romans8:1 TONDŨ wa maũndũ macio rĩ
Romans8:2 Amu watho wa Roho
Romans8:3 Nĩ gũkorũo ũndũ ũrĩa ũtangĩahotekire nĩ watho ũcio
Romans8:4 nĩ getha ũthingu ũrĩa mwathane watho-inĩ ũhingio thĩinĩ witũ
Romans8:5 Nĩ gũkorũo andũ arĩa marũmagĩrĩra ũhoro wa mwĩrĩ
Romans8:6 Amu kũrũmĩrĩra meciria marĩa moimanaga na mwĩrĩ kũrehanagĩre gĩkuũ: no rĩrĩ
Romans8:7 Nĩ gũkorũo meciria marĩa moimanaga na mwĩrĩ matũũraga marĩ ũthũ na Ngai
Romans8:8 nao andũ arĩa matũire marũmagĩrĩra ũhoro wa mwĩrĩ matingĩhota gũkenia Ngai.
Romans8:9 No inyuĩ-rĩ
Romans8:10 Na rĩrĩ
Romans8:11 Na ningĩ
Romans8:12 Tondũ ũcio
Romans8:13 nĩ ũndũ mũngĩtũũra mũtwaranaga na maũndũ ma mwĩrĩ-rĩ
Romans8:14 Nĩ gũkorũo andũ arĩa othe matongoragio nĩ Roho wa Ngai
Romans8:15 Amu mũtiaheirũo roho wa gũtũma mũcoke kũigua ta mũrĩ ngombo
Romans8:16 Roho Mũtheru we mwene nĩwe mũira
Romans8:17 na rĩrĩ
Romans8:18 Amu-rĩ

Romans8:20 Nĩ ũndũ ciũmbe icio
Romans8:21 tondũ-rĩ
Romans8:22 Amu nĩtũũĩ atĩ ciũmbe icio ciothe o nginya rĩu itũire icayaga o hamwe
Romans8:23 Na tocio ciiki
Romans8:24 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Romans8:25 No twakorũo nĩtwĩrĩgĩrĩire kĩndũ tũtekuona-rĩ
Romans8:26 O ũndũ ũmwe

Romans8:28 Ningĩ nĩtũũĩ atĩ harĩ andũ arĩa menda Ngai
Romans8:29 Nĩ gũkorũo andũ arĩa emenyeire o tene nĩo orereire o tene matuĩke a kũhaananio na ũrĩa Mũrũwe atariĩ
Romans8:30 Nao acio orereire ũguo o tene nĩo ningĩ etire; nao acio etire
Romans8:31 Tũkiuge atĩa tondũ wa maũndũ macio? Akorũo Ngai arĩ mwena witũ-rĩ

Romans8:36 O ta ũrĩa haandĩkĩtwo rĩ

Romans9:1 NĨ ũhoro wa ma ngwaria ndĩ mũndũ wĩ thĩinĩ wa Kristo; ti maheni ndĩraaria; o nayo thamiri yakwa nĩyo mũira wakwa
Romans9:2 atĩ ndũire ndĩ na kĩeha kĩnene
Romans9:3 Amu njiguaga ta ingĩendire niĩ mwene njikio na kĩano nyingatwo harĩ Kristo ithenya rĩa andũ a mũhĩrĩga witũ
Romans9:4 Nĩo Aisiraeli; na nĩo Ngai aatuire ciana ciake
Romans9:5 Ningĩ maithe maitũ arĩa a tene maarĩ a kĩruka kĩu
Romans9:6 No ti atĩ uuge wa Ngai nĩũthahĩte ũgatuĩka wa tũhũ. Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Romans9:7 ningĩ ti atĩ othe nĩ ciana cia Iburahimu no ũndũ wa gũtuĩka atĩ nĩ a mbeũ yake
Romans9:8 Ũguo nĩ ta kuuga atĩrĩ
Romans9:9 Amu-rĩ
Romans9:10 Na to ũguo wiki

Romans12:1 TONDŨ wa maũndũ macio

Romans12:4 Amu-rĩ
Romans12:5 no taguo na ithuĩ
Romans12:6 Ningĩ kuona atĩ tũrĩ ahe iheo iria ciumanĩte na wega wa Ngai
Romans12:7 ningĩ akorũo nĩ wa gũtungatanĩra
Romans12:8 ningĩ akorũo nĩ wa gũtaara andũ mekage wega

Romans12:10 Ha kwendana na ariũ arĩa angĩ a Ithe witũ-rĩ
Romans12:11 Ningĩ ha ũhoro ũbatiĩ kĩyo-rĩ
Romans12:12 Kenagai nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa mwĩ na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro

Romans12:14 Andũ arĩa mamũnyariraga-rĩ
Romans12:15 Arĩa megũkena

Romans12:17 Menyai gũgathukĩra mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ũũru nĩ ũndũ wa ũũru ũrĩa amwĩkĩte; wĩciragiei gwĩka maũndũ o marĩa mangĩonwo maagĩrĩire nĩ andũ othe;

Romans13:2 Tondũ ũcio-rĩ
Romans13:3 Nĩ gũkorũo anene ti a kũmakagia arĩa mekĩte wega tiga arĩa mekĩte ũũru. Wee-rĩ
Romans13:4 amu ũcio nĩ ndungata ya Ngai ya gũtũma wonage maũndũ mega. No rĩrĩ
Romans13:5 Tondũ ũcio-rĩ
Romans13:6 O naguo ũndũ ũcio nĩguo ũtũmaga mũrute igoti; nĩ gũkorũo acio nĩ atungati a Ngai a kũrutaga wĩra wake

Romans14:4 Kaĩ wee ũrĩ ũ ũratuĩra ndungata yene? Mwene yo nowe wa gũtua kana nĩĩrũngiĩ wega kana nĩĩgũĩte. O na no kũrũgama ĩrĩrũgamithagio
Romans14:5 Mũndũ ũmwe-rĩ
Romans14:6 Ũrĩa ũrĩ mũthenya aamũraga

Romans14:8 Nĩ ũndũ tũngĩkorũo tũgũtũũra muoyo

Romans14:10 Wee nawe ũgũtuĩra mũrũ wa thoguo nĩkĩ? Wee o nawe-rĩ
Romans14:11 Tondũ nĩ haandĩke ũũ: O ta ũrĩa ndũũraga-rĩ

Romans14:16 Mũtikanagĩtũme ũndũ ũrĩa inyuĩ muonaga ũrĩ mwega ũcambio:
Romans14:17 nĩ ũndũ ũthamaki wa Ngai ti ũhoro wa kũrĩa na kũnyua

Romans15:22 Kĩu nakĩo nĩkĩo gĩtũmi kĩrĩa kĩanangiria mahinda maingĩ njũke kũu kwanyu.

Romans15:25 No rĩu nĩ Jerusalemu ngũthiĩ

Romans15:27 Ũguo nĩguo maakĩonire wagĩrĩire
Romans15:28 Rĩrĩa ngagĩkorũo ’ninĩte bata ũcio
Romans15:29 Na nĩnjũĩ atĩ rĩrĩa ngakinya kũu kwanyu
Romans15:30 Na rĩrĩ
Romans15:31 nĩ getha ngahonokio kũrĩ andũ arĩa aremu a kũu Judea
Romans15:32 nĩguo ngahota gũũka kũrĩ inyuĩ ngenete
Romans15:33 Ngai mwene thayũ aroikara hamwe na inyuĩ inyuothe. Amen.
Romans16:1 RĨU nĩndamũgathĩrĩria Foibe
Romans16:2 nĩ getha mũmũgwate ũgeni thĩinĩ wa Mwathani
Romans16:3 Geithiai Pirisika na Akula
Romans16:4 na nĩo mendire gũtinio mĩtwe nĩ getha niĩ ndikoragwo; nao-rĩ
Romans16:5 O naguo kanitha ũrĩa ũcemanagia nyũmba-inĩ yao
Romans16:6 Na mũgeithie Mariamu
Romans16:7 Geithiai Anderoniko na Juniasi
Romans16:8 Geithiai Ampiliato
Romans16:9 Na mũgeithie Urubano
Romans16:10 Ningĩ mũgeithie Apele
Romans16:11 Geithiai Herodioni
Romans16:12 Geithiai Turufaina na Turufosa
Romans16:13 Geithiai Rufusi
Romans16:14 Ningĩ mũgeithie Asunkirito
Romans16:15 Geithiai Filologo na Julia
Romans16:16 Geithaniai inyuene
Romans16:17 Na rĩrĩ
Romans16:18 Amu andũ ta acio
Romans16:19 Inyuĩ-rĩ
Romans16:20 Nake Ngai mwene thayũ nĩarĩhehenja Shaitani o narua mũmũrangĩrĩrie makinya-inĩ manyu. Wega wa Mwathani witũ Jesu Kristo ũroikara na inyuĩ. [Amen.]
Romans16:21 Nĩmwageithio nĩ Timotheo
Romans16:22 Niĩ Teritio
Romans16:23 Gaio nake
Romans16:24 [Wega wa Mwathani witũ Jesu Kristo ũrogĩa na inyuĩ inyuothe. Amen.]
Romans16:25 Na rĩrĩ
Romans16:26 naguo rĩu nĩ kuumĩrio uumĩrĩtio
Romans16:27 Nake we Ngai
1Corinthians1:1 NĨ niĩ Paulo
1Corinthians1:2 twatũmĩra kanitha wa Ngai ũrĩa ũrĩ Korintho
1Corinthians1:3 Atĩrĩrĩ: mũrogĩa na Wega
1Corinthians1:4 Niĩ nĩnjokagĩria Ngai wakwa ngatho hingo ciothe nĩ ũndũ wanyu
1Corinthians1:5 tondũ nĩmwatongirio na maũndũ mothe thĩinĩ wake
1Corinthians1:6 kũringana na ũrĩa ũhoro wa Kristo ũrĩa mwoimbũrĩirũo wekĩrirũo hinya thĩinĩ wanyu;
1Corinthians1:7 mũgagĩtuĩka atĩ iheo iria Ngai aheanaga na Wega wake gũtirĩ o na kĩmwe mũtingiarĩtie
1Corinthians1:8 nake nĩarĩmũtũũragia mwĩ na hinya o nginya hĩndĩ ya kũrigĩrĩria
1Corinthians1:9 Ngai nĩ wa kwĩhokeka

1Corinthians1:14 Ngũcokeria Ngai ngatho nĩ ũndũ niĩ ndirĩ mũndũ wanyu o na ũmwe ndabatithirie tiga o Kirisipo na Gayo;
1Corinthians1:15 nĩguo mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ndakanae kuuga atĩ mwabatithirio thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa.

1Corinthians9:1 NIĨ githĩ ndirĩ na rũtha rũa gwĩtuagĩra ũrĩa ngwĩka? O na githĩ ndirĩ mũtũmwo? Githĩ ndionire Jesu Mwathani witũ? Anga ti inyuĩ maciaro ma wĩra ũrĩa ndũire ndutagĩra Mwathani ndĩ thĩinĩ wake?
1Corinthians9:2 O na ingĩtuĩka ndionagwo ta ndĩ mũtũmwo nĩ andũ angĩ-rĩ
1Corinthians9:3 Ũhoro ũrĩa ngũcokeria arĩa mendaga kũ’haara nĩ atĩrĩ:
1Corinthians9:4 Ithuĩ githĩ tũtirĩ na kĩhooto gĩa gwĩtagia gĩa kũrĩa na gĩa kũnyua?
1Corinthians9:5 Githĩ tũtirĩ na kĩhooto mũndũ atwaranage na mũtumia wake mwĩtĩkia
1Corinthians9:6 Kana ithuĩ na Baranaba-rĩ
1Corinthians9:7 Kwĩ hĩndĩ mũthigari athiaga ita agetũũria kuo na indo ciake mwene? Gũkĩrĩ mũndũ ũhandaga mĩthabibu na ndarĩage maciaro mayo? Kana rĩrĩ
1Corinthians9:8 Icio anga no ihooto cia andũ ndakĩaria? Githĩ watho o naguo nduugĩte o ũguo?
1Corinthians9:9 Amu watho-inĩ wa Musa nĩ haandĩke atĩrĩ
1Corinthians9:10 Githĩ ti ithuĩ kĩũmbe ekuuga ũhoro ũcio nĩ ũndũ witũ? Ĩĩ-ni
1Corinthians9:11 Ithuĩ akorũo nĩtwahandire mbeũ kũrĩ inyuĩ cia maũndũ ma kĩĩroho-rĩ
1Corinthians9:12 Akorũo andũ arĩa angĩ me na kĩhooto gĩa kũgayagĩrũo ũguo nĩ inyuĩ
1Corinthians9:13 Kaĩ mũtoĩ atĩ andũ arĩa marutaga wĩra wa hekarũ marĩaga irio cia hekarũ
1Corinthians9:14 Nake Mwathani no taguo aathanire
1Corinthians9:15 No niĩ ndirĩ ndakĩhũthĩra maũndũ macio o na ũmwe
1Corinthians9:16 Nĩ gũkorũo o na ndatuĩka nĩ’hunjagia Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega-rĩ
1Corinthians9:17 Tondũ ingĩrutaga wĩra ũcio na kwĩendera
1Corinthians9:18 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
1Corinthians9:19 Amu-rĩ
1Corinthians9:20 Kũrĩ Ayahudi ngĩgĩikara ta ndĩ Mũyahudi
1Corinthians9:21 na kũrĩ andũ arĩa matatongoragio nĩ watho ũcio ngĩikara na niĩ ta itarĩ wa gũtongoragio nĩguo (na ti kwaga gwathĩkĩra Ngai
1Corinthians9:22 Kũrĩ andũ arĩa manyihĩtie hinya ngoro ngĩgĩikara ta itarĩ na hinya o na niĩ
1Corinthians9:23 Na maũndũ macio mothe ndĩmekaga nĩ ũndũ wa Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega
1Corinthians9:24 Kaĩ mũtekũmenya atĩ andũ arĩa mahĩtahĩtanaga kĩhaaro-inĩ mateng’eraga othe
1Corinthians9:25 Na rĩrĩ
1Corinthians9:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
1Corinthians9:27 no nĩ gũtuuka nduukaga mwĩrĩ wakwa ngĩũhatĩrĩria
1Corinthians10:1 AMU rĩrĩ
1Corinthians10:2 othe magĩgĩtuĩka ta makĩbatithĩtio matuĩke andũ a Musa
1Corinthians10:3 Na magĩtũũra marĩaga irio o imwe othe
1Corinthians10:4 na makanyuaga gĩa-kũnyua o kĩmwe othe

1Corinthians10:14 Endwa akwa

1Corinthians10:16 Atĩrĩ
1Corinthians10:17 Kuona atĩ mũgate ũcio nĩ ũmwe-rĩ
1Corinthians10:18 Ta kĩbarei ũhoro wa arĩa maciarĩtwo marĩ Aisiraeli: arĩa marĩaga nyama cia magongona-rĩ

1Corinthians10:20 Aca-ni; ũrĩa nguuga nĩ atĩrĩ

1Corinthians10:22 Kana twenda kũiguithia Mwathani ũiru? Anga tũrĩ hinya kũmũkĩra?

1Corinthians16:24 O na wendani ũrĩa ndĩmwendaga naguo ũroikaraga na inyuĩ inyuothe mwĩ thĩinĩ wa Kristo Jesu. Amen.
2Corinthians1:1 NĨ niĩ Paulo
2Corinthians1:2 Mũrogĩa na Wega
2Corinthians1:3 We ũrĩa ũrĩ Ngai na Ithe wa Mwathani Jesu Kristo arogathwo
2Corinthians1:4 o we ũtũũmagĩrĩria mathĩna-inĩ maitũ mothe
2Corinthians1:5 Nĩ ũndũ atĩrĩ
2Corinthians1:6 No rĩrĩ
2Corinthians1:7 Naguo wĩrĩgĩrĩro ũrĩa twĩ naguo nĩ ũndũ wanyu ũgagĩkorũo wĩ mũrũmu
2Corinthians1:8 Amu rĩrĩ
2Corinthians1:9 Tũgĩkĩigua thĩinĩ wa ngoro ciitũ ta arĩ ituĩro twatuĩrĩirũo rĩa gũkua
2Corinthians1:10 o we watũhonokirie kũrĩ ũhoro wa gĩkuũ mũnene ũũ

2Corinthians12:20 Tondũ ngwĩtigĩra atĩ hihi

2Corinthians13:1 RĨRĨ nĩrĩo ihinda rĩa gatatũ ngoretwo ngĩũka kwanyu. Ũhoro wothe ũrĩa uugĩtwo no mũhaka ũgekĩrũo kĩhooto na tũnua twa aira erĩ kana atatũ.
2Corinthians13:2 Nĩndoigire ũhoro ũyũ o rĩa mbere
2Corinthians13:3 tondũ mũkwenda kĩhooto gĩa kũmenyithania atĩ nĩ Kristo waragia na kanua gakwa. Nake ndamwĩkaga maũndũ make ta atarĩ na hinya

Ephesians4:5 Nake Mwathani no ũmwe
Ephesians4:6 nake Ngai no ũmwe
Ephesians4:7 No rĩrĩ
Ephesians4:8 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo kuugĩtwo atĩrĩ
Ephesians4:9 (Rĩu-rĩ
Ephesians4:10 Ũcio waikũrũkire nowe ũrĩa waambatire Igũrũ
Ephesians4:11 Agĩkĩheana amwe matuĩke atũmwo
Ephesians4:12 nĩ getha andũ arĩa aamũre matuĩke aagĩrĩru kũna
Ephesians4:13 o nginya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ithuĩ ithuothe tũgakinyĩrĩra ũhoro wa gwĩtĩkia wĩtĩkio o ũmwe
Ephesians4:14 nĩguo tũtige gũikaraga tũrĩ o ciana tũkĩagaagagio tũgĩtwarangagwo nĩ ũrutani o wothe
Ephesians4:15 No rĩrĩ
Ephesians4:16 Naguo ũhoro ũyũ uumaga harĩ we
Ephesians4:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nguuga atĩrĩ
Ephesians4:18 Andũ acio-rĩ
Ephesians4:19 nao nĩ ũndũ wa rũtũrĩko rũa ngoro ciao
Ephesians4:20 No inyuĩ-rĩ
Ephesians4:21 mũngĩkorũo ti-itherũ nĩmũiguĩte mũgambo wake
Ephesians4:22 Ha ũhoro wa mĩthiĩre yanyu ya mbere-rĩ
Ephesians4:23 na mwerũhio maroho o na meciria manyu
Ephesians4:24 na mwĩhumbe mũndũ ũrĩa mwerũ
Ephesians4:25 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Ephesians4:26 Mwarakara-rĩ
Ephesians4:27 o na mũtikanarekererie mũcukani one kamweke.
Ephesians4:28 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũiyaga nĩatige gũcoka kũiya; kaba arutage wĩra akĩĩnogagia
Ephesians4:29 Tigagai kwaria ciugo njũru na tũnua twanyu; kaba mwaragie ciugo iria ciagĩrĩire cia kũguna andũ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mabataire
Ephesians4:30 Na rĩrĩ
Ephesians4:31 Eheriai kũrĩ inyuĩ ũhoro wothe wa gũtũũranĩria ũũru ngoro
Ephesians4:32 Tuganagai o mũndũ na mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ
Ephesians5:1 NĨ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Ephesians5:2 na mũtũũre mwendaine
Ephesians5:3 No rĩrĩ
Ephesians5:4 ningĩ maũndũ ma thoni
Ephesians5:5 Tondũ nĩmũũĩ wega ũndũ ũyũ
Ephesians5:6 Menyai mũhenio nĩ mũndũ na ciugo cia tũhũ: nĩ gũkorũo maũndũ macio nĩmo matũmaga marakara ma Ngai makinyĩrĩre rũciaro rũrĩa rũa andũ aremu.
Ephesians5:7 Tondũ ũcio-rĩ
Ephesians5:8 nĩ ũndũ rĩa mbere mwarĩ o nduma
Ephesians5:9 nĩ ũndũ maciaro ma ũtheri nĩmonekaga na ũhoro wothe wa gwĩkana wega
Ephesians5:10 na mũroragie maũndũ mũmenye marĩa makenagia Mwathani.
Ephesians5:11 Ningĩ mũtikanagĩe ngwatanĩro na arĩa marutaga mawĩra ma nduma-inĩ
Ephesians5:12 Tondũ-rĩ
Ephesians5:13 Ĩndĩ maũndũ mothe
Ephesians5:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ekuuga atĩrĩ; Arahũka wee ũkomete
Ephesians5:15 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Ephesians5:16 na mũtigate ihinda rĩrĩa rĩagĩrĩru rĩa gwĩkaga wega
Ephesians5:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Ephesians5:18 Ningĩ mũtikanarĩwo nĩ ndibei
Ephesians5:19 nĩ kaba mũiyũrũo nĩ Roho
Ephesians5:20 Ningĩ mũcokagĩrie Ngai
Ephesians5:21 mũkĩĩnyihanagĩria o mũndũ na mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa mwĩtigĩrĩte Kristo.
Ephesians5:22 Inyuĩ atumia
Ephesians5:23 Tondũ mũndũ mũrũme nĩwe mũtwe wa mũtumia
Ephesians5:24 Na rĩrĩ
Ephesians5:25 Inyuĩ athuri-rĩ
Ephesians5:26 nĩ getha awamũre aũtherie
Ephesians5:27 nĩ getha ahote kwĩrehere kanitha wĩ riri
Ephesians5:28 O ũguo noguo athuri nao maagĩrĩirũo nĩ kwendaga atumia ao ene
Ephesians5:29 nĩ ũndũ gũtirĩ kwonwo mũndũ ũthũire mwĩrĩ wake mwene; no nĩ kũũhe aũheaga irio na akaũikaragia wega
Ephesians5:30 nĩ ũndũ tũrĩ ciĩga cia mwĩrĩ wake.
Ephesians5:31 Tondũ ũcio-rĩ
Ephesians5:32 Ũcio nĩ ũhoro wa hitho
Ephesians5:33 No rĩrĩ
Ephesians6:1 INYUĨ ciana-rĩ
Ephesians6:2 Tĩa thoguo na nyũkwa
Ephesians6:3 nĩ getha maũndũ maku magaacĩre
Ephesians6:4 Na inyuĩ maithe-rĩ
Ephesians6:5 Inyuĩ mũrĩ ngombo-rĩ
Ephesians6:6 Mũtikanarute wĩra o hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mekũmũrora
Ephesians6:7 ningĩ mũrutage wĩra wanyu wa ngombo mũtarĩ na kĩnyiria
Ephesians6:8 mũkĩmenyaga atĩ o ũndũ ũrĩa wothe mwega o mũndũ ekaga
Ephesians6:9 O na inyuĩ aathani-rĩ
Ephesians6:10 Ũhoro wa kũrigĩrĩria nĩ atĩrĩ
Ephesians6:11 Wĩohei indo ciothe cia Ngai cia ita
Ephesians6:12 Nĩ ũndũ kũgiana gwitũ ti gwa kũgiana na arĩa me na mwĩrĩ na thakame
Ephesians6:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Ephesians6:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio kĩĩhandei
Ephesians6:15 o na mwĩkĩrĩte magũrũ manyu ũhoro wa kwĩhaarĩrĩria Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega wa thayũ;
Ephesians6:16 ningĩ gũkĩra icio ciothe-rĩ
Ephesians6:17 Na ningĩ
Ephesians6:18 O na kũhoya mũhoyage mũno mũgĩthaithanagĩrĩra hingo ciothe
Ephesians6:19 O na niĩ mwene-rĩ
Ephesians6:20 naguo nĩguo ndĩ mwarĩrĩria waguo
Ephesians6:21 Na rĩrĩ
Ephesians6:22 Na ndĩmũtũmĩte kũrĩ inyuĩ nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoro ũyũ kĩũmbe
Ephesians6:23 Thayũ ũrogĩa kũrĩ ariũ a Ithe witũ
Ephesians6:24 Wega wa Ngai ũrogĩa na arĩa othe mendaga Mwathani witũ Jesu Kristo na wendani ũrĩa ũtathiraga.
Philippians1:1 NĨ ithuĩ Paulo na Timotheo
Philippians1:2 Mũrogĩa na Wega o na thayũ
Philippians1:3 Atĩrĩrĩi
Philippians1:4 na rĩrĩa rĩothe ndĩmũthaithanagĩrĩra
Philippians1:5 nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa tũgwatanĩire na inyuĩ kũhunjanĩria Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega
Philippians1:6 Na ngakĩmenya ũndũ ũyũ na ma
Philippians1:7 Na rĩrĩ
Philippians1:8 Nĩ ũndũ Ngai nĩwe mũira wakwa wa ũrĩa ndĩmwĩriragĩria inyuothe ndĩ na tha o iria ii na Kristo Jesu.
Philippians1:9 Na ũrĩa ’hoyaga nĩ atĩrĩ
Philippians1:10 nĩ getha mũhotage gũkũũrana maũndũ mũgĩthuraga marĩa maagĩrĩire kũrĩ marĩa mangĩ
Philippians1:11 na ningĩ atĩ mũtũũre mũiyũrĩtwo nĩ maciaro ma ũthingu
Philippians1:12 Na rĩrĩ
Philippians1:13 gũgakĩmenyeka nĩ athigari othe a mbũtũ ya mũthamaki
Philippians1:14 nao ariũ a Ithe witũ arĩa aingĩ nĩmehokete Mwathani o makĩria tondũ wa ũhoro ũcio wakwa wa kuohwo
Philippians1:15 Ti-itherũ nĩkũrĩ andũ amwe mahunjagia ũhoro wa Kristo nĩ ũndũ wa ũiru na ngarari; andũ angĩ maũhunjagia me na ngoro njega.
Philippians1:16 Acio-rĩ

Philippians1:20 o ta ũrĩa ndĩĩriragĩria ngĩambambaga
Philippians1:21 Nĩ ũndũ harĩ niĩ-rĩ
Philippians1:22 No rĩrĩ
Philippians1:23 Njikaraga ’hinyĩrĩirio nĩ maũndũ maya merĩ
Philippians1:24 ĩndĩ nĩ ũndũ wanyu-rĩ

Philippians2:4 na mũtikamenyagĩrĩre o mũndũ maũndũ make moiki
Philippians2:5 Gĩagai na ngoro o ĩrĩa yarĩ na Kristo Jesu.
Philippians2:6 We-rĩ

Philippians2:15 nĩ getha mũtuĩke andũ matangĩcukĩka na maagĩte ũũru
Philippians2:16 mũkĩonanagia ũhoro wa muoyo. Ikagai ũguo nĩ getha ngagĩa na ũndũ wa kwĩrahĩra Mũthenya ũrĩa wa Kristo

Philippians4:1 HAKĨRĨ ũguo
Philippians4:2 Ngũgĩthaitha Euodia
Philippians4:3 O nawe mũrata wakwa wa ma
Philippians4:4 Ikaragai mũkenete nĩ ũndũ wa Mwathani hĩndĩ ciothe: o na nguuga o rĩngĩ atĩ mũikarage mũkenete.
Philippians4:5 Tũmagai gũkiranĩrĩria kwanyu kũmenyũo nĩ andũ othe. Mwathani akiriĩ gũũka.
Philippians4:6 Tigagai gwĩtanga nĩ ũndũ o na ũrĩkũ: no rĩrĩ
Philippians4:7 Naguo thayũ wa Ngai
Philippians4:8 Na ngũrĩkĩrĩria atĩrĩ
Philippians4:9 Namo maũndũ marĩa mwerutire harĩ niĩ mũkĩmetĩkĩra
Philippians4:10 Na rĩrĩ
Philippians4:11 No ti ũhoro wa wagi ngwaria: nĩ gũkorũo nĩndĩĩrutĩte kũiganwo nĩ maũndũ o marĩa ndĩ namo.
Philippians4:12 Ni’menyerete gũikara ndĩ mũkĩaru
Philippians4:13 Nĩ’hotaga gwĩka maũndũ mothe na ũndũ wake we ũrĩa ũ’heaga hinya.
Philippians4:14 Ĩndĩ nĩmwekire wega nĩ kũgwatanĩra na niĩ thĩna wakwa.
Philippians4:15 Na inyuĩ Afilipi nĩmũũĩ inyuene atĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega waambĩrĩirie kũhunjanĩrio
Philippians4:16 tondũ o na ndĩ Thesalonike nĩmwandũmĩire indo cia kũndeithia
Philippians4:17 No rĩrĩ
Philippians4:18 Na rĩrĩ
Philippians4:19 Nake Ngai wakwa nĩarĩkĩragĩrĩria kũmũhe kĩrĩa o gĩothe mũngĩkorũo mwagĩte
Philippians4:20 Nake Ngai
Philippians4:21 Geithiai mũndũ ũrĩa wothe mwamũre ũikaraga thĩinĩ wa Kristo Jesu. Ariũ a Ithe witũ arĩa twĩ hamwe nao nĩmaamũgeithia.
Philippians4:22 Nao andũ arĩa aamũre othe nĩmaamũgeithia
Philippians4:23 Wega wa Mwathani Jesu Kristo ũrogĩa na maroho manyu.
Colossians1:1 NĨ niĩ Paulo
Colossians1:2 tũkũmũtũmĩra marũa maya inyuĩ andũ arĩa aamũre
Colossians1:3 Nĩtũcokagĩria Ngai ngatho
Colossians1:4 nĩ ũndũ nĩtũiguĩte ũhoro wa ũrĩa mwĩtĩkĩtie Kristo Jesu
Colossians1:5 nĩ ũndũ wa wĩrĩgĩrĩro ũrĩa mũigĩirũo Igũrũ. Naguo nĩguo mwaiguire ũhoro waguo o mbere
Colossians1:6 ũcio ũkinyĩte kũrĩ inyuĩ; naguo nĩ gũciara ũciaraga maciaro thĩ yothe
Colossians1:7 Naguo nĩguo mwarutirũo nĩ mwendwa witũ Epafara
Colossians1:8 nake nĩwe watũmenyithirie wega ũrĩa mũtũire mwendaine mwĩ thĩinĩ wa Roho.
Colossians1:9 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo o na ithuĩ-rĩ
Colossians1:10 nĩguo mũthiage na mĩthiĩre ĩrĩa yagĩrĩire andũ a Mwathani
Colossians1:11 Ningĩ atĩ mũhotithagio na ũhoti wothe
Colossians1:12 na ningĩ mũcokagĩrie Ithe witũ ngatho
Colossians1:13 Nake nĩwe watũhonokirie agĩtũruta watho-inĩ wa nduma
Colossians1:14 Ũcio nĩwe watũkũũrire
Colossians1:15 Nake nĩwe mũhianĩre wa ũrĩa Ngai ahaana
Colossians1:16 Tondũ rĩrĩ
Colossians1:17 Nake we nĩwe ũtũire o ho mbere indo ciothe itaanagĩa
Colossians1:18 Ningĩ nĩwe Mũtwe wa mwĩrĩ
Colossians1:19 Nĩ gũkorũo ũiyũru wothe wa Ngai nĩwetĩkĩrire gũtũũra thĩinĩ wake;
Colossians1:20 nĩguo atĩ na ũndũ wake maũndũ mothe macoke kũiguithanio na Ngai
Colossians1:21 Na inyuĩ-rĩ
Colossians1:22 nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa aakuire arĩ na mwĩrĩ wa gũkũ thĩ
Colossians1:23 mũngĩgĩkorũo mũrũmĩtie ũhoro wa gwĩtĩkia
Colossians1:24 Na rĩu nĩ gũkena ngenaga nĩ ũndũ wa mĩnyamaro ĩrĩa ’nyamaragio nayo nĩ ũndũ wanyu
Colossians1:25 naguo nĩguo ndatuirũo ndungata yaguo
Colossians1:26 Naguo Ũhoro ũcio no ũrĩa watũire; hitho-inĩ kuuma agu na agu
Colossians1:27 o arĩa Ngai onire arĩ wega amamenyithie ũrĩa ũhoro ũcio wa hitho ũingĩhĩirio riri kũrĩ andũ a Ndũrĩrĩ - naguo nĩ atĩrĩ
Colossians1:28 Ũcio nĩwe tũhunjagia ũhoro wake
Colossians1:29 O na niĩ-rĩ
Colossians2:1 TONDŨ rĩrĩ
Colossians2:2 Na ndĩĩgiaga ũguo nĩ getha ngoro ciao ciũmagĩrĩrio
Colossians2:3 Nake nĩwe mĩthithũ yothe ya ũũgĩ na ya ũmenyi ĩhithĩtwo thĩinĩ wake.
Colossians2:4 Ngũkiuga ũguo nĩ getha mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ndakanamũhenererie na ciugo cia wara.
Colossians2:5 Nĩ gũkorũo o na itarĩ hamwe na inyuĩ na mwĩrĩ
Colossians2:6 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo
Colossians2:7 mwĩhandĩte wega thĩinĩ wake
Colossians2:8 Wĩmenyagĩrĩrei mũtikanatahwo nĩ mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ na maũũgĩ make na mathara ma tũhũ
Colossians2:9 Nĩ gũkorũo ũiyũru wothe wa Ũngai nĩũtũire thĩinĩ wake arĩ na mwĩrĩ
Colossians2:10 na inyuĩ mũkaiyũrũo nĩ muoyo ũrĩa mwagĩrĩru nĩ ũrĩa mũtũire thĩinĩ wake
Colossians2:11 Na mũkĩrĩ thĩinĩ wake
Colossians2:12 Nĩ gũthikwo mwathikirũo hamwe nake hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mwabatithirio; na nĩ thĩinĩ wa ũhoro o ũcio mwariũkanĩirio nake
Colossians2:13 Na inyuĩ mwatũire mũrĩ akuũ nĩ ũndũ wa mehia manyu
Colossians2:14 na tondũ wa ũrĩa aahuurire ũhoro wa gũtũcuka ũrĩa waandĩkĩtwo mawatho-inĩ
Colossians2:15 na aarĩkia gwĩthengeria monene macio o na mahinya
Colossians2:16 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Colossians2:17 nĩ gũkorũo maũndũ macio no kĩĩruru kĩa maũndũ marĩa magoka; ĩndĩ ma yamo nĩ ya Kristo.
Colossians2:18 Mũtikanareke mũndũ amũtunye kĩheo kĩrĩa mũtanyĩte kuona nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa endaga gwĩtua o mũnyinyi
Colossians2:19 Mũndũ ta ũcio ndatũire egwatanĩtie na Mũtwe
Colossians2:20 Mũngĩkorũo nĩmwakuire hamwe na Kristo
Colossians2:21 Nacio nĩ ta ici: Ndũkananyite na guoko
Colossians2:22 Na rĩrĩ
Colossians2:23 Nacio-rĩ
Colossians3:1 HAKĨRĨ ũguo-rĩ
Colossians3:2 Rũmbũyagiai maũndũ marĩa marĩ Igũrũ
Colossians3:3 Nĩ ũndũ nĩmwakuire
Colossians3:4 Na rĩrĩa Kristo
Colossians3:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Colossians3:6 Maũndũ macio-rĩ
Colossians3:7 namo nĩmo mwathiaga namo rĩa mbere
Colossians3:8 No rĩu kĩeheriei maya mothe o namo: marakara
Colossians3:9 Tigagai kũhenania na kanua o mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ
Colossians3:10 na mũkehumba mũndũ ũngĩ mwerũ
Colossians3:11 Na ũhoro-inĩ ũcio-rĩ
Colossians3:12 Tondũ ũcio-rĩ
Colossians3:13 mũgĩkiranagĩra na mũkĩohanagĩra o mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ
Colossians3:14 Ningĩ gũkĩra maũndũ macio mothe-rĩ
Colossians3:15 Rekei thayũ wa Kristo ũteithũranage maũndũ mothe ngoro-inĩ cianyu; na nĩguo mwetĩirũo mwathagwo nĩguo
Colossians3:16 Rekei Ũhoro wa Kristo ũikarage ũingĩhĩte mũno thĩinĩ wanyu
Colossians3:17 Na ningĩ atĩrĩ
Colossians3:18 Inyuĩ atumia-rĩ
Colossians3:19 Na inyuĩ athuri-rĩ
Colossians3:20 O na inyuĩ ciana
Colossians3:21 Na inyuĩ maithe-rĩ
Colossians3:22 Na inyuĩ ngombo-rĩ
Colossians3:23 Na rĩrĩ
Colossians3:24 mũkĩmenyaga atĩ nĩ Mwathani ũkamũhe kĩrĩa mwĩrĩirũo
Colossians3:25 Tondũ-rĩ
Colossians4:1 Inyuĩ aathani-rĩ
Colossians4:2 Rũmanagĩriai kũhoya na kĩyo
Colossians4:3 na ningĩ mũtũhoyagĩre o na ithuĩ
Colossians4:4 nĩguo ndĩũtaũranagĩre na mĩario o ĩrĩa njagĩrĩirũo nĩ kwaria nayo.
Colossians4:5 Thiagai na mĩthiĩre ya ũũgĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũkoragwo mwĩ na andũ arĩa matarĩ a thiritũ iitũ
Colossians4:6 Na mũkĩaria-rĩ
Colossians4:7 Mohoro makwa mothe nĩmũkamenyithio nĩ Tukiko
Colossians4:8 Nĩwe ndatũma kũrĩ inyuĩ nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoro ũyũ kĩũmbe
Colossians4:9 Megũũka na Onesimo
Colossians4:10 Nĩmwageithio nĩ Arisitariko ũrĩa twohetwo hamwe nake
Colossians4:11 Ningĩ mũkageithio nĩ Jesu ũrĩa wĩtagwo Jusito. Acio nĩo oiki a thiritũ ya andũ arĩa maruaga tũrutithanagia wĩra nao wa ũthamaki wa Ngai: nao nĩo matũire manyũmagĩrĩria.
Colossians4:12 Ningĩ nĩmwageithio nĩ Epafara
Colossians4:13 Amu ndĩ mũira wake wa ũrĩa enogagia mũno nĩ ũndũ wanyu
Colossians4:14 Nĩmwageithio nĩ Luka
Colossians4:15 Geithiai ariũ a Ithe witũ arĩa matũire Laodikia
Colossians4:16 Na rĩrĩ
Colossians4:17 Na mwĩre Arikipo atĩrĩ
Colossians4:18 Ngeithi ciakwa
1Thessalonians1:1 NĨ ithuĩ
1Thessalonians1:2 Nĩtũcokagĩria Ngai ngatho hĩndĩ ciothe nĩ ũndũ wanyu inyuothe
1Thessalonians1:3 na rĩrĩa tũmũhoyagĩra twĩ mbere ya Ngai Ithe witũ-rĩ
1Thessalonians1:4 Ariũ a Ithe witũ
1Thessalonians1:5 tondũ Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega twahunjagia ndwakinyire kũrĩ inyuĩ ta arĩ o ciugo theri
1Thessalonians1:6 Na inyuĩ mũgĩgĩtuĩka a kwĩgerekanagia na ithuĩ o na Mwathani
1Thessalonians1:7 Mũgĩgĩtuĩka kĩonereria kũrĩ andũ arĩa othe metĩkĩtie o kũrĩa Makedonia na Akaia.
1Thessalonians1:8 Tondũ rĩrĩ
1Thessalonians1:9 Amu ha ũhoro witũ-rĩ
1Thessalonians1:10 na mwetagĩrĩre Mũriũ oime Igũrũ
1Thessalonians2:1 NĨ gũkorũo nĩmũũĩ inyuene
1Thessalonians2:2 no rĩrĩ
1Thessalonians2:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũhoro ũrĩa tũtaaranaga naguo nduumanĩte na ũhoro wa kũhĩtithania
1Thessalonians2:4 no rĩrĩ
1Thessalonians2:5 Nĩ gũkorũo gũtirĩ hĩndĩ twanakorũo tũkĩaria ciugo cia kwĩendereria kũrĩ andũ
1Thessalonians2:6 Na ningĩ-rĩ
1Thessalonians2:7 No rĩrĩ
1Thessalonians2:8 Ũguo no taguo
1Thessalonians2:9 Amu no mũkũririkana
1Thessalonians2:10 Inyuĩ mũrĩ aira
1Thessalonians2:11 Ningĩ nĩmũũĩ atĩ nĩtwamwĩkaga
1Thessalonians2:12 nĩ getha mũthiage na mĩthiĩre ĩrĩa yaganĩrĩire na andũ a Ngai
1Thessalonians2:13 Ningĩ nĩtũcokagĩria Ngai ngatho tũtegũtigithĩria nĩ ũndũ wa rĩrĩ
1Thessalonians2:14 Amu inyuĩ
1Thessalonians2:15 o arĩa moragire Mwathani Jesu
1Thessalonians2:16 Nao nĩo matũkaanagia tũtikahunjĩrie andũ arĩa
1Thessalonians2:17 No ithuĩ
1Thessalonians2:18 tondũ nĩ kwenda twendaga gũũka kũrĩ inyuĩ
1Thessalonians2:19 Amu kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro giitũ-rĩ
1Thessalonians2:20 Nĩ ũndũ mwĩraho witũ o na gĩkeno giitũ nĩ inyuĩ.
1Thessalonians3:1 NĨ ũndũ wa ũguo
1Thessalonians3:2 tũgĩgĩtũma Timotheo
1Thessalonians3:3 nĩ getha mũndũ o wothe wanyu ndakae gũthũngũthagio nĩ mathĩna macio; nĩ gũkorũo nĩmũũĩ inyuene atĩ nĩmo twathĩrĩirio.

1Thessalonians3:10 Ũtukũ o na mũthenya tũkĩragĩrĩria kũhoya atĩ nĩguo tũkonana na inyuĩ ũthiũ na ũthiũ
1Thessalonians3:11 Rĩu-rĩ
1Thessalonians3:12 Nake Mwathani aromuongerera na amũkĩrĩrĩrie wendani wa kwendana o mũndũ na mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ

1Thessalonians4:1 NAGUO ũhoro wa kũrigĩrĩria nĩ atĩrĩ

1Thessalonians4:4 na atĩ o mũndũ wanyu amenyage ũrĩa angĩhota gũikaragia mwĩrĩ wake mwene wĩ mũtheru

1Thessalonians4:6 na ningĩ atĩ mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ndakanatwarĩrĩrie mũrũ wa ithe ũhoro-inĩ wa indo ciake
1Thessalonians4:7 Amu Ngai ndaatwĩtĩire maũndũ ma waganu
1Thessalonians4:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
1Thessalonians4:9 No rĩrĩ
1Thessalonians4:10 na ti-itherũ ũguo noguo mwĩkaga ariũ a Ithe witũ othe marĩ Makedonia guothe. No rĩrĩ
1Thessalonians4:11 ningĩ atĩ mwĩkagĩre kĩyo gĩa gũkindĩria
1Thessalonians4:12 nĩ getha mũthiage na mĩthiĩre ĩrĩa ĩngĩtĩĩka

1Thessalonians5:3 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ moigaga atĩ
1Thessalonians5:4 No inyuĩ
1Thessalonians5:5 nĩ gũkorũo inyuothe mũrĩ ciana cia ũtheri na ciana cia mũthenya. Tũtikĩrĩ a ũtukũ kana a nduma;
1Thessalonians5:6 nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩtũtigei gũkoma toro ta acio angĩ

1Thessalonians5:10 o we wakuire nĩ ũndũ witũ
1Thessalonians5:11 Tondũ wa ũguo-rĩ
1Thessalonians5:12 Na rĩrĩ
1Thessalonians5:13 na mũmekagĩrĩre mũno makĩria
1Thessalonians5:14 Na ningĩ twamũhatĩrĩria
1Thessalonians5:15 Menyai mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ akanerĩhĩria ũũru na ũũru kũrĩ mũndũ ũngĩ; no hingo ciothe mũrũmanagĩrie gwĩkana wega inyuene
1Thessalonians5:16 Kenagai hingo ciothe;
1Thessalonians5:17 hoyagai mũtegũtigithĩria;
1Thessalonians5:18 maũndũ-inĩ mothe-rĩ
1Thessalonians5:19 Mũtikanahorie mwaki wa Roho;
1Thessalonians5:20 mũtikanararie mohoro marĩa marathagwo;
1Thessalonians5:21 roranagiai maũndũ mothe; mũrũmagie ũndũ o wothe ũrĩa mwega;
1Thessalonians5:22 na mũthemage ũndũ o wothe ũngĩonwo wĩ mũũru.
1Thessalonians5:23 Nake Ngai Mwene thayũ we mwene aromwamũra amũtherie kũna. Namo maroho manyu
1Thessalonians5:24 Ũcio ũmwĩtaga nĩ wa kwĩhokeka
1Thessalonians5:25 Ariũ a Ithe witũ
1Thessalonians5:26 Geithiai ariũ a Ithe witũ othe na ngeithi theru cia kũmumunyana.
1Thessalonians5:27 Nĩndamwĩhĩtithia na Mwathani atĩ mũtikaage gũthomera ariũ a Ithe witũ othe marũa maya.
1Thessalonians5:28 Wega wa Mwathani witũ Jesu Kristo ũrogĩa na inyuĩ.
2Thessalonians1:1 NĨ ithuĩ Paulo na Silivano na Timotheo twatũma marũa maya kũrĩ Kanitha wa Athesalonike
2Thessalonians1:2 Mũrogĩa na Wega na thayũ
2Thessalonians1:3 Nĩtwagĩrĩirũo nĩ gũcokagĩria Ngai ngatho hĩndĩ ciothe nĩ ũndũ wanyu
2Thessalonians1:4 Na tondũ ũcio nĩ kwĩraha twĩrahaga nĩ ũndũ wanyu thĩinĩ wa makanitha ma Ngai
2Thessalonians1:5 Naguo ũndũ ũcio nĩguo wonanagia wega ũrĩa Ngai atuaga cira na kĩhooto
2Thessalonians1:6 kuona atĩ Ngai nĩonaga arĩ kĩhooto kũmarĩha na mathĩna
2Thessalonians1:7 ĩndĩ na inyuĩ mũtũire mũnyariragwo-rĩ
2Thessalonians1:8 mokĩte me na mwaki ũkũrĩrĩmbũka. Nake nĩakerĩhĩria kũrĩ andũ arĩa matoĩ Ngai
2Thessalonians1:9 Nao nĩmakaherithio na kwanangwo kũrĩa gũtagathira
2Thessalonians1:10 hĩndĩ ĩrĩa agoka kũgoocagwo e thĩinĩ wa andũ ake aamũre
2Thessalonians1:11 Ũndũ ũcio nĩguo ũtũmaga tũmũhoyagĩre hingo ciothe
2Thessalonians1:12 nĩ getha rĩĩtwa rĩa Mwathani witũ Jesu rĩgakumagio thĩinĩ wanyu
2Thessalonians2:1 RĨU-RĨ
2Thessalonians2:2 atĩ mũtikae kwagaagio narua ngoro
2Thessalonians2:3 Menyai mũkahenio nĩ mũndũ na ũndũ o na ũrĩkũ; nĩ gũkorũo mũthenya ũcio ndũgakinya
2Thessalonians2:4 ũrĩa ũreganaga na ũndũ o wothe wĩtanĩtio na Ũngai
2Thessalonians2:5 Kaĩ mũtekũririkana atĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndarĩ hamwe na inyuĩ nĩndamwĩraga maũndũ macio?
2Thessalonians2:6 Na rĩu mũgakĩmenya kĩrĩa kĩgiragia mũndũ ũcio akinye
2Thessalonians2:7 Nĩ gũkorũo ũhoro wa hitho ũrĩa wa kũrega watho nĩũraruta wĩra waguo o na rĩu: ĩndĩ nĩkũrĩ ũmwe ũgiragia ũhoro ũcio woneke rĩu
2Thessalonians2:8 Na hĩndĩ ĩo-rĩ
2Thessalonians2:9 Nake ũcio mũregi watho nĩagoka kũringana na ũrĩa Shaitani agakorũo amũhotithĩtie gũũka
2Thessalonians2:10 ningĩ oke na wara wothe ũtarĩ wa ũthingu
2Thessalonians2:11 Na tondũ ũcio Ngai amarehithagĩrie ũndũ wĩ na hinya wa kũhĩtithania
2Thessalonians2:12 nao meka ũguo magatuĩrũo ituĩro rĩa ũũru
2Thessalonians2:13 No rĩrĩ
2Thessalonians2:14 Naguo ũhonokio ũcio nĩguo aamwĩtĩire na ũndũ wa Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega twamũhunjĩirie
2Thessalonians2:15 Tondũ ũcio

2Thessalonians3:1 NAGUO ũhoro wa kũrigĩrĩria nĩ atĩrĩ
2Thessalonians3:2 na ningĩ atĩ tũhonokio kũrĩ andũ arĩa matangĩigua kĩhooto
2Thessalonians3:3 Ĩndĩ Mwathani nĩ wa kwĩhokeka
2Thessalonians3:4 Na nĩtwĩhokete Mwathani ũhoro-inĩ wanyu atĩ gwĩka nĩmwĩkaga
2Thessalonians3:5 Nake Mwathani aroonagĩrĩria ngoro cianyu kũgĩa na wendani wa Ngai
2Thessalonians3:6 Rĩu-rĩ
2Thessalonians3:7 Nĩ gũkorũo nĩmũũĩ inyuene ũrĩa mwagĩrĩirũo nĩ kwĩgerekanagia na ithuĩ: amu tũtiatũũraga ta andũ matarĩ kĩhaarĩro hĩndĩ ĩrĩa twatũire na inyuĩ
2Thessalonians3:8 o na kana tũkarĩa irio cia mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ tũhũ; no nĩ kũruta twarutaga wĩra wa hinya ũtukũ na mũthenya tũkĩĩnogagia
2Thessalonians3:9 Na rĩrĩ
2Thessalonians3:10 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
2Thessalonians3:11 Amu nĩtũiguaga atĩ nĩkũrĩ andũ amwe anyu matũũraga ta andũ matarĩ kĩhaarĩro
2Thessalonians3:12 Acio nĩo tũgwatha na tũkamahatĩrĩria
2Thessalonians3:13 No inyuĩ-rĩ
2Thessalonians3:14 Na rĩrĩ
2Thessalonians3:15 Ĩndĩ mũtikamũtue thũ yanyu
2Thessalonians3:16 Na rĩrĩ
2Thessalonians3:17 Ngeithi ici ngwandĩka na guoko gwakwa mwene
2Thessalonians3:18 Wega wa Mwathani witũ Jesu Kristo ũrogĩa na inyuĩ inyuothe.
1Timothy1:1 NIĨ Paulo
1Timothy1:2 nĩ niĩ ndakwandĩkĩra marũa maya
1Timothy1:3 O ta ũrĩa ndakũhatĩrĩirie
1Timothy1:4 o na kana mathikagĩrĩrie ng’ano cia tũhũ
1Timothy1:5 No rĩrĩ
1Timothy1:6 Maũndũ macio-rĩ
1Timothy1:7 magakĩenda gũtuĩka arutani a watho
1Timothy1:8 Rĩu-rĩ
1Timothy1:9 akĩmenyete atĩ watho ũcio ndwathanĩtwo nĩ ũndũ wa mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu
1Timothy1:10 o na ningĩ nĩ ũndũ wa arĩa ahũri-maraya
1Timothy1:11 arĩ guo ũrĩa ũringaine na Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega wĩ na riri wa Ngai ũrĩa mũgathe
1Timothy1:12 Nĩngũcokeria Kristo Jesu Mwathani witũ ngatho
1Timothy1:13 o na ndatuĩka mbere ndarĩ mũrumi Ngai
1Timothy1:14 naguo Wega wa Mwathani witũ ũgĩkĩrĩrĩria kũnjiyũrĩrĩra
1Timothy1:15 Ũhoro ũyũ nĩguo wa kwĩhokeka
1Timothy1:16 No rĩrĩ
1Timothy1:17 Na rĩu
1Timothy1:18 Ũtaaro ũcio nĩguo ndagũtaara naguo
1Timothy1:19 na ũtũũre o ũrũmĩtie wĩtĩkio
1Timothy1:20 Nao amwe ao nĩ aa Humenayo na Alekisandero; nĩo ndĩmaneanĩte gwĩ Shaitani
1Timothy2:1 NĨ ũndũ wa ũguo
1Timothy2:2 na makĩria
1Timothy2:3 Ũndũ ũcio nĩguo mwega na wa gwĩtĩkĩrĩka nĩ Ngai Mũhonokia witũ
1Timothy2:4 o we wendaga andũ othe mahonokio na matuĩke a kũmenya ũhoro-wa-ma.
1Timothy2:5 Amu kwĩ na Ngai o ro ũmwe
1Timothy2:6 ũrĩa werutire atuĩke wa gũkũũra andũ othe; naguo ũira wa ũhoro ũcio nĩwaheanirũo ihinda rĩaguo rĩrĩa rĩagĩrĩru rĩakinya.
1Timothy2:7 Naguo nĩ niĩ ndatuirũo mũhunjia o na mũtũmwo waguo
1Timothy2:8 Tondũ wa ũguo-rĩ
1Timothy2:9 Ningĩ no taguo ngwenda atĩ andũ-a-nja megemagie na nguo itarĩ cia mwĩonanio
1Timothy2:10 no nĩmegemagie na ciĩko cia ũthingu
1Timothy2:11 Nĩ wega mũndũ-wa-nja erutage maũndũ akindĩirie
1Timothy2:12 No rĩrĩ
1Timothy2:13 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
1Timothy2:14 nake Adamu-rĩ
1Timothy2:15 No rĩrĩ
1Timothy3:1 ŨHORO ũyũ nĩguo wa kwĩhokeka
1Timothy3:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Timothy3:3 ĩndĩ ndakanatuĩke wa ngũĩ iria ciumanaga na ũrĩu
1Timothy3:4 ningĩ nĩakorũo amenyete gwathaga wega mũciĩ wake mwene
1Timothy3:5 (Tondũ-rĩ
1Timothy3:6 Na ningĩ ndagakorũo arĩ mũndũ wa mwĩtĩkanio
1Timothy3:7 Ningĩ no mũhaka akorũo arĩ na ngumo njega harĩ andũ arĩa matarĩ a thiritũ iitũ
1Timothy3:8 Atungati a kanitha nao nĩmaagĩrĩirũo nĩ gũtuĩka andũ matarĩ na itherũ
1Timothy3:9 no makorũo marĩ andũ marũmĩtie ũrutani wa Wĩtĩkio ũrĩa ũtũire hitho-inĩ
1Timothy3:10 Nao no kinya maambe magerio; na thutha ũcio manyite wĩra wa atungati a kanitha
1Timothy3:11 O ũndũ ũmwe andũ-a-nja no makorũo matarĩ na itherũ na matarĩ acambania
1Timothy3:12 Ningĩ atungati a kanitha-rĩ
1Timothy3:13 Tondũ-rĩ
1Timothy3:14 Ndakwandĩkĩra maũndũ macio ndanyĩte atĩ nĩndĩũka kũrĩ wee narua;
1Timothy3:15 ndakĩmaandĩka nĩguo atĩ ingĩaga gũũka narua-rĩ
1Timothy3:16 Na rĩrĩ
1Timothy4:1 NO rĩrĩ
1Timothy4:2 nĩ ũndũ wa ũhinga wa andũ arĩa maaragia mathara
1Timothy4:3 Acio nĩo makaananagia gũtikanahikanio
1Timothy4:4 Tondũ-rĩ
1Timothy4:5 tondũ nĩkĩrĩkĩtie gũtherio na Ũhoro wa Ngai o na kũhoya.
1Timothy4:6 Ũngĩririkanagia ariũ a Ithe witũ maũndũ macio-rĩ
1Timothy4:7 no rĩrĩ
1Timothy4:8 amu mũndũ akĩĩmenyeria maũndũ ma gwĩkĩra mwĩrĩ wake hinya kwĩ bata o kahinda
1Timothy4:9 Ũhoro ũcio nĩguo wa kwĩhokeka
1Timothy4:10 Na tũrutaga wĩra wa mĩnoga tũkerutanĩria nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoro o ro ũcio; amu-rĩ
1Timothy4:11 Athanaga atĩ maũndũ macio mekagwo
1Timothy4:12 Menya ũreke mũndũ o wothe akũire
1Timothy4:13 Rũmanagĩria ũhoro wa gũthomera andũ Maandĩko marĩa matheru
1Timothy4:14 Menya ũkaaga kũhũthĩra kĩheo kĩrĩa ũrĩ o nakĩo
1Timothy4:15 Ĩkagĩra maũndũ macio kĩyo
1Timothy4:16 Wĩmenyagĩrĩre wee mwene
1Timothy5:1 NDŨKANATETIE mũthuri
1Timothy5:2 nao atumia akũrũ-rĩ
1Timothy5:3 Tĩaga atumia a ndigwa o arĩa a ndigwa ki.
1Timothy5:4 No rĩrĩ
1Timothy5:5 Na rĩrĩ
1Timothy5:6 No mũtumia ũrĩa ũtũire ekenagia na maũndũ marĩa eriragĩria
1Timothy5:7 Athanaga maũndũ macio namo nĩ getha acio maikarage matarĩ ũcuke.
1Timothy5:8 Mũndũ angĩikara ategũteithia andũ ao
1Timothy5:9 Menya ũkaandĩka mũtumia mũtaratara-inĩ wa atumia a ndigwa ũrĩa ũtahingĩtie mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtandatũ
1Timothy5:10 na akamenyeka ũrĩa atũire ekaga maũndũ mega; na ningĩ akorũo nĩarerete ciana
1Timothy5:11 No rĩrĩ
1Timothy5:12 magagĩtuĩka a gũtuwo ehia nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa mareganĩte na ũhoro ũrĩa maambire gwĩtĩkia.
1Timothy5:13 Ningĩ nĩmemenyagĩria ũgũta
1Timothy5:14 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo ngwenda atĩrĩ
1Timothy5:15 amu o na rĩu kũrĩ amwe moimĩte njĩra makerekera kũrĩ Shaitani.
1Timothy5:16 Na rĩrĩ
1Timothy5:17 Nĩkwagĩrĩire atĩ athuri a kanitha arĩa maathanaga wega mekagĩrĩrũo o gwĩkĩrĩrũo mũno
1Timothy5:18 Nĩ gũkorũo kwandĩkĩtwo Maandĩko-inĩ atĩrĩ
1Timothy5:19 Menya ũkanetĩkĩra mũthuri wa kanitha athitakwo
1Timothy5:20 Ĩndĩ arĩa maikaraga makĩĩhagia-rĩ
1Timothy5:21 Ndakwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
1Timothy5:22 Ndũkanaigĩrĩre mũndũ moko na kĩhĩko
1Timothy5:23 Tiga kũnyuaga o maĩ matheri
1Timothy5:24 Mehia ma andũ amwe nĩ moimĩru
1Timothy5:25 Na no taguo kũrĩ maũndũ mega moimĩru; namo marĩa matarĩ moimĩru-rĩ
1Timothy6:1 NĨKWAGĨRĨIRE atĩ ngombo ciothe
1Timothy6:2 Nacio ngombo iria ii na ene metĩkĩtie-rĩ
1Timothy6:3 Mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ angĩkorũo nĩarutanaga ũrutani ũngĩ
1Timothy6:4 mũndũ ũcio nĩ kwĩgatha egathĩte
1Timothy6:5 na kũgiana kwa andũ arĩa marĩ na meciria mathũku na matiganĩte na ũhoro-ũrĩa-wa-ma
1Timothy6:6 Na rĩrĩ
1Timothy6:7 nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
1Timothy6:8 ĩndĩ tũngĩgĩa na irio na nguo-rĩ
1Timothy6:9 No andũ arĩa mendaga gũtonga-rĩ
1Timothy6:10 Tondũ rĩrĩ
1Timothy6:11 No wee mũndũ wa Ngai-rĩ
1Timothy6:12 Rũaga mbaara ĩrĩa njega ya kũrũĩrĩra maũndũ marĩa metĩkĩtio
1Timothy6:13 Ndakwĩra atĩrĩrĩ na ma
1Timothy6:14 atĩ ũrũmagie rĩathani rĩu wathĩtwo narĩo
1Timothy6:15 nake nĩ kuonanio akonanio
1Timothy6:16 Nake nĩwe wiki ũtũũraga muoyo ũrĩa ũtathiraga
1Timothy6:17 Athaga andũ arĩa matongete na indo matukũ maya atĩ matikae kwĩgatha
1Timothy6:18 ningĩ atĩ mekage wega
1Timothy6:19 nĩguo atĩ meigagĩre mũthithũ ũrĩa ũngĩtuĩka gĩtina gĩa gwakwo maũndũ mega ma kũmaguna mahinda marĩa magoka
1Timothy6:20 Atĩrĩrĩ
1Timothy6:21 Andũ amwe-rĩ
2Timothy1:1 NIĨ Paulo
2Timothy1:2 nĩ niĩ ndakwandĩkĩra marũa maya
2Timothy1:3 Nĩnjokagĩria Ngai ngatho
2Timothy1:4 ndĩĩriragĩria tuonane nawe
2Timothy1:5 Nĩ kũririkanio ndirikanĩtio ũrĩa ũikaire wĩtĩkĩtie ũtarĩ na ũhinga
2Timothy1:6 Tondũ ũcio nĩngũkũririkania atĩ ũhuhagĩrĩrie kĩheo kĩrĩa ũheetwo nĩ Ngai kiumanĩte na Wega wake
2Timothy1:7 Amu-rĩ
2Timothy1:8 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
2Timothy1:9 Nĩwe watũhonokirie
2Timothy1:10 naguo rĩu nĩũguũranĩirio nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa Mũhonokia witũ Kristo Jesu okire akĩoneka
2Timothy1:11 o ũcio niĩ ndatuirũo mũhunjia na mũtũmwo o na mũrutani waguo.
2Timothy1:12 Nĩkĩo ndũire nyamarĩkĩte ũguo: ĩndĩ ndingĩconoka; nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
2Timothy1:13 Rũmagia wega mohoro marĩa maagĩrĩru monanĩrĩirio o mbere
2Timothy1:14 Menyagĩrĩra wega ũndũ ũrĩa mwega waigirũo kũrĩ wee ũũramatage
2Timothy1:15 Rĩu-rĩ
2Timothy1:16 Mwathani aroiguĩra andũ a nyũmba ya Onesiforo tha; nĩ ũndũ aana’nyamarũra kaingĩ. Ningĩ ndaaconokaga nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa ndarĩ muohe na mũnyororo;
2Timothy1:17 no rĩrĩa okĩte Roma
2Timothy1:18 (Mwathani aroetĩkĩra akaiguĩrũo tha nĩ Mwathani o Mũthenya ũcio wakinya). Na rĩrĩ

2Timothy2:2 Na maũndũ marĩa ũiguĩte na niĩ

2Timothy2:4 Rĩu-rĩ
2Timothy2:5 Ningĩ-rĩ

2Timothy2:7 Cũranagia wega ũrĩa ndĩroiga; nĩ ũndũ Mwathani nĩarĩkũũhĩgagia maũndũ-inĩ mothe.
2Timothy2:8 Tũũra ũririkanaga Jesu Kristo
2Timothy2:9 Ũhoro ũcio-rĩ

2Timothy3:13 No andũ arĩa aaganu na ahenania-rĩ

2Timothy4:1 NDAKWĨRA atĩrĩ na ma
2Timothy4:2 atĩrĩ
2Timothy4:3 Nĩ gũkorũo hĩndĩ nĩirĩũka rĩrĩa andũ matagakirĩrĩria kũrutagwo ũrutani ũrĩa wagĩrĩire
2Timothy4:4 na nĩmakahũgũraga matũ mao matikaigue ũhoro-ũrĩa-wa-ma
2Timothy4:5 No wee-rĩ
2Timothy4:6 Nĩ ũndũ niĩ-rĩ
2Timothy4:7 Nĩndũĩte mbaara ĩrĩa njega
2Timothy4:8 Gwata rĩu nĩnjigĩirũo thũmbĩ ĩrĩa ya ũthingu
2Timothy4:9 Geria na kĩyo gũũka kũrĩ niĩ narua:
2Timothy4:10 nĩ gũkorũo Dema nĩaandiganĩirie
2Timothy4:11 No Luka wiki tũrĩ nake. Ũka ũkĩoya Mariko
2Timothy4:12 Nake Tukiko nĩndĩmũtũmĩte Efeso.
2Timothy4:13 Kabuti karĩa ndatigire gwa Karipo kũrĩa Teroa
2Timothy4:14 Alekisandero ũrĩa mũturi wa icango cia rũthuku nĩaanjĩkire ũũru mũno: Mwathani nĩwe ũkamũthukĩra kũringana na ciĩko ciake.
2Timothy4:15 Nawe ũmwĩmenyerere
2Timothy4:16 Rĩrĩa ndatwarirũo cira-inĩ rĩa mbere-rĩ
2Timothy4:17 No Mwathani nĩwe wandũgamĩrĩire akĩnjĩkĩra hinya
2Timothy4:18 Nake Mwathani nĩwe ũkandunyũkithia ũndũ-inĩ ũrĩa wothe mũũru
2Timothy4:19 Geithia Pirisika na Akula
2Timothy4:20 Erasito nĩaatigirũo aikare Korintho: nake Terofimo ngĩmũtiga Mileto arĩ mũrũaru.
2Timothy4:21 Ikĩra kĩyo gĩa gũũka hĩndĩ ya heho ĩtanakinya. Nĩwageithio nĩ Eubulu
2Timothy4:22 Mwathani aroikara na roho waku. Naguo Wega wa Ngai ũroikara na inyuĩ.
Titus1:1 MARŨA maya nĩ makwa
Titus1:2 nĩguo merĩgagĩrĩre muoyo ũrĩa ũtagathira
Titus1:3 Nake nĩaaguũranĩirie Ũhoro wake
Titus1:4 Atĩrĩrĩ
Titus1:5 Rĩu-rĩ
Titus1:6 Mũndũ wa gũthurũo nĩatuĩke mũndũ ũtarĩ ũcuke
Titus1:7 Tondũ rĩrĩ
Titus1:8 nĩ kaba atuĩke mwendi gũtugana
Titus1:9 ningĩ nĩatũũre arũmagia ũhoro ũrĩa wa kwĩhokeka
Titus1:10 Nĩ ũndũ nĩkũrĩ andũ aingĩ aregi watho
Titus1:11 Nĩo mabataire nĩ gũtumio kanua
Titus1:12 Mũndũ ũmwe wa rũrĩrĩ rũao
Titus1:13 Naguo ũira ũcio nĩ wa ma. Tondũ wa ũguo ũmakaanagie ũgwatĩirie
Titus1:14 na matikarũmbũyagie ng’ano cia Ayahudi
Titus1:15 Maũndũ mothe nĩ matheru kũrĩ andũ arĩa me na meciria matheru; ĩndĩ kũrĩ andũ arĩa a meciria mathũku na matetĩkĩtie-rĩ
Titus1:16 Kuuga nĩmoigaga atĩ nĩmoĩ Ngai; no maũndũ marĩa mekaga nĩmo monanagia atĩ nĩmamũkaanĩte
Titus2:1 NO wee-rĩ
Titus2:2 nĩguo atĩ athuri arĩa akũrũ mathemage ũrĩu
Titus2:3 na ningĩ atĩ atumia arĩa akũrũ o nao maikarage na mĩikarĩre ĩrĩa ya ũtheru
Titus2:4 nĩ getha mamenyagĩrie atumia arĩa ethĩ ũrĩa mangĩendaga athuri ao o na ciana ciao
Titus2:5 na maikarage marĩ na ũũgĩ wa ngoro
Titus2:6 Aanake nao ũmataarage atĩ maikarage marĩ na ũũgĩ wa ngoro.
Titus2:7 Na maũndũ-inĩ mothe-rĩ
Titus2:8 na ũrutanagwo na ciugo iria ciagĩrĩire
Titus2:9 Taaraga ngombo nacio atĩ ciathĩkagĩre ene cio
Titus2:10 na itekũnyitanga indo ciao
Titus2:11 Nĩ ũndũ Wega wa Ngai nĩwonekete
Titus2:12 naguo nĩguo ũtũmenyagĩria kũregana na maũndũ mothe marĩa mataiguaine na ũhoro wa kwĩamũrĩra Ngai
Titus2:13 tũgĩtanyaga gũkahingĩrio kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro kĩrĩa kĩĩ na kĩrathimo
Titus2:14 Nake nĩwe werutire nĩ ũndũ witũ
Titus2:15 Rĩu-rĩ
Titus3:1 MARIRIKANAGIE atĩ maathĩkagĩre anene na andũ arĩa maathanaga
Titus3:2 ningĩ matikanacambie mũndũ
Titus3:3 Nĩ ũndũ kwarĩ hĩndĩ o na ithuĩ twarĩ akĩgu
Titus3:4 Ĩndĩ rĩrĩa ũtugi wa Ngai Mũhonokia witũ naguo wendani ũrĩa endete andũ naguo ciaguũkire-rĩ
Titus3:5 nĩ kũhonokia aatũhonokirie
Titus3:6 Na nĩ Roho ũcio aatũitĩrĩirie na ũtana na ũndũ wa Jesu Kristo Mũhonokia witũ
Titus3:7 nĩ getha tũtuwo athingu nĩ ũndũ wa Wega wake
Titus3:8 Ũhoro ũcio nĩ wa kwĩhokeka; ngũkĩenda waragie ũhoro wa maũndũ macio ũmagwatĩirie
Titus3:9 No rĩrĩ
Titus3:10 Na ha ũhoro wa mũndũ wĩtĩkĩtie ũrutani mũhĩtanu-rĩ
Titus3:11 ũkĩmenyaga atĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũtariĩ ũguo nĩ mũgariũkanu na akahĩtia
Titus3:12 Atĩrĩrĩ
Titus3:13 Zena ũrĩa wakiri
Titus3:14 Nao andũ aitũ-rĩ
Titus3:15 Andũ arĩa othe tũrĩ nao nĩmaakũgeithia. Wee nawe ũgeithie andũ othe arĩa matwendete
Philemon1:1 NĨ niĩ Paulo
Philemon1:2 na tũgatũmĩra Apufia
Philemon1:3 Mũrogĩa na Wega o na thayũ
Philemon1:4 Atĩrĩrĩ
Philemon1:5 nĩ ũndũ wa kũigua ũrĩa ũtũire wendaga na ũkehoka Mwathani Jesu
Philemon1:6 Na nĩ’hoyaga atĩ ngwatanĩro ĩo yao
Philemon1:7 Nĩ gũkorũo nĩ gũkena ngenete mũno na ngomĩrĩrio ngoro nĩ ũndũ wa wendani waku
Philemon1:8 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Philemon1:9 ndenda kaba ngũthaithe ũwĩke nĩ ũndũ wa wendani. Ũguo noguo niĩ Paulo
Philemon1:10 ngũgĩgũthaitha nĩ ũndũ wa mwana wakwa ũrĩa njiarĩire gũkũ kĩoho-inĩ
Philemon1:11 Nake tene ndaarĩ na kĩene harĩ wee
Philemon1:12 Nake nĩwe ũyũ ndamũcokia kũrĩ wee
Philemon1:13 Na nĩingĩendete tũikare nake
Philemon1:14 Ĩndĩ ndirĩ ũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ingĩĩka itoĩ ũrĩa ũngĩenda
Philemon1:15 Tondũ no gũkorũo gĩtũmi kĩrĩa kĩratũmire eherio kũrĩ wee kahinda no getha
Philemon1:16 na ningĩ atĩ ndagacoke arĩ o ngombo
Philemon1:17 Tondũ wa ũguo
Philemon1:18 Nake angĩkorũo nĩagwĩkĩte ũũru o na ũrĩkũ kana hihi arĩ na thirĩ waku-rĩ
Philemon1:19 Nĩ niĩ Paulo ndaandĩka na guoko gwakwa mwene atĩrĩ
Philemon1:20 Ĩĩ
Philemon1:21 Ngũkwandĩkĩra marũa maya ndĩĩhokete atĩ ndũngĩnema
Philemon1:22 Hamwe na ũguo-rĩ
Philemon1:23 Epafara
Philemon1:24 nao aa Mariko na Arisitariko
Philemon1:25 Wega wa Mwathani witũ Jesu Kristo ũrogĩa na maroho manyu. Amen.
Hebrews1:1 NGAI ũrĩa waaragĩria maithe maitũ matukũ-inĩ ma tene na tũnua twa anabii
Hebrews1:2 o matukũ-inĩ maya ma kũrigĩrĩria nĩatwarĩirie ithuĩ na kanua ka Mũriũ
Hebrews1:3 Nake we
Hebrews1:4 Nake nĩ gũtuwo aatuirũo mũnene gũkĩra araika

Hebrews1:6 Na ningĩ
Hebrews1:7 Na ha ũhoro wa araika akoiga atĩrĩ
Hebrews1:8 No rĩrĩ

Hebrews2:1 HAKĨRĨ ũguo-rĩ
Hebrews2:2 Tondũ rĩrĩ
Hebrews2:3 kaĩ ithuĩ na ithuĩ tũkahonoka atĩa

Hebrews4:1 HAKĨRĨ ũguo-rĩ

Hebrews4:7 Ngai nĩaacokire agĩtua mũthenya mũna

Hebrews4:9 Tondũ ũcio gũgagĩtuĩka atĩ andũ a Ngai nĩmatigarĩirũo nĩ thabatũ ya kũhurũka.

Hebrews7:10 tondũ aarĩ o mũthimo-inĩ wa ithe hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Melikisedeki aamũtũngire.

Hebrews7:12 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Hebrews7:13 Tondũ mũndũ ũrĩa maũndũ macio meranĩtwo nĩ ũndũ wake oimanire na mũhĩrĩga ũngĩ

Hebrews7:15 Naguo ũhoro ũcio tũkwaragia watuĩka muumĩru o makĩria

Hebrews9:1 RĨU-RĨ
Hebrews9:2 Amu-rĩ
Hebrews9:3 Na mbarĩ ĩrĩa ĩngĩ ya gĩtama kĩrĩa gĩa kerĩ
Hebrews9:4 nĩyo yarĩ na kĩgongona gĩa thahabu kĩrĩa gĩa gũcinĩrũo ũbumba
Hebrews9:5 Ningĩ igũrũ rĩa Ithandũkũ rĩu nĩkwarĩ Akerubi me na riri maacuhĩrĩire gĩikaro-gĩa-tha: no tũtingĩhota kwaria rĩu ũhoro wa indo icio mwanya mwanya.
Hebrews9:6 Nacio indo icio ikĩrĩ thondeke ũguo-rĩ
Hebrews9:7 ĩndĩ hema ĩrĩa ya kerĩ-rĩ
Hebrews9:8 Ũguo nĩguo Roho Mũtheru amenyithanagia atĩ njĩra ya gũtonya Handũ harĩa Hatheru ndĩrĩ ĩronanio hĩndĩ ĩrĩa hema ĩrĩa ya mbere ĩtũire o ho.
Hebrews9:9 Nayo nĩyo ngerekano ya gũtũgerekanĩria mahinda maya tũrĩ: na kũringana na ngerekano ĩo kũrutagwo maruta na magongona marĩa matangĩhota gũtũma mũndũ ũrĩa ũmarutaga aagĩrĩre kũna ha ũhoro wa thamiri yake
Hebrews9:10 kuona atĩ makoniĩ o ũhoro wa kũrĩa na kũnyua
Hebrews9:11 Ĩndĩ rĩrĩa Kristo okire
Hebrews9:12 Agĩgĩtonya Handũ Harĩa Hatheru ihinda o rĩmwe rĩa kũigana
Hebrews9:13 Tondũ kũngĩkorũo atĩ thakame cia mbũri na cia ndegwa
Hebrews9:14 githĩ thakame ya Kristo
Hebrews9:15 Na tondũ ũcio nĩwe mũiguithania wa kĩrĩkanĩro kĩngĩ kĩerũ
Hebrews9:16 Tondũ rĩrĩa kwĩ na kĩrĩkanĩro gĩa kwĩgaya-rĩ
Hebrews9:17 Tondũ kĩrĩkanĩro gĩa kwĩgaya nĩkĩgĩaga na hinya ũrĩa wĩgaĩte aarĩkia gũkua; gĩkĩrĩ na hinya ũrĩkũ ũrĩa wĩgaĩte arĩ o muoyo?
Hebrews9:18 Ũguo no taguo kĩrĩkanĩro kĩrĩa kĩa mbere o nakĩo gĩtiigana kũrugũrio hatarĩ na thakame.
Hebrews9:19 Nĩ ũndũ Musa-rĩ
Hebrews9:20 akĩmera atĩrĩ
Hebrews9:21 Ningĩ o ũndũ ũmwe akĩminjĩria hema ĩo thakame
Hebrews9:22 O na atĩrĩrĩ
Hebrews9:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Hebrews9:24 Nĩ ũndũ Kristo ndaatonyire handũ hatheru hathondeketwo na moko
Hebrews9:25 Ningĩ ti getha erutage kaingĩ
Hebrews9:26 amu kũngĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Hebrews9:27 Na ta ũrĩa gũtuĩtwo atĩ andũ makue gĩkuũ o kĩmwe
Hebrews9:28 ũguo no taguo Kristo nake
Hebrews10:1 RĨU-RĨ
Hebrews10:2 Amu kũngĩkorũo ũguo tiguo-rĩ
Hebrews10:3 No rĩrĩ
Hebrews10:4 Tondũ gũtingĩhoteka mehia meherio biũ nĩ thakame ya ndegwa na ya mbũri.
Hebrews10:5 Nĩkĩo Kristo
Hebrews10:6 Mahaki ma gũcinwo
Hebrews10:7 Hĩndĩ ĩo ngĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Hebrews10:8 Nake oiga hau mbere atĩ magongona na mahaki
Hebrews10:9 agacoka akoiga
Hebrews10:10 Nakuo kwenda kũu nĩkuo gũtũmaga tũtherio
Hebrews10:11 Na rĩrĩ
Hebrews10:12 Ĩndĩ ũyũ-rĩ
Hebrews10:13 eterere o nginya rĩrĩa thũ ciake igatuwo gaturũa ka makinya make.
Hebrews10:14 Tondũ-rĩ
Hebrews10:15 O nake Roho Mũtheru nĩwe mũira witũ ũhoro-inĩ ũcio; tondũ aarĩkia kuuga atĩrĩ:
Hebrews10:16 Gĩkĩ nĩkĩo kĩrĩkanĩro kĩrĩa ngarĩkanĩra nao matukũ macio maathira
Hebrews10:17 agacoka akoiga atĩrĩ: Namo mehia mao na waganu wao ndigacoka kũmaririkana o rĩ o rĩ.
Hebrews10:18 Na rĩrĩ
Hebrews10:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Hebrews10:20 tũthiĩrĩire njĩra ĩrĩa njerũ na ĩrĩ muoyo
Hebrews10:21 na ningĩ
Hebrews10:22 nĩtũthengererei twĩ na ũhoro-wa-ma ngoro-inĩ
Hebrews10:23 Ningĩ nĩtũrũmieni ũhoro ũrĩa tũtũire tuumbũraga atĩ nĩtũwĩrĩgĩriire
Hebrews10:24 Hamwe na ũguo nĩtwĩciragiei ũrĩa tũngĩarahũranaga: o mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ
Hebrews10:25 ningĩ tũtigatige kũũnganaga hamwe
Hebrews10:26 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Hebrews10:27 tiga o gwetererũo na kĩmako kĩnene cira o na mwaki wakanaga
Hebrews10:28 Rĩu-rĩ
Hebrews10:29 Mũgwĩciria atĩa? Kaĩ mũndũ ataagĩrĩirũo nĩ kũherithio na iherithia rĩnene mũno makĩria
Hebrews10:30 Amu nĩtũũĩ: ũrĩa woigire atĩ
Hebrews10:31 Nĩ ũndũ wa kũguoyohania mũno gũkumbatwo nĩ Ngai ũrĩa wĩ muoyo.
Hebrews10:32 No rĩrĩ
Hebrews10:33 Mahinda mamwe nĩ kũmenererio mwamenagĩrĩrio mbere-inĩ ya kĩrĩndĩ
Hebrews10:34 Tondũ nĩmwaiguagĩra andũ arĩa mohetwo tha
Hebrews10:35 Tondũ ũcio-rĩ
Hebrews10:36 Tondũ nĩmũbatairio nĩ gũkirĩrĩria nĩ getha atĩ
Hebrews10:37 Nĩ ũndũ kahinda o kanini gaathira-rĩ
Hebrews10:38 Ĩndĩ-rĩ
Hebrews10:39 No ithuĩ-rĩ

Hebrews11:23 Nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtĩkia
Hebrews11:24 Nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtĩkia-rĩ
Hebrews11:25 agĩgĩthura kaba kũnyariranĩrio na andũ a Ngai
Hebrews11:26 tondũ nĩaatuĩte atĩ kũmenwo nĩ ũndũ wa Kristo nĩ ũtonga mũnene gũkĩra indo iria ii bata cia Misiri; nĩ ũndũ nĩaatanyĩte kuona kĩheo kĩa ngatho kĩrĩa gĩkaheanwo.
Hebrews11:27 Nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtĩkia
Hebrews11:28 Nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtĩkia
Hebrews11:29 Nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtĩkia-rĩ
Hebrews11:30 Nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtĩkia-rĩ
Hebrews11:31 Nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtĩkia
Hebrews11:32 Na nĩ ũndũ ũrĩkũ ũngĩ ingĩcoka kuuga? Amu ndingĩona hĩndĩ ya kũheana ũhoro wa Gideoni na Baraka na Samusoni na Jefitha
Hebrews11:33 Acio othe-rĩ
Hebrews11:34 ningĩ makĩhoria hinya wa mwaki
Hebrews11:35 Andũ-a-nja makĩriũkĩrio andũ ao arĩa maakuĩte. Andũ angĩ magĩtandiũrũo ũũru mũno
Hebrews11:36 Angĩ ao makĩgerio na kũnyũrũrio na kũhũrũo na iboko irĩ njaaga
Hebrews11:37 Angĩ makĩũragwo na mahiga
Hebrews11:38 (Nao-rĩ
Hebrews11:39 Nao acio othe-rĩ
Hebrews11:40 nĩ gũkorũo o mbere Ngai nĩaatũthondekeire ithuĩ ũndũ mwega makĩria
Hebrews12:1 HAKĨRĨ ũguo-rĩ
Hebrews12:2 o tũcũthĩrĩirie Jesu
Hebrews12:3 Rĩu-rĩ
Hebrews12:4 Inyuĩ-rĩ
Hebrews12:5 na nĩmũriganĩirũo nĩ ũhoro wa kũmũhatĩrĩria ũrĩa mũtaaragwo naguo ta mwĩ ciana
Hebrews12:6 Nĩ gũkorũo ũrĩa Mwathani endete
Hebrews12:7 Inyuĩ nĩmũkiragĩrĩria nĩ getha mũrutagwo o mũkĩherithagio; Ngai amwĩkaga o ta mũrĩ ciana ciake; nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Hebrews12:8 Ĩndĩ mũngĩikara mũtekũherithio iherithia rĩrĩa rĩmenyeretwo nĩ andũ othe-rĩ
Hebrews12:9 Ningĩ-rĩ
Hebrews12:10 Nĩ gũkorũo acio nĩmaatũherithagia o matukũ manyinyi
Hebrews12:11 Kũherithio o guothe kuonagwo o ihinda rĩakuo ta gũtarĩ gĩkeno
Hebrews12:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Hebrews12:13 na mwĩrũngarĩrie njĩra cia makinya manyu
Hebrews12:14 Geriai na kĩyo gũikarania mũiguanĩte na andũ othe
Hebrews12:15 Wĩmenyererei atĩ mũndũ o wothe wanyu ndakaage gũkinyĩrũo nĩ Wega wa Ngai; o na kana ũndũ mũũru ũtariĩ ta mũri wa mũtĩ mũrũrũ ũmere kũrĩ inyuĩ ũmũtangage
Hebrews12:16 ningĩ atĩ gũtikanagĩe na mũhũri maraya kana mũndũ ũtetigagĩra Ngai
Hebrews12:17 Tondũ nĩmũũĩ atĩ thutha ũcio
Hebrews12:18 Tondũ rĩrĩ
Hebrews12:19 na mũgambĩre wa coro
Hebrews12:20 nĩ gũkorũo matiahotire gwĩtiiria ũhoro ũyũ waathanĩtwo atĩrĩ
Hebrews12:21 Naguo ũndũ ũcio wonekire ũkĩrehe kĩmako kĩnene ũguo
Hebrews12:22 Ĩndĩ inyuĩ-rĩ
Hebrews12:23 marũrũnganĩte kĩũngano kĩnene
Hebrews12:24 o na kũrĩ Jesu
Hebrews12:25 Menyai mũkarega kũigua Ũrĩa ũkwaria. Tondũ rĩrĩ
Hebrews12:26 Ũcio nĩwe mũgambo wake watũmire thĩ ĩthingithe hĩndĩ ĩo: no rĩu nĩeranĩire akoiga atĩrĩ
Hebrews12:27 Nacio ciugo icio “o ihinda rĩmwe rĩngĩ
Hebrews12:28 Tondũ ũcio-rĩ
Hebrews12:29 amu Ngai witũ nĩ mwaki ũninanaga.
Hebrews13:1 IKARAGAI mwendaine na ariũ a Ithe witũ.
Hebrews13:2 Mũtikanariganĩrũo nĩ gũtuga ageni; nĩ gũkorũo
Hebrews13:3 Ririkanagai arĩa mohetwo
Hebrews13:4 Ũhoro wa kũhikania nĩwĩkĩrĩrũo nĩ andũ othe
Hebrews13:5 Mĩikarire-inĩ yanyu-rĩ
Hebrews13:6 Tondũ ũcio nĩtwetaga kuuga
Hebrews13:7 Ririkanagai aathani anyu atongoria
Hebrews13:8 Jesu Kristo atũũraga atekũgarũrũka
Hebrews13:9 Mũtikanatwarĩrĩrio nĩ morutani mageni ma mĩthemba mĩthemba
Hebrews13:10 Ithuĩ-rĩ
Hebrews13:11 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Hebrews13:12 No taguo Jesu nake aanyarirĩirũo na nja ya kĩhingo
Hebrews13:13 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Hebrews13:14 Nĩ ũndũ gũkũ-rĩ
Hebrews13:15 Gwatuĩka ũguo-rĩ
Hebrews13:16 Na mũtikanariganĩrũo nĩ gwĩkana wega o na gũtanahanĩra
Hebrews13:17 Iguagai aathani arĩa matũire mamũtongoragia
Hebrews13:18 Tũhoyagĩrei: amu nĩtũkwĩhoka atĩ twĩ na thamiri ĩtarĩ ũcuke
Hebrews13:19 Na ndamũthaitha mũno makĩria mwĩkage ũguo nĩ getha njokio kũrĩ inyuĩ o narua makĩria.
Hebrews13:20 Rĩu-rĩ
Hebrews13:21 arotũma mũtuĩke aagĩrĩru kũna ũndũ-inĩ o wothe mwega
Hebrews13:22 Ndamũthaitha
Hebrews13:23 Menyai atĩ Timotheo
Hebrews13:24 Geithiai aathani arĩa othe mamũtongoragia
Hebrews13:25 Wega wa Ngai ũrogĩa na inyuĩ inyuothe. Amen.
James1:1 NIĨ Jakubu
James1:2 Ariũ a Baba
James1:3 mũkĩmenyaga atĩ wĩtĩkio wanyu wagerio nĩũtũmaga mũkirĩrĩrie.
James1:4 No rĩrĩ
James1:5 Na rĩrĩ
James1:6 Ĩndĩ nĩahoe etĩkĩtie
James1:7 Mũndũ ũcio nĩagĩtige kwĩgereria atĩ nĩakaheo kĩndũ o na kĩrĩkũ nĩ Mwathani
James1:8 akĩrĩ mũndũ wa ngoro igĩrĩ ũtarĩ harĩa akindĩirie mĩthiĩre-inĩ yake yothe.
James1:9 Atĩrĩ
James1:10 nake ũrĩa mũtongu nĩerahage nĩ ũndũ nĩanyihĩtio: nĩ gũkorũo nĩarĩthira o ta kĩro kĩrĩa kĩa nyeki.
James1:11 Nĩ tondũ riũa rĩrathaga
James1:12 Gũkena-rĩ
James1:13 Mũndũ o wothe aagerio
James1:14 No rĩrĩ
James1:15 Namo merirĩria macio maagĩa ihu-rĩ
James1:16 Ariũ a Baba
James1:17 Ũheani o wothe wa maũndũ mega
James1:18 Nĩwe watũciarire na ũhoro-ũrĩa-wa-ma
James1:19 Ariũ a Baba
James1:20 nĩ gũkorũo kũrakara kwa mũndũ gũtiĩkithagia maũndũ ma ũthingu wa Ngai.
James1:21 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
James1:22 Ĩndĩ tuĩkai andũ a gwĩkaga ũhoro ũrĩa mũiguĩte
James1:23 Amu-rĩ
James1:24 nĩ gũkorũo ekwĩrora
James1:25 No mũndũ ũrĩa ũcũthagĩrĩria watho ũrĩa mwagĩrĩru kũna
James1:26 Mũndũ o wothe angĩĩtua mũndũ wa ndini na ndekwĩĩkĩra mũkwa kanua ohe rũrĩmĩ rũake
James1:27 Ũndini ũrĩa wonagwo nĩ Ngai
James2:1 ARIŨ a Baba

James2:4 githĩ mũtikoragwo mwĩ na ngũũrani thĩinĩ wanyu
James2:5 Ariũ a Baba
James2:6 Ĩndĩ inyuĩ nĩ kũmenereria mũmenagĩrĩria ũrĩa mũthĩni. Itonga-rĩ
James2:7 Ningĩ-rĩ
James2:8 Rĩu-rĩ
James2:9 Ĩndĩ mwakorũo mũtĩagĩra andũ maũthĩ-rĩ
James2:10 Nĩ ũndũ mũndũ o wothe angĩkorũo arũmagia watho wothe
James2:11 Amu ũrĩa woigire atĩ
James2:12 Aragiai
James2:13 Nĩ ũndũ mũndũ ũrĩa wagĩte kũiguanĩra tha
James2:14 Ariũ a Baba
James2:15 Mũrũ wa Ithe witũ kana mwarĩ wa Ithe witũ angĩkorũo arĩ njaga
James2:16 na ũmwe wanyu amere atĩrĩ
James2:17 Ũguo no taguo wĩtĩkio
James2:18 Ĩndĩ hihi mũndũ no kuuga atĩrĩ
James2:19 Wee-rĩ
James2:20 No rĩrĩ
James2:21 Githĩ Iburahimu ithe witũ ndaatuirũo mũthingu nĩ ũndũ wa ciĩko njega
James2:22 Ndũkuona atĩ wĩtĩkio nĩwarutire wĩra hamwe na ciĩko ciake
James2:23 Namo Maandĩko magĩkĩhingio marĩa moigĩte ũũ
James2:24 Nĩmũkuona atĩ mũndũ atuagwo mũthingu nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩka ciĩko njega

James3:1 ATĨRĨRĨ
James3:2 Nĩ ũndũ ithuothe nĩtũhĩngĩcagwo nĩ maũndũ maingĩ. Na rĩrĩ
James3:3 Rĩu-rĩ
James3:4 Ningĩ
James3:5 Ũguo no taguo rũrĩmĩ naruo nĩ kega kanini ka mwĩrĩ
James3:6 Naruo rũrĩmĩ nĩ mwaki: na thĩinĩ wa ciĩga ciitũ nĩruo ruohanĩtie thĩinĩ waruo mawaganu mothe ma thĩ
James3:7 Nĩ ũndũ nyamũ iria cia magũrũ mana
James3:8 ĩndĩ rũrĩmĩ-rĩ
James3:9 Nĩruo tũgathaga Mwathani o we Ithe witũ naruo
James3:10 nĩ kanua o ro kamwe koimaga kĩrathimo o na kĩrumi. Ariũ a Baba
James3:11 Kaĩ gĩthima kiumaga maĩ marĩa mega na marĩa marũrũ o itherũkĩro rĩmwe?
James3:12 Ningĩ
James3:13 Rĩu-rĩ
James3:14 No mũngĩkorũo mũrĩ na ũiru ngoro-inĩ cianyu wa gũtũma mũthũũrane
James3:15 Ũũgĩ ũcio tiguo ũikũrũkaga uumĩte Igũrũ
James3:16 Nĩ ũndũ harĩa harĩ ũiru na mĩamũkano
James3:17 Ĩndĩ ũũgĩ ũrĩa uumaga Igũrũ o mbere nĩ mũtheru
James3:18 Namo maciaro ma ũthingu nĩmo moimanaga na mahanda ma ũiguano marĩa mahandagwo nĩ arĩa ateithũrani.

James4:5 Kana hihi mũkwĩgereria atĩ Maandĩko maaragia mohoro ma tũhũ? Anga roho ũrĩa Ngai aatũmire ũtũũre thĩinĩ witũ nĩwĩriragĩria ũkĩiguaga ũiru?
