1Peter1:1 NĨ niĩ Petero
1Peter1:2 Nĩ gũthurũo mwathurirũo kũringana na ũrĩa Ngai Ithe witũ aamũmenyete o mbere
1Peter1:3 Atĩrĩrĩ
1Peter1:4 na nĩ getha tũgwate igai rĩrĩa rĩtangĩbutha
1Peter1:5 o inyuĩ mũtũire mũrangagĩrũo nĩ hinya wa Ngai
1Peter1:6 Na ũhoro ũcio nĩguo mũkenagĩra mũno
1Peter1:7 nĩ getha wĩtĩkio wanyu
1Peter1:8 Nake nĩwe mwendaga o na mũtarĩ mwamuona; ningĩ o na mũtamuonaga rĩu
1Peter1:9 mũgakĩĩgwatĩra ũndũ ũrĩa mũtanyaga kuona uumanĩte na wĩtĩkio wanyu
1Peter1:10 Naguo ũhonokio ũcio-rĩ
1Peter1:11 Magatuĩragia mũno
1Peter1:12 Nao nĩo maaguũrĩirio atĩrĩ
1Peter1:13 Tondũ ũcio
1Peter1:14 Tuĩkai ciana cia gwathĩka
1Peter1:15 Ĩndĩ kuona atĩ ũrĩa wamwĩtire nĩ mũtheru
1Peter1:16 nĩ ũndũ kwandĩkĩtwo atĩrĩ
1Peter1:17 Na rĩrĩ
1Peter1:18 Nĩ ũndũ nĩmũũĩ atĩ rĩrĩa mwakũũrirũo mũtigane na mĩtũũrĩre yanyu ya tũhũ ĩrĩa mwatigĩirũo nĩ maithe manyu
1Peter1:19 no nĩ thakame ya goro mũno
1Peter1:20 Nake nĩwe waathĩrĩirio o mbere
1Peter1:21 o inyuĩ mũtuĩkĩte a gwĩtĩkia Ngai na ũndũ wake
1Peter1:22 Kuona atĩ nĩmũtheretie mĩoyo yanyu nĩ gwathĩkĩra ũhoro-ũrĩa-wa-ma
1Peter1:23 nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa mũciarĩtwo rĩngĩ mũciarĩre ũrĩa ũtoimanĩte na mbeũ ĩrĩa ĩbuthaga
1Peter1:24 Tondũ rĩrĩ
1Peter1:25 No rĩrĩ
1Peter2:1 HAKĨRĨ ũguo-rĩ
1Peter2:2 na mũtuĩke o tũkenge
1Peter2:3 mũngĩkorũo nĩmũcamĩte mũkona atĩ Mwathani nĩ mũtugi.
1Peter2:4 Ũkani kũrĩ we
1Peter2:5 na inyuĩ-rĩ
1Peter2:6 Nĩ ũndũ thĩinĩ wa Maandĩko nĩharĩ ciugo ici
1Peter2:7 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo-rĩ
1Peter2:8 na ningĩ ũũ
1Peter2:9 No inyuĩ mũrĩ rũruka rũthurĩtwo
1Peter2:10 Kwĩ hingo mũtaarĩ rũrĩrĩ kũrĩ
1Peter2:11 Endwa akwa
1Peter2:12 na mũtũũre na mĩtũũrĩre mĩagĩrĩru
1Peter2:13 Athĩkagai tondũ wa Mwathani nĩ ũndũ o wothe mũtabarĩre nĩ andũ: o na wakorũo nĩ wa mũthamaki
1Peter2:14 O na kana watuĩka nĩ wa abarũthi
1Peter2:15 Tondũ ũrĩa Ngai endaga nĩ rĩrĩ
1Peter2:16 Ikaragai mũtarĩ ngombo
1Peter2:17 Tĩagai andũ othe. Endagai ariũ othe a Ithe witũ. Wĩtigagĩrei Ngai. Tĩagai mũthamaki.
1Peter2:18 Inyuĩ ndungata cia mũciĩ-rĩ
1Peter2:19 Amu ũndũ ũyũ nĩguo wĩ ngatho
1Peter2:20 Amu-rĩ
1Peter2:21 Tondũ ũguo nĩguo mwĩtĩirũo: nĩ gũkorũo Kristo o nake nĩanyarirĩkire ithenya rĩanyu
1Peter2:22 Nake ndaigana kwĩhia
1Peter2:23 nake rĩrĩa aarumagwo ndaigana kwĩrumĩra: na rĩrĩa aanyarirĩkaga
1Peter2:24 Nake nĩaakuuire mehia maitũ we mwene mwĩrĩ-inĩ wake e mũtĩ igũrũ
1Peter2:25 Nĩ gũkorũo nĩ gũturura mwatururaga ta mbũri; no rĩu mũrĩ acokereru ũrĩa Mũrĩithi na Mũrori wa mĩoyo yanyu.
1Peter3:1 ŨGUO no taguo
1Peter3:2 nĩ ũndũ wa kuonaga ũrĩa mũikaraga na mĩikarĩre ya ũthingu
1Peter3:3 Na kwĩgemia kwanyu nĩgũtige gũtuĩka o kwa mwĩrĩ
1Peter3:4 nĩ kaba mwĩgemie na mũndũ ũrĩa wa hitho wa ngoro thĩinĩ
1Peter3:5 Tondũ tene-rĩ
1Peter3:6 o ta ũrĩa Sara aaiguaga Iburahimu akĩmũtuaga mũmwathi; na inyuĩ rĩu mũrĩ ciana ciake
1Peter3:7 O ũguo taguo na inyuĩ athuri
1Peter3:8 Na ngũrĩkĩrĩria atĩrĩrĩ
1Peter3:9 Tigagai kwĩrĩhĩria ũũru na ũũru
1Peter3:10 Tondũ rĩrĩ
1Peter3:11 Ningĩ nĩethemagie ũũru-inĩ
1Peter3:12 Nĩ ũndũ maitho ma Mwathani merekeire na kũrĩ arĩa athingu
1Peter3:13 Na rĩrĩ
1Peter3:14 No gũkena-rĩ
1Peter3:15 no thĩinĩ
1Peter3:16 na mũikarage mwĩ na thamiri itegwĩcuka
1Peter3:17 Tondũ rĩrĩ
1Peter3:18 Tondũ Kristo nake nĩaanyarirĩkĩire mehia ihinda o rĩmwe
1Peter3:19 Agĩthiĩ e na muoyo ũcio wa roho
1Peter3:20 o marĩa maaremire tene
1Peter3:21 Naguo ũhoro ũcio nĩguo ngerekano ya ũrĩa na inyuĩ mũhonokagio rĩu nĩ ũhoro wa kũbatithio - na ti ũhoro wa kweheria o gĩko kĩa mwĩrĩ
1Peter3:22 Nake nĩaathiire Igũrũ
1Peter4:1 HAKĨRĨ ũguo-rĩ
1Peter4:2 Wĩthagathagei ũguo
1Peter4:3 Nĩ ũndũ mahinda marĩa mathirĩte mo nĩmaiganĩte ma gwĩkaga maũndũ marĩa mendagwo nĩ andũ a Ndũrĩrĩ iria itoĩ Ngai
1Peter4:4 Naho ha ũhoro wa maũndũ macio
1Peter4:5 Nao nĩmakaheana ũhoro wa maũndũ mao kwĩ ũrĩa wĩhaarĩirie gũtuĩra cira arĩa marĩ muoyo na arĩa makuĩte.
1Peter4:6 Na nĩkĩo gĩatũmire Ũhoro-ũrĩa-Mwega ũhunjĩrio o na andũ arĩa makuĩte
1Peter4:7 No atĩrĩrĩ
1Peter4:8 na gũkĩra maũndũ mothe
1Peter4:9 Ningĩ tuganagai inyuene mũtekũng’ong’ora:
1Peter4:10 o ta ũrĩa o mũndũ wanyu aheetwo kĩheo kiumanĩte na Wega wa Ngai-rĩ

1Peter4:13 no rĩrĩ

1Peter4:17 Tondũ rĩrĩ
1Peter4:18 Na ningĩ angĩkorũo mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu ekũhonoka na hinya-rĩ

1John3:4 Mũndũ o wothe wĩhagia
1John3:5 Na inyuĩ nĩmũũĩ atĩ we nĩonithanirio nĩ getha eheranĩrie mehia biũ; na thĩinĩ wake gũtirĩ na wĩhia.
1John3:6 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũtũire thĩinĩ wake ndehagia; ũrĩa wĩhagia ndarĩ aamuona
1John3:7 Twana twakwa
1John3:8 ũrĩa wĩhagia nĩ wa mũcukani
1John3:9 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũciarĩtwo nĩ Ngai ndehagia
1John3:10 Ciana cia Ngai nĩho imenyekagĩra
1John3:11 Amu ũhoro ũrĩa mwarutirie kũigua o kĩambĩrĩria nĩ ũyũ
1John3:12 na tũtigatuĩke ta Kaini ũrĩa warĩ wa ũrĩa mũũru
1John3:13 Ariũ a Awa
1John3:14 Ithuĩ nĩtũũĩ nĩtũrĩkĩtie gũkĩra
1John3:15 Mũndũ o wothe ũthũire mũrũ wa ithe nĩ mũũragani
1John3:16 Ũndũ ũrĩa ũtũmenyithĩtie wendani ũrĩa ũhaana nĩ ũyũ

1John3:20 o harĩa hothe ngoro ciitũ ingĩtũcuka; nĩ ũndũ Ngai nĩ mũnene kwĩ ngoro ciitũ

1John3:23 Narĩo rĩathani rĩake nĩ atĩrĩ

1John5:3 Amu kwenda Ngai nĩ atĩrĩ
1John5:4 Nĩ gũkorũo kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩciarĩtwo nĩ Ngai nĩgĩtoragia ũhoro wa gũkũ thĩ; naguo ũtoria ũrĩa ũtoretie ũhoro wa thĩ nĩ atĩrĩrĩ

1John5:12 Ũrĩa wĩ nake Mũriũ
1John5:13 Ndamwandĩkĩra maũndũ macio nĩ getha mũmenye mwĩ na muoyo wa tene na tene
1John5:14 Naguo ũhoro ũrĩa ũtũmaga tũhote kwerekera kũrĩ we tũũmĩrĩirie nĩ ũyũ
1John5:15 na ongorũo nĩtũũĩ atĩ twahoya ũndũ o ũrĩkũ no atũiguaga-rĩ
1John5:16 Mũndũ angĩona mũrũ wa ithe akĩĩhia rĩĩhia rĩtarĩ rĩa gĩkuũ
1John5:17 Ũndũ o wothe ũtarĩ wa ũthingu nĩ wĩhia; na kwĩ wĩhia ũtarĩ wa gĩkuũ.

1John5:19 Nĩtũũĩ ithuĩ tũrĩ a Ngai

Jude1:22 Andũ amwe nao
Jude1:23 na mũhonokie angĩ na kũmahuria moime mwaki-inĩ; angĩ nao mũmaiguĩre tha mwĩ na guoya
Jude1:24 Na rĩu-rĩ
Jude1:25 o we ũrĩ Ngai we wiki na Mũtũhonokia ũtũhonoketie na ũndũ wa Mwathani witũ Jesu Kristo
Revelation1:1 ŨYŨ nĩguo Ũguũria wa Jesu Kristo
Revelation1:2 ũrĩa nake wacokire kuumbũra Ũhoro ũcio wa Ngai
Revelation1:3 Gũkena-rĩ
Revelation1:4 Ũhoro ũyũ nĩ Johana watũmĩra makanitha marĩa mũgwanja me bũrũri wa Asia: Atĩrĩrĩ
Revelation1:5 na kũrĩ Jesu Kristo
Revelation1:6 na agĩtũtua kĩrĩndĩ kĩa mũthamaki
Revelation1:7 Atĩrĩrĩi
Revelation1:8 Nĩ niĩ Alifa o na Omega
Revelation1:9 Atĩrĩrĩ
Revelation1:10 Ngĩkorũo ndĩ thĩinĩ wa Roho mũthenya wa Mwathani
Revelation1:11 ũkiuga atĩrĩ
Revelation1:12 Ngĩkĩĩhũgũra nyone mũgambo ũcio wanjarĩria. Ndehũgũra
Revelation1:13 na mĩtĩ-inĩ ĩo ya kũhangĩrũo matawa gatagatĩ ngĩona kũrĩ wĩ ho ahaana ta mũrũ wa mũndũ
Revelation1:14 Na mũtwe wake na njuĩrĩ yake cierũhĩte ta guoya wa ng’ondu ũrĩa mwerũ cua
Revelation1:15 nacio nyarĩrĩ ciake ikahaana ta gĩcango kĩrĩa gĩthũe mũno
Revelation1:16 Ningĩ guoko gwake kwa ũrĩo nĩaagwete njata mũgwanja
Revelation1:17 Ndamuona
Revelation1:18 nĩ niĩ Ũrĩa-wĩ-muoyo; na nĩndakuĩte
Revelation1:19 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Revelation1:20 na ũhoro wa kĩriga kĩu kĩa njata mũgwanja
Revelation2:1 ANDĨKĨRA mũraika wa kanitha ũrĩa ũrĩ Efeso atĩrĩ: Ũguo nĩguo oiga ũrĩa ũgwete njata icio mũgwanja na guoko kwa ũrĩo
Revelation2:2 Nĩnjũĩ ciĩko ciaku
Revelation2:3 na ningĩ wĩ na ũkirĩrĩria
Revelation2:4 Ũndũ ngũgũcukĩra no atĩrĩ
Revelation2:5 No kĩririkane kũu uumĩte ũkagũa
Revelation2:6 No wĩ na ũndũ ũyũ mwega
Revelation2:7 Ũrĩa ũrĩ gũtũ
Revelation2:8 Nake mũraika wa kanitha ũrĩa ũrĩ Simurina mwandĩkĩre atĩrĩ: Ũguo nĩguo oiga ũrĩa wa mbere na nowe wa kũrigĩrĩria
Revelation2:9 Nĩnjũĩ mĩnyamaro yaku
Revelation2:10 Ndũkae gwĩtigĩra maũndũ marĩa ũkiriĩ gũthĩnio namo; nĩ atĩrĩrĩ
Revelation2:11 Ũrĩa ũrĩ gũtũ
Revelation2:12 Nake mũraika wa kanitha ũrĩa ũrĩ Perigamo mwandĩkĩre atĩrĩ: Ũguo nĩguo oiga ũcio wĩ na rũhiũ rũu rũũgĩ
Revelation2:13 Nĩnjũĩ kũu ũtũire
Revelation2:14 No rĩrĩ
Revelation2:15 Noguo o nawe wĩ na andũ amwe magwatĩte ũrutani wa arĩa metagwo Anikolai
Revelation2:16 Tondũ ũcio no kĩĩrire; waaga ũguo
Revelation2:17 Ũrĩa ũrĩ gũtũ
Revelation2:18 Nake mũraika wa kanitha ũrĩa ũrĩ Thuatira mwandĩkĩre atĩrĩ: Ũguo nĩguo oiga Mũrũ wa Ngai
Revelation2:19 Nĩnjũĩ ciĩko ciaku
Revelation2:20 Ũndũ ngũgũcukĩra no atĩrĩ
Revelation2:21 Nĩndamũheire ihinda rĩa kwĩrira
Revelation2:22 Atĩrĩ
Revelation2:23 Na nĩ kũũraga ngoraga ciana ciake na gĩkuũ; namo makanitha mothe makamenya nĩ niĩ mũtuĩria higo-inĩ o na ngoro-inĩ; na inyuĩ nĩngamũhe
Revelation2:24 Na inyuĩ-rĩ
Revelation2:25 No rĩrĩ
Revelation2:26 Nake ũrĩa wa gũtorania
Revelation2:27 nake nĩagaciriyĩraga na rũthanju rũa kĩgera
Revelation2:28 O na nĩngamũhe njata ĩrĩa ya rũcinĩ.
Revelation2:29 Ũrĩa ũrĩ gũtũ
Revelation3:1 NAKE mũraika wa kanitha ũrĩa ũrĩ Saride mwandĩkĩre atĩrĩ: Ũguo nĩguo oiga ũrĩa wĩ na Maroho marĩa mũgwanja ma Ngai
Revelation3:2 Arahũka
Revelation3:3 No kĩririkane ũrĩa waheirũo
Revelation3:4 No rĩrĩ
Revelation3:5 Ũrĩa wa gũtorania-rĩ
Revelation3:6 Ũrĩa ũrĩ gũtũ
Revelation3:7 Nake mũraika wa kanitha ũrĩa ũrĩ Filadelfia mwandĩkĩre atĩrĩ: Ũguo nĩguo oiga ũrĩa mũtheru
Revelation3:8 Nĩnjũĩ ciĩko ciaku. Atĩrĩrĩ
Revelation3:9 Atĩrĩ
Revelation3:10 Tondũ wee nĩũtũire ũmenyereire uuge ũrĩa wakwa wa ũkirĩrĩria-rĩ
Revelation3:11 Nĩngũũka o narua; gwatagĩria maũndũ marĩa wĩ namo
Revelation3:12 Ũrĩa wa gũtorania-rĩ
Revelation3:13 Ũrĩa ũrĩ gũtũ
Revelation3:14 Nake mũraika wa kanitha ũrĩa ũrĩ Laodikia mwandĩkĩre atĩrĩ: Ũguo nĩguo oiga we Amen
Revelation3:15 Nĩnjũĩ ciĩko ciaku
Revelation3:16 No tondũ ũkĩrĩ mũraru
Revelation3:17 Tondũ uugaga atĩrĩ

Revelation3:19 O arĩa othe nyenda
Revelation3:20 Atĩrĩrĩ

Revelation3:22 Ũrĩa ũrĩ gũtũ
Revelation4:1 THUTHA wa maũndũ macio ngĩcoka ngĩrora
Revelation4:2 O ro kahinda o kau ngĩkorũo ndĩ thĩinĩ wa Roho
Revelation4:3 nake ũcio waikaire ho
Revelation4:4 Ningĩ gũthiũrũrũka gĩtĩ kĩu gĩa ũthamaki kwarĩ itĩ cia ũnene mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na inya
Revelation4:5 Na gĩtĩ-inĩ kĩrĩa gĩa ũthamaki hakoimaga heni na mĩgambo na marurumĩ. Ningĩ mbere-inĩ ya gĩtĩ kĩu haarĩ na imũrĩ mũgwanja cia mwaki ciakanĩte
Revelation4:6 o na ningĩ kũu mbere-inĩ ya gĩtĩ kĩu hakagĩa ta iria inene rĩoni mũno
Revelation4:7 Nakĩo kĩũmbe kĩa mbere gĩatariĩ ta mũrũthi
Revelation4:8 Nacio ciũmbe icio inya ii muoyo ningĩ ii na mathagu
Revelation4:9 Nacio ciũmbe icio ii muoyo
Revelation4:10 hĩndĩ ĩo athuri arĩa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ana makegũithia harĩ we
Revelation4:11 Wee Mwathani witũ
Revelation5:1 NINGĨ guoko-inĩ kwa ũrĩo gwa ũcio waikarĩire gĩtĩ kĩu gĩa ũthamaki ngĩona mbuku yaandĩkĩtwo mwena wa thĩinĩ o na igũrũ
Revelation5:2 Ngĩcoka ngĩona mũraika wĩ hinya akĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene akoria atĩrĩ
Revelation5:3 Na gũkĩaga mũndũ Igũrũ
Revelation5:4 Na niĩ ngĩrĩra mũno
Revelation5:5 Nao athuri arĩa
Revelation5:6 Na harĩa gatagatĩ ga gĩtĩ gĩa ũthamaki
Revelation5:7 Nake ũcio Gatũrũme agĩthiĩ
Revelation5:8 Na aarĩkia kũiyũkia mbuku
Revelation5:9 Na hĩndĩ ĩo makĩina rũĩmbo rũerũ
Revelation5:10 ũkĩmatua kĩrĩndĩ gĩa gũthamakagĩrũo nĩ Ngai witũ na ũkĩmatua amũthĩnjagĩri; nao nĩo a gũthamakaga thĩ.
Revelation5:11 Ngĩcoka ngĩrora
Revelation5:12 makoigaga atĩrĩ na mũgambo mũnene
Revelation5:13 Na kĩndũ kĩũmbe o gĩothe
Revelation5:14 Nacio ciũmbe icio inya ii muoyo ikiuga
Revelation6:1 NA nĩndonire ũcio Gatũrũme aamethũra gatembe kamwe ga tũrĩa mũgwanja twa mũhũra
Revelation6:2 Ngĩrora
Revelation6:3 Na aamethũra gatembe ga kerĩ
Revelation6:4 Gũkiumĩra mbarathi ĩngĩ
Revelation6:5 Ningĩ aamethũra gatembe ga gatatũ
Revelation6:6 Ngĩigua ta mũgambo ũkuuma na gatagatĩ-inĩ ga ciũmbe icio inya ii muoyo
Revelation6:7 Ningĩ aamethũra gatembe ga kana
Revelation6:8 Ningĩ ngĩrora
Revelation6:9 Ningĩ aamethũra gatembe ga gatano
Revelation6:10 nao magĩkaya na mũgambo mũnene
Revelation6:11 Nao makĩheo o mũndũ nguo njerũ ndaya
Revelation6:12 Ningĩ ngĩona aamethũra gatembe ga gatandatũ
Revelation6:13 nacio njata cia igũrũ ikĩgũa thĩ
Revelation6:14 Igũrũ narĩo rĩgĩthengio o ta ibuku rĩa gĩkũnjo rĩgĩkũnjwo
Revelation6:15 Nao athamaki a thĩ
Revelation6:16 makeraga irĩma o na mahiga atĩrĩ
Revelation6:17 amu mũthenya nĩ mũkinyu ũrĩa mũnene wa marakara mao
Revelation7:1 THUTHA ũcio nĩndonire araika ana marũngiĩ ituri-inĩ iria inya cia thĩ
Revelation7:2 Ngĩcoka ngĩona mũraika ũngĩ aambatĩra irathĩro-inĩ rĩa riũa
Revelation7:3 akiuga atĩrĩ
Revelation7:4 Na nĩndaiguire mũigana wa acio mekĩrirũo rũũri
Revelation7:5 A mũhĩrĩga wa Juda arĩa mekĩrirũo rũũri nĩ ngiri ikũmi na igĩrĩ; Na a mũhĩrĩga wa Reubeni ngiri ikũmi na igĩrĩ; Na a mũhĩrĩga wa Gadi ngiri ikũmi na igĩrĩ;
Revelation7:6 Na a mũhĩrĩga wa Asheri ngiri ikũmi na igĩrĩ; Na a mũhĩrĩga wa Nafitali ngiri ikũmi na igĩrĩ; Na a mũhĩrĩga wa Manase ngiri ikũmi na igĩrĩ;
Revelation7:7 Na a mũhĩrĩga wa Simeoni ngiri ikũmi na igĩrĩ; Na a mũhĩrĩga wa Lawii ngiri ikũmi na igĩrĩ; Na a mũhĩrĩga wa Isakaru ngiri ikũmi na igĩrĩ;
Revelation7:8 Na a mũhĩrĩga wa Zebuluni ngiri ikũmi na igĩrĩ; Na a mũhĩrĩga wa Jusufu ngiri ikũmi na igĩrĩ; Na a mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini arĩa mekĩrirũo rũũri no ngiri ikũmi na igĩrĩ.
Revelation7:9 Thutha wa maũndũ macio ngĩrora
Revelation7:10 na nĩ kwanĩrĩra maanagĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene
Revelation7:11 Nao araika othe nĩmaarũngiĩ mathiũrũrũkĩirie gĩtĩ kĩu gĩa ũthamaki
Revelation7:12 makiuga
Revelation7:13 Nao athuri
Revelation7:14 Na niĩ ngĩmwĩra
Revelation7:15 Nĩkĩo rĩu maikaraga mbere-inĩ ya gĩtĩ gĩa ũthamaki kĩa Ngai; na nĩ kũmũtungatĩra mamũtungatagĩra mũthenya na ũtukũ thĩinĩ wa hekarũ yake; nake ũcio ũikarĩire gĩtĩ gĩa ũthamaki egũtũũra aarĩte hema yake igũrũ rĩao.
Revelation7:16 Nao matirĩ hingo magacoka kũhũta
Revelation7:17 nĩ gũkorũo Gatũrũme karĩa ge gĩtĩ-inĩ gĩa ũthamaki gatagatĩ egũtũũra arĩ o mũrĩithi wao
Revelation8:1 NINGĨ aamethũra gatembe ka mũhũra karĩa ka mũgwanja
Revelation8:2 Na ngĩona araika arĩa mũgwanja arĩa marũgamaga mbere ya Ngai; nao makĩnengerũo macoro mũgwanja.
Revelation8:3 Ningĩ mũraika ũngĩ agĩũka akĩrũgama kĩgongona-inĩ e na gacuuri ga thahabu ga gũcinĩra ũbumba; nake akĩnengerũo ũbumba mũingĩ
Revelation8:4 Nayo ndogo ya ũbumba ũcio
Revelation8:5 Nake mũraika agĩcoka akĩoya gacuuri kau
Revelation8:6 Nao araika arĩa mũgwanja maarĩ ma macoro marĩa mũgwanja makĩĩhaarĩria mamagambie.
Revelation8:7 Ũrĩa wa mbere akĩgambia
Revelation8:8 Mũraika wa kerĩ nake akĩgambia
Revelation8:9 nacio nyamũ iria ciarĩ thĩinĩ wa iria
Revelation8:10 Mũraika wa gatatũ nake akĩgambia
Revelation8:11 narĩo rĩĩtwa rĩa njata ĩo nĩ Kũrũra; namo maĩ gĩcunjĩ gĩa ithatũ magĩtuĩka ũrũrũ; andũ magĩgĩkua aingĩ nĩ ũndũ wa maĩ macio
Revelation8:12 Mũraika wa kana nake akĩgambia coro
Revelation8:13 Ningĩ ngĩrora
Revelation9:1 NAKE mũraika wa gatano akĩgambia coro
Revelation9:2 Nake akĩhingũra irima rĩu rĩtarĩ gĩturi
Revelation9:3 Na thĩinĩ wa ndogo ĩo gũkiuma ngigĩ
Revelation9:4 Nacio ikĩĩrũo itikehie nyeki ya thĩ
Revelation9:5 Ikĩheo watho atĩ acio itikamorage
Revelation9:6 Na matukũ macio andũ magacaragia gĩkuũ
Revelation9:7 Na ũrĩa ngigĩ icio ciahianaga
Revelation9:8 Ningĩ ciarĩ na ngore ta njuĩrĩ cia andũ-a-nja
Revelation9:9 O na ciarĩ na mĩrĩnga ya kũgitĩra ngoro
Revelation9:10 Na ii na ithita ta tũng’aurũ
Revelation9:11 Ĩĩ na mũthamaki ũciathaga
Revelation9:12 Haaro ya mbere nĩyathira; gũtigaire haaro igĩrĩ igũũka thutha ũcio.
Revelation9:13 Mũraika wa gatandatũ nake akĩgambia coro
Revelation9:14 ũkĩĩra mũraika ũcio wa gatandatũ
Revelation9:15 Nao araika acio ana makĩohorũo
Revelation9:16 Nacio ita cia arũi arĩa maahaicĩte mbarathi-rĩ
Revelation9:17 Na nĩ ũguo ndonire mbarathi itariĩ
Revelation9:18 Gĩcunjĩ gĩa ithatũ kĩa andũ gĩkĩũragwo nĩ matũhũhũ macio matatũ
Revelation9:19 Amu hinya wa mbarathi icio wĩ tũnua twacio o na thĩinĩ wa icuthĩ ciacio
Revelation9:20 Nao andũ arĩa maatigarire
Revelation9:21 o na ningĩ matiigana kwĩrira nĩ ũndũ wa ũũragani wao
Revelation10:1 NGĨCOKA ngĩona mũraika ũngĩ wĩ hinya agĩikũrũka akiuma Igũrũ
Revelation10:2 guoko aarĩ na kabuku kanini kahingũre. Nake kũgũrũ gwake kwa ũrĩo agĩkinya iria rĩrĩa inene nakuo
Revelation10:3 akĩgũtũka na mũgambo mũnene
Revelation10:4 Na hĩndĩ ĩo ngwa icio mũgwanja ciaaria
Revelation10:5 Nake mũraika ũcio ndonire arũngiĩ akinyĩte iria na agakinya thĩ akĩoya guoko kwa ũrĩo akĩroria igũrũ
Revelation10:6 akĩĩhĩta na ũrĩa ũtũũraga muoyo tene o na tene
Revelation10:7 ĩndĩ matukũ-inĩ marĩa ma mũgambo wa mũraika ũrĩa wa mũgwanja
Revelation10:8 Naguo mũgambo ũcio ndaiguire woima Igũrũ
Revelation10:9 Ngĩgĩthiĩ na kũrĩ mũraika ũcio ngĩmwĩra a’nengere kabuku kau. Nake akĩnjĩra atĩrĩ
Revelation10:10 Na niĩ ngĩiyũkia kabuku kau guoko-inĩ kwa mũraika
Revelation10:11 Ngĩcoka ngĩĩrũo atĩrĩ
Revelation11:1 NGĨCOKA ngĩnengerũo mũrangi wa gũthima ũhaana ta rũthanju
Revelation11:2 Narĩo itheri rĩrĩa rĩĩ nja ya hekarũ
Revelation11:3 Na niĩ nĩngetĩkĩria aira arĩa akwa erĩ marathage ũhoro matukũ ngiri ĩmwe na magana merĩ ma mĩrongo ĩtandatũ
Revelation11:4 Acio no-o mĩtamaiyũ ĩrĩa ĩĩrĩ o na mĩtĩ ĩrĩa ĩĩrĩ ya kũhangĩrũo matawa
Revelation11:5 Na mũndũ o ũrĩkũ enda kũmeka ũũru
Revelation11:6 O me na ũhoti mahote kũhinga igũrũ
Revelation11:7 Na rĩrĩa magakorũo marĩkĩtie kũheana ũira wao
Revelation11:8 Nacio ciimba ciao igaikara hau kĩng’aratua-inĩ kĩrĩa kĩrĩ itũũra rĩrĩa inene
Revelation11:9 Na kĩrĩndĩ kiumĩte iruka-inĩ ciothe na mĩhĩrĩga-inĩ yothe na mĩario-inĩ yothe na ndũrĩrĩ-inĩ ciothe gĩkeroragĩra ciimba icio ciao mĩthenya ĩtatũ na nuthu
Revelation11:10 Na andũ arĩa atũũri gũkũ thĩ nĩ kũmarũhĩria makamarũhĩria na magĩe na gĩkeno
Revelation11:11 Na mĩthenya ĩo ĩtatũ na nuthu yathira
Revelation11:12 Magĩcoka makĩigua mũgambo mũnene woima Igũrũ wamera atĩrĩ
Revelation11:13 Na thaa o ĩo gũkĩgĩa gĩthingithia kĩnene gĩa thĩ
Revelation11:14 Haaro ya kerĩ nĩyathira; haaro ĩrĩa ya gatatũ nayo igũũka o narua.
Revelation11:15 Mũraika ũrĩa wa mũgwanja nake akĩgambia coro; gũgĩcoka gũkĩgĩa mĩgambo mĩnene Igũrũ
Revelation11:16 Nao athuri arĩa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ana
Revelation11:17 makiuga
Revelation11:18 Ndũrĩrĩ nacio nĩciabucunire
Revelation11:19 Nayo hekarũ ya Ngai ĩkĩhingũrũo
Revelation12:1 NINGĨ gũkĩoneka ũrirũ mũnene Igũrũ; na nĩ mũndũ-wa-nja wĩhumbĩte riũa
Revelation12:2 na aarĩ na ihu
Revelation12:3 Na gũgĩcoka gũkĩoneka ũrirũ ũngĩ igũrũ
Revelation12:4 Nakĩo gĩthita kĩayo gĩakururĩtie njata cia igũrũ gĩcunjĩ gĩa ithatũ
Revelation12:5 Nake agĩciara mwana wa kahĩĩ
Revelation12:6 Nake mũndũ-wa-nja akĩũra agĩthiĩ werũ-inĩ kũndũ athondekeirũo handũ nĩ Ngai
Revelation12:7 Na rĩrĩ
Revelation12:8 na matiigana kwĩhootanĩra
Revelation12:9 Nayo ndamathia ĩo nene ĩkĩharũrũkio
Revelation12:10 Na nĩndaiguire mũgambo mũnene Igũrũ
Revelation12:11 Nao nĩmamũtoretie nĩ ũndũ wa thakame ya Gatũrũme
Revelation12:12 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Revelation12:13 Nayo ndamathia yakĩona atĩ nĩĩharũrũkĩtio o thĩ
Revelation12:14 Nake mũndũ-wa-nja akĩheo mathagu merĩ ma nderi ĩrĩa nene
Revelation12:15 Nayo nyamũ-ya-thĩ ĩkĩborora maĩ na kanua kayo o ta rũũĩ ĩkinyĩrie mũndũ-wa-nja ũcio

Revelation22:18 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũkũigua ciugo cia ũrathi ũyũ ũrĩ mbuku ĩno-rĩ
Revelation22:19 na mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ angĩgathengia ũndũ thĩinĩ wa ciugo cia mbuku ĩno ya ũrathi ũyũ
Revelation22:20 Mũheani ũira wa maũndũ macio ekuuga
